Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: loaded-breakfast-hashbrown-waffles-recipe
Ingredients: ['Nonstick cooking spray', '1 (20 oz.) bag frozen shredded hash browns, thawed and squeezed very dry', '8 large eggs, divided', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. onion powder', '1/2 tsp. black pepper', '8 slices bacon', '2 Tbsp. butter', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese', '2 green onions, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Hot Honey Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat a waffle maker and lightly coat it with nonstick cooking spray. In a large bowl, mix the hash browns, 2 eggs, garlic powder, onion powder, and black pepper until combined.
', '
Divide the hash brown mixture into 4 portions and cook in the waffle maker until deeply golden and crisp, about 6–8 minutes per waffle depending on your machine.
', '
While the waffles cook, cook the bacon in a skillet until crisp. Transfer to a cutting board and roughly chop.
', '
In the same skillet, whisk the remaining 6 eggs. Melt the butter over medium-low heat, add the eggs, and scramble gently. When almost set, fold in the cheddar cheese and cook until creamy and melted.
', '
Place a hash brown waffle on each plate and top with cheesy scrambled eggs and chopped bacon. Finish with green onions and a drizzle of\xa0Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp  Hot Honey Sauce.
\xa0
Find more breakfast and brunch recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: frozen-hot-pot-meal-prep-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups Napa cabbage, chopped ', '4 baby bok choy, halved', '4 oz. enoki mushrooms', '1 lb. thinly sliced beef (hot pot style slices)', '8 oz. firm tofu, cubed', '4 cups chicken or vegetable broth, divided']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
Divide Napa cabbage, baby bok choy, and tofu evenly into four freezer-safe glass containers.
', '
Wrap small bundles of enoki mushrooms with the thinly sliced beef to create beef rolls and place them on top of the vegetables.
', '
In a small bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Spoon the sauce mixture into each container. Leave headspace, cover, and freeze.
', '
To cook, run the outside of the container briefly under warm water just until the frozen contents loosen. Invert the frozen hot pot pack directly into a pot of 1 cup boiling broth.
', '
Simmer 6–8 minutes until the beef rolls are cooked and vegetables are tender. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce on the side for dipping.
\xa0
Get more hot pot recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: buffalo-chicken-rangoons-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup shredded rotisserie chicken', '4 oz. cream cheese, softened', '½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '16 wonton wrappers', '1 large egg, beaten', '2 cups vegetable oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. buffalo sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Pull the meat from a rotisserie chicken and finely shred until you have about 1 cup of shredded chicken. In a bowl, combine shredded chicken, cream cheese, buffalo sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and mozzarella cheese. Mix until smooth and well combined.
', '
Place a spoonful of filling in the center of each wonton wrapper. Brush the edges with beaten egg, fold into a triangle or pouch, and press firmly to seal.
', '
Heat vegetable oil in a skillet or pot to 350°F. Fry the rangoon in batches for 2–3 minutes until golden and crispy. Transfer to a paper towel–lined plate.
', '
In a small bowl, stir together ranch dressing and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chiu Chow Style\xa0Chili Crisp Oil until combined.
', '
Serve the buffalo chicken rangoon hot with the chili crisp ranch dipping sauce.
\xa0
Get more Asian fusion\xa0appetizer recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: lomo-saltado-burrito-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sirloin steak, thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 red onion, sliced', '1 tomato, sliced into wedges', '1 cup frozen French fries, cooked', '1 cup cooked white rice', '4 large flour tortillas']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Cilantro Lime Flavored Sriracha Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, toss the sliced steak with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and black pepper. Let marinate 10 minutes.
', '
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add steak and cook quickly until browned, about 2–3 minutes.
', '
Add sliced onion and tomatoes and stir-fry 2–3 minutes until slightly softened but still vibrant. Pour the remaining marinade in and cook for 2-3 minutes until the sauce thickens.
', '
Warm tortillas. Divide rice, steak mixture, and cooked fries among the tortillas.
', '
Roll into burritos and toast in a large skillet over medium heat\xa02-3 minutes or until both sides are evenly toasted. Drizzle generously with Lee Kum Kee Cilantro Lime Flavored Sriracha Sauce\xa0before serving.
\xa0
Find more 30-minute dinner ideas for inspiration on our recipes page!
']

Name: ebi-katsu-curry-sando-shrimp-katsu-recipe
Ingredients: ['12-16 large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '¼ cup all-purpose flour, for dredging ', '2 large eggs', '1 tsp. vegetable oil', '1 cup panko breadcrumbs', '2 cups vegetable oil, for frying', '8 slices milk bread', '1 cup green cabbage, finely shredded']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '¼ cup all-purpose flour', '1½ Tbsp. curry powder', '1 cup chicken broth', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Roughly chop half of the shrimp and finely mince the remaining shrimp until paste-like. Combine with salt and black pepper and mix until slightly sticky. Divide into 4 flat patties about the size of the bread and chill 10–15 minutes to firm.
', '
Dredge each shrimp patty in flour. Beat eggs with 1 tsp vegetable oil, dip the patties into the egg, then coat thoroughly with panko while maintaining the patty shape.
', '
Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat and fry the shrimp patties 3–4 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy. Transfer to a rack.
', '
Melt butter in a small pan over medium heat. Whisk in flour and cook for 3–4 minutes until golden. Stir in curry powder, then whisk in chicken broth, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Simmer until thickened, about 7–8 minutes.
', '
Spread Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo\xa0on the bread slices. Layer shredded cabbage and a shrimp katsu patty onto four slices, spoon over the curry oyster sauce, then top with the remaining bread and slice in half.
\xa0
Find more Japanese inspired recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: creamy-mapo-tofu-udon-recipe
Ingredients: ['12 oz. frozen udon noodles', '1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '12 oz. ground pork', '2 stalks green onions, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['-- FOR THE MAPO PORK MIXTURE -- ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan)', '2 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Shaoxing cooking wine', '1 tsp. sugar', '½ tsp. Sichuan peppercorn powder', '-- FOR GARNISH -- ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['12 oz. silken tofu', '1 Tbsp. peanut butter', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '½ cup unsweetened soy milk']
Procedure:
['
Cook udon noodles according to package instructions. Drain well and divide into serving bowls.
', '
Heat neutral oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground pork and cook 3–4 minutes until browned and most of the liquid evaporates. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce and cook 30 seconds.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce, Shaoxing wine, sugar, and Sichuan peppercorn powder. Stir-fry 2–3 minutes until the pork is glossy and well seasoned.
', '
In a blender, combine silken tofu, peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder, and soy milk. Blend until completely smooth and creamy.
', '
Spoon the seasoned pork over the udon, pour the creamy tofu sauce generously over the noodles, then garnish with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and sliced green onions before serving.
\xa0
Find more 30 minute Asian fusion dinners on our recipes page!
']

Name: spicy-yuzu-tamago-sando-recipe
Ingredients: ['Water, for boiling', '6 large eggs', 'Ice water bath, for cooling the eggs', '8 slices milk bread (shokupan or soft white bread)', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, softened', 'Chives, chopped, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Yuzu Flavored Sriracha Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Bring a saucepan of water to a boil. Gently add eggs and cook for 7 minutes for jammy centers. Transfer to ice water to cool, then peel.
\xa0
Pro Tip: To ensure even and thorough cooking, eggs should be at room temperature before adding to boiling wtaer.
', '
Set aside 2 eggs whole. Roughly chop the remaining 4 eggs and place in a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, sugar, and salt. Mash lightly to form a creamy egg salad.
', '
Lightly butter the bread slices. Spread a thick layer of the egg salad onto four slices of bread. Slice the reserved jammy eggs in half and tuck them cut-side down into the center of the egg salad so the yolks will show when cut.
', '
Spoon a little more egg salad around the eggs to secure them, then top with the remaining bread slices and gently press. Trim crusts.
', '
Slice each sandwich in half to reveal the jammy egg center, drizzle lightly with Lee Kum Kee Yuzu Flavored Sriracha Sauce,\xa0and garnish with chives.\xa0
\xa0
Find more spicy Yuzu recipes on our product page for Yuzu Sriracha!
']

Name: spicy-creamy-pasta-recipe-with-rose-pasta-sauce
Ingredients: ['12 oz. Casarecce, Cascatelli, or Radiatori pasta (or pasta of choice)', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. boneless skinless chicken breast, cut into bite-size pieces', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. shallot, minced', '1 cup marinara sauce', '¾ cup heavy cream', '1 cup mozzarella cheese, shredded', '½ cup Parmesan cheese, grated', '2 Tbsp. fresh parsley, finely chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook pasta in salted boiling water according to package directions until al dente. Reserve ½ cup pasta water, then drain and set aside.
', '
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken, salt, and black pepper and cook until golden and cooked through, about 5–6 minutes.
', '
Stir in shallot, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant. Add marinara sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, stirring to combine.
', '
Pour in heavy cream and bring to a gentle simmer. Add mozzarella and Parmesan, stirring until melted and creamy. Toss in the cooked pasta and a splash of reserved pasta water if needed to loosen the sauce.
', '
Serve warm and garnish with chopped parsley and additional Parmesan if desired.
\xa0
Find more easy 30 minute meals on our recipes page!
']

Name: chili-crisp-sourdough-recipe-with-cheddar-and-scallions
Ingredients: ['1 cup active sourdough starter', ' 1 ¼ cups warm water', ' 3 ½ cups bread flour', ' 1 ½ tsp. salt', ' 1 cup sharp cheddar cheese, shredded', ' 3 stalks scallions, thinly sliced', ' 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, softened']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original, 2 for mixing and 1 for garnish']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, stir together sourdough starter and warm water. Add bread flour and salt and mix until a shaggy dough forms. Cover and let rest 30 minutes.
\xa0
See the recipe intro for tips if you are making your own sourdough starter prior to making this sourdough recipe.
', '
Knead or stretch and fold the dough until smoother. Cover and let rise at room temperature 3–4 hours until slightly puffy. This is your bulk fermentation. 
\xa0
After 3-4 hours, fold in shredded cheddar, scallions, and 2 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original until well combined. Cover and refrigerate overnight, 12-18 hours.
', '
The next day, remove dough from the refrigerator and let sit at room temperature for about 45–60 minutes. Shape into a round loaf and place on parchment while the oven preheats to 425°F.
', '
Score the top of the dough and bake 30–35 minutes until the loaf is golden brown with a crisp crust.
', '
Let the sourdough cool slightly, then slice and spread with softened butter. Drizzle with the remaining Lee Kum Kee Chii Crisp Original before serving.
\xa0
Find more recipes using Chili Crisp on our product page to get more ideas!
']

Name: tuna-melt-recipe-with-korean-spicy-tuna
Ingredients: ['2 (5 oz.) cans spicy tuna, drained', '2 Tbsp. green onions, finely sliced (about 1 stalk)', '½ cup shredded cheddar cheese', '2 Tbsp. butter, softened', '8 slices sourdough bread']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix spicy tuna with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, green onions, and cheddar cheese until creamy and well combined.
', '
Spread butter on one side of each slice of sourdough bread. Place four slices butter-side down on a work surface.
', '
Divide the tuna mixture evenly onto the bread and top with the remaining slices, butter-side up.
', '
Heat a skillet over medium heat and cook the sandwiches 3–4 minutes per side until the bread is golden brown and the filling is hot and melty.
', '
Slice in half and serve warm. Enjoy, and check out more\xa0Asian inspired\xa0recipes in under 30 minutes on our recipes page!
']

Name: dumpling-lasagna-recipe-with-kimchi-and-pork
Ingredients: ['12 oz. ground pork', '2 Tbsp. finely chopped kimchi, plus extra for garnish', '2 Tbsp. green onions, finely chopped', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '16 round dumpling wrappers', '½ cup water', '1 tsp. toasted sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine ground pork, chopped kimchi, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, green onions, and black pepper. Mix until evenly combined.
', '
Spoon a layer of the pork mixture into the bottom of small ramekins. Top with a dumpling wrapper, then another layer of pork mixture.
', '
Pour about 2 Tbsp water into each ramekin so the dumpling wrapper can steam properly. Press another dumpling wrapper on top to finish the layered “lasagna.”
', '
Place the ramekins into a pot with water halfway up the sides. Cover and steam for 12–15 minutes until the pork is fully cooked and the dumpling layers are tender.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and garnish with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and top with more kimchi before serving.
\xa0
Find more easy dumpling and noodles recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: pancit-noodles-recipe-by-chef-tiana-gee
Ingredients: ['8 oz. rice noodles (or bihon), soaked and drained', '1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '2 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 small onion, sliced', '1/2 lb. chicken breast, sliced', '1 cup cabbage, shredded', '1/2 cup carrots, julienned', '1/2 cup snap peas or green beans', '1 1/2 cups chicken broth', '1 large egg per serving (about 3-4 eggs) ', 'Green onions, for garnish ', 'lemon wedges, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', 'Salt and Black pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original per egg you are frying (3-4 total)']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in a large pan or wok over medium heat. Sauté Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and onions until fragrant.
', '
Add chicken and cook through, about 4-5 minutes, while ensuring each piece gets nice color. Stir in vegetables (carrots, cabbage, and snap peas or green beans) and cook for 1-2 minutes until tender.
', '
Add the soaked rice noodles and broth into the pan and toss gently to combine. Season with Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Premium Oyster Sauce, and Premium Dark Soy Sauce, continuing to toss until the noodles absorb the seasoning and are tender.
', '
Season with salt and black pepper to taste, then remove from the heat. During this time, you can fry eggs in a small pan with a tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original per egg.\xa0
', "
Add noodles to bowls for serving, and garnish each bowl with green onions. Serve with lemon wedges and a chili crisp fried egg on top.
\xa0
Enjoy, and don't forget to check out our recipes page for more dinner ideas!
"]

Name: southern-style-fried-chicken-recipe-with-chili-crisp
Ingredients: ['2 lb bone-in chicken thighs and drumsticks', '1½ cups all-purpose flour', '½ cup cornstarch', '1 tsp. baking powder', 'neutral oil, for frying', 'chopped green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 (7 oz.) jar Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. paprika', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '1 cup buttermilk']
Procedure:
['
Season the chicken evenly with salt, black pepper, paprika, and garlic powder, then pour the buttermilk over the chicken and toss to coat. Let sit at room temperature for 15 minutes while you prepare the coating.
', '
In a shallow bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, and baking powder. Remove the chicken from the buttermilk, letting excess drip off, and dredge thoroughly in the flour mixture, pressing to create a craggy coating.
', '
Heat 2 inches of neutral oil in a heavy skillet or Dutch oven to 350°F. Fry the chicken in batches, turning occasionally, for 16–20 minutes until deeply golden, crisp, and cooked through (internal temp 165°F). Transfer to a rack to drain briefly.
', '
While the chicken is hot, spoon Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original\xa0generously over each piece, using the back of the spoon to fully coat the crust so the chili crisp clings to every surface. 
Garnish with green onion and served with steamed rice and cucumber salad. Get a recipe for our spicy spiral cucumber salad recipe at the bolded link!
']

Name: slow-cooker-chorizo-queso-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chorizo, casing removed', '1 small white onion, diced', '4 cups shredded Oaxaca or Monterey Jack cheese', '1 (12 oz.) can evaporated milk', '1 (4 oz.) can diced green chiles', '½ cup crumbled queso fresco, for topping', '2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro, for topping ', 'Tortilla chips, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook the chorizo in a skillet until browned, then stir in the diced onion and cook until softened.
', '
Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and remove from heat.
', '
Add the cooked chorizo mixture to a slow cooker, then add shredded cheese, evaporated milk, and diced green chiles.
', '
Cover and cook on LOW for 1.5–2 hours, stirring occasionally until smooth and fully melted.
', '
Keep on WARM and top with queso fresco and cilantro before serving with tortilla chips.
\xa0
Find more spicy Asian fusion recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: hot-honey-loaded-fries-recipe-three-ways
Ingredients: ['-- Breakfast: Bacon Egg & Cheese Fries -- ', '8 oz. frozen French fries', '3 eggs', '1 Tbsp. butter', '1/4 cup shredded cheddar', '1/4 cup cooked bacon, chopped', '1 stalk green onion, thinly sliced', '-- Lunch: Spicy Chicken Chipotle Fries -- ', '8 oz. frozen French Fries', '8 oz. cooked shredded chicken', '2 Tbsp. mayonnaise', '2 Tbsp. adobo sauce (from a can of chipotles)', '1 Tbsp. cilantro, freshly chopped', '-- Dinner: Short Rib Gravy Fries --', '8 oz. frozen French Fries', '4 oz. cooked braised short rib or pot roast', '1 cup brown gravy', '1 cup cheese curds', '1 Tbsp. parsley, freshly chopped']
Seasoning: ["2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Hot Honey, for each version you're making"]
Procedure:
['
For each version of the recipe, start by cooking the frozen fries according to package instructions, either in an oven or an air fryer.
', '
For the Bacon Egg & Cheese Fries:

Add butter to a small frying pan on medium heat. Once the butter is foamy and melted, add the eggs and scramble to your liking.
Place fries on a serving plate or board, and top with eggs, crumbled pre-cooked bacon, and shredded cheddar cheese.
Garnish with Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Hot Honey and chopped green onions.

', '
For the Spicy Chipotle Chicken Fries:

Warm chicken through to your liking (ie. in a frying pan or microwave) until temperature reaches 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine mayo with adobo sauce and a tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Hot Honey. Stir the shredded chicken through this mix.
Place fries on a board or serving plate and top with the chicken mixture. Garnish with more Chili Crisp Hot Honey and chopped cilantro.

', '
For the Short Rib Gravy Fries:

Heat short rib (or pot roast) and gravy in separate small saucepans or pots. Internal temperature of each should reach 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Place fries on a serving plate or board. Top with the short rib/pot roast, pour gravy on top, then scatter cheese curds on top.
Garnish with Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Hot Honey and chopped parsley.

']

Name: scallion-pancake-quesadillas-recipe-with-enoki-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '4 frozen scallion pancakes', '1 cup enoki mushrooms, trimmed and separated', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 1/2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add the oil. Place the frozen scallion pancakes directly into the skillet and pan-fry until golden and crisp on both sides, about 2–3 minutes per side. Remove from the pan and set aside.
', '
In the same skillet, add enoki mushrooms and cook for 2–3 minutes until lightly golden. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, then sauté 30–60 seconds more until fragrant. Remove from heat.
', '
Return one crispy scallion pancake to the skillet. Sprinkle evenly with mozzarella, top with sautéed enoki mushrooms, then place a second pancake on top.
', '
Cook over medium-low heat until the bottom pancake is deeply golden and the cheese begins to melt, then carefully flip and cook the other side until crisp and fully melted inside.
', '
Slice into wedges and serve warm with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping.
\xa0
Get more speedy dinner recipes under 30 minutes on our recipes page!
']

Name: peruvian-style-chicken-and-rice-bowl-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 boneless, skinless chicken thighs (~16 oz.)', '2 cups cooked rice', '2 sprigs fresh chopped cilantro, for garnish', '4 lime wedges, for garnish']
Marinade: [' 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', ' 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', ' 1 Tbsp. olive oil', ' 1 tsp. paprika', ' 1 tsp. cumin powder', ' 1 tsp. garlic powder', ' 1 Tbsp. red wine vinegar', ' 1 Tbsp. aji amarillo pepper paste']
Sauce Mix: ['-- For the Aji Verde Sauce -- ', ' 1 cup cilantro', ' 1 Tbsp. huacatay (black mint) paste or ¼ cup fresh mint leaves', ' 1 Tbsp. aji amarillo pepper paste (or substitute 1 jalapeño + 1 serrano chili, chopped)', ' 2 cloves garlic', ' ½ cup mayonnaise', ' 2 Tbsp. lime juice', ' 2 Tbsp. queso fresco', ' Salt & pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, stir together Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, olive oil, paprika, cumin powder, garlic powder, red wine vinegar, and aji amarillo paste. Add chicken thighs and coat evenly; marinate for at least 15 minutes.
', '
In a blender, combine cilantro, huacatay paste (or fresh mint), aji amarillo paste (or jalapeño and serrano), garlic, mayonnaise, lime juice, queso fresco, salt, and pepper. Blend until smooth and vibrant; refrigerate until ready to use.
If substituting fresh mint for huacatay, use 1/4 cup mint instead of 1 tablespoon.
If substituting fresh chilies for aji amarillo paste, use 1 jalapeno and 1 serrano chili instead of 1 tablespoon.
', '
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the marinated chicken until well-charred, caramelized, and cooked through. Rest briefly, then slice.
', '
Divide cooked rice between bowls and top with sliced chicken.\xa0Spoon aji verde generously over the chicken and rice. Finish with chopped cilantro and serve with lime wedges.
\xa0
Find more chicken dinner recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: shrimp-fried-rice-recipe-with-yuzu-sriracha
Ingredients: ['1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '2 Tbsp. neutral oil, divided', '3 cups cooked cold jasmine rice', '2 large eggs, beaten', '½ cup frozen peas', '½ cup frozen finely diced carrot', '2 green onions, thinly sliced', 'Lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Yuzu Flavored Sriracha Sauce, divided', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Toss the shrimp with 1 Tbsp.\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Yuzu Sriracha\xa0Flavored Sauce\xa0until evenly coated and set aside while you heat a large skillet or flat-top pan over high heat.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. neutral oil to the hot pan and sear the shrimp in a single layer, cooking 1–2 minutes per side until just cooked through and lightly caramelized. Remove shrimp from the pan and set aside.
', '
Add remaining oil to the same pan, then add the rice and spread it out. Let it cook undisturbed for 1–2 minutes to get lightly toasted, then stir and push to one side. Pour in the beaten eggs, scramble quickly, then fold into the rice.
', '
Add peas, carrots, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, tossing everything together until evenly mixed and heated through. Return the shrimp to the pan and gently fold in.
', '
Transfer to a serving bowl, drizzle with remaining Lee Kum Kee Yuzu Flavored Sriracha Sauce, garnish with green onions, and serve hot with lime wedges for squeezing over the top.
\xa0
Looking for more recipes with Yuzu Sriracha? Check out our recipes page for more ideas!
']

Name: filipino-style-tocino-breakfast-sliders-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. thin-sliced pork shoulder', '12 Hawaiian rolls', '4 eggs, scrambled', '6 slices cheddar cheese', '2 Tbsp. melted butter', '2 tsp. Everything bagel seasoning']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. pineapple juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '½ tsp. annatto powder (or annatto oil)']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, pineapple juice, and annatto; toss pork in the mixture and marinate at least 1 hour (overnight is best).
', '
Cook the marinated pork in a skillet over medium heat until caramelized, glossy, and lightly sticky.
', '
Mix\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo and\xa0Chiu Chow\xa0Style\xa0Chili Crisp Oil to make a chili crisp spicy mayo.
', '
Slice the Hawaiian rolls in half (keeping them connected), spread chili-crisp spicy mayo, and layer scrambled eggs, tocino, and cheddar cheese; place the top buns back on.
', '
Brush with melted butter, sprinkle everything bagel seasoning, and bake at 350°F for 10–12 minutes until golden and melty.
\xa0
Find more\xa0Asian fusion\xa0breakfast recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: kung-pao-fried-chicken-sandwich-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 chicken thighs (boneless, skinless)', '1 cup flour', '1 cup cornstarch', 'Vegetable oil (for frying)', '½ cup shredded cabbage ', '½ cup shredded carrots', '2 green onions, sliced', '2 Tbsp. mayonnaise', '2 sesame buns, toasted', '½ cup roasted red peppers']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Marinade: ['1 cup buttermilk', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. paprika']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned rice vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar']
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken thighs in buttermilk, salt, and paprika for 15 minutes.
', '
Mix flour and cornstarch; dredge chicken and fry in hot oil (350°F) until crispy and golden.
', '
Simmer Lee Kum Kee\xa0Honey Sriracha, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and brown sugar to create a thick kung pao glaze; toss fried chicken in the glaze until coated.
', '
Combine cabbage, carrots, green onions and mayo to create a slaw. 
', '
Build sandwiches: Add roasted peppers to bottom buns, glazed chicken, cabbage slaw, green onions, and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil\xa0before adding the top buns.
\xa0
Serve with potato wedges or your side of choice. Enjoy, and check out our website for more Asian chicken recipes!
']

Name: marry-me-chicken-gnocchi-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. chicken breast, diced', 'Salt & pepper', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '½ cup sun-dried tomatoes, chopped', '1 cup heavy cream', '½ cup chicken broth', '1 package gnocchi (about 16 oz.)', '½ cup grated Parmesan', 'Fresh basil']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat olive oil in a large skillet, season the chicken with salt and pepper, and sear until golden.
', '
Add tomato paste, sun-dried tomatoes, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Garlic Sauce;cook 1 minute to deepen the flavor.\xa0
', '
Pour in the heavy cream and chicken broth; simmer 3–4 minutes until the sauce thickens.
', '
Add the gnocchi directly to the pan and cook until soft and coated in sauce.
', '
Stir in Parmesan, finish with fresh basil, and serve.
\xa0
Want more easy Pasta recipes? Check out our page for all recipes involving rice and noodles for easy weeknight meals!
']

Name: feta-and-caramelized-onion-pizza-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 pizza dough (store-bought or homemade), about 10-12 oz.', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 large onion, thinly sliced', '1 cup mushrooms, sliced', '1 cup fresh spinach', '2 cups shredded mozzarella', '½ cup crumbled feta', '2 tsp. chopped fresh thyme, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce (plus more for drizzling)', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat olive oil in a skillet, add onions, and cook until soft. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and continue cooking until deep, sticky, and caramelized.
', '
Add mushrooms and spinach to the pan and cook until softened.
', '
Roll out the pizza dough and top with mozzarella, then spoon the onion–mushroom–spinach mixture evenly over it.
', '
Sprinkle with feta and bake at 475°F for 12–15 minutes until golden and bubbly.
', '
Finish with a generous hoisin drizzle\xa0and sprinkle with fresh thyme. Slice, serve and enjoy!
\xa0
Find other recipes with hoisin sauce to cook on our recipes page!
']

Name: kimchi-ham-and-cheese-quiche-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 prepared pie crust', '1 cup chopped ham', '½ cup shredded cheddar', '½ cup shredded Monterey Jack cheese', '½ cup chopped kimchi', '5 eggs', '1 cup half-and-half', 'Green onions, sliced, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Salt & pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for finishing drizzle']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375°F and place the pie crust into a 9-inch pie dish.
', '
Press the chopped kimchi firmly between layers of paper towels to remove as much excess moisture as possible.
', '
Sprinkle the ham, cheddar, Monterey Jack, and pressed kimchi evenly over the bottom of the pie crust.
', '
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, half-and-half, salt, and pepper. Slowly pour the custard over the filling, then gently tap the pie dish on the counter to help the mixture settle and distribute evenly throughout the quiche.
', '
Bake for 40–45 minutes, until the center is set and the top is lightly golden. Let cool for 10 minutes, then slice. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil\xa0and garnish with green onions. Enjoy! 


\xa0
Find more Asian breakfast recipes on our recipes page!


']

Name: wrapped-cabbage-dumplings-recipe-by-chef-charles-chen
Ingredients: ['8 savoy cabbage leaves', 'Water, for blanching cabbage', '--For The Filling:--', '8 dried shitake mushrooms (rehydrated in water)', '1 lb. minced beef or chicken', '2 stalks scallions, finely chopped', 'Crispy fried shallots, for garnish', 'Additional chopped scallions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Low Sodium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil', '2 pinches Chinese five spice ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Blanch cabbage leaves in boiling water until they begin to wilt (it should take no more than 20 seconds). Drain and set aside. 
', '
Squeeze out excess water in the rehydrated shiitake mushrooms. Chop them into tiny pieces.
', '
Put mushrooms, minced meat, scallions, and all the seasonings into a bowl. Mix well.
', '
Place 1/8 of the filling in the middle of a cabbage leaf. Wrap it into a cylinder shape. 
', '
Place the rolls into a serving plate then put into a steamer. Steam for 10 minutes. 
', '
Mix the sauce, top it off with fried shallots and scallions and serve.
Check out some more recipes from Chef Charles, like his Hoisin Meatballs recipe or Sesame Lettuce Wraps recipe!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: slow-cooker-mac-and-cheese-bowls-recipe-3-ways
Ingredients: ['--For the Slow Cooker Mac & Cheese--', '1 (1 lb.) box elbow macaroni, uncooked', '¼ cup unsalted butter, melted', '2 (12 oz.) cans evaporated milk', '1½ cups whole milk', '½ tsp. dry mustard', '1 tsp. salt', '1 (16 oz.) block sharp cheddar cheese, freshly grated', '4 oz. American cheese, grated or cut into thin strips', '--For the Toppings--', '(Have enough to serve 6-8 people each) ', 'Pulled pork', 'Crispy chicken strips, chopped', 'Cooked bacon, crumbled', 'Shredded mozzarella', 'Shredded cheddar', 'Shredded Parmesan', 'Cojita Cheese', 'Grilled Corn Kernels', 'BBQ sauce', 'Ranch', 'Sliced green onions', 'Sliced Limes']
Seasoning: ['1 jar Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original', '1 jar Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Cilantro', '1 jar Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Smoky']
Procedure:
['
Grate the sharp cheddar and the American cheese.\xa0
', '
Spray a 6–8 quart slow cooker with nonstick spray. Add the uncooked macaroni, melted butter, evaporated milk, whole milk, dry mustard, and salt. Stir well to combine.\xa0
\xa0
Add the grated sharp cheddar and American cheese directly to the slow cooker. Stir everything together so the pasta is coated
\xa0
Cover and cook on LOW for 1 hour. Stir well, cover again, and cook for 1 additional hour.\xa0When the pasta is tender and the sauce is creamy, switch the crock pot to WARM. (If the mac thickens as it sits, add a splash of warm milk to loosen.)
', '
Set up your Mac Bar: Place the warm mac & cheese front and center in the crock pot. Set out toppings in small bowls or a divided tray so everyone can build their perfect bowl
', '
Load it up & enjoy:
Pair creamy mac with ANY of your toppings — the combos are endless! Try:
• Spicy Fire Mac
A big drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Original + extra cheddar = the ultimate spicy, cheesy comfort bowl.
• Cilantro Lime Street Mac
Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Cilantro + corn + cotija+green onion + a squeeze of lime for a fresh, street-food inspired twist.
• Smoky BBQ Pit Mac
Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Smoky + pulled pork + a little BBQ sauce = full backyard cookout energy in one bowl.
']

Name: heart-shaped-musubi-recipe-for-valentines-day
Ingredients: ['1 can Spam', '2 cups warm cooked sushi rice', '2 sheets nori, cut into thin strips', 'Toasted sesame seeds, for garnish', 'Heart-shaped cookie cutter']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '½ tsp. salt']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix the warm sushi rice with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt. Stir gently and set aside.
', '
Remove the Spam from the can and slice into ½-inch thick pieces.
Use a heart-shaped cookie cutter to punch out heart Spam pieces. (Save scraps for fried rice later!)
', '
In a small bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, and brown sugar until smooth.
', '
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium. Add the heart Spam pieces and cook 2–3 minutes per side until lightly crisp. Brush both sides with the oyster glaze and cook 1 more minute per side until shiny, caramelized, and slightly sticky.
', '
Press a small handful of the seasoned rice into the same heart-shaped cookie cutter to create matching rice hearts. Repeat until you have one rice heart for each Spam heart. 
\xa0
Assemble the musubi: Place a glazed Spam heart over a rice heart. Wrap a thin strip of nori around the center to hold them together. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping.
']

Name: cinnamon-rolls-recipe-with-chili-crisp-hot-honey
Ingredients: ['--FOR THE CINNAMON ROLL DOUGH--', '1 cup warm milk (110°F)', '2¼ tsp active dry yeast', '⅓ cup granulated sugar', '½ cup unsalted butter, melted and cooled', '2 large eggs, room temperature', '1 tsp salt', '4½ cups all-purpose flour', '--FOR THE CINNAMON SUGAR FILLING--', '½ cup unsalted butter, softened', '¾ cup brown sugar', '2 Tbsp ground cinnamon', '--FOR THE CREAM CHEESE ICING--', '4 oz cream cheese, softened', '2 Tbsp unsalted butter, softened', '1 cup powdered sugar', '1 tsp vanilla extract', '1–2 Tbsp milk, as needed']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Hot Honey Sauce, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Stir the warm milk, active dry yeast, and granulated sugar together in a large bowl. Let stand 5–10 minutes until foamy. Whisk in the melted butter, eggs, and salt, then gradually mix in the flour until a soft dough forms. Knead 8–10 minutes until smooth and elastic, then cover and let rise in a warm spot until doubled, about 1 hour.
', '
Roll the dough into a large rectangle. Spread the softened butter evenly over the surface, then sprinkle with brown sugar and cinnamon. Roll tightly into a log and cut into 12 even rolls. Arrange in a greased baking dish, cover, and let rise 30 minutes.
', '
Bake at 350°F for 22–25 minutes, until puffed and golden with a soft center.
', '
Beat the cream cheese, butter, powdered sugar, vanilla, and milk together until smooth and spreadable. Spoon or swirl the icing generously over the warm cinnamon rolls.
', '
Finish with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Hot Honey Sauce, letting the warm rolls melt the honey slightly so it pools into the swirls for a sweet-heat contrast. Serve warm.
\xa0
Find more Asian inspired breakfast ideas on our recipes page!
']

Name: osso-bucco-recipe-for-braised-beef-shank
Ingredients: ['2½–3 lbs beef shanks (about 4 pieces)', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '3 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 celery ribs, finely diced', '2 medium carrots, finely diced', '1 medium yellow onion, finely diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '2 sprigs fresh thyme', '2 sprigs fresh rosemary', '2 bay leaves', '2 cups dry red wine, divided', '1 cup beef stock', '2 Tbsp. butter', 'Chopped Parsley, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Pat the beef shanks dry and season them with salt and black pepper. Heat the olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat, then sear the shanks for 3–4 minutes per side until deeply browned. Transfer to a plate.
', '
Add the celery, carrots, and onion to the same pot and cook for 5 minutes until softened. Add\xa01 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for 1 minute. Stir in the tomato paste, thyme, rosemary, and bay leaves.
', '
Pour in 1½ cups of the red wine and the beef stock, then stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Bring to a simmer, then return the beef shanks to the pot, cover, and transfer to the oven. Braise for 60–90 minutes, or until the beef is very tender.
', '
Return the pot to the stovetop and transfer the shanks to a platter. Add the remaining ½ cup red wine, the butter, and Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce to the pot. Simmer for 5–7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is slightly reduced and glossy.
', "
Spoon the oyster–soy red wine pan sauce over the beef shanks and sprinkle with parsley. Serve over creamy polenta, mashed potatoes, or noodles.
\xa0
Find more ways to use oyster sauce on our recipes page - there's over 450 to get you started!\xa0
"]

Name: surf-and-turf-sushi-roll-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups cooked sushi rice, seasoned with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt', '8–10 tempura shrimp, cooked and cooled', '1 ripe avocado, sliced', '1 cup imitation crab, shredded', '1 lb. beef steak (sirloin or strip), seasoned lightly with salt and pepper', 'Neutral oil, for searing', '3 sheets nori', 'Crispy onions', 'Chopped chives', 'Edible flowers, citrus slices, or microgreens, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the sushi rice and let it cool to room temperature while you set up your rolling station with a bamboo mat.
', '
Heat a skillet over high heat with a small amount of oil and quickly sear the steak until medium-rare. Rest briefly, then slice very thin against the grain.
', '
Lay a sheet of nori shiny-side down on the mat. Spread an even layer of rice over the nori, then flip so the rice faces down. Arrange tempura shrimp, avocado, and imitation crab across the center. Roll tightly into a California-style roll. Repeat to make three identical rolls.
', '
Top each roll with thin slices of seared steak. Slice each roll into even pieces.
', "
Arrange the three rolls side-by-side on a large platter. Drizzle one roll with Lee Kum Kee Smoky BBQ Flavored Sriracha Sauce, one with Lee Kum Kee Cilantro Lime Flavored Sriracha Sauce, and one with Lee Kum Kee Yuzu Flavored Sriracha Sauce. Sprinkle with crispy onions and chopped chives. Garnish the platter with edible flowers and citrus and serve with small dipping saucers of each sauce.
\xa0
We've got over 250\xa0ways to use Sriracha sauces on our recipes page - go check them out for more ideas!
"]

Name: satay-chicken-wings-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. chicken wings', '1 Tbsp. baking powder', '1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '1 stalk green onion, thinly sliced, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for finishing drizzle']
Marinade: ['¼ cup coconut milk', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. curry powder']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup smooth peanut butter', '1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '1 Tbsp. red Thai curry paste', '¼ cup coconut milk', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1–2 Tbsp. warm water, as needed']
Procedure:
['
Add the chicken wings to a bowl and toss with baking powder, neutral oil, coconut milk, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and curry powder until evenly coated. Arrange the wings on a baking sheet and refrigerate uncovered for at least 4 hours or up to 24 hours.
', '
Preheat the oven to 425°F. Bake the wings for 30 minutes, flip, and bake an additional 15 minutes, or until deeply golden and crisp.
', '
While the wings bake, heat neutral oil in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add red Thai curry paste and cook for 1–2 minutes, stirring, until fragrant.
', '
Whisk in peanut butter, coconut milk, fish sauce, honey, and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce until smooth, adding warm water as needed to create a thick, glossy sauce. Remove from heat.
', "
Transfer the hot wings to a large bowl, pour the warm peanut satay sauce over the wings, and toss until fully coated. Finish with sliced green onions and a light drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil before serving.
\xa0
We've got a whole bunch of Asian chicken recipes on our recipes page as well if you're looking for more ideas!
"]

Name: homemade-dumplings-recipe-for-new-years
Ingredients: ['--For the Dumpling Filling--', '1 lb. ground pork (or chicken)', '1 cup napa cabbage, finely chopped', '3 green onions, thinly sliced', '--For Assembly--', '60 round dumpling wrappers', 'Small bowl of water (for sealing)', '--For Cooking--', '1–2 Tbsp. neutral oil (per pan)', '¼ cup water (for steaming)', '--For Garnish--', 'Chopped green onions']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. white pepper']
Procedure:
['
Make the Filling:
\xa0
In a large bowl, mix the ground pork, cabbage, green onions, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce, salt, and white pepper. Stir until the mixture becomes sticky and cohesive.
', '
Create a dumpling table with:
Dumpling wrappers in the center,\xa0a big bowl of filling, water bowls for sealing, trays lined with parchment, and small bowls of flour or cornstarch to prevent sticking
', '
Fold the Dumplings: 
Place a wrapper in your palm. Add 1 heaping teaspoon of filling to the center. Dip your finger in water and moisten the edge of the wrapper. Fold into a half-moon and pinch the top closed. Add pleats or keep it simple — up to the dumpling artist!
Place on a floured tray and keep going until the filling is gone.
', '
Pan-Fry the Dumplings (Potsticker Style):
Heat 1–2 Tbsp oil in a nonstick pan over medium heat. Add dumplings in a single layer. Let the bottoms crisp for 2–3 minutes. Add ¼ cup water and cover immediately to steam. Cook 5–6 minutes until the water evaporates and dumplings are cooked through. Remove and repeat with remaining batches. 
Note: (You can also boil or steam for a lighter version.)
', '
Serve:
Place warm dumplings on a large platter. Drizzle generously with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and finish with chopped green onions and a small dish of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil for dipping.
\xa0
For more new year dumpling recipes, check out our recipes page!
']

Name: air-fryer-firecracker-shrimp-recipe
Ingredients: ['16–20 large shrimp, peeled and deveined, tail on', '20–24 wonton wrappers (square)', 'Neutral oil spray']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Pat the shrimp dry, then make several shallow cuts along the inside curve of each shrimp to help them straighten. Add the shrimp to a bowl with the\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce. Marinate for 15–20 minutes.
', '
Lay one wonton wrapper on the counter. If using jumbo shrimp, overlap a second wrapper by 1 inch to create a longer strip. Place a shrimp on the wrapper with the tail sticking out past the top edge. Roll once, fold the side corner over the shrimp, then continue rolling to seal. Dab the edge with water if needed.
', '
Arrange the wrapped shrimp in a single layer in the air fryer basket. Lightly spray with neutral oil.\xa0Air fry at 350°F for 8–10 minutes, or until the wrappers are golden and crisp and the shrimp are cooked through.
', '
Serve immediately with Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce for dipping.
\xa0
Get more New Year recipes ideas on our recipes page!
']

Name: spicy-sesame-noodles-recipe-with-chicken
Ingredients: ['½ cup plus 1 tablespoon neutral oil', '6 Tbsp. salted peanuts, coarsely chopped', '1 lb. ground chicken', '10 to 12 ounces ramen or egg noodles', '3 Tbsp. chives, finely chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. red-pepper flakes', '1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'Salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a medium heatproof bowl, stir together the red-pepper flakes, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Meanwhile, in a large skillet over medium heat, cook the ½ cup oil and peanuts, shaking the pan occasionally, until the peanuts are golden and bubbling, 3 to 5 minutes. Immediately pour the contents of the skillet over the red-pepper mixture and set aside.
', '
Meanwhile, in the same skillet, heat the remaining tablespoon of neutral oil over medium-high. Add the chicken and press it down with a wooden spoon into a thin layer. Season with salt and a generous amount of black pepper and cook, without stirring, occasionally pressing the layer of chicken down, until the bottom is browned, 5 to 7 minutes. Break the chicken up into small pieces and cook, stirring occasionally, until cooked through, 1 to 2 minutes more.
', '
While the chicken cooks, cook the noodles in the pot of boiling water from step 1 according to package directions, until chewy but not soft. Drain and toss with a bit of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Off the heat, add enough of the peanut chili oil to coat the chicken and stir, scraping up any browned bits from the pan. Add the noodles and toss, adding more peanut chili oil to fully coat the noodles and chicken. Top with chives and serve at once.
\xa0
Looking for more Asian inspired dinner recipes? Check out our recipes page!
']

Name: corn-and-egg-drop-soup
Ingredients: ['2 eggs', '7 cups water', '1 can cream-style corn', '3 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'White pepper to taste', 'salt to taste']
Procedure:
['
Beat eggs and set aside.
', '
Add water and corn to a pot and bring to a boil. Add Chicken Bouillon Powder and salt. Combine cornstarch with a little water and pour the mixture into pot to thicken soup.
', '
When soup comes to a boil again, add beaten eggs and gently stir. Lastly, add Pure Sesame Oil and white pepper. Ready to serve.
\xa0
Find more easy Chinese recipes on our recipes page!
']

Name: phosotto-pho-broth-risotto-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. neutral oil', '2 shallots, minced', '1 cup arborio rice', '½ cup white wine', '6 cups pho broth (store-bought or homemade)', '3 Tbsp. butter', '½ cup grated Parmesan cheese', '1 tsp. black pepper', 'Fresh Thai basil leaves', 'Fresh cilantro leaves', 'Thinly sliced green onions', 'Thinly sliced jalapeños', 'Lime wedges']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, for finishing', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for finishing']
Procedure:
['
Heat the neutral oil in a large pan over medium heat, then add the minced shallots and cook for 2 minutes until softened.
', '
Add the arborio rice and stir to coat it fully in the olive oil and shallots. Pour in the white wine and cook until the rice absorbs it completely.
', '
Begin adding the pho broth ½ cup at a time, stirring continuously and allowing each addition to be absorbed before adding the next. Continue until all the broth is absorbed and the rice is creamy and tender, about 20–25 minutes.
', '
Turn off the heat and stir in the butter, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper until fully incorporated and glossy.
', '
Spoon the pho-sotto into bowls and finish with fresh Thai basil, cilantro, green onions, jalapeños, and a squeeze of lime. Drizzle the risotto with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha.
\xa0
Find more creative Asian fusion dishes on our recipes page!
']

Name: valentine-surf-and-turf-recipe-with-hoisin-red-wine-reduction
Ingredients: ['2 filet mignon steaks (about 6 oz each, patted dry)', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. butter', '1 garlic clove, smashed', '2 sprigs rosemary', '6 extra large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 tsp. olive oil', '⅛ tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. butter']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup dry red wine', '½ cup beef broth', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. balsamic vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Add the red wine to a skillet over medium heat and simmer until reduced by half, about 6–8 minutes. Stir in the beef broth, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and balsamic vinegar, then continue simmering for 14–18 minutes until the sauce becomes thick, glossy, and deeply syrupy. Transfer the reduction to a heatproof bowl and keep it warm near the stove.
', '
Season the filet mignon with salt and black pepper. Heat the olive oil in a clean skillet over medium-high heat, then sear the steaks for 3–4 minutes per side. Add the butter, garlic, and rosemary, spooning the melted butter over the steaks. Transfer the steaks to a plate to rest.
', '
Heat the olive oil in another skillet over medium-high heat. Add the shrimp and season with the salt. Sear 1–2 minutes per side, then add the butter and toss until the shrimp are lightly golden and cooked through.
', '
Plate each filet mignon in the center of the dish with three shrimp arranged beside it.
', '
Stir the warm reduction and spoon it generously over each filet. Garnish with sprig of rosemary and enjoy with mashed potatoes and roasted broccolini.\xa0
\xa0
Find more ways to cook with hoisin sauce on our recipes page!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
