Name: peanut-butter-instant-ramen-recipe
Ingredients: ['1½ cups water', '1 packet instant ramen noodles (discard seasoning packet)', '1 Tbsp. creamy peanut butter', '½ cup rotisserie chicken, shredded ', '¼ cup cucumber matchsticks', '1 scallion, thinly sliced', 'Fresh cilantro, for garnish', '1 lime wedge', 'Toasted sesame seeds (optional)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a saucepan, bring water to a boil.\xa0Add the ramen noodles and cook according to package instructions. Once cooked, remove from heat but do not drain.
', '
While the noodles cook, stir together peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil in a bowl until smooth.
', '
Pour the hot noodles and broth into a serving bowl. Stir in the sauce mixture until fully dissolved and the broth turns creamy and flavorful.\xa0Top with shredded rotisserie chicken, cucumber matchsticks, scallions, cilantro, lime wedge, and sesame seeds if desired. Serve immediately and enjoy!
\xa0
Check out our oyster sauce recipes page for more ideas on what to cook with oyster sauce!
']

Name: pizza-korean-corn-dog-recipe-with-dipping-sauces
Ingredients: ['4 wooden skewers', '4 low-moisture mozzarella cheese sticks, halved', '2 cooked beef hot dogs, halved', '1 cup all-purpose flour', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '¾ tsp. instant yeast', '¼ tsp. salt', '½ cup warm milk (100–110°F)', '1 egg', '1½ cups panko breadcrumbs', 'Neutral oil for frying', '⅓ cup shredded low-moisture mozzarella cheese']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, instant yeast, and salt. Add warm milk and egg, stirring until a thick, sticky dough forms. Cover and let it proof in a warm place for 45 minutes until slightly puffy and airy.
', '
While the batter proofs, thread each skewer with half a hot dog and half a mozzarella stick. Press them together firmly and freeze for 10 minutes to help them hold their shape.
', '
Pour panko breadcrumbs onto a shallow plate. Once the batter is proofed, dip each skewer into the batter, coating fully. Immediately roll in panko until completely covered.
', '
Heat 2–3 inches of neutral oil in a deep pan to 350°F (175°C). Fry each skewer for 3–4 minutes, turning occasionally, until golden and crisp. Drain on paper towels. While still hot, drizzle the top of each fried dog with the Chiu Chow Marinara (1 tablespoon of\xa0Chiu\xa0Chow Chili Crisp Oil mixed into a cup of marinara sauce) and sprinkle generously with shredded mozzarella. Use a kitchen torch or place briefly under a broiler to melt the cheese, if desired.
', '
Serve immediately with Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce\xa0for dipping.
\xa0
For more recipes with sriracha, check out our massive library of recipes!
']

Name: rainbow-sushi-roll-recipe-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups sushi rice, uncooked', '2 cups water (plus more for rinsing)', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '4 8x8-inch toasted nori sheets', '1 8 oz. filet sushi grade salmon', ' 1 8 oz. filet sushi grade ahi tuna', '1 avocado', '1 small (Persian) cucumber, cut into thin matchsticks']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Wash the sushi rice: Place sushi rice in a large bowl and fill to just above the rice with cold water. Stir quickly and drain within 10-15 seconds, massage the rice gently with your hands, and fill the bowl with water again until it just covers the rice. Repeat this process three times. This will gently wash the rice without losing too much of its flavor.
', '
Cook the sushi rice: Transfer rice to a saucepan and add your 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then cover and set the heat to low. Cook for about 15 minutes until the rice absorbs the water, then let stand covered for 10 minutes. 
', '
Season the sushi rice: While the rice cooks and stands, dissolve the sugar into the Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar. This can be done in a small pan or a microwave. Once the rice is ready, transfer it to a large baking dish or bowl. Drizzle with half of the vinegar and sugar mixture then fold carefully with a rice paddle to break up clumps. Taste and check for seasoning and repeat if more vinegar and sugar is desired. Once seasoned, cover with a damp towel and let cool, about 15 minutes.
', '
Prepare the fillings and toppings: While the sushi rice cools, cut the cucumber into thin matchsticks. Split the avocado in half, cutting one half into 1/8-inch thick slices for topping, and the other half into ¼-inch thick slices for filling the sushi roll. Repeat with the filets of sushi-grade ahi tuna and salmon, using half for the filling (1/4-inch thick) and half for the topping (1/8-inch thick). Be sure to slice the fish across the grain.
', '
Assemble the sushi rolls: Wrap a sushi bamboo mat (9 ½-inch wide) with plastic wrap and prepare a bowl of warm water. Place 1 nori sheet smooth side up on the bamboo mat and dab your fingers in the warm water. Grab a handful (about 4 ounces) of cooled sushi rice and spread evenly across the nori. Lay down 2-3 ¼-inch slices each of salmon and tuna, along with a couple of slices of avocado and a scattering of the cucumber match sticks. They should be arranged lengthwise around the bottom third of the roll. 
\xa0
Lift and roll the bamboo mat so the nori and rice roll over the filling, then tuck into the filling to start forming the roll. Repeat and quarter-turn until the sushi roll is fully formed. Remove from the mat and dress with the 1/8-inch thick slices of salmon, tuna, and avocado, alternating to give the appearance of a rainbow-like arrangement. Repeat for each sushi roll.
', '
Cut and Serve:\xa0Use a very sharp knife to cut each roll into 6-8 pieces, wiping between cuts as needed to prevent sticking. Drizzle\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo on top and serve with additional on the side as desired for dipping.
\xa0
For more sriracha mayo recipes\xa0and where to find Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo near you, check out our Sriracha page! 
']

Name: oyster-sauce-spaghetti-bolognese-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 small yellow onion, finely chopped', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 stalk celery, finely chopped', '1 medium carrot, finely chopped', '1 lb. ground beef or pork', '1 (14 oz) can crushed tomatoes', '½ tsp. dried oregano', '¼ tsp. red pepper flakes (optional)', 'Salt and black pepper, to taste', '½ cup water or beef broth (as needed)', '12 oz spaghetti ', 'Water for boiling the pasta', 'Fresh parsley or basil, for garnish', 'Grated Parmesan, for serving (optional)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat olive oil in a large skillet or saucepan over medium heat. Add onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, celery, and carrot. Cook for 5–6 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are soft and fragrant.
', '
Add the ground beef or pork and cook, breaking it up with a spatula, until fully cooked. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
', '

Stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Flavored Sauce, tomato paste, crushed tomatoes, oregano, and red pepper flakes. Add a splash of water or broth to adjust the consistency if needed. Simmer uncovered for 15–20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.



', '

While the sauce simmers, cook pasta according to package instructions. Drain and reserve ¼ cup of pasta water.


', '
Combine the drained pasta with the bolognese sauce, adding reserved pasta water if needed to coat evenly. Garnish with chopped herbs and Parmesan if desired. Serve hot.
\xa0
For more oyster sauce recipe ideas, check out our recipes page!
']

Name: loco-moco-smash-burger-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef (80/20 preferred)', '1 tsp. neutral oil (if needed for skillet)', '8 thin slices cheddar or American cheese', '4 brioche or potato burger buns, toasted', '4 fried eggs (sunny-side up or over-easy)', '½ cup crispy fried onions (optional, for crunch)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'Salt and black pepper, to taste', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '¾ cup beef broth', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. onion powder', '1 tsp. ketchup', 'Black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, gently mix ground beef with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce. Form into 8 loose balls about 2 oz. each (do not overmix). Set aside.
', '
In a small saucepan over medium heat, melt butter and stir in flour. Cook for 1 minute, then slowly whisk in beef broth until smooth. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, ketchup and onion powder. Simmer for 3–4 minutes until thickened. Add black pepper to taste and keep warm.
', '

Heat a cast iron skillet or griddle over medium-high heat. Add beef balls and smash each firmly with a spatula. Season with salt and pepper. Cook for 2–3 minutes until edges are crispy, then flip and top with cheese. Cook 1 more minute until melted. Remove from heat.


', '
In a separate pan, fry eggs to your liking (sunny-side up or over-easy recommended for runny yolks).
', '
Spread\xa0Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on the bottom bun. Stack two smashed patties with melted cheese, spoon over warm gravy, top with a fried egg, and add crispy onions if using. Cap with the top bun. Enjoy!
\xa0
For more easy ways to cook with oyster sauce, check out our oyster sauce recipes page!

']

Name: crispy-rice-salad-recipe-with-chili-crisp-mayo
Ingredients: ['2 heaping cups cooked long-grain white rice, chilled at least 2 hours or overnight', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 English cucumber (or 3 Persian cucumbers), diced', '1 cup shelled edamame, thawed if frozen', '1 ripe mango, julienned', '⅓ cup chopped green onion', '⅓ cup roasted, salted cashews, roughly chopped', 'Salt, to taste']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400°F and line a large rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. In a large bowl, mix chilled rice with 1 Tbsp.\xa0Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Use gloved hands or a spatula to evenly coat the rice and break up any clumps.
', '
Spread the seasoned rice into a thin, even layer on the baking sheet. Bake for 40 minutes, tossing every 10–15 minutes, until golden brown and crispy. Let cool slightly.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chiu Chow Style\xa0Chili Crisp Oil, lime juice, and enough water to thin to a drizzle-able consistency. Set aside.
', '
In a large bowl, combine cucumber, edamame, mango, green onion, and cashews. Drizzle with remaining 1 Tbsp.\xa0Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, season lightly with salt, and toss to coat.
', '
\xa0Add the crispy rice to the salad and toss gently to combine. Drizzle with chili crisp aioli just before serving or serve the aioli on the side. Enjoy immediately for maximum crunch.
\xa0
Check out more salad recipes for summertime inspiration on our recipes page!
']

Name: vegetable-frittata-recipe-with-hatch-green-chile
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ cup yellow onion, diced', '1 cup roasted Hatch chiles, peeled, seeded, and chopped', '1 cup cooked potatoes, diced (Yukon Gold or red)', '8 large eggs', '2 Tbsp whole milk or cream', '½ cup shredded Monterey Jack', 'Sour cream, diced tomatoes, sliced green onion and chopped cilantro, for topping ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375°F. In a 10-inch oven-safe skillet over medium heat, add olive oil. Sauté onion for 3–4 minutes until soft. Add chopped Hatch chiles and potatoes, stirring occasionally for another 2–3 minutes.
', '
In a bowl, whisk eggs with milk, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee Panda\xa0Oyster Flavored Sauce, and black pepper until fully combined and slightly frothy.
', '
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet over the sautéed vegetables. Stir gently to distribute fillings evenly. Sprinkle cheese on top.
', '
Let the frittata cook undisturbed over medium heat for 2–3 minutes until the edges begin to set.
', '
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10–12 minutes, or until the center is fully set and the top is lightly golden. Remove, rest for 5 minutes, slice, and serve with chopped cilantro.
\xa0
Looking for more ways to add Asian flavors to breakfast? Check out our breakfast recipes page!
']

Name: elote-inspired-ceviche-recipe
Ingredients: ['¾ lb. raw shrimp, peeled, deveined, finely chopped', '1 cup fire-roasted corn (grilled, canned, or thawed)', '½ English cucumber, diced', '¼ cup red onion, finely chopped', '1 jalapeño, finely chopped (seeds removed for less heat)', '2 Tbsp chopped cilantro', '2 Tbsp crumbled cotija cheese (plus more for garnish)', 'Tortilla chips or mini tostadas, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '½ tsp. chili powder or Tajín (plus more for garnish)', 'Salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for final drizzle']
Marinade: ['½ cup fresh lime juice (about 4–5 limes)']
Procedure:
['
Add chopped raw shrimp to a non-metallic bowl and cover with fresh lime juice. Stir, then refrigerate for 15–20 minutes until the shrimp turns opaque and pink.
', '
Drain excess lime juice. Stir in corn, cucumber, red onion, jalapeño, cilantro, and cotija. Fold in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and season with chili powder and salt to taste.
', '
Divide ceviche into 6 small clear cups. Garnish with extra cotija, a sprinkle of Tajín, and a drizzle of\xa0Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
', '
Place each ceviche cup on a small plate with tortilla chips or mini tostadas. Serve cold and enjoy!
\xa0
Check out our seafood recipes page for more refreshing ideas!
']

Name: char-siu-chicken-bake-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breasts', '1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '1 lb. prepared pizza dough', '½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '½ cup shredded provolone cheese ', '3 green onions, thinly sliced', '1 large egg, beaten', '¼ cup shredded Parmesan cheese', 'All-purpose flour, for rolling']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. Chinese five spice powder', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce,\xa0Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, Seasoned Rice Vinegar,\xa0Minced Garlic, Minced Ginger,\xa0five spice powder, and honey. Season chicken with salt and pepper, then add to the marinade. Let sit for at least 20 minutes (or overnight). 
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Heat oil in an ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and sear 2–3 minutes per side. Pour in remaining marinade with a splash of water, then transfer to the oven and bake for 15–20 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through. Cool slightly, then chop into bite-sized pieces.
', '
Raise oven heat to 400°F. Divide pizza dough into 3 equal portions. On a floured surface, roll each portion into a 12-inch oval. Sprinkle each with a bit of mozzarella, provolone, then top evenly with chopped char siu chicken and green onions.
', '
Fold the sides of the dough over slightly, then roll up from the bottom edge to form a log. Pinch the seams to seal and place seam-side down on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
', '
Brush the tops of the rolls with beaten egg. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella and Parmesan cheese. Bake at 400°F for 18–22 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp on the outside. Cool slightly, then slice in half, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and serve.
\xa0
For more Asian inspired chicken recipes, head to our recipes page!
']

Name: spicy-bourbon-chicken-pizza-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite-size pieces', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp .neutral oil', '1 cup green bell pepper, sliced', '½ cup yellow onion, sliced', '1 prepared pizza dough (12–14 inch round)', '1½ cups shredded mozzarella cheese', '1 Tbsp. chopped green onions (optional, for garnish)']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce (or more for extra heat)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '¼ cup bourbon', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. cornstarch mixed with 1 Tbsp. water (slurry)']
Procedure:
['
In a small saucepan over medium heat, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Panda Oyster Sauce, Sriracha Chili Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Minced Garlic, Minced Ginger, bourbon, and brown sugar, Bring to a simmer, then stir in the cornstarch slurry and cook for 2–3 minutes until thick and glossy. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Toss chicken pieces with cornstarch. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat and cook chicken until browned and cooked through, about 6–8 minutes. Add ½ of the spicy bourbon sauce to the pan and toss to coat. Remove from heat.
', '
Preheat oven to 475°F. If using a pizza stone or steel, place it in the oven to heat. Roll out pizza dough to a 12–14 inch circle on a floured surface.
', '
Spread the remaining spicy bourbon sauce over the dough like pizza sauce. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese, then evenly distribute the chicken, green bell peppers, and onions on top.
', "
Bake for 12–15 minutes, or until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbly and browned. Remove from the oven, garnish with green onions if desired, and slice while hot.
\xa0
We've got a whole bunch of other Asian fusion recipes you can check out as well!
"]

Name: cold-silken-tofu-recipe-in-5-minutes
Ingredients: ['1 block silken tofu (cold, about 12 oz), drained', '1 Tbsp. chopped green onions', '½ tsp toasted sesame seeds (black or white, optional)', 'Steamed rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, plus more to taste if desired', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. sugar or maple syrup (to balance the heat)']
Procedure:
['
Carefully remove the silken tofu from its packaging and place it on a shallow serving dish. Pat gently with a paper towel if there’s excess water.
', '
In a small bowl, stir together Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, and sugar until well combined.
', '
Pour the sauce over the tofu, letting it pool around the sides\xa0Top with chopped green onions and sesame seeds.\xa0Serve cold, with a spoon to scoop or with rice on the side. Enjoy immediately.
\xa0
Get more easy Asian recipe ideas on our recipes page!
']

Name: vietnamese-spring-rolls-with-hoisin-peanut-dipping-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 lb sirloin, thinly sliced ', '1 shallot, finely chopped', '1 cup shredded lettuce', '1 cup shredded carrots', '1 cucumber, julienned', '½ cup chopped fresh cilantro', '1 package rice paper wrappers', 'Sesame seeds, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the beef: Combine the beef, shallot, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce\xa0and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Let marinate for at least 30 minutes. Heat sesame oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add marinated beef and cook about 5 minutes. 
', '
Prep the veggies: While the beef cooks, shred the lettuce and carrots, julienne the cucumber, and chop the cilantro. Arrange each in separate bowls for easy assembly.
', '
Assemble the Vietnamese spring rolls: Fill a shallow dish with warm water. Dip a rice paper wrapper in the water for 10–15 seconds until softened. Lay flat on a clean surface. In the center, layer beef, lettuce, carrots, cucumber, and cilantro.
', '
Roll the spring rolls: Fold in the sides, then roll tightly from the bottom up to enclose the filling. Repeat with remaining wrappers and ingredients.
', '
Make the peanut lime sauce: In a small bowl, whisk together peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Add water, 1 tsp at a time, until the sauce reaches your preferred dipping consistency. Garnish rolls with sesame seeds and enjoy!
\xa0
Looking for more 30 minute meals? Check out our 30 minutes recipes page!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-lettuce-wraps-recipe-with-turkey-by-chef-charles-chen
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. Coconut Oil', '1 lb. lean ground turkey OR marinated bean curd tofu', '1/2 cup shiitake mushrooms, thinly sliced', '1 8 oz. can water chestnuts, thinly sliced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 large head Boston or butter lettuce, separated into leaves', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '1 carrot, julienned,', '1/2 cup diced cucumbers', '3/4 cup diced colorful bell peppers', '4 stalks scallions, thinly sliced', '1/2 cup cilantro, chopped', '1/3 cup mint, chopped', '1/2 cup roasted peanuts, chopped', 'Fried shallots, for garnish', 'Sesame seeds, for garnish', 'Lime wedges, for garnish', 'Broccoli alfalfa sprouts, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 Tbsp. finely chopped fresh basil']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together the\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0 Hoisin Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, Chili Garlic Sauce, Minced\xa0Ginger,\xa0Minced Garlic,\xa0and lime juice.\xa0Set aside.
', '
In a large skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium high heat. Add the mushrooms and ground turkey and cook, breaking up with a wooden spoon, for 3 to 5 minutes. Add in the water chestnuts and pour in the sauce.\xa0Cook for 2 to 3 minutes or until turkey is cooked through. Finish with Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
To assemble the lettuce wraps, spoon the mixture into the center of the lettuce leaves. Top with shredded cabbage, carrots, cucumbers, bell peppers, scallions, cilantro, mint, broccoli, chopped roasted peanuts, fried shallots, and sesame. Top with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Spicy Mayo & side of lime. Serve immediately.
\xa0
Learn more about how to use hoisin sauce on our recipes page!
']

Name: steak-frites-recipe-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 boneless strip steaks or ribeye steaks (about 8 oz. each)', '2 lbs. russet potatoes, peeled and cut into thin fries', 'Vegetable oil, for frying', 'Salt, to taste', 'Chopped parsley (optional, for garnish)']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 tsp. Dijon mustard', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 shallot, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup dry red wine', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '¼ cup beef broth (or water)', '1 tsp. Dijon mustard', '¼ cup heavy cream', 'Cracked black peppercorns, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the Steak: In a bowl, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, olive oil, Dijon mustard, and black pepper. Pat steaks dry and coat them with the marinade in a dish or resealable bag. Let sit at room temp for 20–30 minutes while preparing the frites.
', '
Prepare the Frites: Soak cut potatoes in cold water for 30 minutes. Drain and thoroughly dry. Heat oil to 325°F and fry potatoes for 8–9 minutes in batches until just tender (not golden). Remove and drain on a paper towel-lined tray. After steaks are cooked and resting, fry the potatoes again at 350–375°F for 2–3 minutes until crispy and golden. Season immediately with salt.
', '
Cook the Steaks: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear steaks for 3–4 minutes per side to desired doneness. Transfer to a plate and tent with foil to rest for 5–10 minutes.
', '
Make the Pan Sauce: In the same skillet, reduce heat to medium and add butter, shallots, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté 1–2 minutes. Deglaze with wine and reduce for 2–3 minutes. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavor Sauce, broth, mustard, and heavy cream. Simmer until slightly thickened. Season with cracked black peppercorns to taste.
', '
Slice steaks against the grain and plate with hot frites. Spoon pan sauce generously over the steak. Garnish fries with parsley, if desired.
\xa0
For more recipe ideas on how to cook with oyster sauce, check out our recipes page.\xa0
']

Name: one-pan-chicken-orzo-recipe-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs', '2 Tbsp. butter', '½ cup white onion, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '8 oz. fresh mushrooms, sliced', '1½ cups dried orzo pasta', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. sea salt', '2 tsp. black pepper, divided', '2 tsp. paprika', '¼ tsp. onion powder', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp dried oregano', '½ tsp garlic powder', '½ tsp crushed red pepper flakes (optional for heat)', '½ tsp dried thyme', '2 cups chicken stock', '¼ cup dry white wine', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '¼ cup heavy cream', '1 cup grated parmesan cheese']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Trim excess skin from the chicken thighs and score the skin. Season both sides with salt, 1 tsp black pepper, paprika, onion powder, and brush with 1 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce.
', '
Heat a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear chicken skin-side down for 5 minutes until golden; flip and cook for another 3 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate.
', '
Discard excess grease. Add butter, chopped onion, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic and mushrooms. Cook 3–4 minutes until softened. Stir in orzo and cook for 1 minute to toast slightly.
', '
Add oregano, garlic powder, crushed red pepper, thyme and remaining 1 tsp black pepper. Pour in chicken stock, wine, and 2 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Stir to combine and nestle chicken back on top.
', '
Cover the skillet and bake for 15 minutes. Remove from the oven, take out chicken temporarily, and stir in cream and parmesan. Return chicken on top and serve hot. Garnish with green onions and enjoy!
\xa0
Follow Lee Kum Kee on Instagram and check out our recipes page for more ways to use oyster sauce.\xa0
']

Name: butter-chicken-dumplings-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 frozen chicken soup dumplings (or other chicken dumplings)', 'fresh chopped cilantro, to garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. butter', '1/2 small onion, finely chopped', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1/2 tsp. garam masala', '1/2 cup tomato purée', '1/4 cup heavy cream', '2 tsp Kasuri Methi or fenugreek powder', 'Salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Steam the frozen chicken soup dumplings (or other chicken dumplings) according to package instructions (usually 10–12 minutes).
', '
Sauté onion in butter over medium heat until soft, about 3 minutes.\xa0
', '

Add\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger, tomato paste, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow\xa0 Chili Crisp Oil. Cook 1–2 minutes until fragrant.
', '
Stir in garam masala, tomato purée, and a pinch of salt. Simmer for 5 minutes, then add heavy cream and kasuri methi and stir until smooth.
', '
Serve dumplings in a shallow bowl over the warm sauce. Drizzle with additional Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with fresh cilantro.
\xa0
Enjoy and check out more simple spicy recipes on our recipes page!\xa0
']

Name: buffalo-chicken-baked-potato-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 large russet potatoes', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1/2 cup cooked chicken breast, shredded', '1/4 cup crumbled blue cheese', '1 stalk green onion, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to season', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted', '2 tsp. white vinegar', '1/2 tsp. garlic powder']
Procedure:
['
Bake the potatoes: Preheat oven to 400°F. Rub potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Bake directly on oven rack for 45 minutes, or until crispy outside and tender inside.
', '
Make buffalo sriracha sauce & prep chicken: In a small bowl, whisk together Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, melted butter, vinegar, and garlic powder. Toss half of the sauce with shredded chicken until fully coated.
', '
Prep the potatoes: Slice open baked potatoes and fluff the insides with a fork. Season with salt and pepper if desired.
', '
Assemble: Top with buffalo chicken, a generous drizzle of the remaining buffalo sriracha sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, and crumbled blue cheese.
', '
Sprinkle with sliced green onions and serve hot. Enjoy, and check out more chicken recipes for easy dinner inspiration!
']

Name: rice-paper-crab-rangoon-bites-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 oz. imitation crab, chopped', '3 Tbsp. cream cheese, softened', '1 stalk green onion, finely sliced (plus more for garnish)', '5 rice paper wrappers', '1 fresh jalapeño, thinly sliced into rounds', 'Neutral oil, for pan-frying']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1/2 tsp. garlic powder', '1/4 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Mix crab, cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, green onion, garlic powder, and salt in a bowl until well combined.
', '
Soften rice paper wrappers one at a time in warm water. Cut each in half.
', '
Place a jalapeño slice in the center of the softened wrapper, then add 1 tablespoon of the crab filling on top of the jalapeño. Fold into a square, keeping the jalapeño on the outside top.
', '
Pan fry seam-side down first in lightly oiled nonstick skillet over medium heat for 2–3 minutes per side until golden and crisp. Flip carefully to keep jalapeño centered.
', '
Sprinkle with extra green onions. Serve hot with Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce for dipping and enjoy!
\xa0
Check out other easy appetizer recipe ideas on our recipes page.
']

Name: spicy-chicken-caesar-salad-wrap-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup cooked chicken breast, diced into 1.5 inch cubes', '1 cup chopped romaine lettuce', '1/2 cup garlic croutons', '2 large flour tortillas or wraps', 'Oil']
Procedure:
['
Make dressing: Whisk together Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Dijon, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Parmesan, salt, and pepper until smooth.
', '
Toss romaine with dressing and chicken and gently fold in croutons. Add about 1 - 1 1/2 cups of the filling into your tortilla and wrap, ensuring the wrap is tight and encloses all of the ingredients.
', '
Heat a tbsp of oil in medium skillet over medium heat.\xa0Wrap tightly and toast the wraps for 3-4 minutes.
\xa0
Slice and serve immediately while croutons are still crisp. Enjoy and check out some of our other lunch recipes for more ideas!\xa0
']

Name: barbecue-pork-ribs-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 whole pork spare ribs, rack ']
Marinade: ['2 oz. ketchup', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '2 oz. worcestershire sauce', '1 tsp. black pepper, coarse', '4 Tbsp. brown sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '4 oz. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine all marinade ingredients and mix well. (B.B.Q. sauce).
', '
Transfer B.B.Q. sauce into a baking dish and marinate spareribs for about 30 minutes. Marinade longer for extra flavor.
', '
Bake pork spareribs at 350 degree temperature for 45 minutes. Cover with aluminum foil.
', '
Brush spareribs with extra B.B.Q. sauce every 20 minutes.
', '
Remove aluminum cover and bake at 450 degree temperature for another 15 minutes. Cool spareribs for 10 minutes before slicing.
']

Name: spicy-club-sandwich-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless skinless chicken thighs ', '6 slices of sourdough, toasted ', '4 slices of thick-cut bacon', '1 heirloom tomato, sliced  ', '4 slices of pepper jack cheese ', '4 leaves little gem lettuce ']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the chicken: In a large bowl, combine the brown sugar, olive oil, and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Add the chicken thighs and coat, let it marinate for 10 minutes. 
', '
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the chicken for 5-6 minutes on each side or until internal temperature reaches 165℉. Let the chicken rest before slicing and setting aside. 
', '
While the chicken rests, cook the bacon in a skillet over medium heat for 4 minutes on each side or until golden. 
', '
Assemble the sandwiches by spreading Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on one side of the toasted bread slices. Add the sliced chicken, pepper jack cheese, and lettuce for the first layer.
', '
Place the second slice of toast and add the tomato and bacon. Finish the sandwich by placing the third slice of bread on top and enjoy! 
\xa0
Check out our recipe page for more easy 30 minute lunches that add a burst of flavor from Lee Kum Kee sauces!
']

Name: spicy-homemade-pickles-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 large english cucumbers, sliced into spears or discs', '2 sprigs fresh dill ', '1 Tbsp. whole black peppercorns']
Marinade: ['½ cup apple cider vinegar', '½ cup water ', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar ', '1 tsp. fine sea salt ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Make the brine: in a small saucepan, combine the vinegar, water, sugar, salt, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha\xa0Chili Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. 
', '
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar and salt. Simmer for 3-5 minutes then remove from heat. 
', '
Place the sliced cucumbers, fresh dill, and black peppercorns in a clean glass jar.Make sure to use a wide-mouthed jar with an airtight lid that can be sealed. Pack the jars tightly!
', '
Carefully pour the warm brine over the cucumbers until fully covered. Let it cool slightly before sealing and refrigerate overnight before opening and using. Enjoy! 
\xa0
For more spicy recipes to enjoy any time of the year, visit our recipes page.\xa0
']

Name: charcuterie-chips-with-spicy-fig-jam
Ingredients: ['2 bags Potato Chips (your favorite kind)', '8 oz. Cured Meats (prosciutto, salami, etc., roughly chopped', '2 cups Shredded or Sliced Cheeses (such as gouda,cheddar, brie)', '2 .Tbsp Balsamic Glaze', '1 cup Fresh Arugula']
Sauce Mix: ['-- Spicy Fig Jam: --', '3 cups Ripe Figs, diced', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '¼ cup Granulated Sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lemon Juice', '¼ cup Water']
Procedure:
['
In a medium saucepan, add the figs,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Honey Sriracha,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Hoisin Sauce, sugar, lemon juice and water. 
', '
Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Reduce to a simmer and cook for 15-20 minutes, mashing the figs gently as they soften. 
', '
Once the mixture has thickened, remove from heat and allow to cool. Store in clean jars and refrigerate until use. 
', '
Arrange chips on a baking tray. Distribute cured meats and cheese evenly across the chips. Broil for 3–4 minutes, watching closely, until the cheese melts and meats crisp.
', "
Top with dollops of spicy fig jam, then drizzle generously with balsamic glaze. Scatter fresh arugula over the top and serve immediately.
\xa0
We've got plenty of other Honey Sriracha recipes as well if you need more ways to try this sweet and spicy sauce!
"]

Name: brown-butter-miso-udon-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 packs fresh or frozen udon noodles', '1 stalk green onions, chopped for garnish', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, for garnish ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. white miso paste', '¼ cup heavy cream', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil (plus more for drizzling)']
Procedure:
['
Cook the udon noodles according to the package instructions, then drain and set aside.
', '
Make the brown butter by melting unsalted butter in a pan over medium heat. Cook until golden brown and fragrant, about 2-3 minutes.\xa0Whisk in\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, miso paste, and heavy cream, stirring until smooth. Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, then turn off the heat.
', "
Toss in the udon noodles, stirring until they are evenly coated in the creamy, umami-packed sauce.\xa0Serve immediately, garnished with green onions, sesame seeds, and an extra drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil.
\xa0
We've got plenty more chili crisp recipes for easy weeknight inspiration as well - visit the bolded link!
"]

', '

Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: vietnamese-pizza---banh-trang-nuong
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '½ cup ground pork', '2 green onions, sliced (whites and green parts separated)', '2 large rice paper sheets', '2 eggs, lightly beaten']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. fish sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Heat neutral oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add ground pork and cook until lightly browned, breaking it into small pieces. Stir in fish sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger, sugar and the white parts of the green onions. Cook for another 30 seconds until fragrant. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Prepare the Vietnamese Pizza: Reduce heat to medium-low and place one rice paper sheet flat in the same pan. Spread beaten egg evenly over the rice paper. Quickly sprinkle cooked garlic-ginger ground pork and remaining fresh green onions on top.\xa0Press gently with a spatula to ensure even cooking. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges are crispy and golden.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo  and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Fold and serve immediately while hot and crispy.
\xa0
Head to our Asian recipes page for a lot more tasty ideas powered by Lee Kum Kee sauces!
\xa0
\xa0
']

Name: yuenyeung-cocktail-made-with-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger Infused Tequila\t\t450 ml', 'Black Tea + Pineapple Syrup\t\t\t\t150 ml', 'Mr Black\t\t\t\t\t\t200 ml', 'Lee Kum Kee Premium Light Soy Sauce\t\t30 dashes', 'Espresso\t\t\t\t\t\t200 ml', 'Coffee Beans\t\t \t\t\t\t30 pcs']
Procedure:
['
Infuse the minced ginger to tequila and sous vide for 1hr at 55 degrees\xa0
', '
8 bits of dry pineapple and 30g tea per 1ltr water and 1kg sugar. Cool all together and coffee filter strain once sugar dissolves\xa0
', '
Dash Lee Kum Kee Premium Light Soy Sauce into fresh espresso and pour all other things together
', '
Garnish with coffee beans
']

Name: chilled-abalone-made-with-premium-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['US Abalones\t\t\t10 pcs', 'Kelp\t\t\t\t1 sheet', 'Radish\t\t\t\t50 g\t \t ', 'Onion\t\t\t\t250 g', 'Cooking Oil\t\t\t1 tablespoon', 'Sugar\t\t\t\t0.5 tablespoon', 'Avruga Caviar \t\t\t1 g', 'Gold Leaf \t\t\t0.5 g ', 'White Radish Sprouts \t\t1 bunch']
Sauce Mix: ['Water \t\t\t\t\t\t\t300 g ', 'Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce \t\t\t25 g ', 'MSG \t\t\t\t\t\t\t0.5 tablespoon', 'So Hongju (Red Vinegar) \t\t\t\t30 g', 'Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood\t15 g', 'Sugar\t\t\t\t\t\t\t8 g']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the abalones once, cover them with kombu and radish, and steam them for 2 hours.\xa0
', '
Mix all ingredients except red vinegar, boil them once, then add red vinegar and let it cool.
', '
Separate the abalone intestines from the meat after steaming, then cook the meat and intestines with the mixture from step 2 (let the sauce mature for at least 3 hours).
', '
Stir-fry the onions in cooking oil until caramelized, then add sugar at the end.
', '
Blend the mixture from step 4 with the intestines that were set aside in the sauce from step 3 to make onion sauce.
', '
Place onion sauce, abalone, and white radish sprouts on the abalone shell, then garnish with Avruga caviar and gold leaf on top of the abalone.
']

Name: wagyu-steak-tartare-made-with-premium-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['Wagyu, Short Rib\t\t\t\t63 g', 'Katsuobushi (Fish Flake)\t\t\t0.5 g', 'Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce \t8 ml ', 'Dijon Mustard\t\t\t\t\t6 ml ', 'Yuzu Juice \t\t\t\t\t3 ml ', 'Yuzu Kosho (Tube) \t\t\t\t2.5 ml ', 'Black Pepper, Coarse\t\t\t\t0.3 g ', 'Fried Garlic Pieces \t\t\t\t1 g ', 'Fresh Minced Shallot \t\t\t\t100 g ', 'Caviar \t\t\t\t\t\t1 g ', 'Chives \t\t\t\t\t2 g\t ', 'Crushed Salt and Vinegar Chips \t\t1 g']
Procedure:
['
Dice wagyu into 1/4 pieces, this needs to be small so it will fit on the spoon.\xa0
', '
Blend the Katsuobushi in a dry blender until a powder is formed.
', '
Sprinkle the fish powder on the wagyu, mixing well.
', '
Measure out each of the rest of the ingredients in their own container.
', '
Mix in 80% of the ingredients into the beef and mix thoroughly.
', '
Taste mix and add additional ingredients as needed.
']

Name: ginger-hot-honey-chicken-recipe-over-rice
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs', '2 cups cooked jasmine or brown rice', '1 cup steamed broccoli', '1 cup shredded carrots', '½ cup sliced cucumbers', '¼ cup chopped green onions', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp vegetable oil', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Add the chicken in a bowl or resealable bag and mix together Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, olive oil and black pepper. Combine with the chicken, cover and marinate for at least 30 minutes (or up to 2 hours for deeper flavor).
', '
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add a little oil if needed. Remove chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-6 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through (internal temp of 165° Fahrenheit/74° Celsius). Transfer to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes, then slice into thin strips.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Honey Sriracha Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Seasoned Rice Vinegar, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the sauce into the same pan and simmer for 1-2 minutes, then add the sliced chicken back in and toss to coat.
', '
Divide cooked rice among four serving bowls. Arrange steamed broccoli, shredded carrots, and sliced cucumbers around the edges. Place the sliced hot honey ginger chicken on top. Drizzle with any remaining sauce for extra flavor.\xa0Sprinkle with chopped green onions and sesame seeds. Serve warm and enjoy!
\xa0
For more exciting and simple chicken recipes, visit our recipes section and explore for yourself!
']

Name: rice-cooker-japanese-curry-rice-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups of uncooked white rice', '3 cups of water (or follow your rice cooker’s guidelines)', '1 large onion, finely chopped', '2 medium red or yellow bell peppers, deseeded and finely chopped', '1/2 lb. thinly sliced beef', 'Green onions, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 curry roux cubes', 'salt and black pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Wash the rice under cold water until the water runs clear to remove excess starch.\xa0In the rice cooker, add the rinsed rice, water, chopped onion, bell peppers, curry roux, salt, black pepper,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, and\xa0Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Sauce, stirring lightly to blend the flavors.\xa0
', '
Place the sliced beef on top of the rice mixture. Spread meat out evenly so it cooks uniformly. Close the rice cooker lid and start the regular cooking cycle. Let the rice cook until done (about 15-20 minutes, depending on your rice cooker).
', '
Once the rice is cooked, fluff it with a fork and garnish with green onion. Enjoy!\xa0
\xa0
Check out other easy recipe ideas as well for when you want a ton of flavor with little to no effort in the kitchen.
']

Name: creamy-pasta-recipe-with-asian-steak
Ingredients: ['12 oz. rigatoni pasta', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. ribeye or sirloin steak', '2 Tbsp. chopped parsley, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tbsp butter', '1 small shallot. minced', '1 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup heavy cream', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '½ cup grated Parmesan cheese', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Cook the rigatoni according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
', '
The Asian steak recipe is incredibly simple: Rub the steak in one tablespoon of\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium\xa0Oyster Sauce and let marinate while the pasta cooks. Then, sear over medium-high heat in a pan with the olive oil. Cook for 3-4 minutes per side based on desired doneness. Let rest.\xa0
', '
While the steak rests, make the sauce by melting butter in the same pan. Add shallots and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic and cook for 30 seconds. Stir in heavy cream,\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper. Simmer for 2 minutes until thickened.
', '
Combine rigatoni and sauce by tossing the cooked pasta in the creamy oyster sauce mixture.
', '
Top with sliced steak, garnish with chopped parsley, and serve immediately.
\xa0
Check out more 30 minute recipe ideas for easy and tasty meals!
']

Name: spaghetti-and-meatballs-recipe-with-oyster-sauce-by-chef-steve-samson
Ingredients: ['--FOR THE MEATBALLS--', '1 kg. ground beef', '200 g. diced onions', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 sprig finely chopped rosemary', '4 leaves finely chopped sage', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '100 g. toasted panko', '150 g. grated parmigiano reggiano', '2 whole eggs and 2 egg yolks', '1 Tbsp. chopped Italian parsley', 'Black pepper and grated nutmeg to taste', '--FOR THE SPAGHETTI--', '500 g. spaghetti (125 g. per person)', '4 stalks scallions, white and green parts separated']
Seasoning: ['100 g. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['--FOR THE TOMATO SAUCE--', '150 g. diced onion', '75 g. diced celery', '75 g. diced carrot', '50 g. extra virgin olive oil', '25 g. tomato paste', '100 mL dry white wine', '125 g. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 fresh bay leaf', '500 mL unsalted beef stock (or chicken stock or water)']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
\xa0
Sweat the onions,\xa0Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, sage, and rosemary in the vegetable oil over medium heat until soft. Let cool. Add the cooked onion mix to a bowl with the remaining ingredients for the meatballs,\xa0making sure everything is very cold. Knead meatball farce energetically until it is tacky and sticks to your hand without falling off. Form the meatballs with a 2-ounce ice cream scoop or by hand. Form meatball shape by hand. Place the meatballs on a baking tray lined with parchment paper and bake in the oven until brown (10-15 minutes). Set aside.
', '
While the meatballs bake, make the tomato sauce. Sweat the vegetables in olive oil over medium heat until soft (about 15 minutes). At this point, the meatballs should be ready to remove from the oven.
\xa0
Add the tomato paste and cook for about 5 more minutes. Add the wine and cook until the alcohol has evaporated. Add the Lee Kum Kee oyster sauce, bay leaf and stock. Bring to a simmer and add the meatballs (3 per person). Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
', '
Finely slice the white part of the scallion and set aside. Julienne the green parts lengthwise and place in ice water for at least 30 minutes so they curl. Drain well and set aside.\xa0
', '
Bring the meatballs and braising liquid to a simmer. In a separate pot, bring about 10 liters of water to a boil. Add about 75 g of salt to pasta water. Add the spaghetti and cook until al dente, stirring frequently.\xa0
', '
Place four large ladles of the meatball braising liquid into a pan large enough to hold the spaghetti. Add the spaghetti and white part of the scallions and toss well over medium heat until the sauce has thickened and is coating each strand of pasta. Plate the pasta in 4 pasta bowls. Add 3 meatballs to each bowl and garnish with the curly green onions. Enjoy!
\xa0
For more ways to use oyster sauce, check out our oyster sauce recipes page.\xa0
']

Name: crispy-enoki-mushroom-recipe-for-bao
Ingredients: ['8 oz. enoki mushrooms, trimmed and kept in small clusters', '1/4 cup cornstarch', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8 steamed bao buns', '1 cucumber, thinly sliced', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, for garnish', '2 stalks green onions, sliced, for garnish ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp water (slurry)']
Procedure:
['
Coat the enoki mushrooms lightly in cornstarch, ensuring an even layer for crispiness.
', '
Fry the enokis in vegetable oil over medium-high heat until golden and crispy, about 3 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
', '
Make the sticky glaze by combining\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium\xa0\xa0Soy Sauce, honey,\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium\xa0Seasoned Rice Vinegar, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium\xa0Pure Sesame Oil in a pan over medium heat. Stir in the cornstarch slurry and cook until thickened.
', '
Glaze the crispy enokis by tossing them in the sticky sauce until fully coated.
', '
Assemble the bao by adding sliced cucumber to each steamed bao bun, filling with glazed crispy enokis, then garnishing with sesame seeds and green onions before serving. Enjoy!
\xa0
For more creative recipe ideas for dinner, check out our Asian fusion recipes page.
']

Name: stuffed-shells-recipe-for-spicy-pasta
Ingredients: ['--- PASTA AND FILLING --- ', '20 jumbo pasta shells', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 cup ricotta cheese', '1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '½ cup grated parmesan cheese', '1 egg, beaten', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '--- FOR TOPPING ---', '½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '2 Tbsp parmesan cheese', '2 Tbsp. fresh basil, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for the filling', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 (28 oz.) can crushed tomatoes', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '½ tsp. dried oregano', '½ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook jumbo shells until al dente, according to package instructions. Drain and set aside to cool slightly.
', '
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add minced Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant. Stir in crushed tomatoes, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, oregano, salt and black pepper. Simmer on low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
', '
In a bowl, mix ricotta, shredded mozzarella, parmesan, beaten egg, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and fresh basil. Stir until well combined.
', '
Preheat oven to 375° Fahrenheit. Spread 1 cup of the spicy tomato sauce in the bottom of a baking dish. Stuff each shell with 2-3 tablespoons of the ricotta filling and place them in the dish, open side up. Pour the remaining spicy tomato sauce over the shells.
', '
Sprinkle with mozzarella and parmesan cheese. Cover with foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove foil and bake for another 10 minutes, until cheese is melted and bubbly. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil for an extra spicy kick. Garnish with fresh basil and serve hot.
For more ways to spice up your favorite recipes, check out our chili crisp recipes page!
']

Name: spicy-shrimp-pasta-recipe-with-creamy-tomato-sauce
Ingredients: ['--- FOR THE BREADCRUMBS ---', '½ cup plain panko breadcrumbs', '2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'Juice of ½ lemon', '¼ tsp. salt', '--- FOR THE PASTA AND SAUCE --- ', '½ lb. Casarecce pasta (or any curly pasta)', '2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '½ lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'Juice of 1 lemon', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '½ cup heavy cream', '2 Tbsp. parsley, finely chopped', 'Pasta water, as needed']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Make the Lemon-Garlic Panko Breadcrumbs: In a large sauté pan over low heat, heat olive oil, then add\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic. Sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant. Stir in panko breadcrumbs and salt, toasting until light golden brown. Add lemon juice and continue to toast for 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook Casarecce pasta until al dente. Reserve 1cup pasta water before draining.
', '
In a large pan over medium-low heat, add olive oil, shrimp,\xa0Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, lemon juice, and salt and pepper. Sauté for 1-2 minutes, until shrimp is fully cooked. Remove shrimp from the pan and set aside.
', '
In the same pan, add Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil and tomato paste. Stir to combine. Reduce heat to low and stir in heavy cream.
', '
Add cooked pasta to the pan along with ¼ cup reserved pasta water. Toss over medium heat until the sauce coats the pasta. Add more pasta water as needed, ¼ cup at a time. Return shrimp to the pan, toss to combine, and cook for 1 more minute. Plate the pasta and top with parsley and lemon-garlic panko breadcrumbs. Drizzle with extra Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil for more heat.
\xa0
Enjoy, and check out more dinner recipe ideas to add to your easy recipe lineup as well!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']
