\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: skillet-chicken-gnocchi-recipe-with-hoisin
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil (or sundried tomato oil from the jar)', '1 lb. chicken breast, cut into ¾ – 1-inch pieces', '2 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup chicken stock', '1 cup heavy cream ', '16 oz. gnocchi', '⅓ cup sundried tomatoes, chopped', '½ cup grated parmesan cheese, plus more for garnish', '2 cups baby spinach leaves']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Italian seasoning', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. smoked paprika']
Procedure:
['
In a large skillet over medium-high heat, heat the olive oil. Add chicken, season with Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper, and cook for 4-5 minutes until golden brown. Ensure chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165° Fahrenheit. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
', '
In the same skillet, melt butter and add\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic. Cook for 30 seconds until fragrant. Pour in chicken stock, scraping the bottom of the pan to deglaze and absorb the flavorful bits.
', '
Add heavy cream and gnocchi to the pan. Simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens and the gnocchi becomes tender.
', '
Lower heat to medium-low, then stir in\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Hoisin Sauce, smoked paprika, sundried tomatoes, and Parmesan cheese.
', "
Add baby spinach, stirring until wilted. If needed, add a splash of water to loosen the sauce. Return the cooked chicken to the skillet, stir to coat, then remove from heat. Garnish with Parmesan cheese and enjoy!
\xa0
We've got a ton more hoisin recipe ideas as well if you need some more easy meal inspiration!
"]

Name: nacho-loaded-potato-skins-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 small potatoes (such as baby gold or red potatoes)', '1 Tbsp olive oil', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese', '½ cup cooked ground beef ', '¼ cup black beans, drained and rinsed', '¼ cup diced tomatoes', '¼ cup sliced black olives', '¼ cup sliced green onions', '¼ cup sour cream (or Greek yogurt)']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. smoked paprika', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400° Fahrenheit. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Scrub the small potatoes clean, then pierce each with a fork. Toss with olive oil, salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
\xa0
Arrange potatoes on the baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until fork-tender. Let cool slightly.
', '
Cut each potato in half lengthwise. Carefully scoop out some of the centers, leaving about ¼ inch of potato flesh inside. Place skins cut-side up on the baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes to crisp up.
', '
Sprinkle most of the shredded cheese inside each potato skin, reserving some for the top. In a small bowl, mix ground beef with Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and black beans. Spoon the mixture evenly over the cheese.
', '
Top with remaining shredded cheese and return to the oven for 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
', '
Top with diced tomatoes, black olives and a drizzle of sour cream. Garnish with additional Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and sliced green onion. Serve immediately and enjoy!
\xa0
Be sure to check out all of our remaining snack recipes if you need more ideas for a party!
']

Name: tofu-power-bowl-recipe-with-hoisin-glaze
Ingredients: ['1 14 oz. block firm tofu, pressed and cubed', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 cups cooked quinoa', '2 cups mixed greens', '1 cup shredded carrots', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '1 small cucumber, thinly sliced', '1 avocado, sliced', '1 cup cooked edamame']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, divided']
Procedure:
['
Cook the tofu by heating vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add tofu cubes and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
', '
Glaze the tofu by adding 2 tbsp Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and tossing to coat. Cook for 1-2 minutes until caramelized, then remove from heat.
', '
Assemble the bowls by dividing quinoa and mixed greens among four bowls. Add the toppings by arranging carrots, red cabbage, cucumber, avocado, edamame, and hoisin-glazed tofu over the base.
', '
Drizzle with the remaining 1 tbsp of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce before serving. Enjoy!
\xa0
Check out more hoisin recipe ideas on our hoisin recipes page.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-pork-belly-sisig-recipe-by-chef-josh-espinosa
Ingredients: ['--- FOR THE PORK BELLY ---', '1 lb. pork belly ', '1 sprig thyme ', '1 sprig rosemary ', '3 bay leaves ', '20 whole black peppercorns ', '1/2 white onion, roughly chopped', '1 whole garlic bulb, halved crosswise', '--- FOR FINISHING THE SISIG ---', '1 fried egg', '2 Tbsp scallions, chopped ', 'White rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup red onions, finely chopped ', '2 Thai chilis, finely chopped', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for garnish', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '¼ cup sugar ', '3 Tbsp. calamansi juice or lemon juice ', '1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Boil The Pork Belly: In a large pot, combine pork belly, thyme, onion, rosemary, bay leaves, peppercorns, and halved garlic bulbs. Add enough water to cover the pork. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours until the pork is tender.
\xa0
Cool and Chop The Pork Belly:\xa0Remove the pork from the pot and let it cool. Once cooled, chop the pork into small, bite-sized pieces.
\xa0
Fry the Pork Belly:\xa0In a hot pan or skillet with a little oil, fry the chopped pork belly pieces until golden brown and crispy. Remove from the pan and set aside. 
', '
In a bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium\xa0Soy Sauce,\xa0Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Sauce, sugar, calamansi or lemon juice, and\xa0Pure\xa0Sesame Oil. Stir until the sugar is dissolved. 
', '
In the same pan, sauté minced ginger, chopped red onions, Sriracha Mayo, Thai chilis and minced garlic until fragrant and translucent. 
', '
Return the fried pork to the pan with the sautéed aromatics. Pour in the prepared sauce and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is reduced and the pork is well-coated, about 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', "
Transfer the sisig to a serving platter. Top with a fried egg, a pinch of pepper, sprinkle with chopped scallions, and garnish with\xa0Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Honey Sriracha. Serve hot.


Chef's Tip: For an authentic sisig experience, serve on a sizzling plate to keep the dish hot and to achieve a crispy texture on the bottom.\xa0
\xa0
Don't forget to check out the recipes page for more pork recipes!
\xa0
\xa0
"]

Name: honey-glazed-shrimp-recipe-by-chef-tue-nguyen---twaydabae
Ingredients: ['½ lb. jumbo shrimp, peeled and deveined', '½ cup cornstarch', 'Salt and pepper, to taste', '1 egg white, beaten until frothy', '1 cup avocado oil']
Sauce Mix: ['--- FOR THE GLAZE---', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '3 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 tsp. cayenne pepper', '1 tsp. red chili flakes']
Procedure:
['
Pat the shrimp dry, then coat in beaten egg white. Transfer to cornstarch seasoned to taste with salt and pepper, and ensure each shrimp is fully coated.
', '
Add avocado oil to a large pan on medium-high heat. Shallow fry the shrimp for 30 seconds on each side, just enough to color each side without fully cooking the shrimp. This will make sure it stays tender and doesn’t overcook when it is glazed. Remove shrimp from frying pan and drain. Also remove all except 1 tablespoon of the avocado oil, reserving to use for the glaze.
', '
Lower the pan to medium heat. Combine all of the ingredients for the glaze and mix well. Add to the pan with the remaining avocado oil and cook down until a thick glaze is formed, about 3-4 minutes.
', '
Add the shrimp into the glaze and toss until fully coated, about 30 seconds to a minute. This should also fully cook the shrimp.
', '
Transfer to a serving plate and enjoy! We highly recommend enjoying this with Chef Tue’s easy fried rice recipe. 
']

Name: easy-chinese-sausage-fried-rice-recipe-by-chef-tue-nguyen---twaydabae
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '2 Chinese sausages (lap cheong), finely diced', '½ white onion, finely diced', '3 stalks green onion, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 eggs, beaten', '2 cups cooked and cooled white rice (day old or leftover is best)']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. fish sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the diced Chinese sausage to a frying pan or wok on medium heat. Cooked for 2-3 minutes to let the fat render.
', '
Add the diced white and green onions and toss to combine until the onions soften and start to turn translucent, about 1-2 minutes.
', '
Beat the eggs and add a teaspoon of fish sauce to season. Move the Chinese sausage and veggies to one half of the pan and scramble the eggs in the other half. Add your day old white rice and stir everything together to combine.
', '
Season with an equal blend of\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium\xa0Soy Sauce and Sriracha Chili Sauce before serving. You can mix together 2 Tbsp. of each and then add to taste, saving any extra for future fried rice recipes. Enjoy!
']

Name: vietnamese-shaking-beef-recipe-by-chef-tue-nguyen---twaydabae
Ingredients: ['1 lb. Steak of choice, cut into bite-size cubes (recommended: Top Sirloin or Filet Mignon)', '1 Tbsp. Neutral Oil', '1 Tbsp. Butter', 'Greens of Choice, for serving (recommended: Watercress)', 'Steamed White Rice, for serving']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp Fish sauce', '1 tsp. Sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Combine the steak cubes with\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium\xa0Oyster Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, fish sauce, sugar, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic. Mix well to combine, cover, and let marinade for a half hour. DO NOT marinade for more than 60 minutes, otherwise the meat will start to get tough. 
', '
Heat a wok or large frying pan on high heat with your neutral oil. Add steak and let sear on one side until well browned, about 2-3 minutes.
', '
Add your butter then shake the beef in the pan vigorously for a minute or two. Make sure there are no raw sides of the steak and that the sauce has coated the shaking beef evenly.
', "
Transfer to a dish with veggies of choice and serve with steamed rice on the side. Enjoy!
\xa0
We've got a whole bunch of easy beef recipes you can check out for more cooking ideas.
"]

Name: easy-lettuce-wraps-recipe-with-pork
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. neutral cooking oil', '1 lb. ground pork or chicken', '1 8 oz. can water chestnuts, finely chopped', '1 red bell pepper, finely diced', '4 stalks green onion, chopped', '¼ cup roasted peanuts (optional)', '4 oz. carrots, diced', '1 head iceberg or Romaine lettuce, separated into individual leaves', 'Black and white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 8 oz. package Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Lettuce Wrap']
Procedure:
['
Heat neutral oil over high heat in a frying pan. Add ground pork (or chicken) in a thin layer and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side until browned. Break the pork up into small pieces and add the water chestnuts, carrots, and bell pepper. Cook for another 2-3 minutes.
', '
Add 6 oz. of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap to the pan, saving some back for garnish. Toss well to combine and stir through 3 of the chopped green onions and toasted peanuts if using.
', '
Spoon a few tablespoons of the mixture into separated lettuce leaves to form the lettuce wraps. Drizzle with remaining Sauce for Lettuce Wrap and garnish with remaining green onion and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
\xa0
Be sure to browse our recipe catalog for even more easy recipes!
']

Name: broccoli-beef-noodles-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 package rice noodles or egg noodles of choice', '2 cups broccoli, cut into small pieces', '2 Tbsp. neutral oil', '1 lb. beef sirloin steak, cut into bite-sized pieces', 'Salt and pepper, to season', '1 stalk green onion, thinly sliced for garnish', 'Black and white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 8 oz. package Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles according to package instructions in boiling water. 
', '
At the same time, add oil to a wok or large sauté pan on medium high heat. Season sirloin steak pieces then add to pan to sear for a couple of minutes. Toss and cook thoroughly, which should take 2-3 more minutes. 
', '
With two minutes left on the noodles, add the broccoli to blanch. Drain the broccoli and noodles and add to the pan once the beef is evenly seared and fully cooked. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef and toss to coat thoroughly. 
', '
Transfer to a serving plate and garnish with green onion and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
\xa0
Check out our 30 minutes recipes page for more easy meals ready in under half an hour.
']

Name: easy-salmon-recipe-with-orange-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 cups white rice', '2 ½ - 3 cups water', '2 Tbsp. neutral oil', '4 6-8 oz. salmon filets, skin-on', 'Salt and pepper, to taste', '1 stalk green onion, thinly sliced, for garnish', 'Toasted sesame seeds, for garnish', '1 orange, thinly sliced, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 8 oz. pouch Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken']
Procedure:
['
Wash rice thoroughly and add to rice cooker with 2 ½ to 3 cups of water, depending on the type of rice you are using. Cook thoroughly until steamed and tender.
', '
Pat salmon dry and preheat the oil a large frying pan on medium heat. Season the salmon on the skin side and add to the pan, skin side down. Season the top side of the salmon and cook until 75% of the salmon changes color, about 5-6 minutes. 
', '
Flip the salmon over and add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken to the pan. Gently swirl the pan to coat the salmon in the sauce as it reduces for about 4-5 minutes. 
', '
Remove salmon from heat and pour the reduced sauce over the salmon. Garnish with green onion, sesame seeds, and orange slices, and serve with the steamed rice. Enjoy!
\xa0
Find more easy ways to cook fish on our seafood recipes page.
']

Name: easy-falafel-recipe-over-brown-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['--FOR THE FALAFEL MIX--', '1 cup dried chickpeas (soaked overnight)', '1/2 small onion, roughly chopped', '3 cloves garlic', '1/2 cup fresh parsley', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. ground coriander', '1/2 tsp. baking powder', '1 tsp. salt', '1/4 tsp. black pepper', '2–3 Tbsp. chickpea flour (or cornstarch, as needed)', 'Oil for frying or air frying', '--FOR THE RICE BOWLS--', '2 cups cooked brown rice or quinoa', '2 cups mixed greens', '1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '1 cup cucumber, diced', '1 cup shredded carrots', '1 avocado, sliced', '½ red onion, thinly sliced', '¼ cup chopped fresh parsley', '½ cup crumbled feta cheese']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Make the falafel: In a food processor, blend soaked chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, cumin, coriander, baking powder, salt, and pepper on the pulse setting until coarse and sticky. Add chickpea flour or cornstarch as needed until the mixture holds together. Shape into 12 patties. Heat 1 Tbsp oil in a pan and shallow fry 2–3 minutes per side, or air fry at 375°F for 5–7 minutes, flipping halfway.
', '
Prepare bowls: Divide brown rice or quinoa and mixed greens evenly among four serving bowls.\xa0Top each bowl with cherry tomatoes, cucumber, shredded carrots, avocado, red onion, and chopped parsley.\xa0Place 3 crispy falafel in each bowl. Sprinkle with crumbled feta.
', '
Drizzle 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha over each bowl. Serve immediately and enjoy!
\xa0
For more sweet and spicy ideas, check out the Honey Sriracha recipes page.
']

Name: bacon-wrapped-jalapeno-poppers-recipe-with-goat-cheese
Ingredients: ['8 large jalapeños, halved and deseeded', '4 oz. goat cheese, softened', '4 oz. cream cheese, softened', '4 slices bacon, cut in half (to make 8 pieces)', '1 stalk green onion, chopped for garnish', 'toothpicks, for securing bacon']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Set oven to 400° Fahrenheit and line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a wire rack.
', '
In a bowl, mix goat cheese, cream cheese, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce until smooth and well combined.\xa0Evenly fill each jalapeño half with the cheese mixture, smoothing the top.\xa0Wrap each stuffed jalapeño half with half a slice of bacon, securing the ends with a toothpick if needed.
', '
Arrange bacon-wrapped jalapeños on the baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the bacon is crispy and the jalapeños are tender. Remove from the oven, let cool slightly, then sprinkle with chopped green onions. Serve warm and enjoy!
\xa0
Visit our oyster sauce recipes page for more simple and tasty ways to season with oyster sauce.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-egg-rolls-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 ½ cups shredded cabbage', '½ cup shredded carrots', '½ cup shiitake mushrooms, finely chopped', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup cooked shredded chicken (or tofu for vegetarian)', '8 egg roll wrappers', '1 egg, beaten', 'Cooking spray', '1 stalk green onion, finely chopped, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add cabbage, carrots, shiitake mushrooms, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee  Minced Garlic. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes. Mix in shredded chicken and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, then remove from heat.
', '
Place 2 Tbsp of filling in the center of each egg roll wrapper. Fold in the sides, roll tightly, and seal with beaten egg.
', '
Lightly spray the egg rolls with cooking spray and place them in a single layer in the air fryer basket. Cook at 375° Fahrenheit (190° Celsius) for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway, until golden and crispy.
', '
Drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with chopped green onions.\xa0Serve hot with extra Hoisin\xa0Sauce\xa0for dipping.
\xa0
Explore some other hoisin recipes if you need more ways to use this sweet and savory sauce!
']

Name: croque-madame-recipe-with-chili-crisp-eggs
Ingredients: ['4 slices thick-cut bread', '2 tsp. Dijon mustard', '4 slices ham', '1 Tbsp. butter', '2 eggs', 'microgreens, for garnish', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '¾ cup milk', '½ cup shredded Gruyère cheese', 'Salt and black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Make the béchamel sauce by melting butter in a pan over medium heat. Whisk in flour and cook for 1 minute, then slowly whisk in milk until thickened. Remove from heat, stir in half of the Gruyère cheese, and season with salt and black pepper.
', '
Assemble the sandwiches by spreading Dijon mustard on two slices of bread. Layer with ham, then top with a spoonful of béchamel sauce. Cover with the remaining bread slices.
', '
Toast the sandwiches in a pan over medium heat with butter, cooking for 3-4 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy. Top with béchamel and remaining Gruyere cheese and broil in the oven for 2 minutes until bubbly and slightly browned. Transfer to serving plates.
', '
Fry the eggs in Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil until crispy around the edges. Place one egg on each sandwich, garnish with microgreens and chives and enjoy!

Make sure to visit our chili crisp recipes page for more spicy food ideas!
']

Name: cheesy-chicken-wrap-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup cooked shredded or diced chicken', '½ cup shredded cheddar cheese', '4 large flour tortillas', '1 Tbsp. butter or oil (for pan-frying)']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup sour cream', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Make the creamy sauce by mixing sour cream, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil in a bowl.
', '
Combine chicken, shredded cheddar, and half of the creamy sauce in a separate bowl, mixing well.
', '
Divide the mixture evenly onto the center of each flour tortilla, then drizzle with extra sauce before wrapping tightly like a burrito.
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat and lightly grease with butter or oil. Pan-fry the wraps for 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy.
', "
Slice and serve warm with extra Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil for dipping!

If you're feeling a simple and quick meal, visit our\xa0easy recipes\xa0page.
"]

Name: lobster-roll-recipe-with-spicy-garlic-butter-sauce
Ingredients: ['1.5 lb. cooked lobster meat, roughly chopped', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '4 split-top brioche hot dog buns', 'Chopped chives, for garnish', 'Lemon wedges, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['5 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Melt butter in a pan over medium heat, then stir in Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce until combined.
', '
Add lobster meat to the pan and toss to coat. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring, until warmed through. Squeeze in lemon juice, stir, and remove from heat.
', '
Lightly toast the outsides of the buns in a dry pan until golden brown. Fill the buns with the spicy buttered lobster, then garnish with chopped chives. Serve with lemon wedges on the side.

For more easy lobster ideas, check out our seafood recipes page.
']

Name: easy-chicken-pot-pie-recipe-in-a-mason-jar
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. butter', '1 small onion, diced', '1 cup mushrooms, diced', '1 cup frozen mixed vegetables (peas, carrots, corn)', '2 cups cooked shredded chicken', '½ cup heavy cream', '1 sheet puff pastry, cut into 5 rounds', '1 egg, beaten (for egg wash)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400° Fahrenheit (200° Celsius). Melt butter in a pan over medium heat and sauté onion and mushrooms until softened, about 3 minutes.
', '
Add mixed vegetables and shredded chicken, then stir in\xa0Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Flavored Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, and heavy cream. Simmer for 2 minutes until slightly thickened.
', '
Divide the filling evenly into 5 oven-safe mason jars. Top each jar with a puff pastry round, pressing the edges to seal. Brush with egg wash for a golden crust.
', '
Bake for 20-25 minutes until the pastry is puffed and golden brown. Let cool slightly before serving.

Be sure to check out the chicken recipes page for more ideas!
']

Name: spicy-quiche-lorraine-recipe-for-mothers-day-brunch
Ingredients: ['1 pre-made pie crust', '6 slices bacon, cooked and crumbled', '1 cup shredded Gruyère cheese', '4 eggs', '1 cup heavy cream', '2 tbsp chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce (plus more for drizzling)', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
Pre-bake the crust by placing the pie crust in a 9-inch pie pan, pricking the bottom with a fork, and baking at 375° Fahrenheit (190° Celsius) for 10 minutes.
', '
Prepare the filling by whisking together eggs, heavy cream, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
', '
Assemble the quiche by spreading most of the cooked bacon and shredded Gruyère cheese evenly over the pre-baked crust, then pouring the egg mixture on top.
', '
Bake at 375° Fahrenheit (190° Celsius) for 25-30 minutes until the center is set and slightly golden. Let cool for at least 20 minutes. Refrigerate and fully chill if you want to serve cold.
', "
Garnish and serve by sprinkling chives and remaining bacon on top then drizzling with extra Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.\xa0

We've got a bunch more sriracha recipes as well if you're looking more ways to use the chili sauce!
"]

Name: island-style-grilled-wings-recipe-by-chef-logan-sandoval
Ingredients: ['3 lb. jumbo split chicken wings (fresh or thawed)', '2 limes, cut into eights', '1 Tbsp. black and white toasted sesame seeds', '3 stalks scallions, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. paprika', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '1/2 Tbsp. kosher salt', '1/2 Tbsp. Sichuan peppercorn powder', '3 Tbsp. grapeseed oil']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Kosher Salt', '¼ cup Dark Brown Sugar', '1 qt. water', '2 qt. ice', '2 pods star anise', '6 bay leaves', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 oz. peeled ginger', '1 oz. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Mirin', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned rice Vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Combine the quarter cup of kosher salt, brown sugar, water, anise, bay leaf, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, and ginger in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil. Turn off the heat and let it steep for 10-15 mins. Pour over ice and mix well bringing the temperature of the brine down. Pour brine over wings and let sit for 48hrs.
', '
After 48rs, drain wings and rinse well, pat dry thoroughly. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Toss with paprika, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder, kosher salt, Sichuan peppercorn and grapeseed oil. Line up on a roasting rack with parchment paper and roast wings skin side up for approximately 35-40 mins or until internal temperature reaches 155 degrees Fahrenheit. Remove from the oven and let cool.
', '
Combine the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Thai Sweet Chili Sauce, Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Premium Dark Soy Sauce, and mirin in a small saucepan to make the hoisin barbecue sauce. Bring to a light boil, then reduce to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Turn on the grill and get it going hot. Spray or wipe down with neutral oil so chicken does not stick. When the grill is nice and hot, start grilling the wings in batches so as to not crowd the grate. As wings are grilling, brush with hoisin barbecue sauce and look for caramelization and not burning. Make sure to get good color and sauce on all sides and nook and crannies.
', '
Garnish with lime, toasted sesame seeds and scallion and serve immediately. Enjoy!

Be sure to check out our chicken recipes page for more tasty ideas like this!
']

Name: pizza-bagels-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 plain bagels, halved', '¼ cup pizza sauce', '½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', 'sliced pepperoni, for topping', '¼ tsp dried oregano']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400° Fahrenheit (200° Celsius). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
', '
In a small bowl, mix pizza sauce with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce for a spicy base. Spread the spicy sauce over each bagel half, then top with shredded mozzarella cheese and pepperoni. Sprinkle with oregano.\xa0
', '
Place bagels on the baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly. Let cool slightly, then enjoy your Spicy Sriracha Pizza Bagels with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce for drizzling!\xa0

Be sure to visit our easy recipes page for other ideas that take just a matter of minutes to make.\xa0
']

Name: butter-chicken-panini-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups shredded cooked chicken', '4 naan breads, halved', '2 Tbsp. butter, divided', '1 cup shredded mozzarella', '½ cup thinly sliced red onion', '½ cup baby spinach leaves']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, plus more for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. butter', '1 small onion, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp garam masala', '1 tsp ground cumin', '½ tsp ground turmeric', '½ tsp smoked paprika', '½ tsp Kashmiri chili powder (adjust to taste, use cayenne if not available)', '1 cup tomato purée', '½ cup heavy cream ', '½ tsp salt (adjust to taste)', '½ tsp sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil ']
Procedure:
['
In a medium saucepan, melt 1 Tbsp butter over medium heat. Add onion, cooking until soft and translucent (about 3 minutes). Stir in\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger, cooking for another 30 seconds until fragrant. Add garam masala, cumin, turmeric, paprika, and chili powder, stirring for 1 minute to toast the spices.\xa0
', '
Pour in the tomato purée, reduce heat to low, and let simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in heavy cream, salt, and sugar. Simmer for another 2 minutes, then mix in Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chiu Chow Style\xa0Chili Crisp Oil. Remove from heat and stir in remaining 1 Tbsp of butter.
', '
In a bowl, mix shredded chicken, 1 cup of the butter chicken sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil until well combined.
', '
Spread the butter chicken mixture over one side of each naan half, then layer with shredded mozzarella, red onion, and baby spinach. Top with the other naan half to form a sandwich.
', '
Melt butter in a grill pan over medium heat. Place the naan sandwiches in the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, pressing gently, until golden brown and the cheese is melted. Slice and serve warm with extra Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil for drizzling.

Check our chili crisp recipes\xa0page for more recipes with layers of complex heat!
']

Name: shrimp-and-grits-recipe-with-hot-honey-glaze
Ingredients: ['1 cup quick-cooking grits', '2 cups chicken broth', '1 cup milk', '1 cup shredded sharp cheddar cheese', '1 Tbsp. butter', 'salt and black pepper, to taste', '1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '1 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. chopped green onion, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook the grits by bringing chicken broth and milk to a boil. Stir in grits, reduce heat, and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in cheddar cheese, butter, salt, and black pepper. Cover and set aside.
', '
Season the shrimp with smoked paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
', '
Sauté the shrimp in butter over medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
', '
Glaze the shrimp by adding Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce to the pan, tossing to coat. Cook for 30 seconds until warmed through.
', "
Serve by spooning cheesy grits into bowls and topping with hot honey shrimp. Garnish with chopped green onions and enjoy!

We've got a bunch more honey sriracha recipes if you're looking for ways to use this sauce as well.
"]

Name: arayes-recipe-for-lebanese-style-stuffed-pitas
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef or lamb', '1 onion, grated', '1 cup chopped parsley', '3 Tbsp. olive oil, divided', '4 pita breads, cut into halves']
Seasoning: ['2-3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp allspice ', '1 tsp ground cumin', '½ tsp Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix ground meat, onion, parsley, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, allspice, cumin, pepper and 1 Tbsp olive oil together until well combined.
', '
Cut pitas in half and gently open the pockets. Evenly spread the seasoned meat inside each pita half and fill to about a half inch thick.
', '
Brush each pita with olive oil. Heat a grill pan over medium heat and grill for 4-5 minutes per side, pressing gently, until crispy and cooked through.
', '
In a small bowl, mix Greek yogurt, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, and lemon juice until smooth.
', "
Serve the arayes with the spicy yogurt sauce for dipping and enjoy!

If you're looking for more ways to use oyster sauce, visit our oyster sauce recipes page.
"]

Name: breakfast-bagel-sandwich-recipe-on-everything-bagel
Ingredients: ['2 everything bagels, halved', '2 Tbsp. cream cheese', '1 Tbsp. butter', '4 eggs', '2 slices cheddar cheese', '4 slices cooked bacon ', '½ cup fresh arugula']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Toast the bagels in a toaster until golden.
', '
Heat butter and scramble the eggs in a pan over medium heat, stirring gently until soft. Once nearly done, place cheddar cheese slices on top, cover the pan, and let melt for 30 seconds.
', '
Spread 1 tablespoon of cream cheese on the bottom half of each toasted bagel, then add 2 bacon slices on top.
', '
Place the cheesy scrambled eggs over the bacon, then drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil before adding fresh arugula.
', "
Close with the top bagel halves and enjoy your Spicy Bagel Breakfast Sandwiches!

We've got plenty of other flavor-packed breakfast ideas on the breakfast recipes page if you're curious for more!
"]

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: veggie-bibimbap-with-brown-rice-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups cooked brown rice (OR other whole grain, like quinoa)', '1 cup spinach', '1 cup shredded carrots', '1 cup shiitake mushrooms, sliced', '1 cup bean sprouts', '1 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, divided, plus more for drizzling ', '2 eggs', 'green onions, sliced for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Sauté each of the vegetables separately: Heat ½ tsp Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure\xa0Sesame Oil in a pan, stir-fry for 3-4 minutes. Remove from heat.
', '
In the same pan, fry eggs until desired doneness (runny yolk recommended).
', '
Arrange the vegetables and fried eggs over the brown rice.
', '
Drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce and more Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Garnish with green onions and sprinkle with sesame seeds and enjoy!\xa0

For more veggie-centric recipes, visit our vegetables recipes page.\xa0
']

Name: turkey-meatball-recipe-for-easy-meal-prep
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground turkey', '1/2 cup breadcrumbs', '1 Tbsp. neutral cooking oil', '2.5 cups cooked rice', '2 cups steamed veggies', '1 cup kimchi']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp garlic powder', '1 tsp onion powder', 'Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix ground turkey, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, garlic powder, onion powder, and breadcrumbs. Roll into small meatballs.
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat, lightly oil it, and cook the meatballs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally until browned and fully cooked.
', "
Divide the rice into 5 meal prep containers, top with turkey meatballs and drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Honey Sriracha. Add in your favorite steamed veggies and kimchi.\xa0 Let cool before sealing.

If you're looking for more turkey recipes for inspiration, visit our turkey recipes page.
"]

Name: roasted-potato-salad-recipe-with-honey-sriracha-dressing
Ingredients: ['½ lb baby potatoes, cut in half', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ tsp garlic powder', 'salt and pepper to taste', '1 cup spring greens mix', '¼ cup thinly sliced radishes', '1 Tbsp. chopped chives']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400 °Fahrenheit (200 °Celsius). Toss baby potatoes with olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes until golden and crispy. Let cool slightly.
', '
In a bowl, mix dijon mustard, Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce, and lemon juice until smooth.
', '
In a large salad bowl, combine roasted potatoes, spring mix, sliced radishes, and chopped chives.
', '
Add the dressing and gently mix until evenly coated. Enjoy warm or at room temperature!

Check out our salad recipes page for more unique and tasty salad ideas.
']

Name: crispy-chicken-tacos-recipe-with-street-corn-salad-topping
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. chicken tenders', '1 cup all-purpose flour', '1/2 cup cornstarch', '1 tsp garlic powder', '1 tsp smoked paprika', '½ tsp salt', '½ tsp Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '1 egg', '1 Tbsp. water', 'Vegetable oil, for frying', '8 soft taco-size flour tortillas', '1 cup corn kernels ', '¼ cup crumbled cotija cheese', '1/4 cup chopped cilantro', 'Lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for drizzling']
Marinade: ['1 cup buttermilk', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the chicken by soaking the chicken tenders in buttermilk and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce for at least 15 minutes.
', '
Prepare the coating by whisking together flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper in a bowl. In a separate bowl, whisk egg and water.
', '
Dip each tender into the egg mixture, then dredge in the flour mixture. Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat and fry until golden brown and crispy, about 4-5 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels.
', '
Warm the flour tortillas in a dry pan or over an open flame until soft and slightly charred.
', '
Assemble the tacos by filling each tortilla with 1-2 crispy fried chicken tenders, then topping with corn and cotija cheese. Drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo and garnish with cilantro. Serve with lime wedges.

Make sure to visit our sriracha recipes page for more spicy ideas!
']

Name: tilapia-recipe-with-lemon-butter-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 tilapia filets', '1 tsp paprika ', 'Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, to taste', 'lemon slices, for garnish', 'fresh parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. butter', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 Tbsp. lemon zest', '½ cup heavy cream']
Procedure:
['
Pat tilapia dry and season with paprika and black pepper.
', '
Heat butter in a pan over medium heat. Cook tilapia for 3-4 minutes per side until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
', '
Lower heat, add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, lemon juice, and heavy cream. Stir and let it simmer for 2-3 minutes until thickened. Mix in lemon zest until combined.
', '
Return tilapia to the pan and spoon the creamy sauce over. Simmer for 1-2 minutes until heated through.
', "
Plate the tilapia, drizzle with extra sauce, and garnish with lemon slices & parsley.

If you're curious about more seafood or fish recipes, check out the bolded link.
"]

Name: kung-pao-chicken-stir-fry-noodles-recipe-by-park-eun-young
Ingredients: ['10 oz. chicken thigh', '1½ lb. cooking oil, for frying', '2½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '5 stalks scallion, cut into sections', '1 tsp. ginger, grounded', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine ', '1 cup Water', '½ Tbsp. sugar', 'cornstarch, a little', '3 oz. roasted cashews', '1 pack plain instant noodle', 'Lee Kum Kee Fiery Hot Dried Shrimp Chili Oil, for garnish', '2 stalks green onion, chopped, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Fiery Hot Dried Shrimp Chili Oil', '5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Supreme Authentic First Draw Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', 'cornstarch, a little', '1 egg']
Procedure:
['
Cut the chicken thigh into bite-size pieces. In a medium bowl, add 1 Tbsp. cooking wine, 2 Tbsp. of\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Oyster Sauce, cornstarch, and egg to the cut chicken thigh and marinate for about 10 minutes.
', '
Heat cooking oil in a pot over medium heat and fry the marinated chicken until cooked.
', '
In a pot or wok, add 2 Tbsp. of\xa0Lee Kum Kee Fiery Hot\xa0Dried Shrimp Chili Oil, then stir-fry the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, scallions and ginger.\xa0Add 1 Tbsp. of cooking wine and 5 Tbsp. of\xa0Lee Kum Kee Supreme Authentic First Draw\xa0Soy Sauce.\xa0Add the fried chicken thigh and stir-fry until the chicken is well coated with thee sauce, then add 1 cup of water.\xa0Season with 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, 1/2 Tbsp. of sugar, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0White Pepper Powder.\xa0Add cornstarch to adjust thickness, then add cashews.
', '
Cook the instant noodles and rinse them. Put the noodles in a pot with cooking oil and heat over medium heat. Fry the noodles in the oil and flip them to fry the other side. The process takes about 3 minutes.
', '
Put the fried noodles on a plate, and pour the kung pao chicken with the sauce over the noodle. If desired, add more\xa0Lee Kum Kee Fiery Hot Dried\xa0Shrimp Chili Oil\xa0to increase the heat.\xa0Sprinkle chopped green onions on top for garnish, enjoy!
']

Name: dongpo-pork-dumplings-recipe-by-park-eun-young
Ingredients: ['--- Dongpo Pork ---', '1 lb pork belly', 'oil, for deep frying', '4½ cups water', '7 Tbsp. sugar', '1 oz. ginger, sliced', '4 garlic clove', '4 stalks scallion', '2 star anise', '---Dumpling Filling Ingredients---', '7 oz. ground pork ', '4 oz. shrimp, chopped', '4 oz. water chestnut (fresh or canned), chopped', '2 oz. scallion, chopped', '4 oz. chive, chopped', '1½ Tbsp. cooking wine', '¾ Tbsp. ginger juice', '1½  Tbsp. scallion oil', '½  cup water', '---Dumpling Wrappers---', '17 oz. all-purpose flour', '½ tsp. salt', '1½ cup hot water', 'OR', '15 ready-made dumpling wrappers']
Seasoning: ['--- Dongpo Pork ---', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 cup Lee Kum Kee Supreme Authentic First Draw Soy Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, to taste', '---Dumpling Filling Seasonings---', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Supreme Authentic First Draw Soy Sauce', '1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['---Slurry---', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '1 cup water', '2 tsp. oil ']
Procedure:
['
 Cook Dongpo Pork: Boil the pork belly until it no longer bleeds. Take out pork from water and brush with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Dark Soy Sauce, then deep-fry in oil at about 356°F until golden (about 5 minutes). Take the pork belly out from the oil and cut into strips (about diameter of 4mm). Set aside.\xa0
', '
In another pot, mix water,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Oyster Sauce, sugar,\xa0Lee Kum Kee Supreme Authentic First\xa0Draw Soy Sauce, and a little\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0White Pepper Powder to make the sauce.\xa0Add ginger, garlic, scallions, star anise, and pork belly to the sauce mixture and simmer for 20 minutes. After cooking, steam the pork in a steamer for 40 minutes.
', '
Prepare Fillings and Wrappers:\xa0Mix all the dumpling filling ingredients seasonings and set aside. If you are crafting your own dumpling wrappers: combine the dumpling wrapper ingredients, take out 20g (around 0.7 oz.) of the dough, roll it into a long shape, then flatten it with a rolling pin to make thin round sheets.
\xa0
', '
Assemble the Dumplings:\xa0Place a scoop of dumpling filling (1 oz.) and 1-2 strips of the cooked Dong Po pork in the center of each wrapper, then fold it up.\xa0
\xa0
', '
Steam the wrapped dumplings in a steamer for about 8 minutes.\xa0Meanwhile, prepare the slurry for the frosted pan-fried dumplings.\xa0
\xa0
 
', '
Frosted Pan-Fried the Dumplings: In a skillet, add a little oil and heat over medium heat, then place 7-8 dumplings in the center.\xa0Pour in enough slurry to a height of about 1/4 of the dumplings.\xa0Cover with a lid and simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes.\xa0After opening the lid, let it sit for 1-2 minutes, shaking the skillet to ensure the dumplings separate from the pan.\xa0Cover the pan with a plate and invert it to complete.
']

Name: congee-with-duck-confit-recipe-by-logan-sandoval
Ingredients: ['5 duck legs', '1/4 cup salt, for curing', '1/4 cup sugar, for curing', '3 cups rendered duck fat', '1 cup whole garlic cloves', '1 cup short grain rice', '8 cups duck, or equal parts chicken and pork stock', '5 eggs, poached', '1 bundle scallions, thinly sliced', '1/4 cup fried garlic']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Cure duck legs in 1/4 cup each of salt and sugar overnight, at least 24 hours. The next day, remove duck from the cure, rinse thoroughly, and pat dry.
', '
Preheat oven to 275 degrees Fahrenheit. Confit the duck legs by adding to an oven-proof vessel with duck fat and whole garlic cloves. Cook at 275 in the oven for 1.5-2 hours, or until a sharp knife slides through the duck with ease. Remove from oven and let cool completely while making your congee.
', '
Sauté Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Minced Garlic in a pot on medium heat until fragrant (pro tip: use some of the leftover duck fat for extra flavor). Add uncooked rice and toast over medium heat until lightly colored. Add stock and bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer. Cook for 45 minutes to an hour, until rice is thick and tender and the congee reaches a thick consistency.
', '
Season the congee with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce and Premium Soy Sauce, plus salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Remove duck legs from fat and shred meat. Crisp in a pan on medium high heat and set aside for serving. Poach eggs and cut scallions into thin slices as well.
', "
Assemble each bowl with a ladle full of congee, then top with a handful of pulled and crisped duck confit meat, a poached egg, a scattering of scallions and fried garlic, and a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp\xa0Oil. Enjoy!
Don't forget to check out our oyster sauce recipes collection for more ideas!
"]

Name: spicy-crab-creme-brulee-recipe
Ingredients: ['5 large egg yolks', '2 cups heavy cream', '1 cup fresh cooked crab meat', '1 bunch chopped chives', '2 Tbsp. sugar (for the top caramelized layer)']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', '⅛ tsp. grated nutmeg', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 320º Fahrenheit. In a mixing bowl, separate 5 egg yolks and set aside. In a saucepan, heat the heavy cream over medium heat until it simmers. Add the salt, white pepper, and grated nutmeg. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
', '
Temper the egg yolks: Slowly pour the warm cream mixture into the egg yolks while whisking continuously to prevent curdling. Once combined, strain the mixture to remove any lumps for a smoother texture.\xa0
', '
Place four ramekins in a baking dish. Divide the fresh crab meat evenly among the ramekins, then sprinkle some chopped chives on top. Pour the custard mixture into the ramekins, leaving a little space at the top.
', '
Pour hot water into the baking dish around the ramekins, about ⅓ of the way up the sides. This helps to keep the crème brulée moist and ensures a silky texture. Bake in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes. After baking, let the crème brulée cool to room temperature, then cover and refrigerate for at least 3-4 hours or overnight.
', '
Just before serving, sprinkle an even layer of sugar over each custard. Use a kitchen torch to caramelize the sugar until golden and crispy. Garnish with additional chives and enjoy!
']

Name: lamb-meatballs-in-spicy-pita-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 slice sandwich bread, ripped into small pieces', '1/3 cup whole milk', '1 large egg', '1 pound ground lamb', '1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '2 Tbsp. pomegranate molasses', '4 pitas, warmed', '½ cup tzatziki sauce', '4 cups lightly packed arugula', '8 mint leaves, torn into smaller pieces', '½ cup crumbled feta cheese', '1/2 cup pomegranate seeds']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, plus more for serving ', '1/2 cup fresh cilantro, chopped', '3 Tbsp. fresh mint, chopped', '1 1/2 tsp. ground coriander', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. finely grated orange zest', '1/2 tsp. ground cinnamon']
Procedure:
['
Arrange the top rack of the oven to 4 inches below the broiler. Preheat the broiler on high heat. Line a sheet pan with a sheet of foil and set aside. In a small bowl, combine the bread and milk with a fork or your fingers so that the bread is moistened. Set aside to let the bread soak up the milk evenly and turn mushy.
', '
In a large bowl, lightly beat the egg using a fork. Add the lamb, crumbling it into the bowl. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, cilantro, mint, coriander, salt, cumin, orange zest, and cinnamon evenly over the lamb. Add the mushy bread mixture to the bowl, rubbing it between your fingers to turn it into wet crumbs. Gently mix the lamb mixture with your hands just enough to so that it’s evenly mixed. The meatballs will toughen and be dense if the mixture is overworked.
', '
Scoop out 2 tablespoons of the meat mixture and roll it between your palms to form a 1 1/2-inch meatball. Place it onto the prepared sheet pan. Continue to form meatballs until all of the meat mixture is used up, putting them in a single layer in the center of the sheet pan.
', '
Drizzle the oil over the meatballs on the sheet pan and gently roll the meatballs around to lightly coat them. Spread them out into a single layer in rows. Broil the meatballs until they are lightly golden and cooked through, rotating the pan halfway through, about 8 minutes total.
', '
Transfer the meatballs to a bowl. Drizzle the pomegranate molasses over the meatballs and gently toss with a spoon to coat. Spread some tzatziki on the warmed pitas then add arugula, spicy lamb meatballs, mint, feta and pomegranate seeds. Serve immediately with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha.\xa0

Click the bolded link for more spicy sriracha recipes.\xa0
']

Name: crispy-rice-sushi-waffle-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sushi grade tuna, diced', 'Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, for brushing ', '4 cups cooked and seasoned sushi rice ', '2 avocados, sliced', '2 cucumbers, sliced ', 'Green onions, sliced for garnish', 'Sesame seeds, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, plus more for drizzling ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Combine the tuna,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Hoisin Sauce. Refrigerate until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Heat waffle maker and brush\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure Sesame Oil so the entire grill is coated (both sides). Add the rice to the waffle maker and cook until crispy, about 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Build the sushi waffle: to the waffle, add avocado, cucumber, scoop on the spicy tuna and drizzle with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds and enjoy!\xa0

Check out these links for more hoisin recipes and sriracha mayo recipes.
']

Name: rice-paper-cheung-fun-recipe
Ingredients: ['5 rice paper sheets', 'warm water ', '15 raw shrimp ', '1 bunch green onion, sliced', 'neutral oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. sugar ', '3 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Soak the rice paper sheets in warm water for about 5 seconds, until they soften.
', '
Once soft, lay out on another plate. Arrange 3 shrimp on each rice paper sheet and sprinkle with some green onions. Roll the rice paper. Brush oil on the rolls so they do not stick to each other.
', '
Place rice paper rolls on an oiled plate for steaming. Steam for about 5 minutes, or until shrimp is fully cooked.
', '
Combine all the ingredients for the seasoning sauce. Drizzle over the rice paper cheung fun and serve immediately!

Visit the bolded link for more quick recipes!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
