Name: garlic-bread-recipe-with-korean-corn-cheese-topping
Ingredients: ['1 loaf French bread or baguette ', '1 1/2 sticks unsalted butter', '2 cups yellow corn kernels', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup fresh parsley, finely chopped', '¼ cup chives, chopped, plus more for garnish', '3 Tbsp. grated Parmesan cheese ', '8 oz. fresh mozzarella cheese, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt to taste', '1Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread']
Procedure:
['
Arrange a rack in the middle of the oven and preheat the oven to 425° Fahrenheit. Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Using a serrated knife, cut 1 loaf French bread or baguette in half crosswise. Cut each piece in half lengthwise. Place on the baking sheet cut-side up.\xa0
', '
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add corn kernels and salt. Cook, stirring often, until tender, about 5 minutes. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook, stirring often, until fragrant and combined, about 2 minutes. Remove the pan from the heat and mix in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Let cool for about 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Evenly spoon the remaining corn mixture onto the bread, spreading to the edges. Arrange mozzarella slices in an even layer on top of the corn mixture. Sprinkle with the reserved corn mixture, about 2 tablespoons per piece.
', '
Bake until the cheese is melted and the bread is golden brown around the edges, 6 to 8 minutes. Transfer to a clean cutting board. Cut on a diagonal with a serrated knife into 12 pieces. Garnish with more chives if desired. Enjoy!

For more sriracha mayo recipes, click the bolded link.
']

Name: pesto-grilled-cheese-sandwich-recipe---pesto-crust
Ingredients: ['8 slices sandwich bread of choice', '1 cup store bought pesto sauce ', '4 oz. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry', '1 cup chopped canned artichoke hearts, patted dry', '3 oz. cream cheese, room temperature', '¾ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese', '3 Tbsp. olive oil, divided']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '¾ tsp. garlic powder', 'Salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Spread both sides of each slice of bread with 1 Tbsp. of pesto sauce.
', '
Place spinach, artichokes, cream cheese, mozzarella, Parmesan, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, garlic powder, salt and pepper in a large bowl. Stir to combine well.
', '
Divide the spinach mixture among 4 bread slices, about 1/2 cup each. Top each with another slice of bread.
', '
Heat 1 1/2 tbsp oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add 2 sandwiches and cook until crispy and browned, about 3 minutes. Flip and continue cooking, adjusting heat as necessary, until the cheese has melted and the filling is hot, 2 to 3 minutes. Repeat with the remaining 1 1/2 tablespoons oil and 2 sandwiches. Serve immediately.

For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce, explore our Oyster Sauce recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: huli-huli-chicken-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 lb. boneless skinless chicken thighs', '2 stalks green onion, for garnish', '1 can pineapple rings or 1/2 lb. fresh sliced pineapple', '3 cups macaroni salad, for serving']
Marinade: ['1/2 cup pineapple juice', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 cup brown sugar', '1/2 cup honey', '1/4 cup ketchup', '1/4 cup sherry or Shaoxing cooking wine', '1/2 cup water']
Procedure:
['
Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl and stir well to combine.\xa0
', '
Add your chicken thighs to a marinade container and pour the marinade over the chicken. Stir the chicken through so that each piece is fully coated and marinate in the fridge for at least 2 hours, up to overnight for max flavor.
', '
Add your chicken thighs to a marinade container and pour the marinade over the chicken. Stir the chicken through so that each piece is fully coated and marinate in the fridge for at least 2 hours, up to overnight for max flavor.
', '
While the chicken rests, grill your sliced pineapple or pineapple rings to get caramelized on each side.
', '
Add grilled pineapple to a serving plate and top with Huli Huli chicken. Garnish with green onion and serve with mac salad on the side. Enjoy!\xa0

Get more\xa0less sodium soy sauce recipes\xa0on our recipes page!
']

Name: loaded-baked-potato-recipe-in-the-microwave
Ingredients: ['1 large russet potato', '2 Tbsp. shredded cheddar cheese', '2 Tbsp. sour cream', '1 green onion, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. cooked bacon bits']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Wash and dry the potato. Pierce the skin several times with a fork. Place on a microwave-safe plate and microwave on high for 8–10 minutes, flipping halfway through. Check for doneness with a knife.
', '
Slice the potato lengthwise and fluff the inside with a fork. Top with shredded cheese, allowing the heat from the potato to melt the cheese. Add a dollop of sour cream.
', '
Drizzle generously with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Garnish with sliced green onions and bacon bits. Enjoy!\xa0\xa0

For more Sriracha Mayo recipes, visit the bolded link to find even more easy and tasty ideas!
\xa0
']

Name: mozzarella-sticks-recipe-with-hot-honey-glaze
Ingredients: ['1 16 oz. block mozzarella cheese', '1 cup all-purpose flour', '3 large eggs, beaten', '1 1/3 cups seasoned breadcrumbs', '2/3 cup panko breadcrumbs', '2 cups vegetable oil for frying, or more as needed']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. cayenne pepper (or adjust to your preferred spice level)', '2 tsp. paprika, divided', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup honey', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Slice 1 lb block of mozzarella cheese into thick, rectangular sticks (about 3 inches long and ½ inch thick) to get about 8 sticks.
', '
In a shallow dish, whisk together the flour, kosher salt, black pepper, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, and 1 tsp paprika. In a second shallow dish, beat the eggs and whisk in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. In a third shallow dish, combine the seasoned breadcrumbs, panko breadcrumbs, and remaining paprika.
', '
Coat each mozzarella piece in the flour mixture, shaking off any excess. Dip the cheese into the egg mixture, ensuring full coverage. Roll the cheese in the breadcrumb mixture to coat evenly. Repeat the process by dipping back into the egg mixture and then into the breadcrumbs again for a thicker crust. Place the breaded cheese sticks on a wire rack set over a baking sheet. Freeze the breaded mozzarella sticks for 30 minutes to help them hold their shape during frying.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep saucepan to 365–375° Fahrenheit (185–190° Celsius). Working in batches, carefully lower the mozzarella sticks into the hot oil. Fry for about 1 minute, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crisp. Transfer the fried mozzarella sticks to a clean wire rack to drain excess oil.
', '
Whisk honey, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil together in a bowl until smooth. While the mozzarella sticks are still warm, coat evenly with glaze, tossing or turning as needed. Transfer to a serving plate.
', '
In a separate, small bowl, mix ranch dressing with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and serve on the side for dipping!\xa0

For more mouthwatering sriracha recipes, visit our recipes page at the bolded link.
']

Name: tallarines-verdes-recipe---peruvian-style-green-spaghetti
Ingredients: ['1 pound spaghetti or bucatini', 'crumbled queso fresco, for serving', 'basil leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup extra virgin olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 ½ cups packed basil leaves', '1 ½ cups packed spinach leaves', '¼ cup evaporated milk', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '4 oz. queso fresco']
Procedure:
['
Cook pasta according to package instructions.
', '
While pasta cooks, add oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, basil, spinach, evaporated milk, salt, pepper, and queso fresco to a blender. Blend until smooth, stopping as needed to push down ingredients.
', '
Toss sauce with cooked pasta. Serve with a sprinkle of crumbled queso fresco and basil leaves for garnish. Enjoy!\xa0

For more tasty oyster sauce recipes, visit the bolded link.\xa0
']

Name: crispy-chicken-caesar-salad-recipe-with-sriracha
Ingredients: ['2 boneless, thin sliced chicken breasts', '1/2 cup all purpose flour', '2 eggs', '1/2 cup panko breadcrumbs', '1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, grated for breading', '2 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 medium head of romaine lettuce, chopped', '1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, shredded for garnish', '1 cup croutons ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. garlic powder', '2 tsp. onion powder ', 'salt and pepper to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Season two thinly sliced chicken breasts with garlic powder and onion powder. Prepare the breading station by adding all-purpose flour into a shallow dish and seasoning with salt and black pepper. Whisk the eggs and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce in a second shallow dish. Combine panko breadcrumbs and grated parmesan in a third shallow dish.
', '
Lightly coat each chicken breast in the seasoned flour. Dip the flour coated chicken into the spicy egg mixture and allow excess to drip off. Transfer the egg dipped chicken into the panko/parmesan mixture and ensure that the entire surface is coated.
', '
Place a large skillet over medium heat and add butter and olive oil into the skillet. Once the butter has melted, place the coated chicken into the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown. Flip the chicken over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through. Transfer the chicken onto a paper towel lined plate until ready to use.
', '
Combine creamy Caesar dressing dressing ingredients in a large bowl. Whisk vigorously until the anchovies have dissolved and have been fully incorporated.
', '
Place romaine in a large bowl. Toss with enough dressing to lightly coat the romaine. Add shredded parmesan and toss to combine. Cut chicken into 1/2-inch strips and place over the salad. Top with croutons. Drizzle with more dressing and enjoy!\xa0

For more spicy sriracha recipes, check out the bolded link.
']

Name: rice-cooker-hainanese-chicken-rice-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup jasmine rice ', '2 boneless chicken thighs, skin on', '1 ½ cups chicken broth', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 stalk green onion, cut into thirds', '½ tsp. kosher salt (plus extra for seasoning chicken)', 'Sliced cucumbers, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 stalks green onion, thinly sliced', '¼ cup canola oil']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the rice thoroughly and shake off excess water. Season the chicken thighs with salt on both sides.
', '
Add rice, chicken broth, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, 1 stalk of green onion, and ½ teaspoon salt to the rice cooker. Stir to combine, then place the chicken skin side up on top. Start the "white rice" function.
', '
While rice cooks, make your scallion oil with the other 2 stalks of green onion. Heat canola oil in a small saucepan until hot. Pour over thinly sliced green onions and mix. Let cool before drizzling.
', '
Once rice and chicken are cooked, remove the chicken, slice into 1-inch strips, and fluff the rice. Plate the rice and chicken together. Drizzle with scallion oil.
', '
Serve hot with sliced cucumbers and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili for dipping your chicken. Enjoy!

Follow us on our socials or check out the bolded link for more easy recipes.
']

Name: garden-focaccia-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups warm water, divided into two bowls', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '2 ½ tsp. active dry yeast', '5 cups bread flour or all-purpose flour, spooned and leveled', '¼ cup olive oil ', '1 tsp. salt', 'Olive oil ', 'Vegetables and herbs of choice, for topping']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Combine the first cup of warm water with sugar and yeast and mix to combine. Set it aside for about 5 minutes or until it looks foamy. Place the water/yeast mixture in the bowl of a stand mixer with the bread hook attached. Add in about 1 cup of flour and mix on low until combined.\xa0
', "
Add in the rest of the water, the olive oil and the salt and half of the remaining flour. Mix on low until combined. Continue adding in the flour while mixing on low until the dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl. If it's still too sticky, add in a couple more tablespoons of flour until it comes together. The dough will be very soft. Keep mixing on low until the dough develops enough gluten that when you touch it, it bounces back.
", '
Place the dough into a bowl with about a tablespoon of olive oil. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in a warm place for 1-2 hours or until it has doubled in size. Pour enough olive oil into a 12"x17" sheet pan so there is a thin layer of oil covering the entire bottom of the pan. Put some olive oil on your hands to prevent sticking and then pull the focaccia dough out of the bowl. It will be very loose. Lay it in the pan and begin stretching it. Cover and allow to proof for one hour.
', '
When ready to bake the bread, dimple the surface with oiled fingers. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil onto the top of the bread until all the dimples have a little oil in them. Spread some Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and sprinkle flakey salt on top. Decorate the top in a garden design with veggies and herbs of choice. Brush all the veggies and herbs with more olive oil to prevent burning.
', '
Bake in the oven at 450º Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes or until the focaccia is golden. Serve with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil.

Visit our Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil page at the bolded link for more\xa0spicy chili crisp recipes.
']

Name: easy-orange-chicken-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless skinless chicken thighs', '¼ cup cornstarch', 'Vegetable oil, for frying', '3 cups cooked white rice', '1 stalk green onion, thinly sliced, for garnish', 'Sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken']
Procedure:
['
Cut chicken thighs into ½ inch pieces and coat evenly in corn starch in a large bowl. Do not dry chicken beforehand so that the cornstarch has moisture to stick to.\xa0
', '
Add vegetable oil to a pan about ¼ inch high and turn the heat to medium high. Once oil is heated, add chicken into oil and spread out so that it all cooks evenly. Cook for 5-6 minutes per side without stirring, flipping when chicken pieces reach a golden brown. Cook in batches if needed.\xa0
', '
Remove chicken from pan and drain of excess oil. Discard oil from frying pan safely and return to medium high heat, add the Lee Kum Kee Orange Chicken Sauce\xa0and stir until the sauce bubbles, about 2-3 minutes.
', '
Add fried chicken pieces and toss carefully to coat all pieces evenly in sauce.\xa0
', '
Distribute white rice evenly amongst three bowls and top with the orange chicken. Garnish with green onion and sesame seeds and enjoy!
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sauce for Orange Chicken, explore our Sauce for Orange Chicken recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: salmon-rice-bowl-recipe-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['2 4 oz. salmon filets, skinless', '2 cups cooked white rice', '1 cucumber, diced or sliced into thin rounds', '1 avocado, sliced thinly', '1 cup cooked edamame', 'lime wedges, for garnish', 'white and black sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 400˚ Fahrenheit and place the salmon filets on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Mix together the honey,\xa0\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce,\xa0Premium\xa0Soy Sauce,\xa0Pure\xa0Sesame Oil, and Minced Garlic, then brush over all over the salmon filets.
', '
Bake for 15 minutes or until the salmon is flake-apart tender. In the meantime, you can dice your cucumber, avocado, and lime wedges, as well as cook or reheat some rice.
', '
Prepare your bowls by starting with a base of white rice. Lay the salmon on top and arrange sliced avocado, cucumber, and edamame on the plate. Garnish the salmon with white and black sesame seeds and drizzle\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo over the entire rice bowl.
', '
Serve with lime wedges and squeeze the lime juice over the rice bowls. Enjoy!
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, explore our sriracha mayo recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: air-fryer-crab-rangoon-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 oz. lump crab meat', '8 oz. cream cheese, brought to room temperature', '3 stalks green onion, separated into white and green parts', '1 large egg, beaten', '1 package square wonton wrappers (at least 2 dozen wrappers)', 'Nonstick cooking spray']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Finely dice the scallion whites and adding to a mixing bowl with the crab meat, cream cheese, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Sauce. Stir until combined.
', '
Add two teaspoons of the crab mixture into the center of a wonton wrapper. Seal the edges using the beaten egg and form a wonton or crab rangoon shape. To form a wonton, fold into a triangle and bring the corners together. To form a rangoon, pull the opposite corners of the wrapper together in the center over the filling, and repeat with the other two corners to join all four together. Repeat for each wonton wrapper, keeping the remaining covered with a towel to keep them from drying out.
', '
Spray the rangoons with nonstick cooking spray and add to an air fryer basket in a single layer. Cook at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 5 minutes until the wonton wrappers are golden brown. Repeat in batches if needed.
', '
Transfer to a serving plate and garnish with thinly sliced scallion greens. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce for dipping.\xa0
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, explore our sriracha chili sauce recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: pad-kra-pao-recipe---thai-basil-chicken
Ingredients: ['14 oz. ground chicken', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Thai chilies, thinly sliced (Add more if more heat is desired) ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 oz. shallot, finely diced', '1 cup green beans, chopped into bite-size pieces', '3 eggs', '1 1/2 cups cooked white rice']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce', '¼ cup water', '1 Tbsp. palm sugar, or brown sugar']
Procedure:
['
Start by preparing your sauce mix: combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, Premium Dark Soy Sauce, fish sauce, water, and palm or brown sugar in a bowl and stir to combine.\xa0
', '
Heat a wok or large saute pan over medium high heat and add 1 Tbsp. of oil. Add the chilies and shallots and cook until the shallots turn translucent, about 1-2 minutes, then add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook until fragrant, another 1-2 minutes.
', '
Add your ground chicken and break up into small pieces, cooking fully for about 5 minutes. Pour in your sauce mix and green beans and stir to combine, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Turn off the heat and add ¼ cup of holy or Thai basil, unsliced. As the Pad Kra Pao cools, this is a good time to fry your eggs in the remaining oil and chop more Thai basil for garnish.\xa0
', '
Break into three portions and serve over white rice. Garnish each with more Thai basil and a fried egg and enjoy!\xa0
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, explore our Oyster Sauce recipe\xa0collection!
\xa0
']

Name: chili-garlic-noodles-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 oz. uncooked instant noodles of choice', '1 green onion, thinly sliced for garnish', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds for garnish', 'Cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles according to package instructions, and drain.
', '
Toss noodles with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, and transfer to a serving bowl.
', '
Top with green onion, cilantro, and sesame seeds, and enjoy!\xa0
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil, explore our chili crisp recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: chili-garlic-fried-rice-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 cups leftover white rice (cooked and cooled)', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 beaten eggs', '1 cup cooked edamame beans', '2 stalks green onions, whites and greens separated and thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat vegetable oil in a large frying pan or wok on medium high heat and add the sliced green onion whites. Cook for about 30 seconds, then add in your beaten egg and scramble.\xa0
', '
Toss in the leftover white rice and edamame and stir well to combine with the egg. Season with 1 Tbsp. each of Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce.
', '
Transfer to a serving dish and scatter the remaining Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and green onion greens over the top. Serve and enjoy!\xa0
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, explore our chili garlic sauce recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: bulgogi-bibimbap-meal-prep-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 oz. thinly sliced ribeye beef', '10 tsp. vegetable oil', '8 oz. sliced shiitake mushrooms', '2 carrots, cut into batons', '2 cucumbers, cut into thin slices lengthwise\t', '1 lb. fresh spinach', '2 cups bean sprouts', '4 cups cooked white rice', '4 eggs']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Marinade: ['¼ Asian Pear, grated', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine the thinly sliced ribeye or steak with the Asian pear,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, honey, 1 Tbsp. of\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, and 1 Tbsp. of\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure Sesame Oil. Leave to marinate in a bowl for at least 30 minutes. Cut all of your veggies and cook the rice while the beef marinates to maximize time efficiency.
', '
Heat a pan to medium high heat and add 2 tsp. of vegetable oil. Drain excess marinade from the beef and pat dry with a paper towel, then add to pan and fully cook through, which should take around 5 minutes. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Cook the mushrooms, carrots, and spinach individually until tender, seasoning each with 2 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium\xa0Soy Sauce and 1 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Pure\xa0Sesame Oil. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Dress the bean sprouts and cucumbers each with another 2 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Don’t cook these so you keep their fresh crunch.\xa0
', '
Fry eggs individually in the vegetable oil until the whites are set and the yolk is still runny.
', '
Fill 4 bowls with a cup of cooked white rice each, and arrange the top of each bowl with equal amounts of cooked beef, cooked spinach, carrots, mushrooms, cucumber, and bean sprouts. Add a fried egg to the center, drizzle with remaining  Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce and\xa0enjoy!
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, explore our Sesame recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: pressure-cooker-pho-recipe-with-brisket
Ingredients: ['1.5 lbs beef brisket', '1 lb beef bones (shank or knuckle)', '3 Liters water, plus more for initial boiling', '4 pods star anise', '2 sticks cinnamon', '4 pods cardamom', '3 whole shallots, peeled', '1 medium yellow onion, peeled', '16 oz. rice noodles', '8 oz. bean sprouts', '1 small red onion, thinly sliced, for garnish', 'Lime wedges, for garnish', '1 small jalapeno, thinly sliced, for garnish', 'Cilantro Leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Salt to taste', 'Fish sauce to taste']
Procedure:
['
Boil the beef bones and brisket in a large stock pot with hot water for at least 5 minutes, then lower to medium and simmer for 10 minutes. Discard all of the water and set the bones aside.
', '
Without burning, toast shallots, onion, star anise, cinnamon, and cardamom in a dry pan until the aromas come through. Transfer to spice bags or wrap in cheesecloth.
', '
Add your beef bones, brisket, and spice bags to a pressure cooker and fill to at least 3L (4 if more broth is desired) with water. Close the lid, seal, and cook at high pressure for 40 minutes (“Soup” setting).\xa0
', '
Release natural pressure from the pressure cooker carefully, and remove and discard spice bags, beef bones. Transfer brisket to cutting board and slice into thin pieces. Season pho broth with salt and fish sauce to taste.
', '
Cook the rice noodles separately according to package instructions and add to serving bowls with bean sprouts, thinly sliced red onion, and brisket slices.\xa0
', '
Pour your pho broth over the bowl, and garnish with jalapeno, cilantro leaves, and lime wedges. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha on the side or drizzle over as desired and enjoy!\xa0
\xa0
For more delicious ways to enjoy Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Sriracha Sauce, explore our Hoisin recipe\xa0collection and Sriracha recipe\xa0collection!
']

Name: bourbon-smash-cocktail-recipe-with-honey-sriracha
Ingredients: ['1.5 oz Bourbon (non-alcoholic substitute: 1.5 oz Apple Cider mixed with a few drops of vanilla extract)', '½ oz. lime juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce', '½ oz simple syrup', '1/4 cup mango juice', 'Mint sprig, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
In a cocktail shaker, combine the Bourbon (or non-alcoholic alternative), lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce, simple syrup and mango juice.\xa0
', '
Add ice cubes to the shaker. Shake vigorously for about 15-20 seconds until well chilled. Strain.
', '
Strain the mixture into a lowball glass filled with ice. Garnish with mint sprig and enjoy!
']

Name: honey-sriracha-salmon-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 4-6 oz. salmon filets', 'rice for serving', 'green onion for garnish']
Marinade: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp.  olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar ', '1/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, olive oil,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger, Seasoned Rice Vinegar, and Coarse Ground Black Pepper. Whisk until well combined.
', '
Place your salmon filets in a resealable plastic bag or shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the salmon, ensuring each piece is well coated. Seal the bag or cover the dish and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes (up to 2 hours for more flavor).
', '
Remove the salmon from the marinade and cook using your preferred method (grilling, baking, or pan-searing) until it reaches an internal temperature of 145° Fahrenheit and flakes easily with a fork. Enjoy your Honey Sriracha Salmon with rice and green onion or your favorite sides!
']

Name: honey-sriracha-tofu-stir-fry-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil (divided)', '1 lb. extra-firm tofu, drained, pressed, and cut into cubes', '1 red bell pepper, sliced', '1 green bell pepper, sliced', '1 cup broccoli florets', '1 cup snap peas', '1 medium carrot, shredded', '2 green onions, chopped', 'Cooked rice or noodles, for serving', 'Sesame seeds, for garnish (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Set aside.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add the tofu cubes in a single layer and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side until golden and crispy. Remove tofu from the skillet and set aside.
', '
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil. Add bell peppers, broccoli, snap peas, and carrots. Stir-fry for 4-5 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
', '
Return the cooked tofu to the skillet with the vegetables. Pour the prepared sauce over the tofu and vegetables. Stir well to coat everything evenly and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until everything is heated through and the sauce has slightly thickened.
', '
Serve the stir-fry over cooked rice or noodles. Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-sriracha-pork-chops-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 bone-in pork chops (about 1 inch thick)']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp.  apple cider vinegar', '1 Tbsp.  butter ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '1/4 tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a small saucepan, combine the Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee  Premium Soy Sauce, apple cider vinegar,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, smoked paprika, and black pepper. Heat over medium, stirring occasionally, until the mixture comes to a simmer. Cook for 3-5 minutes until slightly thickened. Stir in the butter until melted and well combined. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Set your grill to medium-high heat (around 400° Fahrenheit) and lightly oil the grates to prevent sticking.
', '
Season the bone-in pork chops with salt and pepper. Grill the pork chops for about 6-8 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145° Fahrenheit.
', '
During the last 3-4 minutes of grilling, brush the Sweet Heat glaze generously onto the pork chops. Flip the chops and brush the other side as well. Continue grilling until the glaze is sticky and caramelized.
', '
Remove the pork chops from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes. Brush with a final layer of Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce glaze before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: buttermilk-chicken-tenders-recipe-with-honey-sriracha-dip
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken tenderloins', '1/4 cup cornstarch', '1 cup flour', '¾ Tbsp. salt', '¾ tsp. Pepper', 'Vegetable oil, for frying ']
Marinade: ['2 cups buttermilk ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce', '2 Tbsp. pickle juice']
Procedure:
['
Combine the buttermilk, Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce, and pickle juice together in a large bowl. Add your chicken tenderloins and let marinade for at least 30 minutes up to overnight.
', '
Heat up your vegetable oil to 350° Fahrenheit in a deep pan or Dutch oven.\xa0
', '
Add the flour and cornstarch to a shallow bowl and season with salt and pepper. Take the chicken from the marinade, dip it into the flour, then back into the marinade and into the flour again. Make sure some of the buttermilk mixture drips into the flour mixture. This will create an extra crispy chicken tender. Repeat with all tenders.
', '
Fry the tenders in a single layer, in batches, on medium-high heat for 5-7 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy on all sides. Place chicken on a plate lined with paper towels or a cooling rack to drain the excess oil and keep them crispy.
', '
Serve immediately with Lee Kum Kee Honey Sriracha Sauce and enjoy!
']

Name: ramen-steamed-egg-recipe-hack
Ingredients: ['1/2 cup leftover instant ramen broth, or fresh prepared ramen broth', '2 large eggs', 'green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a microwave-safe bowl, add the leftover ramen broth. Crack in the two eggs and add the\xa0\xa0Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Sauce. Whisk together with a fork until well combined.
', '
Cover the bowl with a paper towel or a microwave-safe lid. Microwave on high for 3-5 minutes, checking after 3 minutes. Continue microwaving until the eggs reach your desired consistency (3 minutes for softer eggs, up to 5 minutes for firmer eggs).
', '
Garnish with green onion and enjoy your ramen steamed eggs as they are, or serve over rice, with toast, sliced avocado, or even a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese.
']

Name: folded-kimbap-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 slices SPAM (your favorite flavor)', '1 sheet of seaweed (nori)', '1 cup cooked sushi rice, seasoned with salt and rice vinegar', '1 egg, scrambled or fried', '1/2 cucumber, thinly sliced into matchsticks', '1 small carrot, thinly sliced into matchsticks', '1 romaine lettuce leaf']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey or brown sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar ', '1 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Pan-fry the Spam slices over medium heat until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
', '
In a small bowl, mix the Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, honey (or brown sugar), Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar,\xa0and water until combined. Pour over Spam and allow the sauce to simmer for about 1-2 minutes until it thickens slightly. Toss the Spam slices in the glaze, coating them evenly. Cook for an additional minute, allowing the sauce to caramelize on the Spam.
', '
Fold the kimbap: Place the seaweed sheet shiny side down on a clean surface. Make a vertical slit halfway through the center of the seaweed (this will allow for easy folding). Divide the nori into four imaginary quadrants.
', '
Assemble the layers: 
Quadrant 1 (Top left): Spread a thin layer of sushi rice. 
Quadrant 2 (Top right): Place the fried Spam slices and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread. 
Quadrant 3 (Bottom right): Add the scrambled or fried egg. 
Quadrant 4 (Bottom left): Layer cucumber, sautéed carrot, and romaine lettuce.
', '
Starting from the bottom left (Quadrant 4), fold the nori over onto the bottom right (Quadrant 3), then fold it up onto the top right (Quadrant 2), and finally fold onto the top left (Quadrant 1) until you have a neat, folded square. Cut the folded kimbap in half if desired and serve with extra Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping. Enjoy!
']

PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0

MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: korean-mayak-eggs-recipe
Ingredients: ['6 large eggs at room temperature', 'Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, for drizzling']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '½ cup water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce ', '¼ cup sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 stalks scallions, chopped', '3 chili peppers (red or green), sliced', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds']
Procedure:
['
Bring a large pot of water to a boil then carefully lower each egg into the pot. Cook for 7 minutes, stirring the eggs gently for the first 30 seconds to ensure an even cook.
', '
After cooking, transfer the eggs immediately to an ice bath to stop further cooking. Once cooled, gently peel and set aside.
', '
Make the marinade: In a mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, water, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Dark Soy Sauce, sugar, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, chopped scallions, sliced peppers, and sesame seeds. Stir well.
', '
Place the peeled eggs into a container and pour the prepared marinade over them, ensuring they are fully submerged. For the best flavor, refrigerate and let the eggs marinate overnight, but at minimum, marinate for 2 hours.
', '
To serve, cut the marinated eggs in half and drizzle with\xa0\xa0Lee Kum Kee Pure\xa0Sesame Oil. Enjoy these flavorful eggs as a snack, side dish, or topping for rice and noodles.
']

Name: spicy-goat-cheese-prosciutto-crostini-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 French baguette, sliced and toasted ', '8 oz. goat cheese ', '5 slices prosciutto', '5 figs, sliced ']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Make prosciutto roses. Remove 1 slice from a package of 5 prosciutto slices and use kitchen scissors to cut the slice in half. Fold each slice over and carefully roll each folded slice into a rose. Make 10 roses.
', '
Spread goat cheese on the toasted baguette slices.
', '
Add prosciutto roses, sliced figs and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee  Chili Crisp Oil.
']

Name: peking-crispy-chicken-sandwich-recipe-by-chris-oh
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless skinless chicken thigh', '1/3 lb chicken skin', '2 cups cornstarch', 'canola oil, for frying', '1 cup cucumbers, sliced into thin rounds', '1 cup shallots, thinly sliced', '1 cup cilantro leaves', '1 cup red jalapeno or Fresno chili, thinly sliced', '4 slices milk bread, in thick slices']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Sichuan peppercorn powder, divided into 2', '2 Tbsp. Chinese five spice, divided into 2', 'salt and pepper to taste', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Heat a grill or grill pan on high heat and season chicken thighs with salt, pepper, 1 Tbsp. of Sichuan peppercorn powder and 1 Tbsp. of Chinese five spice. Grill until fully cooked, about 6-8 minutes, turning occasionally and basting with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Take chicken off the heat when done and let rest.
', '
Heat canola oil in a saucepan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for frying. Dust your chicken skins in cornstarch and fry until crispy, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from oil when done and season immediately with salt, pepper, and remaining Sichuan peppercorn powder and five spice.
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, Pure Sesame Oil, Premium Soy Sauce, and sugar in a bowl until well mixed to make your pickling liquid. In a separate bowl, combine sliced cucumbers, shallots, chilies, cilantro leaves, and salt to taste until well combined. Pour over the pickling liquid and toss well to combine, leaving to sit for a few minutes before serving.
', '
Construct your sandwiches in the following order: base of a slice of milk bread, a drizzle of Sriracha Mayo, grilled chicken thigh (sliced if desired), extra Lee Kum Kee Hoisin for drizzling, chicken skin, pickled slaw, one more drizzle of Sriracha Mayo, and the top bread. Serve and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: croissant-breakfast-bake-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. butter or cooking spray (for greasing the dish)', '4 large croissants', '6 large eggs', '½ cup shredded cheddar cheese', '½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '½ cup cooked bacon or sausage, crumbled', '2 Tbsp. chopped green onions ( for garnish)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 350º Fahrenheit (175º Celsius) and grease a 9x9 inch baking dish with butter or cooking spray. Tear the croissants into bite-sized pieces and spread them evenly in the greased baking dish.
', '
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce. Mix in the cheeses and add salt and pepper to taste. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the croissant pieces in the baking dish. Add the cooked bacon or sausage for extra protein.
', '
Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the egg is fully set and the top is golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes. Garnish with chopped green onions, and drizzle with extra Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Serve warm.
']

Name: lao-sausage-wonton-recipe-by-chef-saeng
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. lemongrass, chopped', '1 Tbsp. galangal, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', "1 bird's eye chili pepper", '1 shallot, chopped', '1 lb. ground pork', '1/4 cup green onion, chopped', '1/4 cup cilantro, chopped', 'wonton wrappers, for filling', 'Oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', 'Splash of fish sauce']
Procedure:
['
-- PREPARE THE AROMATIC PASTE --

In a food processor or mortar and pestle, blend the lemongrass, galangal, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, chili pepper, and shallot into a coarse paste.
', '
-- MAKE THE WONTON FILLING --

In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground pork, aromatic paste, green onion, cilantro, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Sauce, Coarse Ground Black Pepper, and a splash of fish sauce. Mix thoroughly until well combined.\xa0
', '
-- ASSEMBLE THE WONTONS --

Lay out the wonton wrappers. Wet the edges with a small amount of water. Place about 1 tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center of each wrapper. Fold and seal the wrapper tightly around the filling to form a ball.\xa0
', '
-- COOK THE WONTONS --

Heat oil in a deep frying pan or pot to 350° Fahrenheit (175° Celsius). Fry the meatballs in batches until golden brown and cooked through, about 3–5 minutes. Remove and drain on a paper towel-lined plate.\xa0
', '
Serve hot with Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Chili Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: lao-khao-soi-noodles-recipe-by-chef-saeng
Ingredients: ['1 lb. cooked rice noodles', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 cup ground pork', '4 Roma tomatoes, chopped', 'lime wedges, for garnish', 'cilantro leaves, chopped, for garnish', 'green onion (green parts only), chopped, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. paprika', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', 'splash of fish sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
-- PREPARE THE SAUCE --

Heat the vegetable oil in a sauté pan over medium-high heat. Add Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic and paprika, stirring for 1–2 minutes until fragrant. Stir in chopped tomatoes and cook until softened. Add ground pork, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand\xa0Oyster Sauce, Hoisin Sauce, Soybean Sauce, fish sauce, and Coarse Ground Black Pepper. Stir to break up any pork clusters. Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for about 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
-- COOK THE NOODLES --

Bring a pot of water to a rolling boil. Blanch the rice noodles for a few seconds until softened. Drain well.\xa0
', '
-- ASSEMBLE THE DISH --

Divide the noodles into serving bowls. Top with your desired amount of meat sauce. Add a squeeze of lime,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Crisp\xa0Oil, cilantro, and green onion.\xa0
', '
Mix everything together and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: rose-vegetable-tart-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 red beets, peeled and sliced with a mandolin', '1 butternut squash, peeled and sliced with a mandolin ', '2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and sliced with a mandolin', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tbsp fresh thyme, finely chopped, plus more for garnish', '1 sprig of fresh rosemary, finely chopped ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', 'salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste', '1 cup ricotta', '¼ cup grated parmesan cheese, plus more for serving ', 'block of puff pastry', '1 egg, beaten ', 'Balsamic glaze, for drizzling']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. butter', '2 large shallots, sliced ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350 ˚Fahrenheit. Line a large baking sheet with foil and drizzle with oil. In a large bowl, toss together the sliced vegetables, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, thyme and rosemary, olive oil and salt and pepper. Add to the prepared baking sheet. Cover the tray with more foil and roast for 20-25 minutes stopping to mix it half way through. This will partially bake the slices and make them easy to roll.\xa0
', '
To a medium pan over medium heat, add oil, butter, shallots and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Cook until caramelized. Remove from the pan, let cool, then combine with the ricotta, parmesan, salt and black pepper.
', '
Roll up the sliced veggies starting with a slice for the middle, roll it into a tight spiral like the center of a rose, then take the next slice and wrap it around. Continue adding slices like petals around the outside. Continue with the rest of the vegetables.\xa0
', '
Roll out the pastry into a rectangle and add filling in the middle. Spread evenly, leaving a 1-inch border on all sides. Press on the vegetable flowers, leaving a small space in between each one. Open the rosettes to look like roses by gently pushing them open. Fold the edges of the pastry in and brush the sides with egg. Bake for 40 minutes, until golden brown. Cover halfway through baking to prevent burning if needed.
', '
Serve with balsamic glaze, more Parmesan and thyme sprigs for garnish. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: rose-tteokbokki-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups Korean rice cakes ', '2 strips bacon, sliced into bite-size pieces ', '1 stalk green onion, finely chopped', '¾ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 cups whole milk ', '1 cup fish cake (sheet form), cut into bite-size triangles', '1 cup mozzarella cheese, shredded', '1 stalk green onion, finely chopped (for garnish)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ tsp.  Gochugaru (Korean red pepper flakes)', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, soak the rice cakes in warm water for at least 5 minutes to soften them. Strain and set aside.
', '
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat without oil. Add the bacon slices and cook until halfway done. Add the chopped green onions and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, cooking for about 20 seconds until fragrant.
', '
Pour in the milk and stir in the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Gochugaru, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Mix until the sauce turns a nice rosy color.
', '
Stir in the soaked rice cakes and fish cake pieces. Allow the mixture to simmer over low-medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sauce becomes thick and creamy and the rice cakes are soft.
', '
Once the sauce has thickened, top the dish with shredded mozzarella and Swiss cheese. Let the cheese melt into the sauce. Garnish with additional chopped green onions and serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-crispy-smashed-potato-salad-recipe-for-gameday
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. baby potatoes', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', 'salt and pepper to taste', '1 medium cucumber, finely chopped', '1 shallot, finely chopped', 'Green onion, sliced for garnish ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425˚ Fahrenheit. Line an extra large baking sheet with parchment paper.
', '
Boil potatoes for 7 minutes or until fork tender. Dry and transfer to the baking sheet. Use the back of a glass to smash them down flat. Brush them with olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste. Roast for 50 minutes to 1 hour or until golden brown and crispy! Save some crispy brown potato bits on the side for garnish.
', '
Whisk together the Greek yogurt, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, dill, parsley, salt and pepper. Mix in the cucumber and shallot.
', '
Once the potatoes have cooled for 5 minutes, fold them into the salad so that they are completely coated. Garnish with the reserved crispy potato bits and green onion. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-creamy-tuscan-salmon-recipe-with-orzo
Ingredients: ['3 8 oz. Atlantic salmon filets', '3 tsp. olive oil', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 shallot, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup sun-dried tomatoes', '2 tsp. lemon juice', '1 tsp. dijon mustard', '1 cup orzo pasta', '1 cup heavy cream', '⅔ cup vegetable broth', '1 tsp. oregano', '1 ½ cup baby spinach', '½ cup parmesan cheese', 'fresh basil, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. pepper', '½ tsp. salt', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Pat salmon dry. Combine the salmon seasonings in a small bowl and sprinkle over the top of each salmon filet. Pat down with your hands or use a spoon to ensure the seasoning sticks to the salmon. Transfer the filets to a tray lined with parchment paper, then drizzle the olive oil over the top of each filet. Air fry at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 minutes.
', '
Add the butter to a large pot over medium-high heat. Melt the butter, then add the diced shallots and sauté for 3-4 minutes before adding the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic over medium heat for two minutes before adding the sun-dried tomatoes, lemon juice and Dijon mustard.\xa0
', '
Stir to combine the ingredients, then add the orzo. Toast the orzo to infuse the flavors for 2 minutes. Then, stir in the vegetable broth. Bring to a simmer and continue to cook for 7-10 minutes over medium-low heat, uncovered. Stir every few minutes to keep the orzo from burning.
', '
Add the heavy cream and continue to stir until all the heavy cream is nearly absorbed. Then, reduce the heat to low. Stir in the spinach and parmesan. Once the spinach has wilted and the cheese has melted, add the salmon filets. Allow to cook on low heat for 2 minutes, before removing from heat.\xa0
', '
Top orzo with the salmon filets and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Crisp Oil\xa0and garnish with basil leaves. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: cabbage-stir-fry-recipe-with-pure-sesame-oil
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. neutral cooking oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 medium carrots, julienned', '1 small green cabbage, shredded', 'water, a splash', '1 red bell pepper, sliced', '1 orange bell pepper, sliced', '3 stalks green onions, sliced, reserve some for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes']
Procedure:
['
Heat 1 tablespoon of neutral cooking oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and stir fry for about 30 seconds, until fragrant.
', '
Add the julienned carrots to the wok and stir fry for 2-3 minutes, until they begin to soften.
', '
Toss the shredded cabbage into the wok. Stir fry for 4-5 minutes, tossing occasionally, until the cabbage wilts and becomes tender. If it begins to stick, add a splash of water and stir to loosen.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, Seasoned Rice Vinegar, sugar, and remaining tablespoon of\xa0 Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure Sesame Oil. Stir to combine and cook for another minute. Add the green onion. Season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.
\xa0

', '
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with more green onions and sesame seeds. Serve hot.
']

Name: bok-choy-recipe-with-premium-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['6 baby bok choy, washed', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 garlic cloves, sliced thin', '¼ cup vegetable broth']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the bok choy by slicing them in half lengthwise. If there’s any dirt in the interior, wash them again before cooking.
', '
Add the vegetable oil to a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until golden and fragrant.
', '
Add the baby bok choy to the pan, cut side down. Cook for 2-3 minutes, turning occasionally, until the leaves begin to wilt and the stems are tender. Add the vegetable broth and bring to a simmer for 1 minute.
', '
Add the bok choy to a serving plate and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce to finish. Enjoy!
\xa0

']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: whole-chicken-recipe-with-oyster-sauce-glaze
Ingredients: ['1 (3-4 lb) whole chicken', '½ tsp. ground ginger', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. Kosher salt', '3 Tbsp. neutral oil', '3 stalks scallions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400º Fahrenheit.
', '
Spatchcock the chicken by using a strong pair of kitchen shears to cut out the spine. Cut alongside the left side of the spine, then the right side, then remove it fully. Turn the chicken over and press the breasts down firmly to flatten it. Rotate and tuck the wing tips under the breasts to prevent burning.
', '
Combine the ground ginger, garlic powder, and salt in a small bowl. Drizzle the oil over the chicken, then season with the spice mixture and place on an oiled baking sheet.
', '
Bake the chicken for 30 minutes. Remove carefully and brush with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce. Place back in the oven and cook for 15 more minutes, or until the internal temperature of the thickest part reads 160˚ Fahrenheit.
\xa0

', '
Turn on the broiler. Brush the chicken with another layer of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce and any pan drippings. Broil for 3-4 minutes, until crispy. Garnish with scallions and serve!\xa0
']

Name: steamed-dumplings-recipe-with-chili-crisp-dipping-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 cup shredded cabbage', '½ cup carrots, grated', '½ cup shiitake mushrooms, finely chopped (or any mushrooms of your choice)', '2 stalks green onions, chopped', '1 package (10 oz.) dumpling wrappers']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the cabbage, carrots, mushrooms, and green onions. Add the Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Mix until combined.
', '
Place a dumpling wrapper on a clean surface and spoon about 1 tablespoon of the vegetable mixture in the center of the wrapper. Wet the edges of the wrapper with a small amount of water, then fold the wrapper in half to create a half-moon shape. Press the edges together to seal (pleat the edges if desired for a more traditional look).
', '
Fill a pot with a few inches of water and bring it to a simmer. Line the steamer basket with parchment paper or extra cabbage leaves. Arrange the dumplings in the steamer basket, leaving a little space between each.
', '
Place the steamer basket over the simmering water and cover. Steam the dumplings for about 10-12 minutes, or until the wrappers are tender and the filling is cooked through.
', '
Serve the dumplings hot, drizzled with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil.
\xa0

']

Name: scallion-pancakes-recipe-with-chili-crisp
Ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '½ tsp. salt', '¾ cup boiling water', '2 Tbsp. flour, for flouring your surface', 'Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, for brushing', '1 bunch scallions, thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine the flour and salt. Slowly pour in the boiling water, stirring with chopsticks or a fork until a dough begins to form. Once cool enough to handle, knead the dough for about 5-7 minutes, until smooth. Cover with a damp towel and let rest for 30 minutes.
', '
Divide the dough into 4 equal portions. On a floured surface, roll one portion into a thin, round circle, about 6 inches in diameter.
', '
Brush a thin layer of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil over the dough. Sprinkle evenly with a generous amount of sliced scallions and the Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder. Roll the dough up like a jelly roll, then coil it into a spiral shape. Flatten the coil gently into a round pancake shape with a rolling pin.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Fry each pancake for 2-3 minutes on each side, pressing down gently with a spatula, until golden brown and crispy. Repeat with the remaining dough portions.
', '
Slice the pancakes into wedges and serve warm with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp. Enjoy!
\xa0

']

Name: lobster-garlic-noodles---house-special-lobster-recipe
Ingredients: ['6 lobster tails', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '4 cups vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. clarified butter', '1 jalapeno, sliced', '½ onion, sliced', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, divided', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 stalks green onions, sliced', '16 oz. egg noodles, cooked according to package']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. rice wine', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste', '½ tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Prep the lobster tails: Toss with cornstarch to coat.
', '
Heat 4 cups of oil in a pot until it reaches 375º Fahrenheit. Add the lobster pieces and fry 30 seconds to 1 minute, until opaque and cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside.
', '
In a clean skillet, add 1 tablespoon clarified butter. Stir fry the jalapenos, onion, 2 teaspoons Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger for 2-3 minutes until softened.
', '
Return the lobster to the pan. Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and sugar. Toss to coat and stir fry for one more minute until well combined.\xa0
', '
Add cooked egg noodles to wok with remaining teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Stir fry for 1 minute over high heat to combine everything. Garnish with green onions and Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil as desired.
\xa0

']

Name: lion-head-meatballs-recipe-for-chinese-new-year
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground pork', '2 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '2 tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '3 green onions, sliced', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '½ cup water chestnuts, drained and finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, for cooking ', 'sliced green onions, for garnish (optional)']
Seasoning: ['-- FOR THE MEATBALLS --', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['-- FOR THE SAUCE -- ', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 stalks green onion, sliced', '1 tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 ½ cups water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground pork, Shaoxing wine, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, sugar, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic,\xa0minced green onions, cornstarch, and chopped water chestnuts.
', '
Mix everything together thoroughly until the mixture is smooth and well combined, then stir vigorously for at least 5 minutes to aerate the meatballs. Take ½ cup portions of the mixture and roll them into meatballs. Set them aside on a plate.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a small pot (so you don’t have to use as much oil) over medium-high until it reaches 375˚ Fahrenheit. Fry the meatballs one at a time for 1-2 minutes, just until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
', '
Make the sauce: add 1 tablespoon oil to wok with ginger and green onions. Stir for 1 minute, then add all remaining sauce mix ingredients and bring to a boil, then reduce to a boil.
\xa0

', '
Add the meatballs to the boiling sauce and cover the wok with a lid. Cook for 12-14 minutes, turning once, until the meatballs are completely cooked. (For a thicker sauce, add 1 teaspoon cornstarch mixed with 2 teaspoons water and simmer for 2-3 more minutes). Garnish with more green onions if desired and serve hot!\xa0
']

Name: longevity-noodles-recipe-for-chinese-new-year
Ingredients: ['8 oz. longevity noodles (or any long wheat noodles)', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '½ cup shiitake mushrooms (or any mushrooms), sliced', '1 cup baby bok choy, chopped', '1/4 cup water']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
Cook the noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
', '
In a large pan or wok, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds, until fragrant. Add the mushrooms and bok choy and stir fry for 2-3 minutes, until softened.
', '
Pour in the Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Panda Brand Oyster Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure Sesame Oil, and ¼ cup of water. Stir to combine and bring to a simmer for 2 minutes.
', '
Add the cooked noodles to the pan. Toss everything together, making sure the noodles are evenly coated with the sauce.
', '
Garnish the noodles with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and enjoy!
\xa0

']

Name: beef-chow-fun-recipe-for-chinese-new-year
Ingredients: ['12 oz wide rice noodles (chow fun noodles)', '8 oz beef flank steak, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, divided', '½ yellow onion, sliced', '1 red bell pepper, sliced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine ']
Procedure:
['
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
', '
In a small bowl, mix the beef with 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, and 1 tablespoon of Shaoxing wine. Let it marinate for at least 15 minutes.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion, bell pepper, and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic. Stir fry for 2-3 minutes, until softened and fragrant. Remove the vegetables from the wok and set them aside.
', '
Add the remaining tablespoon of oil to the wok. Add the beef and stir fry for 2-3 minutes, until browned and cooked through. Push the beef to one side of the wok.
', '
Add the noodles back to the wok, along with the vegetables. Pour in the remaining soy sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, and Pure Sesame Oil. Toss everything together until well coated and heated through, about 2-3 minutes. Serve hot, garnished with fresh green onion.
\xa0

']

Name: mason-jar-salad-recipe
Ingredients: ['1/4 cup thinly sliced carrots', '1/4 cup cucumber, sliced into thin rounds', '1/2 cup tricolor bell peppers, thinly sliced', '1 cup cooked quinoa', '1/2 cup edamame ', '1/4 cup purple cabbage, thinly sliced', '1/4 cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '1/4 cup scallion, thinly sliced', '1/4 cup fresh baby spinach leaves']
Procedure:
['
Combine all of the dressing ingredients together, and transfer to the bottom of a mason jar.
', "
Layer in your veggies and salad ingredients of choice, starting with looser ones like carrots and cucumbers, then adding more packed ingredients like quinoa, tomatoes, or edamame on top, until all of your salad ingredients are added. Close the lid and take on the go until you're ready to eat!
", "
When it's time to eat, simply shake the closed jar a few times to toss the dressing with all of the salad ingredients. Open the lid once it's tossed and enjoy!
"]

Name: mason-jar-ramen-meal-prep-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup cooked rice noodles', '1 cup thinly sliced carrots', '1/2 cup thinly sliced button mushrooms', '1/2 cup scallion, thinly sliced', '1/2 cup bok choy, roughly chopped', '1/2 cup edamame', 'Boiling water, to cook and serve']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 Tbsp. miso', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Combine all of the Seasoning Ingredients to make up your flavor base, then transfer to the base of your mason jar.
', '
Add cooked rice noodles and vegetables in layers to fill the jar completely. Close the lid and take on the go until ready to eat!
', "
When it's time to eat, open the jar and pour hot boiling water into the jar until filled just below the bottom rim. Let the water cool and mix everything together before enjoying!
"]

Name: chicken-katsu-curry-sliders-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into 4-inch segments', '2 cups panko breadcrumbs', '2 eggs, whisked', '1/4 red cabbage, thinly sliced', '1/4 cup scallions', '1 package small slider buns, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for serving']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. kosher salt', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. butter, unsalted', '1/4 cup flour', '1 1/2 Tbsp. curry powder', '2 cups chicken broth', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add chicken thighs, kosher salt, and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce to a large bowl. Mix together and let marinate in the fridge, covered, for 1 hour.
', '
Place panko and eggs into two separate shallow bowls. Dip each piece of chicken in egg, then panko. Set on a wire rack to dry slightly. Preheat at least 2 inches of oil in a large pot to 375º Fahrenheit. Fry the chicken pieces until golden brown, 4-5 minutes on each side. Drain and cool briefly.
', '
Prepare the curry sauce: melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Whisk in flour and cook until the mixture darkens in color, 3 to 4 minutes. Add curry powder, broth, and 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium\xa0Soy Sauce. Simmer for 7-8 minutes, stirring often, until thickened. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
', '
Prepare the slaw: add cabbage, scallions, rice vinegar, and 1 tsp.\xa0Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and to a mixing bowl and stir to combine. Set aside
', '
Build the sliders: spread Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha and Mayo on the bottom half of the slider buns. Top with a piece of fried chicken, then spoon some Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Crisp Oil over each. Add slaw, curry sauce, and a top bun and serve hot with extra sauce on the side!\xa0
']

Name: korean-sausage-bread-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. prepared pizza dough', '6 hot dogs', '3 Tbsp. butter, melted', '1/4 cup canned corn, drained', '2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped']
Seasoning: ['1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚ Fahrenheit. Divide pizza dough into 6 portions. Roll each portion into a rectangle slightly larger than the hot dogs; there should be at least a 1-inch border around the hot dog when placed in the center of the dough rectangles.
', '
Top each rectangle of dough with a generous squirt of Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha and Mayo and one hot dog each. Fold the sides of the dough in and pinch them shut tightly. Place on a baking sheet.
', '
With a pair of scissors, snip the hot dogs three quarters of the way through, leaving the bottom quarter intact so the dough stays together. Alternately push the hot dog slices left, then right, then left again, until each is fully shaped. Cover with plastic wrap loosely and let proof for 20 minutes.
', '
Right before baking, brush the sausage breads with a light coating of melted butter, then sprinkle corn over the top of each. Bake for 14-18 minutes, until golden brown. Cool slightly.
', '
Top the baked sausage breads with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Sauce and sprinkle with chopped parsley. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: easy-omurice-recipe---omelette-wrapped-rice
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '¼ onion, diced', '1 small carrot, diced', '1 ¼ cups cold white rice, cooked', '2 stalks scallions, sliced', '2 Tbsp. frozen peas', '4 eggs']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', 'salt, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for serving']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet. Add onion and carrot and cook for 5-6 minutes, until soft. Stir in the white rice, raise the heat to high, and cook for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Stir in the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Soy Sauce, scallions and peas and let cook for 2 minutes further. Remove from heat.
', '
Whisk eggs well with a pinch of salt. Heat a clean non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add oil and eggs and cook like an omelette, allowing the bottom layer to set and lifting the edges cook the remaining runny egg. Leave the middle slightly wet and turn off the heat.
', '
Add the rice to the center of the eggs and roll into an omelette shape. Let the omurice rest, seam side down, for 30 seconds to seal.\xa0
', '
Remove to a plate. Drizzle generously with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha, top with more scallions if desired, and serve immediately!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
