Name: scallion-pancake-breakfast-burrito-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 scallion pancakes, frozen', '1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '6 eggs, whisked', '3 stalks scallions, sliced', '¾ cup frozen shredded hash browns, prepared according to package', '6 pieces bacon, crumbled', '½ cup cheddar cheese, shredded']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Prepare scallion pancakes in a frying pan with a tablespoon of oil. Fry and turn over medium-high heat until golden and crisp, 2-4 minutes per side. Set aside to cool briefly.
', '
In a small bowl, beat eggs and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce\xa0together. Add a drizzle of olive oil, then add to a skillet over medium heat and stir in. Cook 2-4 minutes, until scrambled. Add to a mixing bowl with scallions, hash browns, crumbled bacon, and cheese. Mix until combined.
', '
Place the scallion pancakes on a clean work surface and spread the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha and Mayo on top of each. Divide the egg mixture evenly between the two scallion pancakes, placing a scoop in the center of each. Place on a piece of foil and roll into a burrito. Slice in half and serve!
']

Name: egg-rolls-recipe-with-hoisin-dipping-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 cup Napa cabbage, shredded', '½ cup carrots, julienned or grated', '2 stalks green onions, chopped', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '¼ cup cooked protein(s) of your choice (chicken, shrimp, or tofu are recommended)', '12 egg roll wrappers', 'vegetable oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large pan, sauté the cabbage, carrots, and green onions in Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil over medium heat until softened, about 3-5 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, and cooked protein (if using). Stir to combine and cook for another 2 minutes. Let cool.
', '
Lay an egg roll wrapper flat on a cutting board. Spoon 2 tablespoons of the filling in the center. Fold up the bottom corner, then fold in the sides, and roll tightly toward the top corner, sealing the edge with a little water.
', '
Heat 2 inches of vegetable oil in a deep pan or wok over medium-high heat.
', '
Fry the egg rolls in batches for 3-4 minutes, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crispy. Drain on paper towels.
', '
Serve hot with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce for dipping and enjoy!
\xa0

']

Name: chili-crisp-ribs-recipe-by-chef-winnie-yee
Ingredients: ['1 rack trimmed spare pork ribs']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '2 tsp. granulated garlic', '2 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. paprika']
Sauce Mix: ['1 14 oz. can cranberry sauce (whole cranberries preferred)', '3 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Select Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '1 stick cinnamon', '1 pod star anise']
Procedure:
['
Trim off excess fat of spare ribs. In a small bowl combine rub and sprinkle generously on the spare ribs. Preheat the oven or smoker at 250˚ Fahrenheit. Cook for 4 hours or until the internal temperature is 165˚ Fahrenheit.\xa0
', '
Combine all the ingredients for the sauce except for the cinnamon and star anise in a large pot and blend with an immersion blender until smooth. Add the cinnamon and star anise into the sauce and cook over medium heat. Let it simmer for 2-3 minutes. Discard whole spices.
', '
Remove sauce from heat and glaze the cooked ribs before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: crispy-rice-paper-dumplings-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 package rice paper sheets', '1 Tbsp. oil', '1 cup shiitake mushrooms, minced', '½ cup shredded carrots', '¼ head green or red cabbage, shredded thinly', '1 stalk scallion, thinly sliced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms, carrots, cabbage, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Cook for 7-8 minutes, until vegetables are softened.
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and remove from heat. Set aside to cool.
', '
Soak rice paper in a shallow dish filled with water for 5 to 10 seconds, just until softened. Place a rice paper wrapper on a cutting board and add filling to the center. Fold 4 sides in towards the center to create the dumplings. Make sure they are sealed tightly.
', '
Heat oil in a clean skillet over medium-high heat. Add the rice paper dumplings and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown. Garnish the dumplings with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil and sliced scallions. Serve hot.
\xa0
For more quick and vegetarian recipes, visit our recipes page.
']

Name: sheng-jian-bao-recipe---pan-fried-pork-soup-dumplings
Ingredients: ['½ lb. ground pork', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. brown sugar', '2 tsp. rice vinegar', '2 stalks scallions, sliced', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the dough: add flour, sugar, yeast, and warm water to a mixing bowl. Stir until a soft dough forms, then empty onto a clean, lightly floured work surface and knead until smooth, about 7 minutes. Add to a lightly oiled bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Set aside to rise for 30 minutes.
', '
In a mixing bowl, combine ground pork, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger with brown sugar and rice vinegar. Stir in scallions and set aside.
', '
Flour the work surface generously and roll the dough until ¼-inch thick. Use a 4-inch round cutter to cut out circles of dough. Cover with plastic to prevent drying out.
', '
Take 1-2 tablespoons of filling and add to the middle of a circle of dough. Fold one of the edges towards the center, then pull more dough over that edge and continue folding to create pleats. Twist the tops sealed tightly and let rise for 10 minutes.
', '
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add oil. Add the buns and sear until golden brown on the bottom, 2-3 minutes. Add half a cup of water to the skillet and cover. Cook the buns until the water evaporates, about 5 minutes. Remove the lid and continue cooking 1 more minute to finish crisping. Transfer the hot buns to a serving platter. Drizzle the buns with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil and top with black sesame seeds. Enjoy!\xa0
\xa0
\xa0
For more Chinese food recipes, check out our recipes page.\xa0
']

Name: bibimbap-picnic-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups white rice, cooked', '½ block spam or lunch meat, seared and chopped', '4 sheets nori seaweed', '¼ cup shredded carrots', '¼ cup kimchi', '3 scallions, chopped', '2 fried eggs', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, plus more for serving', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Toss everything together, breaking up the nori sheets and eggs as it’s stirred.
', '
Top with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha, Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil, and sesame seeds and serve hot!
', '
For more easy recipes, check out our full recipes page here!
']

Name: grilled-tiger-prawn-recipe-with-lemon-and-garlic
Ingredients: ['1 lb. king prawns, halved with shell on', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '¼ tsp. cayenne pepper', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', 'salt and pepper to taste', 'chopped parsley, for garnish', 'lemon wedges, for garnish', 'crusty bread, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['6 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the grill until very hot (400-450˚ Fahrenheit).
', '
Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium high heat. Add Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce\xa0and lemon juice. Stir to combine.
', '
In a large bowl, season the prawn with garlic powder, paprika, cayenne, lemon juice, olive oil, and salt and pepper.
', '
Working quickly, place the prawns on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until opaque and lightly charred. Immediately remove the prawns to a serving plate.
', '
Drizzle with the lemon garlic sauce and sprinkle with parsley. Serve hot with lemon wedges and crusty bread!
\xa0
\xa0
Visit our recipes page for more quick seafood recipes like this one!
']

Name: ginger-scallion-crab-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 fresh blue crabs, claws and legs separated, cut and cleaned', '1 large egg white, beaten', '¼ cup cornstarch', '2 cups vegetable oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 stalks green onions, sliced into strips, greens and whites separated ', '½ Tbsp. cornstarch ', '2 Tbsp. water ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 Tbsp. cooking rice wine', '¼ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. sugar', '⅛ tsp. white pepper', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 cup water ']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl, combine all the sauce ingredients.
', '
Dip the crab in the egg white then dust crab with cornstarch. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat to 350˚ Fahrenheit.\xa0
', '
Deep fry the leg parts, then the claws and shells, for 2 minutes on each side, or until they change to an orange-red tone. Remove crab and clean wok, reserving 1 Tbsp. of oil.
', '
To the same wok over medium heat add Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and the white parts of the green onions. Then add the fried crab back into the wok and toss to combine. Drizzle the sauce over the crab.\xa0
', '
Stir and cover with a lid for 2-3 minutes. Create a slurry with the cornstarch and water and add into the wok to thicken the sauce. Keep stir frying the crabs until the sauce is thickened. Then, add the green parts of the green onion, mix and serve!
\xa0
\xa0
Check out our full recipes page for more seafood recipes like this!
']

Name: vegan-mushroom-birria-style-tacos-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. neutral oil ', '8 oz. oyster mushrooms, shredded ', '8 taco tortillas ', 'Canola oil, for frying', '1 cup shredded mozzarella or Oaxaca cheese', 'Chopped cilantro, for garnish', 'Chopped white onions, for garnish', 'Lime wedges, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. canola oil ', '1 red onion, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ tsp. dried oregano', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '¼ tsp. cinnamon', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 can (15 oz.) crushed tomatoes ', '2 chipotle peppers in adobo sauce', '2 Tbsp. adobo sauce, from the chipotle pepper can', '2 cups vegetable broth', '1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '3 dried guajillo chilis, rehydrated in hot water for 30 minutes', '2 bay leaves']
Procedure:
['
- Make the Consommé -
\xa0
Heat oil in a medium pan over medium heat. Add onions and cook until translucent, 4-5 minutes. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and continue to stir and cook 1 minute further. Add Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Sauce, all the ground spices, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
', '
Add crushed tomatoes, chipotle peppers, and adobo sauce. Let the sauce reduce for a few minutes before adding vegetable broth and apple cider vinegar. Simmer for 10 minutes. Let the sauce cool down a little, then blend with the rehydrated guajillo chilis until smooth. Pour the blended consommé back into the pan and simmer with the bay leaves.
', '
In another medium pan, heat 1 tablespoon oil over medium heat. Lightly fry the mushrooms until crisp and golden on both sides, about 4 minutes per side. Pour 1¼ cups of the consommé on the mushrooms, which should be just enough to fully coat them. Let simmer for 5 minutes.
', '
To make a birria taco, coat each side of the tortilla in the leftover consommé, so it is covered with it but not soggy. Fry the tortilla in a teaspoon or so of oil in a nonstick over medium heat for about a minute. Flip and pile on 2 tablespoons of filling on one side. Sprinkle some cheese. Close and cook on both sides until crisp.
', '
Garnish with cilantro and onion. Finish with a squeeze of lime and dip in extra leftover consommé!
\xa0
\xa0
For more vegetarian recipe ideas, visit our recipes page.
']

Name: mapo-chili-recipe-by-chef-winnie-yee
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2/3 cup of diced onions', '1 Tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 lb ground beef or pork, or both', '2/3 cup of diced red and green bell peppers', 'chopped chives or green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup shaoxing wine', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce', '2 Tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a large 12" sauté pan or wok on medium heat, add the vegetable oil and diced onions. Stir fry till the onions become translucent.
', "
Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and ground meat. Saute for 2-3 minutes, separating the meat so it doesn't form clumps.
", '
Add the diced bell peppers, shaoxing wine, \xa0Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Continue to saute and turn the heat to low to let the mixture simmer by closing the lid. Let it simmer for 15-30 minutes or until the meat is tender.
', '
Garnish with chopped chives or green onions and serve!
']

Name: french-onion-soup-puffs-recipe-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 sheet puff pastry, thawed', '2 large onions, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1/2 cup shredded Gruyère or Swiss cheese', '1 tsp. fresh thyme leaves (optional)', '1 egg, beaten (for egg wash)']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large skillet, heat the butter and olive oil over medium heat. Add the sliced onions and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and continue cooking for another 15-20 minutes, stirring frequently, until the onions are golden brown and caramelized. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
', '
Preheat your oven to 400° Fahrenheit. Lightly grease a 12-cup muffin tin or line it with paper liners.
', '
Roll out the puff pastry sheet on a lightly floured surface to smooth it out. Cut the puff pastry into 12 equal squares. Place each puff pastry square into a muffin tin cup, pressing it gently into the bottom and sides, with the corners hanging over the edges.\xa0
', '
Spoon a generous amount of the hoisin caramelized onions into each pastry-lined muffin cup. Sprinkle a little shredded Gruyère or Swiss cheese on top of each one. Brush the exposed edges of the puff pastry with the beaten egg.
', '
Place the muffin tin in the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and puffed. Let the puffs cool slightly in the muffin tin before removing them.
Garnish with fresh thyme leaves if desired and serve warm.
']

Name: mushroom-and-gruyere-mini-toast-bites
Ingredients: ['1 baguette, sliced into 1/4-inch thick rounds', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 cups mushrooms, finely chopped (cremini, shiitake, or a mix)', '1/2 cup Gruyere cheese, shredded', 'Fresh parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 375° Fahrenheit. Arrange the baguette slices on a baking sheet and lightly toast in the oven for about 5 minutes, or until just crisp. Set aside.
', '
In a large skillet, heat the butter and olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5-7 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce. Mixing well to coat the mushrooms. Cook for another 2-3 minutes until the mixture is well combined and heated through.
', '
Spoon a generous amount of the mushroom mixture onto each toasted baguette slice. Top with a sprinkle of shredded Gruyere cheese.
', '
Place the assembled toast bites back on the baking sheet. Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
', '
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired and serve warm.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: umami-garlic-herb-butter-prime-rib-with-au-jus-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 lbs. bone-in prime rib']
Marinade: ['1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp fresh thyme, minced', '2 Tbsp fresh rosemary , minced', '2 1/2 tbsp salt, or to taste', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, or to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['3 cups beef stock (add beef drippings from roast)', '2 cups red wine', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 500˚ Fahrenheit.\xa0
', '
Mix together the softened butter, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, thyme, rosemary, salt, and pepper. Thoroughly coat the rib roast with the mixture.
', '
Place a thermometer in the meat, place it in a proper deep dish, and cook for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 300˚ Fahrenheit. Roast for additional time per pound based on desired doneness and prime rib weight. For the 4 lb. prime rib in this recipe, an additional 90-100 minutes (25 minutes per pound) should achieve an internal temperature of 130˚ Fahrenheit for medium rare.\xa0\xa0
', '
Remove the meat from the oven and wrap it in foil. Let it rest for 20 minutes while you prepare the au jus. Remember that the meat will rise in temperature by another ten degrees while resting on average.
', '
Place a skillet over high heat with the beef dripping from the roasting pan and/or beef stock (about 2-3 cups total volume) and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Add the wine. Bring to a fast simmer until the liquid has reduced by half.
', '
In a small bowl mix the water and cornstarch. Reduce the heat and add the cornstarch mixture to the pan. Whisk constantly. Wait for it to thicken and season with salt and pepper. Slice the prime rib and serve with the au jus and side dishes of choice. Enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-garlic-cruffins-recipe-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 8 oz. can refrigerated crescent roll dough', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted', '1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese', '2 Tbsp.  fresh parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 375° Fahrenheit (190° Celsius). Grease a muffin tin with cooking spray or butter. Unroll the crescent roll dough and separate it into 4 rectangles (each rectangle is made up of 2 crescent roll triangles). Press the perforations in the dough to seal the triangles together, forming a solid rectangle.
', '
Brush each rectangle of dough with melted butter. Spread about 1/2 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce evenly over each rectangle. Sprinkle a generous amount of shredded mozzarella cheese over the sauce.
', '
Starting from the short side, roll each rectangle tightly into a log. Cut each log in half, creating 8 shorter rolls. Take each cut roll and place it cut side up into the muffin tin. The layers should be visible from the top. Sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese evenly over the tops of each cruffin.
', '
Place the muffin tin in the preheated oven and bake for 15-18 minutes, or until the cruffins are golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
', '
Remove the cruffins from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes in the tin before transferring them to a wire rack. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired and serve warm.
']

Name: grilled-cheese-christmas-tree-sandwich-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 slices of bread (your choice)', '4 slices of cheese (cheddar, Swiss, or your favorite)', '1 Tbsp. butter ', '2 Tbsp. grated Parmesan cheese (optional, for garnish)', 'Christmas tree cookie cutter', 'sour cream or cream cheese (for "snow")', 'green bell pepper (finely chopped, for "tree decorations")', 'red bell pepper (finely chopped, for "tree decorations")', 'black olives (sliced, for "tree ornaments")', 'cherry tomatoes (halved, for "tree toppers")']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Spread Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on one side of each bread slice.
', '
Place 2 slices of cheese between two slices of bread, with the Sriracha Mayo side facing the cheese.
', '
Use the Christmas tree cookie cutter to cut out tree shapes from the assembled sandwiches.
', '
Heat a skillet over medium heat. Melt butter. Cook the sandwiches for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cheese is melted. Optional: Sprinkle grated Parmesan on the bread before grilling for extra flavor.
', '
After grilling, let the sandwiches cool slightly. Use sour cream or cream cheese as "snow" on the bottom of each tree. Decorate with finely chopped green and red bell peppers as ornaments, sliced black olives, and cherry tomato halves as toppers. Enjoy your festive, grilled cheese Christmas trees!
']

Name: pesto-cheese-ball-ornament-recipe-for-christmas
Ingredients: ['8 oz. goat cheese, room temperature', '8 oz. cream cheese, room temperature', '½ cup pesto sauce', '½ cup sun-dried tomato drained and diced into small pieces', '2 Tbsp. pine nuts, toasted']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, mix cream cheese, goat cheese and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce with a hand mixer until well combined. Then, add cheese mixture to a piping bag. Cut the tip-off. Pipe goat cheese into silicone molds. Fill to roughly ⅓ of the mold. Repeat with other cavities. Slightly wet fingers with water and smooth out the cheese mixture until even
', '
Add in pesto evenly into the 6 cavities and smooth out evenly using the back of a spoon. Top with sun-dried tomatoes and then toasted pine nuts evenly into the 6 cavities. Press in gently. Fill the molds to the top with the cheese mixture. Save the remaining cheese mixture in an airtight container in the fridge. Slightly wet fingers with water and smooth out the cheese mixture until even.
', '
Place plastic wrap on top, press slightly, and place in the freezer for 1 hour.\xa0 Remove the plastic wrap and place a dollop of the remaining cheese mixture onto 3 of the semi-spheres. Smooth out evenly with an offset spatula or spoon.\xa0
', '
Set aside a piece of plastic wrap. Take one semi-sphere with the extra cream mixture and one without and put them together to form a whole sphere. Wrap immediately in plastic wrap and use your fingers to smooth out where the semi-spheres meet. Place in the refrigerator for at least one hour.
', '
About 15 minutes prior to serving, take out your beautiful ornament cheese balls, unwrap, and place them on your serving tray. Top with candy ornament topper. Enjoy with crackers, baguette, or crostini!
']

Name: stir-fried-spaghetti-and-chicken
Ingredients: ['120 g spaghetti ', '120 g minced chicken', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '90 g canned whole kernel corn ', '50 g green peas ', '50 g carrot (s) [diced]', '1 Tbsp. Pistachios, shelled, roughly chopped']
Marinade: ['1 1/2 tsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1/2 tsp. Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 tsp. corn starch ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Ketchup ', '1 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Cook spaghetti in boiling water according to packet instructions or until tender. Drain.
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and cornstarch to make the marinade. Mix into the minced chicken, spreading it evenly.
', '
Stir-fry chicken in 2 Tbsp. oil until done.
', '
Add kernel corn, green peas, carrot and stir-fry for 1 minute.
', '
Stir in spaghetti and sauce mix and heat through. Sprinkle with pistachios.
']

Name: simple-sesame-noodles
Ingredients: ['12 oz. of spaghetti or Chinese egg noodles', '4 scallions, thinly sliced']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce  ', '2 Tbsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Whisk together Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Sauce, sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, rice vinegar and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a bowl.
', '
Cook noodles according to package directions.
', '
Pour sauce mix over hot noodles and toss to coat.\xa0
', '
Sprinkle with thinly sliced scallions and serve. Dish may also be enjoyed cold.\xa0
']

Name: mason-jar-instant-noodles
Ingredients: ['2 chicken breasts, cooked and shredded', '4 tsp. lime juice', '4 vegetable bouillon cubes', '½ cup julienne broccoli stems', '½ cup julienne carrots', '½ cup sliced green onions', '½ cup julienne red bell pepper', '1 lb. vermicelli noodles']
Seasoning: ['4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Divide the shredded chicken between 4 mason jars.
', '
Add a teaspoon of\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and lime juice to each mason jar. Then place a vegetable bouillon cube into each mason jar.
', '
Evenly divide the vegetables and vermicelli noodles between each jar.
', '
When ready to eat, add boiling water to each jar and let it sit for 5 minutes. Enjoy!
']

Name: slow-cooked-hoisin-ribs
Ingredients: ['2, 2lb. racks baby back pork ribs', '½ cup ketchup', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'sesame seeds for garnish ', '2 scallions for garnish']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '⅓ cup rice vinegar', '¼ cup honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Siracha Chili', '2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1, 2" piece of ginger, grated', '3 garlic cloves, minced']
Procedure:
['
Combine all marinade ingredients including Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Cooking Soy Sauce. Marinate the ribs in a slow cooker, then cook for 6 hours on low heat. Reserve 1 cup cooking liquid after cooking.
', '
Preheat broiler and line a rimmed baking sheet with foil.
', '
Transfer ribs from the slow cooker onto the baking sheet. Add the reserved liquid and 1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce to the ketchup and mix.
', '
Brush this mixture over the ribs and broil bone side down for 3-5 minutes.
', '
Remove ribs and slice them between the bones as desired. Garnish with sesame seeds and scallions and serve.
']

Name: thai-style-salmon-cakes
Ingredients: ['14 oz. skinless salmon filet, cut into chunks', '2 stalks green onion, sliced', '¼ cup diced red bell pepper', '¼ cup chopped cilantro', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 large egg, beaten', '½ cup panko', '½ cup avocado oil, for cooking', '1 lemon, wedged for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. lime juice', '2 tsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Place the chunks of salmon into a food processor. Pulse the salmon until it is finely chopped. Use a rubber spatula to scrape the salmon into a large bowl.
', '
Add the green onion, red bell pepper, cilantro, lime juice, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, egg, panko, and salt and pepper to taste to the salmon. Fold the ingredients together until well combined.
', '
Form the salmon mixture into 4-6 evenly-sized patties and place them onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Refrigerate the patties for 1 hour.
', '
Heat the oil in a pan over medium-high heat. When the pan and oil are hot, add the patties to the pan and lower the heat to medium. Cook the patties on each side for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
', '
Remove the salmon patties from the pan and serve with lemon juice and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-potato-skins
Ingredients: ['6 medium red potatoes', '1 cup finely shredded Monterey Jack']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup chopped chives, plus more for garnish', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. melted butter']
Procedure:
['
Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper. Boil potatoes whole until fork tender, drain, and cool. When cool enough to handle, cut potatoes in half lengthwise and carefully scoop out flesh, leaving a ¼-inch border and the skin intact.
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F. Place skins on prepared baking sheet.
', '
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, chives, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and melted butter.
', '
Brush the mixture on both sides of the potatoes and roast for 10 minutes, skin side up. Flip and roast for an additional 5 minutes. Remove from oven, top with cheese, and broil until cheese is golden and melted.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and garnish with chopped chives. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-chicken-caesar-wrap
Ingredients: ['4 large flour tortillas', '6 cups chopped romaine lettuce', '1 tomato, sliced', '2 1/2 cups chopped cooked chicken', '1/2 cup croutons', '1/4 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese']
Procedure:
['
To make dressing, process all dressing ingredients including the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo in a food processor or blender and blend until rich and creamy. Refrigerate until needed.
', '
Cover the tortillas with a damp paper towel to make them more pliable. Microwave them for 20 seconds.
', '
Divide the remaining ingredients between 4 tortillas, making a mound in the center. Drizzle about 1 tablespoon of the dressing over the ingredients for each one.
', '
Wrap up your ingredients, cut it in half, and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: pho-roast-beef-sandwich
Ingredients: ['1 8" French baguette, lightly toasted', '½ beefsteak tomato cut into ¼" round slices', '½ avocado, sliced', '¼ cup red onion, thinly sliced into half moons', '¼ cup bean sprouts', '½ lb. roast beef ', '¼ cup cilantro leaves', '¼ cup basil leaves']
Procedure:
['
Cut the bread in half lengthwise. On one side, spread the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and then top that side with tomatoes and avocado.
', '
Add sliced onions to the opposite side then top with bean sprouts.
', '
Add roast beef on top of tomatoes and drizzle\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Hoisin Sauce on top of the beef. Finally, top sauce with cilantro and basil.
', '
Put the sandwich back together.
', '
Slice sub in half down the middle and serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: hot-and-spicy-cabbage-rolls-with-chinese-mushrooms-and-minced-pork
Ingredients: ['5½ oz. minced pork', '3 oz. Chinese mushrooms, soaked and diced', '4 water chestnuts, peeled and finely diced', '13 oz. cabbage, large leaves', '⅓ oz. carrot, peeled and sliced', '¾ oz. lotus root, peeled and sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 tsp. water ']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. water ']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the stuffing and wrap. Marinate pork, water chestnuts, and Chinese mushrooms for 10 minutes. Boil cabbage until soft, then immerse in cold water and set aside.
', '
Divide stuffing into 8 equal portions. Wrap and enclose each portion in a cabbage leaf, then plate. Arrange carrot and lotus root slices in between each Chinese mushroom and minced pork cabbage roll.
', '
Steam for 15 minutes.
', '
Heat Seasoning Mix of\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Bean Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Oyster Sauce, and water. Stir well.\xa0
', '
Drizzle warm Seasoning Mix over spicy cabbage rolls and serve.
']

Name: portuguese-bitoque
Ingredients: ['4 beef steaks', '1 package frozen French fries', '½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 large eggs', '1 Tbsp. butter', '½ cup dry white wine']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. red bell pepper paste', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Season both sides of the steaks with salt and pepper. Mix the red bell pepper paste and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Oyster Sauce together, then brush the sauce onto the steaks. Allow the steaks to marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Cook the french fries according to the package directions.
', '
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat. Once the steaks are done marinating, place them on the grill. Cook for about 3 minutes on each side or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add in the vegetable oil. Crack in the eggs and fry until the whites have cooked but the yolks are still runny. Remove the eggs from the pan.
', '
Add the butter and white wine to a pan. Over medium heat, cook until the butter melts and the sauce has slightly reduced. Remove the sauce from heat.
', '
Serve the cooked Portuguese bitoque steaks, butter sauce, french fries, and fried eggs together. Enjoy!
']

Name: braised-duck-with-chu-hou-paste
Ingredients: ['1 dressed duck (about 1200 grams /2.5 pounds)', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '20 g (1 oz.) ginger, sliced', '20 g (1 oz.) green onion, sliced', '20 g (1 oz.) onion, chopped', '20 g (1 oz.) cilantro']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Double Fermented Soy Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chu Hou Paste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '750 ml (3 cups) water', '1 Tbsp. sugar', 'cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the duck with Lee Kum Kee Double Fermented Soy Sauce.
', '
In a wok, use 1 Tablespoon oil to pan-fry the duck until golden. Set aside.
', '
Using the same wok, sauté ginger, green onion, onion, and cilantro. Drizzle in wine.
', '
Add Seasoning Mix made from Shaoxing wine,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chu Hou Paste,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Oyster Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Premium Dark Soy Sauce, sugar, and water. Bring to a boil.
', '
Add the duck back into the pan. Cover and simmer for 30–45 minutes. Set aside to cool.
', '
Cut the duck into pieces. Use the cornstarch solution (1 Tablespoon cornstarch dissolved into equal part cold water) to thicken sauce, and pour mixture over the duck. Serve hot.
']

Name: shrimp-po-boys
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. shrimp, peeled and deveined', 'vegetable oil, for frying', '4 french loaves, split lengthwise', '1 globe tomato, sliced', '2 cups shredded lettuce']
Seasoning: ['3 tsp. kosher salt', '2 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '½ tsp. cayenne pepper', '½ tsp. ground black pepper', '1 ½ cups all-purpose flour', '1 cup cornmeal']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup buttermilk', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, mix the kosher salt, paprika, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, and ground black pepper. Place the shrimp into a bowl and season it with half of the spice mix.
', '
In another bowl, add the remaining half of the spice mix, flour, and cornmeal. Whisk until combined. In a separate bowl, mix the buttermilk and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce together. Pour enough vegetable oil into a pot so that it is 2 inches deep. Heat the oil to 350˚F.
', '
Working in batches, dip some of the shrimp into the buttermilk mixture. Allow any excess buttermilk to drip off, then place the shrimp into the flour mix. Make sure the shrimp is completely coated and dust off any excess flour. Place the shrimp into the oil and fry for about 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
', '
Remove the shrimp from the oil and place them onto a baking tray lined with paper towels. Repeat steps 3-4 to cook the remaining shrimp.
', '
To assemble the po boys, spread 1-2 Tbsp. of the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo onto the bottom halves of the loaves. Add a few slices of tomatoes then some of the shredded lettuce. Place the desired amount of shrimp on top, then add a drizzle of additional Sriracha Mayo. Finish with the top half of the loaf and enjoy the shrimp po boy!
']

Name: my-famous-drunken-noodles
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. canola or peanut oil', '2-3 garlic cloves, minced', '1-2 serrano chilies, sliced thin', '1/2 medium white onion, sliced', '6-8 large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '2 eggs', '4 cups fresh rice noodle, separated', '½ cup grape tomatoes, halved', '1 cup Thai basil leaves, loosely packed']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '6-8 Thai basil leaves, chiffonade']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Sweet Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic with the other sauce ingredients and set it aside.
', '
In a large sauté pan, heat the oil over high heat. When you see a wisp of white smoke, add the garlic and serrano chilies and sauté until they are light brown.
', '
Add the onions, shrimp, and eggs, then lightly scramble until they’re barely set, about 1 minute. Then add the noodles, folding constantly until the shrimp is cooked, about 1 minute.
', '
Add the sauce mix, tomatoes, and Thai basil, and toss to combine for about 3 minutes. Don’t be scared to scrape the bits off the bottom before they burn. Cook until the noodles are cooked and coated well. Serve these shrimp drunken noodles topped with scallions and additional Thai basil, and enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-spicy-wet-burrito
Ingredients: ['2 lb. top sirloin', '5 large flour tortillas', '2 cups cooked rice', '1 bunch cilantro, chopped', '1 cup kimchi, chopped', '1 cup cheese', '1 bunch green onions, sliced']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste', '1 cup enchilada sauce']
Marinade: ['2 pears, peeled and cut into chunks', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2” knob of ginger', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1/4 cup brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Thinly slice the beef. In a food processor, pulse the pear, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and ginger to make a chunky paste. Put the paste, the remaining marinade ingredients, and the beef in a slow cooker. Cover and cook on high for 3-5 hours or until very tender.
', '
Preheat your oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or spray lightly with cooking spray.
', '
Lay a flour tortilla on a flat surface. Place the rice, meat, cilantro, and kimchi in the middle of the tortilla, and drizzle Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo over the filling. Fold the sides up, and then roll it up front to back. Place seam-side down on the prepared baking sheet and repeat for the remaining tortillas.
', '
Bake for 20 minutes, or until warmed through. Meanwhile, heat the enchilada sauce in a saucepan or microwave. Remove the burritos from the oven and spoon the enchilada sauce on top. Add a sprinkle of cheese. Return to the oven for a few minutes, just until the cheese is melted.
', '
Serve this wet Asian burrito recipe topped with more\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo and green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: fried-chicken-tikka-masala-burger
Ingredients: ['4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, pounded to a uniform ½" thickness', '½ cup all purpose flour', '½ cup cornstarch', '⅓ cup fine cornmeal', 'canola or vegetable oil, for frying', 'brioche buns, toasted', 'pickled red onions', 'cilantro, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt']
Marinade: ['1 cup buttermilk', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 egg', '½ tsp. sugar', '2 tsp. salt']
Sauce Mix: ['1 (16 oz.) jar tikka masala sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
For the chicken: Combine buttermilk, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, egg, sugar, and 2 teaspoons of salt in a medium bowl or zipper-topped bag.\xa0 Add the chicken and submerge in the buttermilk mixture. Marinate in the refrigerator for 2-4 hours.
', '
Combine flour, cornstarch, cornmeal, and 1 teaspoon of salt in a bowl or plate.\xa0 Remove the marinated chicken from the refrigerator and dredge in the flour mixture, making sure each piece of chicken is well-coated (use your hands to pat the flour mixture onto the surface of the chicken if needed).\xa0 Let chicken rest on a wire rack for about 10 minutes before frying.
', '
Meanwhile, heat the oil in a heavy-bottom skillet or Dutch oven to 330°F.\xa0 Fry the chicken, in batches if necessary, until well-browned on each side. They should reach an internal temperature of 165°F.\xa0 Place fried chicken on another wire rack to cool slightly. 
', '
In a saucepan over medium heat, add your tikka masala sauce. Add in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and stir until heated.
', '
Assemble the chicken tikka masala sandwich: Dip a piece of fried chicken in the tikka masala sauce and place it on the bottom bun. Top with pickled onions and fresh cilantro. Add the top bun and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-egg-salad
Ingredients: ['8 eggs, hard boiled', '½ cup celery, chopped ', '¼ cup green onion stems, thinly sliced ', '1 Tbsp. green onion bulbs, thinly sliced ', '1 pack crackers, for topping']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo  ', '1 tsp. spicy brown mustard', '⅛ tsp. cayenne pepper', 'a dash of smoked paprika ', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Roughly chop eggs into small pieces and place them into a mixing bowl.
', '
Add the celery, green onion stems, and bulbs and mix.
', '
In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, mustard, cayenne pepper, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix well and pour onto the egg mixture. 
', '
Carefully stir all ingredients together. Serve with crackers or on bread, or eat this sriracha egg salad right from the bowl!
']

Name: spicy-mayo-baked-salmon-with-pickled-cucumbers
Ingredients: ['3 Persian cucumbers, thinly sliced', '½ Tbsp. white sesame seeds', '½ Tbsp. olive oil', '2 (6 oz.) salmon filets', 'cooked white rice', '1 avocado, sliced', '2 scallions, sliced', 'seaweed snack, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 ½ tsp. salt', '1 tsp. granulated sugar\t', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '2 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to a high broil. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
', '
Add the Persian cucumbers, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, 1 ½ teaspoon of salt, and granulated sugar to a bowl. Toss the ingredients together and massage the cucumbers with your hands. Mix in the sesame seeds, then set it aside to pickle. 
', '
Grease the prepared baking sheet with the olive oil. Season the salmon filets with salt and pepper and place them on the baking sheet.
', '
Brush the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo all over the salmon filets. Place the salmon in the oven to cook for 8-10 minutes, until the top is golden and slightly charred.
', '
Serve the spicy mayo salmon with rice, avocado, scallions, seaweed snacks, and pickled cucumbers. Enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-avocado-egg-rolls
Ingredients: ['canola oil, divided (2 Tbsp. for cooking, 4 cups for frying)', '1/2 cup finely minced red onion', '1/4 cup finely minced red bell peppers', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/4 cup finely chopped celery', '2 cups chopped chicken breast', '1 cup julienned green cabbage', '1/2 cup shredded carrots', '12 egg roll wrappers', '2 avocados, sliced into 24 pieces', '1 egg mixed with 1 Tbsp. milk, for egg wash']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
n a sauté pan over high heat, add 2 tablespoons of canola oil. Sauté the red onions and bell peppers until translucent.
', '
Turn the heat down to medium and add Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, celery, and chicken, and cook for 5 minutes. Deglaze the pan with Lee Kum Kee Panda Cooking Soy Sauce. Allow the mixture to cool.
', '
In a large bowl combine cabbage, carrots, and the chicken mixture. 
', '
In a medium saucepan, add enough oil (around 4 cups) to keep egg rolls from touching the bottom of the pan. Heat to 350°F. 
', '
To form each egg roll, lay out the egg roll skin with a corner facing you. Place 1½ Tbsp. of the mixture on each roll and then place 2 pieces of avocado on top of the mixture. Fold the corner over the mixture, and then fold the outside corners over the mixture, making a roll that is 4- to 5-inches wide. Roll up firmly, being careful not to tear the wrapper, and seal the final edge with egg wash.
', '
Dredge each egg roll in egg wash, allowing the excess to drain off. Submerge the egg rolls in oil. Fry until golden brown, about 3 to 4 minutes. Drain on a sheet tray lined with a cooling rack. Serve these chicken avocado egg rolls with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: tiger-egg-crispy-eggs
Ingredients: ['8 eggs, hard-boiled', 'neutral oil, for frying', '2 stalks green onions, sliced into 1” pieces ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger\t', '1 can 12 oz. cola ', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce\t']
Procedure:
['
Using a small knife, make multiple vertical shallow slices on the eggs.
', '
In a large frying pan, heat oil on low and fry eggs gently until golden on all sides.
', '
Add in green onion pieces, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Panda Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, and cola. Cover and cook on low heat until the sauce is thickened. 
', '
Garnish the tiger skin eggs with sesame seeds and green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: ma-po-tofu
Ingredients: ['3 oz. ground pork', '1 Tbsp. green onions, minced', '3 Tbsp. water', '1 box tofu']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. LKK Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. LKK Chili Bean Sauce', '1 Tbsp. LKK Pure Sesame Oil', 'Cornstarch water as needed', '2 tsp. LKK Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. LKK Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
Cut the tofu into small cubes. Pat with paper towels to remove excess water. Boil the tofu until cooked through and set aside.
', '
Over medium heat, sauté Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger until fragrant. Add ground pork and stir-fry until cooked through. 
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce. Stir-fry until fragrant, then add water. 
', '
Add the tofu and simmer over low heat until it absorbs the flavor. Add cornstarch water to thicken the sauce. Sprinkle Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil before serving.
', '
Garnish with green onions, and your ma po tofu is ready to serve. Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.

Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.

Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: holiday-cheesy-bacon-loaded-chips-recipe
Ingredients: ['10 slices thick cut bacon chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 bag kettle cooked Black Pepper or Sea Salt Potato Chips', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese', '1/4 cup brown sugar', '1/4 cup maple syrup', '1/2-1 tsp. cayenne pepper', 'rosemary for garnish ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350° Fahrenheit. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
', '
Cook the bacon and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic in a large skillet over medium high heat until the fat renders and the bacon is just beginning to crisp, about 5-6 minutes. Slide the bacon out onto a paper towel lined plate to drain.
', '
Arrange the potato chips on the prepared baking sheet and sprinkle the brown sugar evenly over the chips. Drizzle the maple evenly over the chips. Add the cheese and bacon. Sprinkle on the cayenne pepper. Transfer to the oven and bake for 10-15 minutes or until the bacon is crisp and the cheese is melted. Remove and break the chips into pieces. Garnish with rosemary and serve warm or at room temperature.\xa0
']

Name: pigs-in-a-blanket-wreath-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cans (8 oz.) refrigerated crescent roll dough', '24 mini cocktail sausages', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 egg, beaten (for egg wash)', '2 Tbsp. sesame seeds ', 'fresh rosemary sprigs or parsley for decoration (optional)']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 375° Fahrenheit (190° Celsius). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.\xa0 Grease a small, oven safe bowl and place in the center of the baking sheet.
', '
Unroll the crescent roll dough and separate it into 16 triangles per can (32 triangles total).Cut each triangle in half lengthwise to create smaller triangles. Spread a small amount of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce onto each dough triangle. Place a mini cocktail sausage at the wide end of each dough triangle. Roll the sausage up in the dough, starting from the wide end and rolling towards the pointed end.
', '
Arrange the wrapped sausages in a circular wreath shape around the bowl on the prepared baking sheet, with the pointed ends of the dough facing inward. Overlap them slightly to form a continuous circle. Brush the beaten egg over the top of the crescent dough to give it a golden finish when baked. Sprinkle sesame seeds on top, if using.
', '
Place the baking sheet in the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the dough is golden brown.
', '
Once the wreath is done baking, let it cool slightly on the baking sheet. Transfer the wreath to a serving platter and place a bowl of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo  in the center of the wreath for dipping. Garnish with fresh rosemary sprigs of parsley around the wreath for a festive touch, if desired.
']

Name: creamy-tomato-pastina-soup-recipe-with-chicken-meatballs
Ingredients: ['2 large eggs', '1 lb. ground chicken', '½ cup plain fine dried breadcrumbs', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, divided ', '2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup), plus more for serving', '⅓ cup finely chopped parsley, plus more for serving', '1 tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '1 medium onion, finely chopped', '1 can (32 oz.) tomato purée', '4 cups low-sodium chicken broth', '2 cups water', '6 oz. pastina', '½ cup heavy cream']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Gently mix eggs, ground chicken, breadcrumbs, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, parmesan, parsley, and salt in a medium bowl until combined. Working one at a time, scoop out about 2 tsp. meat mixture and roll into balls. Transfer meatballs to a baking sheet.
', '
Heat olive oil in a medium Dutch oven over medium-high. Carefully arrange half of the meatballs in the pot; cook, turning occasionally, until lightly browned, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a clean plate with a slotted spoon. Repeat with remaining meatballs. Spoon out all but 2 Tbsp. fat from pot.
', '
Reduce heat to medium. Add onion, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is translucent and edges are starting to brown, 5–7 minutes. Add tomato purée, chicken broth, and water. Season with salt; bring to a boil. Add pastina and cook until al dente, 8–10 minutes.
', '
Return meatballs to pot and cook, stirring to distribute, until heated through, about 4 minutes. Stir in heavy cream and warm for 2 more minutes. Taste and season soup with more salt if needed.
', '
Ladle soup into bowls; top with more Parmesan, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and parsley.
']

Name: baked-mac-and-cheese-bites-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 cups cooked macaroni (cooled)', '1 cup shredded sharp cheddar cheese', '1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese', '1/2 cup milk', '1 large egg', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1/2 tsp. garlic powder', '1/2 tsp. onion powder', '1/4 tsp. black pepper', 'Cooking spray (for greasing)', '1/2 cup breadcrumbs', '1 Tbsp. butter, melted']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 375 °Fahrenheit (190 °Celsius) and grease a mini muffin tin with cooking spray.
', '
In a large bowl, combine cooked macaroni, cheddar cheese, Parmesan cheese, milk, egg, garlic powder, onion powder, black pepper, and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce. Mix well.
', '
Spoon the mixture into the mini muffin tin, pressing down slightly. Mix breadcrumbs with melted butter and sprinkle over each bite.
', '
Bake for 12-15 minutes until tops are golden and bites are set. Let cool in the tin for 5 minutes. Serve with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Sauce!
']

Name: vegetarian-stuffed-mushrooms-with-cream-cheese-recipe
Ingredients: ['24 cremini mushrooms, cleaned and stems removed', '2 oz. low fat cream cheese room temperature', '1/3 cup plain Greek yogurt', '1/2 cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '1/4 cup shredded Parmesan cheese', '8 oz. frozen spinach defrosted and squeezed dry', '3 Tbsp. sun dried tomatoes finely chopped']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375° Fahrenheit. Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil and spray lightly with cooking spray.
', '
In a bowl whisk together all of the ingredients until combined. Spoon approximately 1/2-1 teaspoon of the filling into each mushroom cap then place it on the prepared baking sheet.
', '
Place in the oven to bake for 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the filling is warmed through. Serve immediately and enjoy!
']

Name: korean-spicy-beef-soup-recipe---yukgaejang
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef brisket', '4 dried shiitake mushrooms', '1 medium onion, cut in half', '3 cups mung bean sprouts, washed and strained', '4 stalks large green onions (dae-pa) OR 14-16 stalks green onion, cut into 2½ inch long pieces', '2 cups soaked (or fresh) gosari, cut into 2½ inch long pieces', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Korean hot pepper flakes (gochugaru)', '1 Tbsp. kosher salt', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Cut your beef brisket into several pieces, along the grain, 3 inches long. Soak in cold water for 15 minutes, then wash, drain, and add to a pot with 3 quarts (12 cups) of boiling water, plus the medium onion and dried mushrooms. Cook for one hour over medium high heat.
', '
Combine the sauce ingredients in a bowl and mix it well. Cover with plastic wrap and set aside.
', '
Add the mung bean sprouts, green onions, gosari, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic to a large bowl.
', '
After an hour of cooking, check the beef. Take a sample chunk and split it with your fingers or fork. If it splits nicely, it’s done. If it’s a little tough to split, let it cook for 10 more minutes. As the stock boils off, you want to maintain about 10 cups’ worth, so add some water. When it’s done, remove the beef, onion, and mushrooms with a slotted spoon. Let the beef and mushrooms cool down and discard the cooked onion.
', '
Mix the vegetables with the seasoning sauce until well incorporated. Add to the boiling stock. Cover and cook for 20 minutes over medium high heat until the vegetables are cooked through and tender, but not mushy.
', '
Slice the mushrooms and pull the beef apart into strips. Add to the boiling soup and cook for another 10 minutes. Ladle into bowls and enjoy!
']

Name: black-bean-enchiladas
Ingredients: ['1 (15 oz.) can black beans, drained and rinsed', '1 (12 oz.) bag frozen corn', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 stalks green onion, sliced (+extra for garnish)', '8 oz. shredded pepper jack cheese', '2 ½ cups enchilada sauce', '14-18 pcs. small flour tortillas', '4 oz. shredded sharp cheddar cheese', 'crumbled cotija cheese, for topping', 'diced tomatoes, for topping', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. cumin', '½ tsp. chili powder', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F.
', '
In a large bowl, combine the black beans, corn, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, cumin, chili powder, green onion, pepper jack cheese, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Mix until well combined. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Spread 1 cup of the enchilada sauce into the bottom of a baking dish.
', '
Fill each tortilla with ⅓ cup of the corn and bean mix. Roll the tortilla up and then place it seam-side down into the baking dish. Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling.
', '
Pour the remaining enchilada sauce on top of the enchiladas. Top them with the shredded sharp cheddar cheese. Bake in the oven for about 20 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly. Remove the enchiladas from the oven.
', '
Top the black bean enchiladas with crumbled cotija cheese, diced tomatoes, sliced green onions, and cilantro leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-tofu
Ingredients: ['12 oz. firm tofu, pressed ', '3-6 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '1 Tbsp. canola oil', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['--- For the sauce ---', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. maple syrup', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '--- For the slurry ---', '2 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Cube the tofu and place it in a bowl. Add 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, stir, and let it rest for at least 5 minutes.
', '
While the sesame tofu marinates for the recipe, add all the sauce mix ingredients to a bowl and mix until well combined. In a separate small bowl, whisk 2 Tbsp. water and 1 Tbsp. cornstarch to create a slurry, and then mix them into the sauce bowl until well combined. Set aside.
', '
Drain the tofu and transfer ⅓ of the tofu cubes into a freezer bag with 1 or 2 tablespoons of cornstarch and toss to coat. Repeat this step with the remaining tofu and cornstarch. Add more cornstarch if needed.
', '
Once the tofu cubes are fully coated with the cornstarch, heat the oil in a large skillet and add the tofu cubes.
', '
Cook the tofu cubes over medium-high heat until all sides are golden brown. Then pour the sauce into the skillet and cook until it thickens. To serve, garnish this sesame tofu recipe with the sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: two-hours-chicken-nuggets-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup all-purpose flour', 'Salt and pepper to taste', '2 eggs', 'splash of water', '2 cups breadcrumbs (you can use store-bought or make your own by processing stale bread)', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. onion powder', '1 tsp. paprika', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces', 'Vegetable oil for frying']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE BREADING STATION:\xa0Set up three shallow bowls or plates. In the first one, add the flour and season with salt and pepper. In the second, beat the eggs with a splash of water. In the third, mix the breadcrumbs with garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
', '
BREAD THE CHICKEN:\xa0Take each piece of chicken and coat it first in the flour mixture, shaking off any excess. Then dip it into the beaten egg, letting any excess drip off. Finally, coat it evenly with the seasoned breadcrumbs, pressing gently so the crumbs stick to the chicken. Place the breaded chicken nuggets on a plate or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
', '
CHILL THE NUGGETS:\xa0Once all the chicken pieces are breaded, place them in the refrigerator for about 30-45 minutes to chill. This helps the coating adhere better during frying.
', '
COOK THE NUGGETS:\xa0In a large skillet or pot, heat enough vegetable oil to submerge the chicken nuggets. Heat the oil to around 350°F. Carefully place the chilled chicken nuggets into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan. Fry the nuggets for about 5-7 minutes, turning occasionally, until golden brown and cooked through. You may need to cook them in batches.
', '
Once cooked, remove the nuggets from the oil using a slotted spoon or tongs and place them on a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil. Serve these chicken nuggets hot, and take this simple recipe to the next level with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on the side for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: feta-rolls-with-hot-honey-sauce-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 oz. feta cheese, crumbled', '2 Tbsp. fresh chopped dill', '1 clove garlic, grated', '16-20 sheets frozen phyllo dough, thawed', '1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil, plus more for brushing', '1 Tbsp. salted butter', '1/2 tsp. cumin seed', '1/3 cup honey']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (cage-free eggs)', '1-2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
PREHEAT YOUR OVEN.\xa0Set it to 425°F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
', '
PREP THE FILLING AND GLAZE.\xa0In a bowl, combine the feta, dill, garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo (cage-free eggs). In a separate small bowl, place 1/4 cup of olive oil for brushing.
', '
START ROLLING.\xa0Place 1 sheet of phyllo dough on a clean surface and gently fold it in half crosswise. Brush the edges of the phyllo with a little olive oil. On the short end of the dough, add 1 rounded tablespoon of feta. Roll the phyllo up over the filling, folding the side edges in to seal it burrito style. Place the roll seam-side down on the prepared baking sheet and repeat to make 12-16 rolls.
', '
BAKE THE\xa0FETA ROLLS.\xa0Brush the top of each phyllo roll with olive oil. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the rolls are golden brown on top.
', '
MAKE THE HOT HONEY SAUCE.\xa0In a small skillet, melt together the butter, 1 Tbsp. oil, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Garlic Sauce, and cumin. Cook over medium heat until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the honey.
', '
SERVE.\xa0Take the feta rolls out of the oven. Serve with honey sauce for dipping or drizzled on top. Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-steak-street-corn-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 lb flank steak or skirt steak', '2 ears of corn, husked', '3 tablespoons Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (cage-free eggs)', '1/2 teaspoon chili powder', '1/4 cup crumbled cotija cheese (or feta)', '1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro', 'Juice of 1 lime', '8 small flour or corn tortillas', '1/2 cup shredded cabbage', '1/4 cup sliced green onions', 'Lime wedges (for serving)']
Marinade: ['¼ cup. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tablespoon Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tablespoon Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tablespoon lime juice', '1 tablespoon honey', '1 teaspoon ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
MARINATE THE STEAK:\xa0In a bowl, mix together the Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, lime juice, honey, and ground black pepper.
', '
Place the steak in a resealable plastic bag or a shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the steak, ensuring it is well-coated. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours for more flavor.
', '
PREPARE THE STREET CORN:\xa0Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat. Grill the corn on the cob, turning occasionally, until charred and cooked through, about 10 minutes. Let the corn cool slightly, then cut the kernels off the cob and place them in a bowl. Mix the corn kernels with the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, chili powder, crumbled cotija cheese, chopped cilantro, and lime juice. Set aside.
', '
COOK THE STEAK:\xa0Preheat a grill or skillet over medium-high heat. Remove the steak from the marinade and cook for about 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness. Let the steak rest for a few minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
', '
ASSEMBLE THE ASIAN STYLE\xa0STREET CORN STEAK TACOS:\xa0Warm the tortillas in a dry skillet over medium heat or in the microwave.
Place a few pieces of steak onto each tortilla. Top with a spoonful of the street corn mixture. Add some shredded cabbage and sliced green onions. Serve with lime wedges on the side for extra flavor. Enjoy!
']

Name: homemade-sweet-potato-fries
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. sweet potatoes, peeled']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400°F.
', '
Peel the sweet potatoes and then cut them into sticks about ¼ inches wide and 3-4 inches long.
', '
Place them into a mixing bowl and toss with olive oil and the spices.
', '
Spread them out onto a greased baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes and then flip fries over and cook for another 10 minutes until that side is crisp. Don’t let them burn.
Serve hot with a side of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
