Name: spicy-cheeseburger-sliders
Ingredients: ['12-count brioche slider buns', '1 pound ground beef', '1 yellow onion, diced', '6 slices cheddar cheese', '1 cup freshly grated sharp cheddar cheese', 'Olive oil/melted butter for brushing', 'Sesame seeds', 'Parsley, chopped for garnish', 'Burger toppings of your choice']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '3 Tbsp. ketchup', '2 Tbsp. yellow mustard', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
', '
Slice the slab of slider rolls in half horizontally, keeping them attached as much as you can. Place the bottom of the rolls on a baking sheet.
', '
Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it apart into small crumbles. Add the diced onion and cook for 5 minutes. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, ketchup, and mustard until combined.
', '
Place the sliced sharp cheddar on the bottom layer of the slider buns. Top that with the ground beef mixture. Drizzle on the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Sprinkle with the shredded cheddar.

', '
Top with the slider buns. Brush with a touch of olive oil or butter and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
', '
Bake the sliders for 10 to 15 minutes, until the cheese is melty. Sprinkle with parsley and serve immediately with your favorite burger toppings and sides. Enjoy!
']

Name: baked-mussels-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['18 mussels in shell', '4 Tbsp. crab yolk ', '4 Tbsp. condensed milk', 'some cilantro leaves for garnish', '2 tsp. cracked black pepper', '4 Tbsp. chopped cilantro stalks', '3 Tbsp. lemon juice']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Rinse mussels. Grill them with closed lids for 5 minutes until they start to open a little. Use a knife to pry open all the way and separate shells. Set aside.
', '
In a small bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, condensed milk, black pepper, chopped cilantro stalks, lemon juice, and 2 Tbsp. of crab roe. Spoon the sauce onto the mussels (the whole half shell) and place them on the baking tray.
', '
Put the mussels in the oven and bake at Broil setting for 3 minutes until golden brown on the surface. Garnish with remaining crab roe and cilantro.
']

Name: loaded-vietnamese-style-street-fries
Ingredients: ['1 (28 oz.) bag french fries, prepared according to package directions', '⅓ cup lightly salted peanuts, roughly chopped', '¼ cup fresh cilantro, chopped', 'lime wedges, for serving ', 'toasted sesame seeds, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, for drizzling ', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the Fries.\xa0Bake or air fry the frozen French fries according to package instructions until golden and crispy.
', '
Place the prepared fries on large plate or serving platter. Drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce\xa0and\xa0Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
', '
Top with peanuts, cilantro, sesame seeds, and lime wedges on the side. Enjoy!
']

Name: sriracha-spinach-and-artichoke-dip
Ingredients: ['8 oz. cream cheese, softened', '⅔ cup sour cream', '3 Tbsp. mayo', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ cups shredded mozzarella cheese', '½ cup grated parmesan cheese', '½ cup grated Gruyére cheese', '10 oz. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry', '14 oz. marinated artichoke hearts, chopped', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven. Set it to 375˚F. 
', '
Mix the ingredients. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sour cream, mayo, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Mix with a rubber spatula until combined and fluffy. Add in 1 cup of the mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, Gruyère cheese, spinach, and artichoke. Mix until combined.
', '
Bake the spicy spinach and artichoke dip. Spread the mixture into a 9x9 inch casserole pan. Top it with the remaining mozzarella cheese. Bake it in the oven for 25-30 minutes until bubbly and the cheese has browned. 
', '
Serve. Remove the dip from the oven and garnish with chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: tomato-tarte-tatin
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil ', '2 pints cherry tomatoes (about 4 cups), preferably a mix of colors', '2 Tbsp. balsamic vinegar', '1 tsp. honey', '2 tsp. chopped fresh thyme leaves, plus a handful of small sprigs for garnish', '1 sheet frozen puff pastry, thawed but still cold, and corners cut off to make very rough 9- to 10-inch round']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for serving ']
Procedure:
['
Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil\xa0Arrange a rack in the middle of the oven and heat to 400°F.
', '
Over medium heat in an ovenproof 9- or 10-inch skillet, preferably cast iron, heat the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Crisp Oil until shimmering. Add the tomatoes and season lightly with salt and Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder.
', '
Once the tomatoes are cool enough to handle, return the skillet to medium heat and add the vinegar and honey. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for about 1 minute until reduced slightly, thick, and syrupy.
', '
Remove the skillet from the heat. Use your fingers to gently return the tomatoes to the skillet in one even layer, nestling them beside each other to fit as needed. Leave any juices that have collected on the plate behind. Sprinkle the chopped thyme over the tomatoes along with another big pinch of salt and a few grinds of black pepper from Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder.
', '
Place the puff pastry round on top of the tomatoes, folding under any edges, if needed. Prick the pastry with a fork in a handful of spots.
', '
Bake 25-30 minutes or until the puff pastry is golden brown. Remove from the oven, let stand for 5 minutes, then run a knife around the pastry to loosen it from the pan. Invert a large plate over the top of the skillet and, using oven mitts, carefully and quickly flip the tarte tatin onto the plate.\xa0
Rearrange any tomatoes that may have fallen out of place. Garnish with the thyme sprigs and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo.\xa0
Cut into wedges, then serve warm or at room temperature with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: leftover-turkey-chilaquiles
Ingredients: ['1⁄4 cup canola oil, for frying', '12 corn tortillas, cut into 8 wedges each', '4 tomatoes, coarsely chopped', '1⁄2 yellow onion, coarsely chopped', '1 jalapeño, coarsely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 1⁄4 cups chicken stock ', '1 cup leftover turkey, shredded', '1 cup brussels sprouts, cooked', '1 egg, fried, sunny side up', '1 avocado, sliced', '4 oz. queso fresco, crumbled', '1⁄2 bunch cilantro, chopped']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add about ¼ of the tortilla wedges and cook for 2 minutes or so, then flip and cook the other side until they’re lightly brown and crisp. Drain the tortilla chips on a paper towel-lined baking sheet. Sprinkle lightly with salt. Repeat this process until all tortillas are fried, adding more oil if needed.
', '
Place the tomatoes, onion, jalapeno, and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic in a blender with about 1 cup of stock to start. Blend until smooth. Add more chicken stock if needed.
', '
Add the salsa to a large, flat-bottom sauté pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened. This should take about 6 - 8 minutes. Season with salt.
', '
Add the chips into the salsa pan, turning them carefully to coat them. Continue cooking until the chips are heated through and softened slightly, about 3 minutes. Add leftover turkey and Brussels sprouts to the pan and heat through.
', '
Drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce and top with egg, avocado, queso fresco, and cilantro. Serve the chilaquiles immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-garlic-egg-boil
Ingredients: ['6 eggs, hard-boiled', 'green onion, a little, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup unsalted butter', '1/2 onion, finely diced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 lemon, juiced', '1 bay leaf', '1 tsp. Old Bay seasoning or to taste', '2 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. oregano', '1/2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the butter to a large skillet and let it melt completely over medium heat.
', '
Stir in the onions and cook for 3-4 minutes. Add the\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic and cook until fragrant. Add the rest of the sauce, mix ingredients, and cook for 2-3 minutes while stirring frequently.
', '
Taste for seasoning and add salt and pepper if desired, then add the hard-boiled eggs.
', '
Cook for 1 minute until eggs are warmed through.
', '
Top these spicy garlic boiled eggs with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Crisp Oil and green onions. Enjoy this tasty recipe!
']

Name: super-chinese-bowl-sriracha-hoisin-wings
Ingredients: ['22 oz. chicken wings ']
Seasoning: ['1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Marinade: ['2/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2/3 tsp. ground black pepper', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl or zipper bag, mix 2/3 cup of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and 2/3 cup of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce with ground black pepper and cooking oil.
', '
Add the wings, and ensure they’re coated thoroughly.
', '
Place the wings and marinade in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours or overnight.
', '
Preheat oven to 450°F for 15 minutes. Bake wings for 45 minutes.
', '
Mix 1/3 cup of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and 1/3 cup of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce in a bowl and add the baked wings. Toss to mix well. Enjoy!
']

Name: bang-bang-chicken-skewers
Ingredients: ['wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes', '2 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1” cubes', '1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', 'sliced green onions, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. paprika', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. garlic powder']
Sauce Mix: ['⅔ cup sweet chili sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 ¼ cups Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the chicken, paprika, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and olive oil. Toss to evenly coat. Working with one skewer at a time, thread 4-5 chicken cubes onto each.
', '
In a small bowl, combine the sauce mix ingredients to make the bang bang sauce.
', '
Pour half of the sauce into a separate bowl and set aside to use after the chicken has been cooked. Use the remainder of the sauce to brush evenly over the chicken.
', '
Add the skewers to the basket of your air fryer in a single layer. Depending on the size of your air fryer, you may have to work in batches.
', '
Air fry at 400°F for 11-12 minutes, flipping halfway. The chicken is fully cooked when it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
', '
Transfer the skewers to a plate and drizzle or brush with the reserved sauce. Garnish the bang bang chicken skewers with green onions. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: cold-vietnamese-spring-roll
Ingredients: ['12   Vietnamese spring roll wrappers ', '3 oz.  imitation crabmeat, shredded ', '3 oz.  carrot, shredded', '3 oz.  mango, skinned and cut into strips ', '3 oz.  cucumber, cut into strips']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Soak the wrappers in cool water for about 1 minute until soft. Drain and pat dry with a towel.
', '
Place a portion of crab meat, carrot, cucumber, mango, and ½ tsp. Seasoning mix onto a wrapper. Roll it up to form a small sealed packet. Repeat this procedure for the remaining spring rolls. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-sriracha-and-honey-chicken-legs
Ingredients: ['3 chicken legs, skin-on and bone in', '¼ cup scallions, sliced for garnish ', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Marinade: ['coarse sea salt, to taste', 'ground black pepper, to taste', 'garlic powder, to taste ']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup honey', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Combine honey, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Cooking Soy Sauce in a bowl.
', '
Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and garlic powder on both sides.
', '
Place in the air fryer at 350˚F for 15 minutes. Brush the sauce on and cook for an additional 2-5 minutes.
', '
Transfer the chicken to a large serving plate. Reserve some sauce on the side for serving and brush extra sauce over the chicken.
', '
Garnish with sliced scallions and serve these honey sriracha chicken legs with extra lime wedges on the side. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-cajun-pasta
Ingredients: ['1 medium onion', '1 red bell pepper', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. chicken breast, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 (15 oz.) can chopped tomatoes', '2½ cups chicken stock', '½ lb. penne pasta', 'juice of ½ a lemon', '⅔ cup heavy cream', 'Parmesan, for topping', 'fresh parsley, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Cajun seasoning', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
Thinly slice the onion and red bell pepper.
', '
Heat the oil in a large, deep pot over medium-high heat, then add the chicken. Cook it for 2 minutes.
', '
Reduce the heat slightly to medium, add the sliced onion and sliced red pepper, and sauté for 5 minutes until the onion is translucent and softened.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Garlic Sauce, and the Cajun seasoning, and cook for another 2 minutes.
', '
Toss in the chopped tomatoes, chicken stock, and penne pasta, and add salt and pepper to taste. Cover with a lid, and allow the pasta to cook for 8 minutes, or according to the package instructions.
', '
When the pasta is al dente, add the lemon juice and the heavy cream, and allow everything to cook together for 2 additional minutes.

Finely chop the parsley. Grate parmesan over the top of the penne, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Crisp Oil and garnish the spicy Cajun pasta with parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-cracker-bites
Ingredients: ['3 sleeves crackers']
Sauce Mix: ['1 stick salted butter, melted', '2 Tbsp. dark brown sugar', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. onion powder', '1 Tbsp. chopped fresh sage', '1 Tbsp. dried oregano', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, solids only', 'kosher salt and black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 300° F. Place wire racks on top of two baking sheets.
', '
In a large bowl, combine the butter, brown sugar, garlic powder, onion powder, sage, oregano, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, paprika, solids from the\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Crisp Oil, plus a pinch of salt and a generous pinch of pepper.
', '
At this stage in the recipe, add the crackers to the spicy mix and toss to combine. Make sure all crackers are coated in butter.
', '
Spread the crackers out in an even layer on top of the racks. Bake for 15-25 minutes until golden brown, turning them halfway through cooking.
', '
Allow the cracker bites to sit on the baking sheet until cooled and dry, about 20 minutes. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-pub-cheese-dip
Ingredients: ['8 oz. grated cheddar cheese', '4 oz. cream cheese', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '6 Tbsp. beer', '1 garlic clove ', '1 tsp. worcestershire sauce', '½ tsp. smoked paprika ', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'soft pretzels, for serving']
Procedure:
['
Blend all ingredients in a food processor for a few minutes until well combined.
', '
Spoon out into a bowl and then top with a sprinkle of smoked paprika.
', '
Serve with soft pretzels.
']

Name: hoisin-philly-cheesesteak-bites
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. butter, divided', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, divided', '1/2 onion, diced ', '1 green pepper, diced ', '5 oz. thinly sliced roast beef, roughly chopped', '6 slices Provolone cheese, cut into fourths  ', '6 slices American cheese, cut into fourths ', '1 package, 10 count buttermilk biscuits, separated and flattened', '1/4 cup olive oil']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a medium saucepan over medium heat, add 1 tablespoon of butter. Cook 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, onions, and green peppers until onions are browned and green peppers are softened. Remove from the pan and set aside.
', '
In the same pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter and cook roast beef, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Hoisin Sauce, and remaining 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic until caramelized, about 4 minutes.
', '
Place down 2 pieces of provolone on each biscuit. Top with 1 tablespoon of the onion and green pepper mix and 1 tablespoon of roast beef. Lay 2 pieces of American cheese on top of the roast beef. Gather the edges of the biscuits around the toppings and pinch to seal.
', '
Place in a greased, round baking dish with the seams down. Brush the tops with olive oil. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes. Serve warm with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: mac-and-cheese-gnocchi-garlic-bread-bowl
Ingredients: ['--- Mac N Cheese Gnocchi ---', '1 lb. gnocchi, cooked according to package. ½ cup pasta water reserved ', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '1 ½ cups whole milk', '1 ½ cups shredded cheddar cheese', '¼ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '½ tsp. onion powder', '¼ tsp. paprika', '--- Garlic Bread Bowl ---', '1 large round loaf of bread (sourdough or another crusty type)', 'prepared garlic butter ']
Sauce Mix: ['--- Garlic Butter ---', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '¼ cup unsalted butter, softened', '1 Tbsp. fresh basil, chopped', '¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese', '1 tsp. Italian seasoning']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo, butter, basil, Parmesan, and Italian seasoning. Mix until well combined.
', '
Garlic Bread Bowl: Preheat the oven to 400°F. 
Using a serrated knife, carefully cut the top off the round loaf of bread. Hollow out the center, leaving about a 1-inch border around the edges and bottom to create a bowl. Generously coat the inside and top of the bread with the prepared garlic butter mixture. Place the bread bowl on a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes or until the bread is crispy and golden. Set aside.
', '
Mac and Cheese Gnocchi: In a pan over medium heat, melt 1 tablespoon of butter. Add the all-purpose flour and stir until the flour is fully coated, about 1 minute. Pour in the whole milk and continue stirring for 3-4 minutes until the mixture slightly thickens. Reduce the heat to low and add the shredded cheddar and mozzarella cheeses, stirring continuously until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth. Season the sauce with salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and paprika. Stir until well combined. Add the cooked gnocchi to the cheese sauce, gently coating the gnocchi with the sauce. If the sauce is too thick, add a little of the reserved pasta water to adjust the consistency.
', '
Carefully fill the prepared garlic bread bowl with your mac and cheese gnocchi. Enjoy immediately!
']

Name: loco-moco
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef', '1 medium yellow onion, peeled (¼ of the onion chopped; ¾ of the onion sliced)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 ½ Tbsp. neutral oil', '8 oz. cremini mushrooms, cleaned and sliced', '2 cups beef broth', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '4 cups steamed white rice', '4 large eggs, fried, sunny side up or over easy', '2 scallions, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the beef, chopped onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Hoisin Sauce, salt, and pepper. Mix with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined. Form into four patties about ½-inch thick. Place the patties on a plate, cover with plastic wrap then transfer to the refrigerator for 20 minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large 12-inch skillet over medium. When the oil is hot and shimmering, add the sliced onion and sauté, stirring occasionally, until almost translucent, 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce the heat to low and continue cooking, stirring often, until soft and caramelized, about 10 minutes. Transfer to a bowl and set aside.
', '
Add 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet and hold over medium heat. When the oil is hot, swirl the pan around to evenly coat it, then gently place the patties in the pan, spacing them out evenly. Cook until browned, about 4 minutes per side. Using a spatula, transfer patties to a clean plate to rest.
', '
Add the remaining ½ tablespoon of oil to the pan and heat over medium until hot. Add the mushrooms and sauté until tender, about 10 minutes. Season the mushrooms with salt and pepper, then add the caramelized onions, beef broth, and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Cooking Soy Sauce. Reduce the heat to medium-low.
', '
Place the cornstarch in a small bowl. Add 2 tablespoons of the broth from the skillet and whisk until smooth. Stir the cornstarch slurry into the skillet and simmer until the sauce has thickened, 5 to 7 minutes. Place 1 cup steamed rice on each plate and top each serving with one patty, then the gravy, and a fried egg. Drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo and garnish with scallions. Enjoy!
']

Name: pork-souvlaki
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lb. pork tenderloin, cut into 1" cubes', 'tzatziki, for serving', 'chopped parsley, for garnish', 'lemon juice, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for serving ']
Marinade: ['1/4 cup extra virgin olive oil', '3 Tbsp. lemon juice', '2 Tbsp. red wine vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. dried oregano', '1 Tbsp. fresh thyme', '1 tsp. grated lemon zest', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
Combine the olive oil, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, Lee Kum Kee\xa0 Minced Garlic, dried oregano, thyme, lemon zest,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Cooking Soy Sauce, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Ground Black Pepper in a large mixing bowl; whisk until well incorporated. Add in the pieces of pork and toss to coat really well. Cover and place in the refrigerator to marinate overnight.
', '
Place 6 wooden skewers to soak in cold water for about 30 minutes before you start building your souvlakis. When ready to eat, preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
', '
Thread the pieces of pork onto the pre-soaked bamboo sticks; discard unused marinade.
', '
Grill the kebabs, turning them every 2-3 minutes, until the meat is cooked through, about 10-12 minutes total.
', '
Serve with tzatziki and drizzle with\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo. Garnish with parsley and lemon juice, and serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: abalone-tacos
Ingredients: ['4 yellow corn tortillas', '1 cup shredded cabbage', '½ cup sliced green pepper', '1 cup diced avocado ', '½ cup chopped red onion', '½ cup chopped cilantro', '¼ cup shredded cheese', '2 cans Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce (4 pcs)']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Sauce from Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Lay the yellow corn tortillas in a skillet until they are browned and pliable.
', '
Add the sauce from the canned Lee Kum Kee\xa0Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce to a bowl with the cabbage and green pepper, mix well, and set aside.
', '
With the warmed yellow corn tortillas on the bottom, layer the mixed cabbage and green pepper, avocado, red onion, cilantro, and cheese on top. Place the Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce pieces in the center, and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo.
']

Name: hoisin-burgers
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. ground chuck beef', '4 burger buns, cut in half', '1 English cucumber thinly sliced', '1 cup red onion, sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Divide beef into 4 equal 6 oz. portions, using buns as a guide for patty sizes. Indent the center of the patty with your finger to prevent the patties from shrinking while cooking. Generously season with salt and pepper.
', '
Heat a cast-iron skillet or a grill over medium-high heat. When the grill or pan is hot, add patties with salt and pepper side down and grill for 4 minutes.
', '
Season the other side with salt and pepper.
', '
Flip burgers and brush each patty with Lee Kum Kee\xa0Hoisin Sauce. Continue to grill for 4 minutes for medium doneness. Remove from the grill and allow to rest.
', '
Grill buns cut side down until slightly toasted and warm. Remove from the grill.
', '
Build burgers by spreading Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo on cut sides of buns. Add cucumber slices to the base of the bun, then burger patty. Add red onions to the top of burgers and close with the other bun. Serve.
']

Name: salmon-croquettes-with-sriracha-dill-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless skinless salmon fillet, roughly chopped\t', '¼ cup parmesan cheese, grated', '¾ cup panko', '1 shallot, finely chopped', '1 large egg', '1 Tbsp. capers', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the salmon, Parmesan cheese, panko, shallot, Worcestershire sauce, and egg into a food processor. Pulse until the ingredients are minced then transfer the mixture to a bowl.
', '
Fold in the capers until they are evenly distributed throughout the mixture. Grease your hands with 1 tablespoon of the olive oil and portion the mixture into 10-12 evenly-sized balls. Then shape each ball into an oval shape.
', '
Heat the remaining olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the salmon croquettes to the pan and cook them for about 5-6 minutes on each side or until cooked through. Remove them from the pan and transfer them to a plate lined with paper towels to drain.
', '
In a bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo, dill, and lemon juice. Mix until combined and serve with the salmon croquettes. Enjoy!
']

Name: cabbage-salad-mix
Ingredients: ['4 cups cabbage, thinly sliced', '1 jalapeno, thinly sliced', '2 mini sweet peppers, thinly sliced', '10 cilantro leaves', '2 Tbsp. masago (optional)']
Procedure:
['
Cut cabbage into quarters, then slice thinly.
', '
Trim both ends of the jalapeño, cut in half lengthwise, and remove seeds. Then thinly slice across, forming crescent-shaped strips.
', '
Prepare the sweet peppers the same way as the jalapeño.
', '
In a bowl, toss together cabbage, jalapeño, sweet peppers, salt, sugar, and mix well.
', '
Add apple cider vinegar and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo, mix well.

Garnish with cilantro leaves and masago (optional). 
Note: Grilled shrimp also goes well as a garnish for this salad.
']

Name: turkey-burger-sliders
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground turkey', '⅓ cup panko breadcrumbs', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 slices sharp cheddar cheese', '6 slider buns', '2 tomatoes, thinly sliced', '1 avocado, sliced for topping', 'Pickles, for garnish or on the side']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. garlic powder']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, mix the ground turkey, salt, pepper, garlic powder and bread crumbs. Then form into small golf ball-sized bites. You should be able to make at least 6.
', '
Heat a skillet with olive oil over medium/high heat. Place the burger balls down in the pan and give them a gentle press to flatten them a little. Cook for 3-4 minutes per side until both sides are brown. Flip again and then cover the pan with a lid and cook for another 3 minutes until they are cooked through.
', '
Place some cheese onto the burgers and then cover again, letting the cheese melt, then transfer to a plate.
', '
Build the sliders by placing some Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo on to the bun, followed by turkey patties. Top with a slice of tomato and avocado. Add pickles for garnish or place on the side.
']

Name: two-days-chicken-nuggets-recipe
Ingredients: ['---Breadcrumbs---', '4-5 slices stale bread', 'herbs or seasonings of your choice, optional', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. onion powder', 'salt and pepper to taste', '---Frying---', 'Vegetable oil for frying']
Marinade: ['---Brining Chicken---', '2 cups buttermilk', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'salt and pepper to taste', '1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces']
Procedure:
['
Day 1
Brining the Chicken: In a bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, salt, and pepper until well combined.
', '
Place the chicken pieces in a resealable plastic bag or a shallow dish. Pour the buttermilk-sriracha mixture over the chicken, ensuring all pieces are fully submerged. Seal the bag or cover the dish and refrigerate for 24 hours to allow the chicken to brine and absorb the flavors.
', '
Breadcrumbs: Tear 4-5 slices of stale bread into pieces and place them in a food processor. Pulse until you get coarse breadcrumbs. You can add herbs or seasonings if desired. Spread the breadcrumbs on a baking sheet and let them air dry for a few hours or overnight so you’re ready to make this homemade sriracha chicken nugget recipe the next day.
', '
Day 2
Prepare the Breading Station: In a shallow dish, combine the homemade breadcrumbs with garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
', '
Bread the Chicken: Remove the chicken from the buttermilk-sriracha brine and let any excess drip off. Coat each piece of chicken in the seasoned breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere the crumbs. Place the breaded chicken nuggets on a plate or baking sheet.
', '
Chill the Nuggets: Once all the chicken pieces are breaded, place them in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the coating to set.

Fry the Nuggets: In a large skillet or pot, heat enough vegetable oil to submerge the chicken nuggets. Heat the oil to 350°F. Carefully add the chilled nuggets to the hot oil, frying them in batches if necessary. Fry the nuggets for about 5-7 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are golden brown and cooked through. Once cooked, remove the chicken nuggets from the oil and place them on a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.

Serve these homemade sriracha chicken nuggets hot with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: buffalo-chicken-hashbrowns-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 frozen hash brown patties', '1 ½  cup shredded rotisserie chicken', '4-8 slices mozzarella cheese', '1 jalapeño, thinly sliced', '½ cup ranch dressing', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'green onion, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼  cup buffalo sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the air fryer to 400F° and cook the hashbrown patties for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
', '
Meanwhile, in a bowl, mix the shredded rotisserie chicken with Buffalo sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
', '
Top the cooked hashbrowns with Buffalo chicken, mozzarella cheese, and jalapeños.
', '
Air fry at 400F° for 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
', '
In another small bowl, mix Ranch dressing and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Drizzle the sauce over the hot Buffalo chicken hashbrown potatoes and garnish with green onion. Enjoy!
']

Name: jerk-chicken-tacos-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb chicken breast or thighs, cut into strips', '8 small corn or flour tortillas', '1 cup shredded lettuce', '1 cup diced tomatoes', '1/2 cup diced red onion', '1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro', 'sliced avocado, optional', 'sour cream, optional', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, optional ', 'lime wedges ,for serving']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. jerk Seasoning ', 'juice of 1 lime']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the Chicken: In a large bowl, combine olive oil, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Cooking Soy Sauce, Jerk seasoning, and lime juice. Mix well. Add the chicken strips to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade. Cover and let marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes (or up to 2 hours for more flavor).
', '
Cook Chicken: Heat a large skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat. Add the marinated chicken strips to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until the chicken is fully cooked and has a nice char. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Prepare the Tacos: Warm the tortillas for this recipe in a dry skillet or microwave until soft and pliable. Assemble the tacos by placing a few strips of jerk chicken on each tortilla. Top with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, diced red onion, and chopped cilantro.
', '
Add any optional toppings like sliced avocado, sour cream, or\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce if desired. Serve with lime wedges and enjoy!
']

Name: pulled-pork-waffle-bites
Ingredients: ['1 4 lb pork shoulder ', '1 cup cornmeal', '1 cup All-Purpose Flour', '¼ cup sugar', '4 tsp. baking powder', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 cup cheddar cheese, shredded', '2 Large eggs', '1 cup milk', '¼ cup canola oil', '3 cups coleslaw mix', 'Butter or oil for greasing the waffle iron']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup BBQ Sauce', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Place pork roast in a 3 to 4-quart slow cooker. Cook on High for 4 to 5 hours, or on Low for 8 to 10 hours. Remove roast from cooker and discard juices. Use tongs or two forks to shred and pull apart the pork then gently stir in the BBQ sauce and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce.
', '
In a large bowl combine the cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Stir in the cheddar cheese. In a smaller bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and canola oil. Make a well in the dry ingredients and add the wet ingredients. Stir gently until just combined. Do not overmix to ensure the best sriracha pulled pork waffles.
', '
Cook the waffles in a hot, greased waffle iron until golden brown and crispy around the edges. Cut waffles into quarters.
', '
In a large bowl, toss together the coleslaw mix, coleslaw dressing, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
', '
Top each waffle quarter with a heaping pile of pulled pork, then top with coleslaw. Drizzle these pulled pork waffle bites with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and enjoy!
']

Name: sheet-pan-shrimp-boil
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baby potatoes, halved', '3 ears of corn, cut in half', '1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 (12.8 oz.) package andouille sausage, sliced', 'chopped parsley, for garnish', 'lemon wedges, for serving']
Marinade: ['¼ cup unsalted butter, melted', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Old Bay Seasoning']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Spray a baking sheet with cooking spray.
', '
Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add in the potatoes and cook until they are partially cooked through (about 5-8 minutes). Remove the potatoes from the pot. Add the corn to the pot of water and cook for 5 minutes. Remove the corn from the pot.
', '
In a bowl, combine the melted butter, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Old Bay Seasoning.
', '
Add the potatoes, corn, shrimp, and sausage to the baking sheet. Pour the butter mixture over top. Toss to combine the ingredients and sauce.
', '
Bake for 12-15 minutes until the shrimp are cooked through. Remove the baking sheet from the oven. Garnish the sheet pan shrimp boil with chopped parsley and serve with lemon wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: volcano-steamed-egg
Ingredients: ['4 eggs', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '5 Tbsp. water ', 'green onions, chopped, for garnish', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. light fish sauce', '1 tsp. mirin', '½ tsp. sugar', '¼ tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'pinch of Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Whisk the eggs with light fish sauce, mirin, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, sugar, and salt. Add in the water and mix well.
', '
Heat a small pot that holds about 2 cups of liquid, over medium heat. A Korean earthenware pot (called a ttukbaegi) works perfectly for this. Pour the mixture in and continue stirring with a spoon or spatula, scraping the bottom and sides.
', '
For this volcano egg recipe, when the eggs are about 75% cooked, you should see large curdles forming. Reduce the heat to low heat. Cover the pot with a domed lid or a heat-safe bowl to steam the eggs. Steam for 2 to 3 minutes or until you see steam escaping from the lid.
', '
Uncover the volcano eggs and garnish with Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, green onions, and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: crab-rangoon-cup
Ingredients: ['12 wonton wrappers', '4 oz. imitation crab, chopped', 'thinly sliced green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['12 oz. cream cheese, softened', '1/4 cup sour cream', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 stalks green onions, thinly sliced (divided)', '1/4 tsp. Worcestershire sauce', '1/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a muffin pan with cooking spray.
', '
Place one wonton wrapper in each muffin cup; bake for 10 minutes or until the edges begin to brown. Remove from the oven and cool slightly.
', '
In a medium mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sour cream, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, half of the sliced green onion, Worcestershire sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Cooking Soy Sauce. Stir well.
', '
Stir the chopped crab into the cream cheese mixture.
', '
Spoon filling into baked wonton shells; bake for an additional 8-12 minutes. For our recipe, we top each crab rangoon cup with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Sauce and remaining sliced green onions. Serve with additional Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: leftover-turkey-enchiladas
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. olive oil', '1 green pepper, diced', '½ onion, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 cups leftover turkey, diced', '15 oz. enchilada sauce, divided', '8 tortillas, 6" each, corn or flour', '2 cups Monterey jack cheese shredded, divided', 'cilantro, chopped for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste ', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly grease a 9x13 pan.
', '
Heat oil in a small pan. Cook onion and peppers over medium heat until tender. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and cook for 1 minute more. Toss with the turkey and season with salt & pepper to taste.
', '
Place ½ cup enchilada sauce in the bottom of the prepared pan. Spread 1 tablespoon on each tortilla. Top each with ¼ cup of the turkey mixture and 2 tablespoons of cheese. Roll up and place in the pan.
', '
Pour the remaining enchilada sauce over top and sprinkle with the remaining cheese. Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes. Remove foil and bake uncovered for 5-10 minutes or until the cheese is browned and bubbly.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and garnish with cilantro. Enjoy your leftover turkey enchiladas!
']

Name: crispy-chicken-taquitos
Ingredients: ['1 quart neutral oil, for frying', '2 skinless, boneless chicken breast - cooked and shredded', '1 ½ cups shredded cheddar and Jack cheese blend', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 (7 oz.) can green salsa', '1 cup chopped onion', '20 (6 inch) corn tortillas', '1 cup sour cream ', '1 cup chunky salsa ', '1 cup guacamole ', 'cilantro, chopped for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in a deep pot to 350˚F.
', '
In a medium bowl, mix together the shredded chicken, cheese, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, green salsa, and onion.
', '
To soften the tortillas, wrap about 10 tortillas at a time in a kitchen cloth or moist paper towel and place in the microwave for about 1 minute. This step of the taquito recipe makes the tortillas easy to roll. Repeat with remaining tortillas when ready to fill.
', "
Spoon about 1 1/2 tablespoons of the mixture onto the tortillas, or enough so that when rolled up, each one is about 1 inch wide. Avoid overfilling or placing filling too close to the end of the tortillas so the filling doesn't spill out. Secure rolls with toothpicks.
", '
Fry rolls 4 or 5 at a time so there is enough room between them for even cooking. Cook for 3 to 5 minutes, or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels. Serve these crispy chicken taquitos with sour cream, salsa, and guacamole for dipping. Garnish with cilantro. Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-chocolate-pudding
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups granulated sugar', '¾ cup unsweetened cocoa powder', '½ cup cornstarch', '1 tsp. instant coffee granules ', '5 cups milk, 2% or whole', '¼ cup butter', '1 ½ tsp. vanilla extract', 'sweetened whipped cream, for serving']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, oil only, for serving']
Procedure:
['
Set a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add the sugar, cocoa powder, cornstarch, salt, and coffee granules. Whisk to combine, then pour in the milk and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Whisk well until smooth.
', '
Bring the mixture to a simmer. Once the mixture starts to form small bubbles, stir constantly for 1-2 minutes, as the pudding thickens. The chili chocolate pudding will slightly thicken but will continue to thicken as it cools. Remove from heat and stir in the butter and vanilla immediately for better incorporation. Stir until the butter is fully melted and combined.
', '
Transfer the pudding into a storage container and place a piece of plastic wrap over the surface of the pudding, so a skin doesn’t form as it cools. Place in the fridge to chill for 2 hours.
', '
Once the pudding is fully chilled, you can remove the plastic wrap and transfer it to serving dishes. Top with sweetened whipped cream and a drizzle of just the oil from the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy this spicy chili chocolate pudding chilled.
']

Name: kale-and-cheddar-cheese-savory-galette-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 small onion, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 cups fresh kale, stems removed and chopped', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese', '1/2 cup ricotta cheese', '1 pre-made pie dough (store-bought or homemade)', '1 egg, beaten (for egg wash)']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp.  honey ', '1 tsp. rice vinegar ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 375° Fahrenheit. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for another 1 minute. Add the chopped kale to the skillet and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Remove from heat and let the mixture cool slightly. In a bowl, mix the cooled kale mixture with shredded cheddar cheese and ricotta cheese.
', '
Roll out the pie dough on a floured surface into a rough circle, about 12 inches in diameter. Transfer the dough to a parchment-lined baking sheet. Spoon the kale and cheese mixture into the center of the dough, leaving a 2-inch border around the edges.\xa0
', '
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling, pleating as you go to create a rustic border. The center will remain open.Brush the folded edges of the dough with the beaten egg for a golden finish. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, honey, and rice vinegar.\xa0
', '
Let the galette cool slightly before slicing. Drizzle the Sriracha Chili Sauce over the top or serve on the side for dipping. Slice and Enjoy!
']

Name: apple-cider-glazed-chicken-thighs-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', 'chopped green onions, for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup apple cider', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Pat chicken thighs dry and season with salt and pepper on both sides. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken thighs to the skillet, skin side down, and sear for 5-7 minutes, until the skin is golden brown and crispy. Flip the chicken and sear the other side for 3-4 minutes. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
', '
In the same skillet, reduce the heat to medium. Add the apple cider, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, apple cider vinegar, and honey. Stir well to combine and bring the mixture to a simmer.
', '
Return the seared chicken thighs to the skillet, skin side up. Spoon the glaze over the chicken to coat. Cover and cook for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the glaze has thickened. Occasionally spoon the glaze over the chicken to keep it coated and flavorful.
', '
For extra crispy skin, preheat your oven broiler. Transfer the skillet to the oven and broil for 2-3 minutes, or until the skin is crispy and caramelized. Keep a close eye to prevent burning.
', '
Transfer the glazed chicken thighs to a serving plate. Drizzle any remaining glaze from the skillet over the chicken. Garnish with chopped green onions or sesame seeds if desired and serve with rice or mashed potatoes.
']

Name: mini-broccoli-cheddar-pockets-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp.  extra virgin olive oil', '1 small yellow onion, diced', '3 cups roughly chopped broccoli florets', '1 cup cremini mushrooms, chopped ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. fresh thyme leaves', '1/4 tsp. freshly grated nutmeg', '1-2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 oz. cream cheese, at room temperature', '1 1/2 cups shredded sharp cheddar cheese', '1/2 cup shredded Mozzarella cheese', '1 box frozen puff pastry, thawed', '1 egg, beaten', 'Black and white sesame seeds, for sprinkling ']
Seasoning: ['Kosher salt and black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 375° Fahrenheit and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.\xa0
', '
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and cook for 5 minutes, until softened. Add in the broccoli and mushrooms. Season with salt and pepper and continue cooking another 5-10 minutes or until the broccoli begins to brown. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, thyme, nutmeg, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and cook for another minute. Remove from the heat.
', '
Stir in the cream cheese, 1 cup cheddar, and Mozzarella cheese.
', '
Lay the pastry sheets flat on a clean, floured surface. Gently roll the sheets out and cut each sheet into 9 squares. Evenly divide the broccoli filling among half of the squares, leaving a 1/4 inch border around the edges. Brush the edges with egg. Lay the remaining 9 squares over the filling and seal the edges by crimping with the back of a fork.\xa0
', '
Place the squares on the prepared baking sheet and brush the tops with beaten egg. Make 2 small slits on the top of the pastries. Sprinkle with the remaining 1/2 cup cheddar cheese and the sesame seeds. Transfer to the oven and bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
