Name: baked-spicy-mac-and-cheese-recipe-with-croutons
Ingredients: ['---Croutons---', '1 tablespoon unsalted butter', '4 slices white bread cut into ½-inch squares', 'Kosher salt, to taste', 'chopped parsley, for garnish', '---Mac and Cheese---', '¼ cup butter', '¼ cup all-purpose flour', '2 cups milk', '3 cups shredded Cheddar cheese, divided ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 cups elbow pasta, cooked until almost al dente']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350° Fahrenheit.
', '
In a skillet over medium high heat, melt the butter. Toast the bread cubes in the butter until golden – about 5-6 minutes. Remove to a paper lined plate, season with a bit of salt, and set aside.
', "
Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add flour, salt, and pepper and stir until smooth, about 5 minutes. Pour in milk slowly, while stirring continuously. Continue to cook and stir until mixture is smooth and bubbling, about 5 minutes, making sure the milk doesn't burn. Add 2 cups cheddar cheese and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Stir until melted, 2 to 4 minutes. Fold the macaroni into the cheese sauce until coated.
", '
Pour the macaroni and cheese mixture into the baking dish and top with the remaining cheese. Bake the macaroni and cheese, uncovered, for about 20 minutes until the cheese is just about set and the top is beginning to brown.
', '
Remove from the oven, sprinkle on the croutons and return back to the oven for another 10 minutes or so until everything is golden brown. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chili Crisp Oil, garnish with parsley and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: roasted-turkey-breast-with-miso-butter-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 skin on turkey breasts', '1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 sprig fresh rosemary, minced', '4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, softened ', '1 large lime, zested', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. white miso paste', '1 medium red onion, cut into wedges', '3 Tbsp. olive oil, plus more as needed']
Sauce Mix: ['1 small red onion, thinly sliced', '1 lb. cremini or mixed mushrooms, sliced', '1/4 cup olive oil', '3/4 tsp. kosher salt, divided', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 Tbsp. white miso paste', '1/2 cup all-purpose flour', '1 32 oz. box low-sodium vegetable broth', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Season the turkey all over with 1 tablespoon plus 1 teaspoon kosher salt. Use your finger to gently loosen the skin on the breast, then rub the rosemary onto the breast meat. Cover the turkey loosely with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 24 hours or up to 3 days. One hour before roasting, let the turkey breast sit at room temperature.\xa0 Arrange a rack in the middle of the oven and heat the oven to 450ºF. Combine the butter, lime zest and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic in a small bowl. Add white miso paste and smash and stir with a fork to combine.
', '
Arrange the red onions on the baking sheet around the turkey breast. Drizzle 3 tablespoons of olive oil over the turkey and onion then rub the oil over the turkey to evenly coat. Take a small spoonful of the miso butter, lift up the skin over one breast half, and tuck it under the skin. Repeat with the remaining breast half. Rub the remaining compound butter all over the skin covering the breast in an even layer with no clumps.\xa0
', '
Roast the turkey until the skin starts to darken and bubble, 25 to 30 minutes. If it looks like it’s burning or smoking, reduce the heat by 25 or 50 degrees. Spoon any juices on the baking sheet over the turkey and stir the onions. Rotate the baking sheet. Continue to roast until the skin is darkened and an instant-read thermometer inserted registers at least 165°F, 55 to 65 minutes more. Let the turkey rest for at least 10 minutes before carving.
', '
Towards the end of your turkey cooking time, heat 1/4 cup olive oil in a large (about 12-inch) skillet over medium heat until shimmering. Add the onion, season with 1/4 teaspoon of the kosher salt, and cook, stirring occasionally, until starting to soften, about 4 minutes. Add the mushrooms, season with the remaining 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt, and cook, stirring every few minutes, until they have shrunken down and are silky and most of the liquid has evaporated, 10 to 12 minutes.
', '
In a medium saucepan, add 2 tablespoons butter and 1 tablespoon white miso paste and stir until melted. While stirring constantly with a wooden spoon and scraping up anything on the bottom of the pan, sprinkle in 1/2 cup all-purpose flour in about a tablespoon at a time. Continue stirring for 1 minute. While stirring constantly, pour in 1 (32-ounce) box vegetable broth a little at a time, and stir until the flour is dissolved. Bring to a simmer. Continue to simmer, stirring often, until thickened but still pourable, about 8 minutes more. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and stir to combine. Remove from the heat. Taste and season with kosher salt and black pepper as needed.
', '
Serve the gravy hot with the roasted turkey and onions, and enjoy!
']

Name: ground-turkey-stuffed-pumpkins-with-sage-brown-butter-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 small sugar pumpkins, about 2 pounds each', '5 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil, divided', 'Salt and pepper to taste', '1 cup diced carrots', '1 cup diced yellow onion', '½ cup diced celery', '1 pound ground turkey', '3½ cups ½” cubes of stale French baguette', '1½ cups chicken stock', '1½ cups shredded Gruyère cheese, divided']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh sage', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400º Fahrenheit. Turn each pumpkin on its side, and use a sharp knife to slice the top, including the stem, off the pumpkin, about 1-inch down. Use a spoon to remove the seeds and discard or reserve for another use. Rub the inside of the pumpkins with 2 tablespoons of the olive oil. Season with salt and pepper then arrange the pumpkins and cut off tops on a baking sheet. Roast until the meat is soft, about 35 minutes. Set aside.
', '
Heat a large sauté pan over medium-low heat, add the remaining oil and heat through. Add the carrots, onion and celery and sauté until tender, about 5 minutes. Add the ground turkey to the pan and sauté, stirring occasionally and using a wooden spoon to break up any large pieces, until the meat is browned, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper then remove the turkey mixture to a large mixing bowl and toss with the bread cubes.
', '
Lower the oven to 350º Fahrenheit. Return the pan to medium-low heat, add the butter and allow to melt. Add the sage, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce to the pan and cook until the butter is nutty and fragrant, about 4 minutes.
', '
Add the spicy sage butter to the turkey mixture. Pour the chicken stock over top, tossing to combine until all the bread is moistened then add 1 cup of the Gruyère cheese and toss to combine.
', '
Fill the roasted pumpkins with the stuffing mixture until packed and almost overflowing. Top each with the remaining Gruyère cheese. Bake until the cheese has melted and begins to bubble, about 15 minutes. Remove and serve immediately with the pumpkin tops propped against the side.
']

Name: baked-korean-style-cauliflower-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 large head of cauliflower, cut into florets', '1/4 tsp. sesame seeds (for garnish)', '2 green onions, chopped (for garnish)']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 425°Fahrenheit.
', '
In a large bowl, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, olive oil, and honey.
', '
Add the cauliflower florets to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the sauce mixture.
', '
Spread the coated cauliflower florets in a single layer on a baking sheet. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cauliflower is tender and lightly caramelized, stirring halfway through.
', '
Remove the cauliflower from the oven and sprinkle with sesame seeds and chopped green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: easy-vegetarian-dumplings-recipe
Ingredients: ['---Filling---', '5 tsp. vegetable oil', '2 cups shredded carrots', '2 cups shredded napa cabbage', '8 oz. mushrooms, thinly sliced', '4 stalks green onions, thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '34 dumpling wrappers', 'Water as needed', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', 'chopped cilantro, for garnish ', 'sesame seeds, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', 'Kosher salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat vegetable oil in a large saute pan over medium heat. Add carrots, cabbage, and mushroom along with a large pinch of salt and pepper. Cook, stirring frequently, for 6-8 minutes or until the liquid from the veggies has been released and begins to evaporate.\xa0
', '
Add remaining filling ingredients and cook for an additional minute. Then transfer the filling to a bowl and pop it in the fridge for about 10 minutes to cool completely.\xa0
', '
To assemble dumplings, wet the entire edge of the wrapper with water and add about a tablespoon of filling into the center of the wrapper. Fold the wrapper in half, creating a half-moon shape. Gently pat the bottom of the dumpling on the countertop to make sure it stands by itself. Continue with remaining filling until all 34 dumplings are complete.
', '
Heat oil in a large saute pan over medium heat. Saute dumplings in a batch of 7-8 depending on how large your pan is. Cook dumplings for 2 minutes or until a golden-brown crust forms on the bottom of the dumplings. Pour in ¼ cup of water, cover pan, and let the dumplings steam for 2-4 minutes or until the water has evaporated.
', '
Remove the lid and allow the dumplings to get crisp on the bottom again. Garnish with cilantro and sesame seeds. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo  for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: pork-and-cabbage-dumplings-holiday-recipe
Ingredients: ['---Filling---', '1 ¾ pounds ground pork', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. thinly sliced green onion', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 egg, beaten', '2.5 cups finely shredded napa cabbage', '100 (3.5 inch square) wonton wrappers', 'Water', 'Green onions, sliced, for garnish ']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the filling ingredients. Stir until well mixed.
', '
Place 1 heaping teaspoon of pork filling onto each wonton skin. Moisten edges with water and fold edges over to form a half moon shape. Roll edges slightly to seal in filling. Press together corners. Set dumplings aside on a lightly floured surface until ready to cook.
', "
Arrange dumplings in a covered bamboo or metal steamer so they don't touch to prevent them from sticking together; steam for 15 minutes, or until pork is cooked through.
", '
Garnish with green onions and serve with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil for drizzling and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: hasselback-butternut-squash-recipe-with-hoisin-glaze
Ingredients: ['1 butternut squash', 'olive oil for brushing', '6 leaves fresh sage', '4 oz halved pecans', '2 oz arugula', '4 oz creamy goat cheese, crumbled', 'flaky sea salt for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt for seasoning, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 large shallot, thinly sliced', '3 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. white wine vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425° Fahrenheit. Peel the butternut squash until you reach the pure yellow-orange layer (there should be no white remaining). Cut the squash in half lengthwise. Scoop out the seeds/stringy flesh. Place the squash onto a sheet pan and drizzle generously with olive oil. Rub to coat evenly. Season with salt and freshly cracked black pepper. Roast the squash, halved-side down, for 20 minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, heat a 2qt saucepan over medium heat. Add about 2 teaspoons of olive oil. Place the sage leaves in the hot oil and fry until crisp, just a minute or so. Transfer the sage to a plate. Add the sliced shallot to the oil. Saute for a few minutes until caramelized. Season with a pinch of salt.
', '
Stir in 3 tablespoons of honey, 2 tablespoons of white wine vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, the dijon, and water. Bring the mixture to a simmer. Lower the heat and cook for about 5 minutes until syrupy. Transfer the shallots to a mixing bowl. Reserve the honey glaze.
', '
Remove the squash from the oven. Use a sharp knife to score the outside of the squash in small increments. Cut each slice about ¾” of the way into the squash, without cutting all the way through. Brush the honey glaze over the squash. Continue to roast for about 30 more minutes, or until tender. Add 1 tablespoon of honey and the remaining 1 tablespoon of white wine vinegar to the shallots. Whisk to combine. Slowly whisk in the vegetable oil. Season with a pinch of salt to taste.
', '
Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add enough olive oil to coat the bottom. Add the pecans. Toast for a couple of minutes until golden and fragrant. Stir in the remaining 3 tablespoons of honey and a pinch of salt. Simmer for about 3 minutes until reduced.
', '
Toss the arugula with half of the shallot vinaigrette and arrange it onto a platter. Use a metal spatula to carefully transfer the butternut squash from the sheet pan to the platter. Top with the maple pecans, goat cheese, and fried sage. Drizzle the remaining vinaigrette over the squash. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt and enjoy!
']

Name: tuna-poke-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['1 lb. tuna (sashimi grade)', '1 oz. onion, julienned', '4 oz. avocado, diced', '1 tsp. mixed black and white sesame seeds, toasted']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
Dice tuna into half-inch cubes and set aside.
', '
Mix ingredients for Seasoning Sauce well.
', '
In a bowl, combine tuna, onion, and avocado with sauce and stir well.
', '
Garnish with sesame seeds. Serve and enjoy.
']

Name: korean-style-cheese-corn
Ingredients: ['3 cups sweet corn kernels', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '8 oz. whole milk mozzarella, shredded and divided', '2 green onions, thinly sliced, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 ½ tsp. sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste', 'kosher salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly oil an ovenproof skillet or coat with nonstick spray.
', '
In a large bowl, combine corn, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs),\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce, sugar,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Garlic Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic, pepper, salt and about half of the cheese.
', '
Spread corn mixture into the prepared skillet; sprinkle with remaining mozzarella.
', '
Place into oven and bake until bubbly, about 15 minutes. Then broil for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown.
', '
Serve immediately, garnished with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: poke-meal-prep
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sushi-grade tuna, cubed', '1 avocado', '2 cups brown rice, cooked ', 'spinach, to taste', 'shelled edamame, to taste ', 'sliced green onions, to taste ', '½ large mango, cubed', 'pickled ginger, to taste']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. maple syrup', '1 tsp. sesame seeds', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Whisk together the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Dipping Soy Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee\xa0Pure Sesame Oil, maple syrup, sesame seeds,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Mayo, and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce in a medium mixing bowl.
', '
Add the cubed tuna, and gently stir together to dress the tuna. Marinade for at least 10 minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, pit and cube the avocado of a similar size to the tuna. Add to the tuna, and gently mix together.
', '
Take your meal-prep trays and divide brown rice, spinach, edamame, and green onions, and top with tuna poke, diced mango, and a sprinkle of extra sesame seeds. Place a little pile of pickled ginger in one corner. Enjoy!
']

Name: korean-style-rice-cake-skewer
Ingredients: ['32 pieces Korean rice cakes (garaetteok)', 'cooking oil ', '1-2 Tbsp. crushed peanuts, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 1/2 Tbsp. ketchup', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. dark brown sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Blanch the rice cakes in hot boiling water for about 30 seconds to soften them. Drain and run under cold tap water then pat the rice cakes dry. (If rice cakes are fresh, skip this step.)
', '
In a small saucepan, add all sauce mix ingredients and cook for 20-30 seconds to dissolve the sugar and honey, stirring constantly until thickened.
', '
Place the rice cakes on skewers.
', '
Heat a large pan over medium-high heat and add some cooking oil.  Add skewers and cook both sides of the rice cakes for about 1 minute each. Remove and brush the sauce on both sides of the rice cakes.
', '
Garnish with crushed nuts and serve warm or cooled to room temperature. Enjoy!
']

Name: biang-biang-noodles
Ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '½ cup water', '¼ tsp. salt', 'cooking oil, for coating the dough', '1 Tbsp. scallions, finely chopped', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce or to taste', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '¼ tsp. ground Sichuan pepper', '3 Tbsp. oil from Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the biang biang noodle dough: Mix flour, water, and salt in a stand mixer fitted with a dough hook on low speed. Run the machine until ingredients are well combined and the dough is very smooth. Form the dough into a ball and wrap it in lightly oiled plastic wrap. Let it rest at room temperature for at least 2 hours, and up to 24 hours. When you’re ready to pull the noodles, lightly oil the dough and divide it into halves. Cover one portion with plastic wrap while you work with the other one.
', '
Lightly oil your work surface and a tray. Place the dough on the work surface and roll it into a rectangle about ¼ inch thick. Use a knife to cut it into 1-inch-wide strips. Cover the strips with plastic wrap. 
', '
Working with one dough strip at a time, use the heel of your hand to flatten it into a very wide, long strip, then take hold of both ends of the strip and bang it against the oiled work surface, pulling your hands apart slowly so that you’re stretching the dough. As long as your dough has rested enough and you slowly stretch out your hands, the dough will comply.
', '
Pull until the noodle is 20 to 24 inches long and about ⅛ inch thick. Lay the noodle on your prepared tray (you may need to snake the noodle to fit) and cover with plastic wrap so it doesn’t dry out. Repeat with the remaining dough until it is used up. Bring a pot of water to a boil. Cook four noodles at a time, about 1 minute, then place in a serving bowl.
', '
Make the biang biang noodle sauce: Place scallions, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee  Chili Crisp Oil,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Sriracha Chili Sauce,\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Chili Garlic Sauce, and Sichuan pepper on top of the noodles. Heat up the oil from the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. When it starts to smoke, pour it over the scallion and garlic mixture. Add\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0 Dipping Soy Sauce and\xa0Lee Kum Kee\xa0Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar. Stir to coat the noodles evenly. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: cajun-sausage-puffs-recipe-with-spicy-mustard
Ingredients: ['1 sheet puff pastry (thawed if frozen)', '8 oz. Cajun sausage (like andouille or smoked sausage), sliced into thin rounds', '1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese', '1 egg (beaten, for egg wash)', '1 tsp paprika', '1/2 tsp garlic powder', '1/2 tsp dried oregano']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 400°F.\xa0
', '
Roll out the puff pastry sheet on a lightly floured surface. Cut it into small squares, about 2 inches each. Place a slice of Cajun sausage and a sprinkle of shredded cheddar cheese in the center of each puff pastry square. Fold the corners of each pastry square over the filling to form a puff shape, or you can fold them into triangles or rectangles.
', '
Place the prepared puffs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Brush the tops with the beaten egg to help them brown. Sprinkle them with paprika, garlic powder, and dried oregano.
', '
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the puff pastry is golden brown and puffed.
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the Whole Grain Dijon mustard, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and honey (if using). Serve the warm Cajun sausage puffs with the spicy mustard dipping sauce and Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-oil-caramelized-onion-pasta-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 large onion, thinly sliced', '½ lb spaghetti (or pasta of choice)', '1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup of heavy cream', '½ cup of parmesan cheese, grated', '¼ cup of parsley, finely chopped ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat a large high-sided pan over medium heat. Add the olive oil and butter in a pan. Once butter is melted, add the thinly sliced onions and cook over medium-low heat for 30 minutes. Stir often until caramelized. Set aside.
', '
Cook the pasta until al dente and reserve 1 cup of pasta water.
', '
In the same pan, add the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and shrimp. Saute until the shrimp is mostly cooked (2-3 minutes). Add in heavy cream followed by the caramelized onions; stir to combine.
', '
Add in the pasta, parmesan cheese and ½ cup of pasta water (adjust the consistency of the sauce to your liking). Stir to combine. Serve with more parmesan cheese, chopped parsley and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-polenta-bites-recipe-with-spicy-brussels-sprouts
Ingredients: ['1 package pre-cooked polenta', '1 tsp kosher salt ', '¼ tsp ground black pepper', '¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese', 'Olive oil spray', '2 cups brussels sprouts, quartered']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400º F.
', '
Toss brussels sprouts with olive oil and a pinch of salt and pepper. Bake in the oven until browned and easily pierced with a fork.\xa0 Cut polenta in half, then into ½-inch thick triangular wedges. Place on a baking sheet.
', '
Spray the polenta wedges with olive oil spray on both sides, then season with salt and pepper.
', '
Sprinkle each polenta wedge with a generous layer of Parmesan cheese and bake for 15-18 minutes, until cheese is melted and polenta is golden brown.
', '
Build the bites: squeeze Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce onto a polenta bite, then top with a brussel sprout and pierce together with a toothpick. Garnish with freshly grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
']

Name: beef-bourguignon-pie-recipe
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ cup plus 1 tablespoon all-purpose flour, plus more for dusting', '1½ lbs boneless beef chuck, cut into 2-inch pieces', '3 slices bacon cut into ¼-inch pieces', '1 medium onion, finely chopped', '1 medium leek, white and pale-green parts only, halved lengthwise, thinly sliced', '1 medium carrot, peeled, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup finely chopped fresh parsley', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. brandy or bourbon', '4 sprigs thyme, leaves stripped, plus more for garnish', '1 bay leaf', '1 whole star anise pod', '2 cups low-sodium chicken broth', '1 cup red wine', '5 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, divided', '8 oz. cremini mushrooms, stems removed', '8 oz. pearl onions, peeled', '1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice', '2 14 oz. packages frozen puff pastry, thawed', '1 large egg, beaten to blend']
Seasoning: ['Kosher salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Place a rack in the lower third of the oven; preheat to 400°F. Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat. Season ½ cup flour with salt and pepper. Add beef and toss to coat; shake off excess flour. Working in batches as needed to avoid steaming meat, cook beef, turning often, until browned all over, 8–10 minutes per batch. Transfer to a plate.
', '
Cook bacon in the same pot, stirring often, until brown and crisp. Add ¼ cup water and cook, scraping up browned bits, then add onion, leek, and carrot and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are starting to soften, about 5 minutes. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and parsley and return beef to pot. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and brandy and simmer until liquid has almost completely evaporated, about 1 minute. Add thyme leaves, bay leaf, star anise, broth, and wine and season with salt and pepper; bring to a simmer. Mix 1 Tbsp. flour and 1 Tbsp. butter in a small bowl until smooth; stir into meat mixture. Cover pot and braise in the oven until beef is very tender, 1–1½ hours.
', '
Melt remaining 4 Tbsp. butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms and pearl onions and cook, stirring, until browned, 8–10 minutes. Stir in lemon juice; season with salt and pepper. Add mushrooms and onions to stew, cover pot, and return to the oven. Cook until onions are very tender, 25–30 minutes. Let stew cool.
', '
Meanwhile, working with one at a time, roll out pastry sheets on a lightly floured surface until about 4” larger than a baking dish (use a 2-qt. oval or an 8” square). Place 1 sheet on a parchment-lined baking sheet and chill. Transfer remaining sheet to baking dish. Lift up the edge and let dough slump down into the dish. Trim, leaving about 1” overhang. Transfer stew to a baking dish. Brush edge of pastry with egg.
', '
Using a cutter, punch out a circle in the center of the chilled pastry. Drape pastry over filling and trim to a 1” overhang. Press edges of dough together to seal and fold overhang under. Crimp the edge, then brush the top of the pastry with egg. Bake until the crust is deep golden brown, 30–35 minutes. Let the pie cool slightly, garnish with thyme and serve!\xa0
']

Name: crispy-parmesan-potato-stacks-recipe-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['4 medium Russet potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. dried thyme', '1 tsp. dried rosemary', '1/2 tsp. paprika', '1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese', '1/4 cup all-purpose flour', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat your oven to 400°F.\xa0
', '
Slice the potatoes into thin rounds (about 1/8 inch thick). You can use a mandoline for even slices. In a large bowl, toss the potato slices with olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, dried thyme, dried rosemary, paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix the grated Parmesan cheese with the flour in a separate bowl.
', '
Take a stack of potato slices and press them into the Parmesan mixture to coat. Then arrange the slices vertically in a muffin tin or on a baking sheet. You can use a muffin tin to create individual stacks or a baking sheet for a more freeform approach.
', '
Bake in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes, or until the potato stacks are crispy and golden brown.
', '
Allow the potato stacks to cool slightly before serving. Garnish with chopped chives and\xa0 serve with the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread on the side.
']

Name: chicken-finger-dipping-sauce-recipe
Ingredients: ['¾ cup mayonnaise', '3 Tbsp. ketchup', '5 tsp. Worcestershire sauce', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '3/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '⅛ tsp. celery salt']
Procedure:
['
Add all ingredients, including Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to a medium bowl. Mix until combined and smooth.
', '
You can serve this straight away, but this sauce gets tastier if it sits in the fridge covered for 6-24 hours for all the flavors to marry. Enjoy with your favorite Chicken Tenders or whatever else you want to dip!
']

Name: pizza-skulls-recipe
Ingredients: ['16 oz. pre-made pizza dough', '¾  to 1 cup pizza sauce', '2 cups shredded mozzarella', '⅓ cup Parmesan cheese', 'chopped basil, for garnish', 'Desired pizza skull fillings, such as: ', '8 oz. cooked sausage', '6 oz. mini pepperoni', '4 oz. black olives, sliced', '6 oz. sliced ham, diced', '4 oz. sliced mushrooms']
Seasoning: ['6 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Spray the mini skull baking tin with cooking spray. Dust the counter lightly with flour to prevent the dough from sticking. Roll, pat, or stretch the dough out until it is roughly 1/4" thick. Cut the dough into 6 rectangles. Don’t worry if they aren’t perfectly shaped or exactly equal in size.
', '
Working with one piece of dough at a time, lay each dough piece into the skull cavity and start filling it with sauce, mozzarella, a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese and your desired toppings. After adding the toppings, add the 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil to each skull and a little bit of pizza sauce on top before sealing the dough (no more than a tablespoon).
', '
Fold the dough over the fillings, pinching the dough together to seal them (like a small pizza pocket). Continue until the 6 pieces have been filled and sealed.
', '
Refrigerate the skull pizza tray while you preheat the oven. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Remove the tray from the refrigerator and bake for 16 to 20 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Remove from the oven and allow it to cool for 5 minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, combine marinara sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Unmold skulls and serve with spicy marinara sauce and chopped basil.
']

Name: spicy-pumpkin-shaped-cheeseballs-recipe
Ingredients: ['16 oz. cream cheese, softened', '2 cups shredded cheddar cheese', '1/2 cup finely chopped roasted red peppers, drained and patted dry', '3 stalks green onion, finely chopped', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'crushed nacho cheese chips, paprika, and crushed blue corn tortilla chips for coating', '20 pretzel sticks for garnish', 'fresh flat-leaf parsley, for garnish', 'assorted crackers, for serving and garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Add the cream cheese, shredded cheddar cheese, roasted red peppers, green onions, garlic powder, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce to a medium bowl. Mix together with a wooden spoon until evenly combined. Add salt and pepper to taste, and cover and chill for about an hour.
', '
Add crushed nacho cheese chips, paprika, and crushed blue corn tortilla chips to separate plates, based on the amount of each color pumpkin you want to make. Use a tablespoon measuring scoop to get a portion of the cheese mixture. Roll into a ball and set on a plate. Continue until all of the cheese mixture is rolled into balls.
', '
Roll each of the balls in one of the prepared coatings and set aside.
', '
Use a wooden skewer to make marks up the side of each ball and across the top to achieve a pumpkin look. Place half of a pretzel stick into the top center of each mini cheese ball, then garnish with a small leaf of parsley.
', "
Refrigerate until you're ready to serve. Enjoy!\xa0
"]

Name: halloween-tuna-onigiri-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup sticky rice, cooked', '2 Tbsp. of sushi vinegar (plus 1 tbsp for shaping)', '5 oz. canned natural tuna', '1/8 cup of  cream cheese', '2 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1 Tbsp. chopped chives', '8 oz. water', '1 sheet of nori seaweed (for sushi)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook sticky rice according to package instructions. Once cooked, in a medium bowl, drizzle the rice with sushi vinegar; mix gently with a fork and let cool.
', '
Drain the tuna. In a bowl, mix the tuna, cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and chives.
', '
Prepare a container with 1 tablespoon of sushi vinegar and 8 oz of water. Take a good tablespoon of rice with your hands moistened in the water/vinegar mixture. Shape a pancake in the palm of your hand, then place a teaspoon of tuna stuffing in the center. Close the rice over the stuffing to wrap it and shape a triangular onigiri. Repeat the operation until the ingredients are used up.
', '
Cut out small triangles to form the eyes and the nose, strips for the mouth from the nori sheet. Place them on the onigiris, pressing gently.
', '
Serve and enjoy! Muahahahahahaha!
']

Name: shortcut-pho
Ingredients: ['1 lime, halved', '4 cups 50%-less-sodium beef broth', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '⅛ tsp. cinnamon', '⅛ tsp. coriander', 'dash ground cloves', '8 oz. rice noodles, cooked', '12 oz. beef sirloin steak, very thinly sliced', '½ cup chopped fresh cilantro', '½ cup bean sprouts', '1 bunch green onion, bias-sliced into 1-inch pieces']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Juice half the lime and cut the remaining half into wedges.
', '
In a medium pot, combine lime juice, broth, fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, cinnamon, coriander, and cloves. Bring to boiling; reduce heat. Simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
', '
Divide noodles among bowls. Top with thinly sliced beef and spoon broth over, quickly cooking beef.
', '
Top bowls with cilantro, bean sprouts, and green onions. Serve with lime wedges and drizzle with both Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce to your taste. Enjoy!
']

Name: spinach-artichoke-dip-stuffed-garlic-bread-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 12 in. baguette', '1/2 Tbsp. oil', '1 can (14 oz.) artichoke hearts, drained and chopped', '1 bag (10 oz.) baby spinach leaves', '1 package (8 oz.) cream cheese', '1 1/2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese', '3 stalks green onion, sliced', '3 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'Parmesan cheese, grated, for garnish', 'fresh basil leaves, torn, for garnish', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, drizzle for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Intro: Take garlic bread to the next level and stuff it with this easy Spinach Artichoke Dip recipe. You can easily transform a baguette into a craveable side dish by filling with spinach artichoke dip and dressing it in a garlic butter. An extra drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo gives it a spicy kick that will make this memorable next to pasta, chicken, or as an easy party food idea!
\xa0
\xa0
Cut the baguette into 4 pieces. Use a long knife to cut out the insides, leaving some bread along the edges. Pull out the loose bread to leave hollow bread quarters. Set aside.
', '
Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add in the artichoke pieces and cook for one minute. Reduce heat to medium, add in the spinach, and cook until wilted, turning often. Mix in the cream cheese and mozzarella, and let it melt entirely. Fold in the green onions and season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove from heat.\xa0
', '
Preheat the oven to 350 ˚F. Stuff the baguette quarters with the spinach and artichoke dip, using a spoon to help pack the dip.
', '
Once the bread is stuffed, transfer it to a cutting board. Line up the quarters so that they fit together as they did before the baguette was cut. Slice the baguette into slices that are approximately 1" thick. Tear a piece of heavy duty foil that is about 5-6 inches longer than the baguette. Slide the baguette slices off of the cutting board and onto the foil, keeping them together.
', '
In a small bowl, combine the butter and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Loosely cover the top and microwave for a minute, or until the butter is fully melted. Brush the garlic butter over the baguette, allowing some to drip down between the slices. Make sure to get all of the minced garlic on top of the bread.
', '
Wrap the foil around the bread and bake for 15 minutes. Unwrap the bread and bake for 5 minutes, or until the top browns slightly. Remove from the oven, top with parmesan cheese and torn basil then drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: pork-belly-and-pumpkin-risotto-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 oz. cooked pork belly, cut into chunks', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 shallot, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup Arborio rice', '½ cup white wine', '4 cups chicken or vegetable stock, warmed', '1 cup pumpkin, small diced ', '4 Tbsp. pumpkin puree', '1 stick (8 Tbsp.) butter', '1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, grated, plus more for serving', '1 tsp. thyme', 'pumpkin seeds and fresh thyme, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
["
Intro: A seasonal twist on a comfort classic, this Pork Belly & Pumpkin Risotto recipe is sure to be a fall favorite. Seasoned with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and garnished with crispy pork belly, there's levels of umami packed into this bowl of risotto that accentuate the sweet pumpkin. Risotto is known as a fine dining staple, but is actually simple to make at home, and this recipe is concrete proof of that. Ready in under an hour, it's great to whip up for a quick fancy dinner!

In a medium pan over medium high heat, cook pork belly until crispy and set aside.
", "
In a small pot, heat olive oil and cook shallot and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Add rice and cook for 3 minutes, stirring continuously so it doesn't stick. Add white wine, stir and cook for a further 3 minutes until the wine reduces.
", '
Gradually add stock to rice, 1 soup ladle at a time. Stir continuously until rice has soaked up all stock, about 25-30 minutes. With about 5 minutes until finished add cubed pumpkin so it cooks through the risotto.
', '
When risotto is nearly finished add pumpkin puree and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and stir through. Add thyme, butter & parmesan cheese and gently mix together.
', '
Serve risotto in a bowl and garnish with pumpkin seeds, more parmesan, fresh thyme and crispy pork belly!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: stuffed-pepper-soup-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '1 red bell pepper, chopped', '1 green bell pepper, chopped', '1 yellow bell pepper, chopped', '1 onion, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 lb. ground beef', '6 cups chicken broth', '1 can (28 oz.) crushed tomatoes', '1 can (14 oz.) fire-roasted diced tomatoes', '2 tsp. dried oregano', '1 cup white rice, uncooked', 'Parmesan cheese, for serving', 'freshly chopped parsley, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Kosher salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, divided']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Intro: This spicy Stuffed Pepper Soup Recipe is the perfect soup season idea if you love stuffed peppers. It has all of the ingredients you love from stuffed peppers, like ground beef, rice, tomatoes, and spices, with an extra added kick of heat from Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Stuffed Pepper Soup is simple, hearty, and an easy addition to your lineup of soups.
\xa0
\xa0
In a large pot over medium heat, heat oil. Add bell peppers and onion and cook until soft, 7 minutes. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook until fragrant, 1 minute. Add ground beef and season with salt and pepper. Cook until no longer pink, 7 minutes. Drain fat and return to heat.
', '
Add broth, crushed tomatoes, diced tomatoes, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and oregano. Bring to a boil then reduce heat to a simmer. Add rice and simmer, covered, until rice is tender, about 40 minutes, adding water if necessary.\xa0 Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Garnish with parmesan, parsley and 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: pomegranate-braised-short-ribs-recipe
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '3 lbs. beef short ribs (about 6-7 bone in short ribs)', 'mashed potatoes, cooked', 'fresh parsley and pomegranate seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 medium onion, chopped', '3 bacon, slices cut into smaller pieces', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee minced garlic', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '2 1/2 cups pomegranate juice', '1 1/2 cups beef stock', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/2 cup dark brown sugar ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '3 sprigs fresh thyme']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Preheat the oven to 375°F degrees. Add olive oil to a large pot or dutch oven over medium high heat. Liberally season short ribs with salt and pepper to taste then add short ribs to the hot pot. Sear ribs on all sides until golden brown. Once beef is finished searing, remove from pot, drain on paper towels, and place to the side.
', '
Next add chopped onion and bacon to the pan and brown until the onion is tender (about 6-8 minutes). Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and only cook for 30 seconds. Sprinkle in flour and stir together and cook for about 2 minutes. Pour in pomegranate juice, beef stock, and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce then stir in brown sugar and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and stir until everything is smooth, scraping up any brown bits still remaining on the bottom of the pan. Add thyme sprigs then bring the braising liquid to a boil.
', '
Once boiling, return beef short ribs to liquid, cover with top and place in the oven for 2 - 2 ½ hours or until ribs are completely tender (easily separated with a fork) and the liquid has thickened into a gravy that has stuck to the ribs.
', '
At this point, there will be lots of fat that has rendered to the top from the ribs. You will want to scoop this out to remove it. If you have time, place the entire dutch oven in the fridge for a few hours and let the fat solidify. You can easily scoop it out then and place the oven right back on the heat to heat up. It also lets the flavors intensify even more.
', '
Garnish with fresh pomegranate seeds and parsley then serve over mashed potatoes and enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-gnocchi-soup-recipe
Ingredients: ['olive oil spray, for cooking', '7 oz. sweet Italian chicken sausage, removed from casings', '1 large shallot, diced', '6 garlic cloves, minced', '2 tsp. tomato paste', '1 lb. boneless skinless chicken breast', '1/2 cup water', '5 cups reduced sodium chicken broth', '1 parmesan cheese rind', '⅓ cup sundried tomatoes in oil, drained and chopped', '16 oz. package gnocchi', '4 cups fresh baby spinach leaves, rough chopped', '¼ cup parmesan cheese, grated', '2 Tbsp. fresh basil, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Italian seasoning', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['Slurry:', '3 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '¼ cup half and half', '1 cup cold water, divided']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Create a slurry by combining 1/2 cup of the cold water, half and half and flour in a small bowl and whisk until well blended. Set aside.
', '
Heat a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat and spray with oil then add the sausage. Cook the sausage, breaking up with a wooden spoon as it cooks, until no longer pink and slightly browned. Add the shallots and garlic and cook until soft, 3 minutes. Add the tomato paste and chicken breast.
', '
Pour the remaining 1/2 cup water and chicken broth, parmesan rind, sundried tomatoes, Italian seasoning, and bring to a boil. Partially cover and simmer on low until vegetables are soft and the chicken shreds easily, about 25 minutes.
', '
Remove the chicken and set aside, shred with 2 forks. Return the chicken to the pot then slowly stir in slurry, stirring well as you add and bring it back to a boil.
', '
Add the gnocchi, spinach, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, parmesan cheese and basil; cook according to package directions for the gnocchi, or until they start to float to the top and soup thickens. Adjust salt and pepper to taste, discard parmesan cheese rind and serve.
']

Name: super-spicy-sushi-bake
Ingredients: ['2 cups uncooked short-grain rice', '2 ¼ cups water', '1 tsp. toasted sesame seeds', 'Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, to taste', 'furikake, to taste', '1 lb. imitation crab meat', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to taste', '1 egg', 'black sesame seeds, to taste', 'sliced cucumber, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'nori sheets, to serve']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for topping', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for topping']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['




Sushi bake casserole recipes are a hit because they’re easy to make and can be prepped ahead of time. And because they’re so tasty, they’ve become a staple at family dinners, potluck parties, picnics, and more.

Adding Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and Sriracha Mayo to this spicy sushi bake will make your version stand out, no matter the occasion.\xa0

Why We Love It
Sushi bakes are a tasty blend of sweet and savory, and the simplicity of a sushi bake recipe makes it effortless to prep in the kitchen. This version adds a spicy kick for those looking to add a little extra heat.


This sushi bake casserole recipe is easy to cook, as once you’ve prepped and assembled the ingredients, you can bake and go. You can even make the casserole a few hours ahead! Just bake when ready so it’s hot when served.

Step 1: Preheat oven to 350 °F. To make the sushi rice: rinse rice well. Add rice and water to a rice cooker, and set to cook.

', '
In a small saucepan, mix Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, granulated sugar, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Heat on low setting until sugar dissolves. Once rice is cooked, dump the hot rice into a large mixing bowl. Gently fold the vinegar mixture into the rice. Add the toasted sesame seeds and gently fold in.
', '
Grease pan with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Spread rice mixture in pan, press to flatten a bit. Sprinkle with a nice layer of furikake, set aside. Make the crab layer: Chop imitation crab and add in ½ cup of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, stir well to combine. Crack egg into the bowl, beat to break up, then mix well to fully combine.
', '
Spread imitation crab mixture in pan, top with another thin layer of furikake. Sprinkle with black sesame seeds. Make the topping: Drizzle ⅓ cup of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce over the spicy sushi bake casserole.
', '
Bake for 25 minutes. Serve hot, garnished with sliced cucumber and sliced green onions. Serve with nori. Enjoy!
']

Name: sous-vide-short-rib-ragu-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. beef short ribs', 'cooked pasta, for serving', 'grated Parmesan cheese, for serving', 'fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish (optional)']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion, finely chopped', '2 carrots, finely chopped', '2 celery stalks, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 can (14 oz) crushed tomatoes', '1 cup beef broth', '1/2 cup red wine', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 tsp. dried oregano', '1 tsp. dried basil', '1 tsp. dried thyme']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Preheat your sous vide water bath to 165°F. Season the short ribs generously with salt and pepper.Place the seasoned short ribs in a vacuum-sealable bag or a zip-top bag, ensuring they are in a single layer. Once the water bath is preheated, place the sealed bag of short ribs into the water. Sous vide cook the short ribs for 24-48 hours. This long cooking time will result in tender, melt-in-your-mouth meat.
', '
Prepare the Ragu Sauce: In a large skillet or saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery to the skillet. Sauté until the vegetables are softened, about 5-7 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, crushed tomatoes, beef broth, red wine, tomato paste, dried oregano, dried basil, and dried thyme. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Bring the sauce to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low. Let the sauce simmer gently for about 20-30 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the sauce to thicken slightly.
', '
Shred the Short Ribs: Once the short ribs are done sous vide cooking, remove them from the water bath and carefully open the bag. Remove the short ribs from the bag and shred the meat using forks or tongs. Discard any bones or excess fat.
', '
Add the shredded short rib meat to the simmering ragu sauce. Stir to combine and let it simmer together for an additional 5-10 minutes. Taste the ragu and adjust the seasoning if necessary. Serve the short rib ragu sauce over cooked pasta of your choice. Garnish with grated Parmesan cheese and fresh parsley, if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: bacon-onion-asiago-fondue-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 slices bacon', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ onion, thinly sliced', '3 Tbsp. heavy cream', '1⅓ cups diced Asiago cheese', 'bread, crackers and assorted vegetables, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
\xa0
\xa0
\xa0
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and cook bacon for 20 minutes, or until bacon is almost completely crispy.
', '
Meanwhile, in a small, ovenproof skillet, add oil and the onion. Cook until lightly golden, 7 to 8 minutes. Add in the heavy cream. Bring to a simmer. Remove the skillet from the heat and add the cheese.
', '
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake until the cheese is melted (you may need to stir once to encourage even melting), 6 to 8 minutes.\xa0
', '
Brush bacon with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and return to the oven to caramelize while the cheese melts. (Keep a close eye that the bacon doesn’t burn)
', '
Chop Hoisin bacon and pile on top of melted cheese. Garnish with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and serve with your choice of bread, crackers and assorted vegetables. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-butternut-squash-pasta-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 slices prosciutto', '1 lb. long or short cut pasta', '2 Tbsp. salted butter', '1 Tbsp. fresh chopped sage', '½ cup shredded gouda cheese', '⅓ cup grated parmesan cheese']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '2 cups cubed butternut squash', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fresh thyme leaves', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh rosemary ', 'kosher salt and black pepper, to taste', '½ cup ricotta cheese']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Preheat the oven to 400° F. On a baking sheet, toss together the olive oil, butternut squash, one tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, thyme, one tablespoon of rosemary, and a pinch each of salt and pepper. Arrange the prosciutto around the squash. Bake for 20 minutes, check the prosciutto and remove if crispy, then bake another 10-15 minutes, until the squash is tender.
', '
Add the butternut squash, remaining Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and ricotta to a food processor. Puree until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente. Just before draining, remove 1 cup of the pasta cooking water. Drain.
', '
In a large skillet, melt together the butter, sage, and remaining rosemary. Cook until the butter is browning, then add the butternut puree and 1/2 cup pasta cooking water, stirring until combined. Melt in the gouda and parmesan.
', '
Add the pasta to the sauce, tossing to combine. If needed, thin the pasta sauce with a little of the reserved cooking water. Divide the pasta between plates. Top with parmesan and prosciutto. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: cheddar-popovers-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 large eggs, plus 2 egg whites', '1 ¾ cup milk', '1 ½ cup all-purpose flour', '1 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3/4 tsp salt', '1 cup finely grated extra-sharp aged white Cheddar', '2 Tbsp butter, room temperature, for coating pans, plus more for serving']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for garnish']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, whisk together eggs, egg whites, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, milk, flour, and salt. Stir in cheddar and set aside.
', '
Place two 6-cup popover pans in the oven for 10 minutes. Remove pans and, working quickly, brush the cups with butter. Evenly divide reserved batter among cups and return pans to the oven. Bake until popovers are puffed over pan rims and deep golden, 25 to 30 minutes. Cut a small slit into the top of each popover to release steam; bake for 10 more minutes.\xa0
', '
Garnish with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and serve immediately with butter on the side.
']

Name: crispy-rice-shrimp-burger--recipe
Ingredients: ['--- For the Rice Buns ---', '2 cups cooked sushi rice (short-grain rice)', '1 Tbsp. Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. sugar', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional)', '--- For the Shrimp Patty ---', '12 medium shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 green onion, finely chopped', '2 Tbsp.  panko breadcrumbs', '1 egg white', 'salt and pepper to taste', '½ cup panko breadcrumbs, for coating', 'oil, for frying', '--- For the Toppings ---', 'lettuce leaves', 'sliced avocado', 'thinly sliced cucumber', 'pickled ginger (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. lime juice', '½ tsp. honey ']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Prepare the Rice Buns: In a bowl, mix the cooked sushi rice with Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, and sugar until well combined. Divide the rice into 4 equal portions. Using your hands, shape each portion into a round, flat patty (about the size of a burger bun). Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly coat with sesame oil. Fry the rice patties for 3-4 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy. Remove from the pan and set aside.
', '
Finely chop the shrimp until it forms a chunky paste. In a mixing bowl, combine the chopped shrimp, green onion, panko breadcrumbs, and egg white. Mix until the ingredients are well combined and can hold together. Form the mixture into 2 patties.
', '
Coat each patty in panko breadcrumbs, pressing gently to ensure they stick. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Fry the shrimp patties for 3-4 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and cooked through. Remove and drain on paper towels.
', '
Prepare the Sauce: In a small bowl, mix the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo with soy sauce, lime juice, and honey (if using). Adjust the seasoning to taste.
', '
Assemble the Burger: Take one rice bun and spread a generous layer of the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo sauce on top. Layer with lettuce, sliced avocado, and cucumber. Place a shrimp patty on top of the vegetables. Add another dollop of Sriracha Mayo on the shrimp, and then top with the second rice bun.
', '
Serve: Garnish with pickled ginger and sesame seeds if desired.Serve the burgers with extra Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on the side for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-grilled-chicken-thighs-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 ¼ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs', 'vegetable oil, for grilling', '2 stalks green onions, thinly sliced', '½ cup cilantro leaves with tender stems', 'sesame seeds, for serving', 'lemon wedges, for serving', 'grilled vegetables of your choice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt, to taste']
Marinade: ['2 lemongrass stalks, trimmed, tough outer layers removed, minced', '1 serrano pepper, minced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add marinade ingredients to a bowl and mix well to combine.
', '
Season chicken thighs with kosher salt and add to the bowl with marinade. Turn as needed to coat completely. Marinate at least 10 minutes and up to 2 hours.
', '
Prepare a grill for high indirect heat. Grill chicken over the hottest part of the grill, moving to cooler zones as needed if browning too fast, until well browned, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest for 10 minutes.
', '
Transfer chicken pieces to a platter and top with green onions, cilantro leaves with tender stems. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over. Serve with grilled vegetables of your choice! Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-asian-style-schiacciata-recipe
Ingredients: ['3.5 oz. all-purpose flour', '4.8 oz. strong bread flour', '½ tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '7 g instant yeast ', '⅔-¾ cup extra virgin olive oil, divided ', '½ cup hot water (105 °F) ', '1/4 cup corn kernels', '1/2 cup heirloom cherry tomatoes, halved', '1 head roasted garlic', 'flakey salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil,  for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. miso ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flours, salt, sugar, instant yeast, water and 3 tablespoons of the olive oil in a. Mix with a spoon until you have a shaggy ball then tip out onto the counter and knead the dough by hand. Continue to knead for 5-10 minutes until you have a ball of smooth, silky dough. Place the ball of dough in a lightly oiled bowl and cover with a clean tea towel, a lid, or plastic wrap. Place in a very warm place for about 5 minutes. Use another 2-3 tablespoons of the olive oil to grease the base and sides of a 9x13 baking tin.
', '
Turn out the dough and knead briefly. Use your hands to squash, stretch and pat the dough out into a rectangle roughly the size of the pan. Transfer the dough to the oiled pan and squash, pat and ease the dough to the edges of the tin. It should be a roughly even thickness all the way across. Cover the baking tin with a tea towel, plastic wrap, or a lid, and return it to the warm place for about 15 minutes.
', '
Preheat oven to 425 °F and while the dough rests, combine the miso, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Set aside.
', '
Remove the dough from the warm place and Drizzle two tbsp of miso chili oil on the dough and lightly coat fingers in oil again. Dimple the dough using your fingers by pressing them close to the bottom of the pan (but not all the way through). Allow the bubbles to form (don’t pop them!). Place desired amount of tomatoes, corn and roasted garlic. Finish with a generous sprinkle of flakey salt.\xa0
', '
Place on the middle rack of your oven and bake for 20-22 minutes or until the surface is crisp and deep golden. Transfer the focaccia to a cooling rack. Allow it to cool for 15 minutes before slicing and serving. Enjoy with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil.\xa0
']

Name: hot-honey-salmon-bowl-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 (4-6 oz.) salmon filets, cut into bite-size chunks', '6 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil, divided ', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', 'kosher salt and black pepper', '1 bunch asparagus, ends trimmed', '3-4 cups cooked rice, for serving', 'creamy ranch, for serving', 'Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, for drizzling', '---Avocado Salsa---', '2 avocados, diced', '1 serrano or jalapeño, sliced', '1/2 cup fresh cilantro, chopped', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh dill', '1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese', '2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1/3 cup toasted seeds']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 tsp. cayenne pepper', '3/4 tsp. chipotle chili powder', '1/2 tsp. garlic powder', '1/2 tsp. onion powder']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Preheat the oven to 450° F. On a baking sheet, toss the salmon pieces with 3 tablespoons olive oil, paprika, salt, and pepper. Arrange in a single layer. On the other side of the pan, add the asparagus. Toss with 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast 10-15 minutes or until the salmon is just undercooked to your liking.
', '
Meanwhile, make the hot honey. In a sauce pot, warm together the honey, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, cayenne, chili powder, onion powder, and garlic powder, plus a pinch of salt.
', '
Spoon some of the hot honey over the salmon. Switch the oven to broil and broil until lightly charred and crispy. Spoon over additional hot honey, to your taste.
', '
To make the salsa, combine all avocado salsa ingredients in a bowl and season with salt, gently tossing.
', '
Arrange the salmon and asparagus over bowls of rice. Top with salsa. Add ranch on the side and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
