Name: lasagna-alla-vodka-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. ground beef', '3 Tbsp. oil', '1 onion, peeled and finely diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 14 oz jars diced tomatoes', '½ cup vodka', '1 cup heavy cream', '1 box lasagna noodles, cooked ', '1 cup grated mozzarella cheese', '½ cup grated parmesan cheese']
Seasoning: ['3 tsp. fennel seeds', '2 tsp. garlic powder', '2 tsp. smoked paprika', '2 tsp. dried oregano', '2 tsp. cayenne pepper', '2 tsp. ground coriander seeds', '2 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['---Bechamel Sauce---', '6 Tbsp. butter', '6 Tbsp. flour', '4 cups milk, hot', '1.5 tsp salt', '1/2 tsp ground nutmeg']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Preheat oven to 350 F. Mix the fennel seeds, salt, garlic powder, paprika, oregano, cayenne, coriander seeds and black pepper with the ground beef until fully incorporated.
', '
Heat the oil in a large heavy bottom pot and cook the onions until soft. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for a minute. Add the ground beef mixture and cook, breaking it up. Cook the beef halfway and then add the jars of tomato and vodka. Simmer for 30 minutes. Add the heavy cream at the end and stir and cook for 5 minutes.
', '
Make a bechamel sauce: Add the butter to a small saucepan and melt. Add the flour and cook the flour in the butter for a minute. Add the milk gradually and stir until smooth. Season with salt and nutmeg.\xa0
', '
Oil a large baking dish and spread out one layer of pasta sauce, then lasagna noodles, bechamel and keep layering with each component. Finish on a layer of pasta then add bechamel, mozzarella and parmesan.\xa0
', '
Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the top is golden. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with parsley. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: coconut-curry-salmon-noodles-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 pieces salmon about 6 to 8 ounces each, skinless', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 can coconut milk', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ cup sliced green onions', 'handful of cilantro, roughly chopped', '12 oz. Vermicelli noodles, cooked according to package directions']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. red curry paste', '2 Tbsp. fish sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl, combine curry paste, fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Add salmon filets and toss gently to coat.
', '
Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium high heat until hot. Add Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, heat, and then add the salmon mixture and cook for 3 minutes.
', '
Turn salmon pieces over and add green onions and cover. Cook for 3 more minutes. Carefully remove salmon to a plate, no worries if it breaks apart a little.
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and coconut milk to the sauce and whisk to combine well. Bring sauce to a simmer and then nestle salmon back in the pan. Cook for another 3 to 4 minutes or until salmon is cooked through. Add cilantro and serve with vermicelli noodles. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-cajun-baked-potato-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 cup butter', '1 cup chopped yellow onion', '1 bunch green onions, chopped', '3/4 cup diced celery', '3/4 cup diced bell pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 cup all purpose flour', '3 cups chicken broth', '1 cup heavy cream', '20 oz shrimp, deveined ', '5 large russet potatoes, baked ', 'butter, sour cream, shredded cheddar cheese, for topping', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling', 'parsley, finely chopped, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Cajun seasoning', '1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
["

\xa0
\xa0
In a large skillet melt butter over medium heat. Add onion, green onions, celery, bell pepper and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook until tender. Slowly add flour and stir. Cook until bubbling but don't brown the roux.
", '
Slowly add chicken broth, stirring the whole time. Then add cream and bring up to a slow simmer. Add shrimp and Cajun seasoning, cayenne, salt and black pepper. Simmer for about 10 minutes.
', '
When potatoes are done, cut a slit in them and add butter, cheese and sour cream.\xa0
', '
Spoon creamy Cajun sauce over the loaded potato. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, garnish with parsley and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: hot-honey-cured-egg-yolks-recipe
Ingredients: ['6 egg yolks', '1 cup cottage cheese', '½ cup chopped chives', '2 slices of sourdough bread, toasted, for serving', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, a drizzle for serving']
Marinade: ['Hot Honey:', '1 1/8 lb of clear honey', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '5 red thai chili peppers, whole', '1 tsp apple cider vinegar']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Add all the hot honey ingredients except the apple cider vinegar to a pot over medium heat. Bring to a gentle simmer, then turn off the heat and leave the honey to infuse for 2 minutes. Stir in the apple cider vinegar, then transfer to a container to cool for 4 hours.
', '
Place the yolks into a container leaving enough room so that they are not overlapping. Pour the cooled hot honey over the egg yolks, making sure they are fully submerged. Cover with a lid, and leave in the fridge for 2–4 days to cure.
', '
Once cured, mix together the cottage cheese and finely sliced chives, reserving some for garnish. Spread the cottage cheese mix over the toasted sourdough, then spoon over the cured egg yolks and some of the hot honey and peppers.
', '
Drizzle with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and sprinkle with a few more chives, and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: jalapeno-popper-dip-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 whole jalapeño peppers', '½ cup panko breadcrumbs', '1½ tsp. extra-virgin olive oil, plus more for drizzling', '½ cup grated sharp cheddar cheese', '1 jalapeno, sliced for garnish', 'chopped chives, for garnish', 'tortilla chips, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup whole milk Greek yogurt', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1 tsp. onion powder', '1 tsp. sea salt, plus more for sprinkling', '¼ tsp. smoked paprika', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven broiler and line a baking sheet with foil. Place the 2 whole jalapeños on the baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Broil for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the jalapeños are soft and blistering.
', '
Remove from the oven and set aside to cool. When the jalapeños are cool to the touch, use your hands (wearing gloves, if desired) to peel and remove the loose skin. Slice the peppers in half and remove the seeds and membranes. Finely chop the peppers.\xa0
', '
In a medium bowl, stir together the yogurt, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, onion powder, salt, smoked paprika, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Then add in the roasted jalapeños from the last step.
', '
In a small bowl, toss the panko with the olive oil. Transfer the yogurt mixture to a small skillet or baking dish, top with the cheese, and sprinkle with the panko. Broil for about 5 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown. The timing will depends on your broiler.
', '
Remove from the oven. Sprinkle the fresh jalapeno slices over the dip. Top with chives and serve with tortilla chips. Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-enoki-rolls-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 lb very thinly sliced, hotpot style beef ', '1 pack enoki mushrooms, pulled by hand into small bunches, same number of bunches as meat slices ', '1 orange bell pepper, julienned', '1 medium zucchini, julienned into similar length as bell pepper strips', 'cooking oil, a drizzle', 'green onion, chopped for garnish ', 'steamed rice, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. cold water', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '½ tsp honey ', '1 cup chicken broth ']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Whisk cornstarch and water to dissolve. Whisk in remaining sauce mix ingredients and set aside.
', '
Form beef rolls: Place one strip of beef vertically. About half an inch from the bottom, place enoki bunch, 2-3 pepper strips and 2-3 zucchini strips horizontally. Roll beef up and around the enoki and veggies. Place seam-side down on plate. Repeat with remaining rolls.
', '
Heat a large saucepan over medium heat. Give sauce mixture a quick whisk as the cornstarch will have settled by now. Add a drizzle of oil and the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Stir quickly to prevent burning. Immediately add sauce. Turn heat down to medium-low. Give sauce a few stirs with a spatula. Arrange beef rolls around the pan in concentric circles, leaving a bit of space between them to allow proper cooking. You will likely need to cook the rolls in 2 batches.
', '
Cover with lid. Adjust heat to a good simmer and let cook until beef has gone from pink to fully cooked – keep a close eye on it as the beef is so thin that it cooks quickly. Transfer cooked rolls onto serving platter and tent loosely with foil to keep warm. Cook second batch.
', '
Serve beef rolls with enoki and veggies on serving platter with sauce poured all over. Garnish with green onions and serve over steamed rice.
']

Name: two-hours-ramen-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 cups water', '4 cups beef broth', '1 onion, thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1-inch piece of ginger, sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. mirin ', '10.5 oz. thin-sliced beef (such as sirloin or ribeye)', '10.5 oz. Fresh Ramen noodles', '4 stalks green onions, thinly sliced', '4 soft-boiled eggs, halved ', '2 sheets nori, cut into thin strips', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce (plus more for serving)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce (plus more for serving)']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Prepare the Broth: In a large pot, combine water, beef broth, sliced onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, ginger slices, Lee Kum Kee Premium soy sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, mirin,  Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for about 30 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
', '
Prepare the Beef: While the broth simmers, season the thin-sliced beef with salt and pepper. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and cook the beef slices for 1-2 minutes on each side until they are browned and cooked to your liking. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Cook the Ramen Noodles: In a separate pot, bring water to a boil and cook the Ramen noodles according to the package instructions until they are al dente. Once cooked, drain the noodles and rinse them under cold water to stop the cooking process. Set aside.
', '
Assemble the Ramen Bowls: Divide the cooked noodles among serving bowls. Ladle the hot broth over the noodles, making sure to distribute the onions and garlic evenly. Arrange the cooked beef slices on top of the noodles. Garnish each bowl with sliced green onions, halved soft-boiled eggs, nori strips, and sesame seeds.
', '
Serve with additional Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce if desired.
']

Name: creamy-coconut-chicken-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts', '2 Tbsp. olive oil, divided', '1 onion, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 red bell pepper, sliced', '1 orange bell pepper, sliced', '1 can (13.5 oz) coconut milk', 'fresh cilantro, chopped (for garnish)', 'cooked rice or noodles (for serving)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '1/2 tsp. ground turmeric', '1/2 tsp. paprika', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0
Heat 1 Tbsp. of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper on both sides. Add the chicken breasts to the skillet and sear until golden brown on each side, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
', '
In the same skillet, add the remaining tablespoon of olive oil. Add the chopped onion,\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Sauté until the onion becomes translucent, about 3-4 minutes. Add the sliced red and orange bell peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
', '
Pour the coconut milk into the skillet, stirring well to combine. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, sugar, ground turmeric, and paprika. Stir until all the ingredients are well combined.
', '
Return the seared chicken breasts to the skillet. Spoon some of the sauce over the chicken to coat. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer. Cover the skillet and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is fully cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Garnish with freshly chopped cilantro. Serve the creamy coconut chicken over cooked rice or noodles. Enjoy!
']

Name: two-days-ramen-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 lbs. pork bones (such as neck bones or ribs)', '1 onion, quartered', '4 cloves garlic, smashed', '2-inch piece of ginger, sliced', '4 green onions, chopped', '4-6 in dried shiitake mushrooms', '1 piece kombu (dried kelp)', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. mirin', '1 Tbsp.  sake', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'salt, to taste', '4 eggs, cold from the fridge', '2.5 lb pork belly', 'cooked fresh ramen noodles', 'bok choy, blancheds, for serving', 'sliced green onionss, for serving', 'sesame seeds, for serving', 'nori, sliced, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for serving']
Marinade: ['---Marinade for the Eggs---', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Premium Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup mirin', '1/4 cup water', '2 tsp. sugar', '---Marinade for Pork Belly---', '3 cups chicken or pork broth', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Premium Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup mirin', '1/4 cup sake', '1/4 cup sugar', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2-inch piece of ginger, sliced', '2 green onions, chopped', '1 star anise']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
\xa0

DAY 1

\xa0
Prepare the Broth: In a large pot, add pork bones, onion, garlic, ginger, green onions, dried shiitake mushrooms, and kombu. Fill the pot with water until all ingredients are submerged.
Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for at least 8 hours or overnight. Skim off any scum that rises to the surface.

\xa0
After simmering, strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth. Discard the solids. Return the broth to the pot and add Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, mirin, sake, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and salt to taste. Let it cool, then refrigerate overnight.
', '
Prepare the\xa0Chashu Pork:\xa0Lay the pork belly flat on a cutting board. Season with salt and pepper. Roll the pork belly tightly into a log shape and tie it securely with kitchen twine at 1-inch intervals. In a large pot, combine chicken or pork broth, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, sliced ginger, chopped green onions, and star anise (if using). Place the rolled pork belly into the pot with the braising liquid. Bring the liquid to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for about 2-3 hours or until the pork is tender and cooked through. Turn the pork occasionally during cooking to ensure even flavor distribution.
\xa0
Once the pork is cooked and tender, remove it from the braising liquid and let it cool slightly. Transfer the pork to a container and pour a ladleful of the braising liquid over it to cover. Allow the pork to marinate in the refrigerator overnight, or for at least 8 hours.
', '
Prepare the Eggs: In a saucepan, bring water to a boil. Carefully add the eggs and cook for exactly 7 minutes for a jammy yolk or adjust according to your preference.\xa0 Remove the eggs and transfer them to an ice bath immediately to cool. In a separate bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, mirin, water, and sugar until the sugar is dissolved. Add peeled and cooled eggs to marinade and place in the fridge overnight.\xa0
', '
DAY 2
\xa0
Cook the Rolled Chashu Pork: Preheat the oven to 375°F. Place the marinated rolled Chashu pork on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the pork is heated through and caramelized.
', '
Reheat the pork broth from Day 1. Cook the ramen noodles according to package instructions. In serving bowls, ladle the hot broth. Add cooked ramen noodles, blanched bok choy, and sliced green onions.
', '
Top each bowl with slices of broiled chashu pork, half of a ramen egg, sesame seeds, and sliced nori. Drizzle with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
']

Name: butter-chicken-pizza
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 lb. chicken thighs boneless, skinless, diced ', '2 jars butter chicken sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 store bought pizza doughs, par-cooked', '16 oz. fresh mozzarella cheese, sliced', '1 small red onion, thinly sliced', '1 cup cilantro, finely chopped ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['




Preheat the oven to 500 F. To a large pan over medium heat, heat oil. Add chicken and cook for 5 minutes. 
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Stir to combine and cook for a few more minutes until chicken is cooked through. Add one jar of the butter chicken sauce and stir to combine and warmed through.\xa0
', '
Use the second jar of butter chicken sauce to pour onto the middle of the pizza dough and spread it out. Top with mozzarella slices and butter chicken. Scatter some red onions over the top. Repeat to make a second pizza.
', '
Cook the pizzas in the oven for 4-8 minutes or until cheese is melted.
', '
Sprinkle with cilantro and enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-philly-cheesesteak-bowl-recipe
Ingredients: ['olive oil, for cooking', '1 yellow onion, chopped in 1/2 inch pieces', '1 green bell pepper, sliced', '1 cup mushrooms, sliced ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 lb. ribeye, sliced extra thin', 'cooked rice, for serving', '1 jar cheez whiz, warmed', 'hot peppers, for serving']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (cage-free eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
\xa0
\xa0

Warm some olive oil in a large skillet then add onions, bell pepper, mushrooms, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and salt. Cook 10 minutes on medium high, tossing often until onions are brown and golden and soft and cooked through. Remove from skillet. 
', '
To the same skillet, add some more oil and cook steak for 5-8 minutes until steak pieces are cooked through. Do not toss too often, to get some good browning & crispy bits on one side.
', '
Serve by making a bowl with rice, veggies, cheese whiz and then steak. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (cage-free eggs) and add some hot peppers. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: spicy-sushi-sandwich-recipe
Ingredients: ['3 cups cooked sushi rice (calrose rice preferred)', '2 Tbsp. sugar', '5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', 'pinch of salt', 'cornstarch, for coating', 'oil, for frying ', '5 oz. crab meat', '2 stalks scallions, chopped', '5 oz. sushi grade tuna, finely chopped', '2 nori squares', '5 oz. sushi grade salmon slices', '1 avocado, thinly sliced ', 'eel sauce, to taste', 'black and toasted sesame seeds, to taste ', 'togarashi, to taste', '1 Persian cucumber, julienned ']
Seasoning: ['---Spicy Crab Salad---', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (cage-free eggs)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '---Spicy Gochujang Tuna---', '1 Tbsp. gochujang', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Japanese mayo', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
["





\xa0
Season the sushi rice with the Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, sugar, and salt. Press onto a rectangular baking sheet or square container.  Make sure to press well so it's flat and even. Place in the freezer for 2 hours.
", '
Once firm, cut rice into “bread sized” squares. Coat the rice in cornstarch, tapping off excess. Heat oil in a deep skillet or pot to 350F. Fry until golden, about 6-8 min.\xa0
', '
In a medium bowl, combine crab meat, scallions, and all seasoning ingredients for the spicy crab salad; set aside. In another bowl, combine tuna and all seasoning ingredients for the gochujang tuna; set aside.
', '
Spread a layer of spicy crab salad onto one slice of crispy rice, then the nori, gochujang tuna and salmon slices. At this point, you can torch the salmon for\xa0 extra flavor.
', '
\xa0Then add the avocado, eel sauce, sesame seeds, togarashi and cucumber. Top with the other crispy rice and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-korean-style-corn-grilled-cheese-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '½ cup minced yellow onion', '1½ cups corn kernels ', '8 slices sourdough bread']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, plus more for brushing', '2 cups low-moisture mozzarella, shredded', '1 cup fontina or provolone cheese, shredded', '2 Tbsp. minced parsley', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat the butter in a large cast-iron or nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and cook, stirring, until soft and just beginning to brown at the edges, 2 to 3 minutes. Add the corn and cook, stirring occasionally, until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Scrape the corn into a bowl and let cool for 10 minutes (wipe the skillet clean and reserve). Stir in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, followed by the mozzarella, fontina and parsley, and season with salt and pepper.
', '
Brush a thin layer of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, on each slice of the sourdough bread, then turn the slices over. Divide the corn mixture among 4 slices of bread, then sandwich them with the other 4 slices. (Make sure the “mayonnaise sides” are facing outward.)
', '
Heat the reserved skillet over medium heat. Add 2 sandwiches to the skillet, cover, and cook, flipping once, until golden brown outside and the cheese is melted inside, 8 to 10 minutes. Transfer the sandwiches to a cutting board and repeat with the remaining sandwiches.
', '
As soon as they’re cooked, cut the sandwiches in half and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-layered-nachos-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 bag of tortilla chips', '1 cup shredded cheese (cheddar, Monterey Jack, or a blend)', '1/2 cup black beans (drained and rinsed)', '1/4 cup diced red onion', '1/4 cup diced tomatoes', '1/4 cup sliced black olives', '1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro', 'sour cream, for serving (optional)', 'guacamole or diced avocado, for serving (optional)']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to drizzle']
Procedure:
['




Preheat your air fryer to 350°F. 
', '
Spread a layer of tortilla chips slightly overlapping\xa0 in the air fryer basket. Sprinkle some shredded cheese over the chips, ensuring even coverage. Add ½ the black beans, diced red onion, diced tomatoes, and sliced black olives on top of the cheese. Repeat layer until all used up.
', '
Place the assembled nachos in the preheated air fryer basket. Air fry for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly, and the nachos are heated through.
', '
Carefully remove the nachos from the air fryer basket and transfer them to a serving plate. Sprinkle chopped fresh cilantro over the top. Serve hot with optional toppings such as sour cream and guacamole or diced avocado.
', '
Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce over the nachos just before serving, according to your desired level of spiciness. Enjoy!
']

Name: lemongrass-chicken-panini-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 boneless, skinless chicken breasts', '4 ciabatta rolls (or 8 slices of sourdough bread)', '4 slices provolone cheese', '1 cup fresh spinach leaves', '1/2 red bell pepper, thinly sliced', '1/4 cup mayonnaise', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, for spread', 'butter, as needed for grilling']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 tsp. honey']
Procedure:
['


Marinate the Chicken: In a bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger,  Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, lime juice, olive oil, and honey. Place the chicken breasts in a resealable plastic bag or a shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the chicken, ensuring it is well-coated. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours for more flavor.
', '
Cook the Chicken: Preheat a grill or skillet over medium-high heat. Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for about 6-7 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and has nice grill marks. Internal temperature should reach 165°F (75°C). Let the chicken rest for a few minutes, then slice it thinly.
', '
In a small bowl, mix the mayonnaise with 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce. Set aside.
', '
Assemble the Panini: Spread a thin layer of the prepared hoisin-mayo spread on the cut sides of the ciabatta rolls or one side of each sourdough bread slice. Layer the sliced chicken, provolone cheese, fresh spinach leaves, and red bell pepper slices on the bottom halves of the rolls or four of the bread slices. Top with the other halves or remaining slices.
', '
Preheat a panini press or a skillet over medium heat. If using a skillet, you may need to press the sandwich down with another heavy skillet or a weight. Lightly butter the outside of the bread.
', '
Grill the panini for about 3-4 minutes per side, or until the bread is golden and crispy and the cheese is melted. Cut in half and enjoy
']

Name: spicy-coconut-curry-ramen-recipe
Ingredients: ['---Ramen---', '2 packs instant ramen noodles (discard seasoning packets)', '---Broth---', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 can (400ml) coconut milk', '2 cups chicken or vegetable broth', '---Toppings---', '1 cup sliced mushrooms', '1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced', '1 cup baby spinach', '2 boiled eggs, halved', 'Fresh cilantro, chopped', 'Green onions, chopped', 'Lime wedges (for serving)']
Seasoning: ['---Broth---', '1-2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil (adjust to taste)', '1 Tbsp. red curry paste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce (optional)', '1 tsp. sugar', 'Juice of 1 lime']
Procedure:
['
\xa0


In a large pot, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté for about 1-2 minutes until fragrant. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and red curry paste. Cook for another 1-2 minutes until well combined.

', '
Pour in the coconut milk and chicken or vegetable broth. Stir well to combine. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, fish sauce (if using), and sugar. Bring to a gentle simmer and cook for about 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
', '
While the broth is simmering, cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
', '
Add the sliced mushrooms and red bell pepper to the broth. Cook for another 3-4 minutes until the vegetables are tender. Stir in the baby spinach and cook until wilted, about 1 minute. Squeeze in the juice of 1 lime and stir to combine. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
', '
Divide the cooked ramen noodles into serving bowls. Ladle the spicy coconut curry broth and vegetables over the noodles. Top each bowl with halved boiled eggs, fresh cilantro, and green onions. Serve with lime wedges on the side and extra Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, if desired.\xa0
']

Name: mushroom-vol-au-vent-recipe
Ingredients: ['12 ready-made puff pastry shells', '2 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 small onion, finely chopped', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '8 oz mushrooms, sliced', '1/4 cup heavy cream', 'fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['

\xa0
Prepare the Vol Au Vent Shells: Preheat the oven according to the package instructions for the puff pastry shells. Place the shells on a baking tray and bake as per the instructions until they are puffed and golden brown. Set aside to cool.
', '
Make the Mushroom Filling: In a large skillet, melt the butter with the olive oil over medium heat. Add the finely chopped onion and cook until it becomes translucent, about 3-4 minutes.Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for another 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
', '
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the mushrooms are tender and any liquid has evaporated, about 5-7 minutes. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and mix well. Pour in the heavy cream and stir to combine. Cook for another 2-3 minutes until the sauce has thickened slightly. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove from heat.
', '
Assemble the Vol Au Vents: Carefully spoon the mushroom filling into the baked vol au vent pastry shells. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: italian-korean-pinwheels-recipe
Ingredients: ['4 large flour tortillas (10-inch size)', '16 slices deli salami', '8 slices deli ham', '8 slices provolone cheese', '1 cup shredded lettuce', '1/2 cup roasted red peppers, sliced', '1/4 cup chopped green onions', '1/4 cup chopped kimchi']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (cage-free eggs)']
Procedure:
['


Lay out the flour tortillas on a flat surface. Evenly spread about 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread over each tortilla, leaving a small border around the edges.
', '
Place 2 slices of salami on each tortilla, followed by 2 slices of ham and 2 slices of provolone cheese. Sprinkle the shredded lettuce, roasted red peppers, chopped green onions, and chopped kimchi evenly over the meats and cheese.
', '
Starting from one edge, tightly roll up each tortilla into a log shape. Ensure the roll is tight to keep the filling from falling out.
', '
Wrap each tortilla roll in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes. Chilling will help the rolls hold together better when sliced.
', '
Starting from one edge, tightly roll up each tortilla into a log shape. Ensure the roll is tight to keep the filling from falling out.
', '
After chilling, remove the plastic wrap and slice each roll into 1-inch thick pinwheels. Place on serving a platter and drizzle with additional Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-garlic-beef-noodles---slow-cooker-edition
Ingredients: ['1 lb.  Diced Chuck Roast, or stew meat', '450 ml Boiling water, divided', '8 oz. Dried noodles', '1 Green pepper, Sliced', '½  cup Sugar snap peas, Halved', '---To serve---', 'Spring onions, Chopped', '1-2 tbsp Sesame seeds']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '8 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '6 Tbsp. Honey', '6 Tbsp. Tomato ketchup']
Procedure:
['

Place the beef, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce,  Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, honey, ketchup, and 150ml of water into the slow cooker and stir well.
', '
Place lid on and cook on HIGH for 3.5 hours or LOW for 5.5 hours. When the beef is tender, add the remaining 300ml of boiling water, the dried noodles, the sliced pepper and sugar snap peas to the slow cooker.
', '
Stir everything together well, replace the lid and cook until the noodles are just cooked, about 30 minutes. (You may need to stir as it cooks a couple of times.)
', '
Serve garnished with green onions and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: japanese-style-croquettes-recipe
Ingredients: ['--- Potato Filling ---', '3 cups of mashed potatoes', '1/2 cup ground beef or pork', '1 small onion, finely chopped', '1 carrot, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 green onions, finely chopped', 'Salt and pepper to taste', '--- Coating ---', '1/2 cup all-purpose flour', '2 eggs, beaten', '1 cup panko breadcrumbs', '--- Frying ---', 'Vegetable oil, for frying']
Procedure:
['

In a skillet over medium heat, cook the ground beef or pork until browned and fully cooked. Drain any excess fat. Add the chopped onion, carrot, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
', '
Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Cook for another 1-2 minutes. Add the cooked mixture to the mashed potatoes. Mix well to combine. Stir in the chopped green onions. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
', '
Form the Croquettes: Take a small handful of the potato mixture and form it into a patty or oval shape, about 2-3 inches in diameter. Repeat with the remaining mixture.
', '
Prepare the Coating:Set up a breading station with three shallow dishes: one with flour, one with beaten eggs, and one with panko breadcrumbs. Dredge each croquette in the flour, shaking off any excess. Dip it into the beaten eggs, then coat it with the panko breadcrumb mixture, pressing lightly to adhere.
', '
Fry the Croquettes: In a large skillet or deep fryer, heat vegetable oil to 350°F. Fry the croquettes in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove and drain on paper towels.\xa0
', '
Serve the croquettes hot with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread. Enjoy!
']

Name: summer-garden-pasta-recipe
Ingredients: ['2 pints cherry tomatoes, halved ', '1 pound dried angel hair pasta', '1½ cups freshly grated Parmesan cheese, plus extra for serving']
Marinade: ['½ cup olive oil, plus extra for cooking', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '18 large basil leaves, julienned, plus extra for serving', '½ teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Combine the cherry tomatoes, ½ cup olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, basil leaves, red pepper flakes, salt and pepper in a large bowl.\xa0 Cover with plastic wrap, and set aside at room temperature for about 4 hours.
', '
Just before you’re ready to serve, bring a large pot of water with a splash of olive oil and 2 tablespoons salt to a boil and add the pasta.\xa0 Cook al dente according to the directions on the package (be careful – it only takes 2 to 3 minutes!).\xa0 Drain the pasta well and add to the bowl with the cherry tomatoes.
', '
Add the cheese and some extra fresh basil leaves and toss well.\xa0 Serve in big bowls with extra cheese on each serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-garlic-bread-meatball-toast-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 Frozen Texas Toast Garlic Bread', '1 lb. precooked thawed meatballs', '8 slices Mozzarella Cheese', 'dried Parsley, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 jar marinara sauce (16 oz)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook the garlic bread according to the package directions
', '
Add the cooked meatballs, marinara sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce to a pan over medium heat and bring to a simmer. Once simmering, cover with a lid and lower the heat.
', '
Remove the garlic bread from the oven when golden and press down the center with a spoon to form little bread bowls. Place 2-3 meatballs in each piece of garlic bread and top with additional sauce from the pan.
', '
Add a slice of Mozzarella cheese over the top of each of your meatball subs and place them back in the oven for a couple more minutes to melt the cheese.
', '
Top with dried parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-tahini-caesar-pasta-salad
Ingredients: ['16 oz rotini/fusilli, cooked according to package directions, cooled', '2 small chicken breasts (~3/4 - 1lb total), pounded to an even thickness', 'Salt and pepper, to taste', '2 hearts of romaine, chopped into bite-sized pieces', '1 1/2 cup cherry or grape tomatoes, halved', '1/2 small red onion, thinly sliced', '2/3 cup shredded Parmesan cheese ', '3 Tablespoons drained capers ', 'freshly cracked black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Heat a large grill pan over medium-high heat. Season chicken on both sides with salt and pepper then place inside grill pan and grill until cooked through, 3-4 minutes per side. Remove chicken to a cutting board then let rest for 10 minutes. Chop into bite sized pieces then refrigerate while you assemble the rest of the salad.
', '
Add all of the Spicy Tahini Caesar Dressing ingredients to a food processor and pulse until smooth. This dressing will be thick; but if you need to add a little more water to thin it out, feel free.
', '
To a very large mixing bowl add the chopped romaine lettuce, cherry tomatoes, red onion, shredded Parmesan cheese, capers, freshly cracked black pepper, cooled pasta, and Spicy Tahini Caesar Dressing. Stir with a spatula to evenly coat. Add cooled chopped chicken then fold to combine and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-crispy-potato-salad
Ingredients: ['4 lbs golden potatoes, cut into wedges', '½ teaspoon baking soda', 'Salt, to taste', '½ cup olive oil', '1 shallot, sliced', '½ cup parsley, chopped', '4 stalks green onions, sliced']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/ynEHX0oZBto
', '
Heat oven to 425°F. Place potatoes in a large pot of water with baking soda and salt. Bring to a boil and cook for 10-12 until potatoes are very tender. Remove from heat and fully drain.\xa0
', '
Return potatoes to pot and toss with olive oil. Using a wooden spoon or spatula, stir the potatoes, until a mashed potato–like paste has collected around each potato. (This will crisp up in baking.) Spread the potatoes on 2 sheet pans, making sure not to crowd them, then roast for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Remove pans from oven, gently toss the potatoes, then return to the oven for another 15-20 minutes until they are deeply browned and crisped. Remove from the oven and rest until you are ready to serve.\xa0
', '
Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine the dressing ingredients.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-cheeseburger-bombs-recipe
Ingredients: ['cooking spray, to coat muffin pan', '4 oz sharp cheddar cheese, cut into small cubes ', '1 green onion, sliced', '8 oz ground beef', '1 (16.3 oz) can biscuit dough', '2 tsp. sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. pickle relish', '1 Tbsp. mustard', '2 Tbsp. ketchup', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/pVUsoq-wU0Q
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F. Coat 16 cups of 2 muffin pans with the cooking spray.\xa0
', '
In a 10-inch nonstick skillet, cook the beef on medium heat for 6 minutes, until browned. Season with salt and pepper. Remove from heat and stir in the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, ketchup, relish, mustard, and green onion. Let mixture cool. Separate the biscuits and cut each in half to get 16 pieces.
', '
Roll and stretch each piece of dough until very thin. Spoon 1 tbsp of beef mixture onto center of dough. Place 1 cube of cheese on beef. Pinch dough tightly to close around filling. Place in 1 cup of muffin pan, seam-side down. Repeat with remaining biscuits and filling.
', '
Lightly coat tops with cooking spray. Sprinkle with the sesame seeds. Bake 15–20 min., until golden brown. Serve with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread for dipping, and enjoy!
\xa0
']

Name: spicy-stir-fried-rice-cakes-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 pound Korean rice cake (tteok), thawed if frozen', '2 small heads baby bok choy, chopped', '8 ounces mixed mushrooms (shiitake, oyster, cremini)', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, divided', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 stalks green onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. gochujang chili paste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for serving']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/4VYiW_4R5WU
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add bok choy and mushrooms; cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and browned, 5 minutes. Transfer vegetables to a plate.
', '
Add remaining 1 Tbsp oil and rice cakes to the skillet. Cook, turning occasionally, until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
', '
Push rice cakes to one side of the skillet. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and green onions; cook, stirring, until fragrant, 30 seconds.
', '
Return vegetables to skillet; add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, and gochujang. Toss gently to combine. Remove from heat, plate and top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-lobster-bisque-pasta-recipe
Ingredients: ['5 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '1 medium yellow onion, diced', '1 large celery rib, chopped', '1 large carrot, chopped', '1 medium Roma tomato, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 sprigs fresh tarragon, plus more for garnish ', '2 sprigs fresh thyme', '2 bay leaves', '¼ tsp. whole black peppercorns', '½ cup brandy', '½ cup sherry', '4 cups fish stock', '1 lb cooked lobster meat', '2 tablespoons tomato paste', '1½ cups heavy cream', '1 cup unsalted butter, cut into ½-inch cubes', '1 pound bucatini pasta, cooked, reserve pasta water']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste ', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzing']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/55s-8Y81NZ4
', '
Heat the oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat until hot. Sauté the onion, celery, and carrot until the onion becomes translucent and soft, about 8 minutes. Add the tomato, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, thyme, tarragon, bay leaves, peppercorns, brandy and sherry, stirring, until almost all liquid has evaporated, about an additional 6 to 8 minutes.
', '
Stir in the fish stock and bring to a simmer over medium-low heat. Continue to simmer the sauce, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes, until reduced by half.
', '
Remove the pot from the heat and pour the mixture through a fine sieve into a large saucepan, pressing on the solids to extract as much liquid as possible; discard the leftover solids.
', '
Whisk the tomato paste into the strained broth then whisk in the cream. Simmer for 15 minutes, until the broth is slightly thickened, stirring occasionally. Turn the heat down to low and season with salt and pepper, to taste. Begin to whisk in the butter one cube at a time until it has all been added to the sauce. Add the lobster meat, stirring to combine then remove the sauce from heat.
', '
Add the pasta and ½ cup of the pasta cooking water, tossing to coat. To serve, ladle the pasta with sauce into warmed pasta bowls. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with tarragon. Enjoy!
']

Name: aguachile-tostadas-recipe
Ingredients: ['1 lb. raw shrimp (peeled and deveined, tails removed)', '2 large limes', '1/4 red onion, very thinly sliced', 'water, to cover onion', 'white vinegar, a splash ', '1 1/2 cups sliced English cucumber', '2 radish, sliced', '1 avocado, sliced, for serving', 'cilantro leaves, a little, for serving', 'olive oil, a drizzle ', '1 bag tortilla chips or mini tostadas']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste']
Marinade: ['1/2 cup fresh lime juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 cup cilantro, packed', '2 jalapeños, sliced in half lengthwise', '1 serrano chili, sliced in half lengthwise ', '1 tsp. kosher salt']
Procedure:
['
Slice the shrimp in half (lengthwise) and remove any veins or tails.\xa0 Place in a shallow serving dish in one layer if possible. Squeeze with enough lime to cover the shrimp- which will cook the shrimp, turning them slightly pink. Sprinkle with a little salt. Turn shrimp over as needed to cook both sides in the lime juice – this will take about 20-30 minutes.
', '
Place red onion in a bowl and season generously with salt. Pour just enough water to cover the onions. Add a splash of white vinegar to enhance and bring out the red color of the onion.
', '
Make the Aguachile Marinade: Place the marinade ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth, for a full minute, scraping down sides as necessary. If you have excess lime juice marinating the shrimp you can use some of this in the blender to make your ½ cup.
', '
Pour the aguachile marinade over the shrimp and toss to coat. Drain the onions and scatter them over top, mixing them in slightly. Add cucumber and radishes. Refrigerate for 30 minutes or up to 4 hours. This is best served cold!
', '
When ready to serve, add avocado slices to the top, scatter with fresh cilantro and a drizzle of olive oil.
', '
Serve with tortilla chips or mini tostadas on the side. Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-spicy-sloppy-joe-pockets
Ingredients: ['--- Yogurt Slaw ---', '1 head napa cabbage, sliced', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '1/2 cup shredded carrots', '1/4 cup chopped cilantro', '--- Sloppy Joe Mixture---', 'olive, a drizzle', '1 onion, diced', '1 Tbsp. Thai chili pepper, sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 pound ground turkey', '1 pound ground beef', 'Salt and pepper to taste', '--- To Serve ---', 'bread and butter pickles, as desired', '2 Pita bread, halved (heat up and buttered if desired)']
Seasoning: ['--- Sloppy Joe Mixture ---', '2 tablespoons tomato paste', '1 tablespoon smoked paprika', '1/3 cup brown sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 tablespoons apple cider vinegar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/mXViWMdAjZw
', '
Yogurt Slaw:\xa0In a large bowl, toss together the cabbage, carrots and cilantro. In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, honey, Chili flakes, vinegar, salt and pepper. Stream in the olive oil while whisking until the mixture comes together. Pour the dressing over the slaw, tossing well to coat.
', '
Sloppy Joe Mixture: Heat a large skillet over medium-low heat and add a drizzle of olive oil. Stir in the onion, thai chili pepper and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook until the onions soften, about 5 to 6 minutes. Increase the heat to medium and add in the turkey and beef, using a wooden spoon to break it apart and combine it. Cook until browned. Stir in the tomato paste, paprika and brown sugar. Stir in the tomato puree, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and apple cider vinegar. Cover and cook for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring often.\xa0
', '
To Serve: Layer the slaw and pickles in the pita bread, then spoon the Sloppy Joe mixture on top. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: thai-style-glass-noodle-salad
Ingredients: ['2 oz bean thread noodles, soaked in water for 10 minutes ', '4 shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1/2 lb ground pork ', '1 Roma tomato, sliced and seeds removed', '1 shallot, sliced thin', '2  stalks celery, sliced thin', '2 stalks green onion, sliced into 1-inch pieces ', '2 Tbsp. roasted Peanuts']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/UQW9-8cuqdQ
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Oyster Flavored Sauce, Fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, and chili flakes together in a small bowl.\xa0
', '
Bring a small pot of water to a boil. Place softened noodles in boiling water and cook for 30 seconds. They should be soft and clear at this point. Drain and place in a mixing bowl. With the same boiling water, reduce the heat to a simmer and add shrimp. Cook gently for about a minute or until shrimp are pink. Remove and place in the same bowl with noodles.
', '
Empty the water from the pot and fill it up with fresh water until it covers a thin layer on the bottom of the pot. Heat on medium and add ground pork to the pot with water. Break up the pork and keep stirring until the pork is fully cooked.
', '
In the mixing bowl with the noodles and shrimp, add the cooked pork with some of the cooking liquid. This prevents the salad from being too dry.
', '
Add the dressing ingredients, sliced tomatoes, shallots, celery, and green onions to the mixing bowl. Toss to incorporate. Transfer to a plate and top with roasted peanuts. Serve immediately and enjoy!
']

Name: loaded-tater-tot-bites
Ingredients: ['16 oz bag frozen tater tots ', '¾ cup cheddar cheese, shredded', '4 slices bacon, cooked and crumbled, for topping', 'chives, sliced, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/yXjjbo1O_Yk
', '
Preheat oven to 450ºF. Spray mini muffin pan cups with cooking spray. Place 2-3 tots in each muffin cup.
', '
Place muffin pan on bottom rack of the oven and bake for 10 minutes. Remove the pan from the oven.
', '
Spray bottom of shot glass or small juice glass with cooking spray. Use it (in a twisting motion) to press the tots in each muffin cup to make potato cups. Return to the oven; bake for an additional 15 minutes or until deep golden brown.
', '
Add 1 tablespoon of cheese to each potato cup. Bake for 4-5 minutes, or until the cheese has melted. Transfer to a platter and let cool for 5 minutes.
', '
Add a squeeze of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, sprinkle of bacon, drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and sprinkle of chives to each loaded tater tot appetizer cup. Serve warm and enjoy!
']

Name: 8-cheese-loaded-kimchi-grilled-cheese
Ingredients: ['4 slices Texas toast, or thick sliced sandwich bread', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 slices medium cheddar cheese', '2 slices Gouda cheese', '2 slices Havarti cheese', '2 slices Muenster cheese', '½ cup kimchi, at room temperature', '2 slices sharp cheddar cheese ', '2 slices pepper jack cheese', '2 slices swiss cheese', '2 slices smoked provolone cheese\t']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
["

If you're looking to try something new and delicious, this Kimchi Grilled Cheese recipe is perfect for you. Combining the classic comfort of grilled cheese with the bold flavors of kimchi, this dish is a mouthwatering twist on a favorite sandwich. This Kimchi Grilled Cheese recipe is not only new and delicious but also a fantastic way to elevate your grilled cheese game. Perfect for lunch, dinner, or a savory snack, it's a must-try for anyone looking to add a unique twist to their meals.




", '
In a small bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Gluten-Free Sriracha Mayo, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Set aside.
', '
Spread 1/2 Tbsp of butter on one side of each slice of bread. Flip bread over and spread the sauce mix on two slices.
', '
Layer the inside of the two pieces of bread with 1 slice of the medium cheddar cheese, Gouda cheese, Havarti cheese and Muenster cheese then top with 2 tablespoons of fresh kimchi. Top the kimchi with the remaining slices of sharp cheddar cheese, pepper jack cheese, swiss cheese, and smoked provolone cheese. Top with remaining slice of bread, butter side up.
', '
Set a skillet over medium/low heat and place sandwiches in the skillet with the butter-side-down.\xa0
', '
Cover and continue cooking until the bread is a rich golden brown, flipping once and press down lightly to help the bread stick to the cheese. About 5 minutes per side. Once you see the cheese has melted and breads are browned, remove to a plate and cut in half diagonally to serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: jalapeno-popper-pretzel-dogs
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. yeast', '1 cup hot water', '3 Tbsp. white sugar', '1/4 cup olive oil', '1 tsp salt', '3 cups all purpose flour', '4 jalapenos, finely diced', '2 ½ cups shredded cheddar cheese', '12 hot dogs', '8 cups water', '4 Tbsp. baking soda', '1 egg, beaten', 'Kosher Salt', '1 jalapeno, sliced']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. cream cheese, softened to room temperature', '1 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread', '1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/UR-TDHKcWQs
', '
Preheat oven to 375 F. Add the yeast, hot water, oil and sugar to a large bowl and mix. In a separate bowl combine the flour, and salt. Add to yeast mixture. When dough forms a ball, place on counter and knead for a few minutes until smooth. Divide dough into twelfths and let rest on the counter.
', '
In a small bowl, combine cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread, and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce.\xa0
', '
Roll each ball of dough into a 12 inch long rope. Flatten the rope until it is about an inch and a half wide. Spread a layer of the cream cheese mixture on the strip. Sprinkle a tablespoon or two of shredded cheddar and as many jalapenos as desired on the strip of dough. Wrap the dough around the hot dog, securing at both ends. Place on a greased cookie sheet. Let rise in a warm place for about 20 minutes.
', '
Bring water and baking soda to a boil in a large saucepan. Drop hot dogs into the water 2 at a time and boil for 45 seconds on a side. Remove from water back to the cookie sheet.
', '
Brush the dough with a beaten egg and sprinkle with kosher salt. Bake for 15 minutes or until deep brown in color. Remove and sprinkle with more cheddar cheese and Jalapeñoslices. Place back in the oven for 5 more minutes. When done, remove them immediately from the cookie sheet to a wire rack. They are best when enjoyed warm straight from the oven. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: ma-po-tofu-2
Ingredients: ['14 oz. soft tofu, cubed', '3 oz. ground pork', '2 green onions, chopped', '1 tsp. ginger, minced', '1 tsp. garlic, minced', '2 tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 tbsp. Sichuan peppercorns, toasted and ground']
Seasoning: ['1 pouch Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Ma Po Tofu']
Procedure:
['
Experience the rich flavors of Sichuan cuisine with this recipe for Ma Po Tofu. This dish combines soft tofu with a savory and easy sauce for a truly delightful meal. For best results, adjust the spice level with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil if desired, stir the tofu gently to prevent breaking, and for a vegetarian version, simply omit the pork and use vegetable broth.
Instructions

Prepare the Tofu: Cut the tofu into cubes, simmer in salted water for 2-3 minutes, then drain and set aside.

', '
Cook the Pork: Heat 1 tbsp. oil in a pan, cook ground pork until browned, then set aside.
', '
Sauté Aromatics: In the same pan, add remaining oil, sauté ginger, garlic, and green onions until fragrant.
', '
Prepare the Sauce: Add the Lee Kum Kee sauce for ma po tofu\xa0and broth to the pan, stir well and bring to a simmer.
', '
Combine and Thicken: Return pork to the pan, add tofu, simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in cornstarch mixture and cook until sauce thickens.
', '
Final Touch: Sprinkle with Sichuan peppercorns and garnish with green onions if desired.
\xa0
Serving Suggestions
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles. Enjoy the perfect balance of spicy, savory flavors in this Ma Po Tofu recipe.
']

Name: ebi-katsu-shrimp-burger
Ingredients: ['2 cups panko (Japanese breadcrumbs)', '2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil ', '12 large shrimp', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '¼ cup all-purpose flour ', '2 large eggs', '1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil ', '3 brioche burger buns, toasted', '3 leaves green cabbage, shredded ']
Sauce Mix: ['Tartar Sauce:', '¼ onion, minced', '8 cornichons, minced', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. white wine', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/9vswgUSUnp0
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F. Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Combine panko and extra virgin olive oil in a frying pan and toast over medium heat until golden brown. Transfer the panko to a shallow dish and allow to cool.
', '
Lay 12 large shrimp on the cutting board and make small incisions (⅛ inch, 3 mm) lengthwise and widthwise (in a grid pattern) on one side of the shrimp. Do not cut through. This helps the shrimp become more pliable and cook faster. Form a patty with 3–4 shrimp in a round shape that is about the size of your buns. If the shrimp is not pliable, make small incisions, so it’s easier to make a nice round shape. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Add olive oil to the eggs and beat to combine. Dredge each shrimp patty in the flour to coat completely and pat off the excess flour. Then, dip into the beaten egg. Transfer the shrimp patty to the toasted panko and coat the shrimp without losing the patty shape. Press on the panko flakes to make sure they adhere to the shrimp. You want to maintain the patty shape as much as possible. Scoop up the patty with a spatula and flip over to your hand to remove excess panko that might be sitting on the shrimp. Transfer to the baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
', '
In a bowl, combine the minced onion, cornichons, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, white wine and salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Place the ebi katsu on the bottom bun, followed by the shredded cabbage. Top with the tartar sauce and the top bun. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: popcorn-tofu

Name: pumpkin-balls-with-enoki-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['200 g Pumpkin (flesh in ball shape)', '150 g Enoki mushroom(s) ', '1 tsp. Garlic (minced)', '1 tsp. Red Chili (diced)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. corn starch ', '100 ml water ']
Procedure:
["
This Pumpkin Balls with Enoki Mushrooms recipe combines tender pumpkin with enoki mushrooms, creating a delicious and easy vegetarian dish that's perfect for any meal.
", '
Steam Pumpkin:

- Steam pumpkin balls for about 8 minutes until done. Keep warm.

', '
Prepare Sauce:

- In a pan, sauté garlic and red chili in 1 tablespoon of oil. Add enoki mushrooms and stir-fry until tender.

', '
Combine and Serve:

- Stir in the sauce mix: 2 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Sauce, 1 tsp corn starch, and 100ml water. Cook through until the sauce thickens. Pour over the steamed pumpkin balls and serve warm.


For more vegetarian recipes, visit Lee Kum Kee Recipes.
']

Name: chinese-vegetarian-kung-pao-tofu-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['14 oz. extra firm tofu', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 red bell pepper, cut into ½-inch pieces', '1 green bell pepper, cut into ½-inch pieces', '1 small red chili pepper, sliced and seeded', '1 tsp. cornstarch slurry', '2 tsp. sesame seeds, to garnish', '1 stalk scallion, sliced, to garnish', '2 Tbsp. roasted peanuts, optional']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegetarian Stir-fry Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan)', '¼ cup Shaoxing rice wine']
Procedure:
['
Use a paper towel to remove excess moisture from the tofu and chop the tofu into ¾-inch cubes.
', '
Heat the oil until it starts to smoke. Add the tofu and stir-fry for five minutes on all sides or until the edges are crispy and golden brown. Set aside.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Garlic\xa0and Lee Kum Kee\xa0Minced Ginger\xa0to the wok and toss until aromatic. Add the rest of the sauce mix (Low Sodium Soy Sauce,\xa0Sesame Oil,\xa0Vegetarian Oyster Sauce,\xa0Chili Bean Sauce, sugar, Shaoxing rice wine, and cornstarch slurry) stirring until the sauce has combined.
', '
Add the red bell pepper, green bell pepper and red chili pepper. Stir-fry for three minutes or until the bell peppers start to soften.
', '
Add the tofu, Shaoxing rice wine and the cornstarch slurry then stir-fry for two minutes. Continue to stir-fry for three minutes then quickly toss for one minute until the sauce has thickened. Place the tofu stir-fry on a dish and garnish with sesame seeds, green onions and peanuts. Serve and enjoy!


For more vegetarian recipes, visit\xa0Lee Kum Kee Recipes.
']

', '
Combine Ingredients:

Add Seasoning:

Name: vegetarian-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1/4 cup celery, shredded', '1/3 cup green peas', '3 eggs, beaten', '3 bowls cooked white rice']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', 'as appropriate white pepper', '1 Tbsp. sugar']
Procedure:
["
Looking for an easy, nutritious, and delicious meal? This Chinese vegetarian fried rice recipe is perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. Packed with vegetables like celery and green peas, this vegan fried rice is enhanced with Lee Kum Kee's vegan oyster sauce, making it both healthy and satisfying.
", '
Prepare Sauce Mix:

- Combine all the ingredients listed under Sauce Mix and set aside.

', '
Stir-Fry Vegetables:

', '
Cook Eggs:

', '
Add Rice:

', '
Combine and Serve:

Stir in the prepared Sauce Mix (Premium Soy Sauce,  Vegan Oyster Sauce, Mushroom Bouillon Powder,\xa0Pure Sesame Oil,\xa0Dark Soy Sauce, white pepper, and sugar)\xa0and add extra\xa0vegetarian oyster sauce\xa0to enhance taste. Toss everything together until evenly coated with the sauces. Serve hot.


For more\xa0vegetarian recipes, visit\xa0Lee Kum Kee.
']

Name: deep-fried-california-roll-rice-ball
Ingredients: ['10 oz. imitation crab meat, chopped', '1 medium avocado, diced', '4 cups cooked sushi rice', '1 (8 oz.) package cream cheese, softened', '2 cups panko bread crumbs', '1 cup canola oil, for frying, or as needed']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/5kdZw38AbeY
', '
Prepare filling: Toss crabmeat and avocado together in a bowl and place in the refrigerator to chill until needed.
', '
To the sushi rice, add cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, garlic salt, and pepper. Mix until well combined.
', '
Scoop out a golf ball-sized handful of the rice mixture and flatten it into a patty. Add about a heaping teaspoon of the avocado-crab filling into the center. Cup your hand and close the rice around the filling. Roll between your hands if needed to seal and get a good round shape; patch any holes with more rice if needed. Roll in bread crumbs until well coated. Repeat to make remaining balls (10-15)
', '
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 375°F. Add 1 to 2 balls to the hot oil at a time. If not fully submerged, let each side of the ball fry until golden brown, about 30 seconds per side. Remove to a paper towel-lined plate to drain. Continue to fry remaining rice balls.
', '
Drizzle the balls with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-hot-pot
Ingredients: ['1 lb. Boneless chicken thigh fillets, cut into 3 pieces ', '1 Tbsp. Vegetable oil', '4 oz. Pancetta (or un-smoked bacon), diced', '1 Celery stalk, sliced', '4 oz. Button mushrooms, halved', '8 ½ oz. Chicken stock', '1 Onion, sliced', '2 Garlic cloves, crushed', '2 Carrots, peeled and roughly diced', '3 Large tomatoes, skinned and chopped', 'Topping/Crust: 1 lb. Red skinned potatoes. ½ oz. Butter, melted. Chopped parsley, as garnish']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1½ Tbsp. Cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Mix the oyster sauce and cornstarch together, then add the chicken pieces and stir until they are evenly coated. Set the mixture aside.
', '
Preheat the oven to 375°F. In a large ovenproof casserole, heat the oil and cook the onion and pancetta or bacon over medium-low heat for 5 minutes until softened. Increase the heat, add the chicken pieces, and cook for 2-3 minutes, turning occasionally. Add the garlic and cook for 1 more minute.
', '
Add the remaining vegetables to the casserole along with the stock. Bring to a simmer, stirring well. Cover the casserole and place it in the oven for 30 minutes.
', '
Cut the potatoes into 1/4-inch slices. Increase the oven temperature to 400°F. Take the hot casserole out of the oven, remove the lid, and arrange the potato slices on top. Brush the potatoes with melted butter, then cook for another 30-40 minutes, until they are golden brown. Sprinkle with parsley before serving
']

Name: stir-fried-eggplant-potato-and-green-bell-pepper

Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '4 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic']
Procedure:
["
This easy eggplant recipe combines the unique textures and flavors of eggplant, potato, and bell pepper into a delicious and satisfying stir-fry. The potatoes and eggplant are deep-fried to achieve a crispy exterior with a tender interior, while the bell pepper adds a fresh, slightly sweet crunch. Enhanced with Lee Kum Kee's Vegetarian Oyster Sauce and a touch of sesame oil, this dish is perfect for a quick and tasty weeknight meal. Enjoy it with steamed rice or noodles for a complete and nutritious dinner.
", '
Preparation:

- Deep-fry the eggplant and potatoes separately until golden brown. Drain and set aside.

', '
Cooking:

- In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of cooking oil over medium heat.
- Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
- Add the sliced green bell pepper and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until slightly softened.

', '
Combining Ingredients:

- Add the deep-fried eggplant and potatoes to the skillet.
- In a small bowl, mix 1 tsp. cornstarch with 4 Tbsp. water to create a cornstarch mixture.
- Pour the cornstarch mixture, 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Sauce, and 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil into the skillet.
- Stir well to coat the vegetables and cook for another 2-3 minutes until the sauce has thickened and everything is well combined.

', '
Serving:

- Transfer to a serving dish and enjoy hot with steamed rice or noodles.

For more\xa0vegetarian recipes, visit\xa0Lee Kum Kee.
']

Name: stir-fried-fresh-mushrooms-with-mixed-peppers
Ingredients: ['9 oz. fresh mushrooms', '9 oz. green bell pepper, cut into chunks', '9 oz. red bell pepper, cut into chunks', '9 oz. yellow bell pepper, cut into chunks', '2 oz. onion, cut into chunks', '1 garlic cloves, diced', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']

Procedure:
['
Preparation:

\xa0
\xa0
\xa0
', '
