Name: couscous-salad
Ingredients: ['½ cup uncooked couscous', '½ cup chicken broth', '16 oz. (about 3 cups) frozen peas', '½ cup chopped parsley', '½ cup crumbled feta cheese', '½ cup chopped pecans']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/uKxpAeh1Nkk
', '
In a medium saucepan, bring the chicken broth and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce to boil. Remove the saucepan from the heat, stir in the couscous, cover and let sit for 10 minutes. Fluff with fork.
', '
While the couscous is cooking, heat a large pot of water to boil. In a medium bowl, create an ice bath with lots of ice and water, set aside. Add the frozen peas to the boiling water and let blanch for 1-2 minutes or until the peas turn bright green and are warmed all the way through. Drain in a colander, and immediately drop the peas into the ice water bath so they stop cooking. Drain from ice water before adding to salad.
', '
In a serving bowl, combine the fluffed couscous, peas, parsley, feta, and pecans.
', '
Combine the dressing ingredients for the basil vinaigrette in a blender, using a big pinch of salt and pepper. Blend until the dressing is smooth. Taste and adjust the salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Dress the salad immediately with the desired amount of dressing and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: braised-tofu-with-shiitake-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['6-8 pcs. shiitake mushroom ', '4 pcs. king oyster mushroom ', '14 oz. deep-fried tofu cube', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. dried green onion ', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic', '4 pcs.  bird’s eye chili ', '½ onion, sliced ', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '½ cup water']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce (Vietnamese Label) ', '1 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
This Chinese braised tofu and shiitake mushroom recipe is perfect for a flavorful, easy-to-make meal. Combining deep-fried tofu cubes with a mix of shiitake and king oyster mushrooms, this dish is enhanced with Lee Kum Kee’s\xa0Mushroom Oyster Sauce and Soy Sauce, delivering rich umami flavors. This mushroom with tofu recipe offers a satisfying and nutritious option for lunch or dinner.
', '
Prepare the Mushrooms:

- Wash and stem the shiitake mushrooms. Cube the king oyster mushrooms.

', '
Blanching:

- Blanch the tofu cubes, shiitake mushrooms, and king oyster mushrooms in boiling water for 1 minute. Drain well.

', "
Stir-Fry:

- Heat 3 tablespoons of cooking oil in a wok. Sauté dried green onion, garlic, and bird's eye chili until fragrant.
- Add sliced onion and sauté for another minute.
- Add blanched tofu and mushrooms to the wok.

", '
Season and Simmer:

- Add Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Sauce, Soy Sauce, and sugar. Stir well.
- Add ½ cup of water and simmer for 1 minute until the sauce reduces slightly.
- Mix cornstarch with water to create a slurry, then add it to the wok to thicken the sauce.

', '
Serve:

-\xa0 Serve hot with steamed rice.

For more\xa0vegetarian recipes, visit\xa0Lee Kum Kee.
']

Name: peanut-chicken-spring-roll-bowl
Ingredients: ['4 cups shredded romaine or cabbage', '4 carrots, shredded', '4 green onions, chopped', '1/2 cup fresh cilantro, chopped ', '1/2 cup diced mango', '2 Persian cucumbers, thinly sliced', '1/3 cup pickled jalapeños', '1/3 cup peanuts, chopped', '4 oz. vermicelli rice noodles, cooked according to package instructions ', '1-2 cups cooked shredded chicken', '1 avocado, chopped', 'lime wedges, for serving ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Z7a5I39YG4o
', '
In a large bowl, combine the lettuce, carrots, green onions, cilantro, mango, cucumbers, jalapeños, and peanuts.
', '
To make the peanut dressing. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix. Add water as needed to thin out.\xa0
', '
Pour 1/2 the dressing over the salad and toss to combine. Divide the salad between bowls. Top each with noodles, chicken, and avocado. Drizzle over more dressing and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Serve with lime wedges and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-gazpacho
Ingredients: ['4 large tomatoes ', '1/2 red onion', '1/4 white onion', '1 jalapeno pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tbsp olive oil', '2 cups tomato juice', '1 red pepper ', '1 yellow pepper ', '1 cucumber ', '2 tsp balsamic vinegar', 'juice from ½ lemon', '1/3 cup basil, chopped, for garnish', '1 cup cherry tomatoes, sliced in half, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, plus more for drizzling ', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a blender combine the tomatoes, red onion, white onion, jalapeno, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, olive oil, tomato juice, red pepper, yellow pepper, cucumber, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, balsamic vinegar, lemon juice Pulse until the mixture becomes a smooth consistency. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Pour into a bowls and garnish with cherry tomatoes and basil.
', '
Drizzle with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: vegetarian-chow-mein
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 oz. cabbage, julienned', '1 oz. carrot, julienned', '2 oz. celery, julienned', '1½ lb. Chinese fried noodles']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', 'White pepper to taste', '1 Tbsp. sugar']
Procedure:
["
Looking for an easy and delicious meal? This Vegetarian Chow Mein recipe is perfect for quick lunches or dinners. Combining fresh vegetables like cabbage, carrots, and celery with savory vegan sauces, this stir-fried noodle dish is both flavorful and nutritious. Enhanced with Lee Kum Kee's Premium Dark Soy Sauce, Mushroom Oyster Sauce, and Pure Sesame Oil, it delivers a delightful vegan meal that’s sure to satisfy your taste buds.
", '
Prepare Sauce Mix:

- Combine all ingredients under the Sauce Mix and set aside.

', '
Stir-Fry Vegetables:

- Heat 3 tablespoons of cooking oil in a wok at medium heat.
- Add the julienned cabbage, carrots, and celery. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until slightly softened.

', '
Add Noodles:

- Add the Chinese fried noodles to the wok. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until noodles are heated through and mixed well with the vegetables.

', '
Mix in Sauce:

- Pour the Sauce Mix over the noodles and vegetables. Stir well to coat everything evenly.
- Add 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil. Mix thoroughly and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes

', '
Serve:

- Transfer to a serving dish and enjoy hot.

For more\xa0vegetarian recipes, visit\xa0Lee Kum Kee.
']

Name: bang-bang-orange-shrimp
Ingredients: ['2 cups shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '⅓ cup panko breadcrumbs', '½ cup all-purpose flour', '½ cup cornstarch', '¼ tsp. paprika', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '½ tsp. onion powder', 'vegetable oil, for frying', 'sliced green onions for garnish', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds for garnish']
Marinade: ['¾ cup buttermilk', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Add the shrimp, buttermilk, salt and pepper to a bowl. Let the shrimp sit in the buttermilk for about 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, mix together the panko, flour, cornstarch, paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder. Heat a pot filled with about 2 inches of vegetable oil to 350˚F.
', '
Working in batches, remove the shrimp from the buttermilk and allow any excess liquid to drip off. Dip the shrimp into the panko and flour mixture, making sure that it is completely coated. Dust off any excess flour then gently add it to the hot oil.
', '
Fry the shrimp until golden brown. Remove them from the oil and place them onto a baking sheet lined with paper towels to drain.\xa0
', '
Transfer the fried shrimp to a bowl then add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken. Toss the shrimp and sauce together until evenly combined.\xa0
', '
Serve with your choice of sides garnish with sliced green onions, white sesame seeds, and black sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-chili-cheese-fries
Ingredients: ['32 oz. frozen french fries, prepared according to package directions', '2 cups shredded cheddar cheese', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling', 'sour cream, for topping', 'green onion, a little, sliced for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['Chili:', '1 tsp. vegetable oil', '1 lb. ground beef', '1/2 cup onion, finely diced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 (15 oz.) can diced tomatoes ', '2 (8 oz.) cans tomato sauce', '1/2 cup beef broth', '1 Tbsp. chili powder', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '1 tsp. cocoa powder', '1/2 tsp. brown sugar', 'salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste', '1 (15 oz.) can kidney beans, drained and rinsed']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/tp1AIgFHhP8
', '
Heat the oil in a large pot over medium high heat. Add the ground beef and season with salt and pepper. Cook, breaking up the meat with a spoon, for 3-4 minutes. Drain off any excess grease. Add the onion to the pot and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until softened. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for 30 seconds. Add the diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, beef broth, chili powder, ground cumin, smoked paprika, cocoa powder, brown sugar and salt.\xa0
', '
Bring to a simmer. Cook for 30-40 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until chili has thickened. Add the kidney beans and cook for another 10 minutes. Taste and add more salt and pepper if desired.
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F.
', '
Add the cooked fries to a cast iron skillet and spoon 1 1/2 cups of chili over the fries, then top with cheddar cheese. Return the fries to the oven. Bake for 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), top with sour cream and garnish with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-spicy-steak-fettuccine
Ingredients: ['1 lb. fettuccine, cooked according to package directions. Reserve ½ cup pasta water. ', '1 lb. sirloin steak', '2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil ', '2 Tbsp. butter', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 cups heavy cream ', '1 Tbsp. freshly chopped parsley', '½ cup freshly grated Parmesan', '1 cup halved cherry tomatoes', '½ cup baby spinach', 'balsamic glaze, for drizzling']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/cfPDdEiRzOQ
', '
Coat both sides of steak with oil and season generously with salt and pepper. In a large pan over medium-high heat, cook steak until your desired doneness, 4 minutes per side for medium rare. Transfer to a plate to let rest, 10 minutes, then thinly slice.
', '
Meanwhile, make alfredo sauce: Add butter to pan and let melt, add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and cook until fragrant, 1 minute. Add heavy cream and simmer until thickened, 5 minutes. Add parsley and Parmesan and season with salt and pepper. Add tomatoes and cook down 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add cooked pasta to sauce and toss until coated, then add spinach and toss until wilted.\xa0 Add pasta water as needed.\xa0
', '
Top with sliced steak and drizzle with balsamic glaze and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: baked-parmesan-edamame
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups shelled edamame, cooked according to package directions', '½ cup all-purpose flour', '2 large eggs', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup panko breadcrumbs', '½ cup grated Parmesan cheese']
Marinade: ['salt, to taste', '1 pinch chili powder', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ggs7MTQqTBs
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F, line a baking sheet with parchment paper.\xa0
', '
Sprinkle the edamame with flour, salt and chili powder. Toss to combine. In a medium bowl combine the eggs and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Beat to incorporate. In a separate large bowl, add the Panko breadcrumbs, Parmesan and stir to combine; set aside.
', '
Using a slotted spoon, add about half the floured edamame to the eggs for a quick dunk. Remove edamame from eggs and transfer to breadcrumb mixture. Toss with spoon or hands to coat evenly.Place edamame on prepared baking tray, spaced evenly and without touching if possible. If there are large clumps of more than 2 to 3 edamame stuck together, break them apart with your fingers. You want the oven air to circulate freely on all pieces so they get as crispy as possible. Repeat battering process with remaining edamame and place on baking tray.\xa0
', '
Bake for about 12 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Start watching closely after 9 minutes and watch so the undersides don’t become overly browned or burn.
', '
Drizzle the bites with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: banh-mi-hot-dogs
Ingredients: ['1 pound all-beef hot dogs, 4 total', '4 brioche hot dog buns', '1 cup carrots, julienned', '1 cup daikon radish, julienned ', '¼ cup roughly chopped cilantro leaves', '¼ cup roughly chopped basil leaves', '1 Persian cucumber, julienned', 'Sliced, seeded jalapeños']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce ', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 teaspoon fish sauce', '2 green onions, finely chopped']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl combine all of the sauce mix ingredients and whisk until smooth.
', '
Preheat the grill to medium/medium-high heat. Place the hot dogs on the grill, and cook, turning every so often, until they’re lightly charred on all sides, about 5 minutes.
', '
Place the hot dog buns on the upper rack of the grill until lightly toasted.
', '
Place the hot dog in the bun and drizzle with sauce. Layer on the veggies, cilantro, basil, cucumbers and jalapeños. Serve immediately and enjoy!
']

Name: bacon-parmesan-egg-clouds
Ingredients: ['4 eggs', '¼ cup parmesan cheese, grated', '¼ cup cooked bacon, crumbled', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup green onions or chives, sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt & black pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/ylow_G1XlC4
', '
Preheat your oven to 450°F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Carefully separate the egg whites from the egg yolks. Place the whites in a large mixing bowl and place each yolk in a separate small ramekin.
', '
Next use an electric mixer to beat your egg whites until stiff peaks form. (About 2 minutes.) Then gently fold in your parmesan cheese, bacon bits, green onions/chives, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic.
', '
Spoon 4 mounds of your egg white mixture onto your prepared baking sheet and make a small well in the center of each with the back of a spoon.
', '
Place the baking sheet in the oven and bake for 3 minutes. Once done, remove the pan from the oven and place a yolk in the center of each well. Then return the pan back to the oven and cook for 3-5 more minutes or until the yolks are cooked to your liking.
', '
Season with salt and pepper to taste then serve with extra sliced green onions/chives and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy! 
']

Name: chili-oil-feta-egg-taco
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/4 cup feta crumbles', '1 egg', '1 flour tortilla', '1/2 ripe avocado, smashed', '1 tsp. fresh lime juice', '½ pickled onion', 'drizzle of honey']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/hDqwBZZN-EA
', '
Preheat a skillet to medium to low heat. Add in a small drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté for one minute then carefully add in the feta crumbles creating a circle with a hole in the center.\xa0
', '
Next, crack an egg in the center of the feta crumbles and then drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Cover and let the egg cook for 3-5 minutes.
', '
In the meantime, toast a tortilla on the stove top and then add on smashed avocado and a squeeze of lime juice.
', '
Using a spatula, carefully scrape out the crispy fried egg and place it on top of the avocado smashed tortilla. Then top with pickled onions.
', '
Drizzle with honey and more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: airfryer-rice-balls
Ingredients: ['3 large eggs, divided', '⅔ cup grated Parmesan cheese', '1/2 cup Italian cheese blend', '⅓ cup butter, melted', '2 ½ cups cooked rice, cooled', '2 oz. fresh mozzarella cheese, cubed', '1 cup panko bread crumbs', 'nonstick cooking spray']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ tsp. and 1 pinch ground black pepper, separated', '½ tsp. Italian seasoning', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/5t89DOn9nIo
', '
Beat 2 eggs lightly in a large bowl. Stir in Parmesan cheese, Italian cheese blend, butter, rice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and ¼ teaspoon of pepper; mix to combine. Cover and refrigerate the mixture for 20 minutes.
', '
Preheat an air fryer to 370°F.
', '
Roll mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls. Press a mozzarella cube into the center of each ball and reshape.
', '
Combine bread crumbs, Italian seasoning, salt, and remaining pepper in a shallow dish. Beat remaining egg lightly in a second bowl. Dip each rice ball first into the egg, then roll in the bread crumb mixture. Place rice balls in air fryer basket and spray with cooking spray.
', '
Cook in the preheated air fryer for 6 minutes. Increase temperature to 400°F and air fry for 3 more minutes. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-chicken-noodle-bowl
Ingredients: ['7 oz. dried egg noodles', 'cooking oil spray', '1 lb. uncooked chicken breast, slice into thin strips', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 red pepper, sliced into thin strips', '1 zucchini, sliced into thin strips', '1 carrot, sliced into thin strips', '¼ green cabbage, shredded', 'crushed peanuts, for topping ', 'mint, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and black pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '¼ cup water']
Procedure:
['
Cook the noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
', '
Whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar and water, set aside.
', '
Heat a large frying pan or wok over a medium-high heat, spray with cooking oil spray, add the chicken, a little pinch of salt and black pepper, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and cook until lightly browned. Remove and set aside.
', '
Add the red pepper, zucchini, carrot, and green cabbage, and stir fry for a couple of minutes.
', '
Add back in the chicken, noodles, and the sauce, and continue to stir fry for a minute or two until everything is well coated in the sauce. Sprinkle with the peanuts and garnish with mint, serve and enjoy!
']

Name: korean-style-potato-salad-sando
Ingredients: ['2 russet potatoes, baked and cooled enough to handle', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. milk', '1/2 tsp. rice or apple cider vinegar', '2 pieces thick deli ham, medium diced', 'Korean pickled veggies, for serving ', '⅓ cup green onions, diced', '½ cup kimchi, diced', '2 croissants, toasted and halved']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. sea salt', 'Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/J8haZCG3Dww
', '
Remove flesh from potatoes and mash the potatoes until smooth using a potato masher. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, salt, Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, sugar, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), and milk and mix. Start with 2 Tbs milk and 1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and see if you like the consistency. Also add a splash of vinegar. It should be like very creamy wet mashed potatoes. Add more milk if needed.
', '
Add the ham, pickled vegetables, green onions, and kimchi to the potato salad and mix. Adjust seasoning as needed.
', '
Fill your croissants with the potato salad filling. Be sure to stuff a lot so you get a good bread to salad ratio. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: breakfast-croissant-boats
Ingredients: ['4 large croissants', '5 eggs', '2 Tbsp. milk', '6 strips cooked bacon, chopped', '3 Tbsp. green onion, plus more for garnish', '7 Tbsp. cheddar cheese']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Q8gdlcP6nO8
', '
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a nonstick baking mat.
', '
Cut the top of each croissant with a knife.
', '
In a medium bowl, beat eggs with milk. Add Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, bacon, green onion, and cheese, and combine well.
', '
Spoon the egg-bacon mixture into the prepared croissant boats. Place them on a baking sheet.
', '
Bake in the oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown and egg mixture is set. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and garnish with more green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: flower-omelet
Ingredients: ['olive oil, a drizzle', '1 large egg, yolk and white separated', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4-5 cherry tomatoes, halved ', '1 carrot, cut into flowers', 'chives, for garnish', 'parsley leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/AgtGh6kxCjA
', '
Lightly oil a small pan, and heat over low heat.\xa0
', '
To the egg whites, add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and mix well, then pour in pan and allow to slowly cook.
', '
In the pan, place halved cherry tomatoes into the shape of a flower and place egg yolk in the center of tomatoes.
', '
Place more tomatoes and carrot “flowers” around the pan to your liking.\xa0
', '
Decorate with chives and parsley to complete your “flower” omelet. Remove from heat. Top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-mustard-pork-chops
Ingredients: ['4 pork chops, 6 oz. each ']
Marinade: ['2 cups Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. toasted sesame oil ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 tsp. fresh ginger, peeled and grated', '1/4 cup fresh cilantro, minced ', 'pinch of salt and pepper ']
Sauce Mix: ['1⁄4 cup Dijon mustard ', '2 Tbsp. red wine vinegar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1/2 cup sour cream']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dGLDyEkXHks
', '
Prepare the grill by heating one side to high and the other to low.
', '
Whisk all marinade ingredients in a medium bowl. Place pork chops in a zip top gallon bag. Coat the pork chops liberally with the marinade and marinate for 3 hours and up to overnight in the refrigerator.\xa0\xa0
', '
Place the chops on the grill and grill for 5 minutes until you have a great grill mark. Baste then rotate a quarter turn after 4-6 minutes; this should create a nice crosshatch mark. Turn over then repeat the process. Baste every time you make a quarter turn.\xa0\xa0
', '
Start to take an internal temperature after both sides are seared and basted. If it does not reach 165°F, move the pork chop to the cooler side and close the lid to create a convection oven.\xa0\xa0
', '
The pork is ready when it registers 165°F on an instant-read thermometer. Combine the sauce mix ingredients to make hoisin mustard sauce and serve on the side for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: teriyaki-tofu-nigiri
Ingredients: ['1 cup cooked sushi rice ', '1/2 cup oil, for frying', '4 oz. firm tofu, cut into 15 thin rectangles of 1”×2”', '2 shallots, minced', '2 tsp. cornstarch diluted in 1 Tbsp. water', '2 sheets nori, cut into strips of a about 1” width']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['--- For Sweet Rice Vinegar ---', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '2 tsp. sugar', '1/8 tsp. salt', '--- For Teriyaki Sauce ---', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. maple syrup', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1/2 cup water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/RiInsmCFIks
', "
In a small bowl, mix the Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar with the sugar and salt. After 10 minutes, transfer the rice to a large mixing bowl, add the sweet rice vinegar to the rice and mix gently (you don't want to mash the rice). Cover with a damp towel and let the rice cool for about 1 hour, or until it is not warm anymore.
", "
Heat the oil in a deep skillet, or large saucepan. Once hot, add the tofu rectangles (make sure they don't touch each other) and fry for 5-7 minutes, or until the tofu gets a light golden brown color. Remove from the oil and transfer to a plate lined with parchment paper. To the same skillet, add the minced shallots and fry for 3-5 minutes, or until shallots are golden brown. Use a slotted spoon to remove from the oil and transfer to a plate lined with parchment paper to remove excess oil. Set aside.
", '
To a non-stick skillet, add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, maple syrup, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, water, Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Add the fried tofu as well and let simmer over medium heat for about 5 minutes. Dilute the cornstarch and add it to the skillet. Stir until the sauce has thickened and coats the tofu slices. Remove from heat and let cool a few minutes.
', '
To assemble: place a strip of nori on a cutting board. Place a slice of teriyaki tofu in the middle. Using slightly wet hands, take about 1 tbsp of the cooked sushi rice and shape it into a rectangle of 2”×1” (the same size as your slice of tofu). Place it on top of the tofu. Slightly wet the nori sheet and wrap it tightly around the tofu and rice. Flip and place on a serving plate. Repeat with the remaining tofu and rice. For extra flavor, feel free to brush the tofu with more teriyaki sauce.
', '
Top each nigiri with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), some fried shallots and serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: slow-cooker-kbbq-tacos
Ingredients: ['2 1/2 – 3 lb. beef bottom round or shoulder', '3 Tbsp. flour', 'tortillas, to serve', 'Asian slaw, to serve', 'extra limes, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 large onion, finely dice half and roughly chop the other half', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 cup rice wine vinegar', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1/4 cup brown sugar', '1/4 cup maple syrup', '1 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes', '1 tsp. chipotle powder']
Procedure:
['
Combine the sauce mix ingredients in a large bowl. Place liquid and beef in a large slow cooker. Cover and cook on low for 10 hours.
', '
After 10 hours, pour the liquid out of the slow cooker into a large saucepan. Bring to a simmer. Let the meat remain in the slow cooker, with the heat turned off.
', '
Stir the 3 tablespoons of flour into 1/4 cup of water. Whisk together so it is well combined and forms what resembles a paste. Slowly stir the flour/water paste into the saucepan. Continue simmering until the liquid has thickened to your liking.\xa0
', '
Return thickened liquid to the slow cooker. Use two forks to shred the meat and mix with the liquid.
', '
Build tacos with the meat and slaw on top of warmed tortillas. Serve with a squeeze of lime. Enjoy!
']

Name: brown-sugar-soy-sauce-citrus-cake
Ingredients: ['---For the orange brown sugar top---', '1/4 cup unsalted butter', '1/2 cup dark brown sugar, well packed', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 small navel oranges, sliced into ⅙-¼” rings', '--- For the cake batter ---', '1/3 cup unsalted butter', '1 ¼ cups dark brown sugar', '2 large eggs', '1 Tbsp. pure vanilla extract', '1 ½ cups flour', '1 ¼ tsp. baking soda', '1/2 tsp. baking powder', '1/4 cup cold water', '1/2 cup milk', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'finely grated zest of one orange', '--- Topping ---', 'vanilla ice cream, for serving ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/2yJTb-EvmL0
', '
Preheat oven to 350°F.\xa0
', '
In a 10” ovenproof skillet, melt ¼ cup butter with ½ cup brown sugar, whisking over low/medium heat. When butter has melted and sugar starts looking less grainy, let bubble while whisking for another 30 seconds or so. Whisk in 2 teaspoons Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and stir until even. Remove from heat. Gently lay the orange slices in one layer on the butter mixture, prettiest sides down. Set pan aside. In a separate container, melt the remaining 1/3 cup butter; set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large bowl, beat the remaining 1 ¼ cups brown sugar with the eggs. Beat in the melted butter until smooth, gradually adding vanilla extract. Sift the flour, baking soda and baking powder over the egg mixture. Begin to mix (batter will seem dry), gradually adding the milk, water and 3 tablespoons Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce as you go. Scrape bowl often with spatula as you mix well. Fold in orange zest until evenly dispersed. Gently pour batter onto the orange slices in skillet.
', '
Place pan in center of oven and bake for about 35 minutes, until center no longer jiggles when shaken and a wooden skewer or toothpick inserted in the middle comes out batter-free; a few moist crumbs are fine. (Begin checking at the 25-minute mark, since every skillet is different.) Carefully remove cake from oven (handle will be hot). Let cool in pan for 30 minutes to an hour, until pan is still quite warm but cool enough to handle. Loosen sides of cake with a butter knife and gently invert cake onto a large plate. Serve warm, cutting into pieces with a sharp knife straight through the orange slices.
', '
For premium texture, this cake is best eaten soon after baking; but if you must wait longer than noted above, leave it in the skillet until ready to serve (up to overnight). After it’s completely cooled, cover loosely with foil. When ready to serve, remove foil, place skillet over low-medium heat for about a minute to help loosen the oranges, then loosen sides with a butter knife and invert. For gooey deliciousness, warm the slices and serve with vanilla ice cream. Enjoy!
']

Name: korean-style-corn-on-the-cob
Ingredients: ['Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, for grill ', '4 ears of corn, husked', '¼ cup crumbled Cotija cheese', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup crema Mexicana or sour cream', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) ', '1 Tbsp. gochujang ', 'zest of 1 lime', '1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. chili powder, plus more for serving', 'kosher salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/EyBdylu2UKo
', '
Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; oil grate with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Grill corn, turning occasionally, until kernels are charred in spots and tender, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to a platter.
', '
Stir crema Mexicana or sour cream, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), gochujang, lime zest, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, chili powder and salt in a small bowl to combine.
', '
Using a brush or spoon, slather each ear with about 2 Tbsp. sauce. Sprinkle corn with more chili powder, then top with crumbled Cotija cheese and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil.
', '
Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over and any remaining sauce alongside. Enjoy!
']

Name: nasi-goreng-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. high temperature cooking oil', '12 pieces medium shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '2 large eggs', '4 cups day old rice', '2 green onions, bias sliced, save some for garnish', '3 Tbsp. cilantro leaves, save some for garnish', '1 ½ Tbsp. fried shallots (store bought), save some for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder']
Sauce Mix: ['For Sambal:', '3 Tbsp. shallots, diced', '¼ cup dried shrimp', '1-2 Thai chilies', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DFb11Fgb6bk
', '
Make Sambal: Add sauce mix ingredients into a mini prep food processor or mortar and pestle. Pulse or pound the ingredients until garlic and chilies are minced and all ingredients are combined. Set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large skillet, heat oil until a whisp of white smoke appears. Add the sambal and shrimp and cook for about 30 seconds until shrimp starts to turn pink. Crack eggs into the pan and scramble for about 20 seconds until barely set. Fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.\xa0
', '
Fold in rice; make sure not to break rice grains. Season with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder. Press and fold the rice as it sears against the skillet for about 2 to 3 minutes until fragrant. Make sure fold constantly mixing all the ingredients well.\xa0
', '
Fold in green onions, cilantro, and fried shallots, and toss for 30 more seconds. Remove from heat.
', '
Garnish with remaining green onions, cilantro, and fried shallots. Sprinkle Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder. Serve hot. Enjoy!
']

Name: ramyun-birria-burrito
Ingredients: ['3 packs Nongshim Shin Black Ramyun', '4 large flour tortillas', '1 cup shredded cheese (such as Oaxaca or Monterey Jack)', 'diced onion, to taste', 'chopped cilantro, to taste', 'optional: additional toppings like sliced avocado, salsa, or sour cream']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 onion, chopped', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 lb. beef chuck roast or beef shank, cut into chunks', '2 cups beef broth', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 Tbsp. ground cumin', '1 Tbsp. dried oregano', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v_0NbrN16tY
', '
Prepare the Birria: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook until softened. Add the beef chunks to the pot and brown on all sides.
', '
Stir in the beef broth, tomato paste, ground cumin, dried oregano, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Bring the mixture to a simmer. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and let the birria simmer for 2-3 hours, or until the beef is tender and falls apart easily. You can also cook it in a slow cooker on low for 6-8 hours. Once the beef is cooked, shred it using two forks. Keep the birria warm until ready to assemble the burritos.
', '
Cook the Nongshim Shin Ramyun noodles according to package instructions, including the veggie packet (but not seasoning packets). Drain the noodles and set aside. In a skillet, heat a little more oil over medium heat and add drained noodles and seasoning packets. Sauté until seasoning is completely distributed.\xa0
', '
Warm the flour tortillas in a dry skillet or microwave. Place a portion of the cooked Nongshim Shin Ramyun noodles in the center of each tortilla. Top the noodles with a generous amount of shredded birria beef. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the beef. Add diced onions, chopped cilantro and a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil.
', '
Fold the sides of the tortilla over the filling, then roll it up tightly into a burrito. Place burrito in a skillet to toast tortilla and melt the cheese. Serve with consommé liquid from the birria. Enjoy!
']

Name: elote-queso
Ingredients: ['2 cups fire roasted corn ', '1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped', '1/4 cup cotija', 'limes, for serving', 'tortilla chips, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['chili powder, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 jalapeño, minced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. flour', '1 1/2 cups evaporated milk ', '1 cup shredded queso quesadilla cheese', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/7luvJPPjQzY
', '
Heat the butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, jalapeño, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and sauté for 5 minutes.
', '
Add flour and stir until everything is coated – about 1 minute. Add the milk slowly and whisk until a smooth bubbly mixture comes together. Remove from heat and stir in the queso quesadilla cheese until smooth and melty, low and slow.
', '
Season with salt and stir in most of the corn. Arrange a little “elotes pile” on top: remaining corn, cilantro, cotija, and chili powder. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Best served warm with tortilla chips for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-adobo-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, separated', '½ yellow onion, sliced', '4 skin-on bone in chicken thighs', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, separated', '½ tsp. whole black peppercorns', '2 bay leaves', '½ cup white vinegar', '2 cups cooked rice, day-old and chilled', 'green onion, sliced thinly']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce ', 'salt, to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/-ebVRKulMB4
', '
In a medium size pan, around 8-inches, on medium heat, add 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Once oil is hot, add onions and cook until translucent. Move the onions aside and place chicken thighs skin side down. Allow the skin to brown for a few minutes. Do not move the chicken after it hits the pan, this will prevent your chicken from properly browning.
', '
Pour in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, black peppercorns, bay leaves and lastly white vinegar. For best results, do not stir the sauce as this prevents the acid from fully evaporating. Bring to a boil. Then cover and reduce low-medium heat or a rolling simmer for 10 minutes. Uncover the lid and flip the chicken over so the skin is facing up. Cover and simmer for another 10 minutes. Uncover the lid and continue to simmer for 3-5 minutes so the sauce can thicken a bit. Remove off heat. Shred the chicken.\xa0
', '
Heat the remaining Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a wok or a large frying pan to medium setting. Cook the remaining Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic until nicely browned but not burned. Add the shredded chicken and cook until heated up.
', '
Mix the prepared rice with the meat and stir-fry until rice is heated through. Season with salt to taste. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce. Garnish with some sliced green onions. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-pastitsio
Ingredients: ['14 oz. Pastitsio No. 2 pasta / Greek bucatini (sub small ziti, penne or normal bucatini), cooked according to package instructions ', '2 egg whites ', '4 oz. feta, crumbled', '3 oz. Kefalotyri Greek cheese (sub parmesan or Romano), finely grated ', 'basil leaves, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Sauce Mix: ['--- For Meat Sauce ---', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 red onion, finely chopped ', '2 lb. ground beef ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 (24 oz.) jar marinara sauce ', '1/2 tsp. cinnamon powder', '1/4 tsp. ground cloves', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '--- For Greek Bechamel ---', '7 Tbsp. butter, unsalted', '3/4 cup flour', '4 cups milk ', '⅛ tsp. nutmeg ', '3 oz. Kefalotyri Greek cheese (sub Parmesan or Romano), finely shredded ', 'salt, to taste', '2 egg yolks ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/s5QkKUfAj78
', "
Meat Sauce: Heat olive oil in a large pot over high heat. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and onion, cook for 2 – 3 minutes until onion is softened. Add beef and cook, breaking it up as you go, until it changes from red to brown. Add remaining meat sauce ingredients. Stir well, bring to simmer, then reduce heat to medium / medium low so it's simmering gently. Cook for 20 minutes until liquid is mostly gone, stirring every now and then. It should be a thick mixture with little liquid, not saucy. Remove from stove and cool.\xa0
", "
Greek Bechamel: Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add flour and stir for 1 minute. While stirring, slowly pour half the milk in. It should turn into a wet paste. Then again, while stirring, pour in remaining milk – the paste should easily dissolve so it's lump-free. If not, just whisk vigorously. Cook, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes or until thick enough so it coats the back of a spoon. Remove from stove. Stir in nutmeg, cheese and salt. Leave to cool for 5 minutes. Then whisk in egg yolks quickly. Place lid on and set aside. If sauce cools and gets too thick to pour, just reheat on a low stove until pourable.
", '
Stir in egg whites and feta with pasta.\xa0
', '
Preheat oven to 350°F. Place pasta in a baking dish arranging them so they are all going in the same direction as best you can (for visual effect when sliced). Make the surface as level as you can. Top with Meat Sauce, then smooth the surface. Pour over Béchamel Sauce, then sprinkle with cheese. Bake for 30 minutes or until crust turns golden.
', '
Cool for at least 10 minutes so you can cut neat slices with the layers neatly visible. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Garnish with basil leaves and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: calabrian-chili-pasta-with-burrata
Ingredients: ['1 small shallot', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. chopped Calabrian peppers', '½ cup tomato paste', '1 cup heavy cream', '¼ cup parmesan cheese', '1 Tbsp. fresh basil, finely sliced', '16 oz. fusilli corti bucati pasta', '1 cup reserved pasta water, as needed', 'burrata cheese, for topping', 'fresh basil leaves, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QTe2pHuyvBc
', '
Finely chop the shallot. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add in the shallots and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook until soft and aromatic, about 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in the Calabrian chili peppers and tomato paste until smooth and continue to cook for another 2 minutes. Slowly whisk in the heavy cream until fully combined, then reduce the heat to low. Stir occasionally and continue to cook until the sauce begins to simmer and thickens. Grate the parmesan and finely slice the basil. Add them into the sauce.
', '
While the sauce is cooking, bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook pasta for 2 minutes less than the package instructions. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water and drain.\xa0
', '
Add the al dente pasta and reserved pasta water to the sauce and toss gently to combine for 2 minutes or until the sauce thickens up and coats the noodles.
', '
Season with cracked salt and pepper. Serve immediately and top with creamy Burrata, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with fresh basil leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-chicken-bake
Ingredients: ['1 lb. pizza dough', 'all purpose flour, for dusting', '2 ¾ cups shredded low-moisture mozzarella, divided', '1 cup thick cut bacon, cooked, chopped', '2 cups cooked chicken, cut into ½” pieces', 'thinly sliced chives, to taste']
Seasoning: ['¾ cup ranch dressing, divided', '¾ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), divided', '¾ cup Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, divided', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/EcMCTP0neQQ
', '
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Use a knife or bench scraper to divide the dough into 4 equal pieces (about 4 oz. each). Lightly dust a clean surface with flour, then use a rolling pin to roll one portion of dough out to a roughly 7 x 10-inch rectangle with a shorter end closest to you.
', '
Use a spoon to spread about 2 tablespoons of ranch dressing over the center of the dough rectangle, 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, leaving a 2-inch border around the edges. Sprinkle ½ cup of mozzarella over the ranch dressing, followed by ¼ cup of bacon, then ½ cup chicken. Sprinkle another tablespoon of mozzarella and chives on top.
', '
Gently lift one of the longer sides of the dough up and over the filling, trying to wrap it as far over the filling as possible. Tuck a short end up and over the filling, as if rolling a burrito, and repeat with the other short end. Lift the other long side of dough up and over the filling as tightly as possible without tearing the dough, then lightly pinch and press the edges of the dough together to seal. Set the chicken bake seam-side down on the prepared baking sheet and repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 3 more chicken bakes.
', '
Use a pastry brush to generously brush the remaining ranch dressing over the tops of the chicken bakes, then sprinkle each with 1–2 tablespoons of mozzarella.
', '
Bake the chicken bakes until the tops are golden brown and bubbly and the dough has puffed up, 15–18 minutes. Let cool on the baking sheets for 5–10 minutes before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-shaved-carrot-salad
Ingredients: ['2 medium-sized carrots', '1 cup arugula', '5 red radishes, thinly sliced', 'squeeze of lime juice']
Procedure:
['
Use a vegetable peeler to peel the carrots into long, thin strips over a mixing bowl.
', '
To make dressing, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, rice wine vinegar, sesame seeds, sea salt, and black pepper.
', '
Toss carrot strips with the dressing, then mix in arugula and radishes. Enjoy immediately with an additional squeeze of lime. Enjoy!
']

Name: banh-mi-smash-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground pork', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. neutral oil', '¼ cup cilantro, finely chopped', '6-8 flour tortillas', 'To serve: julienned carrots, fresh cucumber, fresh jalapeno, cilantro leaves']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/PRJHQY7-6oE
', '
Mix the ground pork, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, fish sauce, oil, cilantro, and Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder\xa0together in a mixing bowl.
', '
Divide the pork mixture into 6-8 equal pieces (depending on how meaty you want each taco!). Use a fork to smoosh down a piece of pork onto a flour tortilla, then fry on an oiled and hot cast iron pan for 4 minutes or until brown (and almost charred). Flip and fry on the tortilla side for an additional 2 minutes until the tortilla starts becoming crispy.
', '
To assemble, top the meat side with carrots, cucumber, jalapeno, and cilantro leaves. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Fold and enjoy!
']

Name: crispy-salami-bites
Ingredients: ['20-25 pieces salami', '1/3 cup feta, crumbled', '1/3 cup kalamata olives, chopped', '1/3 cup cherry tomatoes, chopped', '1 Tbsp. capers, rinsed', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1/4 cup fresh basil, chopped, plus more for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Q0doxJ6ZnCc
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F.
', '
To a muffin tin add each piece of salami, pressing down slightly to create a cup. Bake in the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until the salami crisps and can hold shape. Once the salami is done, remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
', '
In a medium sized bowl combine the feta, olives, tomatoes, capers, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and olive oil.
', '
Scoop mixture into salami bites, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and top with fresh basil. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-vodka-gnocchi
Ingredients: ['2 lb. gnocchi ', '1/2 cup mozzarella cheese balls', '1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', 'fresh basil leaves, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. butter', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '6 oz. tomato paste', '1/4 cup vodka', '1 cup heavy cream', '1 cup chicken broth ', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/_HXf57tzk5Q
', '
Heat butter in a large oven-safe pan over medium low heat. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, sauté for 2 minutes. Add Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and tomato paste; sauté for 1-2 minutes. Add vodka; sauté for 1-2 minutes. Add cream, broth, and salt. Bring to a low simmer until the sauce coats the back of a spoon. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Prep the gnocchi according to package directions. Add to the sauce in the pan, and stir gently to combine.
', '
Preheat the oven to the broil setting (500°F). Arrange mozzarella balls over the top. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Bake for 5-8 minutes until very browned and slightly crisped on top. Sprinkle with basil leaves drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: spring-veggie-paella
Ingredients: ['1/4 cup olive oil', '1 large onion, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 cups Arborio rice', '1 cup dry white wine', '4 cups vegetable broth', '1 red bell pepper, diced', '1 yellow bell pepper, diced', '1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '1 cup asparagus, cut into 1” pieces', '1 cup snap peas, trimmed', '1 cup baby carrots, sliced', '1 cup artichoke hearts, quartered', '1/2 cup green onions, chopped', '1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped', '1 lemon, sliced']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', 'salt and black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a large paella pan or a wide, shallow skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, sautéing until softened.
', '
Stir in the Arborio rice and cook for 2-3 minutes until the rice is well-coated with the oil and slightly toasted. Pour in the white wine and let it simmer until mostly absorbed by the rice.
', '
Begin adding the vegetable broth one cup at a time, stirring frequently and allowing the liquid to be absorbed before adding more.
', '
Once the rice is almost cooked, add the diced bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, asparagus, snap peas, baby carrots, and artichoke hearts. Stir gently to combine. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, ensuring that all the ingredients are well-coated.
', '
Continue cooking until the rice is tender and the vegetables are cooked to your liking. Adjust the seasoning with salt and black pepper as needed. Garnish the paella with chopped green onions, fresh parsley, and lemon slices. Allow the paella to rest for a few minutes before serving, letting the flavors meld together. Enjoy!
']

Name: pineapple-hoisin-sliders
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef (use your favorite burger blend)', 'neutral oil, for greasing', '4 canned or fresh pineapple rings', '4 slices American cheese', '4 Hawaiian sweet rolls, split', '4 very thin slices red onion, plus more if desired', '1 Roma tomato, thinly sliced', '1 cup shredded iceberg lettuce', '1 cup Hawaiian sweet onion potato chips']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v7VmNF3AwpY
', '
Preheat a grill or large grill pan to high for about 5 minutes.
', '
Form the beef into four round patties, about 1/4 pound each. Season the patties generously with salt and pepper.
', '
Lightly oil the grates or grill pan with clean paper towels. Grill the pineapple ring, flip the pineapple rings when grill marks form, after about 1 minute and brush with more Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Grill the other side of the pineapple until grill marks form, about 1 more minute, then remove from the heat and set aside.
', '
Season the patties with salt and pepper. Grill the patties until you get nice deep char marks, about 3 minutes. Flip and brush with more Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, then top each patty with a cheese slice. When you hit your desired doneness, remove the patties from the grill and let them rest. Toast the rolls for 10 seconds on each side then remove to a plate.
', '
To assemble each slider, place a bottom bun on a plate. Top with a cheese patty then a pineapple ring. Top with onion, tomato and lettuce. Squeeze some Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) over each slider. Top with 1/4 cup of the potato chips, then gently press the top bun on it. Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-chicken-tostada
Ingredients: ['1lb. boneless, skinless chicken thighs ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '5 tostada shells, warmed in the oven ', '1 (14 oz.) can refried beans, warmed ', '1 cup guacamole', '1 cup Mexican cheese blend', '1 cup pickled onions', 'cilantro, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. smoked paprika', '1 tsp. cumin', '½ tsp. oregano', '1/2 tsp. onion powder', '½ tsp. garlic powder', 'salt, to taste', '1/4 tsp. cayenne pepper', 'pinch of black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. tomato paste ', '1 cup chicken stock', '1 Tbsp. lime juice ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. honey', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/_PSRFC6a3lg
', '
In a small bowl combine smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, cayenne pepper and a pinch of black pepper. Sprinkle over chicken thighs, then drizzle over 2 tbsp olive oil. Use your hands to fully coat the chicken thighs.
', "
In a large pan over medium-high heat add your chicken thighs. Leave to fry until they begin to char, then flip and continue frying until they're cooked right through the center and lightly charred on the other side. If they look like they're charring too fast turn down the heat slightly once you flip. Remove from pan and place in a bowl to one side.
", '
Turn heat to medium and add tomato paste. Stir and fry for 1-2mins, then add chicken stock, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and honey. Give it a good stir then simmer for 5 minutes, or until it begins to thicken. Shred chicken with two forks, then add to the sauce and simmer for another couple of minutes, until the chicken soaks up the sauce.
', '
Stack your tostadas in this order: Tostada shell, refried beans, guacamole, chicken, cheese, pickled onions, and cilantro. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and serve with lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: stuffed-artichokes
Ingredients: ['4 oz. hot Italian sausage', '1 ½ cups finely chopped red bell peppers', '1 finely chopped red onion', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¾ cup panko bread crumbs', '½ cup chopped parsley', '¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese', '4 large artichokes', '3 Tbsp. lemon juice', '½ cup water', 'fresh parsley, for garnish', 'lemon wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/GETuc6lShqg
', '
For filling, in a large skillet cook sausage over medium-high heat until brown, using a wooden spoon to break up meat as it cooks. Drain off fat. Add bell peppers and onion. Cook over medium heat for about 10 minutes or until tender, stirring occasionally. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and cook for 2 minutes. Stir in panko, parsley, and cheese; cool.
', '
Meanwhile, trim stems from artichokes so they sit flat and remove loose outer leaves. Cut about 1 inch off the top of each artichoke; snip off the sharp leaf tips. Brush cut edges with some of the lemon juice. Spread leaves apart, creating space for the filling. Using a spoon, scoop out the chokes; discard. Stuff filling between each leaf. Place any remaining filling on top of artichokes.
', '
In a 6-quart slow cooker combine the water and the remaining lemon juice. Place artichokes, filling sides up, in the cooker.
', '
Cover and cook on low-heat setting for 6 to 8 hours or on high-heat setting for 3 to 4 hours or until a leaf pulls out easily. Before serving, sprinkle with additional parsley. Serve with lemon wedges. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
']

Name: easy-crab-rangoon-dip-recipe
Ingredients: ['8 oz. package cream cheese, room temperature', '1/4 cup sour cream', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ of a lemon, juiced', '¼ cup chopped green onion', '1 cup freshly shredded cheddar cheese, divided', '1 lb. fresh jumbo lump crab meat', '---- Serving ideas ----', 'sourdough bread', 'crackers', 'tortilla chips', 'chopped cold veggies']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 1/2 tsp. Old Bay seasoning', '1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce', '1/4 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, or more, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
', '
Add cream cheese to a mixing bowl and beat until smooth. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), sour cream, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Old Bay seasoning, Worcestershire, lemon juice, green onion, and salt.
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, ¾ cup shredded cheddar cheese, and crab meat, and mix until smooth.
', '
Spread the mix into a 9″ pie dish or similar size baking pan and sprinkle remaining cheddar cheese on top. Bake for about 20 minutes or until the top is golden and bubbly.
', '
Serving with sourdough bread, crackers, tortilla chips, and/or chopped cold veggies. Enjoy!
\xa0
Jet Tila recipes are always delicious and simple - check out the recipes page for more of his ideas!
']

Name: creamy-puff-pastry-carrots
Ingredients: ['2 sheets puff pastry ', '1 Tbsp. milk', '2 egg yolks', '6 oz. asparagus tips', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 oz. cream cheese', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '7-8 slices thick deli ham or turkey']
Seasoning: ['1/4 tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/3HK0BVgmf5o
', '
Make Pastry Cones: Use metal pastry cones or make your own; Take a piece of paper and cut it in half. Roll each piece into a cone shape securing the sharp end with a piece of duct tape and tuck away any excess paper. The paper cone will give stability to the future pastry cones. Wrap the paper cone with a piece of aluminum foil. Place a small lump of foil inside the cone which will help keep the weight of the dough. As a result, you will have a homemade pastry cone.
', '
On a lightly floured surface, roll out each pastry sheet a little bit and cut into equal strips about 1-inch thick. Wrap the pastry around the cone, starting at the wide end with a 1/8-inch overlap of the layers, covering the form in a spiral. Place the cones onto a baking sheet.
', '
Whisk one tablespoon of milk with the egg and brush the wrapped pastry cones. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool on the baking sheet with the metal forms still inside then carefully remove the pastry cones from the cones.
', '
Place the asparagus on a baking sheet, toss with the olive oil and season with salt. Roast for 10-12 minutes. leave aside to cool.
', '
In a medium bowl, mix together the cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Spread the inside of your cone with cream cheese mixture. Wrap a slice of ham around 4-5 asparagus spears, then insert them into the cones. Enjoy with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)!
']

Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.

Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:

MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
