Name: baby-chick-mini-cheeseballs
Ingredients: ['8 oz. cream cheese, softened to room temperature', '2 cups finely shredded sharp cheddar cheese, divided', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '⅓ cup bacon, cooked and crumbled into very small pieces', 'shredded carrot or flat carrot pieces, for the feet and nose', 'almond slivers, for wings', '5-6 olives, cut into small pieces, for the eyes (or black peppercorns)', 'your favorite crackers, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', 'sea salt and black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/CnJQQe4JFdg
', '
In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, 1 cup cheese, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and bacon together with a hand mixer.
', '
Scoop and roll mixture into small round balls. Roll around until coated in finely shredded cheese.
', '
Cut small triangles of carrot for the nose and small pieces of carrot shreds for the feet. Put one sliver on each side of the cheese balls, pressing it in, for the wings. Place the very small pieces of olives (or peppercorns) for the eyes.
', '
Store in the refrigerator until ready to serve. Place on your favorite crackers just before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: maple-sausage-bread
Ingredients: ['5 eggs', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'splash milk', '1 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 loaf French bread', '1 cup shredded cheese of your choice', '16 oz. maple sausage', 'chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/ORVcg4wR550
', '
Mix eggs, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and splash of milk together in a large bowl.\xa0
', '
Add butter and olive oil in the pan and melt butter on medium-low heat. When ready add the egg mixture and cook for a few minutes but not fully.
', '
Carve a large cavity length-wise in the bread and hollow out, leaving a boat for your eggs and sausage. Layer cheese, then layer eggs and finally top with the sausage, making sure to cover the whole surface (sausage with shrink).
', '
Heat griddle or large cast iron pan on medium heat. Lightly oil and place bread, meat side down, on the hot griddle. Press the top with the spatula. Flip and repeat. Cook for 2-3 minutes per side. If sausage isn’t fully cooked, place in oven at 350°F until meat reaches 165°F.
', '
Slice and garnish with chives. Enjoy!
']

Name: shrimp-meal-prep
Ingredients: ['3 lb. jumbo shrimp, peeled and deveined', 'cooked vegetables, for serving']
Marinade: ['---- For Spicy BBQ ----', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 tsp. Creole seasoning', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 cup BBQ sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. lemon zest', '---- For Teriyaki ----', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup brown sugar', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '---- For Kung Pao ----', '⅓ cup low sodium chicken stock', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. sherry cooking wine ', '1 tsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KAmjEdXMkUY
', '
Prepare three different marinades: For each marinade, in a large bowl, combine marinade ingredients and 1 lb. of shrimp. Cover and refrigerate for up to 24 hours.
', '
For each marinated shrimp, grill over high heat, turning once, until shrimp is done, about 5-10 minutes depending on the size of the shrimp.
', '
Set out your meal prep containers. Add cooked vegetables of your choice and cooked shrimp to each container. Enjoy!
']

Name: asparagus-and-sausage-basil-pasta
Ingredients: ['8 oz. pasta of your choice', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. asparagus, trimmed and cut into bite-sized pieces', '1 lb. Italian sausage, casings removed', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '1/2 cup fresh basil leaves, torn', 'grated Parmesan cheese, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'salt and black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
', '
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the asparagus and cook for 2-3 minutes until slightly tender. Push the asparagus to the side and add the Italian sausage to the skillet. Break it into crumbles and cook until browned.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic to the skillet and sauté for 1-2 minutes. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and cook for an additional minute.
', '
Add the cooked pasta and halved cherry tomatoes to the skillet. Toss everything together to combine.
', '
Season the dish with salt and black pepper to taste. Add torn fresh basil leaves and toss again to distribute the flavors. Garnish with grated Parmesan cheese. Enjoy!
']

Name: cucumber-shrimp-bites
Ingredients: ['1 avocado', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 English cucumber, sliced into about 20 rings', '1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. olive oil, divided', 'cilantro, chopped for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1/4 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. cayenne pepper', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/9viKmNdq2ik
', '
In a small bowl, mash together avocado, lime juice, and ¼ teaspoon of salt until creamy. Divide the avocado mix over cucumber slices.
', '
Place shrimp in a large mixing bowl and pat dry with paper towels. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, cayenne pepper, salt and pepper, and 1 Tbsp olive oil. Mix to combine.
', '
Heat a large heavy pan over medium/high heat with remaining 1 Tbsp olive oil. Once oil is hot, add shrimp in a single layer and sauté for 2 minutes per side or until cooked through.
', '
Top each cucumber slice with a shrimp, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and garnish with cilantro.\xa0
', '
Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-and-guinness-stew
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 lb. beef stew meat, cut into bite-sized pieces', '1 large onion, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '1 bottle (14.9 oz.) Guinness beer', '1 cup beef broth', '2 bay leaves', '1 tsp. thyme leaves', '4 carrots, peeled and cut into chunks', '3 potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks', 'chopped fresh parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and black pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven at 325°F. In a large oven-safe pot, or Dutch oven, heat vegetable oil. Season beef cubes with salt and pepper then add to pot and sear beef in batches. Set aside.
', '
In the same pot, sauté chopped onions and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic (if the pan seems dry, add a little more oil). Sprinkle flour, stirring to create a roux. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
', '
Pour in Guinness beer to deglaze the pot, scraping up any browned bits.
', '
Return the browned beef. Add beef broth, tomato paste, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, bay leaves, and thyme leaves. Stir and cover. Braise in a preheated oven for 2 hours.
', '
After 2 hours, add carrots and potatoes. Continue braising for 45 minutes to 1 hour. Adjust seasoning, discard bay leaves, garnish with parsley, and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-shamrock-crisps-and-dip
Ingredients: ['flour, for dusting', '1 store-bought pie dough, thawed', '1 egg', '1 Tbsp. water', '3 Tbsp. fresh parsley', '⅓ cup parmesan cheese', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/FY4WzanXAzg
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly dust a cutting board with flour. Unroll your pie dough.
', '
Cut 12 shamrocks using a shamrock-shaped cookie cutter. Crack and whisk one egg with water. Brush the tops of each pie crust shamrock with egg.
', '
Finely chop parsley and grate the parmesan cheese. Combine Parmesan cheese, parsley, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and spread over top of each shamrock.
', '
Set your pie crust shamrocks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 7-9 minutes until golden brown.\xa0
', '
Combine dipping sauce ingredients. Serve and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: mini-shepherds-pies
Ingredients: ['2 large russet potatoes, peeled and cut into pieces', '½ Tbsp. salt', '½ cup fresh spinach', '¼ cup milk', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter, softened', '--- For Meat Base ---', '1 lb. ground beef', '1 egg', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '½ cup frozen peas', '1 tsp. salt']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, to taste', 'salt, to taste ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/03JYoNCDNIc
', '
Preheat the oven to 375°F. In a large pot filled with water, boil the potatoes with ½ tablespoon of salt until tender, 15-20 minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil. Remove from heat and add the spinach for 2 minutes. Strain the hot water, run the spinach under cold water and then squeeze out the excess water. Place the spinach into a blender and add the milk. Blend until smooth.
', '
Once the potatoes are cooked, strain. Using a potato masher, mash the hot potatoes with butter and spinach mixture until nice and smooth. Season with salt and Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder. Transfer it into a pastry bag, or a ziplock bag with one end cut.
', '
While potatoes are cooking, in a medium bowl, mix together the meat base ingredients until fully incorporated.\xa0
', '
Divide the meat mixture into 12 muffin cups. Pipe the mashed potatoes on top. (As meat shrinks during cooking, pipe the mashed potatoes so that it doesn’t completely cover the meat.) Bake for 25-30 minutes and serve warm. Enjoy!
']

Name: baked-salmon-sushi-cups
Ingredients: ['1 1/2 cups cooked sushi rice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 1/2 lb. salmon, skin removed and cubed', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '12 nori squares ', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds, for garnish', '1/4 cup chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch sea salt', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), plus more for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/kKOjyUHAD0Y
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F and lightly grease a standard size muffin tin.
', '
To a medium bowl, combine sushi rice and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar. Mix until all of the rice is coated in the vinegar. Prepare your nori sheets by laying them out on a countertop. If using large nori sheets, cut them into squares small enough to fit into each cavity of your muffin tin.
', '
Add about 2-3 tablespoons of your rice mixture to each nori sheet, then fold and place inside the muffin tin. Repeat until all of the cavities of your muffin tin are filled.
', '
To a medium bowl, add cubed salmon, sea salt, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Toss to coat well, until all of the ingredients are fully combined.
', '
Top each nori cup with the salmon mixture, about 2 tablespoons. Bake for about 15 minutes or until salmon is cooked. Once done, remove from the oven, garnish with sesame seeds and chives. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: asparagus-tart
Ingredients: ['1 sheet puff pastry, thawed', '1 bunch asparagus, tough ends trimmed', '½ cup Parmesan cheese, shredded']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Sauce Mix: ['3 cups gruyere cheese, shredded', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/yuvq_qfoeNs
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a large bowl, combine the gruyere, Lee Kum Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and dijon mustard.
', '
Use a rolling pin to gently roll out puff pastry to an 11"x14" rectangle, then transfer to the parchment lined baking sheet. Dock (prick all over) the puff pastry with a fork.\xa0
', '
Spread the gruyere mixture over the puff pastry, leaving a 1" border on all sides. Arrange asparagus spears to be parallel with each other.
', '
Sprinkle with the Parmesan cheese. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and puffy. Slice into squares and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegan-poke-soba-salad
Ingredients: ['3 cups beets, cut into ½” cubes (washed, rough ends trimmed, no need to peel) ', '1 cup water', '½ tsp. sea salt', '2–3 scallions, chopped', '1/4 cup cilantro, chopped', '2 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds', 'shredded nori, for sprinkle', 'cooked soba noodles, cooked rice, or greens, for serving']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 1/2 tsp. grated ginger', '2 tsp. lime', '2–3 tsp. maple syrup (adjust to taste)', '1/4 tsp. chili flakes (optional)']
Procedure:
['
Place beet cubes in a pot with the water and salt. Simmer on low heat for 15-20 minutes until easily forked and tender. Remove beets from heat and drain off any remaining water and place in a bowl.
', '
While the beets are simmering, whisk together the marinade. Mix beets with poke marinade while still warm. Set aside to cool for a few minutes before adding scallions and cilantro.
', '
Toss and refrigerate beets until ready to serve. Taste, season with salt and pepper if you like and adjust sweetness. Top with sesame seeds and seaweed just before serving.
', '
Serve over soba noodles, rice, or greens with any or all of the following: avocado, radish, cucumber, carrots, snap peas, edamame, sprouts, nuts or seeds, seaweed. Enjoy!
']

Name: kimchi-nori-popcorn
Ingredients: ['6 cups popcorn', '1 ½ cups kimchi, finely chopped ', '6 Tbsp. sesame seeds, toasted', '1 (5”) strip sushi nori, finely chopped']
Seasoning: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/wPG6I6Bpd5s
', '
Preheat oven to 350°F.
', '
In a large bowl, toss together popcorn, kimchi, sesame seeds, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce.
', '
Spread popcorn mixture in a single layer on parchment-lined baking sheets; bake for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, rotating trays halfway through.
', '
While popcorn is still warm, sprinkle with chopped nori. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: tom-yum-shrimp-hotpot
Ingredients: ['vegetable oil, a drizzle', '3 slice ginger', '3 glove garlic', '1 lb. shrimp', '8 cups water', '1 potato (cut into thick strips and fried)', '1 pack enoki mushrooms', '6 oz. dried bean curd sticks ', 'some vegetables of your choice']
Seasoning: ['1 pack Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Tom Yum Hot Pot', 'salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in a pot and stir-fry the ginger and garlic until fragrant. Add the shrimp and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
', '
Add water and Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Tom Yum Hot Pot, then bring it to a boil. Add the potato, enoki mushrooms and dried bean curd sticks.\xa0
', '
Reduce the heat and simmer for two minutes.\xa0Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: peppery-pork-tripe-and-chicken-soup
Ingredients: ['1/2 \twhole pork tripe', '1/2 \twhole chicken', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 slices ginger ', '2 stalks scallions (cut into pieces)', '2 Tbsp. cooking wine', '5 cups water', '2 pcs. fried tofu skin']
Seasoning: ['1/2 pack Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Pork Bone Hot Pot', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1.5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
Wash the pork tripe\xa0and the chicken, then blanch them in boiling water separately. Cut them into small pieces and set the chicken aside.
', '
Heat oil in a pot, stir-fry ginger slices and scallions, and then add cooking wine, water, Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Pork Bone Hot Pot, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder, Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon, and the pork tripe pieces. Simmer over low heat for about an hour.
', '
Add chicken pieces and fried tofu skin then cook for about ten minutes.\xa0Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: umami-mushroom-hotpot
Ingredients: ['3 cups water', '4 oz. fresh shiitake mushrooms', '2 oz. enoki mushrooms', '3 oz. oyster mushrooms', '2 oz. white mushrooms', '1/2 pack\t firm tofu', '2 pcs. fried tofu skin', '1 pack konjac noodles', '4 oz. napa cabbage']
Seasoning: ['1/2 pack\t Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Mushroom Hot Pot', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Mix the water and all seasonings, and then heat until boiling.
', '
Blanch all other ingredients in other pot of boiling water.
', '
Add the blanched ingredients to the cooked broth and simmer together for about 10 minutes. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: chiu-shan-style-beef-hotpot
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef bones', '12 cups water', '1 thumb fresh ginger', '2 stalks scallion (cut into pieces)', '4 – 6 pcs. dried Chinese date', '1 corn (cut in to pieces)', '1 pc. daikon radish', '1 lb. sliced beef', '1 pack beef meatball', 'some fried tofu skin']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder']
Procedure:
['
Blanch the beef bones in boiling water.
', '
Heat a pot and add water, fresh ginger, scallions, beef bones, dried Chinese date, corn, daikon radish, and Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder. Reduce the heat after boiling and simmer until about 4-5 cups of beef broth remain.
', '
Remove the beef bones and add the remaining ingredients. Boil until fully cooked.
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Sa Cha Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and scallions to create a hot pot dipping sauces. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: dan-dan-miracle-noodles
Ingredients: ['3 tsp. oil', '8 oz. ground pork ', '1/3 cup sui mi ya cai (preserved mustard greens)', '1 lb. Miracle Noodle Organic Fettuccine', 'chopped peanuts, for garnish', 'green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. sesame paste', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. sugar', '1/4 tsp. five spice powder', '1/2 tsp. Sichuan peppercorn powder (ground in a mortar and pestle)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '¼ cup hot cooking water from the noodles']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JdUBzkQJOHA
', '
To make the meat mixture: In a wok, heat the oil over medium heat, and brown the ground pork. Add the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, shaoxing wine, and five spice powder. Cook until all the liquid has evaporated. Add the sui mi ya cai and sauté for a few minutes. Turn off the heat and set the wok aside.
', '
To make the sauce: In a bowl, mix together all the sauce mix ingredients including the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Crisp Oil. Taste and adjust seasoning.
', '
To prepare the noodles: Rinse the Miracle Noodle Organic Fettuccine according to package directions and drain.\xa0
', '
Put the wok with the meat mixture back to the stove over medium heat. Add the sauce mix and stir. Add the noodles and stir to coat the noodles well, cook for 5 minutes.
', '
Remove from wok and serve in bowls. Sprinkle with chopped peanuts and green onions. Mix everything together and enjoy!
']

Name: crab-rangoon-melt
Ingredients: ['1 (8 oz.) package cream cheese, softened ', '1 (8 oz.) package imitation crab, chopped', '½ cup green onion, chopped', '½ Tbsp. cornstarch', '½ Tbsp. water', 'sliced sourdough', '½ cup shredded mozzarella']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, divided ']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup sugar', '¼ cup water', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. red pepper flakes', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/vDT_Sna2Ijo
', '
Combine the cream cheese, imitation crab, green onion, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) in a medium bowl. Set aside.
', '
In a small saucepan over medium heat, add sugar and water. Boil until sugar dissolves. Add rice vinegar, red pepper flakes, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Stir to combine.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, make a slurry with the cornstarch and water. Add to the saucepan. Allow sauce to boil until thickened.\xa0\xa0
', '
To a medium skillet over low heat, add 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Place down one slice of sourdough bread. Spread 1 Tbsp. of the sweet chili sauce over the top of the bread. Spread ½ cup of the filling on top, add mozzarella, and drizzle with more of the sweet chili sauce. Place second slice of bread on top and drizzle with remaining 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil.\xa0
', '
Cook for 3 minutes, flip and cook for another 3 minutes, or until golden brown. Slice and enjoy!
']

Name: salmon-meal-prep
Ingredients: ['3 lb. salmon filets', 'cooked noodles, for serving', 'cooked vegetables, for serving']
Marinade: ['--- For Lemongrass Chili ---', '1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '2 Tbsp. lime juice ', '1/4 tsp. red pepper flakes', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. honey', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. chipotle chili powder ', '--- For Orange Ginger ---', '1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '1 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '¼ tsp. red pepper flakes', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '--- For Firecracker ---', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '¼ cup olive oil', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VCDNDVvU4BA
', '
Prepare three different marinades: For each marinade, in a small bowl, whisk together the marinade ingredients.\xa0
', '
For each marinade, add 1 lb. of salmon fillet and the marinade to a resealable plastic bag. Massage salmon to coat thoroughly. Seal the bags and refrigerate for 24 hours.
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place the marinated salmon filets. Bake the salmon for 12-14 minutes, keeping an eye on it so the fish does not burn.
', '
Set out your meal prep containers. Add cooked noodles and vegetables of your choice and cooked salmon to each container. Enjoy!
']

Name: moroccan-chicken-tagine
Ingredients: ['6 chicken thighs, bone-in with skin', '3 cups chicken stock', '¼ tsp. saffron strands or powdered saffron', '6 Tbsp. flour, separated into 2 and 4 Tbsp.', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 large onion, chopped', '1 tsp. ground turmeric', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. ground ginger', '1 tsp. sweet paprika', '1 tsp. garlic powder', 'fresh parsley and cilantro (a good handful of each tied with cooking twine)', '1 lemon, sliced', '6 oz. olives, pitted']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['6 cloves garlic, peeled and sliced or chopped', '1 lemon zested and juiced – then chop the remnants into chunks', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. ground cumin', '2 tsp. ground ginger', '1 tsp. sweet paprika', '1 Tbsp. kosher salt or sea salt', '½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the Chicken: In a large bowl, mix all of the marinade ingredients. Add the chicken. Mix everything together, cover, and set aside to marinate for anywhere from 20 minutes to 8 hours.
', '
When ready to cook, preheat the oven to 375°F. Warm the stock, add the saffron and set aside to infuse.
', '
Remove the chicken from the marinade and pat it dry. Set the marinade aside. Lightly coat the chicken in 4 tablespoons of flour. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat. Place the chicken skin-side down in the pan. Cook for 4 to 5 minutes per side, or until browned. Remove the chicken from the pan and set it aside.
', '
Add the onion and cook for 4 to 5 minutes or until softened. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of the flour to coat. Add the spices and sauté with the onions for 3 to 4 minutes. Slowly stir in the stock then add the leftover marinade and lemon remnants, and stir in the olives. Add the tied herbs, lemon slices & cilantro, and some salt and pepper. Bring to a boil over high heat, add the chicken back to the pan, and bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
', '
Discard herb bunches and lemon. Taste for seasoning and add more salt as needed and remove the skin if desired before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: elote-ramen
Ingredients: ['16 oz. instant ramen noodles (around 4 packs) ', '½ cup mayonnaise', '1 lime, juiced ', '1 (15 oz.) can golden sweet corn, drained', 'chili powder, for garnish', 'crumbled Cotija cheese, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/2_bnQ9HofC8
', '
Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the ramen noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes or until cooked through. Drain, and transfer the noodles to a large bowl.
', '
To the noodles, add in the mayonnaise, lime juice, corn and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Mix to combine.\xa0
', '
Plate the elote ramen and sprinkle with chili powder and Cotija cheese and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: pulled-pork-hoisin-sliders
Ingredients: ['3-4 lb. pork butt or pork shoulder, patted dry', '8 Hawaiian sweet rolls, mini or regular size', 'kimchi, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for garnish', 'chopped green onions, for garnish']
Marinade: ['½ cup low-sodium chicken broth', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. ketchup', '3 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/jFZ8u4lkCls
', '
Place pork in the slow cooker.
', '
In a medium bowl, mix all of the marinade ingredients together and pour over pork.
', '
Cook on low for 6-8 hours or on high for 5-6 hours or until pork is tender and falls apart easily.
', '
When pork is done, remove from slow cooker and shred with 2 forks. Reserve leftover sauce and put shredded meat back in the sauce so it can soak it all up.
', '
To assemble, layer a heaping spoonful of shredded pork onto half of the Hawaiian roll and top with kimchi, a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and chopped green onions. Place the top of the Hawaiian roll on to form a slider and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: prosciutto-and-mushroom-stuffed-steak
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. olive oil, separated', '8 oz. wild mushrooms, sliced thin', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 lb. flank steak', '2 cups arugula', '6 slices prosciutto', '8 slices thin provolone cheese', '2 Tbsp. flour', '1 tsp. paprika', 'kitchen twine']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. salt ', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add 2 Tbsp. olive oil and the mushrooms to the skillet and sauté until soft—about 10 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté another 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
', '
Lay the flank steak on a work surface and place a piece of plastic wrap over the top. Using a meat mallet or rolling pin, pound the steak into a 9×12-inch rectangle—1/4-inch thick. Lay the cheese over the steak, leaving a 2- to 3-inch area uncovered along one long edge. Next, lay the mushrooms over the cheese, followed by the prosciutto and arugula leaves.
', '
Starting with the long edge covered with ingredients, carefully roll the flank steak. Tie the steak roll in 4 places with kitchen twine. Mix 1 tsp. salt, Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, paprika and flour and rub over the roll.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F. In a large skillet, heat 2 Tbsp. of oil over medium-high heat. Carefully place the steak roll in the skillet and sear for 5-8 minutes turning to brown on all sides.
', '
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake until cooked through and the cheese is melted—30 minutes. Tent with foil and let the meat rest for 10 minutes, then carefully slice in 1/2-inch pieces. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-stuffed-pasta-shells
Ingredients: ['2 cups fresh whole milk ricotta cheese', '1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, grated', '2 cups mozzarella, shredded ', '1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped, divided', '1/4 cup fresh basil, chopped, divided', '2 Tbsp. fresh mint, chopped', '2 large eggs, lightly beaten', '12 oz. jumbo shells, cooked']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 cups marinara', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 1/2 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes ', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/IjADwc7FU2I
', '
Heat Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil in a large skillet over medium. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently, until garlic is fragrant and just starting to turn golden. Add marinara, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and crushed red pepper. Reduce heat to medium and stir. Let cook for 8 minutes – stirring occasionally –Add salt and pepper.
', '
Preheat the oven to 375°F. In a medium-sized bowl combine the ricotta, Parmesan, 1 cup of the mozzarella, half of the parsley, basil, and all of the mint. Season with salt and pepper, then stir in the eggs - mix well to combine; set aside.
', '
Pour 1 1/2 cups of the sauce into a 9-by-13-inch baking dish; set aside.
', '
Stuff each shell with a heaping tablespoon or two of the filling and nestle the shells in the sauce as close together as possible. Drizzle 1 1/2 cups of the remaining sauce on top of the shells, then sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
', '
Bake the shells for about 35 minutes, or until golden. Let rest for 5 minutes before serving. Before serving sprinkle the reserved herbs on top of the shells; serve warm and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: fried-ravioli-hearts
Ingredients: ['oil, for frying ', '2 packages heart shaped ravioli ', '1 cup panko bread crumbs', '1 cup Italian style bread crumbs', '1 cup buttermilk', 'grated parmesan, for garnish', 'chopped parsley, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['pinch of salt', 'freshly ground pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 (24 oz.) jar marinara sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
"https://www.youtube.com/embed/N-pG9VWBbLA
', '
Pour oil into a large frying pan or Dutch oven until you reach a depth of about 2”. Place the pan over medium heat and heat to 325°F.\xa0
', '
In a shallow bowl, combine the bread crumbs, salt and pepper. Pour the buttermilk into a separate shallow bowl. Set a baking sheet next to your bowls. Working one piece at a time, dip the ravioli into the buttermilk. Then dredge the ravioli in the bread crumbs, making sure to get an even coating. Then place the ravioli on the baking sheet, and continue breading the remaining ravioli pieces.
', '
When the oil is hot, begin to fry the ravioli in batches, starting with the pieces you breaded first. Once you start frying, be sure to turn the pieces over occasionally to ensure even cooking. After 3-4 minutes the ravioli will turn a deep golden brown color. Use a slotted spoon to transfer the fried ravioli to a plate with paper towels, and allow them to drain.
', '
In a medium saucepan over medium heat, combine the sauce mix ingredients. Heat until warmed, about 5 minutes.
', '
To serve, sprinkle the hot ravioli with Parmesan cheese and parsley. Serve with the spicy garlic marinara sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: rose-dumplings
Ingredients: ['--- Filling Ingredients ---', '3 ½ oz. shrimp, chopped', '3 ½ oz. ground pork', '2 tsp. sake', 'salt, to taste', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. green onions, minced', '--- Other Ingredients ---', '32 sheets dumpling wrappers or gyoza skins', '⅓ cup water', 'beet juice, for brushing ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, divided']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/eOm_jxbIzSQ
', '
In a large bowl, combine the filling ingredients and mix until thoroughly combined.
', '
Using your finger, rub the right edge of a dumpling wrapper with water. Lay another dumpling wrapper over the edge so that it slightly overlaps, sealing tightly. Repeat with 2 more wrappers. Scoop a spoonful of filling onto the middle of each dumpling wrapper. Brush tops and bottoms with beet juice. Fold each wrapper over from top to bottom, ensuring that the edges are still overlapped, sealing tightly. Gently roll the dumplings from one end to the other, starting from the left side, creating a flower shape. Repeat with the remaining dumpling wrappers and filling to create 8 rose dumplings in total.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a medium pan over medium-high heat. Add the dumplings to the pan and cook for 2 minutes, until the bottoms begin to brown. Add a splash of water to the pan and cover with the lid. Steam for 10 minutes. Remove the lid and drizzle with the remaining tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Cook on low heat for 3 minutes.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together the sauce ingredients.\xa0
', '
Remove the dumplings from the pan and serve with the sauce on the side. Enjoy!
']

Name: hot-honey-pizza-dip
Ingredients: ['1 cup pizza sauce', '1 cup shredded mozzarella or Italian cheese blend', '¼ cup grated Parmesan or pecorino Romano cheese', '18-20 pepperoni slices', 'hot honey, for drizzling', '6 basil leaves, cut into ribbons', 'bruschetta toasts, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['8 oz. plain cream cheese, softened', '1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. dried oregano', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/fdqTRraTCxQ
', '
Preheat the oven to 400°F.\xa0
', '
In a medium bowl, mix together the cream cheese, Greek yogurt, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, dried oregano and salt until well combined, smooth and creamy.
', '
Spread cream cheese yogurt mixture on the bottom of a greased 9-inch skillet or an 8x8 pan. Spread 1 cup pizza sauce on top, then sprinkle both mozzarella/Italian and parmesan cheese on top. Finally, top with pepperoni slices. Bake for 15 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly. Place under the broiler for 1-2 minutes until the cheese is slightly golden.
', '
Remove from the oven and drizzle with a little hot honey, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil then top with basil ribbons.\xa0
', '
Serve with bruschetta toasts. Enjoy!
']

Name: lotus-egg
Ingredients: ['1 red onion, peeled ', '5 eggs', '½ cup water', '1 tsp. chopped green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, for drizzling', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/yfDf_r_jOHY
', '
Make four deep cuts to onion to create a “lotus flower.”
', '
Place onion onto low bowl, making sure the bowl fits into a steamer with a lid.\xa0
', '
In a medium bowl, whisk eggs, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, water, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Evenly pour mixture over the onion.\xa0
', '
Place the bowl into steamer, cover with lid and steam for 15 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
Remove bowl and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Garnish with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: heart-grilled-cheese-and-spicy-tomato-soup
Ingredients: ['--- Spicy Tomato Soup ---', '½ cup yellow onion', '¼ tsp. fresh thyme', '¼ tsp. fresh rosemary', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 28-oz. cans tomatoes with juices, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 bay leaf', '2 tsp. red wine vinegar', '1 tsp. dried basil', '½ tsp. dried oregano', '3 cups vegetable broth', '½ cup heavy cream', 'fresh basil leaves, for garnish', '--- Heart Grilled Cheese ---', '8-12 slices sourdough bread', '4-6 slices mozzarella']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for spreading ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ziQV3MhcyYg
', '
Spicy Tomato Soup: Chop the yellow onion, thyme and rosemary. Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Sauté the chopped onion, thyme and rosemary and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic until tender. Add the tomatoes, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, bay leaf, vinegar, herbs, and vegetable broth. Cover, and simmer for about 25 minutes, until the liquid has reduced by quarter.
', '
Remove the soup from heat and discard bay leaf. Add the soup to a blender and puree until smooth. Alternatively, an immersion blender may be used. Return the soup to a simmer to heat through. Remove from the heat and gradually stir in the heavy cream. Season with cracked salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with fresh basil leaves.
', '
Heart Grilled Cheese: Heat a large skillet or a griddle on medium-high heat.
', '
Using a cookie cutter, cut bread and mozzarella slices into heart shapes. Spread one side of each heart bread with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs).\xa0
', '
Assemble the sandwiches with mozzarella. Grill each sandwich for 2-3 minutes on each side, until the outsides are browned and the cheese begins to melt. Serve with spicy tomato soup and enjoy!
']

Name: heart-egg-in-a-hole
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. room temperature butter, divided ', '4 slices white bread', '4 eggs']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/bfbpicGTg0A
', '
Prepare the bread by laying it down on a hard surface and using a cookie cutter to punch a heart-shaped hole in the center of the bread. Be sure that the surrounding bread stays intact.
', '
Spread 2 tbsp. of butter on both sides of the bread and the heart cutout. Then, melt the other 2 tbsp. in a pan over medium-low heat.
', '
Crack the eggs into 4 separate cups.
', '
Lay the bread into the pan carefully and allow it to toast on one side. Then, flip the bread over and carefully pour the egg into the heart-shaped hole in the bread. Cook for 5-6 minutes over a low heat, or until the white part of the egg is set.
', '
Remove from the pan. Season with salt and pepper and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Toast the remaining heart cut outs in the pan and serve alongside the egg-in-toast. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-spicy-seafood-linguine
Ingredients: ['4 oz. linguine ', '1 oz. sliced mushroom', '0.5 oz. chopped onion ', '4 pcs. mussel ', '4 pcs. scallop', '4 pcs. shrimp']
Seasoning: ['1.5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Fiery Hot Dried Shrimp Chili Oil ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder ', '5 Tbsp. heavy cream ', '2 sliced cheese', '3.5 fl oz. water ']
Procedure:
['
Cook the linguine by following the packaging instruction, set aside.\xa0
', '
Heat up a wok with oil and sauté sliced mushrooms and chopped onion until fragrant. Add blue mussels, scallops and shrimp and stir-fry until cooked through.
', '
Add the linguine and seasonings and cook until the sauce is thicken.
', '
Tips: Rinse the cooked linguine\xa0with cold water in result to a better texture.
']

Name: chicken-breast-meal-prep
Ingredients: ['12 skinless, boneless chicken breasts', 'cooked rice, for serving', 'cooked vegetables of your choice, for serving']
Marinade: ['--- For Cilantro Lime ---', '1/4 cup olive oil', '1 lime, juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1/2 cup cilantro, chopped', '1 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '--- For Sweet & Spicy ---', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ cup honey', '½ cup sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '--- For Soy Garlic ---', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2/3 cup honey', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar ', '1/4 cup Chinese cooking wine', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r_4Y60utxeo
', '
Prepare three different marinades: For each marinade,\xa0whisk together the marinade ingredients\xa0in a small bowl.
', '
For each marinade, add 4 chicken breasts and the marinade to a resealable plastic bag. Massage chicken to coat thoroughly. Seal the bags and refrigerate 24 to 48 hours.
', '
Brush BBQ plate or grills with oil and heat to medium high. Or, heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
', '
Cook chicken on the preheated grill until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 7 to 8 minutes on each side. You may also bake the chicken at 425°F for 30 minutes.
', '
Set out your meal prep containers. Add cooked rice and vegetables of your choice and chicken to each container. Enjoy!
']

Name: boiled-seafood-platter
Ingredients: ['10 oz. shell-on shrimp', '8 pcs. mussels (on the half shell)', '6 oz. squid rings', '4 pcs. crab sticks', '6 oz. fresh scallops', '4 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. minced millet pepper', '2 Tbsp. chopped scallion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Cook the seafood in separate batches in boiling water, draining each well and placing onto a plate.\xa0
', '
Heat the oil in a pot and quickly stir-fry the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and millet pepper until fragrant. Drizzle the mixture over the cooked seafood.
', '
Scatter chopped scallion over the dish, and drizzle the seafood with Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to serve.
']

Name: stir-fried-clams
Ingredients: ['vegetable oil, a drizzle', '2 Tbsp. dry red pepper ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 lbs. clams', '2 stalks scallion, chopped', 'cornstarch, a little', 'water, a little']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder']
Procedure:
['
Heat the pot with oil, stir-fry the dry red pepper, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, add the clams and stir-fry for two minutes.
', '
To create a slurry, mix corn starch with water.
', '
Add all the seasonings and scallions, pour in the slurry, mix well and serve.
']

Name: stir-fry-cabbage-2
Ingredients: ['1 cabbage (around 1.5 lbs.)', '2 Tbsp. dry red pepper', '1 Tbsp. sliced garlic', 'vegetable oil, a drizzle']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '1 ½ Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder']
Procedure:
['
Remove the roots from the cabbage and tear the leaves into pieces with your hands.\xa0
', '
Heat oil in a pot, sauté the dried red pepper and garlic and add cabbage, stir-fry for one minute.
', '
Stir in all the seasonings and mix well to serve.
']

Name: hand-shredded-chicken-salad
Ingredients: ['1 raw whole chicken (around 3 lbs)', '6 cups water', '4 stalks whole scallion (reserve 0.5 oz. shredded scallion)', '4 sliced ginger', '3 Tbsp. cooking wine', '2 Tbsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 oz. chopped cilantro', '1 oz. shredded red pepper']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', '2 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored With Chicken (No MSG Added)', '4 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil  (optional)']
Procedure:
['
Clean and rinse the chicken (remove head, neck and feet, if necessary) and drain well.
', '
Add the water, scallion, sliced ginger, cooking wine and salt to the pot and bring to a boil. Then add the chicken and turn the heat to low.\xa0
', '
Simmer for 30 minutes until cooked through. Remove the chicken from the pot and soak in an ice water bath for about 20 minutes.\xa0
\xa0
', '
Finally, in a big bowl, tear the chicken into strips by hand and take out the bones. Add the rest of the ingredients and sauce mix ingredients. Mix well to serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: steamed-eggplant-with-garlic
Ingredients: ['3 Chinese eggplant', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. chopped scallion', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood']
Procedure:
['
Wash and remove the stem of the eggplant and cut it in half. Score the inner flesh of the eggplant and sprinkle with salt, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, then place on a plate.\xa0
', '
Steam the eggplant for 15 minutes. Drain excess water from the plate and sprinkle with chopped scallion.\xa0
', '
Heat the vegetable oil and drizzle over the eggplant, add in the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood. Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-pho
Ingredients: ['1 medium yellow onion', '1 (14.5 oz.) can low-sodium beef broth ', '1 (14.5 oz.) can low-sodium chicken broth ', '2 tsp. sugar', '1 star anise pod', '4 whole cloves', '1 cinnamon stick', '2 cups water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '7 oz. flat rice noodles', '8 oz. very thinly sliced beef, such as flat iron or flank steak', '1 small onion, for garnish', '½ cup bean sprouts, for garnish', '¼ cup fresh basil leaves, for garnish', '¼ cup fresh cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'lime, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. fish sauce', 'salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, for drizzling', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for drizzling', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hHlgh2ej-Dg
', '
Quarter the onion. In a large pot, bring the onion quarters, beef broth, chicken broth, sugar, star anise, cloves, cinnamon stick, fish sauce, water, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger to a boil. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil, add rice noodles, and cook according to package directions. Drain and rinse well with cold water.
', '
Thinly slice onion and slice lime into wedges. Over a large bowl, strain the broth through a fine mesh strainer. Discard the solids and pour the clear broth back into the pot.\xa0
', '
Bring the broth to a boil and add the precooked noodles; cook until the noodles are just tender, 30 seconds. Using tongs or a spider, lift the noodles from the pot and divide evenly into bowls. Reduce the heat to a simmer and add the sliced beef to the broth; let simmer until no longer pink, about 1 minute.\xa0
', '
Using a slotted spoon or spider, remove the beef from the broth and divide between the bowls. Crack salt into broth. Ladle the broth over the noodles and beef. Top each bowl with the thinly sliced onions, bean sprouts, basil, cilantro and lime wedges and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: jerk-chicken-leg-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 small yellow onion, rough chopped', '6 medium scallions, rough chopped', '1/2 to 1 Scotch bonnet or habanero pepper, rough chopped', '1 (1”) piece ginger, rough chopped', '3 cloves garlic, rough chopped', '1/4 cup packed light brown sugar', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar']
Marinade: ['1 small yellow onion, rough chopped', '6 medium scallions, rough chopped', '1/2 to 1 Scotch bonnet or habanero pepper, rough chopped', '1 (1”) piece ginger, rough chopped', '3 cloves garlic, rough chopped', '1/4 cup packed light brown sugar', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '2 tsp. dried thyme leaves, or 6 sprigs fresh thyme']
Procedure:
['
In a food processor or a blender, add onion, scallions, scotch bonnet pepper, ginger and garlic cloves; pulse a few times. Then add in light brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, apple cider vinegar and thyme. Blend until smooth, scraping down the sides of the container as needed. Transfer the marinade to a large zip top bag. Add 4 chicken quarters and massage the bag to coat the chicken. Seal the bag and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or up to overnight.
', '
Arrange a rack in the middle of the oven and heat the oven to 450ºF. Coat 1 rimmed baking sheet with 1 tablespoon canola oil. Remove the chicken from the bag and shake off any excess marinade. Place the chicken skin-side down on the baking sheet, spacing the pieces at least 1-inch apart.
', '
Bake, flipping halfway through, until cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers at least 165ºF, 20 to 25 minutes total (the skin will look blackened). If you’d like crispy skin, broil until the skin darkens and sizzles, 2 to 3 minutes.
', '
In a bowl, add rice, beans and top with chicken leg. Add guacamole, sour cream and salsa. Garnish with peppers, cilantro and enjoy!
']

Name: firecracker-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 1/4 lb. boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1” pieces', '1/3 cup cornstarch', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 eggs ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1/4 cup sliced green onions', 'cooking spray', 'cooked white rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['1/3 cup buffalo hot sauce', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 cup brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1/4 tsp. red pepper flakes']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/5LLTWyeJVxg
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Coat a 9"x13" pan with cooking spray. Place the chicken pieces on a plate and season with salt and pepper to taste. Sprinkle the cornstarch over the chicken and toss to coat evenly.
', '
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Dip each piece of chicken into the egg mixture.
', '
Heat the oil over high heat in a large pan. Place the chicken in a single layer and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown. You may have to work in batches. Place the chicken pieces in a single layer in the 9"x13" pan.
', '
In a medium bowl, whisk together the buffalo sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar and red pepper flakes.
', '
Pour the sauce over the chicken. Bake for 35 minutes, stirring once halfway through to coat the chicken with the sauce. Top with green onions and serve with white rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: seafood-gumbo
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. butter', '1/4 cup all-purpose flour', '1 small yellow onion, diced', '1 medium green bell pepper, chopped', '2 celery ribs, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 bay leaf', '1 (15-oz.) can fire-roasted diced tomatoes', '4 cups low-sodium chicken broth', '12 oz. andouille sausage, sliced into 1/2" pieces', '1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '3 green onions, sliced, plus extra for garnish', 'cooked white rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Cajun seasoning', 'kosher salt and ground black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/IbGIQhU2ANI
', '
In a large, deep skillet over medium-low heat, melt butter, then add flour. Cook, stirring constantly, until dark caramel colored, about 10 minutes.
', '
Add onions, peppers, and celery, and stir until softened, about 5 minutes more. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and stir to combine. Season with Cajun seasoning, salt, and pepper. Stir in bay leaf, diced tomatoes, and chicken broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer until thickened, stirring occasionally, about 40 minutes.
', '
In the last 10 minutes of cooking, add sausage and shrimp. Once shrimp is pink and cooked through, taste and adjust seasonings. Stir in green onions, reserving some for garnish.
', '
Serve with white rice and garnish with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: braised-beef-tacos
Ingredients: ['2 lb. chuck roast', 'flour tortillas, to taste', 'pico de gallo, to taste', 'fresh cilantro, chopped, to taste']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for drizzling', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Sauce Mix: ['2 small cans chipotle peppers in adobo ', '2 cups dark beer', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '2 Tbsp. light brown sugar', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/VvFlemp0Ov8
', '
In a large skillet over high heat, quickly sear the roast for 1-2 minutes on each side. Add the beef to the base of your slow cooker.\xa0\xa0
', '
Mix chipotle peppers, beer, lime juice, brown sugar, salt, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic in a large bowl. Pour over beef.
', "
Cover and cook on low for 10 hours. You'll know the beef is done when it falls apart. Carefully transfer the cooked beef to a large sheet pan.
", '
Shred the beef and drizzle with the chipotles and about 1 cup of the leftover cooking liquid. Broil the beef on high for 3-5 minutes or until the beef is dark brown and crispy on the ends.
', '
Serve with tortillas, pico de gallo, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and fresh cilantro. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-spicy-sausage-gnocchi
Ingredients: ['15 oz. spicy Italian sausage, casings removed', '16 oz. potato gnocchi', '½ cup chicken broth', '1 cup heavy cream', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '13 oz. marinara', '5 oz. spinach, fresh', 'red pepper flakes, to taste']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, plus more for drizzling', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'salt and Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/5uHHyTUpz5k
', '
Heat Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil on medium heat in a large, high-sided skillet.
', '
Add sausage and cook on medium heat for about 5 minutes, crumbling it.
', '
To the same skillet with sausage, add uncooked potato gnocchi, chicken broth, heavy cream, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Bring to a boil on medium heat and stir everything well. Cover with lid, and allow the gnocchi to cook for about 5 minutes on medium heat, while the sauce boils.
', '
Add the marinara and stir it well. Add fresh spinach, and cook on medium heat, stirring frequently for 5 minutes until the spinach wilts. Cook longer if you would like a thicker sauce.
', '
Mix everything well. Remove from heat. Season with salt, Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, and red pepper flakes. Drizzle with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: zha-jiang-mian
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. peanut oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '12 oz. ground pork/beef blend', '2 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '3/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sweet Bean Sauce', '1 1/2 cups water', '1 white onion, diced', '12 oz. fresh wheat noodles (or 9 oz. dried wheat noodles), cooked ', '1 cucumber, julienned for garnish', 'green onions, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/FruMPFYQuaM
', '
Heat a large skillet or a wok over medium-high heat until hot. Add the peanut oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Stir in the pork. Pour in the Shaoxing wine. Stir and cook for 1 minute.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Sweet Bean Sauce and turn to medium heat. Stir constantly, until the sauce thickens and turns darker, about 10 mins. Add water as needed.\xa0
', '
Add the onion. Cook and stir for 3 to 5 minutes, until the onion has softened but remains crispy. Turn off heat and transfer the sauce to a large bowl.
', '
Add noodles to individual serving plates. Top noodles with sauce, and garnish with cucumbers and green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-peanut-noodles-with-halloumi
Ingredients: ['8 oz. rice noodles or long cut pasta', '2 carrots, shredded', '2 bell peppers, thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp., plus 1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '8 oz. halloumi cheese, cubed and patted dry', '---For topping---', '1/2 cup fresh basil, chopped', '1/2 cup fresh cilantro, chopped', '2 green onions, thinly sliced', '3 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds', '3 Tbsp. chopped peanuts', '2 Tbsp. lime juice']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup creamy peanut butter', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey', '1/4 cup Thai red curry paste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, plus more for drizzling', '1 Tbsp. fresh ginger, grated', '1/3 cup water']
Procedure:
['
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the noodles according to package directions. Drain and add to a large bowl with the carrots and peppers.
', '
Meanwhile, in a food processor, combine the peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, honey, curry paste, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, ginger, and 1/3 cup water. Pulse until combined and smooth. Pour the sauce over the warm noodles. Tossing well.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the Halloumi and cook until golden, about 5 minutes. Remove from the skillet.
', '
Divide the noodles between bowls and top with the halloumi, herbs, and toppings. Add additional Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and Enjoy!
']

Name: mini-beef-empanadas
Ingredients: ['3/4 lb. ground beef', '1/2 medium onion, grated', '1 rib of celery, finely minced', '1 small carrot, grated', '1 large russet potato, peeled, diced into ¼” cubes, boiled ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 tsp. chili powder', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1/2 tsp. ground cinnamon', '3/4 cup beef broth', '1/2 cup peas', 'empanada dough rounds (5”)', '1 egg, beaten']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/qw6S68bJka4
', '
Prepare the filling: In a large skillet set over medium, add the ground beef along with the onions, celery and carrots. Cook until the beef is browned and vegetables are softened, about 8 minutes. Once potatoes are cooked, drain and add them to the ground beef mixture.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, chili powder, cumin, cinnamon and beef broth, cook 1 minute longer until fragrant. Add peas and simmer over medium heat until everything is fully incorporated and most of the liquid has been absorbed. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F and place the rack into the center of the oven. Working with one wrapper at a time, add a heaping ⅓ cup of filling onto one side of the dough.
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the beaten egg with 1 tablespoon of water. Wet a pastry brush with egg wash and dampen the inside ¼ inch edge of the dough. Fold the dough in half over the filling. Using a fork, firmly press the edges together. Repeat this process with remaining dough and filling and arrange on a parchment lined baking sheet. Brush the tops of each empanada with the egg wash until coated. Bake for 35 min or until golden brown. Serve with favorite dipping sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-chicken-parm-sandwich
Ingredients: ['1 ¼ cups Italian flavored breadcrumbs', '½ cup fresh Parmesan cheese, grated', '4 eggs ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup flour', '3 chicken breasts, cut in half lengthwise', '2 cups oil', '6 Italian style buns', '¼ cup butter', '8 oz. mozzarella cheese, sliced', '1 ½ cups marinara sauce', '⅓ cup fresh basil, chopped']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ tsp. garlic salt', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/3HTxFL0mKDw
', '
In a small bowl, mix bread crumbs, salt, pepper, and grated parmesan cheese. Transfer to a shallow bowl. In a second shallow bowl, whisk eggs, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Place flour in a third shallow bowl.
', '
Dredge chicken by dipping the cutlets in the following order: flour, egg mixture, breadcrumbs, egg mixture, breadcrumbs.
', '
Heat oil in a pan on medium-high heat. When oil is hot, turn heat down to medium and shallow fry the chicken for three to four minutes on each side until golden brown and no longer pink inside.
', '
Place the chicken on a rack over a cookie sheet and top with sliced mozzarella cheese. Broil the chicken for 3 minutes until the cheese is melted. Cut buns in half, spread with butter and sprinkle with garlic salt. Toast under the broiler for 3-5 minutes, watching carefully.
', '
Heat marinara sauce in the microwave for 1 minute, stirring after 30 seconds. Spoon ¼ cup marinara sauce on each chicken cutlet, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and sprinkle with chopped basil. Place on buns and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: chickpea-lemon-orzo-soup
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1/2 onion, diced', '3 carrots, peeled and diced', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '7 – 8 cups vegetable broth ', '1 cup whole wheat orzo', '2 cans (15oz.) chickpeas, drained and rinsed', '1/3 cup tahini', '1/4 lemon juice ', 'a large handful fresh spinach']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil over medium heat. Add onion and carrot and sauté for about 5 – 7 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sauté for 1 minute more.
', '
Add the broth, bring to a boil, then add the orzo and chickpeas. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook at a gentle boil for 8- 9 minutes.
', '
Remove from heat, add tahini and lemon juice and stir well. Add in the baby spinach and stir; greens will soften and wilt within a few minutes. Season well with salt & Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper and top with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
