Name: salt-and-pepper-pork
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless pork chops', '½ cup cornstarch', '¼ cup avocado oil or neutral oil, for frying', '2 red chili peppers, sliced', '1 green chili, sliced', '2 stalks green onion, chopped', '1 tsp. white granulated sugar', '1 Tbsp. Shaoxing cooking wine', 'cooked rice, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Shaoxing cooking wine or dry sherry wine', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/X3zhpnZJd6M
', '
Slice your pork into strips, then tenderize with a meat hammer until it’s thin. Transfer to a mixing bowl. Season the pork with the 2 tablespoons of Shaoxing cooking wine, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and the black pepper. After marinating, thoroughly coat the pork strips with cornstarch.
', '
In a pan set over medium-high heat, add your avocado oil. Once the oil is hot, carefully lower half the pork into the pan. Do not overcrowd your pan. Fry on both sides until golden crispy and no longer pink inside, for 6-12 minutes. Repeat process for remaining pork.
', '
Drain off all but 1 teaspoon of oil from the pan, then over medium heat fry your remaining ingredients starting with red chili, green chili, green onion and sugar. Then deglaze with the 1 tablespoon of Shaoxing cooking wine. Mix everything together to fry for 20 seconds.
', '
Quickly add in pork strips and mix again, about 20 seconds until the internal temperature of the pork has reached 145°F. Transfer to a plate and serve hot. Season with more salt and pepper to taste. Serve with rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: carne-asada-fries
Ingredients: ['1 lb. skirt steak', '1 (1 lb.) bag frozen French fries', '1 1/2 cups shredded Mexican cheese blend', '1/2 cup pico de gallo', '1/2 cup guacamole', '2 Tbsp. crumbled queso fresco cheese', '2 Tbsp. pickled jalapeño slices', '2 Tbsp. loosely packed fresh cilantro leaves, chopped ', '1 medium lime, cut into wedges']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ tsp. dried oregano', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fresh cilantro, minced', '½ cup fresh orange juice', '¼ cup fresh lime juice', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/8KKg6n4p6kY
', '
In a large bowl, or zip-top bag, combine all marinade ingredients and mix well. Add skirt steak to the marinade and place in the refrigerator for 6 hours to overnight.
', '
When ready to cook, heat a grill pan over medium heat. Meanwhile, arrange a rack in the middle of the oven and heat the oven to 425°F. Bake frozen French fries according to package directions.\xa0
', '
While fries are baking, remove the steak from the marinade and discard the marinade. Place the steak on the grill and grill until desired doneness, 4 to 5 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer to a clean cutting board and let rest 5 minutes.
', '
Transfer the fries to a large ovenproof platter or baking dish. Sprinkle with shredded Mexican cheese blend. Return the fries to the oven to melt the cheese, about 2 minutes.
', '
Thinly slice the steak on a slight diagonal across the grain. Taste and season with kosher salt as needed. Scatter the steak over the cheese fries. Top with pico de gallo, guacamole, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Sprinkle with queso fresco cheese, pickled jalapeño slices, and the cilantro. Serve with the lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-garlic-chicken-bites
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1” chunks', '2 large eggs, beaten', '1 cup panko breadcrumbs', '2 tsp. sesame seeds', '2 green onions, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. freshly grated ginger']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/6flA6K72pKc
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly grease a 9×13 baking dish.
', '
Season chicken with salt and pepper, pour beaten eggs over chicken and toss to combine, then dredge in panko, pressing to coat.
', '
Place coated chicken onto the prepared baking dish. Bake until golden brown and crisp, for about 15-20 minutes.
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, honey, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and ginger in a medium saucepan. Cook over medium high heat until slightly thickened, about 1-2 minutes. Stir in chicken and gently toss to coat.
', '
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: seafood-bisque
Ingredients: ['1 lb. extra large shrimp, shell on', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 shallot, roughly chopped', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 carrots, diced', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '16 oz. clam juice', '16 oz. water', '1 bay leaf', '4 oz. diced pancetta', '3 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '¼ cup bourbon', '½ cup heavy cream', '½ tsp. cayenne pepper', '½ lb. cooked mussels, shelled and roughly chopped', '6 ½ oz. can chopped clams, drained', 'heavy cream, for serving', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Peel the shrimp. Reserve the shrimp shells and wrap them in cheesecloth. Tie off the top with kitchen twine. Chop the shrimp in half and set aside.
', '
Heat a pot over medium-high heat. Add in the unsalted butter and allow it to melt. Mix in the shallots, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and carrot. Sauté for about 5 minutes.
', '
Mix in the tomato paste and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Cook for 30 seconds. Add in the clam juice, water, bay leaf, and shrimp shells. Bring the mixture to a boil then lower the heat so that it is simmering. Simmer for 30 minutes. Discard the shrimp shells and bay leaf. Set the broth aside.
', '
Heat a separate pot over medium-high heat. Add in the pancetta and cook until it has browned and the fat has rendered. Whisk in the flour and cook while whisking for 2 minutes. Mix in the bourbon and the prepared seafood stock. Bring the mixture to a simmer and whisk for 2 minutes. Mix in the heavy cream and cayenne pepper.
', '
Add in the shrimp, mussels, and clams. Cook for about 3 minutes until the shrimp are fully cooked. Season with salt and pepper, to taste.
', '
Serve the bisque with a drizzle of heavy cream and chopped chives. Enjoy!
']

Name: pumpkin-beer-queso-with-pretzels
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '½ cup pumpkin puree', '4 oz. cream cheese', '½ cup pumpkin beer', '½ cup milk', '6 oz. sharp cheddar cheese, grated', '6 oz. pepper jack cheese, grated', '1 package soft pretzels', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. paprika', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', 'dash cayenne pepper', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Melt the butter in a sauce-pot over medium-low heat. Whisk in the pumpkin puree, cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, paprika, Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, and cayenne. Mix until combined.
', '
Add in the pumpkin beer and milk. Whisk until combined. Reduce the heat to low and mix in the sharp cheddar and pepper jack. Continue to cook until the cheese is melted. Season with salt to taste. Keep the pumpkin beer queso warm.
', '
Prepare the soft pretzels according to the package directions. When the pretzels are ready, serve them with the queso. Garnish with chopped chives and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: korean-style-fried-chicken-bao
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lb. chicken breasts, sliced into bite-size chunks', '---- For Breading ----', '1 ½ cups all-purpose flour', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '½ tsp. garlic salt', '½ tsp. celery salt', '1 tsp. dried thyme', '1 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. baking powder', '1 tsp. chili flakes', 'vegetable oil, for deep frying ', '---- To Serve ----', 'bao buns, steamed according to package directions', '1 small red onion, thinly sliced', '¼ cucumber, chopped into small pieces', '1 small bunch cilantro, roughly chopped', '2 tsp. black sesame seeds']
Marinade: ['2 cup buttermilk', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '2 Tbsp. gochujang paste', '2 Tbsp. honey', '4 Tbsp. brown sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/DNs6Mub65VM
', '
Combine all marinade ingredients together and mix well. Add chicken to the marinade and place in the fridge for 2-4 hours.
', '
Remove chicken from the fridge. Heat a large pan of vegetable oil until it has reached 330°F.\xa0 Mix together the breading ingredients in a small bowl. Lift a piece of chicken from the buttermilk mixture and allow the excess to drip off. Dredge the chicken in the breading mixture – ensuring it’s fully coated. Place on a tray and repeat until all of the chicken is coated.
', '
Preheat oven to 200°F. Once the oil is at the proper temperature, add in 10-12 of the chicken pieces, making sure not to overcrowd the pan. Cook for 3-5 minutes until golden brown and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F. Place on a tray in the oven to keep warm whilst you cook the rest of the chicken.
', '
While the chicken is cooking, make the sauce. Place all sauce mix ingredients in a saucepan and stir together. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes until thickened.
', '
Place all of the cooked chicken in a bowl and pour the sauce over the chicken. Toss together to coat.\xa0 Carefully open the steamed bao buns and stuff with the chicken. Top with slices of red onion, cucumber, cilantro and sesame seeds before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: buffalo-chicken-egg-rolls
Ingredients: ['2 cups cooked chicken, shredded ', '1/2 cup shredded sharp cheddar cheese', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 oz. cream cheese, softened to room temperature', '16 egg roll wrappers', 'olive oil or cooking spray']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup buffalo wing sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/74CQiwDim0g
', '
Preheat the oven to 425°F.
', '
In a medium bowl, combine the cooked chicken, buffalo wing sauce, shredded cheese, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cream cheese until well mixed.
', '
With a corner of an egg roll wrapper facing you, place 3 tablespoons of chicken mixture just below the center of the wrapper. Fold the bottom corner over filling; moisten remaining wrapper edges with water. Fold side corners toward center over filling; roll up tightly, pressing at the tip to seal. Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet, seam side down. Repeat, until all wrappers are used.
', '
Spray with cooking spray (or brush with olive oil) and bake until golden brown, 15-20 minutes, turning halfway. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving. Serve warm, with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: pumpkin-shaped-meatball-biscuits
Ingredients: ['1 package (8 pieces) jumbo refrigerated biscuits', '1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '8 frozen cooked 1-inch meatballs', '100% cotton kitchen string', '8 fresh rosemary leaves']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. honey', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/G1Hblh9IHds
', '
To make sauce, combine all sauce mix ingredients and mix well. Set aside.
', '
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Separate biscuits. Roll or pat each piece of dough to 4 ½” diameter.
', '
Place 2 Tbsp. of cheese in the center of one piece of dough. Top with 1/2 teaspoon sauce and one meatball. Bring dough up around the meatball and pinch to seal at top. Loosely tie 100% cotton kitchen string around the dough balls at 1 ½” intervals to resemble the sections of a pumpkin.
', '
Place on prepared baking sheet; bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool for 5 minutes. Carefully remove kitchen string and place rosemary leaves on top of each roll to resemble a stem. Serve warm with more sauce and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: loaded-bulgogi-fries
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ribeye, thinly sliced', '1 cup kimchi, drained, coarsely chopped', '1 (32 oz.) bag frozen French fries', 'sliced scallions, for garnish', 'black and white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1/2 small white onion, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup mayonnaise', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/WBSwrK473KU
', '
For the sriracha aioli: Combine the mayonnaise, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and store in a squeeze bottle for later.
', '
For the bulgogi: Combine the onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and sliced steak in a container and allow to marinate, refrigerated, for at least 6 hours.\xa0
', '
When ready to cook, place a pan over medium-high heat. Drain the marinade and add steak and kimchi to the pan. Cook, stirring frequently, until the steak is cooked and the kimchi is warmed through, about 5 minutes.
', '
Cook fries according to package directions. Place on a serving platter and season with salt and pepper.\xa0 Cover with the bulgogi and kimchi mixture. Drizzle with the sriracha aioli and garnish with sliced scallions and black and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: korean-style-beef-sloppy-joe
Ingredients: ['1 1/2 lb. ground beef ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 cup water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '4 brioche buns, toasted ', '2 stalks green onions, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 cup ketchup', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/1D_Sj5eHB0g
', '
In a large skillet over medium heat, add in the ground beef and cook, breaking it apart. Cook until well browned (5-6 minutes).
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, ketchup, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, water, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar, and stir together well until the sauce starts to evaporate and the mixture becomes "sloppy" (about 5-6 minutes).
', '
Toast the buns then spoon over the mixture and top with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: grinder-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 large loaves of a crusty Italian sub sandwich bread', '1/2 lb. sliced provolone cheese', '1 lb. sliced deli turkey', '1 lb. sliced deli ham', '1/2 lb. sliced soppressata', '1/2 lb. sliced deli pepperoni', '1 large tomato, sliced', '1 head iceberg lettuce, sliced thin']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/TdW3ishVN9w
', '
In a medium bowl, add Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), red wine vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, salt, pepper, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Italian seasoning, pepperoncini peppers, red onion and Parmesan cheese, and whisk to combine. Refrigerate in an airtight container until ready to use.
', '
To assemble the sandwiches: Slice the loaves of bread in half lengthwise. Scoop out some of the bread from each side (this will make the loaves look like boats). This will help make room for the toppings.
', '
Layer the bottom with slices of cheese and add the meats. Season the tomato slices with salt and pepper; place on top of the meats and cheese.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, toss together the lettuce with some of the dressing. Top the sandwich with the salad, followed by the top bun.\xa0
', '
Slice into pieces with a large serrated knife. Enjoy!
']

Name: lettuce-wrap-sauce-pasta-salad
Ingredients: ['16 oz. fusilli pasta, cooked and drained', '6 cups chopped romaine lettuce', '1 cup cherry tomatoes, sliced in half', '1 cup croutons ', '½ cup parmesan, grated ']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap', '1/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/TWYbSW0Qcig
', '
In a large bowl, combine the pasta, romaine lettuce, cherry tomatoes and croutons.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap over the top and season with grounded black pepper from Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder. Gently toss to coat evenly.\xa0
', '
Top with parmesan and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: spicy-cheddar-broccoli-sausage-soup
Ingredients: ['6 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 lb. ground hot Italian sausage', '1 large yellow onion, diced', '2 celery ribs, halved and thinly sliced', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup flour', '3 cups chicken broth', '3 cups milk', '1 cup carrot, quartered and thinly sliced', '4 cups broccoli florets, roughly chopped', '2 cups cheddar cheese, grated, plus extra for garnish', '2 cups pepper jack cheese, grated, plus more for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/MDYvnWINPA8
', '
In a large heavy bottomed pot or Dutch oven, melt 2 Tbsp. of butter over medium-high heat. Add the Italian sausage, onion and celery, and cook until no longer pink, about 10 minutes. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant. Remove all ingredients from the pot and set aside.
', '
Melt the last 4 Tbsp. of butter in the pot. Whisk in flour and cook over medium heat for about 3 minutes, until thickened. While whisking, slowly pour in chicken broth.
', '
Whisk in milk and simmer for about 10 minutes, whisking occasionally, allowing it to thicken.
', '
Add all of the previously cooked ingredients, carrots and broccoli to the pot. Simmer for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until broccoli and carrots are tender.
', '
Remove from heat. Stir in cheeses until completely combined. Add salt and pepper to taste. Garnish with extra cheese and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: salmon-sliders
Ingredients: ['2 lb. salmon filets, skin on', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 16 oz. bag tri-color coleslaw ', '¼ cup cilantro, roughly chopped', '¼ cup green onions, sliced ', '1 bag dinner rolls (around 8 rolls)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Cajun seasoning']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/YB7kBn8wARk
', '
Cut the salmon into eight small pieces and press the skin side of the salmon into the Cajun seasoning. Repeat until all the pieces have been coated on one side.
', '
Heat a large sauté pan on high then add a very small amount of cooking oil to the pan and carefully place the salmon, seasoned-side down in the pan and allow to cook for about 2 minutes. After 2 minutes, carefully turn each piece and sauté on the other side for about 2 minutes. Remove the blackened salmon filets from the pan to a serving dish.
', '
Toss together the tri-color coleslaw, cilantro and green onions in a medium-sized bowl.
', '
In a medium bowl, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, honey, apple cider vinegar and vegetable oil until fully combined. Add the dressing to the slaw mix and toss until all the ingredients are coated with the dressing.
', '
Slice the slider rolls in half and add the blackened salmon, seasoned side up, on the bottom of the slider roll. Top the salmon with Asian slaw. Add the top of the roll, serve and enjoy!
']

Name: chili-crisp-oil-fettucine-alfredo
Ingredients: ['salt, for boiling water', '4 Tbsp. butter', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup heavy cream', '1 lb. dried fettuccine', '¾ cup finely grated Parmesan, plus more for serving', 'parsley, chopped for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, plus more for garnish']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/NwUU_nkFdl8
', '
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
', '
While the water heats, melt the butter with the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic in a very large skillet or Dutch oven over low heat. Whisk in the cream and keep warm over low. (It should steam, not bubble.)
', '
Cook the fettuccine until al dente according to the package directions. Use tongs to transfer the noodles to the cream mixture, reserving the pasta water.\xa0
', '
Add the Parmesan and toss, still over low heat, until the noodles are slicked with a creamy sauce, adding a spoonful or two of pasta water if needed to loosen the sauce.
', '
Divide among serving dishes and top with Parmesan, more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and parsley. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: tom-yum-noodle-soup
Ingredients: ['4 cups chicken stock', '1 stalk lemongrass, sliced into large rings', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ cups shiitake mushrooms, washed and sliced', '¾ cup cherry tomatoes, quartered ', '1 can coconut milk', '2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 cups medium-sized peeled shrimp, deveined and tail-off', '4 oz. rice noodles or ramen noodles, cooked and drained', '⅓ cup cilantro leaves']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/4Oli2MUd_sQ
', '
In a medium-large pot over medium-high heat, add chicken stock and bring to a boil.\xa0
', '
Add the sliced lemongrass, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, stir to combine.
', '
Add the mushrooms, tomatoes, coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Stir to combine and cook for about 5 minutes. Turn the heat down to medium and continue cooking for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add the shrimp and cook for 5 minutes. Then add the cooked noodles and stir to combine.\xa0
', '
Distribute soup between bowls and garnish with cilantro leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: smashed-buffalo-potatoes
Ingredients: ['12-15 baby yellow potatoes', '¼ cup extra virgin olive oil', '1 jalapeño, thinly sliced', '1 stalk celery, diced', '2 Tbsp. chopped chives']
Seasoning: ['3 tsp. kosher salt', '½ cup buffalo hot sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 450˚F. Line a baking sheet with foil and set aside.
', '
Add the potatoes to a pot. Fill the pot with cold water, making sure that it covers the potatoes. Add in 2 teaspoons of kosher salt. Bring the water to a boil and cook for 20-30 minutes until the potatoes are fork tender. Drain the potatoes and set aside to cool.
', '
While the potatoes are cooking, make the blue cheese dressing. Add the sour cream, mayonnaise, blue cheese, milk, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, white wine vinegar, 1 tablespoon of the chives, and garlic powder to a bowl. Mix to combine then set aside.
', '
Grease the bottom of a glass with cooking spray. Use the bottom of the glass to smash the potatoes down to a ½ inch thickness. Place them onto the prepared baking sheet. Drizzle the olive oil on top and sprinkle with the remaining teaspoon of salt.
', '
Place the baking sheet on the bottom rack of the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes until golden brown and crispy on bottom side. Flip the potatoes over and cook for another 10-12 minutes until the other side is crispy.\xa0
', '
When the potatoes are done, transfer them to a platter. Drizzle the blue cheese dressing and hot sauce on top. Top with jalapeño slices, celery, and the remaining chives. Enjoy!
']

Name: taco-stuffed-mini-peppers
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sweet mini peppers', '1 lb. ground beef', '1 1/2 cups cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese, shredded', 'sliced green onions, a little, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. taco seasoning', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/UZCE8pb5qzM
', '
Preheat oven to 350°F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Slice the sweet mini peppers in half, lengthwise and scoop out the seeds. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. with the cut side facing up.
', '
Heat a skillet and add the ground beef. Brown the beef, stirring and breaking up the pieces until it is cooked. Once it is cooked through, sprinkle it with the taco seasoning and add the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Stir to coat it evenly. Taste and season with salt and pepper as needed.
', '
Add 1/2 cup of shredded cheese to the ground beef and stir. Scoop the mixture into the sliced mini peppers.
', '
Top them with the remaining shredded cheese and bake them for 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
', '
Sprinkle with green onion and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
']

Name: skillet-sheperds-pie
Ingredients: ['1lb. ground beef', '1 small onion, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. tomato paste', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour ', '1 ½ cups beef broth', '1 ½ cups frozen vegetable medley', '4 cups prepared mashed potatoes ', '2 Tbsp. butter, melted', 'parsley, chopped, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Italian seasoning', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste ', '½ tsp. garlic powder']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/PCta9zKObdI
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F.
', '
Place a 12" or larger oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat then add ground beef and onions. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Italian seasoning and sauté for 1 minute or until garlic is very fragrant. Add tomato paste, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and stir to combine. Sprinkle in flour then stir to combine and cook for 1 minute.
', '
Gradually pour in beef broth while stirring to avoid clumps then simmer, stirring often, until mixture has thickened, 3-4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Remove skillet from heat then stir in frozen vegetables.
', '
Spoon mashed potatoes on top of meat and vegetables then spread into an even layer. Combine butter and garlic powder in a small dish then use a pastry brush or spoon to brush or drizzle the garlic butter on top.
', '
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until dish is bubbly. Place under broiler set to high to get the top golden brown. Garnish with parsley and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: lemongrass-pineapple-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['1 pineapple', '4 tsp. vegetable oil, divided', '2 eggs, beaten', '¾ lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 red bell pepper, diced', '1 cup julienne carrots', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¾ cup chopped green onion', '2 cups cooked and chilled white rice', '1 cup frozen shelled edamame, thawed', 'juice from ½ a lime', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Sliced the pineapple in half lengthwise. Core out the center of the pineapple halves to create 2 pineapple bowls. Dice the scooped-out pineapple and set aside.\xa0
', '
Heat a large wok over medium-high heat. Pour in 1 teaspoon of vegetable oil. Add in the eggs and cook until scrambled. Remove the eggs from the pan and wipe out the wok.\xa0
', '
Pour in 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil. Add in the shrimp and cook until it has cooked halfway through. Then add in the red bell pepper, pineapple, and carrots. Sauté until the liquid has evaporated, the pineapple has caramelized, and the shrimp is cooked. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, green onion and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant. Remove the vegetables and shrimp from the wok.\xa0
', '
Reduce the heat to medium. Pour in the remaining 2 teaspoons of vegetable oil. Add the rice to the wok and cook until hot, about 3 minutes. Mix in the egg, vegetables, and shrimp. Add in the edamame. Mix until combined and everything is warmed through.\xa0
', '
Pour in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, and lime juice. Mix until well combined. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Fill the pineapple bowls with the fried rice. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: fried-mac-and-cheese-balls
Ingredients: ['3 cups prepared macaroni and cheese, chilled', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup shredded white cheddar cheese ', '2 large eggs', '1 1/2 cups panko breadcrumbs', '2 cups oil, for frying', 'parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/2c5HCHPf2jg
', '
In a bowl, combine the mac n cheese, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cheese. Scoop into 1 ½” balls and place on a baking sheet. Freeze for 15 minutes.
', '
While the balls are chilling, beat two eggs in a bowl with a little water. In a separate bowl, add the panko crumbs.
', '
Remove the balls from the freezer, dip fully in egg wash, roll in panko to completely coat, and place back on baking sheet. Repeat with remaining balls.
', '
Return the balls to the freezer while you heat the oil to 375°F.
', '
When the oil is ready, fry the balls 3 to 4 at a time for 2 minutes or until golden brown. Garnish with parsley and serve warm with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
']

Name: banh-mi-meal-prep-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 1/2 lb. ground pork, or your choice of meat', '2 shallots, chopped', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/3 cup pickled ginger', '4 cups cooked brown rice, for serving', '1 cup wildVINE® Banh Mi Medley Vietnamese Spiced Pickled Vegetables', '1 bunch cilantro, roughly chopped']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1-3 Tbsp. chili paste', '2 Tbsp. maple syrup', '1/3 cup water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/6aLjw9s0KUs
', '
In a small bowl, mix the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, fish sauce, chili paste, and maple syrup. Add the water. Set a few tablespoons of the sauce aside for serving.
', '
Heat the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add in the ground meat, shallots and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
', '
Add in the sauce mix and cook for another 5 minutes, until the meat is broken up and crispy. Mix in the pickled ginger, and let cook for 1 minute. Remove from the heat.
', '
Set out your meal prep containers and add 1 cup of rice into each container. Spoon the meat over the rice and drizzle over the extra sauce.
', '
Top with the wildVINE® Banh Mi Medley Vietnamese Spiced Pickled Vegetables and chopped cilantro. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-chorizo-quiche
Ingredients: ['1 frozen pastry pie shell ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 yellow onion, diced ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ cups gold potatoes, finely diced', '¾ lb. spicy chorizo ', '8 eggs', '¼ cup shredded Manchego cheese', 'green onion, sliced, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, plus more for topping', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/E5PXn4Av2Zs
', '
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Remove pie crust from packaging. Par-bake for 5-7 minutes, then remove from the oven. Reduce oven temperature to 350˚F.
', '
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sauté for 3 minutes. Add potatoes and continue cooking for 15 minutes, until fork tender. Stir often to prevent burning. Add chorizo and continue cooking until browned and fully cooked. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
', '
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, pepper, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce.
', '
Use a spatula to fold in the chorizo/potato mixture and Manchego cheese. Pour into pie crust, then bake for 20-30 minutes, until set.
', '
Remove from the oven and top with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: lettuce-wrap-burger
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef ', '8 cheese slices ', '8 iceberg lettuce leaves', '1 tomato, sliced', '1 red onion, sliced']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '¾ tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. garlic powder', 'Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, for topping', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/2YEMEPdpShU
', '
Combine the ground beef, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap, Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, salt, and garlic powder in a small bowl. Then form 2 patties and press a thumbprint into the center. Cook in a skillet over medium-high heat for 3 to 5 minutes per side or until the internal temperature reaches 155ºF. Add 2 slices of cheese onto each burger and let it melt. Remove to a plate lined with a paper towel to catch any extra grease.
', '
Divide a lettuce leaf onto each plate, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, top with burger patties, tomato slices, red onion slices and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and top each burger with another lettuce leaf. Serve warm and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: poached-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 whole chicken (around 2-3 lbs)']
Seasoning: ['1 pack of Lee Kum Kee White Marinade Kit (includes 1 pack of Premium Marinade Spices and 2 packs of White Marinade Pack)']
Procedure:
['
Add the pouch of Premium Marinade Spices to around 4 cups (32 oz) of water. Bring to a boil, then turn off the heat and cover with a lid for 1 hour.
', '
Add 2 packs of the White Marinade Pack, bring to a rolling boil and carefully submerge the chicken.
', '
Turn the heat down to its lowest setting, and poach for 10 minutes.
', '
Turn the chicken over and poach for another 10 minutes. Rotate the chicken again and poach for another 10 minutes at minimum heat. Slice into bite-sized pieces and enjoy!
', '
Tips: Poach the chicken at the lowest heat setting to ensure the white marinade does not reach too high a temperature. After boiling, turn the hear completely off and wait as the white marinade slightly cools, then continue poaching the chicken at the lowest heat setting.
']

Name: onigirazu
Ingredients: ['1 block firm tofu, pressed', '2 nori sheets', '2 cups cooked sushi rice', '1 avocado, sliced', 'baby spinach, to taste', '1 carrot, thinly sliced', '¼ cup red cabbage, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. maple syrup', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U9WYgoHreQ4
', '
Slice the pressed tofu into thin slices. In a small bowl combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, maple syrup, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar. Pour the mixture over the tofu and let marinate for 30 minutes. Meanwhile, preheat your oven at\xa0350 °F.
', '
Bake for 10-15 minutes at 350 °F until golden brown. Let cool and gather ingredients to build your onigirazu. Place a sheet of plastic wrap on a clean work surface. On top of the plastic wrap, place nori sheets with the shiny side down.
', '
Have a small bowl with water nearby to dip your fingers in so the rice will not stick to your fingers and also help to seal the nori sheet when you wrap it. On top of each nori sheet, place a bit of rice. Form the rice by hand into a square or circle. For each onigirazu, place half teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo in the middle of the rice, then add the other ingredients (avocado, tofu, spinach, carrots, cabbage, half teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce) and end with a layer of rice again.
', '
Fold the nori sheet by starting with the right or left corner of the nori sheet and fold that side to the opposite side. Repeat with the other side. Then fold the top or bottom tip of the nori sheet in the opposite direction. You should have a small packet now. If the tips of the nori sheet don’t stay put, wet the tips of your fingers with a bit of water.\xa0
', '
While folding the nori sheet, use the plastic wrap to tighten the onigirazu. Press down gently and set aside to rest for about 10 minutes to allow the nori sheet to soften. Remove the plastic wrap and with a sharp knife, cut the onigirazu in half. Serve with more Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: cheeseburger-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['4 slices thick cut bacon, roughly chopped', '1 large onion, chopped', '1 lb. ground beef', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 large eggs, lightly beaten', '4 cups cooked white rice', '1 cup sliced or diced dill pickles', '2 cups shredded iceberg lettuce', '2 cups shredded cheddar cheese', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'thinly sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3/4 cup yellow mustard', 'salt & pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'ketchup, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s5v9nMsDhIA
', '
Heat a wok over medium-high heat and cook the bacon until crisp.\xa0 Add in the onions, and continue cooking until soft and almost translucent, about 3-5 minutes. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and mustard; lower the heat to a simmer, cooking for another 60 seconds. Transfer the mustard mixture to a medium bowl, and set aside.
', '
Turn heat back up and add in the ground beef and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, stirring & breaking up meat as it cooks. Continue cooking until completely browned. Stir in salt & pepper, to taste. Drain excess fat and transfer to the bowl with the mustard mixture. Mix and set aside.
', '
Heat the wok over medium heat, and stir in the slightly beaten eggs. Stir them almost continuously across the pan until the eggs are scrambled and set.\xa0
', "
Add the beef mixture to the work, stirring to incorporate the egg. Stir in the rice, tossing until everything's completely combined and evenly incorporated. Mix in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Cook the mixture over medium low heat, stirring/tossing often, until the mixture is hot throughout. Remove the wok from the heat.
", '
Stir in the pickles, lettuce, and cheese. Divide the cheeseburger fried rice evenly into bowls. Drizzle ketchup and then sprinkle with some sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-pork-belly-sandwich
Ingredients: ['½ large yellow onion, thinly sliced', '1 1/2 lb. pork belly, cut into 1/4” slices', '4 ciabatta buns, toasted', 'mayonnaise, to taste', 'lettuce, to taste', 'pickled veggies, to taste']
Marinade: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. organic brown cane sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. cooking wine']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/wtT7BBTGQmc
', '
In a large bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and cooking wine.
', '
Once the marinade is thoroughly mixed, add in onion and pork belly and fully coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least one hour.
', '
When ready to cook, heat a pan to medium-high heat. Sauté the onions and pork belly until fully cooked, about 5-7 minutes per side.\xa0
', '
Place mayonnaise and lettuce on the bottom bun, and top with your cooked spicy pork belly. Place pickled veggies on the pork belly and add top bun. Enjoy!\xa0\xa0
']

Name: spicy-ceviche
Ingredients: ['1 1/2 lb. raw shrimp, peeled, deveined, and cut into bite-sized pieces', '3/4 cup freshly squeezed lime juice, divided', '1 beefsteak tomato, finely diced', '2 Persian cucumbers, finely diced', '1/2 red onion, finely diced', '1 avocado, diced', '1/3 cup cilantro leaves, minced', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', 'tortilla chips, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ja1iShcaxHY
', '
Combine shrimp in a glass bowl with 1/2 cup lime juice. Cover with plastic wrap and transfer to the fridge for 20 minutes until opaque and “cooked”.\xa0
', '
Drain lime juice from the shrimp and toss it with the remaining ingredients. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve immediately with tortilla chips. Enjoy!
']

Name: filipino-style-fiesta-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 pack rice noodles (16oz)', 'water, as needed', '-----For Topping-----', '½ lb. shrimp, shell removed and cooked', '½ cup tinapa flakes (smoked fish)', '½ cup chicharon (pork rind), crushed', '3 hard-boiled eggs, cut into fourths', '¼ cup green onions, sliced', '2 lemons, cut into fourths']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 onion, chopped', '¾ lb. ground pork', '4 cups beef broth', '1 Tbsp. annatto powder, diluted in ¼ cup beef broth (or water)', '1 shrimp bouillon cube', '4 Tbsp. flour, diluted in ¼ cup beef broth (or water)', '2 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/xijBvHmrd5M
', '
Soak the rice noodles in cold water for 15 minutes. Meanwhile, boil enough water in a pot to cook the noodles. Once the noodles are done soaking, drain them from the cold water and then submerge in boiling water for a few minutes, just until they are cooked but still firm, about 3-5 minutes. Once cooked, drain the water and transfer to a large bowl and set aside.
', '
In a saucepan, heat oil over medium heat and add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and chopped onions. Sauté until tender and aromatic. Add in the ground pork and cook for 5 to 7 minutes or until nicely browned.
', '
Add in the beef broth and diluted annatto powder. Bring to a boil. Once boiling, turn down heat slightly and add in shrimp bouillon and simmer for 3 minutes. Mix in the diluted flour, then the fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and ground pepper. Simmer until the sauce becomes thick. Set aside.
', '
Transfer the noodles into a serving plate and then add the sauce. Arrange the topping ingredients over the sauce. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-fishcakes
Ingredients: ['4 rectangle Korean fish cake sheets', '3 cups dashi stock', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 tsp. ketchup ', '2 Tbsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/nmp2zNKmuRI
', '
Soften fish cakes with hot water. Fold a fish cake sheet long ways, three times. Then fold the piece into 3 waves and stick a skewer through it. Repeat the process for remaining sheets.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix all sauce ingredients together and set aside.
', '
In a small pot deep enough to submerge fish cakes, bring dashi to a boil. Mix in prepared sauce then add in skewers.\xa0
', '
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: korean-style-street-toast
Ingredients: ['1 cup thinly sliced green cabbage', '⅓ cup julienned carrot', '2 green onions, thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 large eggs, beaten', '3 Tbsp. salted butter, divided', '2 thick slices white bread', '½ tsp. white sugar', '2 thin slices smoked ham', '1 slice mild cheddar cheese']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '1 Tbsp. ketchup, or to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/oJFVN2FFAWE
', '
Mix cabbage, carrot, green onions, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Mix in eggs until thoroughly combined.
', '
Melt 2 Tbsp. butter in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add bread slices and toast until golden brown and a little crispy on both sides. Set aside.
', "
Melt remaining 1 Tbsp. butter in the same skillet over medium heat. Add cabbage mixture, briefly sauté then form into a rectangle that's about twice as long as it is wide. Cook until the mixture starts to hold its shape then split the rectangle in half into two square patties; continue to cook until golden brown, 1 1/2 to 2 minutes per side. Stack patties on top of each other and onto one slice of toast and sprinkle with sugar.
", '
Place ham slices into the hot skillet; cook over medium heat until sizzling, 1 to 2 minutes. Flip and top with cheddar slice; cook until melted, about 1 minute.
', '
Place ham and cheese on top of patties; top with ketchup, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), and remaining slice of toast. Cut in half and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-pork-katsu
Ingredients: ['8 oz. low-moisture mozzarella block', '4 pork cutlets', '1 cup all purpose flour', '⅛ tsp. turmeric ', '2 eggs, beaten', '1 cup panko bread crumbs', 'neutral cooking oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for serving ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/ba0YGC9SPYg
', '
Cut the mozzarella cheese into 4 even pieces, length-wise. Set aside. Using a meat tenderizer, pound your pork cutlets to about ⅛” thick.
', '
Place a stick of mozzarella in the center of each pork cutlet. Starting from the bottom, carefully roll to wrap the cheese (like a spring roll). Wrap each pork cutlet roll in plastic wrap, making sure the ends are tightly sealed. Repeat this step for the remaining pork cutlets and cheese. Chill the rolled pork cutlets in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
', '
Set up a breading station: In a square baking dish (or something similar) mix flour and turmeric together. In a separate dish, mix eggs, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Place panko in a third dish.\xa0
', '
Unwrap the chilled pork cutlet rolls and dredge in the flour, then into the beaten egg mixture and then into the panko bread crumbs.
', '
Fill a Dutch oven or heavy-bottomed pot halfway with your choice of neutral cooking oil. Heat the oil to 350ºF-360ºF. Once your oil is hot, carefully drop your pork cutlet rolls into the oil. Deep fry your pork cutlets until it reaches an internal temperature of 145ºF. Serve with rice and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-surf-and-turf-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['3/4 lb. flank steak', '1 Tbsp. corn starch  ', '3/4 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 stalks scallions, thinly sliced ', 'steamed rice, for serving ']
Sauce Mix: ['1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'salt, to taste', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Dr0S4tn_3mk
', '
Pat steak dry and thinly slice against grain into ¼”-thick strips. Toss with corn starch in a large bowl until well coated. Set aside. Pat shrimp dry and set aside.
', '
To make the sauce, add all sauce ingredients to a small saucepan and stir occasionally over medium-low heat, about 5 minutes. Once simmering, reduce to low heat to keep sauce warm.
', '
Cook Steak: Heat oil in a large wide pan over medium heat for a few minutes or until hot. Add sliced beef to the hot pan and cook until mostly browned, a few minutes, stirring frequently. Transfer to plate.
', '
Cook Shrimp: Add shrimp to the same pan in a single layer. Cook until turning pink around edges, then flip and cook for another minute or until cooked through.
', '
Return beef to the pan and pour sauce on top. Stir for a minute to let beef and shrimp soak up sauce. Turn off heat. Top with scallions and serve immediately with steamed rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: pork-banh-mi-burger
Ingredients: ['--- For Burger Patty ---', '1 lb. ground pork', '1/4 cup finely chopped fresh basil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 green onions, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. cornstarch', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper', '--- For Assembling ---', '4 brioche buns, toasted', 'cucumbers, to taste', 'fresh jalapeños, sliced, to taste', 'cilantro, to taste', 'pickled veggies, to taste']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/VkzoOvfn0wk
', '
In a large bowl mix all ingredients for pork patties together until fully combined. Portion into 4 equal patties, about ⅓” thick.\xa0
', '
Preheat the grill to medium. Add pork patties to the grill and allow to cook without moving for 5-7 minutes. Flip the patties and repeat with the other side for additional 5-7 minutes, or until internal temperature of 160°F.\xa0
', '
To assemble the burgers: Add some Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) to both sides of the toasted buns and top with the pork patty, cucumbers, jalapeños, cilantro and plenty of pickled vegetables. Serve immediately and Enjoy!
']

Name: tteok-and-cheese
Ingredients: ['2 cups tteok, or Korean-style rice cakes', 'paprika, to taste', 'green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup heavy whipping cream', '2 cups shredded sharp cheddar cheese', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/XH9-PU4NsiM
', '
Boil the tteok according to the package until fully cooked.
', '
While the tteok cooks, in a saucepan over medium-low heat, combine heavy whipping cream, shredded sharp cheddar cheese, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder\xa0and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Stirring occasionally, cook until thickened.
', '
Add rice cakes to pot of sauce, then plate. Top with fresh cracked black pepper, paprika and green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: japanese-style-ginger-oysters
Ingredients: ['24 shucked oysters', '2 oz. salmon roe']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ inch piece of ginger grated', '2 green onion, julienne (extra for garnish)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. granulated sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the ginger, green onion, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, granulated sugar, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce to a bowl. Mix to combine then let it sit for 5 minutes.
', '
Place the oysters onto a serving platter filled with ice.\xa0
', '
Spoon the prepared sauce mixture into each oyster, topping with the green onion and a small dollop of salmon roe. Enjoy!
']

Name: strawberry-watermelon-feta-salad-with-a-soy-balsamic-glaze
Ingredients: ['2 cups mixed greens', '4 cups watermelon, sliced into triangles', '3 cups sliced strawberries', '1 English cucumber, sliced', '¼ cup torn basil leaves', '1 cup feta, sliced into triangles', 'olive oil, for drizzling', '¼ cup roughly chopped pistachios']
Procedure:
['
Add the cornstarch and water to a small bowl. Whisk until combined and all the cornstarch has been incorporated. Add the brown sugar, balsamic vinegar, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce to a sauce pot. Mix to combine then heat it over medium heat until it comes to a boil and the sugar has dissolved.\xa0
', '
Stir the cornstarch and water mixture again then pour it into the pot. Mix to combine. Decrease the heat to low and simmer the mixture for about 3 minutes until the sauce thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon. Remove the pot from heat and set it aside to cool to room temperature.\xa0
', '
Add the mixed greens, watermelon, strawberries, cucumber, basil leaves, and feta to a large bowl. Gently toss to combine. Drizzle olive oil and the prepared soy balsamic glazed over top. Sprinkle the pistachios on top. Enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-kimchi-hot-dogs
Ingredients: ['4 hot dogs', '4 hot dog buns', '1 cup kimchi', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'green onion, sliced, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '1 cup whole milk', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '8 oz. shredded cheddar cheese', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ev0Eu9Q3Pfk
', '
Make the cheese sauce: Melt butter in a small pot over medium heat. Add flour and whisk together for 2 minutes. Stir in milk and continue to whisk for 2 to 3 minutes or until mixture is smooth. Add Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and cheese; whisk together until smooth. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Set aside and keep warm while you grill your hotdogs.
', '
Heat up your grill on medium-high heat, place the hotdogs on the grill and cook for about 7-10 minutes flipping halfway.
', '
Toast the buns in the oven or on the grill until slightly crispy.
', '
To serve, place the hotdogs in the buns, top with kimchi, and spoon on the spicy cheese sauce. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onion. Enjoy!
']

Name: burrata-and-prosciutto-tomato-salad-with-honey-chili-oil
Ingredients: ['6 cups arugula ', '8 oz. burrata', '3 tomatoes, quartered', '½ cup sliced red onion', '3 oz. prosciutto', '2-3 Tbsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup honey', '2 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine the honey and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Set aside.
', '
Place the arugula onto a serving platter. Rip the burrata into pieces and place them onto the arugula. Arrange the tomatoes and red onion around the salad. Rip the prosciutto slices into smaller pieces and add them onto the salad.\xa0
', '
Drizzle the olive oil over the burrata. Sprinkle salt and pepper over top. Drizzle the honey and chili crisp mixture over top. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-garlic-parm-wings
Ingredients: ['2 ½ lb. chicken party wings', '4 Tbsp. grated parmesan']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. baking powder', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '¼ tsp. paprika']
Sauce Mix: ['5 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. chopped parsley']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/R7nsT3B6ZVg
', '
Pat the wings completely dry using paper towels. In a large bowl, season the wings with baking powder, salt, garlic powder, black pepper, and paprika, coating evenly on both sides. Place on a wire rack over a baking sheet and allow to sit in the fridge for at least 1 hour, but preferably overnight.\xa0
', '
When ready to cook, position a rack in the upper third of the oven and preheat to 450ºF. Line a baking sheet with foil, then place a wire rack on top of the baking sheet. Spray the wire rack with cooking spray to keep the wings from sticking to it.
', '
Place the wings on the wire rack and bake for 28-38 minutes, depending on the size of the wings, flipping them after the first 18 minutes until they’re golden and cooked through.\xa0
', '
While the wings are cooking, add the butter, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and parsley into a sauce pan. Cook over low heat until butter is melted. Keep warm until wings are done.
', '
Transfer the wings to a large bowl, drizzle with the garlic butter and toss to coat all the wings evenly. Sprinkle with parmesan and continue to toss until evenly coated. Plate and serve warm. Enjoy!
']

Name: cantonese-style-beef-stew
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. oil', '21 oz. beef (diced) ', '7 oz. onion (diced) ', '7 oz. carrot (diced) ', '5 oz. daikon or white radish (diced) ', '5 oz. mushrooms (sliced) ', '1 oz. dried shiitake mushroom (sliced) ', '1 ½ cup water ', 'some cornstarch for thickening if needed']
Seasoning: ['1 pack of Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Cantonese Beef Stew ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 pack of Lee Kum Kee Slow Cook Sauce for Cantonese Beef Stew ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ']
Procedure:
['
Heat 1 tsp. oil in a pan and pan-fry the meat until browned.\xa0
', '
Place into a slow cooker (if using) with all remaining ingredients and seasonings. Season to taste.\xa0
', '
Cook 4-6 hours on high or 8 hours on low.
', '
Add more water as needed. Add a little cornstarch to thicken as required.\xa0
', '
Serve with steamed vegetables, rice, noodles or mashed potatoes.\xa0
']

Name: korean-style-sweet-spicy-chicken-bites
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless skinless chicken thigh, trimmed and cut into bite sized pieces ', '1/2 cup milk ', '⅓ cup cornstarch', 'oil for deep frying', 'coarsely chopped peanuts, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1/4 tsp. salt', 'pinch pepper', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. mirin', '2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '3 Tbsp. honey', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', 'pinch pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/9KLj_Qyl3Ks
', '
Place chicken and milk into a medium bowl and place in the fridge for at least 30 minutes. Drain well and mix with the salt, pepper, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Let marinate for 20 to 30 minutes.
', '
In a pan, combine all sauce ingredients and whisk together. Bring to a boil then reduce the heat to medium low, and simmer until it thickens slightly, about 3 to 4 minutes. Turn the heat off.
', '
Pour about 1 inch of oil into a heavy bottom pan and heat to 330°F. Coat each chicken piece well with the cornstarch and to hot oil one at a time, making sure not to overcrowd the pan. Fry them in two batches, if necessary. Cook until light golden brown, about 3-5 minutes. Remove and set on a wire rack or a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
', '
Warm up the sauce over medium low heat. Add the chicken and toss well until the chicken pieces are evenly coated.
', '
Garnish with chopped peanuts. Enjoy!
']

Name: blackened-fish-tacos
Ingredients: ['4 tilapia filets', '12-15 small flour or corn tortillas', '2 cups shredded cabbage', '1 cup pickled red onion', '4 radishes, thinly sliced', '1 jalapeño, sliced', 'cilantro leaves, for serving', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2-3 Tbsp. Cajun seasoning']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup crema', '3 Tbsp. mayo', '1 garlic clove', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ Tbsp. lime juice', '⅛ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Add the crema, mayo, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, lime juice, and salt to a food processor. Blend until smooth and combined. Transfer the crema to a Ziploc bag and cut a small hole at one of the corners. Set aside.
', '
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease.\xa0
', '
Slice the tilapia in half lengthwise. Then cut each half in half. Season all sides of the tilapia with Cajun seasoning then place them onto the baking sheet. Cook them in the oven for 12-15 minutes until cooked through.\xa0
', '
Char and warm the tortillas in a small pan over medium-high heat or directly on the burner if you have a gas burner.
', '
To assemble the tacos, place a piece of tilapia onto a tortilla. Top with shredded cabbage, pickled red onion, radish slices, jalapeño slices, and cilantro leaves. Drizzle the crema on top. Serve with lime wedges and enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-noodle-dogs
Ingredients: ['6 packets ramen', '6 pcs. wooden skewers', '6 pcs. string cheese', 'sunflower oil', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['3 cups nacho cheese', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/KgJi6YvEfy8
', '
Cook ramen and spread out noodles onto a cooling rack to drain any excess liquid.
', '
Insert skewers into string cheese. Mix nacho cheese and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce together and place into a tall cup. Dip one prepared cheese stick into the cup filled with the cheese. Coat evenly and then roll in a layer of ramen noodles until completely covered.\xa0
', '
Fry in hot oil until golden brown. Repeat with the remaining cheese sticks.
', '
While cheese sticks are frying, make the dipping sauce. Combine Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and chives together; mix until smooth.
', '
Garnish cheese sticks with chives and serve immediately with sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-vermicelli-bowl
Ingredients: ['flank steak, cut into thin strips against the grain', 'vermicelli noodles (Dong Guan style), to taste', '1 Tbsp. oil', 'Toppings:', '5 – 6 lettuce leaves, shredded', '1 large cucumber, chopped in matchsticks', 'pickled carrots, to taste', '½ lime', 'roasted peanuts, crushed (optional)', '1/4 bunch cilantro, roughly chopped', 'bean sprouts, to taste', 'handful of mint leaves (optional)']
Marinade: ['3 garlic cloves, finely chopped', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/zVOoMVvYasY
', '
Combine all the marinade ingredients in a bowl, reserving ¼ of it for dressing the finished bowl. In the remaining marinade, mix in the beef strips and set aside.
', '
Cook your rice noodles as directed on the packaging and leave it in a strainer until needed.\xa0
', '
Heat a large skillet or wok on medium-high. Add 1 Tbsp. of oil and flash fry the beef strips until medium/medium-rare.
', '
Bowl Assembly: In each bowl, place the rice noodles in first and then all the toppings on top. Pour the reserved marinade/dressing over the top and finish with crushed peanuts (if using). Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-honey-buffalo-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['3 lb. chicken party wings', 'cilantro leaves, for topping', 'sliced serrano pepper, for topping']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. garlic powder', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 Tbsp. baking powder', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Sauce Mix: ['5 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '½ cup honey', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with foil and generously grease it with oil.\xa0
', '
Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Add the garlic powder, Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, kosher salt, baking powder, and cornstarch to a resealable plastic bag. Shake to combine the spices. Add in the chicken wings then tightly seal the bag. Shake until the chicken wings are well coated in the dry mixture.\xa0
', '
Place the chicken wings onto the baking sheet in a single layer and place it in the oven to bake for 45-50 minutes until the chicken wings are browned and cooked through.
', '
While the chicken wings are baking, make the sauce. Add the butter to a small pot and melt over medium heat. Mix in the honey, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and lime juice. Bring the mixture to a bubble then remove it from the heat and set aside.\xa0
', '
Add the chicken wings to a large bowl then pour the sauce over top. Toss the wings and sauce together until well coated. Top with cilantro leaves and sliced serrano peppers. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-garlic-shrimp-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 lb. udon noodles, frozen', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '½ lb. jumbo shrimp, peeled & deveined', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. green onion, finely chopped (plus more for garnish)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. white granulated sugar', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/GRZZlhuhebw
', '
Soak your frozen udon noodles in hot boiling water just until loosened, about 30 seconds. Strain immediately and set aside.
', '
In a large sauté pan, set over medium heat, add vegetable oil. Once oil is hot, sauté shrimp until pink and cooked through. Remove shrimp and set aside.
', '
Lower pan to medium-low heat and add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and green onions. Then quickly add in all sauce mix ingredients in the listed order. Toss in udon noodles and mix well until noodles are coated in sauce.
', '
Once noodles begin to steam, add in shrimp. Remove from heat.\xa0
', '
Garnish with sesame seeds and more green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
