Name: filipino-style-pork-skewers
Ingredients: ['3 lb. boneless pork butt']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '⅓ cup lemon juice', '⅔ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '½ cup ketchup', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 cup lemon-lime soda', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/u9-UVGT8rCo
', '
Partially freeze the meat for about an hour to make slicing easier. Slice thinly (about ¼-inch thick and 1½-inch wide) and across the grain. Keep them uniform in size, so they cook evenly.
', '
In a large bowl, mix all marinade ingredients, add sliced pork and mix well. Cover the bowl, place in the refrigerator and marinate for 2 to 8 hours.
', '
Thread the meat onto skewers by bunching them together, creating folds like an accordion.
', '
In a medium saucepan over medium heat, cook leftover marinade for about 10 minutes to slightly thicken.\xa0
', '
Preheat grill or grill pan over medium heat and brush with a neutral oil. Cook for 4 minutes, then brush with the sauce, turn, brush again, and continue cooking until the internal temperature of the meat reaches 140°F. Serve with rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: chocolate-chili-brownies
Ingredients: ['⅓ cup cocoa powder', '1 tsp. instant coffee ', '1¼ cups boiling water', '2 oz. unsweetened chocolate, finely chopped', '6 oz. 60% cacao dark chocolate chips', '½ cup butter, melted', '¼ cup vegetable oil', '¼ cup oil from Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '2 large eggs', '2 large egg yolks', '2 tsp. vanilla extract', '2 ½ cups sugar', '1 ¾ cups flour']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/M4dGPvPtWyc
', '
Preheat your oven to 350°F and spray a 9 x 13 pan with cooking spray, set aside.
', '
Whisk together cocoa powder, instant coffee, and boiling water together in a large bowl until smooth. Add in unsweetened chocolate, chocolate chips and whisk until chocolate is mostly melted.
', '
To the same bowl, whisk in melted butter, vegetable oil and oil from Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Add in eggs, egg yolks, vanilla extract, sugar and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce; Whisk until fully incorporated. Then mix in flour and salt until no streaks of flour remain.
', '
Scrape batter into prepared pan and bake until toothpick inserted halfway between edge and center comes out with just a few moist crumbs attached, 30 to 35 minutes.
', '
Transfer pan to wire rack and cool 1½ hours. Cut, serve, and enjoy!
']

Name: char-siu-tacos
Ingredients: ['8 taco shells', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 red onion, thinly sliced', '1 pc of 4 oz. pork belly, thinly sliced', '1 garlic clove, crushed', '½ cucumber, cut into thin strips', '5 oz. bean sprouts, washed and drained', 'shredded parsley, a little, for garnish', '4 Tbsp. unsalted roasted peanuts, minced, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce (Chinese Barbecue Sauce)']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. mayonnaise', '1  lime, grated zest and juice']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 270°F
', '
Mix the mayonnaise with the lime zest and juice. Put the mayonnaise in a piping bag, if wished.
', '
Bake the taco shells crispy as instructed on the box.
', '
Heat the oil in a wok and fry the onions for 3-4 minutes until softened, remove form the wok. Add the pork belly, stir fry over medium high heat for approximately 10 minutes or until golden and cooked through. Add softened onion and garlic then cook for a further minute.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce (Chinese Barbecue Sauce) in pork mixture, mix everything together then remove the wok from the heat. Fill the tacos with cucumber, bean sprouts and seasoned pork mixture.
', '
Pipe or drizzle the lime mayonnaise on the tacos and garnish with shredded parsley and peanuts.
']

Name: chicken-skewers-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['7 oz chicken thigh fillet, cut into small cubes', '8 wooden skewers, soaked', '1 red pepper, chopped', '1 green pepper, chopped', '1 onion, chopped']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', "1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee's Premium Oyster Sauce"]
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken with the marinade for about 30 minutes.
', '
Thread the cubed chicken with pepper and onion onto 8 wood skewers.
', '
Grill or barbecue for 5 minutes, turn once during cooking until golden brown, or to your liking then serve.
']

Name: chicken-and-cabbage-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil, divided', '4 medium chicken breasts, sliced thin', '1 bunch green onions, sliced (whites and greens separated)', '1 medium red bell pepper, sliced', '1 medium zucchini, sliced into rounds', '1 small head of broccoli, cut into florets', '1 ½ cups Wildbrine Roasted Garlic Kraut', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/g4ys-9kqDmk
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and sauté for about 5 minutes, or until browned and cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside.
', '
Add the remaining tablespoon of oil to the pan along with the whites of the green onions, red bell pepper, zucchini and broccoli. Cook for 4-6 minutes, or until the veggies just barely start to soften. Add in Wildbrine Roasted Garlic Kraut and sauté for an additional 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add chicken back in and mix in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Toss until chicken is warmed through. Taste for seasoning and adjust if needed.
', '
Divide the cabbage stir fry between 4 plates and top with greens of the onions and garnish with sesame seeds. Serve with a side of Wildbrine Roasted Garlic Kraut. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: flag-taco-dip
Ingredients: ['1 cup crushed blue corn tortilla chips, plus more uncrushed for serving', '1 (8 oz. block) Monterey Jack cheese', '1 cup quartered grape tomatoes', '1 jar roasted red bell pepper, drained and diced ', '8 oz. Monterey Jack cheese, shredded']
Sauce Mix: ['2 (8 oz.) packages cream cheese, softened', '1 jar (16 oz.) chunky salsa', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 cup sour cream', '2 cups Colby cheese, shredded ', '1/2 cup chopped green onions']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/3pGt0XCaMQc
', '
In the bowl of a stand mixer, beat the cream cheese, salsa, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), sour cream, Colby cheese and green onions until blended. Spread mixture into the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch baking dish.\xa0
', '
Arrange the crushed tortilla chips in a rectangle on top-left corner of the Colby mixture, about 5 x 4-inches.
', '
Cut 1 block Monterey Jack cheese in half into two blocks, each about 1/2-inch thick. Cut slices with a 1 1/2-inch star cookie cutter. Place stars on chips in top left corner.
', '
Combine tomatoes and red bell peppers in a bowl. For stripes, arrange tomato mixture and shredded Monterey Jack in alternating rows, each about 1-inch. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or until serving.
', '
Serve with the reserved tortilla chips. Enjoy!
']

Name: red-white-and-blue-salad
Ingredients: ['2 pints cherry tomatoes', '1 pint blueberries', 'firm buffalo mozzarella cheese, to taste', '½ cup fresh basil, torn ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/8KQK401n068
', '
Make Dressing: In a bowl or mason jar, add balsamic vinegar, oil from Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Dijon mustard. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Shake or whisk until combined.
', '
Half cherry tomatoes and toss in a serving bowl with blueberries, set aside.
', '
Slice mozzarella cheese into ¼ or ½" slices and then cut into small stars with a cookie cutter. Top the tomatoes and blueberries with the star cheese and toss in torn basil. Drizzle dressing over salad. Enjoy!
']

Name: cream-cheese-spring-rolls
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '1 oz. water', '8 spring roll wrappers', 'peanut oil, for frying']
Sauce Mix: ['8 oz. wildCREAMERY Dairy-Free Cream Cheese', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce ', '2 cups shredded cheddar cheese', '3 jalapeño peppers, seeded and diced']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/piFLiVsJN98
', '
In the bowl of a stand mixer, combine the wildCREAMERY Dairy-Free Cream Cheese, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, shredded cheddar, and diced jalapeños. Chill the cheese mixture in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
', '
Make a paste by stirring the flour and water together and set aside for sealing the spring roll wrapper closed.
', '
Divide the cheese mixture into 8 even pieces and with your hands, roll into a log shape. Place a wrapper on a cutting board with 1 corner pointing toward you. Place a cheese log near that corner, on the lower half of the wrapper. Wrap bottom corner around the cheese and roll the whole thing up until the cheese log is level with the 2-sided corner. At this point fold both side corners to the center. Continue to roll it up until almost to the top corner. Add some of the flour paste on that top corner and finish rolling, sealing the eggroll. Let eggrolls rest for about 10 minutes while the oil is heating.
', '
Fill a large heavy Dutch oven no more than halfway full with peanut oil. Heat the oil to 375°F.
', '
When the oil reaches temperature, gently place a few of the eggrolls into the oil. Fry for about 2 minutes or until the wrapper is golden brown. When the spring rolls are done, lift them out of the oil with a slotted spoon and let them drain on a cooling rack over a sheet pan lined with paper towels. Repeat with remaining spring rolls. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before eating. Dip in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and enjoy!
']

Name: mushroom-cheung-fun
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8-9 oz. mixed mushrooms (such as shiitake, oyster, etc.), thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. thinly sliced scallions, plus more for garnish', '3 Tbsp. chopped cilantro', '⅓ cup rice flour', '¼ cup potato starch', '⅛ cup tapioca starch', '2 Tbsp. glutinous rice flour', '½ tsp. salt', '2 cups room temperature filtered water']
Seasoning: ['1/4 tsp. kosher salt', '1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/quDlqcA9VVE
', '
Stir fry mushrooms: Heat a pan with oil over medium-high heat. Add the mushrooms and sauté them for 2 minutes. Season with ¼ teaspoon of kosher salt. Transfer the mushrooms to a bowl and toss with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, scallions, and cilantro. Let the mushrooms cool for 10 minutes.
', '
Make batter: In a large mixing bowl, add the rice flour, potato starch, tapioca starch, glutinous rice flour, and ½ teaspoon of salt, and blend together. Add the two cups of filtered water in the dry ingredient bowl and whisk together. Rest the liquid for at least 20 minutes on the counter.
', '
Make rice noodles: Place a steaming rack in the center of a large,14-inch wok. Fill the wok with water, enough so that the water level is just below the steamer rack. Cover the wok with a domed lid and bring the water to boil. You can leave the steaming rack in the wok as the water boils. Lightly brush an 8×8 square baking pan with oil. Pour just over 1/3 cup of batter to cover the bottom of the pan. Scatter some of the mushroom filling an inch above the bottom edge.
', '
Uncover the wok and carefully lay the square pan over the steaming rack. Cover the wok and steam the noodle for 2 minutes. Use oven mitts or a towel to remove the pan. Let the cheung fun cool on a cooling rack for a few minutes before using a scraper to roll it up.
', '
Let the steamed noodle roll rest for about two minutes to allow the texture to firm. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil over the roll and garnish with green onion. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-cobb-salad
Ingredients: ['1 1/2 cups chopped cooked chicken', '1 head romaine lettuce, chopped', '7 slices bacon, cooked and crumbled', '3 hard-boiled eggs, finely chopped', '1 avocado, chopped', '1 cup grape tomatoes, quartered', '1/2 red onion, finely chopped', '1/3 cup crumbled blue cheese']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xGPoNp1xyyI
', '
Make salad dressing. Combine Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, mustard, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, mayonnaise and vinegar in a bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Refrigerate until needed.
', '
In a medium bowl, mix the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil together. Add in chicken and mix until fully coated.\xa0
', '
Place greens in salad bowl. Arrange chicken, bacon, eggs, avocado, tomato, red onion and blue cheese on top of greens.
', '
Just before serving, drizzle dressing over the salad and toss. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-ramen-dumplings
Ingredients: ['1 packet favorite ramen', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '6 sheets rice paper', '2 slices Swiss cheese, cut into 6 small pieces', '2 stalks green onions, finely chopped', '1-2 tsp. cooking oil ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/B_PgEHzzBXM
', '
Cook the noodles according to package instructions. Drain and mix with half of the seasoning packet that came with the ramen. Mix in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Set aside.
', '
Pour some warm water onto a plate and soak a piece of rice paper for around 30 seconds, until soft and pliable. Place the rice paper down on a clear surface. Add 1-2 Tbsp. of the noodles to the center of the wrapper, then place a piece of Swiss cheese and some green onions on top.
', "
Wrap into a parcel and set them aside on a lightly oiled plate so the dumplings don't stick. Repeat this process for 6 dumplings (make sure to leave some leftover green onion for the spicy dipping sauce).
", '
In a frying pan, heat the oil over medium-high heat. Place in your dumplings and fry for 4 minutes on each side.
', '
In a small bowl, add your mayonnaise, leftover green onions and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Drizzle with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil if you want it extra spicy. Enjoy!
']

Name: rice-cooker-lap-cheong-rice
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups jasmine rice', '3 cups water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', 'lap cheong (Chinese sausage), to taste', 'green onions, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/hj9U9TeJ7mc
', '
Add rice and water to your rice cooker.\xa0
', '
Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, add the lap cheong (Chinese sausage), and turn on the rice cooker.\xa0
', '
Once the rice is finished, remove sausage and slice. Mix in Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce with the rice. Put the sausage back to the pot and mix.
', '
Serve the rice and sausage mix in a bowl. Top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-chicken-teriyaki-quesadilla
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken thighs', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 large flour tortillas', 'Mexican-style shredded cheese, to taste', '1-2 avocados, diced', 'a pinch cilantro, chopped', 'salsa, to serve', 'sour cream, to serve', 'limes, to serve', 'cilantro, to serve']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. brown sugar', '3 Tbsp. sake', '3 Tbsp. mirin', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=Gzh6eelHJNQ&feature=youtu.be
', '
For teriyaki marinade, combine brown sugar, sake, mirin, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin sauce and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic in a bowl. Whisk well until the sugar has dissolved completely. Add chicken to the bowl and marinate for two hours.
', '
Heat a skillet on medium heat and add olive oil to the pan. Once hot, cook chicken for 6-7 minutes per side. Remove to a cutting board and let cool. Once cooled, cut the chicken into strips or cubes and get ready to assemble your quesadillas.
', '
Heat the griddle pan or frying pan over medium low heat. Place tortillas to warm up and flip once. Place a generous amount of cheese on the tortillas. Then to one half of the tortilla, add teriyaki chicken, avocado, cilantro and a generous squirt of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Fold over the other side of the tortilla and cook until the cheese is melted and both sides are golden and crispy.
', '
Cut each quesadilla into 3 or 4 triangles. Serve immediately with salsa, sour cream, lime, cilantro and more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: easy-egg-bites
Ingredients: ['nonstick spray', '7 large eggs', '1/4 cup milk ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 cup baby spinach, chopped ', '1 small tomato, diced and seeded', '4 strips bacon, cooked and crumbled', '1/4 cup shredded cheddar cheese']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/L-KMKuYB9Qo
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
', '
Spray a regular sized muffin tin generously with nonstick spray.
', '
In a medium bowl mix eggs, milk, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, salt, and pepper to taste.
', '
To each muffin slot, add about 1 Tbsp. of greens, tomatoes, bacon, and a sprinkle of cheese. Pour over egg mixture to each slot leaving little room at the top.
', '
Bake egg bites for 20 minutes. If the top is not fully cooked return to the oven cooking in 3-minute increments. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
']

Name: oyster-sauce-okra
Ingredients: ['½ tsp. cornstarch', '¼ cup water', '1 lb. okra', 'neutral oil', '½ tsp. salt, or more to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Thai chili peppers, chopped']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/COodpWfn7Fk
', '
Prepare the sauce: Place Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a bowl and whisk to combine. In another bowl, mix together cornstarch and water to make a slurry. Set both mixtures aside.
', '
Cook the okra: Prepare a bowl of cold water and set it aside. Fill a large pot with water and bring to a boil. Add a drizzle of oil and salt. Then, cook the okra for 2 minutes. Remove and transfer the okra to the cold water and let it sit for 2-3 minutes, then drain. Cut off the top and end of the okra and slice it in half or leave it as a whole. Arrange the prepared okra on a plate.
', '
Heat a small non-stick skillet over medium heat and add some oil. Sauté Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Thai chili for 30 seconds until garlic is fragrant. Lower heat and add the sauce and cornstarch mix, quickly stir to combine. Cook until thickened and pour over okra.
', '
Mix the sauce with okra before serving. This dish can be served at room temperature or as a cold dish. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-meat-loaded-pizza
Ingredients: ['1 lb. spicy Italian sausage', '1 lb. pizza dough', '¾ cup pizza sauce', '2 cups grated mozzarella cheese', '⅓ cup grated parmesan cheese', '½ cup pepperoni slices', '½ cup diced carved ham', '1-2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven according to the pizza dough package directions.
', '
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Remove the sausage from the casings and add it into the pan. Cook and crumble the sausage until browned and cooked through. Remove the sausage from the pan and set it aside.
', '
Grease your hands with olive oil then stretch the pizza dough out into a circle 14-inches in diameter. Make sure the edges are a bit thicker to form the crust. Place the pizza dough onto a baking sheet. Spread the pizza sauce onto the pizza dough in an even layer. Sprinkle the mozzarella cheese and parmesan cheese on top. Evenly distribute the pepperoni, ham, and sausage all over the pizza.
', '
Brush the edge of the pizza crust with olive oil. Bake it in the oven according to the pizza dough package directions or until the cheese has melted and the crust is golden brown. Remove the pizza from the oven and drizzle Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil all over the top. Enjoy!
']

Name: grilled-king-oyster-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['16 oz. king oyster mushrooms', 'cooking oil ', 'green onion, sliced, for garnish']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 tsp. five-spice powder']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/_XObc7HD9xM
', '
Trim off the bottom of the mushrooms and cut into thick slices, about ½ inch thick. Score each side of the mushroom slices in a crisscross pattern. Be careful not to cut all the way through.
', '
In a mixing bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and five-spice powder. Reserve about ⅓ of the sauce and toss the mushrooms with the remaining sauce and marinate for 20-30 minutes or up to an hour at room temperature.
', '
Preheat your grill or your cast iron griddle/grill pan over medium heat. Once the grill is hot, lightly oil the grates. Shake off excess marinade and then place mushrooms on the grill in a single layer.
', '
Grill each side for about 3 minutes. Baste with the reserved marinade and grill each side for another minute. Transfer to serving plates, garnish with green onion, and serve right away. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-kimchi-dip
Ingredients: ['green onions, sliced, for garnish', 'furikake, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup kimchi ', '8 oz. cream cheese, room temperature', '8 oz. sour cream', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/8eF0CrxjtYk
', '
Strain kimchi and reserve the juice.
', '
Into the bowl of a food processor, add the kimchi, the softened cream cheese, sour cream, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Blend until smooth. Add in juice from kimchi to thin the dip to your preference.
', '
Transfer kimchi dip to serving bowl and top with the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Garnish with green onions and sprinkle with furikake.
', '
Serve with your favorite potato chips, pork rinds or sliced cucumbers. Enjoy!
']

Name: chinese-style-nachos
Ingredients: ['6 oz. small wonton wrappers, cut in half diagonally (about 24 wrappers) ', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil (plus cooking spray)', '2 jalapeños - 1 finely diced and 1 thinly sliced ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '1 lb. ground chicken ', '1 heaping cup shredded Monterey Jack cheese', '1 heaping cup shredded Pepper Jack cheese or Colby Jack', '¼ red onion, thinly sliced', 'optional garnish: thinly sliced scallions, chopped cilantro, sliced avocado, shredded red cabbage, lime wedges, sliced red chile, sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'pepper, to taste', '2 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. creamy peanut butter ', '1-2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce (or to taste)', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. lime juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=skrCKzaqFls
', '
Make the peanut sauce: Add all the sauce mix ingredients to a small bowl. Whisk until smooth. Taste and adjust for seasoning with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce or Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. If you like a thinner consistency, add a bit of water. Set the peanut sauce aside until ready to use. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line two sheet large rimmed baking sheets with aluminum foil and spray aluminum with non-stick cooking spray.
', '
For the wonton chips: Divide the cut wontons between the baking sheets, making sure to arrange the wontons in a single layer. Spray the wontons evenly with a bit of cooking spray. Season generously with salt. Bake (on the upper 1/3rd and middle shelves of the oven) until golden brown, about 7-10 minutes, rotating the pans from top to middle half way through cooking. Remove from oven and let cool.
', '
Meanwhile, prepare the chicken: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet, or wok, over medium-high heat. Add the diced jalapeño and cook until softened, about 2 minutes. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add in the chicken and season generously with salt and pepper. Cook, using a spoon to break it up into smaller pieces, until almost cooked through and starting to brown, about 6-8 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Cook, stirring, until the liquid is reduced and coats the chicken, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat. Taste and adjust for seasoning with salt and pepper.
', '
Assemble the nachos: Arrange all the chips on one baking sheet. Spoon the chicken mixture over the chips. Top with both cheeses, the red onions and the sliced jalapeños. Bake until the cheese is melted and bubbling, about 10 minutes. Garnish with desired toppings and drizzle with peanut sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-wonton-tacos
Ingredients: ['2 cups chicken, cooked and shredded', '1 bag  (14 oz.) coleslaw mix', '2 Tbsp. green onion (sliced thin)', '16 wonton wrappers', '1 Tbsp. fresh cilantro (minced)', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. lime juice ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1 tsp. lime juice ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/E9oAN6qBRtc
', '
Prep Chicken: In a medium bowl, mix all marinade ingredients and chicken together. Set aside.
', '
Make Coleslaw: In a medium bowl, mix the coleslaw and green onions together. In a small bowl, whisk together all sauce mix ingredients and pour over the coleslaw and toss well. Cover and keep in the refrigerator until needed.
', '
Make Tacos: Preheat oven to 375°F. Place the wonton wrappers over the edge of a 9×13-inch pan and spray with cooking spray. Bake until lightly browned, about 7 minutes, keeping a close eye on them to prevent burning.
', '
Spoon the chicken evenly into the wontons.
', '
Top each one with coleslaw. Garnish with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and a sprinkle of cilantro and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: stir-fry-rice-cakes
Ingredients: ['8 oz. pork loin, cut into thin strips', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '6 shiitake mushrooms, thinly sliced', '3 scallions, sliced diagonally into 1 inch pieces', '8 oz. baby bok choy, separated into individual leaves', '1 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '1 lb. fresh rice cakes', '1/2-3/4 cup water', '1/2 tsp. sugar', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', 'salt, to taste']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. water', '1 tsp. vegetable oil', '1/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Kpqyprxu6ew
', '
In a large bowl, add all the marinade ingredients and mix well. Add in sliced pork and allow to sit for 20-30 minutes.
', '
Place your wok over high heat until it begins to smoke lightly. Add the vegetable oil to coat the wok, then add the\xa0marinated pork and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook until the pork turns opaque then add mushrooms and stir-fry for 1 minute. Stir in the scallions, bok choy, and Shaoxing wine. Stir-fry for 30 seconds, and move everything to the center of the wok to create an even “bed” of vegetables and meat. Distribute the rice cakes on top
', '
Add water, cover, and cook for 2 minutes to steam the rice cakes and cook the vegetables.
', '
Remove the cover, and add the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, and sugar. Stir-fry everything together for 1 minute over medium heat. Taste, and season with additional salt if necessary. Continue stir-frying until the rice cakes are coated in sauce, cooked through but still chewy.\xa0
', '
Plate and garnish with sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: kung-pao-spaghetti
Ingredients: ['1 lb. spaghetti', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. boneless skinless chicken breast, cut in 3/4-inch cubes', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 cups coarsely-chopped scallions, greens and whites', '10 -15 whole Chinese dried red chili peppers (don’t eat these, they are for color and heat)', '1 cup unsalted dry roasted peanuts']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. salt, for cooking spaghetti']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup chicken stock', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '3/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1/4 cup sugar', '2 Tbsp. red wine vinegar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/dURYh1ZPEz4
', '
Make Kung Pao Sauce: In a saucepan, whisk together the chicken stock and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, sugar, red wine vinegar and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer until the sauce is thick enough to coat the back of a spoon (about 20 minutes).
', '
Bring a large pot of salted water to a rapid boil. Add the pasta and cook a minute shy of al dente. Drain.
', '
In a large nonstick frying pan over medium-high heat, heat the olive oil for about 1 minute. Add the chicken and sauté until browned and cooked through.\xa0 Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and scallions and cook for about 30 seconds. Add in the Kung Pao Sauce and toss and stir to coat the ingredients
', '
Add in the cooked and drained pasta and combine with the sauce.
', '
Add in the Chinese peppers and roasted peanuts into the bowl. Top with extra chopped scallions. Enjoy!
']

Name: dan-dan-soup-dumplings
Ingredients: ['MiLa Classic Pork Soup Dumplings', 'green onions, for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. tahini', '1½ Tbsp. water', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. MiLa Black Vinegar', '½ tsp. ground Sichuan pepper', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 pinch sugar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XbpMSPI3o38
', '
Steam your desired amount of MiLa Classic Pork Soup Dumplings according to the package directions.
', '
Meanwhile, prepare the Dan Dan Sauce. In a small bowl, mix tahini and water together until smooth.
', '
Mix in the remaining sauce mix ingredients. Pour into the bottom of your serving bowl.
', '
Place steamed dumpling on prepared sauce and garnish with green onions and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: khachapuri
Ingredients: ['1 lb. mozzarella, grated', '8 oz. feta, crumbled', '2 cups shredded provolone', '1 large egg', '2 cups roughly chopped kale', '4 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 lb. pizza dough', '½ cup basil leaves, chopped', '¼ cup parsley, chopped', '1 Tbsp. chopped dill', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'pinch crushed red pepper flakes', '2 egg yolks', '2 Tbsp. salted butter at room temperature']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', 'as needed, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 450˚F. Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.
', '
Add the mozzarella, feta, provolone, and one egg to a bowl. Mix until combined and set aside. In a separate bowl, add in the kale and 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Sprinkle in salt and pepper. Then use your hands to massage the kale until slightly wilted.
', '
Grease your hands with olive oil. Cut the pizza dough in half and stretch each half into a 10-inch-long oval. Place them onto the prepared baking sheet. Spoon the cheese mixture into the center of the oval. Spread it into an even layer, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge. Fold the edges over and inwards so you form a crust around the edges. The ends should taper out into a short tail, so that it resembles the shape of a boat. Top each boat with the massaged kale.\xa0\xa0
', '
Brush the edges of the pizza dough with 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Bake it in the oven for about 10-15 minutes until the cheese has melted and the edges are golden brown. While it bakes, combine the remaining olive oil, basil, parsley, dill, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and red pepper flakes in a small bowl and set aside.
', '
Remove the khachapuri from the oven and top each with 1 egg yolk and 1 tablespoon of salted butter. Mix the two together into the cheese mixture to cook the egg. Drizzle the garlic herb oil and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) over top. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: hawaiian-teriyaki-burgers
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef', '¼ cup panko', '4 slices provolone cheese', '4 pineapple rings', '4 brioche buns', '4 green leaf lettuce leaves', '4 slices red onion']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste', 'additional Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce, for serving']
Procedure:
['
Preheat and grease the grill. In a bowl, combine the ground beef, panko, Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and salt and pepper to taste. Mix then portion the mixture into 4 burger patties that are around the same size as your burger buns.
', '
Place the burger patties onto the grill. Cook for 4-5 minutes on one side then flip the burger over and cook for 3-4 minutes. Place a slice of provolone onto each burger patty and cook for another minute until melted. Remove the burgers from the grill and set them aside.
', '
Add the pineapple rings to the grill. Cook for 1 minute on each side until they develop grill marks. Place the buns onto the grill for about 1 minute until toasted.\xa0
', '
Layer the green leaf lettuce onto the bottom buns. Place the burger on top. Then layer on the red onion and pineapple rings. Drizzle more Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce\xa0on top if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: dango
Ingredients: ['⅔ cup joshinko (Japanese rice flour)', '¾ cup shiratamako (glutinous rice flour/sweet rice flour) ', '⅔ cup boiling water ', '5 wooden skewers']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. mirin', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2/3 cup water', '2 Tbsp. potato starch or cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/uIHsciUes8I
', '
Combine the joshinko and shiratamako into a bowl and using chopsticks, mix together until well blended. Stir in the boiling water a little bit at a time while mixing. You may not need to use all the water.\xa0
', '
The flours will start to stick together and eventually form clumps. Using your hands, combine the dough into one ball. Knead until the dough becomes smooth and then form into a ball. Divide the dough ball into 8 equal pieces. Then divide each piece into 2 smaller pieces to make 16 equal-sized pieces of dough. Shape each of the dough pieces into a smooth, round ball. Meanwhile, bring a pot of water to boil for cooking the rice balls.
', '
Just before cooking the rice balls, prepare a bowl of iced water. Once the water in the pot is boiling, gently drop each rice ball into the pot one after another so they are all cooking at the same pace. Stir the rice balls occasionally so they don’t stick to the bottom of the pot. When they rise to the top, boil them for an additional 1-2 minutes. Transfer the rice balls to the bowl of iced water. Drain and transfer to a tray. Adding a little water to the tray helps the rice balls not stick. Skewer three pieces onto a bamboo skewer. Continue with the rest of the rice balls and set aside.
', '
Combine all of the sauce mix ingredients in a saucepan and mix before you turn on the heat. Then, turn on the heat and continue to whisk. When the sauce becomes thick, remove the saucepan from the heat and transfer the sauce to a container or bowl.\xa0
', '
Spoon the sauce over the skewers. Enjoy!
']

Name: potato-and-cheese-perogies
Ingredients: ['2 large Idaho potatoes, cooked and cooled', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. butter, room temperature', '1-2 Tbsp. whole milk ', '1/2 cup grated sharp cheddar cheese', '1 egg', '1 Tbsp. water', '1 package (12 oz.) round wonton skins ', '4 slices bacon, chopped', '1/2 small onion, diced', 'extra cheddar cheese, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/7XgCkSJ9Ppw
', '
Cut cooked potatoes in half and scoop out the insides into a large bowl. Mash potatoes with Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), butter, salt and pepper. Stir in milk to get a smooth consistency. Mix in cheese and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, whisk the egg with water.\xa0
', '
To assemble perogies, take one wonton wrapper and brush the edges with the egg. Place 2-3 teaspoons worth of potato filling into the center. Fold wrapper in half to create a half moon shape and press edges together keeping the potato filling inside and removing any excess air. Repeat this process until no more filling remains.\xa0
', '
To cook, bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Meanwhile, in a large skillet, start rendering the chopped bacon over medium-low heat. After about 3 minutes of cooking the bacon, add in chopped onion. Once water has come to boil, drop in perogies and stir, they will float when ready- about 2 to 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Using a slotted spoon, drain perogies and drop into the skillet with bacon and onions. Fry perogies until golden brown on either side or until cooked to your liking. Serve warm with additional Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), more cheddar cheese and chopped green onions.
']

Name: filipino-sticky-bbq-sticks
Ingredients: ['2 ¼ lb. pork shoulder, sliced into 2 1/2 x 1 1/2-inch strips', 'neutral oil, for greasing', 'green onion, for garnish']
Marinade: ['½ cup ketchup', '6 oz. lemon-lime soda', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ cup brown sugar', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned White Vinegar', '1 ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/TmwjhdiEMjs
', '
Add the ketchup, lemon-lime soda, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned White Vinegar, and black pepper to a large bowl. Whisk until the sugar dissolves. Reserve ½ cup of the marinade in a separate bowl.
', '
Place the sliced pork into the bowl with the marinade and mix until the meat is well-coated. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator to marinate for at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.
', '
When ready to cook, preheat the grill to medium heat. Thread the meat onto skewers, leaving about 1 inch of space at the top and bottom of each skewer.
', '
Brush the grill grates with oil, then arrange the skewers on the grill. Cook for 4 minutes, then brush with the reserved marinade, turn, brush again, and continue cooking until the internal temperature of the meat reaches 140°F.
', '
Garnish with green onions and serve the skewers immediately. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: spicy-chorizo-queso
Ingredients: ['3 green onions, for garnish', 'tortilla chips, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 lb. Mexican chorizo ', '1 (10oz.) can diced tomatoes with green chiles, drained', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 (12oz.) can evaporated milk', '12 oz. Monterey Jack cheese, shredded', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/7aFHh94G69E
', '
Brown the chorizo in a skillet over medium heat until it is slightly crispy on the edges. If your chorizo is very fatty, drain some of it off before the next step, leaving a couple tablespoons of fat in the pan.
', '
Add the diced tomatoes with green chiles, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce to the skillet with the chorizo, and continue to stir and cook until most of the moisture from the canned tomatoes has evaporated away.
', '
Pour the evaporated milk into the skillet and stir and cook until heated through. Lower the heat and begin adding the cheese, one handful at a time, stirring until it is fully melted in before adding the next handful. Mix in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs).\xa0
', '
Once all the cheese has melted into the dip, turn the heat off. Top with some Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and garnish with sliced green onion. Serve with tortilla chips. Enjoy!
']

Name: spring-roll-night
Ingredients: ['2 oz. rice vermicelli', 'Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, to taste', '8 rice wrappers (8.5” diameter)', '8 large cooked shrimp, peeled, deveined and cut in half', '2 leaves butter lettuce, torn', '1 cup very thinly sliced red cabbage', '2 medium carrots, peeled and cut into matchsticks', '2 Persian cucumbers, thinly sliced ', '3 Tbsp. chopped fresh mint leaves', '3 Tbsp. chopped fresh cilantro', '1 ⅓ Tbsp. chopped fresh Thai basil']
Sauce Mix: ['---- Sauce 1 ----', '¼ cup water', '2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice', '2 Tbsp. white sugar', '4 tsp. fish sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '---- Sauce 2 ----', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '⅓ cup creamy peanut butter', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. honey or maple syrup', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2-3 Tbsp. water, as needed']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T78yq89rYwg
', '
Mix ingredients for “Sauce 1” in a small bowl. Set aside.
', '
Mix ingredients for “Sauce 2” in a second bowl and thin with water, if desired.
', '
Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil; stir in rice vermicelli\xa0and return to a boil. Cook rice vermicelli\xa0uncovered, stirring occasionally, until the vermicelli is tender yet firm to the bite, 3 to 5 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold running water. Toss with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Premium Sesame Oil and set aside.
', '
Fill a large bowl, or a pie plate, with warm water. Dip one wrapper into the warm water for 1 second to soften. Lay wrapper flat; place 2 shrimp halves in a row across the center, add some vermicelli, lettuce, cabbage, carrot, cucumber, mint, cilantro, and basil, leaving about 2 inches uncovered on each side. Spread some of “Sauce 2” over the shrimp, if desired. Fold uncovered sides inward, then tightly roll the wrapper, beginning at the end with lettuce. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
', '
Serve rolled spring rolls with sauces. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-korean-fried-chicken-sandwich
Ingredients: ['½ cup flour', '¼ cup potato starch or cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. garlic powder', '1 Tbsp. onion powder', '1 tsp. salt', '¾ cup buttermilk', '1 egg', '4 chicken thighs', 'oil, for frying', '4 burger buns, toasted', 'kimchi, to taste', 'green onion, sliced, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['---- Spicy Sauce ----', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '¼ cup water', '---- Spicy Mayo ----', '¼ cup mayo', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/fBInCWhL5bk
', '
Make spicy sauce: Combine Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and water into a saucepan and simmer for 3-5 minutes to thicken slightly. Set aside.
', '
Make spicy mayo: Mix mayo, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil together until combined. Set aside.
', '
In a medium bowl, mix flour, starch, garlic powder, onion powder, and salt together to make a dry batter. In a separate medium bowl, mix buttermilk and egg to create a wet batter.
', '
Coat chicken thighs in dry batter, then place into wet batter. Coat once more into the dry batter and fry at 350°F for 6-8 minutes.
', '
Assemble the sandwich: place down burger buns, add a layer of spicy mayo, chicken, drizzle with spicy sauce, top with kimchi and green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: kimchi-dumplings
Ingredients: ['---- Dumpling Filling ----', '3/4 cup Wildbrine Korean Style Kimchi, finely chopped and drained of extra liquid', '4 oz. firm tofu, finely chopped ', '3 oz. mung bean sprouts, parboiled and finely chopped ', '3 oz. ground pork ', '¼ onion, finely chopped', '2 Tbsp. chives, finely chopped', '1 egg', '1 tsp. sea salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '---- For Wrapping ----', '25 dumpling wrappers ', 'small bowl of water', '---- For Cooking ----', 'vegetable oil', '1/4 cup water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/YADP7lm54MU
', '
In a large bowl, add all dumplings filling ingredients and mix well.
', '
Wrap Dumplings: Place about a teaspoon of filling into the center of the dumpling wrapper. Dip your finger in the water and lightly wet the edge of the dumpling wrapper. Seal the wrapper then place on a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper. Repeat until all filling and wrappers have been used.
', '
Cook Dumplings: Heat a large sauté pan over medium-high heat and add vegetable oil. Add dumplings and cook until the bottom is golden brown, about 2 to 3 minutes. Reduce the heat to medium-low. Add the water and cover to steam, about 5 minutes or until all water has evaporated and the filling is cooked.\xa0
', '
Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and extra Wildbrine Korean Style Kimchi. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-chicken-pretzel-twists
Ingredients: ['1 cup cooked chicken, shredded fine', '12 frozen dinner rolls, thawed but cold', '3 cups mozzarella cheese, shredded fine', '⅔ cup baking soda', '1 egg, beaten', '1 Tbsp. water']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Everything Bagel seasoning']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vu5zN39QIFo
', '
In a medium bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil together. Add in shredded chicken and mix. Set aside.
', '
To make pretzel twists, begin by rolling each piece of dough into a 10" rope. Flatten and pull dough out, width wise, to be filled with chicken and cheese.
', '
In the center of the dough, sprinkle some shredded mozzarella and then some of the chicken mixture. Make sure not to overfill your dough. Pinch dough closed very well. Twist and place on a large baking sheet prepared with foil and sprayed with vegetable oil. Cover with saran wrap sprayed with non-stick spray and place in a warm spot and let rise for about an hour.
', '
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and add the baking soda. Gently place each twist in the soda water and simmer gently for 15 seconds per side. Drain on a wire rack and return to prepared baking sheet.\xa0
', '
Combine egg with 1 Tbsp. water to make an egg wash. Brush each with egg wash and sprinkle with Everything Bagel Seasoning. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve with additional Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce for dipping if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: quiche-lorraine
Ingredients: ['9-inch deep dish frozen pie crust', '6 slices thick cut bacon, diced', '½ cup chopped shallots', '1 ¼ cups grated gruyere', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['4 large eggs', '1 ¼ cups heavy cream', '1.4 tsp. salt', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'pinch of nutmeg']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Place the pie crust onto a baking sheet. Prick the bottom and side of the pie crust with a fork. Place it into the oven to bake for 10-15 minutes until lightly golden then remove it from the oven. Reduce the oven temperature to 325˚F.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add in the bacon and cook until golden brown and crispy, about 10 minutes. Use a slotted spoon to remove the bacon from the pan. Discard all but 1 tablespoon of bacon grease from the pan. Add in the shallots and cook over medium low heat until translucent, about 3-4 minutes. Remove the pan from heat and set aside.
', '
In a bowl, add in the eggs, heavy cream, salt, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce,\xa0 and nutmeg. Whisk until well combined.\xa0
', '
Spread the shallots onto the bottom of the pie crust. Sprinkle half of the bacon on top then layer on the gruyere. Top with the remaining half of the bacon. Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust.
', '
Bake it in the oven for 45-50 minutes until the custard has set but is still slightly jiggly. Allow the quiche to sit until almost cooled to room temperature before serving. Top with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-rabokki
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil  ', '2 Tbsp. kimchi', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2-3 cups water', '1 cup tteokbokki', '1 pack instant ramen', '1 pack dehydrated vegetables from instant ramen', '1/2 cup mozzarella cheese, shredded', 'nori strips, for garnish', 'green onion, sliced, for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '2-3 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/_Y52md2BN1Y
', '
Combine sauce mix ingredients in a bowl and set aside.
', '
In a pan, heat Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil over medium heat and stir fry kimchi and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic until fragrant. Pour in water and stir in the sauce. Allow this to come to a boil.
', '
Add tteokbokki and let it cook for about 5 minutes, or until tteokbokki softens.
', '
Create a well in the middle, and add instant ramen and the pack of dehydrated vegetables from the ramen. Let noodles cook until al dente, or for about 2-3 minutes. Toss ramen noodles for even cooking.
', '
Sprinkle on cheese and allow it to melt. Remove from heat and garnish with nori, green onions and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-breakfast-sandwich
Ingredients: ['1/2 lb. sweet or spicy Italian sausage, casings removed', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 large eggs', '2 English muffins, toasted', '2 slices pepper jack cheese', '1/3 cup sliced drained jalapeño', '1/2 cup cilantro leaves with tender stems']
Seasoning: ['pinch of kosher salt', 'pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/mi2rMjaRKVM
', '
In a medium bowl, mix sausage, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic together. Using damp hands, form sausage into two 1/4"-thick patties.
', '
Heat a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high until hot. Cook patties until golden brown on bottom side, about 2 minutes. Turn and continue to cook until the other side is browned and cooked through, 2–3 minutes more. Transfer to a plate. Wipe out the skillet.
', '
Heat butter over medium in the same skillet until melted. Cook eggs, undisturbed, until whites are set, edges are golden, and yolks are still runny, 4–5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and remove pan from heat.
', '
Spread Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce on 2 muffin halves. Top with pepper jack cheese, patties, eggs, jalapeños, and cilantro. Spread Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)\xa0on remaining muffin halves, then close up sandwiches. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']
