Name: brown-butter-soy-sage-gnocchi
Ingredients: ['16 oz. gnocchi ', '4 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, divided', '5 sprigs fresh sage (more for garnish if desired)', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '¼ cup shredded parmesan cheese, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JQ26B3_FXhw
', '
Boil the gnocchi according to recipe or package directions. Drain well.
', '
While the gnocchi is cooking, add the butter, 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and sage leaves to a large pan over medium heat. Stir the butter occasionally until it begins to lightly brown and begins to have a slightly nutty smell, about 2 minutes. Remove the butter from the pan and set aside.
', '
Add the olive oil to the pan and heat over medium-high heat. Add the drained gnocchi to the pan and cook until golden on one side without stirring, about 5-6 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, mix and then add the browned butter back to the pan. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and toss with the gnocchi. Cook 1-2 minutes. Season with fresh black pepper.\xa0
', '
Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and garnish with more sage, if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: tamarind-chicken
Ingredients: ['4 quarter chicken legs', 'additional cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Marinade: ['½ cup packed finely chopped cilantro leaves', '¼ cup olive oil', '¼ cup tamarind concentrate', '2 Tbsp. chipotle chili paste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. and 2 tsp. paprika', '1 ½ tsp. salt', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Pat the chicken legs dry with paper towels. Set them aside. Add the cilantro, olive oil, tamarind concentrate, chipotle chili paste, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, paprika, salt, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and ground black pepper to a bowl. Mix until well combined. Add the chicken legs to the marinade and toss to combine until well coated. Allow the chicken to marinate for at least 1 hour or overnight.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Line a baking sheet with foil. Place the chicken legs onto the baking sheet, skin side up. Brush the remaining marinade on top. Bake the chicken in the oven for 35-40 minutes or until fully cooked through.
', '
Remove the chicken from the oven and allow it to rest for 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with cilantro leaves and enjoy!
']

Name: stone-pot-bibimbap
Ingredients: ['1 1/2 cups mung bean sprouts, divided', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, divided', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, divided', '3 cups spinach', '1 tsp. toasted sesame seeds', '1 ribeye steak (around 8-10 oz)', '2 tsp. cooking oil', '1 carrot, julienned', '8 mushrooms, thinly sliced', '1 cup cooked short grain rice', '1 egg yolk', 'toasted sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. salt, divided', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. toasted sesame seeds']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xb0gIxKP2bw
', '
Bring a pot of water to boil. Add in 1 cup mung bean sprouts and boil for 15 minutes. Remove from hot water (save water for blanching spinach) and mix with 2 tsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, 1/2 tsp salt, 1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Set aside. Blanch spinach in the hot water and remove. Squeeze out the water. Chop and mix with 1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, 1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, 1/2 tsp salt and 1 tsp toasted sesame seeds. Mix and set aside.
', '
In a large bowl, mix all marinade ingredients and set aside. Slice ribeye into thin strips and place into marinade. Let marinade for at least 30 minutes.
', '
Heat pan over high heat. Add 1 tsp oil. Add in julienned carrots and sauté for 1-2 minutes. Season with 1/2 tsp salt and set aside. Into the same pan, add sliced mushroom and 1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sauté for 3 minutes. Add 1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes. Remove and set aside. Add 1 tsp oil to the pan and sear beef 2 minutes per side.
', '
In a stone pot, add 1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil at the bottom of the pot. Add rice into the pot. Arrange vegetables and meat on top. Add egg yolk and 1 tbsp Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Add a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil on top and add toasted sesame seeds.
', '
Place over the stove and let it heat up. Once you hear the crackling, ticking sound from the rice, it is ready. Top with desired amount of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and more toasted sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: greens-and-eggs-bake
Ingredients: ['2 lb. greens of choice (e.g. spinach, chard, kale)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '12 stalks scallions, thinly sliced', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 jalapeños, thinly sliced', '2 cups heavy cream', '½ cup coarsely chopped dill', '2 oz. finely grated Parmesan (about ½ cup), plus more for serving', '8 oz. croutons', '6 large eggs']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. kosher salt, plus more', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'freshly ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/li4MqmJ6Pp4
', '
Place a rack in the middle of the oven and preheat to 325°F. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of heavily salted water to a boil. If using kale or chard, remove tough ribs and stems and discard. Blanch greens until they are just wilted, 1–2 minutes. Drain in a colander, then rinse under cold running water until cool, about 30 seconds. Transfer greens to a clean kitchen towel and squeeze out as much water as possible. Transfer greens to a cutting board and coarsely chop.
', '
Set a pot over medium heat and add 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Add scallions, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and jalapeños and cook, stirring often, until scallions and garlic are softened but not browned, about 3 minutes. Add greens and 1 tsp. salt and stir to coat. Remove from heat and mix in heavy cream, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, dill, and 2 oz. Parmesan.
', '
Place croutons in a 13x9" baking dish and spread the greens mixture evenly over croutons, allowing some croutons to peek through. Drizzle any sauce that’s left in the pot over the bread and greens. Using a spoon, create 6 wells in the greens mixture and crack an egg into each one. Season eggs with salt and pepper.
', '
Bake casserole, rotating baking dish halfway through, until egg whites are barely set and yolks still jiggle and are slightly runny, 25–30 minutes. Let cool for 5–10 minutes. Sprinkle with more Parmesan to serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-pizza-pockets
Ingredients: ['1 sheet puff pastry', '15 slices pepperoni', '½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '1 egg, for egg wash']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup marinara sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/2YBAFRpFRrI
', '
Preheat your oven to 400°F.
', '
In a medium bowl, add the marinara sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and mix.\xa0
', '
Cut the puff pastry into six rectangles and place on a nonstick baking tray. On one rectangle, spread a tablespoon of spicy marinara, avoiding the edges of the pastry. Top with pepperoni slices and cheese.
', '
Place a rectangle of pastry on top and seal the edges with a fork. Repeat with remaining pastry rectangles.
', '
Brush the pockets with egg wash and bake for 15-20 minutes or until the pastry is flaky and golden. Enjoy!
']

Name: sugar-and-soy-sauce-salmon
Ingredients: ['4 skin-on salmon filets ', '1 Tbsp. finely chopped fresh parsley, for garnish', '2 cups cooked rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. kosher salt', '1/4 tsp. freshly cracked black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup lightly packed brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. lemon zest', '1 Tbsp. freshly squeezed lemon juice', '4 medium cloves garlic, grated ', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/xq6gNzhwKgM
', '
Position the rack in the center of the oven and preheat it to 375°F. Let the salmon sit at room temperature for 10 minutes before you bake it.
', '
To a small saucepan over medium heat, add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, lemon zest, lemon juice, and garlic. Allow the mixture to cook until the sugar has melted, the liquid has reduced by half, and it’s made a sticky glaze. Add half of the butter and swirl until it has melted, remove the pan from the heat, and add in the second half of the butter. Swirl until the remaining butter has melted from the residual heat. Add in the Dijon mustard and stir to combine.
', '
Cover a rimmed baking sheet with aluminum foil, you will need enough so you’ll be able to fold the edges over and create a tight seal. Place the salmon skin side down in the center of the foil, then sprinkle with salt and pepper. Pour the soy sauce mixture over the salmon, and seal the aluminum foil.
', '
Bake for 15 - 18 minutes, or until the salmon is nearly cooked through. Open the foil pack, turn the oven to broil, and broil for 2 minutes (or until the top has golden edges and is crispy - keep a close eye on it so it doesn’t burn).
', '
Sprinkle with fresh chopped parsley, and serve hot with rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: lettuce-wrap-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['6 eggs', '1 inch ginger, peeled, finely chopped', '2 tsp. olive oil', '1 small red onion, thinly sliced', '4 cups cooled cooked brown rice', '1 carrot, peeled, cut into long thin matchsticks', '4 stalks green onions, thinly sliced', '30 butter lettuce leaves', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V3CkOXcfmgs
', '
Whisk the eggs, ginger and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce in a small bowl.\xa0
', '
Heat 1 tsp. olive oil in a wok or large non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Add eggs and scramble. Remove from wok and set aside.
', '
Heat the remaining olive oil in the wok or pan. Add the onion and rice and cook for 1-2 mins. Add the carrot and green onion and stir to combine. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap and mix. Return the egg to the pan and cook, stirring, until combined and heated through. Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter.
', '
Divide the lettuce leaves among serving plates. Fill with rice mixture.
', '
Top with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and garnish with sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: roasted-artichokes-with-garlic-butter
Ingredients: ['3 lemons', '2 large globe artichokes', '3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, softened', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ tsp. red pepper flakes', '½ tsp. chopped fresh rosemary']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and set it aside.
', '
Fill a large bowl with water and the juice of 2 of the lemons. Trim the stem end of the artichokes then remove any tough outer leaves from the bottom. Cut 1 inch off from the top of the artichoke then trim the tips of the leaves. Slice the artichokes in half then scoop out the fuzzy center. Submerge the artichokes in the lemon water while you prepare the butter.
', '
Add the butter, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, red pepper flakes, and rosemary in a bowl. Mix until combined. Brush the butter all over the artichokes, making sure to get it into the crevices of the leaves. Season with salt and pepper on both sides.
', '
Place the artichokes onto the baking sheet. Slice the remaining lemon. Place a lemon slice into the center of each artichoke then flip the artichokes over so that they are cut side down.\xa0
', '
Cover the artichokes with another sheet of aluminum foil. Roast them in the oven for 45-50 minutes until knife tender. Enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-sriracha-cookies
Ingredients: ['1 cup butter, softened', '1 cup brown sugar, packed', '1/2 cup sugar', '2 large eggs', '1 1/2 tsp. vanilla', '2 1/3 cups flour', '1 tsp. baking soda', '1 tsp. salt', '2 cups chocolate chips']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/VCYC42gbfhQ
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F.\xa0
', '
Use an electric mixer to beat the butter, brown and white sugars together. Beat in eggs, one by one, vanilla, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil until smooth and creamy. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda and salt together and slowly add to sugar/eggs mixture. Mix until well combined and there are no pockets of flour in the mixture.\xa0Fold in chocolate chips.
', '
Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of cookie dough, 2 inches apart, onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.\xa0
', '
Bake in oven for 9-11 minutes.
', '
Cool on a wire rack. Enjoy!
']

Name: croque-monsieur
Ingredients: ['8 slices white sandwich bread', '5 oz. good quality ham about 8 slices', '6 oz. Gruyere cheese', '1/4 cup parmesan cheese, freshly grated']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup unsalted butter ', '¼ cup all-purpose flour', '1½ cups whole milk', 'salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste', '1/4 tsp. Dijon mustard', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', 'dash of ground nutmeg']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XXUsFeQqsZc
', '
Béchamel sauce: Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Whisk in flour and cook, stirring constantly, for about 3 minutes. Gradually add milk, stirring well until the mixture is smooth. Cook, stirring, until sauce is thickened.\xa0
', '
Season with a little bit of salt and pepper. Remove from heat and whisk in mustard, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) and nutmeg. Set aside while you make the sandwiches. Assemble sandwiches: Preheat oven to 425° F. Line a baking tray with parchment paper and set aside.
', '
Spread each bread slice with a layer of béchamel, spreading to completely cover the slice of bread. Place 4 slices of bread, béchamel side up, on the prepared baking sheet. Place a piece of ham on top, a handful of Gruyere cheese, and then a sprinkle of parmesan cheese. Place remaining slices of bread on top, béchamel side up, then top with remaining gruyere and parmesan cheese.
', '
Bake at 425° F for about 5-6 minutes, until cheese is melted, and then turn the oven to broil and broil until the cheese on top is lightly golden, 2-4 minutes. Serve with additional Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: corn-ribs
Ingredients: ['2 corn on cob', 'cilantro, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. avocado oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. paprika smoked', '1/4 tsp. pepper', '1/4 tsp. onion powder']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/gSdJB6gkyos
', '
Chop the corn in riblets: To safely cut the corn, stand it up vertically with the wider part against the table, and chop in half, then chop those halves into quarters lengthwise.
', '
Prepare the corn seasoning by combining all of the spices and oil, including the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, in a small bowl and mix well.
', '
Brush the seasoning over the chopped corn.
', '
Preheat your air fryer to 375ºF. Lay the corn ribs in a single layer in your air fryer basket, with a little space between each so the air can flow. Cook for 12-15 minutes, flipping them over after 7 minutes.\xa0
', '
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: california-burrito-with-carne-asada
Ingredients: ['---For the Carne Asada---', '2 lb. skirt steak', '---For the Burrito---', '2 cups French fries', '2 cups Spanish rice', '1 avocado sliced', '1 ½ cup pico de gallo', '4 large flour tortillas']
Marinade: ['---For the Carne Asada---', '⅓ cup extra virgin olive oil', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '2 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '1 tsp. ground black pepper', '1 tsp. cumin', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 jalapeño, seeded and minced', '½ cup roughly chopped cilantro']
Sauce Mix: ['---For the Jalapeño Crema---', '2 jalapeños, stems removed', '½ onion, diced', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 cup crema']
Procedure:
['
For the Carne Asada: Add the olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, lime juice, apple cider vinegar, granulated sugar, ground black pepper, cumin, 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, jalapeño, and cilantro to a large bowl. Mix to combine then add in the skirt steak. Flip it around in the marinade to make sure both sides are coated. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the fridge for 1-4 hours. Preheat the grill over high heat. Remove the steak from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels. Place it on the grill and cook on each side for about 4-5 minutes or until it reaches your desired level of doneness. Remove it from the grill and allow it to rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
', '
For the Jalapeño Crema: Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Place the jalapeños and onions onto the baking sheet. Season with kosher salt and drizzle with olive oil. Toss to combine then roast them in the oven for 20-25 minutes. Transfer the jalapeños and onions to a food processor along with 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and lime juice. Blend until smooth. Transfer this mixture into a bowl then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and crema. Set the crema aside.\xa0
', '
For the Burrito: Evenly distribute the French fries, Spanish rice, avocado slices, pico de gallo, and carne asada between the tortillas. Fold the edge closest to you over the fillings then fold in the sides. Roll the burrito upwards until it is fully wrapped. Heat a pan over medium-high heat and place the burrito seam side down. Cook until the bottom is toasted and golden brown, about 2-3 minutes. Then brown on the other side. Remove the burritos from the pan and serve with the jalapeño crema. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: hot-honey-fried-chicken
Ingredients: ['vegetable oil for frying', '3 lb. assorted bone-in, skin-on chicken pieces', '2 cups all-purpose flour', '⅓ cup cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. garlic powder', '1 Tbsp. onion powder', '1 Tbsp. ground paprika', '1 tsp. ground cayenne pepper', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Marinade: ['1½ cups buttermilk', '1 large egg', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup unsalted butter 1 stick', '½ cup honey', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/EJjw9xiXgCI
', '
Add about 2 inches worth of frying oil to a cast iron skillet or Dutch oven set over medium-high heat. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and line a wire rack with paper towels. Set both aside.
', '
While the oil heats, whisk the buttermilk, egg, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, 1 teaspoon of kosher salt and ½ teaspoon of black pepper together in a large bowl. Nestle the chicken pieces in the liquid and allow it to marinate while you continue prepping or overnight.
', '
In a shallow bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, cayenne pepper, and remaining salt and pepper. One piece at a time, remove the chicken from the buttermilk and dredge it through the flour mixture, turning to coat and packing into crevices. Shake off excess flour and transfer to the prepared baking sheet, then repeat with the remaining chicken.
', '
When the oil reaches 325-350°F, fry the chicken in batches, 2 or 3 pieces at a time, turning often for 5-8 minutes until deep golden brown and 165°F inside. Drain fried chicken on the prepared wire rack.
', '
While the chicken is frying, make the hot honey sauce. Melt the butter in a small saucepan set over medium heat until it begins to boil. Remove it from the heat and whisk in the honey, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil until combined. Serve the chicken with the hot honey. Enjoy!
']

Name: homemade-pizza
Ingredients: ['1 cup shredded cooked chicken', '6 stalks green onions, cut on the diagonal into thin slices', '1 lb. fresh pizza dough', '3 cups coarsely shredded mozzarella cheese', 'white onion, thinly sliced, to taste', 'pepperoni, to taste', 'mushrooms, to taste', '1⁄2 cup lightly packed cilantro leaf']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. (for chicken) + ¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce (for the crust)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup tomato sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1Tvh8nCRqnE
', '
Position an oven rack in the center and lower half of the oven; preheat to 450°F. While the oven is heating, toss the chicken with 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and half of the green onions. Set aside.
', '
In a separate small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and tomato sauce. Mix well and set aside.
', '
Divide fresh dough in half and stretch into two 10/12-inch rounds. Place each on a rimless baking sheet. Par bake bare crusts for 5-7 minutes. Remove from the oven and get ready to top with your toppings.
', '
On one pizza crust, spread ¼ cup of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce evenly over the crust, leaving a 1-inch border. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the sauce. Arrange chicken mixture in a single layer over the cheese. Distribute some white onion over. On the second pizza crust, spread the spicy tomato sauce evenly over the crust, leaving a 1-inch border. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the sauce. Top with pepperoni and mushrooms. Place the pizzas in the oven; bake for about 10 minutes or until the crust is crisp and deep golden brown and the cheese is golden.
', '
Sprinkle the remaining green onions and cilantro over the chicken pizza and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Sprinkle the pepperoni pizza with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Slice the pizzas into wedges and serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-patty-melt
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. butter, divided', '4 slices rye bread', '½ lb. ground beef', '½ cup grilled onions', '1 cored and sliced jalapeño pepper', '4 slices pepper jack cheese']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. stone ground mustard', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/0luiaVNGjNU
', '
Using a large frying pan, melt 1 Tbsp. butter and toast your rye bread on one side. Remove to a plate. In a medium bowl, mix ground beef, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce together. Do not over-mix! Form into two oblong patties and cook to desired doneness. Set aside.\xa0
', '
In the same pan, heat up the grilled onions and add the jalapeño slices (keep them separate) to the pan to warm and soften a bit. When the onions and jalapeño are done, remove them to the plate with the burgers.
', '
Wipe out the skillet. Melt 1 Tbsp. of butter and place the untoasted side of two pieces of bread on the butter. Layer with sliced pepper jack cheese, then burger, onions, another slice of cheese and jalapeño pepper slices.
', '
Mix the stone ground mustard, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) in a small bowl. Spread the inside (toasted side) of the top bun with this mixture and then top the patty with the bread. Heat on low to medium heat, covered with a lid until cheese has visibly melted on the bottom.
', '
Remove the sandwiches, melt another tablespoon of butter and flip the patty melt over and continue heating until the cheese starts to melt. Remove the burger, plate and cut the sandwich in half.\xa0 Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: spinach-artichoke-lasagna
Ingredients: ['9 lasagna sheets', '3 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 1/2 cups onion, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '5 oz. baby spinach, chopped', '1 cup artichoke hearts, drained and chopped ', '3 oz. cream cheese, softened', '1 cup parmesan cheese, grated', '1 egg', '2 1/2 cups mozzarella cheese, grated', 'parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'salt & pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. butter', '3 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '2 cups milk', 'salt & pepper, to taste', '1/8 tsp. nutmeg', '1/3 cup prepared pesto']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/C69Nx1ZKX9Y
', '
Preheat the oven to 375 °F. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil and cook lasagna sheets for half the time recommended on the package. Drain and place on a lightly greased baking sheet and set aside.
', '
In the same pot, sauté onions and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic in olive oil until softened, about 5 minutes. Stir in chopped spinach and cook 1-2 minutes, until wilted.\xa0 Stir in chopped artichoke hearts and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Spoon mixture into bowl and stir together with cream cheese, ½ cup of parmesan cheese, egg and salt and pepper, if desired. Set aside.
', '
In the same pot, melt butter over medium heat. Sprinkle in flour and whisk. Cook for 1 minute to start your roux. Slowly whisk in milk and stir until thickened. Add in salt, pepper, nutmeg and pesto. Remove from heat. To assemble, lightly grease 9×13 baking dish.\xa0
', '
Spread 1/4 cup sauce on the bottom of the baking dish. Place 3 cooked noodles across the bottom. Top with half the filling, 1 cup of grated mozzarella cheese and 1/3 of the sauce. Repeat this pattern again: noodles, filling, cheese, sauce. Top with remaining three noodles, remaining sauce and remaining 1/2 cup mozzarella and parmesan cheeses.
', '
Cover with foil and bake for 30-45 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Remove foil and broil 2-3 minutes or until cheese has browned. Remove from oven and let lasagna rest 10-15 minutes before serving. Top with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-and-scallion-biscuits
Ingredients: ['1 ½ tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. ground black pepper', '1 ¾ tsp. baking powder', '½ tsp. baking soda ', '1 ¼ tsp. granulated sugar', '2 ½ cups all purpose flour, and more for dusting', '10 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter, diced', '8 scallions, sliced', '1 ¼ cup sour cream', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted', 'flaky sea salt, for topping', 'sesame seeds, for topping']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set it aside.
', '
Add the kosher salt, ground black pepper, baking powder, baking soda, granulated sugar, and all purpose flour to a bowl. Whisk to combine. Add in the chilled diced butter. Use the tips of your fingers to rub the flour into the butter until you get pea sized clumps.
', '
Toss in the scallions and mix to combine. Create a well in the center of the mixture. Spoon the sour cream and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil into the center of the well. Use a fork to combine the flour into the sour cream. Mix until the dough comes together. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Gently knead the dough until it comes together.
', '
Pat the dough into an 8x4” rectangle. Fold the dough in thirds like a letter then pat it back into an 8x4” rectangle. Fold the dough in thirds again then pat it back out into an 8x4” rectangle. Cut the dough in half lengthwise then cut each half into 4 pieces so that you have a total of 8 pieces.
', '
Place the biscuits onto the prepared baking sheet. Brush the tops of the biscuits with the melted butter and sprinkle with flaky salt and sesame seeds. Bake the biscuits in the oven for 18-22 minutes until golden brown. Remove them from the oven and enjoy!
']

Name: green-mac-n-cheese
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. salt', '1 lb. elbow macaroni', '4 cups fresh spinach, packed', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup fresh parsley', '2 ½ cups milk, divided', '¼ cup butter', '¼ cup flour', '2 tsp. onion powder', '1 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. pepper', '1 lb. white cheddar cheese', '½ cup mozzarella cheese']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/jDZNuAZTgKg
', '
In a large pot, bring water and 1 tablespoon of salt to a boil over high heat. Add the elbow macaroni and cook until al dente, roughly 6-7 minutes. Rinse with cold water and drain.
', '
In a food processor, combine the spinach, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, parsley, and ½ cup milk, and process until smooth.\xa0 In a large pot, combine the butter and flour on medium-high heat, and whisk constantly until the mixture turns a golden brown.
', '
Slowly whisk in 2 cups of milk, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, onion powder, paprika, pepper, and salt to the pot and stir until well incorporated.
', '
Add in the cheddar cheese and mix until melted and incorporated. Add in the spinach mixture and stir until fully incorporated and the sauce is completely green in color.
', '
Add in the macaroni, mix and pour into a casserole dish. Top the macaroni with mozzarella and broil for 5 minutes or until brown and bubbly. Enjoy!
']

Name: onsen-egg-on-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['4 large eggs (2 for making onsen eggs and other 2 for making fried rice, whisked)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, divided', '1 carrot, peeled, finely chopped', '4 stalks green onions, sliced - whites and green parts separated', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '⅓ cup peas', '2 cups day-old jasmine rice ', '1 Tbsp. toasted white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/2DIIr4VhAzA
', '
Make onsen eggs: Fill a large pot with water and bring to 167°F. Add 2 shell-on eggs and cook for 13 minutes, adjusting heat as necessary to maintain temperature (use a thermometer to monitor the water temperature). Transfer eggs to an ice bath to chill.\xa0
', '
Make fried rice. Heat a wok until hot and add a little of the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Add the whisked eggs and make an omelet. Remove from the wok just before fully set. Cut the omelet into strips.
', '
Add a little more Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and sauté carrots and white parts of the onion until soft. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and peas and stir-fry for a minute.
', '
Add a little more Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and then add the rice, mixing well. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and stir-fry until all of the rice is coated in oil and soy sauce. Carefully break apart any clumps of rice with a spoon.
', '
Turn the heat down to medium and add the omelet strips. Serve in individual bowls, carefully place the onsen eggs on top of the rice and sprinkle with the sesame seeds. Garnish with green parts of the onion and serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-sesame-zoodles-zucchini-noodle
Ingredients: ['2 zucchinis ', '1 stalk green onion, sliced thinly', 'sesame seeds, to taste']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. tahini sesame paste', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/xyRzLCX-njQ
', '
Use a spiralizer to create raw zucchini noodles.
', '
Bring a pot of water to boil. Add the zucchini noodles and cook until barely tender, 3 to 5 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water. Set aside.
', '
In a bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, tahini sesame paste, sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Stir to combine.
', '
Pour this sauce over your cooked zoodles and toss.
', '
Place in two serving bowls and top with green onion, sesame seeds and top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil for additional heat. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: sticky-mango-curry-tenders
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless chicken breasts cut into strips', '¾ cup buttermilk', '1 ½ cups panko ', '2 Tbsp. cornmeal', 'sliced jalapeño, for serving']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup mango chutney', '1 Tbsp. orange juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 tsp. Thai red curry paste', '½ cup water', 'juice + zest of 1 lime', '½ cup fresh cilantro, chopped']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFkCynyDSyM
', '
Preheat the oven to 475°F. Line a baking sheet with foil and spray with nonstick spray.
', '
Add the chicken to a large bowl and add buttermilk. Toss together and set aside. In a shallow dish, add the panko, cornmeal, salt, and pepper. Mix well. Remove each piece of chicken from the buttermilk and coat in the panko mixture, pressing gently to adhere. Place on the prepared baking sheet. Repeat until all the chicken has been used. Do not crowd the baking sheet, use two if necessary.\xa0
', '
Spray each chicken tender with non-stick spray or a mist of olive oil. Bake for 10-12 minutes, then gently flip using kitchen tongs and spray the other side. Bake for another 10-12 minutes, then remove from the oven. Reduce the oven temp to 400°F.
', '
While the chicken is cooking, make the sauce: In a small-medium saucepan, combine the mango chutney, orange juice, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Thai red curry paste, and water. Bring the sauce to a boil and then reduce the heat. Simmer for 5 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly. Remove from the heat and stir in the lime juice, lime zest and chopped cilantro.
', '
Lightly coat each piece of chicken with the sauce and place back on the baking sheet. Place the pan of chicken back in the oven for 5 minutes to caramelize sauce slightly. Serve with sliced jalapeño and any extra sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: rice-cooker-curry-rice
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1/2 cup chopped onion', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '5 1/5 oz. chicken thighs', '3-4 small potatoes, diced', '½ tsp. turmeric', '½ tsp. curry powder', '¾ cup rice, rinsed ', '1 cup water', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '⅛ tsp. pepper', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/aio_0Aai4ws
', '
Turn on the rice cooker and heat the oil in the rice cooker pot. Sauté the onions until soft then add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté for another minute. Add in chicken and sauté until slightly browned.
', '
Add potatoes and continue to sauté for a couple of minutes. Add in the rest of the ingredients and stir.\xa0
', '
Close the rice cooker lid and cook for about 25-30 minutes, until chicken and potatoes are tender.
', '
Garnish with green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-mayo-tempura
Ingredients: ['8 shrimp', '2 Tbsp. potato starch', '1 Japanese eggplant, 1/4" vertical slices', '½ kabocha squash, sliced 1/4" thick', '2 lotus roots, sliced 1/4" thick', '8 shiitake mushrooms, stems removed', '½ cup cake flour', '½ cup potato starch', '¾ cup ice-cold water', '1 egg', 'vegetable oil, for frying', '4 bowls steamed rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. mirin', '2 Tbsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. dashi', '2 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/wuuQvhn9jgg
', '
Peel shrimp and make diagonal cuts on shrimp to help straighten. Remove moisture well from all the ingredients and sprinkle potato starch lightly over eggplant. Cover with plastic and keep in the fridge until ready to use.
', '
Make the sauce: Place all sauce mix ingredients into a small sauce pan and bring them to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat and continue to simmer until the sauce is reduced and thickened. Remove from heat and set aside until ready to serve.
', '
Make batter: Sift cake flour and potato starch. Mix ice-cold water and egg in a medium bowl. Add flour to egg mixture, and mix with chopsticks. Do not overmix.
', '
In a large pot, heat enough vegetable oil to deep fry your tempura to 375 °F. Dip vegetables and shrimp in batter, and deep-fry until they float and are cooked through.
', '
Drizzle some Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) over the steamed rice. Place Tempura on top of rice and top with more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Serve with the sauce mix for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: grilled-romaine-with-spicy-creamy-feta-dressing
Ingredients: ['3 romaine hearts', '¼ cup toasted pine nuts']
Procedure:
['
Add the feta, extra virgin olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, Greek yogurt, lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and salt and pepper to taste to a food processor. Blend until smooth then mix in the dill. Set the dressing aside.
', '
Heat a grill over medium heat. Slice the romaine hearts in half lengthwise. Place the romaine onto the grill cut side down. Cook for about 2 minutes on each side, until it develops charred marks.
', '
Remove the romaine from the grill then serve with the prepared dressing and top with toasted pine nuts. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-yaki-onigiri
Ingredients: ['2 cups short-grain rice, cooked', 'shredded cheese of your choice, to taste']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. mirin']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/QZ_8-9LNFv4
', '
Preheat the oven to 450 °F. While the rice is still warm, add in 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and black pepper, then mix with a spatula or rice paddle. Take about half a cup of rice into a small bowl. Shake the bowl left and right a couple of times to create pre-shaped rice balls.\xa0\xa0
', '
Make a small hole in the center of the rice with a wet finger and add some shredded cheese. Cover the cheese with a small amount of rice on the top. Wet your hands with water, then gently press rice together to form a secure rice ball. Repeat with remaining rice.
', '
In a small bowl, combine the sauce mix ingredients and mix thoroughly. Brush the rice balls with the glaze.
', '
Place the rice balls on a sheet pan lined with parchment paper and bake them for 4 to 5 minutes. Re-brush the glaze every 2 minutes flipping the rice balls and glazing until you get a nice golden brown. Enjoy!
']

Name: sticky-sriracha-wing-pops
Ingredients: ['1 package (around 1 lb) chicken drumettes ', '1 cup white flour', '2 tsp. garlic powder', '2 tsp. sweet paprika', '1/2 tsp. cayenne pepper', '2 cups canola oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/x_TDh_Pf-D4
', '
Prep the wing pops: Hold the thinner side of the drumette and with a sharp knife, carefully cut around the bone to detach the meat and skin.
', '
Now hold the bone and with your other hand, pull the meat and skin down to the end of the bone, creating a lollipop shape. Continue pushing the meat down and over the end. Continue with all the wings. Place lollipop wings in a pan in a single layer. Sprinkle each side with 1/2 tsp salt and 1/2 tsp black pepper. Cover and place in the fridge to chill for 30 min. to an hour.
', '
Make the dry mix: In a large bowl, add the flour, garlic powder, paprika, and cayenne pepper, and mix to combine. Add chicken in batches and toss to evenly coat with dry mix. Meanwhile, heat the oil in a high rimmed frying pan over medium-high heat until oil reaches 340°F.
', '
Once the oil has reached the correct temperature, add a single layer of wings, taking care not to crowd the pan. Fry for about 5-7 minutes on each side, until golden and nice and crispy.\xa0
', '
When the chicken is finished, place it on a cooling rack set over a sheet tray to drain excess oil before tossing in sauce. To make the Sticky Sriracha Sauce: Add all sauce mix ingredients to a bowl and whisk to combine. Toss wings in sauce and enjoy immediately!
']

Name: portobello-mushroom-pizza
Ingredients: ['6 portobello mushroom caps, stems removed, washed and dried ', '1 1/2 cups mozzarella cheese, shredded', '30 miniature-sized pepperonis', '6 cherry or grape tomatoes, sliced thinly']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '6 tsp. Italian seasoning, divided', '3/4 cup pizza sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/SQNRm-wSWh8
', '
Preheat the oven to broil on high heat. Arrange the oven rack to the middle of your oven.
', '
Combine the oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and 4 teaspoons of the Italian seasoning together in a small bowl. Brush the bottoms (technically the “tops”) of each mushroom with the garlic oil mixture and place each mushroom, oil side down, on a lightly greased baking sheet.
', '
In a small bowl, mix the pizza sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce together.
', '
Fill each mushroom with 2 tablespoons of the spicy pizza sauce per cap, 1/4 cup of mozzarella cheese and 6 pepperoni miniatures.
', '
Broil until the cheese has melted and is golden in color, about 8 minutes. To serve, sprinkle with the remaining Italian seasoning, and top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: shakshuka
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 red bell pepper, seeded and diced', '1 medium onion, diced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. cumin', '1 can (28 oz.) crushed tomatoes', '6 large eggs', '1 small bunch fresh cilantro, chopped', '1 small bunch fresh parsley, chopped']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0XNTut4WObI
', '
Heat olive oil in a large sauté pan or cast iron skillet on medium heat. Add the chopped bell pepper and onion and cook for 5 minutes or until the onion becomes translucent. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, paprika, and cumin, and cook for an additional minute.
', '
Pour the can of tomatoes and juice into the pan and mix in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Bring the sauce to a simmer.
', '
Use a large spoon to make small wells in the sauce and crack the eggs into each well. Cover the pan and cook for 5-8 minutes, or until the eggs are done to your liking.
', '
Garnish with chopped cilantro and parsley and top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: cute-bento
Ingredients: ['1 cup uncooked Japanese short grain rice', '1 1/4 cups water', '1 tsp. sesame seeds', '1/2 sheet nori', 'lettuce leaves for lining the box', 'mochiko fried chicken reheated and cooled to room temperature, to taste', '5 grape tomatoes', '1 Tbsp. shelled edamame ', 'julienned carrots cooked if desired and seasoned', '1 slice cheese']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/03oly4BbiDY
', '
Rinse the rice in cold water until the water runs clear. Soak the rice in the cold water for 30 minutes, then drain.
', "
Cook the rice in a rice cooker according to the manufacturer's instructions or place the rice and 1 1/4 cups of water in a heavy bottomed saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce the heat to the lowest setting, cover, and cook until all the water has been absorbed, 10-13 minutes. Remove from heat, leave the cover on, and allow to rest for another 10 minutes. Remove the lid, fluff the rice and mix in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Allow to rest until just cool enough to handle.\xa0
\xa0
", '
To form cute animal shapes, wet your hands with cold water, rub with salt and grab a handful of the warm rice. Form the mound of rice into a ball for the head, using plastic wrap if needed. Add smaller mounds of rice for “ears”. Sprinkle with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and garnish with sesame seeds. Use a piece of nori to cut out the desired face.
', '
Line the bottom tier of the bento box with lettuce. Add the cute rice animal, fill the second tier with fried chicken, grape tomatoes, shelled edamame, and carrots.\xa0
', '
Cut shapes out of the cheese slice using a cutter or by hand with a knife. Serve with small dishes of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: mie-goreng
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '5 oz. boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite size pieces', '5 oz. peeled and deveined shrimp', '2 large eggs, whisked', '1 large shallot, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 cups shredded cabbage', '3 bok choy, roughly chopped ', '3-4 Tbsp. water', '14 oz. egg noodles, cooked', 'sliced green onion, for garnish ', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'salt, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat a wok over high heat. Add in 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil. Place the chicken into the wok and cook for 3-4 minutes until browned and cooked through. Remove the chicken from the wok. Pour in another tablespoon of vegetable oil into the wok then add in the shrimp. Cook for about 1-2 minutes until they are cooked halfway through. Remove the shrimp from the pan.
', '
Pour in another tablespoon of vegetable oil. Then add in the eggs. Scramble the eggs then push them to one side of the wok. Pour in another tablespoon of vegetable oil and add in the shallots, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cabbage. Cook until the cabbage turns translucent.\xa0
', '
Toss in the light green parts of the bok choy. Add the chicken and shrimp back into the wok. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, and water.\xa0
', '
Add the cooked egg noodles and dark green parts of the bok choy. Toss until everything is well coated in the sauce.\xa0
', '
Season with salt and Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder to taste. Remove the wok from heat and serve. Garnish with sliced green onions and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: seared-scallop-risotto
Ingredients: ['---For Risotto---', '6 1/2 cups chicken stock ', '1 1/2 lb. shiitake mushrooms, sliced ', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 shallot, minced ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 1/2 cups Arborio rice ', '¼ cup of sake (optional) ', '½ cup heavy cream ', '2 Tbsp. butter ', 'fresh parmesan cheese, to taste', 'fresh chives, a little, to taste', '---For Scallops---', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 lb. sea scallops', 'fresh chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['---For Risotto---', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'black pepper, to taste', '---For Scallops---', '1/2 tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XZO68M2yH9s
', '
Heat the chicken stock and set it aside.\xa0
', '
For Risotto: Without adding any oil, add sliced shiitake mushrooms and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce in a pan. Turn the heat up to medium and sauté for 2-3 minutes or until fragrant. Add in vegetable oil and add in minced shallots and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sweat the shallots and garlic for 1-2 minutes or until translucent. Add in Arborio rice and sauté for 1-2 minutes. Add in Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and mix.
\xa0
', '
Pour in sake to deglaze (optional). Slowly pour in the chicken stock ladle by ladle, start with ½ cup at a time. Let the rice sit for 20 seconds and occasionally stir. Once the rice absorbs most of the stock, add in another ½ cup. Repeat this process until the rice is 95% cooked and all the broth is done (around 18 minutes).
', '
Once the rice is al dente, add in heavy cream and black pepper to taste. Mix well and turn off the heat. Add in cold butter, parmesan cheese, and fresh chives. Mix well.
', '
For Scallops: Heat a large sauté pan over medium heat and add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil. Pat scallops dry and season with salt and pepper. Place scallops in the pan and cook 3 to 4 minutes per side. Transfer cooked scallops to a plate and immediately brush Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce onto scallops. Serve atop creamy risotto and sprinkle some fresh chives for garnish. Enjoy!
']

Name: chawanmushi
Ingredients: ['2 eggs', '1 cup chicken stock', '1 dash sake', '1 shiitake mushroom, sliced into strips', '½ cup chicken breast, cooked and chopped ', '2 pieces fish cake', '2 sprigs fresh parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/U_oGPcXa7-A
', '
In a medium bowl, whisk eggs gently while slowly pouring in the chicken stock, sake, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce.
', '
Divide the mushroom and chicken evenly between two small tea cups. Add fish cake and pour the egg mixture into each cup until filled.
', '
Bring about 1 inch of water to a boil in a steamer or saucepan. Reduce heat to a simmer, and place cups into the steamer. Cover and steam for 12 minutes, or until the egg is firm but soft and silky like tofu.\xa0
', '
Garnish each cup with a sprig of parsley and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-soft-tofu-stew
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. vegetable oil', '⅓ cup kimchi, chopped with juice', '¼ cup onions, diced', '1 Tbsp. Korean red pepper flakes', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup protein of choice (shrimp/ chicken/ beef/ pork), cut into bite sized pieces', '1 package soft tofu ', '½ cup chicken stock', '½ cup shiitake mushroom, sliced', '1 egg ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'green onion, chopped for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'salt and sugar, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/eyc3atTmGC4
', '
To make the soup base, heat a medium pot or earthenware pot (ttukbaegi) over medium-high heat. Add the vegetable oil, kimchi, onions, Korean red pepper flakes, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Add your choice of protein if using. Stir fry until protein is almost cooked and onions softened, about 3 to 4 minutes.
', '
Add the soft tofu and gently break it apart. Next pour in the chicken stock and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and bring to a boil. Taste and season with salt and sugar depending on how salty and fermented your kimchi is.\xa0
', '
Once boiling, add the mushrooms and crack an egg on top and boil for 3 to 4 minutes.
', '
Finish with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and garnish with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: sushi-cake
Ingredients: ['3 cups short grain (sushi) rice', '3 cups water', '2 sheets of sushi nori, cut into pieces', 'half an English cucumber, sliced ', '½ lb. wild salmon, sliced thin (or any other sushi grade fish of your choice)', '1 cucumber, thinly peeled ribbon', '¼ cup salmon roe']
Seasoning: ['furikake, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. sugar ', '1 ½ tsp. kosher salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sJjBGxc5Ee8
', '
Make the rice: In a heavy-bottomed pot, rinse the rice in several changes of cool water, until the water runs clear. In the same pot, add 3 cups of fresh water and cover the pot with a tight fitting lid. Do not remove this lid until the rice is finished. Bring the pot to a full boil. You will know it is boiling when steam pushes its way out at the edges of the lid and you can hear the bubbling in the pot. Turn the burner down to the lowest possible setting, and set a timer for 18 minutes.
', '
While the rice is cooking, make the seasoned vinegar. Combine the sugar and salt with the Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar in a bowl and mix until sugar is dissolved.
', "
When time is up, return the heat to high for 1 minute. Turn off the heat, and leave the lid on for 5 minutes. After 5 minutes, lift the lid and gently fluff the rice. Transfer the rice to a large baking sheet. Sprinkle the seasoned vinegar onto the rice and gently toss to coat it evenly and help it cool. When the rice is evenly seasoned, shiny, and dry, it's ready to use.\xa0
", '
Take half of the rice, and mix it with furikake. Line an 8-inch springform pan with plastic wrap.\xa0Fill the pan a little more than halfway with the furikake rice. Use a piece of wax paper to press it down into an even firm layer. Arrange the nori to cover the layer of rice. Next, make a layer of thin cucumber slices. Top the cucumber with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Fill the pan the rest of the way with rice, pressing down into a firm even layer that’s flush with the top of the spring form pan. Use wax paper to keep it from sticking to your hands. Flip the pan over onto a cake stand or plate and carefully remove the pan, and then the plastic wrap.\xa0
', '
Arrange the salmon around the edge of the “cake” and place cucumber ribbon in the center to resemble flower petals. Just before serving, mix salmon roe with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce. Mound salmon roe in the center. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Slice and serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and wasabi. Enjoy!
']

Name: menbosha
Ingredients: ['4 slices of milk bread', '1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', 'neutral oil for frying (vegetable or canola)']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 egg white', '2 Tbsp. potato or cornstarch', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/bSjnRq9175g
', '
Cut off the crust from the bread and cut the slices into quarters.
', '
Mince shrimp well and place in a medium bowl. To the bowl, mix in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, egg white, starch, salt, Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Form a ball about the size of the bread slices and place on one piece of the toast. Top with another piece to create a mini sandwich.
', '
In a deep pot, heat up your frying oil to 325°F. Add the toasts in batches to avoid overcrowding your pan. Fry for 2 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Remove on a wire rack to cool.
', '
Serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-piccata
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lb. chicken breast', '¼ cup all purpose flour', '3 Tbsp. parmesan cheese', '¼ cup extra virgin olive oil ', '2 Tbsp. butter', 'cooked pasta of choice, for serving', 'chopped parsley, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. kosher salt', 'pinch ground black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '½ cup white wine', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '¼ cup capers, drained', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter']
Procedure:
['
Slice the chicken breasts halves through the center leaving the ends intact. Add the all purpose flour, kosher salt, black pepper, and parmesan cheese to a shallow dish. Mix to combine. Dredge the butterflied chicken breasts to the flour mixture and dredge them until they are completely coated.
', '
Heat a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in 2 tablespoons of butter and allow it to melt. Working in batches, add the chicken breasts to the pan. Cook for 3 minutes on each side until browned and fully cooked. Remove the chicken from the pan and set them aside.
', '
Add the lemon juice, white wine, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and capers to the pan. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the sauce reduces by half. Whisk in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
', '
Add the chicken back to the pan and coat them in the sauce. Serve with pasta and garnish with parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
