Name: v-day-brunch-board
Ingredients: ['1 pack pancake mix', '6 cooked bacon strips', '3 eggs, scrambled', '2 eggs, hard-boiled, halved', '6 potatoes wedges, roasted ', '2 bagels', '6 slices smoked salmon', '6 slices salami, or other meats of your choice']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. cream cheese', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '3 Tbsp. hummus', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. maple syrup', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili  Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/OozOnXK0Y_E
', '
Follow the instruction on the package of pancake mix to create a pancake batter and make some pancakes (heart shapes if desired).
', '
Arrange all items on a large wooden board or serving platter, leaving room for 4 dipping sauces.\xa0
', '
In 4 separate bowls: mix the cream cheese and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce together. Mix the hummus and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic together. And finally, mix maple syrup and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil together. Place Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo in a fourth bowl and place it on the brunch board.
', '
Create your own combinations and enjoy!
']

Name: heart-shaped-spicy-tuna-bites
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups short grain (sushi) rice', '2 cups water', 'vegetable oil, for frying', '1 lb. sushi grade ahi tuna, finely chopped', 'avocado, thinly sliced, to taste', 'toasted sesame seeds, for garnish', 'chives, minced, for garnish', 'serrano pepper, sliced, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1-2 tsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/FjoFUvzyYOw
', '
Prepare the rice: Thoroughly rinse the rice 4-5 times until the water runs clear. Add rice and water to a pot and place it on the stove over medium to high heat. Once water is boiling, reduce the heat to low-medium and place the lid on and cook for 15 minutes. After 15 minutes, remove from the heat. Leave the lid on and allow it to steam for 5 minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, in a small bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, sugar and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil until the sugar has dissolved. Once the rice is cooked, toss the mixture with the cooked rice in a large bowl until combined. Place your rice into a small square baking tray lined with plastic wrap and shape your rice into a ½ inch thick square block. Wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or overnight. You can also freeze in the freezer for about 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Fry the rice: In a medium skillet, heat a thin layer of oil on high heat until hot. Gently, place the rice into the pan leaving about 2 inches in between each piece. Cook on medium-high heat for about 3 minutes or until golden brown and then flip and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes. Remove from the pan and place on a wire rack placed over a lined baking sheet to drain any excess oil.
', '
Make the Spicy Tuna: In a medium mixing bowl, add your chopped tuna, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and lime juice. Mix until thoroughly combined.\xa0
', '
To assemble, add thinly sliced avocado on top of the crispy rice. Then place 1-2 tablespoons of spicy tuna on top. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds, minced chives and a serrano pepper slice. Enjoy immediately!\xa0
']

Name: sichuan-style-spicy-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['vegetable oil, a little', '2 stalks green onion', '2 ginger slices', '5 garlic cloves', '5 dry red pepper', '1 Tbsp. dry peppercorn', '6 oz. shrimp (with head and shell)', '6 oz. sliced beef', '6 fish balls', '3 oz. lotus root slices', '3 oz. cauliflower', '3 oz. celery', '3 oz. potato slices', 'black fungus, a little', 'water, a little', '1 tsp. roasted white sesame, for garnish', 'cilantro leaves, a little, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce (No Preservatives Added)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)']
Procedure:
['
Heat the pan and add vegetable oil; sauté the scallion, ginger, garlic, dry red pepper, and dry peppercorn.\xa0
', '
Add shrimp, beef slices, and fish balls and stir fry for two minutes.\xa0
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot, Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and stir fry until mixed.\xa0
', '
Add all of the vegetables and some water, and keep stir frying.\xa0
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) when the soup thickens. Pour into a pot and drizzle with sesame to serve.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: rice-cooker-hainan-chicken
Ingredients: ['6 chicken drumsticks (approx. 1 1/2 lb.)', '2 cups uncooked rice ', '2 cups chicken stock', '½” of ginger cut into thin strips', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'green onion, sliced for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'a pinch of ground black pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/8IMlat-FBmk
', '
Rub Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil on chicken drumsticks. Top with a pinch of black pepper and let marinade for about 20 minutes.
', '
Rinse rice 3 times and place in the rice cooker. Add chicken stock to the 2-cup line on your rice cooker then add ginger and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Arrange the chicken drumsticks over the rice. Turn on the rice cooker and let it cook.
', '
When the rice cooker shuts off, remove the lid and let it sit for about 10 more minutes. Remove the chicken from the rice cooker.
', '
Fluff the rice with a fork and mix in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce.
', '
Serve rice with chicken and garnish with green onion and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: egg-salad-sando
Ingredients: ['2 slices Japanese sandwich bread', '3 large eggs, boiled and peeled', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '¼ tsp. Dijon mustard', '⅛ tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', '⅛ tsp. onion powder', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/_Fv8DZhOWK8
', '
Slice one boiled egg in half and set aside.
', '
Roughly chop the remaining two eggs and add them to a bowl, along with the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Dijon mustard, Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, onion powder, and salt. Mix well to combine.
', '
Take two slices of bread and add the halved eggs to one slice with the tapered end of each egg pointing towards opposite corners. Cover the halved egg with the egg salad mixture.
', '
Place the second slice of bread over the first, and gently press the edges down to mold the bread to the shape of the eggs.
', '
Cut the crusts off if you like and then slice the sandwich diagonally to reveal the halved eggs in the center. Enjoy!
']

Name: army-stew
Ingredients: ['½ can SPAM', '8 oz. soft tofu', '⅓ white onion', '8 Vienna sausages', '2 stalks green onion, whites and greens separated', '5 oz. enoki mushrooms', '½ cup Korean rice cake ovalettes', '¼ cup kimchi', '4 cups beef bone broth', '1 pack ramen']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 ½ Tbsp. gochujang (Korean red pepper paste)', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ Tbsp. sugar', '2 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2hOkTjx_80M
', '
Cut the SPAM, tofu, white onion, sausage and green onion. Wash the mushrooms and cut off the roots, separate. Put rice cakes in a small bowl and cover with water. Set aside.
', '
Mix all sauce ingredients in a small bowl, add white part of green onion and set aside.
', '
Arrange SPAM, sausage, tofu, white onion, mushrooms, rice cakes in a shallow pot. Top with kimchi and 2/3 of the sauce mix. Pour beef bone broth into the pot until ingredients are barely submerged. Bring to a boil over medium heat and allow it to reduce slightly for about 3-4 minutes. Taste and add more sauce if necessary, add more broth if too much has evaporated.\xa0
', '
Add in your ramen and cook until noodles are done. Sprinkle with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Add the green part of green onion.
', '
Serve immediately with a bowl of rice or by itself. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-strawberry-sriracha-margarita
Ingredients: ['---For Glasses---', '¼ cup sugar', 'juice of 1 lime', '---For the Margarita---', '2 cups strawberries, hulled and chopped', '½ cup tequila', '¼ cup Cointreau liqueur (or other orange flavored liquor)', '1 Tbsp. agave nectar', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '2 cups ice']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/iuBf3KanASM
', '
On a plate, place lime juice. On a separate plate, add the sugar.
', '
Dip a glass into the lime juice and then in the sugar, rimming the glass. Repeat with a second glass.
', '
To make the margaritas, add all other ingredients to a blender and blend until smooth.\xa0
', '
Pour into the sugar rimmed margarita glasses and enjoy!
']

Name: mini-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ Tbsp. egg', '½ tsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. white rice, cooked and cooled', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. carrots and peas', '½ tsp. green onion, sliced']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/-eMvmKQ0eOo
', '
In a mini skillet, heat Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil over medium heat. Once hot, add in egg and scramble. Remove from the pan and set aside.
', '
In the same skillet, add in butter and melt. Add in rice and cook until warmed through. Add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sauté for 1 more minute.\xa0
', '
Add in carrots, peas, and cooked egg and stir until warmed through.
', '
Garnish with green onion and enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-salmon-pasta
Ingredients: ['1 lb. fettuccine pasta', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '7 oz. salmon filet, skin removed and cut into bite size pieces', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 shallot, diced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup dry white wine', '1 cup heavy cream', '2 cups baby spinach', 'zest from ½ lemon', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 Tbsp. chopped parsley']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '¼ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Add in the fettuccine and cook according to the package instructions. Drain and rinse under cold water.
', '
Melt the butter in a large pan over medium-high heat. Season the salmon with salt and pepper then add it to the pan. Cook for 3-4 minutes or until fully cooked. Remove the salmon from the pan. Pour in the olive oil and allow it to heat. Then add in the shallot and garlic. Sauté for 1-2 minutes.
', '
Reduce the heat to medium and add in the white wine. Let it cook and reduce for 5-7 minutes. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, heavy cream, spinach, lemon zest, lemon juice, and ¼ teaspoon of salt. Add the pasta to the pans and toss it together with the sauce. Gently add in the salmon and give it a quick mix. Top with parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: homemade-crunch-wrap
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lb. lean ground beef', '1 small yellow onion, chopped', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/4 cup water', '1 jar nacho cheese or queso cheese dip', '6 burrito-size flour tortillas', '6 tostada shells or corn tortillas', '2 cups shredded lettuce', '1 tomato, diced', '1 cup shredded Mexican cheese blend', 'cooking spray']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/39nqxg1NDrM
', '
In a large skillet, over medium-high heat, cook and crumble the ground beef and onion until beef is no longer pink. Drain grease. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and water. Continue to cook until it starts to boil. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 5 more minutes.
', '
Warm the nacho cheese sauce or queso cheese in a microwave-safe bowl.
', '
Place the flour tortillas on a large plate. Microwave for 20 seconds to warm them. Lay one flour tortilla on a flat surface. Spread 1/2 cup of taco meat onto the center of the tortilla. Drizzle a couple Tbsp. of nacho cheese over the meat. Top meat with one tostada shell or crispy corn tortilla. Spread a thin layer of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo over the tostada shell. Top with lettuce, tomato and shredded Mexican cheese.
', '
To assemble the crunch wrap, start with the bottom of the flour tortilla and fold the edge up over the center. Continue to work your way around, folding the flour tortilla over the center fillings. Depending on the size of your tortilla, there might be a spot left open in the center; cut a piece of another flour tortilla and tuck it in the center, so it’s fully covered. Repeat with all remaining tortillas, tostadas and fillings.\xa0
', '
Spray a large, non-stick skillet with cooking spray. Heat over medium heat. Place one crunch wrap seam-side down onto the skillet. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes, or until golden-brown. Carefully, flip over and cook the other side until golden-brown. Repeat the process with all crunch wraps. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
']

Name: lions-head-meatballs
Ingredients: ['---For the Meatballs---', '1 lb. ground chicken', '¾ lb. ground pork', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '3 stalks scallions, chopped', '1 large shallot, finely chopped', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Sauce Mix: ['---For The Sauce---', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '4 thin slices ginger', '2 stalks scallions, cut into 2”-long pieces', '4 oz. shiitake mushrooms, sliced', '2 lb. napa cabbage, chopped', '1 ½ cups chicken stock', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '6 oz. baby bok choy, quartered']
Procedure:
['
For the Meatballs: Add the ground chicken, ground pork, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, scallions, shallot, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, salt, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce to a bowl. Mix in one direction until combined and develops the consistency of a paste. Then mix in the olive oil and portion the mixture into 6 balls.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium low heat. Add the meatballs to the pan and cook on each side for 4 minutes. Remove the meatballs from the pan and set them aside.\xa0
', '
For the Sauce: Heat the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in the pan over medium low heat. Add the ginger and scallion and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant. Transfer the meatballs back to the pan. Add in the shiitake mushrooms, the thicker pieces of napa cabbage, chicken stock, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Bring the mixture to a simmer. Cover with a lid and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes. Add in the thinner pieces of cabbage and bok choy. Cover and cook for another 5-10 minutes until the cabbage and bok choy are cooked.
', '
Remove the pot from heat and enjoy!
']

Name: spiral-cucumber-salad
Ingredients: ['4 mini cucumbers', '2 tsp. salt, to drain water']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, plus more for garnish', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Prepare the cucumbers: Wash and dry cucumbers and trim the ends. Place cucumber between 2 chopsticks. Cut one side at a 45-degree angle. Flip the cucumber over and cut at a straight/90-degree angle.
', '
Sprinkle salt over cucumbers and gently massage into them. Let cucumbers soak in salt for 5 minutes (no more than 10 minutes or they will break down). Rinse with cold water at least 3-4 times to completely remove the salt. Strain and set aside.
', '
Meanwhile, combine all the sauce ingredients in a separate bowl and mix thoroughly.
', '
Pour sauce over cucumbers and gently mix. Top with more sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: sichuan-style-spicy-stir-fry-hot-pot
Ingredients: ['17.5 oz. fresh shrimps', 'garlic and ginger to taste, Slice', '6.5 oz. vegetables (lotus root, potatoes, wood ear mushroom)', '6.5 oz. additional ingredients (onion, green pepper, red pepper)']
Seasoning: ['1 pouch of Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Spicy Stir-Fry Sauce (3.5 oz)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/PoMLgg1eLps
', '
Boil the shrimps until 80% cooked, then remove from water and set aside.
', '
Heat oil in a wok and add ginger and garlic. Heat until very fragrant. Add Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Spicy Stir-Fry Sauce and stir-fry until fragrant, then add shrimps and vegetables and stir-fry.
', '
Lastly, add the additional ingredients (onion, green pepper, red pepper) and cook on low heat to taste.
']

Name: new-orleans-style-grilled-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['17.5 oz. chicken wings']
Marinade: ['1 pouch of Lee Kum Kee New Orleans Style Barbecue Sauce (3.9 oz)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ad7t0Bd07HU
', '
Marinate the chicken wings in Lee Kum Kee New Orleans Style Barbecue Sauce for at least 3 hours.
', '
Preheat the oven to 400°F, then cook the chicken wings on the top or bottom rack for 20 minutes.
']

Name: rice-paper-roll-tteokbokki
Ingredients: ['12 rice paper', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. vegetable bouillon', '2 Tbsp. gochujang', '2 Tbsp. agave', '2 ½ cups water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/A4gAbw7c4qU
', '
Dip two rice papers into warm water. Remove the rice paper when you feel them begin to soften. Tightly roll up the rice paper then cut it into 3-4 pieces. Repeat this process with the remaining rice paper.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, vegetable bouillon, gochujang, agave, and water to a pot. Mix to combine. Heat it over medium-high heat and bring it to a boil.
', '
Add in the rice paper rolls and cook for 3-4 minutes. Remove the pot from heat and garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: crispy-salmon-rice-paper-rolls
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sockeye salmon, cut into 2” cubes', '3 Tbsp. avocado oil', '10 rice paper wrappers', '1 ½ cups cooked white rice', '1 avocado, sliced', '3 green onion, cut into 2”-long pieces']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. lemon juice', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/sVH6hTuzQFQ
', '
Season the salmon with salt and pepper. In a bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Add the salmon to the sauce and mix until well combined. Marinate the salmon for about 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add in 2 tablespoons of avocado oil. Place the salmon into the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side. Remove the salmon from the pan then peel off the skin.\xa0
', '
Dip a rice paper into warm water. Remove it from the water when it begins to soften. Add about 2 tablespoons of rice to the center of the rice paper. Layer on the avocado then the green onion. Place the salmon on top. Fold the bottom edge of the rice paper over the salmon. Then fold in the sides of the rice paper. Then roll the roll up to the top edge. Repeat this process to make the remaining salmon rolls.\xa0
', '
Heat the remaining tablespoon of avocado oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the salmon rolls to the pan and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side until crispy and golden brown. Remove the rolls from the pan. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: chili-oil-vodka-pasta
Ingredients: ['1 lb. penne pasta', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. vodka', '½ cup tomato paste', '½ cup heavy cream', 'shredded cheese, for topping', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/GuEdRGE3KEQ
', '
Cook the pasta according to the package directions. Drain and rinse it under cold water.
', '
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add in the onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté until the onion is browned and translucent. Pour in the vodka and cook for a minute. Mix in the tomato paste until well combined. Then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil and heavy cream.
', '
Add the pasta to the pan and mix until combined. Remove the pan from heat. Top with shredded cheese and garnish with chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: butter-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 1/2 lb. chicken thighs, cut into bite-size pieces', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', 'cilantro, for garnish', 'basmati rice, to serve', 'naan bread, to serve']
Marinade: ['1/2 cup plain yogurt, full fat', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 tsp. turmeric powder', '2 tsp. garam masala ', '1/2 tsp. chili powder ', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. ghee ', '1 large onion, sliced ', '1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. ground coriander', '1 1/2 tsp. ground cumin', '1 1/2 tsp. garam masala', '14 oz. crushed tomatoes', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. red chili powder ', '1 cup of heavy cream ', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1/2 tsp. dried fenugreek leaves']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h1_LQTj8uJw
', '
Combine the marinade ingredients and mix well. Add the chicken into the bowl and toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate overnight, or up to 24 hours (minimum 3 hours).
', '
Heat oil in a large skillet or pot over medium-high heat. When sizzling, add chicken pieces in batches of two or three, making sure not to crowd the pan. Fry until browned for only 3 minutes on each side. Set aside and keep warm.
', '
Heat ghee in the same pan. Cook the onions until they start to sweat (about 6 minutes) while scraping up any browned bits stuck on the bottom of the pan. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant, then add ground coriander, cumin and garam masala. Let cook for about 20 seconds until fragrant, while stirring occasionally. Add in crushed tomatoes, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and chili powder. Let simmer for about 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally until sauce thickens and becomes a deep brown red color.
', '
Remove from heat, scoop mixture into a blender and blend until smooth. You may need to add a couple tablespoons of water to help it blend (up to 1/4 cup).
', '
Pour the puréed sauce back into the pan. Stir the cream, sugar and crushed fenugreek leaves. Add the chicken with juices back into the pan and cook for an additional 8-10 minutes until chicken is cooked through and the sauce is thick and bubbling. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with fresh, hot garlic butter rice and naan bread. Enjoy!
']

Name: butter-board
Ingredients: ['1 head garlic', '1-2 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 sticks unsalted butter, softened to room temperature', 'honey, as needed', '3 Tbsp. sliced green onion', '¼ cup microgreens']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '1-2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', 'flakey salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/Per95zebEvo
', '
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Cut off the head of the garlic then drizzle the olive oil on top. Season with salt and pepper. Wrap the garlic in foil and bake it in the oven for 30-40 minutes until the cloves feel soft inside. Remove the garlic from the oven and allow it to cool.\xa0
', '
Spread the butter onto the serving board. Evenly disperse the roasted garlic onto the butter. Spoon the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil over the butter. Drizzle honey over top. Sprinkle flakey salt all over. Top with sliced green onions and microgreens. Enjoy!
']

Name: mala-sichuan-style-chicken-stew
Ingredients: ['1 whole chicken ', 'sliced ginger', 'garlic', 'red onion (to taste)', 'green peppers (to taste)', 'red peppers (optional)', 'cilantro (optional)', 'wine (according to taste)']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Mala Sichuan Style Sauce for Chicken Stew']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3cVz6nJMt9s
', '
Heat oil in a wok, add sliced ginger and garlic, cook until fragrant.
', '
Add chicken pieces (1 chicken, about 3 lbs) and stir fry the chicken over medium heat until golden brown (does not need to be fully cooked).
', '
Add the Spices Pack and stir fry the chicken for about 2 minutes until the flavor of the spices comes out.
', '
Add the first pouch of the Mala Sichuan Style Sauce for Chicken Stew, stir fry until well mixed. Pour 6 Tbsp. of water into the pot, cover with lid and simmer for 2 minutes.
', '
Add the second pouch of Mala Sichuan Style Sauce for Chicken Stew and the other ingredients (such as red onions, green and red peppers, etc.). Stir fry for about 1 minute.\xa0Add Extra Spicy Chili Powder to preferred spiciness, stir fry until cooked evenly.\xa0Add cilantro and serve.
\xa0
Tips: Add a splash of wine before adding the cilantro to heighten the aroma.
']

Name: hoisin-chicken-yaki-udon-noodles
Ingredients: ['16 oz. fresh udon noodles', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '¾ lb. chicken breast, cut into small pieces', '8 shiitake mushrooms, stems removed and sliced', '3 stalks of green onions, sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup chicken broth', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZmfYtYk7YQg
', '
Cook the noodles according to the package directions. Drain and rinse with cold water.
', '
In a bowl, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, chicken broth, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger.
', '
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add in the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Add in the mushrooms and cook until browned.
', '
Add in the udon noodles and prepared sauce mix. Continue cooking until everything is well combined and the sauce has slightly thickened. Remove the pan from heat. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: steamed-snapper-with-hot-ginger-scallion-oil
Ingredients: ['1 (2 lb.) whole snapper', '1 cup sliced green onion', '1” piece ginger, peeled and fine julienned', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qVVZOIq5Alg
', '
Fill a large pot with a ¼ inch of water. Fit a steaming rack into the pot. Heat the pan over high heat and bring the water to a boil. Rinse the inside and outside of the snapper then pat it dry. Transfer it to a heatproof dish and season it with kosher salt.
', '
Place the dish onto the steaming rack. Cover the pot with a lid and reduce the heat to medium. Cook for 15-20 minutes or until the thickest part of the fish is cooked and flaky.
', '
Remove the dish from the steamer and top with the green onions and ginger.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a small pan over medium heat until hot, about 5 minutes. Pour the hot oil over the green onion and ginger mixture on top of the snapper.
', '
Mix the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and Shaoxing wine together in a small bowl. Pour it over the snapper and garnish with cilantro leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: pork-dumplings
Ingredients: ['3 cups chopped cabbage leaves', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 stalks of green onions, sliced', '⅓ lb. ground pork', '½ Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 pack of dumpling wrappers', '½ Tbsp. cornstarch', '¼ cup water']
Seasoning: ['a pinch of kosher salt', 'a pinch of black pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qVVZOIq5Alg
', '
Place the cabbage leaves into a food processor and pulse until finely chopped. Transfer the cabbage to a bowl and sprinkle a good pinchful of salt on top. Allow the cabbage to sit for 10 minutes then squeeze out and discard the excess moisture.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, green onion, pork, a pinch of black pepper, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, rice vinegar, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to the food processor. Pulse until the ingredients are finely chopped and combined. Transfer the pork mixture to the bowl of cabbage and mix until combined.
', '
Fill the dumpling wrappers with ¾ tablespoon of pork filling. Combine the cornstarch and water in a small bowl. Dip your finger into the cornstarch and water mixture and rub it along the edge of the wrapper. Fold the wrapper in half so that you have a semicircle. Press down on the edge to seal the fold. Rub the cornstarch and water mixture along the edge and create pleats. Repeat this process to make the remaining dumplings.
', '
Fill a large pot with water and bring it to a boil. Add in the dumplings and cook for about 6 minutes or until the dumplings are fully cooked through. Remove the dumplings with a slotted spoon and serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: longevity-noodles
Ingredients: ['12 oz. Asian wheat flour noodles', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '½ lb. shitake mushrooms, stemmed and sliced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 bunch of green onions, cut into 2”-long pieces, green and white parts separated']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qVVZOIq5Alg
', '
Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add in the Asian wheat flour noodle and cook according to the package directions. Drain and set aside.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in the mushrooms and sauté for 5-8 minutes until all the moisture has been released. Mix in 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and the white parts of the green onion. Sauté until the garlic turns a light golden brown color. Add the drained noodles to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
', '
Add the remaining Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder to the noodles. Toss the noodles and sauce together until well combined then mix in the green parts of the green onion. Cook for another minute. Remove the pan from heat and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-oil
Sauce Mix: ['3 cups vegetable oil', '3 star anise', '2 cinnamon sticks', '3 bay leaves', '1 Tbsp. green Sichuan peppercorns', '2 Tbsp. red Sichuan peppercorns', '2 cardamom pods (optional)', '1 tsp. cloves', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1-2 shallots', '1 cup Sichuan chili flakes', '1 ½ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xGEm8ZB_rMw
', '
Add vegetable oil, star anise, cinnamon, bay leaves, Sichuan peppercorns, cardamom, cloves, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and shallots into a pot.
', '
Heat the oil to 225°F over medium heat and lower heat to maintain heat at 220-225°F.
', '
Allow oil to infuse over heat for about 1 hour.
', '
Pour oil over a mesh sieve into a heatproof bowl that has your Sichuan chili flakes.
', '
Stir in salt and allow chili oil to cool. Enjoy!
']

Name: ginger-scallion-oil
Sauce Mix: ['1 ¼ cups sliced green onion', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '¾ tsp. sherry vinegar', '¾ tsp. kosher salt', '2 Tbsp. grapeseed oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xGEm8ZB_rMw
', '
Add the green onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, sherry vinegar, and kosher salt to a bowl.\xa0
', '
Heat up grapeseed oil in a small pot. Pour in heated grapeseed oil in the sauce mix.
', '
Mix until combined and let it sit for 15-20 minutes before using. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-walnut-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 cup water', '⅔ cup granulated sugar', '½ cup walnut halves', '4 egg whites', '⅔ cup cornstarch', '1 cup vegetable oil, for frying', '1 lb. shrimp, peeled', 'sliced green onion, for topping']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. mayo', '2 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs) ', '2 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. sweetened condensed milk']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xGEm8ZB_rMw
', '
Add the water, sugar, and walnuts to a small pot. Heat it over medium-high heat and bring the mixture to a boil. Boil for 2 minutes then remove the walnuts from the pot and set them aside on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper to cool.
', '
Add the egg whites to a medium sized bowl. Whisk until foamy then mix in the cornstarch.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a pot over medium-high heat until it reaches 350˚F. Dip the shrimp in the egg batter and allow the excess to drip off. Add the shrimp to the hot oil and cook for 4-5 minutes until golden brown and fully cooked. Remove the shrimp from the oil and set them on a plate lined with paper towels to drain.
', '
In a large bowl, combine the mayo, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing or Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), honey, and sweetened condensed milk. Add in the fried shrimp and gently mix the shrimp and sauce together until the shrimp is evenly coated.
', '
Transfer the shrimp to a serving platter. Top with the candied walnuts and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: hot-and-sour-soup-3
Ingredients: ['6 cups beef broth', '½ cup sliced mushrooms', '1 (8 oz.) can bamboo shoots, drained', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '3 Tbsp. cornstarch', '3 Tbsp. cold water', '2 large eggs, beaten', '6 oz. extra firm tofu, cut into 1/2” cubes', '2 stalks of green onions, sliced']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xGEm8ZB_rMw
', '
Pour the beef broth into a pot and heat it over medium-high heat until it comes to a simmer. Add in the mushrooms, bamboo shoots, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder. Simmer for another 5 minutes.
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the cornstarch and cold water. Pour the mixture into the pot and mix. Simmer the soup for another 5 minutes until it starts to thicken.
', '
Pour the eggs into the pot while stirring the soup in a circular motion. Then add in the tofu and green onion. Remove the pot from heat and enjoy!
']

Name: eggplant-with-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2-3 Japanese eggplants, cut into 2”-long pieces', '4 oz. ground pork', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '10 dried red chilies', '2 stalks of green onion, cut into 2”-long pieces and white and green parts separated']
Sauce Mix: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan) ', '2 tsp. granulated sugar', '2 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '1 tsp. fish sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sgYK7oMXxNI
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan), granulated sugar, half of the Shaoxing wine, and fish sauce to a bowl. Mix to combine.\xa0
', '
Heat 2 tablespoons of the vegetable oil in a wok over high heat. Add in the eggplant and sear until brown on all sides and soft in the center, about 5 minutes. Remove the eggplant from the wok.\xa0
', '
Pour the remaining tablespoon of vegetable oil into the wok. Heat over medium heat. Add in the ground pork and use a spatula to crumble it into pieces. When the pork has browned, mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and dried chilies.
', '
Increase the heat to high and add in the eggplant, prepared sauce mix, remaining half of Shaoxing wine, and the white parts of the green onion. Stir fry for 2 minutes until everything is combined then mix in the green parts of the green onion. Cook for another 30 seconds then remove the wok from heat. Enjoy!
']

Name: sichuan-stir-fried-potatoes
Ingredients: ['1 large or 2 medium red bliss potatoes, peeled and fine julienned', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 dried chili peppers', '1 tsp. Sichuan peppercorns', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '½ tsp. salt', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gybTZXqgv78
', '
Place the cut potatoes into a bowl of cold water. Allow the potatoes to soak for a few minutes then drain and set aside.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add in the chili peppers and Sichuan peppercorn. Fry until aromatic. Then add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Fry for 5 seconds.
', '
Add in the potatoes and stir fry until cooked through. Then mix in salt, Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Remove the wok from heat. Garnish with cilantro and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: cuban-chicken-and-black-bean-bowls
Ingredients: ['---For the Chicken---', '1 lb. chicken breast, cut into 1” pieces', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '¼ cup orange juice', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '---For the Black Beans & Quinoa---', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion, chopped', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 red bell pepper, deseeded and chopped', '1 ½ cups dry quinoa', '3 cups chicken broth', '2 cups black beans, drained and rinsed', '1 mango, peeled and diced, for serving', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['---For the Black Beans & Quinoa---', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['---For the Chicken---', '1 tsp. cumin', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 red chili, deseeded', 'pepper, to taste', '¾ cup orange juice', 'juice from 4 limes', 'zest from 1 lime', '1 tsp. honey', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup cilantro']
Procedure:
['
For the Chicken: Add the cumin, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, red chili, a pinch of pepper, ¾ cup of the orange juice, lime juice, lime zest, honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and cilantro to a blender. Blend until the ingredients are finely chopped.\xa0
', '
Add the chicken breast to a bowl and pour in half of the marinade. Mix to combine and allow the chicken to marinate for at least 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in 1 tablespoon of the olive oil then add in half of the chicken. Cook for 3-5 minutes until cooked through and browned then remove it from the pan. Repeat this process with the remaining chicken and remove it from the pan. Add the remaining marinade and ¼ cup of orange juice to the pan. Bring the mixture to a boil then add in the butter. Cook for 5 minutes or until the sauce has slightly reduced. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
For the Black Beans and Quinoa: Heat the olive oil in a large pan with sides over medium-high heat. Add in the onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté for 5-10 minutes until soft. Then mix in the red bell pepper and quinoa. Cook for another 5 minutes until the red bell pepper is soft and the quinoa is toasted. Pour in the chicken broth and bring it to a boil. Reduce the heat so that it is simmering. Cover the pan with a lid and simmer for 20-25 minutes until the quinoa is cooked and all of the liquid has been absorbed. Mix in the black beans and season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Serve the black beans and quinoa with the chicken. Serve with the diced mango, cilantro, and lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: greek-tomato-orzo
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', 'half an onion, diced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 red bell pepper, diced', '2 cups kale, chopped', '1 cup uncooked orzo ', '1 (14 oz.) can diced fire roasted tomatoes', '1 ½ cups cooked chickpeas', '2 ½ cups vegetable broth', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', 'dill fronds, for topping', 'feta cheese crumbles, for topping', 'lemon wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. dried oregano', 'pinch of red pepper flakes', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '3 Tbsp. tomato paste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F.\xa0
', '
Heat the olive oil in an oven safe pan over medium heat. Add in the onion and sauté until soft, about 5 minutes. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, red bell pepper, kale, oregano, red pepper flakes, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and kosher salt. Cook until the kale wilts.\xa0
', '
Add in the tomato paste and cook for another minute. Then add in the orzo, diced fire roasted tomatoes, chickpeas, and vegetable broth. Bring it to a simmer then place it in the oven to bake for 10-15 minutes until the orzo is cooked.
', '
Remove the pan from the oven and mix in the unsalted butter. Top with dill fronds and feta cheese crumbles. Serve with lemon wedges and enjoy!
']

Name: chinese-steamed-garlic-ribs-with-taro
Ingredients: ['½ lb. pork ribs, cut into small pieces', '⅓ taro root, peeled and cut into ½” cubes', '2 green onions, sliced']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. shaoxing cooking wine', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 tsp. granulated sugar', '3 garlic cloves, smashed']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I_xgWPXkQd8
', '
Rinse the cut ribs with water then pat dry. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, salt, pepper, shaoxing cooking wine, vegetable oil, granulated sugar, and garlic to a bowl. Mix until combined. Then add in the pork ribs and mix until the ribs are well coated in the marinade. Marinate the ribs for 3 hours.
', '
Place the taro and marinated ribs onto a plate in an even layer. Fill a wok with a few inches of water. Heat it over medium-high heat until the water starts bubbling. Reduce the heat to medium low so that it is gently simmering. Place the plate onto a bamboo steamer and cover with the lid. Place the bamboo steamer into the wok so that it is hovering over the water. Steam for 25 minutes.
', '
Sprinkle the green onion and drizzle the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil over the pork and taro. Steam for another 5 minutes until the pork and taro are cooked. Remove the bamboo steamed from heat and enjoy!
']

Name: umami-sweet-and-salty-sauce
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. water', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. green onion, chopped']

Enjoy!

Name: spicy-hoisin-shrimp-bruschetta
Ingredients: ['1 baguette', 'olive oil, to taste', '2 whole garlic cloves', '½ lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '1 Tbsp. chives ', '1 Tbsp. parsley', '1 lemon, juiced and zested', '⅔ cup marinara sauce', '1 stalk green onion, sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dh6379KMmVQ
', '
Preheat oven to 425°F.\xa0
', '
Thinly slice baguette and arrange in a single layer on a baking sheet. Brush with olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Bake until lightly golden, about 7 minutes. Rub with garlic clove and let cool slightly.
', '
Toss shrimp with chives, parsley, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, lemon juice and zest. Grill 2 to 3 minutes per side.\xa0
', '
To build, spread a small amount of marinara sauce on crostini. Place shrimp on top and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Garnish with green onion. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: honey-hoisin-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['2 lb. chicken wings, drums and flats', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '2 green onions, minced', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '⅓ cup honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar ', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice, plus wedges for garnish']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dh6379KMmVQ
', '
In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients for the sauce and mix. Reserve half of the marinade and set aside. To the remaining marinade, add in chicken wings and toss. Place in the refrigerator for 8 hours or overnight.
', '
Preheat air fryer to 400°F and lightly oil basket. Add chicken wings in a single layer, slightly separated from each other, and cook for 10 minutes. Turn over and cook for an additional 8-10 minutes, depending on the size of your wings. Repeat with remaining wings.
', '
While the chicken is cooking, add reserved marinade to a small pot and bring to a simmer on medium heat. Simmer until mixture has reduced and thick, about 8-10 minutes.
', '
Brush wings with sauce on both sides and garnish with sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-beef-pinwheels
Ingredients: ['1 lb. lean ground beef', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1/4 cup flour', '2 sheets puff pastry, thawed', '1 egg, beaten', '4 green onions, thinly sliced']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dh6379KMmVQ
', '
Heat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment.
', '
Brown the ground beef along with the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic in a skillet over medium-high heat, until beef is crumbled and cooked through. Drain any fat and return the pan to the stove.
', '
In a small bowl, add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, brown sugar and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and mix. Pour into ground beef mixture. Cook for about 2 to 3 minutes to blend flavors. Set aside to cool.
', '
Unfold then lay a sheet of puff pastry on a lightly floured flat surface and roll out slightly to remove creases. Brush lightly with egg mixture. Sprinkle with half the sliced green onions then follow with half of the ground beef mixture. Roll tightly into a log. Freeze until firm but still sliceable, about 20 minutes.
', '
Slice the log into 1/4-inch-thick rounds and place on the prepared baking sheet. Bake until golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes. Serve warm or at room temperature. Enjoy!
']

Name: shrimp-and-pork-dumplings
Ingredients: ['8 oz. ground pork', '4 oz. peeled and deveined shrimp, cut into small pieces', '½ cup sliced napa cabbage', '1 stalk green onion, sliced', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 pack dumpling wrappers']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. shaoxing wine', '3 dashes Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder', 'salt, to taste', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4tFO1Ojjz_8
', '
In a large bowl, add the pork, shrimp, cabbage, green onion, shaoxing wine, Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Powder, salt, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce. Mix until combined.
', '
To assemble the dumplings, take one dumpling wrapper and add a heaping teaspoon of the pork and shrimp filling to the center of it. Dip a finger into water and rub it along the edge of the wrapper. Fold the wrapper in half so that you have a half moon shape. Pinch the seam together with your thumb and index finger. Repeat this process to make the remaining dumplings.\xa0
', '
Fill a wok with a few inches of water. Heat it over medium heat until the water is bubbling. Reduce the heat to medium low until gently simmering. Line a bamboo steamer with parchment paper. Add a batch of the dumplings to the steamer. Cover and place the steamer in the wok so that it is hovering over the water. Steam the dumplings for 10-15 minutes until the pork and shrimp are cooked. Remove the cooked dumplings from the steamer and repeat this process to cook the remaining dumplings. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-boozy-pineapple-sorbet
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. water', '3/4 cup sugar', '1/3 cup light corn syrup ', '2 lb. peeled, frozen pineapple', '1/4 cup tequila', '1 lime, juiced']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. kosher salt, plus more to taste', '1 1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2VksOMYv-L8
', '
Warm water, sugar and light corn syrup in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring until the sugar has dissolved. Let cool.
', '
Place pineapple in a blender and add in sugar/corn syrup mixture and salt, blending until well combined. Add in tequila and lime juice and pulse a few times to mix. Season to taste with additional kosher salt. The flavors should be bright.\xa0
', '
Transfer sorbet to a container and sprinkle Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil over top (try to grab more of the solids and less of the oil, if possible). Using a knife, swirl Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil over top.\xa0
', '
Chill in the freezer for three hours or overnight. To serve, scoop sorbet in small bowls and sprinkle with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil, if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-furikake-chex-mix
Ingredients: ['2 cups Rice Chex', '2 cups Wheat Chex ', '2 cups Corn Chex ', '2 cups honeycomb cereal', '2 cups pretzel sticks', '2 cups wasabi peas']
Seasoning: ['1 bottle (1.9 oz.) nori furikake rice seasoning']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup butter', '½ cup granulated sugar', '⅓ cup vegetable oil', '½ cup corn syrup', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2VksOMYv-L8
', '
Preheat the oven to 225°F.
', '
Line two baking sheets with parchment paper.
', '
Melt the butter and granulated sugar in a small pot over low heat. Once the sugar has melted, remove from heat and mix in vegetable oil, corn syrup, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil until well incorporated.
', '
Place Chex cereal, Honeycomb cereal, mini pretzels and wasabi peas into a large mixing bowl. Pour the butter mixture over the cereal mixture until well coated. Add in the whole bottle of furikake seasoning into the mixing bowl. Toss until all the cereal is well coated with the seasoning.
', '
Divide cereal onto the baking sheets and bake the snack mix for about an hour. Stir every 15 minutes and toss to prevent the cereal from browning too quickly or becoming burnt. Let the spicy furikake chex mix cool. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-caramel-popcorn
Ingredients: ['8-10 cups air-popped popcorn, about ⅓ cup unpopped', '1 cup granulated sugar']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, for finishing']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1/2 tsp. baking soda']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2VksOMYv-L8
', '
Preheat oven to 230°F and line two baking trays with parchment paper or preferably a silicon mat.
', '
Pop popcorn and set aside in a large bowl.
', '
Before you begin the caramel, mix Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil and baking soda together. Set aside.
', '
Make Caramel: Sprinkle about 1/4 of the sugar evenly into a non-stick pan and place the pan over medium heat. When you start to see some of the sugar melt, sprinkle a little more sugar on the melted parts. Do this in increments until you’ve added in all of the sugar. Keep cooking the sugar to turn it into caramel, swirling the pan occasionally to even out the temperature of the sugar and also to make sure all of the sugar is melted. Once the sugar has turned a rich amber, add in the soy sauce mixture and whisk vigorously. The caramel will start bubbling (so be careful) and keep whisking it for 30-60 seconds until it comes together into a smooth lava.
', '
Pour the caramel onto your popped corn and use a spatula to mix all the ingredients together until the popcorn is coated evenly in caramel. Work fast as the caramel will begin to harden and can be difficult to mix. Transfer the popcorn evenly onto your baking trays, making sure to smooth out as much as possible. Then, bake it in the oven for 60 minutes, giving the popcorn a rough mix every 15 minutes. Remove popcorn from the oven and let it cool for 15 minutes. Once cooled, sprinkle with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Crisp Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: tomato-egg-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['2 ½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 large eggs mixed with 2 Tbsp. water', '3 garlic cloves, sliced', '4 tomatoes, cut into large chunks', '¼ cup water', 'pinch of granulated sugar', '1 stalk green onion, sliced']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a_JeD366P2c
', '
Heat 2 tablespoons of the oil in a wok over high heat. Add in the egg. Allow the bottom to set then use a spatula to scrape the bottom of the wok. When the eggs are fully cooked, remove them from the wok.\xa0
', '
Add the remaining ½ tablespoon of oil to the wok. Heat over medium heat. Then add in the sliced garlic and fry until fragrant. Mix in the tomatoes and cook for 20 seconds. Pour in the water and cook until the tomatoes turn mushy. Turn off the heat.
', '
Add in the cooked eggs, granulated sugar, salt, sliced green onions, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Gently mix everything together, and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: cumin-lamb-noodles
Ingredients: ['2 ½ Tbsp. cumin seeds', '1 Tbsp. Sichuan peppercorns', '1 (16 oz.) package wide noodles', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 lb. ground lamb', '3 green onions, sliced', '1 yellow onion, sliced', '1 serrano pepper, finely chopped', 'cilantro, for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. rice wine vinegar', '2 tsp. granulated sugar']
Procedure:
['
Heat a small sauté pan over medium low heat. Add the cumin seeds and Sichuan peppercorns to the pan and toast the spices for 2-3 minutes. Add the spices to a spice grinder and blend until coarsely ground.\xa0
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add the noodles to the water and cook according to the package directions. Reserve 1 cup of the cooking water then drain the noodles and set them aside.\xa0
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant. Increase the heat to high and add in the ground lamb. Cook and crumble the lamb to pieces until browned and cooked through. Then mix in the ground spices, green onion, yellow onion, serrano pepper, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, rice wine vinegar, and granulated sugar. Allow it to cook for 5 minutes. If the sauce becomes too thick, mix in a splash of the reserved cooking water.
', '
Add in the noodles and toss it together with the sauce. Season with salt to taste. Remove the wok from heat and garnish with cilantro and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: mixed-mushroom-crostini
Ingredients: ["1 Tbsp. olive oil, add'l for drizzling", '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '½ lb. shiitake mushrooms, stems removed and sliced ¼” thick', '½ lb. oyster mushrooms, sliced ½” thick', '1 shallot, thinly sliced', '2 garlic cloves, thinly sliced', '¼ cup dry white wine', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 tsp. chopped thyme', "1 Tbsp. chopped parsley, add'l for garnish", '4 (½” thick) slices sourdough bread', '1 cup ricotta', '¼ cup tarragon leaves']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add in the olive oil and butter. When the butter has melted, add in shiitake mushrooms and sauté for 4 minutes until they have browned. Mix in the oyster mushrooms and sauté for another 4 minutes until softened and browned. Then add in the shallot and garlic and cook for 2 minutes. Mix in the wine, lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, thyme, and parsley. Cook for 3-4 minutes until most of the wine has evaporated. Season with salt and pepper to taste then remove the pan from heat.
', '
Heat a grill pan over high heat. Drizzle a bit of olive oil over both sides of the bread. Add the bread to the grill pan and cook for about 1 minute until toasted and grill marks have formed.\xa0
', '
Spread the ricotta onto each slice of bread. Add some of the mushroom mix on top of the ricotta. Drizzle more olive oil on top then garnish with tarragon, chives, and parsley. Cut each toast in half and enjoy!
']

Name: pomegranate-sesame-chicken
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. boneless chicken breast, cut into bite sized pieces', '4 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 cup broccoli florets', '8 oz. button mushrooms, sliced', '3 Tbsp. sesame seeds', 'pomegranate seeds, for topping', 'sliced green onions, for topping']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup pomegranate juice', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. chili paste']
Procedure:
['
Place the chicken into a large bowl. Add in the all purpose flour. Toss the chicken in the flour until all of the pieces are well coated.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Working in batches, add in the chicken and cook until it has browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes. Remove the chicken from the wok and wipe out the pan.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, mix together 1 tablespoon of the remaining Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, pomegranate juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and chili paste.
', '
Heat the wok over high heat. Add in the remaining tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Then mix in the broccoli and mushroom. Cook until lightly browned, 3-5 minutes. Reduce the heat to low and pour in the sauce mixture. Add the chicken back to the wok and bring it to a bubble. Simmer for 5-10 minutes until the sauce thickens and coats the chicken. Remove the wok from heat and mix in the sesame seeds. Top with pomegranate seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!\xa0\xa0
']

Name: vegan-katsu-curry
Ingredients: ['---For the Katsu---', '14 oz. firm tofu, drained and pressed', '1 cup soy milk', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '2 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '2 tsp. curry powder', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 cup panko breadcrumbs', 'vegetable oil, for frying', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['---For the Katsu---', '½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['---For the Curry---', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 yellow onion, diced', '1 large carrot, peeled and diced', '2 garlic cloves, crushed', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. curry powder', '1 tsp. turmeric powder', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '14 oz. can coconut milk', '1 cup vegetable stock', '1 Tbsp. coconut sugar']
Procedure:
['
For the Curry: Heat a pot over medium heat. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Then add in the yellow onion and carrot. Sauté until the onion has softened. Mix in the garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, curry powder, and turmeric powder. Cook for 1 minute until the spices are toasted and fragrant. Add in the tomato paste, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, coconut milk, vegetable stock, and coconut sugar. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes until the carrots have softened. Remove the pot from the heat and use an immersion blender to blend the curry until smooth.
', '
For the Katsu: Slice the tofu into ½” thick rectangles. Mix the soy milk and lemon juice together in a dish and set it aside. In a separate dish, mix together the flour, curry powder, and garlic powder. In another dish, mix together the panko, salt, and pepper.
', '
Dredge the tofu triangles in flour and dust off any excess flour. Then dip them into the soy milk until all of the flour has been absorbed. Allow any excess liquid to drip off. Then completely coat the tofu in panko.\xa0
', '
Pour just enough vegetable oil into a large pan until it coats the bottom of the pan. Add the tofu to the pan and cook on each side for 1-2 minutes until golden brown. Remove the tofu from the pan and allow them to drain on paper towels. Serve the tofu with the curry sauce. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
