Name: cheese-pierogies-with-chili-onion-butter-sauce
Ingredients: ['For the Dough:', '2 cups all purpose flour', '2 Tbsp. melted salted butter', '1 cup full fat Greek yogurt', '1 large egg', 'For the Filling:', '4 russet potatoes, peeled and quartered', '2 Tbsp. salted butter, at room temperature', '2 oz. cream cheese']
Seasoning: ['For the Dough:', '1 tsp. kosher salt', 'For the Filling:', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['For the Chili Onion Butter Sauce:', '4 slices thick cut bacon, chopped', '2 Tbsp. salted butter', '2 yellow onions, thinly sliced', '3 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. fresh thyme leaves', 'grated cheddar cheese, for topping']
Procedure:
['
For the Dough: Add the flour, salt, salted butter, Greek yogurt, and egg to a large bowl. Mix until combined and knead for 2-3 minutes. Cover the dough with plastic wrap and set it aside for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
For the Filling: Place the potatoes in a pot filled with cold water. Add in a pinch of salt. Bring the water to a boil and cook until the potatoes are tender, 20-30 minutes. Drain the potatoes and return them back to the pot. Mash the potatoes then, over low heat, mix in the salted butter and cream cheese. Season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Roll the dough out to ⅛” thickness. Use a ring cutter to cut 3” diameter circles. Spoon 2 teaspoons of the filling into the center of the circles. Rub water along the edge of the circle then fold it in half. Cover the finished pierogies with plastic wrap while you assemble the remaining pierogies.\xa0\xa0
', '
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Working in batches, add in the pierogies and cook for 2-3 minutes until they float. Then drain the pierogies from the water.\xa0
', '
For the Chili Onion Butter Sauce: Heat a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in the bacon and cook until brown and crispy. Remove the bacon from the pan and drain on a plate lined with paper towels. Discard the grease from the pan. Add 1 tablespoon of the salted butter to the pan. Mix in the onions and sauté for 5 minutes until softened. Pour in the apple cider vinegar and cook for another 5-8 minutes until the apple cider vinegar has evaporated and the onions have caramelized. Add in the remaining salted butter, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and thyme. Mix and cook for 2-3 minutes until the butter has slightly browned. Add the pierogies to the pan and toss them in the butter sauce. Remove the pierogies from the pan and top with cheddar cheese and bacon. Enjoy!
']

Name: bangers-and-mash
Ingredients: ['---For the Sausages---', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. sausage', '3 oz. stout beer', '---For the Mashed Potatoes---', '3-4 russet potatoes (peeled and sliced)', '2 Tbsp. butter', '½ cup buttermilk', '---For the Gravy---', '2 Tbsp. butter', '1 medium onion, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. flour', '1 cup stout beer', '1 cup beef broth']
Seasoning: ['---For the Mashed Potatoes---', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '---For the Gravy---', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
For the Sausages: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the sausages and the stout beer to the pan and cover with a lid. Leave a slight crack on the side to allow the steam to escape. Cook for 10 minutes, flipping them over halfway through. Reduce the heat to medium low. Remove the lid and allow some of the liquid to reduce. Continue cooking the sausages for another 10 minutes, rotating them every few minutes until cooked and evenly browned.\xa0
', '
For the Mashed Potatoes: Add the potatoes to a pot filled with cold water. Bring the water to a boil and cook until the potatoes are tender. Drain the potatoes and return them to the pot. Mash the potatoes and mix it together with the butter and buttermilk. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
For the Gravy: Heat a sauce pot over medium-high heat. Melt the butter then add in the onions. Cook the onions for 5-10 minutes until slightly caramelized. Sprinkle in the flour and cook for another 2-3 minutes. Pour in the stout beer and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce to deglaze the pan. Use a wooden spoon to mix and scrape the brown bits off the bottom of the pan. Add in the beef broth and allow it to simmer until the gravy has slightly reduced and thickened, about 10-15 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve with a spoonful of mashed potatoes topped with sausages and the gravy. Garnish with parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: kimchi-mac-and-cheese
Ingredients: ['1 lb. elbow macaroni', '7 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup panko breadcrumbs', '1 ½ tsp. smoked paprika']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup all purpose flour', '3 cups whole milk', '1 ¼ cups grated Havarti cheese', '1 cup grated Fontina cheese', '1 ¼ cups grated sharp white cheddar cheese', '6 oz. brie, cut into chunks', '1 cup kimchi, drained and roughly chopped', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '¼ tsp. ground mustard', '¼ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. ground black pepper', '4 green onions, sliced', '¼ cup chopped cilantro']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l8IQkKN9Y6g
', '
Preheat the oven to 425˚F.\xa0
', '
Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add in the elbow macaroni and cook for about 5-6 minutes or until it is almost al dente. Drain the elbow macaroni and rinse under cold water.
', '
In a large Dutch oven, melt 3 tablespoons of the unsalted butter over medium heat. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Then add in the panko breadcrumbs. Cook the panko until lightly golden and toasted. Remove the panko from the Dutch oven.\xa0
', '
Melt the remaining 4 tablespoons of unsalted butter in the Dutch oven. Whisk in the all purpose flour until you get a smooth paste. Slowly pour in the whole milk while whisking. Whisk frequently until the sauce has thickened, about 2-3 minutes. Remove the Dutch oven from heat and mix in the havarti, Fontina, sharp white cheddar, brie, kimchi, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, ground mustard, salt, pepper, green onion, and cilantro. Mix until all of the cheese has melted.
', '
Add the elbow macaroni into the Dutch oven and mix until evenly coated with the cheese sauce. Top the mac and cheese with the toasted garlic panko. Sprinkle the smoked paprika on top. Bake the mac and cheese in the oven for about 20 minutes until golden brown and bubbly. Remove the mac and cheese from the oven and allow it to sit for a few minutes before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: hong-kong-style-curry-street-food
Ingredients: ['1 jar of Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Hong Kong Style Fish Balls', '4 cups of water', '2 lbs. of white radish, squid, pork skin, and fish balls']
Procedure:
['
Boil a pot of water, add white radish and simmer for 3 minutes, set aside.
', '
Add squid, pork skin and fish balls in the same pot of boiled water and simmer for 30 seconds, set aside.
', '
Boil 4 cups of hot water. Once boiled, add white radish and Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Hong Kong Style Fish Balls, then cook for 10 minutes. After that, put in the cooked squid, pork skin and fish balls, then cook for another 10 minutes until the sauce becomes thicken. Serve and enjoy!
', '
Tips: For a richer flavor, turn off the heat and soak for another 10 minutes before\xa0serving.
']

Name: pear-prosciutto-tart
Ingredients: ['1 (14 oz.) sheet puff pastry, thawed', '8 oz. ricotta', '1 pear, sliced', 'olive oil, for drizzling', '1 egg yolk', '1 Tbsp. heavy cream', '1 tsp. fennel seeds', '4 Tbsp. butter', '1 fresh rosemary sprig', '¼ cup honey', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '½ cup chopped pecans', '8 slices prosciutto']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Unfold the puff pastry sheet into a rectangle. Spread the ricotta all over the puff pastry, leaving a 1” border. Sprinkle it with salt and pepper. Then arrange the pear slices over the ricotta. Drizzle olive oil on top. Fold the edges of the puff pastry over the pears.
', '
In a small bowl mix together the egg yolk and heavy cream. Brush the mixture onto the border of the puff pastry. Sprinkle the fennel seeds onto the border. Bake it in the oven for 25 minutes.
', '
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the rosemary sprig and cook until the butter has browned and the rosemary is crisp. Remove the rosemary and set it aside. Mix in the honey and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger.
', '
Remove the tart from the oven and drizzle 2 tablespoons of the honey mixture over the tart. Place it back in the oven to bake for another 10 minutes. Mix the pecans with the remaining honey mixture. Remove the tart from the oven and allow it to cool slightly. Top with prosciutto, the pecans, and the fried rosemary leaves. Cut the tart into squares and enjoy!
']

Name: you-po-mian
Ingredients: ['16 oz. thick cut wheat noodles', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 green onion, chopped and white and green parts separated', '12 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, only the oil', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'toasted white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '2 tsp. Chinese black vinegar', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, only the solids', '1 tsp. granulated sugar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M57jA1gPVx4
', '
Cook the thick cut wheat noodles according to the package directions. Drain and rinse under cold water. Set the noodles aside in a bowl.\xa0
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil solids, white parts of the green onion, Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Chinese black vinegar, granulated sugar, and Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder to the noodles.\xa0
', '
Heat the oil from the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil in a wok until hot. Pour the hot oil over the noodles and seasonings. Mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Garnish with the green parts of the green onion, cilantro leaves, and toasted white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: hot-and-sour-soup-2
Ingredients: ['1 oz. wood ear mushroom', '1 onion, quartered', '1 bunch green onions, cut into thirds', '8 cloves garlic', '12 black peppercorns', '12 cups chicken stock', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '½ lb. pork tenderloin, thinly sliced into 2” long strips', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '¼ cup water', '1 lb. firm tofu, drained and cut into ½” cubes', '2 large eggs, beaten', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. grated ginger', '1 Tbsp. red chili paste', '1 cup bamboo shoots, thinly sliced', '½ cup rice vinegar', '1 tsp. white pepper', '¼ tsp. granulated sugar', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5AvTW7wyViY
', '
Add the wood ear mushrooms to boiling water. Set it aside for 30 minutes. Chop the mushrooms into thin slices, discarding any tough pieces.
', '
Lay out a piece of cheesecloth. Add the onion, green onion, garlic cloves, and peppercorns to the center of the cheesecloth. Wrap up the sides and tie it closed with cooking twine. Add the pouch of aromatics and chicken stock to a large pot. Bring the stock to a simmer and cook for about 20 minutes or until it has reduced by a third. Remove the pouch of aromatics and keep the pot over low heat.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add in the pork and stir fry until fully cooked. Remove the pork from the pan then add in the ginger, red chili paste, bamboo shoots, rice vinegar, white pepper, granulated sugar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce. Mix to combine then bring the mixture to a boil. Add this mixture to the pot of chicken stock along with the wood ear mushrooms and pork.
', '
Combine the cornstarch and water together in a small bowl to create a slurry. Mix the slurry and tofu into the pot and increase the heat to medium low. Cook for about 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Slowly stir the soup, moving in one direction. While stirring, slowly pour in the egg. When the egg has solidified and cooked, remove the pot from heat. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: lettuce-wraps
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 onion, chopped', '2 cloves garlic, minced', '2 tsp. minced pickled ginger', '1 (8 oz can.) water chestnuts, drained and finely chopped', '1 bunch green onions, chopped', '16 butter lettuce leaves, washed and dried']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '6 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/PS9lQkLcReA
', '
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add the beef to a pan. Cook and crumble the beef for 5-7 minutes until browned and cooked through. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove the beef from the pan and discard the grease.
', '
In the same pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add in the onion and garlic. Sauté until the onion is translucent. Mix in the pickled ginger and water chestnuts. Add the beef back into the pan and pour in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap. Cook for another 2-3 minutes. Remove the pan from heat and mix in the green onions.
', '
Spoon the beef filling into the butter lettuce leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: leftover-hoisin-green-beans
Ingredients: ['2 cups leftover green beans', 'black and white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1\u2009½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tZO9N88bbU
', '
Whisk Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic together in a bowl.\xa0
', '
Bring hoisin mixture to a simmer in a wok over medium-high heat. Add green beans.
', '
Sauté until heated through, about 5 minutes.
', '
Garnish with sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: leftover-mashed-potato-scallion-pancakes
Ingredients: ['2 cups leftover mashed potatoes', '½ cup all-purpose flour  ', '2 large eggs', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '5 scallions, chopped (plus more for garnish)', '¼ cup vegetable oil, or as needed']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. ground white pepper ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tZO9N88bbU
', '
Mix mashed potatoes, flour, eggs, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and white pepper together in a medium mixing bowl. The mixture should be firm enough to form a ball in your palm.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Sauté scallions in the hot oil until soft, about 5 minutes. Fold into the potato mixture until combined.
', '
Heat enough vegetable oil in the frying pan to cover by 1/4 inch.
', '
Form potato mixture into balls using a 1/4 cup measure and flatten into pancakes. Gently place into the hot oil in batches and cook until browned on both sides and somewhat firm, about 5 minutes. Do not crowd pan. Transfer pancakes to a paper towel-lined plate to soak up excess oil. Repeat with remaining mixture, adding more vegetable oil before frying each batch.
', '
Transfer to a platter and garnish with sliced scallions. Serve hot and dip in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/ Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
']

Name: mapo-tofu
Ingredients: ['1 (16 oz.) package soft tofu, drained and cut into 1” cubes', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 stalks of green onions, sliced', '3 oz. ground pork', '½ tsp. granulated sugar', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '2 Tbsp. water', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan)', '1 cup chicken stock', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. ground Sichuan peppercorn', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YvCpUPmr0kE
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add a generous pinch of salt. Reduce the heat to a simmer and add in the tofu. Cook for 1 minute. Drain the tofu and set it aside.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, green onions, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Heat until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add in the ground pork, breaking it into small pieces with a spatula. Cook for about 2-4 minutes.\xa0
', '
Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan) and cook for 1 minute. Then add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, chicken stock, granulated sugar, and Sichuan peppercorns. Mix to combine and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Combine the cornstarch and water together in a small bowl to create a slurry. Pour the slurry into the wok and mix. Cook until the sauce has thickened. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and tofu. Remove the wok from heat and garnish the dish with sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: leftover-stuffing-and-turkey-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['8 slices thick-cut bacon, cut crosswise into ¼” strips', '2 eggs, beaten', '1 Tbsp. canola oil', '½ cup sliced green onions, whites and green parts separated', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 cups leftover vegetables, such as brussels sprouts, carrots, peas, etc.', '1 cup cubed cooked turkey', '2 cups cold cooked brown rice', '2 cups leftover stuffing']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tZO9N88bbU
', '
Heat a large cast iron or heavy nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, cook bacon until crisp and fat is rendered. Remove and set aside, leaving bacon fat in the skillet.
', '
Over medium heat, scramble eggs until cooked and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a bowl and set aside.
', '
Add canola oil to the skillet and sauté green onions and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic until green onions are translucent and sweet. Add in leftover vegetables and stir until combined and hot. Add turkey, rice and stuffing. Let rice crisp a little at the bottom of the pan. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, mixing well into rice.\xa0
', '
Fold cooked bacon and eggs into rice. Season generously with pepper, and add salt, if necessary.
', '
Just before serving, garnish with greens onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-jalapeno-poppers
Ingredients: ['12 large jalapeño peppers, halved and seeded']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['8 oz. cream cheese, softened to room temperature', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup extra-sharp cheddar, grated', '½ lb. bacon, cooked and crumbled', '1/4 cup green onions sliced, plus more for garnish', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uDgLJT4G5pE
', '
Preheat the oven to 400°F.
', '
In a medium-sized bowl, combine the cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, cheddar, bacon, green onions and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
', '
Spoon the mixture evenly in the jalapeños and place it on a baking sheet. Bake for 20 minutes or until the jalapeños are tender.
', '
Finish with green onions and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-tuna-tartare-wonton-cups
Ingredients: ['24 wonton wrappers', '3 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. sushi grade tuna, cut into ¼” cubes', '1/2 cucumber, diced', '3 green onions, sliced thin', '1 tsp. fresh ginger, peeled and grated', '1 lime juiced and zested', '2 Tbsp. black sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. kosher salt', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ tsp. fresh ground pepper', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uDgLJT4G5pE
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
', '
Brush both sides of the wonton wrappers with olive oil and sprinkle with 1 teaspoon of salt on one side. Place in a mini muffin pan, salt side up. Bake for 6-8 minutes until the tops of the wrappers are brown and crisp. Remove and set on a cooling rack.
', '
Combine tuna, cucumber, green onions, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, ginger, remaining 1 teaspoon of salt, and pepper in a bowl. Mix together.
', '
Just before serving, mix in lime juice, lime zest and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.\xa0
', '
Spoon tuna into each wonton bowl and top with sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-spinach-artichoke-dip
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uDgLJT4G5pE
', '
Preheat the oven to 375°F.
', '
Spray a 1 ½ quart small baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
', '
In a large bowl add the softened cream cheese, sour cream, mayonnaise, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, parmesan cheese, mozzarella, garlic powder, kosher salt and ground black pepper. Fold in spinach and artichoke hearts to combine.
', '
Spoon the dip into the prepared baking dish. Top with more parmesan and mozzarella cheese. Cover with foil and bake in the oven for 30 minutes. Remove foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes until the dip is bubbly and the cheese is golden. Remove and cool for 5 minutes before serving.
', '
Top with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil for added flavor and spice. Serve with your choice of crackers or toasted bread. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-creamy-mini-mashed-potatoes
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. baby potatoes', '4 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '⅓ cup milk', 'green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'fresh cracked pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k_urXbVccAY
', '
Wash, peel, and cut the potatoes in half. Place potatoes in a large saucepan. Add enough cold water to cover potatoes by about an inch. Stir in salt, place over high heat, and bring to a boil.\xa0 Reduce the heat to a low boil, stirring occasionally, and cook for 15 to 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork.
', '
Drain the potatoes and return them to the pot. Add the butter, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and milk. Use a potato masher to mash the potatoes to your liking. Mix well. Add more milk if necessary to get them to a smooth consistency.
', '
Top with cracked pepper and garnish with green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: mini-hasselback-potatoes-in-air-fryer
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baby gold potatoes', 'avocado oil cooking spray', 'fresh parsley, chopped']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k_urXbVccAY
', '
Using two chopsticks, cut each baby potato “hasselback-style”, cutting thin slices that stop 3/4 of the way through the potato. Spray with oil (including between the slices), season with salt and pepper.
', '
Preheat the air fryer to 370°F. Place the potatoes in the air fryer in a single layer, working in batches if needed. Fry them for about 18 to 20 minutes, until crisp on the outside and fork tender all the way through.
', '
Brush with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and top with minced parsley.\xa0
', '
Serve hot with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: mini-smashed-potatoes-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. baby Yukon gold potatoes ', '½ stick unsalted butter', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley leaves']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. plus ¾ tsp. kosher salt, divided', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k_urXbVccAY
', '
Arrange the oven racks to the top and bottom thirds of the oven. Preheat the oven to 500°F.
', '
Place potatoes in a large saucepan. Add enough cold water to cover potatoes by about an inch. Stir in 2 tablespoons of the kosher salt, place over high heat, and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer until the potatoes are very tender and can be easily pierced with a sharp knife with no resistance, 15 to 20 minutes. Drain and set aside.
', '
In that same saucepan, add the butter and melt over low heat. Remove from heat and stir in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, parsley, pepper, and remaining 3/4 teaspoon kosher salt. Add the potatoes and toss to coat.
', '
Pour the potatoes and any extra melted butter mixture onto a rimmed baking sheet. Using the bottom of a lightly greased drinking glass, press down on each potato until it splits open and is flattened to about ¾” thick. Begin by roasting on the lower rack until the bottoms are golden-brown, about 10 minutes. Then move to the higher rack and roast until the tops are brown and crispy, 10 to 15 minutes more.\xa0
', '
Serve warm and dip in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Enjoy!
']

Name: fall-harvest-crunch-salad
Ingredients: ['1 cup granulated sugar', '2 ½ tsp. salt', '¾ cup water', '1 ½ Tbsp. unsalted butter', '⅛ tsp. baking powder', '1 cup pumpkin seeds', '¼ cup black sesame seeds', '¼ cup white sesame seeds', '3 cups kale greens', '½ Tbsp. olive oil', '1 ½ cups mixed greens', '2 cups red grapes, halved', '⅓ cup thinly sliced red onion ', '¼ cup thinly sliced radishes', '2 cups apple chips', '⅓ cup crumbled blue cheese']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Add the sugar, salt, and water to a sauce pot. Heat it over medium-high heat until it reaches a simmer and the sugar has melted. Continue cooking for 6-7 minutes until the mixture begins to turn an amber color or reaches 300˚F. Once the mixture is golden, remove the pan from heat and mix in the butter, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, baking powder, pumpkin seeds, black sesame seeds, and white sesame seeds. Pour the mixture onto a sheet tray lined with parchment paper. Allow the brittle to cool and harden.
', '
While the brittle cools, add the kale, olive oil, and a pinch of salt and pepper to a bowl. Massage the kale with your hand until it has slightly wilted. Then add in the mixed greens and gently toss it together with the kale.\xa0
', '
To assemble the salad, add the salad greens to the serving platter. Then layer on the grapes, red onion, radish, apple chips, and blue cheese.\xa0
', '
When the brittle has cooled and hardened, use a knife to cut and crack the brittle into pieces. Sprinkle the pieces of brittle on top of the salad. Serve with an apple cider vinaigrette. Enjoy!
']

Name: cranberry-orange-ginger-salsa
Ingredients: ['8 oz. cream cheese', '4 oz. goat cheese', 'assorted crackers, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ["12 oz. fresh cranberries, add'l whole cranberries for garnish", '1 jalapeño, deseeded and diced', '¼ cup red onion, minced', "½ bunch cilantro, stems removed, add'l cilantro leaves for garnish", 'zest of 1 orange', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '½ cup honey', 'juice from ½ a lemon', '1 tsp. cinnamon', '¼ tsp. cumin', 'pinch of ground cloves']
Procedure:
['
Add the cranberries, jalapeño, red onion and cilantro to a food processor. Pulse until the cranberries are chopped. Transfer the mixture to a bowl. Mix in the orange zest, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, honey, lemon juice, cinnamon, cumin, and cloves. Set the mixture aside.\xa0
', '
Add the cream cheese and goat cheese to a stand mixer. Beat the two together until smooth and creamy. Spread the whipped cheese mixture in an even layer onto the serving dish. Top with the cranberry salsa.\xa0
', '
Garnish with cilantro leaves and additional whole cranberries. Serve with assorted crackers and enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-orange-roasted-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 (4 lb.) whole chicken', '5 clementines, halved', '3 sprigs rosemary', '3 sprigs thyme']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 450˚F.
', '
In a bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, honey, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Whisk until everything is evenly combined. Set aside.
', '
Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Season the inside and outside of the chicken with 1 teaspoon of salt and a ½ teaspoon of black pepper. Place half of the clementine halves inside the cavity of the chicken along with the rosemary and thyme.
', '
Twist the wing tips back under the chicken and tie the ends of the drumsticks together with kitchen twine. Place the chicken onto a roasting pan, breast side up. Arrange the remaining clementine halves around the chicken. Brush the Hoisin sauce mix all over the chicken.
', '
Roast the chicken in the oven for 20 minutes. Then brush another layer of the Hoisin sauce mix over the chicken. Reduce the oven temperature to 350˚F and tent the chicken with foil. Continue cooking for 50-60 minutes, brushing on more glaze halfway through. Remove the foil tent and brush more sauce mix onto the chicken. Cook for another 10 minutes or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 170˚F.
', '
Remove the chicken from the oven and tent it with foil. Allow the chicken to rest for 10 minutes. Before serving, squeeze one of the roasted clementine halves over the chicken. Enjoy!
']

Name: butter-chicken-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground chicken', '1 large egg', '½ cup panko breadcrumbs', '¼ cup cilantro leaves', 'white rice for serving', 'naan, for serving', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '½ yellow onion, chopped', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. garam masala', '2 tsp. curry powder', '½ tsp. turmeric', '1 tsp. cayenne pepper', '1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 (14 oz.) can coconut milk', '½ cup water', '½ cup plain Greek yogurt', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 450˚F. Line a baking sheet with foil. Add the ground chicken, egg, panko, salt, and pepper to a bowl. Mix the ingredients together until combined. Roll the meat into tablespoon sized meatballs and place them onto the baking sheet. Bake them in the oven for 15 minutes until lightly browned and cooked through. Set the meatballs aside.
', '
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add in the onion and cook for 5 minutes until softened and translucent. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Mix in the garam masala, curry powder, turmeric, and cayenne pepper. Cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add in the tomato paste, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, coconut milk, and water. Mix until combined and bring it to a boil. Cook for 5 minutes until the sauce slightly thickens. Mix in the yogurt and butter then add in the chicken meatballs. Cook for another 5 minutes. Remove the pan from heat and mix in the cilantro.\xa0
', '
Serve with white rice, naan, and lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: curried-green-bean-casserole
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. green beans, ends trimmed', '4 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 yellow onion, minced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '8 oz. white mushrooms sliced', '¾ cup fried shallots']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. curry powder', '2 cups coconut cream', '¼ cup vegetable stock', '2 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. granulated sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350˚F.
', '
Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the green beans to the boiling water and cook for 1 minute. Strain the green beans and transfer them to a large bowl of ice water to cool. Drain the green beans and set them aside.
', '
Heat a large pan with 2 tablespoons of the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add in the onion and cook until the onion turns translucent. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for another minute. Then add in another tablespoon of the vegetable oil along with the mushrooms. Cook for 1 minute. Push the vegetables to the sides of the pan. Pour the remaining tablespoon of oil into the center of the pan. Mix the curry powder into the oil and cook until aromatic, about 30 seconds. Then combine everything in the pan together.\xa0
', '
Add in the coconut cream, vegetable stock, salt, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Soy Sauce, and granulated sugar. Mix until combined and cook for about 10 minutes until the sauce has slightly thickened. Remove the pan from heat and mix in the green beans.\xa0
', '
Transfer the mixture into a 7x11 inch baking dish. Bake the green beans in the oven for about 30 minutes until the sauce turns creamy and the green beans are just cooked. Sprinkle the fried shallots on top and bake for another 5 minutes. Remove the green beans from the oven and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: pork-chops-with-cranberries-and-pears
Ingredients: ['4 (6 oz.) boneless pork chops, cut 1” thick', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 Bartlett pears, cored and cut into wedges', '1 onion cut into 1/4” thick wedges', '1 cup fresh cranberries', '3 sprigs fresh rosemary']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. packed brown sugar', '1 tsp. ground mustard', '1 ½ tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup hard apple cider', '½ Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. cold unsalted butter', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. In a small bowl, combine the brown sugar, ground mustard, kosher salt, and black pepper. Rub the mixture onto both sides of the pork chops.
', '
Heat a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add in the olive oil. Add the pork chops to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until browned. Remove the pork chops from the pan.
', '
Add the pears and onion to the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes until browned. Add the pork chops back into the pan, nestling them into the pears and onion. Top with the cranberries and rosemary. Bake the pork chops in the oven for 15 minutes or until the pork chops reach an internal temperature of 145˚F. Transfer the dish into a serving platter. Tent with foil and allow the pork chops to rest for 10 minutes.
', '
In the meantime, add the apple cider, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger to a small sauce pot. Heat it over medium-high heat and bring it to boil. Allow it to bubble and cook for 5-8 minutes until it has reduced and slightly thickened. Remove the pan from heat and add in the unsalted butter. Whisk until the butter is fully incorporated. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Spoon the sauce over the pork chops and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: roasted-sausage-and-potato-bake
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 large onions, cut into wedges', '2 red bell peppers, deseeded and cut into large chunks', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. chopped thyme', '12 Italian sausage links, pricked with a fork', '1 lb. 2 oz. baby Yukon gold potatoes, halved', '7 oz. white wine']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (Cage-Free Eggs)']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F.
', '
In a large bowl, add in the olive oil, onion, red bell pepper, half of the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, half of the thyme, Italian sausage, and salt and pepper to taste. Toss the ingredients together until combined.
', '
In a separate bowl, add in the baby potatoes, remaining Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, remaining thyme, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (Cage-Free Eggs), and salt and pepper to taste. Mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Distribute the sausage mixture and potato mixture into a large roasting pan. Make sure none of the sausages are covered by the vegetables. Place it in the oven to cook for 20-30 minutes until the vegetables and sausage are lightly golden. Gently mix the vegetables and flip the sausages onto the other side. Pour in the white wine and cook for another 20 minutes until the sausages have browned and the potatoes are tender.\xa0 \xa0
', '
Remove the pan from the oven and garnish with chopped parsley. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: rosemary-chili-garlic-smashed-potatoes
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baby Yukon gold potatoes', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. fresh chopped rosemary', '¼ cup grated parmesan cheese']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vZLjvOL_Ltc&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 425˚F.\xa0
', '
Add the potatoes to a large pot filled with cold water. Bring the water to a boil and cook until the potatoes are fork tender, about 15-20 minutes. Drain the potatoes and allow them to cool slightly.\xa0
', '
Place the potatoes onto a baking sheet. Use a glass to press down on the potatoes so that they are smashed. Add in the olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, rosemary, parmesan, salt, and pepper. Toss to combine.\xa0
', '
Roast the potatoes in the oven for 15 minutes. Flip the potatoes over and bake for another 12-15 minutes until crispy.\xa0
', '
Remove the potatoes from the oven and enjoy!
']

Name: lentil-stew-with-potato-parsnip-mash
Ingredients: ['1 lb. Yukon gold potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks', '1 lb. parsnips, peeled and cut into chunks', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 yellow onion, diced', '8 oz. cremini mushrooms, sliced', '8 oz. shiitake mushrooms, stemmed and sliced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. tomato paste', '½ cup dry red wine', '1 Tbsp. + 2 tsp. chopped fresh rosemary', "6 thyme sprigs, plus add'l for garnish", '2 cups vegetable broth', '2 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '1 cup cooked brown lentils', '⅓ cup milk', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Place the potatoes and parsnips into a large pot. Fill the pot with cold water so that it’s a few inches above the vegetables. Heat over high heat and bring the water to a boil. Cook the vegetables for 20-30 minutes or until fork tender.
', '
In the meantime, heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in the onion and mushrooms. Cook for about 8 minutes until the mushrooms have browned and the onion has softened. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, tomato paste, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Cook for about 5 minutes then add in the red wine, 1 tablespoon of the rosemary, thyme, half of the kosher salt, and black pepper. Mix until combined and cook until the wine reduces by half, about 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together the vegetable broth, flour, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce. Pour the mixture into the pan and mix. Simmer for about 5 minutes until the mixture has thickened. Remove the thyme stems from the pan and mix in the lentils. Remove the pan from heat and set aside.\xa0
', '
When the potatoes and parsnips are tender, drain them from the pot. Return them back to the hot pot and add in the milk, butter, remaining half of the salt, and remaining 2 teaspoons of rosemary. Mash everything together until creamy.
', '
Serve the mashed potatoes with the parsnips with the lentil stew. Garnish with chopped parsley and additional thyme sprigs. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegetarian-potstickers
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1-inch fresh ginger, grated', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '8 oz. shiitake mushrooms, chopped', '1 cup shredded cabbage', '1 cup shredded carrots', '3 Tbsp. chopped fresh chives', '2 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds', '36-40 round wonton wrappers', '¼ cup water']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zt3tGXqw9iU
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. When the oil shimmers, add the ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, mushroom, cabbage and carrots, and cook, stirring occasionally until the veggies have cooked down, about 5 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, chives, and sesame seeds and cook another 2-3 minutes or until all the liquid has evaporated. Remove from heat and let cool.\xa0
', '
To assemble, spoon 1 tablespoon of filling onto each wrapper. Brush water around the edge of the wrapper. Fold the dough over the filling to create a half moon shape, pinching the edges to seal and pleating the dough as you go. Repeat with the remaining wrappers.\xa0
', '
Heat a large skillet with the remaining Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil over medium-high heat. Add the potstickers and cook until the bottoms are light golden brown, about 2-3 minutes. Pour 1/4 cup of water into the pan and immediately cover with a tight-fitting lid. Turn heat to medium and let the dumplings steam for 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Serve immediately with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce for dipping. Enjoy!
']

Name: tofu-nuggets
Ingredients: ['1 package super firm tofu', '1 cup flour ', '1 cup buttermilk', '4 cups panko breadcrumbs', '¼ cup of vegetable oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. smoked paprika', '½ tsp. onion powder', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zt3tGXqw9iU
', "
Remove tofu from packaging. Press the tofu for 20 minutes, ideally using a tofu press, but if you don't have a tofu press, place about 4 paper towels on a plate. Set tofu on top of plate and cover with more paper towels. Place a cast iron pan or something else that is heavy on top. Let sit for 30 minutes. Once the tofu is pressed, cut it into bite sized cubes.
", '
In a medium bowl, stir together Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic to make a marinade. Add tofu cubes to the marinade and toss to coat. Place in the fridge and marinate for 30 minutes. Stir halfway through to ensure each piece is coated with marinade.
', '
Create a breading station by adding flour to a medium bowl. In a separate medium sized bowl, add buttermilk. In a third medium sized bowl, combine panko, smoked paprika, onion powder, salt and pepper and mix.
', '
Dip the tofu chunks into the flour and shake off the excess. Then dip into the buttermilk, letting any excess drip off. Finally, roll in the panko mixture to coat all sides as much as possible.\xa0
', "
Heat ¼ cup of vegetable oil in a high rimmed pan over medium-high heat. When oil is hot, add tofu, a few pieces at a time. Make sure not to overcrowd the pan. Cook for 1 ½ minutes on each side or until golden brown, then flip and cook for another 1 ½ minutes on the other side. Remove to a paper towel lined plate to absorb the excess oil. Continue until you've cooked all of the tofu. Allow to cool slightly, then serve immediately with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo Dressing/Spread (Cage-Free Eggs). Enjoy!
"]

Name: oyster-mushroom-scallops
Ingredients: ['4 king oyster mushrooms ', 'olive oil', 'sliced scallions, for serving', 'white and black sesame seeds, for serving']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup vegetable broth', '1 Tbsp. toasted sesame oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zt3tGXqw9iU
', '
To prepare the king oyster mushrooms, cut the mushrooms into thick slices horizontally, about 2” thick. Then score them by slicing diagonal lines, then cross hatching them in the opposite direction. Do this cross hatching on both sides of mushroom.
', '
Combine the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, vegetable broth, and sesame oil in a large bowl. Place the sliced and scored mushrooms into the bowl and allow to marinate for about 20 minutes. Tossing the mushrooms in marinade occasionally to make sure they are evenly coated.
', '
Heat a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add a little oil to the pan, then add 2-4 pieces of mushroom in the pan. Be careful, the mushrooms may sputter a bit when they hit the pan. Check them after a minute or two. Once they have a nice, deep color, flip and allow to sear on the other side.
', '
While mushrooms are cooking, make dipping sauce. In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, lime juice and water. Mix and set aside.
', '
Once mushrooms have a deep color on both slides, place on a serving platter and garnish with scallions. Top with white and black sesame seeds. Serve with dipping sauce and enjoy!
']

Name: jarcuterie
Ingredients: ['8 oz. cheese wedges and cubes, use a variety of cheeses ', 'assorted pickles and olives', '4 oz. each capicola, mortadella, salami, prosciutto', '8 rosemary sprigs', '8 crackers breadsticks, pretzels, or crostini']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup sweet chili sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. fish sauce ', '1 tsp. rice vinegar', '2 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gnYWnE7pgqA
', '
To make chili jam: In a small bowl, combine sweet chili sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, fish sauce, rice vinegar and water. Mix and set aside.\xa0
', '
To assemble Jarcuterie: In a jar, place a layer of the chili jam, then add cheeses, olives, and pickles to fill the cup. Add a variety of meats and cheeses, skewered with toothpicks at varying heights. Finish with a cracker and rosemary sprig. Repeat to make 8 jars and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: shrimp-cocktail-shooters
Ingredients: ['12 large tail-on shrimp, cooked, peeled and deveined. Leave tails on. ', 'juice of one lemon', '1 tsp. lemon zest (about one whole lemon zested)']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup ketchup', '2 Tbsp. horseradish or more to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '3 tsp. fresh lemon juice', '½ tsp. Worcestershire sauce ', 'a dash of salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gnYWnE7pgqA
', '
To make cocktail sauce, place ketchup, horseradish, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and salt to a bowl and mix until well combined. Chill until ready to use.
', '
When ready to assemble shooters, add 1-2 Tbsp. of the cocktail sauce to a small parfait or shot glass and place shrimp on top. Repeat to prepare 12 shooters. Squeeze a little lemon juice over each shrimp and top with lemon zest. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-meatball-marinara-poppers
Ingredients: ['½ lb. ground pork', '½ lb. ground beef', '¼ cup grated parmesan  ', '1 tsp. red pepper flakes', '1 egg, beaten', '1/2 cup plain breadcrumbs', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '8 oz. mozzarella cheese, freshly grated', '1 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '¼ tsp. salt']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup marinara sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gnYWnE7pgqA
', '
Preheat oven to 350˚F and line a baking sheet with foil and spray with cooking spray. Set aside.
', '
In a medium size mixing bowl combine ground pork, ground beef, parmesan cheese, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, red pepper flakes, garlic powder, salt, egg and breadcrumbs. Gently mix until well combined. Roll into 24 small balls, using a small cookie scoop, and set aside.
', '
Heat a large cast iron skillet on medium heat until hot and add olive oil. Place 12 meatballs in the skillet and sear on all sides for 4-5 minutes, turning occasionally. Repeat with remaining meatballs. Place meatballs on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes until fully cooked.
', '
Meanwhile, combine marinara sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil in a bowl and set aside.
', '
When the meatballs are completely cooked, remove from the oven and switch the oven to broil. Top with 2 Tbsp. of the spicy marinara sauce and mozzarella cheese. Place under the broiler for several minutes, watching closely, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly. Garnish with chopped parsley. Serve immediately, with toothpicks for easy eating.\xa0 Enjoy!
']

Name: dai-pai-dong-style-assorted-stir-fry-with-dried-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 oz. dried shrimp ', '1.5 oz. dried radish (diced)', '5 oz.  squid tentacles', 'cooking oil, a drizzle', '4 oz. Chinese chive bud (sectioned) ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 pc.  dried tofu (diced)', 'dried green onions, a little ', '0.5 oz.  red bell pepper (julienne)', '1 oz. cashews (roasted)']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Fiery Hot Dried Shrimp Chili Oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the dried shrimp and dried radish. Blanch the squid tentacles and set aside.
\xa0
', '
Heat the wok with oil, add the chive buds, stir-fry for a while. Remove and set aside.
\xa0
', '
Stir-fry the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and dried green onions until fragrant. Add dried tofu, dried radish and dried shrimp and stir-fry briefly. Add the chive flowers and squid tentacles back into the wok.\xa0 Add red bell peppers and seasonings, stir-fry until the sauce is absorbed. Add cashews and serve.
']

Name: thai-mussel-curry-with-tomatoes-and-lemongrass
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 Roma tomatoes, cut into chunks', '1 lb. mussels, debearded and cleaned', '2 Tbsp. chopped dill', '2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro', 'microgreens, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. red curry paste', '2 Tbsp. chopped lemongrass', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce', '3 Tbsp. coconut milk', '2 Tbsp. tamarind juice']
Procedure:
['
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan with high sides over medium high heat. Add in the red curry paste and lemongrass. Stir until fragrant. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce and coconut milk. Cook until the oil separates.
', '
Mix in the tomatoes and mussels. Cover the pan with a lid and cook for about 5 minutes until the mussels open. Add in the tamarind juice and mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Remove the pan from heat and add in the dill and cilantro. Garnish with microgreens and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: moroccan-cauliflower-with-tahini-chili-honey
Ingredients: ['1 head cauliflower, cut into florets', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ tsp. salt', '4 Tbsp. harissa paste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '¼ tsp. salt', '2 Tbsp. tahini', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZD2L8ie7NJ0
', '
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
', '
In a large bowl, add in 2 tablespoons of the olive oil, ½ teaspoon of the salt, and 2 tablespoons of the harissa paste. Mix to combine then add in the cauliflower. Toss until the cauliflower is evenly coated.\xa0
', '
Spread the cauliflower onto the prepared baking sheet. Bake it in the oven for 35 minutes, flipping the cauliflower halfway through cooking. Remove the cauliflower from the oven and mix in the remaining 2 tablespoons of harissa paste. Place the cauliflower back into the oven and bake for another 5-10 minutes until cooked through and slightly charred.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the remaining tablespoon of olive oil, ¼ teaspoon of salt, tahini, honey, lemon juice, black pepper, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Whisk until combined. Slowly mix in the water a little bit at a time until you reach your desired consistency.\xa0
', '
Drizzle the sauce over the cauliflower. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
