Name: steak-salad-with-parmesan-peppercorn-ranch-dressing
Ingredients: ['8 oz. New York strip steak', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 tsp. olive oil', '½ large red onion sliced', '3 cups mixed greens', '1 avocado, sliced', '½ cup sliced radish', '½ cup sliced Persian cucumber', '½ cup black beans']
Seasoning: ['freshly cracked black pepper, for seasoning', 'kosher salt, for seasoning']
Marinade: ['⅓ cup balsamic vinegar', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup olive oil', '2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 tsp. dried Italian seasoning', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. dried mustard']
Procedure:
['
For the Steak: add the balsamic vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, olive oil, Worcestershire sauce, honey, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, and dried mustard to a bowl. Whisk until combined. Add in the New York strip steak and allow it to marinate for 15-20 minutes. Remove the steak from the marinade and pat it dry with paper towels. Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Season both sides of the steak with freshly cracked black pepper and salt. Add the steak to the pan and cook for about 4-5 minutes on each side until it develops a golden brown crust and is cooked to your liking. Remove the steak from the pan and allow it to rest before slicing.\xa0
', '
For the Dressing: add the mayonnaise, sour cream, parmesan cheese, parsley, peppercorns, Worcestershire sauce, white vinegar, hot sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic to a blender. Blend until combined. Pour in the buttermilk and blend until incorporated. Set the dressing aside in the fridge.\xa0
', '
For the Salad: heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add in the sliced red onion rings and cook for about 3 minutes on each side until softened and slightly caramelized. Remove the onions from the pan. Add the mixed greens to a platter. Top with sliced avocado, radishes, cucumbers, black beans, caramelized red onions and sliced steak. Serve with the prepared dressing and enjoy!
']

Name: thai-sweet-chili-chicken-bowls
Ingredients: ['1 cup quinoa', '1 ¾ cups water', '1 lb. chicken thighs, cut into 1” pieces', '2 tsp. vegetable oil', '3 cups kale, destemmed and massaged', '2 cups bean sprouts', '1 cup sliced red bell pepper', '1 cup sliced yellow bell pepper', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, for seasoning']
Procedure:
['
For the Dressing: add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce, coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to a sauce pot. Heat it over medium heat until the mixture comes to a simmer and the peanut butter melts into the mixture. Remove the sauce pot from the heat and set it aside to cool.
', '
For the Bowl: add the quinoa and water to a pot. Heat it over high heat until it comes to a boil. Reduce the heat to low so that it is simmering. Cover the pot with a lid and allow it to simmer for 15-20 minutes until the quinoa is cooked and the water has been absorbed. Fluff the quinoa with a fork and set it aside to cool.
', '
Season the chicken thighs with salt and pepper. Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add in the chicken and cook for 2-4 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through. Remove the chicken from the pan.\xa0
', '
To assemble, add a portion of quinoa, chicken, kale, bean sprouts, red bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, and red cabbage to each bowl. Garnish with sliced green onions and serve with the sweet chili dressing. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-sausage-and-kale-tortellini-soup
Ingredients: ['1 lb. Italian sausage, casings removed', '½ Tbsp. olive oil', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 onion, diced', '2 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '1 (9 oz.) package cheese tortellini', '½ bunch kale, destemmed and roughly chopped', '⅓ cup heavy cream', '3 Tbsp. chopped fresh basil']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '2 tsp. Italian seasoning', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '4 cups chicken stock', '1 (8 oz.) can tomato sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add in the Italian sausage. Cook and crumble the sausage until golden brown and cooked through. Remove any excess grease from the pot.\xa0
', '
Add in the olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, onion, and Italian seasoning. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the onion turns translucent. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Use a whisk to mix in the all purpose flour. Continue mixing the flour for about 1 minute until the flour lightly browns. Whisk in the chicken stock and tomato sauce. Bring the soup to a boil then reduce the heat so that it is simmering. Simmer for 10 minutes until the soup has slightly reduced and thickened.
', '
Add in the tortellini. Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and cook for 5-7 minutes until the tortellini is cooked. Then mix in the kale, heavy cream and basil. Cook for an additional 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste and enjoy!
']

Name: turkish-eggs
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups full fat Greek yogurt', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ Tbsp. chopped fresh dill', '½ Tbsp. white distilled vinegar', '3 large eggs', 'additional dill, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. kosher salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '½ Tbsp. paprika', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '½ cup halved cherry tomatoes', '½ tsp. Aleppo pepper']
Procedure:
['
Add the Greek yogurt, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, dill, salt, and black pepper to a bowl. Mix until combined and set it aside.
', '
Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer. Add in the white distilled vinegar. Crack each egg into a small dish. Use a spoon to swirl the water and create a vortex. Drop one of the eggs into the water. Allow the egg to set for a bit before repeating this process with the remaining eggs. Cook the eggs for 2-3 minutes until the egg whites are set but the yolk is still runny. Remove the eggs from the water with a slotted spoon and place them on a plate line with paper towels to drain.\xa0
', '
Add the butter to a small sauce pan. Heat it over medium heat until it melts. Remove the pan from heat and mix in the paprika, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, cherry tomatoes, and Aleppo pepper.\xa0
', '
Portion the yogurt into bowls. Add an egg to each bowl. Top with the tomato chili butter mixture. Garnish with additional dill fronds and enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-potato-coconut-milk-lentil-stew
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. coconut oil', '1 onion, diced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ lbs sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1” pieces', '½ cup brown lentils', '4 cups vegetable stock', '13.5 oz. coconut milk', '1 bunch kale, destemmed and roughly chopped', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. red pepper flakes ', '½ tsp. ground coriander', '½ tsp. ground cumin', '½ tsp. ground turmeric', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add in the coconut oil and allow it to melt. Sauté the onion for about 5 minutes until translucent. Mix in the red pepper flakes, coriander, cumin, and turmeric. Sauté for 1 minute until the spices are fragrant. Then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic.
', '
Add the sweet potatoes to the pot and mix until it’s coated in the spices. Then mix in the lentils. Season with salt and pepper. Pour the vegetable stock and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce into the Dutch oven. Cover with a lid and bring the soup to a boil.
', '
Reduce the heat to low so that the soup is simmering. Position the lid so that there is a slight gap for steam to escape. Simmer for 30 minutes until the sweet potatoes and lentils are tender and the soup has reduced by ⅓.\xa0
', '
Mix in the coconut milk and kale. Simmer for 3-4 minutes until the kale is bright green and wilted. Season with more salt and pepper to taste then turn off the heat. Garnish with cilantro leaves and enjoy!
']

Name: sriracha-maple-sweet-potato-chorizo-hash
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 medium sweet potato, cut into ½” cubes', '2 oz. crumbly chorizo', '4 large eggs', '1 avocado, sliced', 'cilantro, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, for seasoning', '1 Tbsp. maple syrup', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in sweet potatoes and cook for about 10 minutes until they turn golden brown and tender.
', '
Add in the chorizo. Cook and crumble the chorizo until it becomes crispy and is cooked through, about 2-3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper, to taste.\xa0
', '
Mix in the maple syrup and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Remove the pan from heat and set it aside.
', '
In a separate pan, fry the eggs until the whites are set and the yolks are still runny.\xa0
', '
Portion the hash and eggs onto plates. Add a few slices of avocado to each plate. Garnish with cilantro and serve with lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: stir-fried-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 green onions, sliced- whites and green tops separated ', '½ cup rotisserie chicken, shredded', '½ cup frozen mixed vegetables', '2 packages prepared Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Asian Style Soy Garlic Noodles', '2 Tbsp. water']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P-Qyxe2NG3Y
', '
In a large wok or sauté pan, heat vegetable oil over medium heat. Add in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and the whites of the green onions. Sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
', '
Add in rotisserie chicken, frozen mixed vegetables, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Sauté until chicken and vegetables are warmed through.
', '
Add in prepared Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Asian Style Soy Garlic Noodles and water. Mix well and sauté for 1 more minute.
', '
Serve garnished with green tops of green onions and more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, if desired. Enjoy!
']

Name: hot-honey-pizza-and-salad
Ingredients: ['leftover pizza', '---For Side Salad:---', '4 cups spring mix', '⅓ cup red bell peppers, sliced', '¼ red onion, sliced', '½ cucumber, medium diced', 'shaved parmesan']
Sauce Mix: ['---For Hot Honey:---', '1 ½ cup honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RAJWb8BIYc0
', '
To make Lee Kum Kee hot honey:
Place honey, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil into a small pot. Put on a high heat and bring to a simmer. Once it starts to bubble, take it off of the heat and stir in the rice wine vinegar. Let cool before transferring to a mason jar for storage.
', '
To reheat pizza:
Preheat air fryer to 325° F for thin crust pizza or 350° for thick crust pizza. Place pizza in basket in a single layer. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes. Remove and top with Lee Kum Kee hot honey.
', '
To make Lee Kum Kee hot honey vinaigrette:
Place all ingredients into a jar with a lid. Shake until combined. Add salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
To make salad:
Combine all ingredients into a bowl and toss with Lee Kum Kee hot honey vinaigrette. Top with more cheese if desired.\xa0
', '
Enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-wings
Ingredients: ['3 lbs. whole chicken wings, wing tips removed and divided at the joint', 'black and white sesame seeds, for garnish ', 'cilantro, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rEslweKl8aY&feature=youtu.be
', '
Place chicken wings into a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper and mix. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce and toss to combine. Cover with plastic wrap and let marinate for at least 4 hours.\xa0
', '
Preheat oven to 400˚F. Place a wire rack onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Remove the chicken wings from the marinade and place on the wire rack.\xa0
', '
Bake the chicken wings for 45-50 minutes, flipping them halfway through. Remove from the oven when golden brown and crispy and fully cooked through.\xa0
', '
Garnish with black and white sesame seeds and cilantro. Serve with\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-chicken-piccata-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground chicken', '1 large egg', '¾ cup breadcrumbs', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup chopped parsley', '½ cup grated parmesan cheese', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '3 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '¼ cup capers, drained']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. all purpose flour', '1 cup chicken broth', '1 cup heavy cream', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '4 Tbsp. lemon juice']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bWnzR-XOX40&feature=youtu.be
', '
Add the ground chicken, egg, breadcrumbs, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, half of the parsley, parmesan, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Mix the ingredients together until combined. Form heaped tablespoon sized meatballs.
', '
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add in the olive oil. Place the meatballs into the pan. Cook the meatballs for about 4 minutes, turning them every few minutes, so that all sides are golden. Remove the meatballs from the pan.
', '
Reduce the heat to medium. Add in the butter. Allow the butter to melt then whisk in the all purpose flour. Cook for 1 minute. Then add in the chicken broth, heavy cream, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and lemon juice. Mix until combined and bring it to a simmer. Simmer for 5 minutes until the sauce thickens and the meatballs are fully cooked. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Mix in the remaining parsley and the capers. Remove the pan from heat and enjoy!
']

Name: shrimp-etouffee
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '⅓ cup unsalted butter', '⅓ cup all purpose flour', '1 small onion, chopped', '½ red bell pepper, diced', '2 ribs celery, diced', '¼ tsp. dried thyme', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 cups shrimp stock', '2 cups fresh decided tomatoes', '2 dried bay leaves', 'juice from ½ a lemon', 'cooked white rice, for serving', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '3 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Cajun seasoning']
Procedure:
['
Add the shrimp and Cajun seasoning to a bowl and toss to combine. Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add in the shrimp and cook for about 2 minutes until opaque. Remove the shrimp from the pan and set aside.
', '
Melt the unsalted butter in a large pan over medium heat. Add in the flour. Whisk and cook the flour until it turns into a peanut butter colored paste, about 6-8 minutes. Mix in the onion, red bell pepper, celery, thyme, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook until the vegetables have slightly softened.
', '
Slowly pour the shrimp stock into the pan while mixing. Add in the tomatoes, Worcestershire sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and bay leaves. Mix to combine. Heat it over high heat until the mixture comes to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes.
', '
Remove the dried bay leaves from the pan. Mix in the lemon juice and shrimp. Cook until the shrimp are heated through. Season with salt and pepper, to taste. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
Serve with cooked white rice and garnish with chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: rainbow-veggie-sandwich
Ingredients: ['4 slices of bread of your choice', '1 cup baby spinach ', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '1 tomato, sliced', '1 avocado, pitted and sliced', '1 cup shredded carrots']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Toast the bread until it reaches the desired level of toastiness.\xa0
', '
Spread about 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo onto each slice of bread.\xa0
', '
Layer the baby spinach, red cabbage, sliced tomato, sliced avocado, and carrots onto 2 slices of bread. Top each sandwich with the remaining slices of bread.\xa0
', '
Cut the sandwiches in half and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: miso-carbonara
Ingredients: ['3 eggs and 2 egg yolks', '14 oz. spaghetti ', '7 oz. diced pancetta', 'additional grated parmesan, for topping', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. miso paste', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3.5 oz. grated parmesan cheese', '½ tsp. ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Add the eggs, miso paste, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, parmesan cheese, and black pepper to a bowl. Whisk until combined.\xa0
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add in the spaghetti and cook according to the package directions. Reserve 1 cup of the pasta water. Drain the pasta and set it aside.
', '
Heat a large pan over high heat. Add in the pancetta and cook until browned and crispy. Turn off the heat.\xa0
', '
Add the cooked spaghetti into the pan and pour in the egg mixture. Toss to combine until the sauce is thick and creamy. If the sauce is too thick, mix in a splash of the reserved pasta water. Top with additional grated parmesan cheese and garnish with chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: grilled-peach-burrata-salad
Ingredients: ['2 peaches, pitted and cut into wedges', '1 Tbsp. avocado oil', '4 oz. burrata', '2 oz. prosciutto', 'basil leaves', '1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Add the balsamic vinegar, brown sugar, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce to a small sauce pan. Heat over medium-high heat and bring it to a boil. Lower the heat to medium or medium-low and gently simmer until it thickens and coats the back of a spoon. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
Preheat the grill over high heat. Add the peaches and avocado oil to a bowl. Toss until combined. Place the peaches onto the grill. Cook the peaches for about 1 minute on each side until both sides develop grill marks. Remove the peaches from the grill.
', '
Place the peaches onto a serving platter. Dollop spoonfuls of burrata around the platter. Tear the prosciutto into smaller pieces and place them on top. Then add on the basil leaves. Drizzle the olive oil and balsamic soy glaze on top. Enjoy!
']

Name: steak-au-poivre
Ingredients: ['2 (1 ½” thick) New York Strip Steaks', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 tsp. olive oil', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. whole peppercorns', 'kosher salt, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup + 1 tsp. Cognac', '1 cup heavy cream', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce', 'kosher salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Remove the steaks from the fridge and allow them to sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Crush the peppercorns with a mortar and pestle then place them onto a place. Season both sides of the steaks with kosher salt. Then press each side of the steaks into the plate of peppercorns.\xa0
', '
In a pan, add in the unsalted butter and oil. Heat over medium heat until it turns golden. Add the steaks to the pan and cook for about 4 minutes on each side for a medium rare steak. Remove the steaks from the pan and set them aside to rest. Pour the excess fat out of the pan.
', '
Bring the pan off the heat and pour in the ⅓ cup of cognac. Ignite the alcohol with a matchstick. Return the pan to the stovetop to cook off the alcohol. Over medium heat, add in the heavy cream and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce.
', '
Bring the mixture to a boil. Whisk until the sauce is thick enough to coat the back of a spoon, about 5-6 minutes. Add the remaining teaspoon of cognac and season the sauce with salt. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
Slice the steaks and serve with the sauce. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-peanut-zoodles-with-crispy-tofu
Ingredients: ['12 oz. extra firm tofu', '⅓ cup cornstarch', '¼ cup vegetable oil', '4-6 zucchini, spiralized', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'chopped peanuts, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¾ tsp. salt']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup peanut butter', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '2 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
Wrap the tofu in paper towels and place it into a dish. Place a heavy object on top to press out the moisture. Allow the tofu to sit for 30 minutes. Then dice the tofu into ½” cubes.
', '
Add the peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, 2 tablespoons of the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, granulated sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger to a food processor. Blend until combined then transfer the sauce to a bowl and set it aside.
', '
Add the cornstarch and salt to a bowl. Mix to combine. Then add in the tofu and toss until the cubes of tofu are coated in the cornstarch.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Working in batches, add the tofu to the pan and fry on all sides until golden and crispy. Remove the tofu from the pan and place them on a plate lined with paper towels to drain. Add the fried tofu to a bowl along with the remaining 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Toss until combined.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, add in the spiralized zucchini noodles and prepared peanut sauce. Mix until the zucchini noodles are well coated in the sauce. Serve the zoodles with the crispy tofu and garnish with cilantro leaves and chopped peanuts. Enjoy!
']

Name: temari-sushi
Ingredients: ['2 cups Japanese rice', '1 Persian cucumber, thinly sliced', '3 oz. sashimi grade salmon, thinly sliced', '2 radishes, thinly sliced', '½ cup salmon roe']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup rice vinegar', '¼ cup granulated sugar', 'pinch of salt']
Procedure:
['
Cook the Japanese rice according to the package directions.
', '
While the rice cooks, add the rice vinegar, granulated sugar, and salt to a small sauce pot. Heat it over medium heat until the sugar and salt dissolve. Set it aside for later.
', '
Transfer the cooked rice to a large bowl. While the rice is still hot, pour the vinegar mixture over top. Use a rice paddle to mix the rice and vinegar together. Cover the bowl with a towel to prevent the rice from drying out.\xa0
', '
Layer the slices of cucumber and radish to form a circle about 2” in diameter. Place each circle onto a piece of plastic wrap. Add about 2 tablespoons of the sushi rice on top. Bring the ends of the plastic wrap together and twist to form a compact ball. Unwrap the plastic wrap and remove the temari sushi.
', '
To make the salmon temari, layer 2-3 slices of salmon onto the plastic wrap. Add about 2 tablespoons of the sushi rice on top. Bring the ends of the plastic wrap together and twist to form a compact ball. Unwrap the plastic wrap and remove the temari sushi.
', '
Top each temari sushi with a small spoonful of salmon roe. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-tuna-tostada
Ingredients: ['8 oz. sashimi grade tuna, diced', '2 green onions, sliced', '2 tsp. toasted sesame seeds', '4 tostadas ', '1 avocado, sliced', '2 radishes, sliced', '1 jalapeño, sliced', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onion, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Add the tuna, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, green onions, and toasted sesame seeds to a bowl. Mix until combined.
', '
Distribute the spicy tuna onto the tostadas. Top each tostada with avocado, radish, and jalapeno. Garnish with black sesame seeds, white sesame seeds, and sliced green onion. Serve with lime wedges and enjoy!
', '
N/A
']

Name: leftover-rice-balls
Ingredients: ['6 cups leftover short-grain white rice', '½ cup canned tuna, canned in oil (drained)', 'black and white sesame seeds, for garnish', '4 hard-boiled egg yolks', '½ cup finely minced pickled radish, or any pickled vegetable', '2 hard-boiled egg white', '2 tsp. oil', '½ cup finely chopped red bell pepper', '½ cup finely chopped shiitake mushroom, or other mushroom of your choice', '2 green onion, finely chopped', '1 tsp. minced garlic', '1/2 tsp. grated ginger ']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. salt', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6khZVSDm5Gc
', '
Warm leftover rice in the microwave with a moist paper towel on top, to prevent rice from drying out.
', '
To make Tuna Mayo Rice Balls: In a mixing bowl combine 2 cups of the rice, canned tuna, salt, ½ Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and ½ tsp of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Gently mix. Take a heaping tablespoonful of the mixture and place into rice mold. Shake until rice ball forms. Remove from mold and top with black and white sesame seeds and garnish with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
', '
To make Egg and Pickled Radish Rice Balls: Chop the egg whites finely. Using a fork, mash the egg yolks to very fine crumble. In a mixing bowl combine 2 cups of the rice, egg yolks, pickled radish, egg whites and 1 ½ Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo; mix well. Season with salt according to your taste. Take a heaping tablespoonful of the mixture and place into rice mold. Shake until rice ball forms. Remove from mold.
', '
To make Vegetable Rice Balls: Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté red bell pepper, mushroom and green onions with garlic and ginger until soft. Season with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and 1 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Season with salt and pepper according to your taste. Remove from heat. Combine the mushroom mixture with 2 cups of the rice in a mixing bowl; mix well. Take a heaping tablespoonful of the mixture and place into rice mold. Shake until rice ball forms. Remove from mold.
', '
Serve all rice balls on a plate, and garnish with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: one-pan-spicy-cream-pasta
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. oil from sun-dried tomato jar, divided', '1 lb. frozen raw shrimp, thawed', '3 shallots, finely diced', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. tomato paste', '⅓ cup sun-dried tomatoes ', '¾ cup heavy cream ', '2 cups fresh spinach ', '1 package rigatoni pasta, cooked', '½ cup grated parmesan cheese + more for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZB2wQgNrm5s&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a large pan, heat 1 Tbsp. of the sun-dried tomato oil on medium-high heat. Add shrimp to the pan and cook on both sides until just pink, about 2 minutes. Remove the shrimp from the pan and set aside.
', '
To the same pan, add remaining sun-dried tomato oil, shallots and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook until shallots begin to change color and the mixture is fragrant. Add in the tomato paste and allow to caramelize for about 2 minutes. Add the sun-dried tomatoes (chopped or whole) and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil.\xa0 Stir to combine.
', '
Lower the heat and stir in the heavy cream, season with salt and pepper to taste. Let that simmer for a few minutes until the sauce has slightly thickened.
', '
Next add in the fresh spinach, cooked pasta and parmesan cheese. Stir until well incorporated and pasta is heated through.\xa0
', '
Finish by re-introducing the shrimps into the pot and garnish with more parmesan cheese. For added heat, top with more Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: cumin-chicken-wings-in-hunan-style
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken wings']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Cumin Chicken Wings']
Procedure:
['
Use a small knife to cut along the back of the chicken wings slightly. Be careful not to cut through the surface. Marinate with Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Cumin Chicken Wings for 30 minutes.
', '
Put the chicken wings into the preheated oven with 356°F and bake for 30 minutes and serve.
', '
Tips: Rinse the chicken wings under with running water to defrost can reduce the frozen odor.
']

Name: toothpick-lamb-or-beef
Ingredients: ['1 lb. lamb or beef']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Cumin Chicken Wings']
Procedure:
['
Cut the meat into 2x2 cm sizes, mix well with 2 Tbsp. Of Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Cumin Chicken Wings, and marinate for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Skewer each piece of meat with a toothpick.
', '
Preheat the oven to 380°F, place the toothpick meats in the oven, and bake for 18 minutes.\xa0
', '
Tip: If preferring more cumin and spicy flavors, sprinkle some cumin and chili powder on top of the meat before serving.
']

Name: lomi-lomi-salmon-with-yuzu-ponzu-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sushi grade salmon filet, skinless and bones removed', '1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '1 Tbsp. grapeseed oil', '2 green onions, sliced', '1 serrano pepper, deseeded and diced', '½ cup diced cucumber', '1 avocado, diced', '¼ cup chopped cilantro', '2 Tbsp. salmon roe']
Seasoning: ['¾ cup kosher salt', '¼ cup granulated sugar', 'pinch of salt']
Sauce Mix: ['3 tsp. yuzu kosho', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. ponzu', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rYzj3pNvnKQ
', '
Add the kosher salt and granulated sugar to a bowl. Mix until combined. Pour half of the mixture into a high-sided dish. Place the salmon filet on top. Then pour the remaining mixture over the salmon, patting the salt and sugar onto the filet. Wrap the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate it overnight.\xa0
', '
Remove the salmon from the salt and sugar mixture. Rinse the salmon filet in cold water and pat it dry with paper towels. Cut the salmon into ¼” cubes and add it to a bowl.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the yuzu kosho, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, ponzu, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Mix until the ingredients are well combined.
', '
In a separate bowl, toss together the cherry tomatoes, a pinch of salt, and grapeseed oil. Allow it to sit for 15 minutes.
', '
Add the ponzu sauce, cherry tomatoes, green onion, serrano pepper, cucumber, avocado, and cilantro to the bowl of salmon. Gently mix until combined. Top with salmon roe and serve. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegetable-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '4 cups assorted mushrooms, sliced (trumpets, shiitake, crimini and oyster mushrooms) ', '1 carrot, thinly sliced ', 'half an onion, thinly sliced ', '2 cups broccoli, blanched ', 'white rice, for serving ', 'sliced scallion, for garnish ', 'cilantro, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, to taste', 'salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nPjJRiYNDSQ
', '
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add in some Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Minced Ginger. Then add in the sliced mushrooms. Sauté until golden, about 2-3 minutes.
', '
Add in the sliced carrot, onion and broccoli and continue to sauté until the carrots and broccoli are tender, about 5 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and continue cooking until veggies are fully coated. Drizzle in a touch of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Toss to combine. Taste and adjust the seasoning with salt and pepper if necessary.
', '
Serve over prepared white rice and garnish with sliced scallions and cilantro. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: coconut-shrimp-bowls
Ingredients: ['½ head red cabbage, shredded', '24 medium shrimp, peeled and deveined', '½ cup tapioca starch', '2 eggs, beaten', '1 cup finely shredded unsweetened coconut', 'vegetable oil, for frying', 'cooked rice, for serving', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, for topping']
Sauce Mix: ['1 mango, peeled and diced', '½ red bell pepper, diced', '2 Tbsp. diced red onion', '1 Tbsp. diced jalapeño', 'juice from 1 lime', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
For the Cabbage Slaw: Add the orange juice, lime juice, olive oil, dijon mustard, salt, and pepper to a bowl. Whisk until emulsified. Add in the red cabbage and toss it together with the dressing. Place the slaw aside in the fridge.
', '
For the Mango Salsa: Add the mango, red bell pepper, red onion, jalapeño and lime juice to a bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Toss to combine then set it aside in the fridge.\xa0
', '
For the Coconut Shrimp: Pat the shrimp dry with paper towels. Place the tapioca starch, eggs, and unsweetened coconut in separate shallow dishes. Season the tapioca starch and coconut with salt and pepper.
', '
Dredge the shrimp in the tapioca starch. Dust off any excess starch. Dip the shrimp into the egg mixture, allowing any excess egg to drip off. Then place the shrimp into the coconut and completely coat each shrimp in coconut flakes.
', '
Pour an inch of oil into a pan with high sides. Heat it to 350˚F. When the oil is hot, add the shrimp in batches. Fry until golden brown, then flip them onto the other side until golden. Remove the shrimp from the oil and place them onto a plate lined with paper towels to drain.\xa0
', '
To assemble the bowl, portion the rice into each bowl. Then add on some of the cabbage slaw, mango salsa, and shrimp. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce on top and serve with a lime wedge. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-crab-cake-benedict
Ingredients: ['12 oz. fresh Dungeness crab meat', '4 Tbsp. finely diced celery ', '2 Tbsp. finely chopped cilantro', '1 Tbsp. chopped chives', '1 cup panko breadcrumbs', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 large eggs', '2 English muffins, halved and toasted', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['8 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '3 large egg yolks', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '⅛ tsp. cayenne pepper']
Procedure:
['
For the Crab Cakes: In a large bowl, combine the crab meat, celery, cilantro, chives, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, panko, salt, and pepper into a bowl. Mix until combined then divide the mixture into 4 portions. Form each portion into 3” patties. Place them in the fridge to chill for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
When the crab cakes have chilled, heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the crab cakes to the pan and cook until golden brown, about 3 minutes on each side. Remove the pan from heat.\xa0
', '
For the Eggs Benedict: Bring a pot of water to a boil. Reduce the heat so that it is lightly simmering. Crack an egg into a ramekin. Use a spoon to swirl the water. Drop the egg into the water and cook for about 3 minutes until the egg white is set and the yolk is still soft and runny. Use a slotted spoon to remove the egg from the water and place it on a plate lined with paper towels to drain. Repeat this process to poach the remaining eggs.\xa0
', '
For the Hollandaise Sauce: Melt the butter in a pan over low heat. Set it aside. Add the egg yolks, lemon juice, salt, and cayenne pepper to a blender. Blend until the eggs turn a light yellow color. While blending on low speed, drizzle in the melted butter. Continue to blend until you reach the desired viscosity. Transfer the sauce to a bowl. Place the bowl in a large bowl filled with warm water to keep the sauce warm.
', '
To assemble the eggs benedict, place the crab cakes on top of a toasted English muffin half. Add a poached egg on top. Spoon the hollandaise sauce over top and garnish with chopped chives. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegetarian-summer-rolls-with-coconut-peanut-dipping-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. vegetable oil', '16 oz. extra firm tofu, pressed and cut into ½” strips', 'rice paper wrappers', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '6 Persian cucumbers, julienne', '1 red bell pepper, julienne ', '1 yellow bell pepper, julienne ', '1 cup julienne carrots', '1 avocado, sliced']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, add in the peanut butter, coconut milk, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Mix until combined and top with chopped peanuts. Set the dipping sauce aside.\xa0
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the tofu to the pan and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.\xa0
', '
To assemble the rolls, dip a rice paper wrapper into a dish filled with warm water for a few seconds. Place the wrapper onto a cutting board. Working on the side closest to you, place a small mound of the red cabbage onto the wrapper leaving a 1” border from the edge. Pile some of the cucumber, red bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, carrots, a strip of tofu, and a slice of avocado on top.\xa0
', '
Use the 1” border, to lift and fold the rice paper over the filling. Fold in the sides then continue to roll the wrapper forwards. Repeat this process to make the remaining rolls. When all of the summer rolls have been assembled, serve with the coconut peanut dipping sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: korean-buckwheat-noodles
Ingredients: ['8 oz. buckwheat noodles', '1 ⅓ cups julienne cucumber', '1 ⅓ cups shredded purple cabbage', '1 ⅓ cups julienne red bell pepper', '1 ⅓ cups julienne orange bell pepper', '1 ⅓ cups julienne yellow bell pepper', '1 ⅓ cups sliced red onion', '2 boiled eggs, halved', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 apple, peeled and diced', '¼ onion, diced', '1 heaping Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. gochugaru', '2 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '1 Tbsp. gochujang', '1 tsp. sesame seeds']
Procedure:
['
Add the apple and onion to a food processor. Blend until fully pureed then transfer it into a bowl. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, gochugaru, rice wine vinegar, granulated sugar, gochujang, and sesame seeds. Cover and refrigerate the sauce for at least 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add in the buckwheat noodles and cook according to the package directions. Drain and rinse with cold water.
', '
Twirl the noodles and place them in a mound in the center of the serving dish. Arrange the cucumber, purple cabbage, red bell pepper, orange bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, and sliced red onion around the noodles.\xa0
', '
Spoon the prepared sauce on top. Place half of a boiled egg on top. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: tuna-arrabiata-pasta
Ingredients: ['8 oz. fusilli pasta', '4 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion, diced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 (5 oz.) cans tuna in water, drained', '2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 (28 oz.) cans diced tomatoes', '1 tsp. dried thyme', '2 tsp. dried basil', '2 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '¼ tsp. granulated sugar']
Procedure:
['
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add the fusilli to the boiling water and cook according to the package directions. Reserve ¼ cup of the pasta water. Drain and rinse the pasta under cold water. Set it aside.
', '
Preheat the oven to 375˚F. Heat a large pan over medium-high heat. Pour in the olive oil and the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Add in the onion and sauté until it turns translucent. Then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.\xa0
', '
Add in the diced tomatoes, thyme, basil, salt, black pepper, and sugar. Mix to combine. Bring the sauce to a boil then reduce the heat so that it is simmering. Simmer for 10 minutes until the sauce slightly thickens.\xa0
', '
Mix in the tuna, fusilli, and reserved pasta water. Cook for about 1 minute. Taste and adjust the seasoning if necessary. Transfer the pasta to a baking dish. Sprinkle the mozzarella cheese over top. Bake it in the oven for 15 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly. Remove the dish from the oven and top with chopped parsley. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: crispy-mushroom-burger-with-zesty-cilantro-aioli
Ingredients: ['1 cup all-purpose flour', '3 eggs, beaten', '2 cups panko', 'vegetable oil, for frying', '4 portobello mushrooms, gills and stem removed', '4 brioche burger buns, toasted', '2 cups arugula', '1 tomato, sliced', '1 red onion, sliced']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. ground black pepper ']
Sauce Mix: ['¾ cup mayonnaise', '⅓ cup cilantro, roughly chopped', 'zest and juice of ½ a lime', '1 tsp. ground cumin', 'dash of hot sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the mayonnaise, cilantro, lime zest, lime juice, cumin, and hot sauce to a food processor. Blend until combined. Set the cilantro aioli aside.
', '
Add the all purpose flour to a shallow dish. Combine the eggs and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce in a separate shallow dish. Add the panko, salt and pepper, to another shallow dish. Mix to distribute the seasoning.
', '
Pour the vegetable oil into a pot so that it’s about 2” deep. Bring the vegetable oil to 350˚F.\xa0
', '
While the oil heats, coat the Portobello mushrooms in the flour. Dust off any excess flour. Then dip the mushrooms into the egg mixture until all of the flour has been absorbed. Allow any excess egg to drip off. Completely coat the mushrooms in panko.
', '
When the oil is hot, add in the mushrooms, working in a few batches at a time. Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes. Flip the mushrooms over and fry for another 2-3 minutes until the other side is golden. Remove the mushrooms from the oil and allow them to drain on a plate lined with paper towels.
', '
To assemble the mushroom burgers, place a handful of arugula onto the bottom brioche bun. Place the mushroom on top. Add a few spoons of the cilantro aioli onto the mushroom. Layer on the tomatoes and red onion. Place the top brioche bun on top and enjoy!
']

Name: cioppino
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 large fennel bulb, thinly sliced', '1 onion, chopped', '3 shallots, chopped', '1 heaping Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup tomato paste', '1 (28 oz. can) diced tomatoes with juice', '1 ½ cups dry white wine', '5 cups fish stock', '1 dried bay leaf', '1 lb. Manila clams, scrubbed', '1 lb. mussels, scrubbed and debearded', '1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 ½ lbs. halibut, cut into 2” pieces', 'fennel fronds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat the olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add in the fennel, onion, shallots, and salt. Sauté until the onion turns translucent. Then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for another 2 minutes. Mix in the tomato paste.\xa0
', '
Add in the diced tomatoes, white wine, fish stock, and bay leaf. Cover the pot with a lid and bring the mixture to a simmer. Reduce the heat to medium low and simmer for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add the clams and mussels to the pot. Cover the pot with the lid and allow them to cook until their shells begin to open, about 5 minutes. Then add in the shrimp and fish. Cook until they are opaque and fully cooked through, about 5 minutes. Remove the pot from heat and taste for seasoning. Add in salt and pepper if necessary. Garnish with fennel fronds and enjoy!
']

Name: vegan-vermicelli-bowls
Ingredients: ['1 (14 oz.) block extra firm tofu, pressed and cut into ½” cubes', '4 oz. vermicelli noodles', '1 carrot, fine julienne', '2 Persian cucumbers, peeled into ribbons', '¼ cup chopped roasted peanuts', 'mint leaves, for topping', 'basil leaves, for topping', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '3 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup unseasoned rice vinegar', 'juice of ½ lime', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '¼ cup sweet chili sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.\xa0
', '
Add the tofu to a bowl and pour the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce on top. Gently toss the tofu until it’s coated in the sauce. Sprinkle the cornstarch on top and gently fold it together with the tofu.\xa0
', '
Spread the tofu out onto the prepared baking sheet. Bake it in the oven for 13 minutes. Flip the tofu over and bake for another 12 minutes until golden and crispy. Remove the tofu from the oven and set it aside.
', '
Add the vermicelli noodles to a bowl. Pour in enough boiling water to cover the noodles. Soak the noodles for 3-5 minutes until the noodles are tender. Drain and set them aside.
', '
In a bowl, add in the rice vinegar, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, sweet chili sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and water. Whisk until combined and set it aside.
', '
Add the vermicelli noodles, tofu, and carrots to each serving bowl. Wrap each ribbon of cucumber around your finger to create a cylinder shape. Add the rolled cucumbers to each bowl. Top with peanuts, mint leaves, and basil leaves. Serve with a lime wedge and the prepared sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-sriracha-roasted-carrot-fries
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. whole carrots, peeled and cut into thin sticks ', 'cilantro, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. oil ', '1 Tbsp. honey ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JEG0S5z3Fks
', '
Preheat the oven to 425˚F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.\xa0\xa0
', '
Place the carrots into a large bowl. Season them with salt and pepper, to taste. Add in the oil, honey, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Toss to combine.\xa0
', '
Spread the carrots onto the prepared baking sheet, being careful to not overcrowd the pan.\xa0
', '
Bake for 20 minutes, flipping carrots halfway through.\xa0
', '
Once carrots are tender, remove them from the oven. Transfer roasted carrots to a platter and garnish with cilantro. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Enjoy!
']

Name: gochujang-ribs
Ingredients: ['1 side baby back ribs, silverskin removed', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. canola oil', '½ onion, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '2 Tbsp. gochujang', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '½ cup rice vinegar', '½ cup brown sugar', '1 cup ketchup', '1 cup water', 'salt and pepper, to season']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uKa5FXC3ki4&feature=youtu.be
', '
Heat a large saucepan over medium heat. Add in the canola oil. When the oil is hot, add in the onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Then add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and stir until fragrant. Mix in the gochujang and cook for 1 minute. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, rice vinegar, brown sugar, ketchup, and water. Cook for 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper, to taste. Bring the mixture to a boil then lower the heat so that it is simmering. Simmer for 20 minutes. Remove the sauce from heat and cool. Blend with an immersion blender or blender until smooth.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Place the baby back ribs into a casserole dish. Pour in enough water that it comes up halfway up the ribs. Brush the ribs with the prepared sauce. Cover the ribs with parchment paper and foil. Bake the ribs for about 2 hours until the meat is tender.
', '
Increase the oven temperature to 425˚F. Transfer the ribs to a baking sheet lined with foil. Brush another coating of sauce onto the ribs. Bake them for 15-20 minutes until the sauce begins to caramelize. Allow the ribs to rest for 8-10 minutes before cutting. Garnish with white sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-sesame-garlic-grilled-pork-chops
Ingredients: ['6 pcs of pork chops', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['kosher salt, for seasoning']
Sauce Mix: ['1 ¼ cups honey', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Mix the honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil together in a saucepot. Heat it over medium-high heat and bring it to a boil. Lower the heat and bring it to a simmer. Simmer for 5 minutes. Remove the saucepot from heat and stir in the black pepper. Set the sauce aside.\xa0
', '
Preheat the grill over medium heat. Season the pork with salt. Brush a layer of the honey garlic soy sauce onto the pork chops. Place the pork chops onto the grill. Cook the pork chops until they reach an internal temperature of 145˚F. Flip the pork chops every few minutes and baste with the sauce.\xa0
', '
Remove the pork chops from the grill. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: thai-basil-chicken
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 lb. ground chicken', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 red bell pepper, deseeded and diced', '1 orange bell pepper, deseeded and diced', '½ cup raw cashews', '1 cup basil leaves, torn', '¼ cup mint, torn', 'white rice, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fish sauce', '2 ½ Tbsp. chili paste']
Procedure:
['
Heat the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add in the ground chicken. Break down the chicken into small pieces and cook until brown all over, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and black pepper. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, red bell pepper, orange bell pepper, and raw cashews. Cook for 2-3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, fish sauce, and chili paste. Bring the sauce to a boil over medium-high heat and continue to cook for 5-8 minutes until the sauce coats the chicken. Remove the pan from heat and stir in the basil and mint.\xa0
', '
Serve the chicken with rice and garnish with sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-oil-ice-cream
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '¼ cup brown sugar', '1 pinch salt', '1 cup walnuts', 'vanilla ice cream, for serving', 'Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, for drizzling', 'flaky salt, for topping']
Procedure:
['
Add the unsalted butter, brown sugar, and salt to a small pan. Heat over medium heat until the butter has melted and the mixture begins to bubble around the edges. Mix in the walnuts and cook for 2-3 minutes until they are coated in the brown sugar mixture. Spread the walnuts out onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Allow the candied walnuts to cool for at least 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
To serve, scoop the vanilla ice cream into a bowl. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil on top. Add on some of the candied walnuts and finish with a sprinkle of flaky salt. Enjoy!
', '
N/A
']

Name: spicy-lemongrass-shrimp-with-coconut-rice
Ingredients: ['1 cup jasmine rice', '½ (13.5 oz) can coconut milk', '¾ cup coconut water', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 ½ lbs. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 Tbsp. sake', 'lime wedges, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Marinade: ['4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 stalks lemongrass, roughly chopped and outer leaves peeled', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. coconut sugar', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '3 red chili peppers', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Add the jasmine rice to a fine mesh sieve. Rinse under cold water until it runs clear.\xa0
', '
Pour the coconut milk and coconut water into a pot. Bring the liquid to a boil and then add in the rice. Lower the heat so that the liquid is simmering. Cover the pot with a lid and cook for about 17-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and all of the liquid has been absorbed. Remove the pot from heat and allow it to sit for 15 minutes. Fluff with a fork.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, lemongrass, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, fish sauce, coconut sugar, a tablespoon of vegetable oil, red chili peppers, and salt to a blender. Blend until smooth.\xa0
', '
Add the shrimp to a bowl and pour in the blended marinade. Mix to combine. Marinate the shrimp for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Pour the remaining tablespoon of vegetable oil into a large pan. Heat the pan over medium heat. Place the shrimp into the pan and cook for 1 minute on each side until fully cooked through. Remove the pan from heat.\xa0
', '
Pour the marinade into a small sauce pot. Mix in the sake. Heat over medium high heat and bring the sauce to a boil. Remove the pan from heat. Spoon the sauce over the shrimp. Serve with lime wedges and garnish with sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: tallarin-saltado
Ingredients: ['1 lb. linguine pasta', '1 lb. pork tenderloin, cut into cubes', '4 Tbsp. avocado oil', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 red onion, chopped', '1 red bell pepper, deseeded and sliced', '2 cups chopped cabbage', '3 cups baby spinach', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. aji amarillo spice']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. red wine vinegar', '½ cup reserved pasta water']
Procedure:
['
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add in the linguine and cook according to the package directions. Reserve ½ a cup of pasta water and set it aside. Drain the linguine and rinse under cold water.
', '
Season the pork with black pepper. Heat the avocado oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in the pork and stir fry for 6-7 minutes until almost fully cooked. Remove the pork from the pan.
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and red onion. Cook for 3-4 minutes until the onion turns translucent. Mix in the aji amarillo spice and cook for 1 minute. Stir in the bell pepper, cabbage, and baby spinach. Saute for 3-4 minutes until the vegetables are tender. Add the pork and linguine back into the pan.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, red wine vinegar, and reserved pasta water. Pour the sauce into the pan.
', '
Toss the pasta and sauce together until the pasta is well coated. Remove the pan from heat. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-lettuce-wraps
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 lb. ground pork', '1 red bell pepper, deseeded and diced', '1 green bell pepper, deseeded and diced', '1 yellow onion, diced', 'butter lettuce leaves, for serving', 'cooked white rice, for serving', 'sliced radishes, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Set it aside.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add in the pork. Break the pork down into small pieces and cook until browned and no longer pink. Stir in the red bell pepper, green bell pepper, and yellow onion. Cook for 5-7 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
', '
Pour in the sauce mixture and mix it together with the pork and vegetables. Cook for another 2-3 minutes. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
To serve, fill the butter lettuce cups with rice and the pork mixture. Garnish with sliced radishes and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: ahi-poke-nachos
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sushi grade ahi tuna, diced', '12 oz. wonton chips', '1 avocado, sliced', '1 jalapeño, sliced', '¼ cup sliced radishes', '¼ cup sliced green onion', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. rice vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Add the ahi tuna, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and rice vinegar to a bowl. Toss to combine. Allow the tuna to marinate for at least 2 hours.\xa0
', '
Arrange the wonton chips onto a serving platter. Layer the tuna on top. Drizzle the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo onto the tuna. Add on the sliced avocado, jalapeño, radishes, green onion, white sesame seeds, black sesame seeds, and cilantro leaves. Enjoy!
', '
N/A
']

Name: maple-sriracha-breakfast-sausages
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground pork', '1 lb. ground turkey']
Marinade: ['⅓ cup maple syrup', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. dried thyme', '½ tsp. dried oregano', '½ tsp. salt', 'pinch black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, ground turkey, maple syrup, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, dried thyme, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper. Mix until well combined. Form 2 ½ inch diameter patties.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add the breakfast patties to the pan. Cook for 3-4 minutes until golden brown. Then flip them onto the other side. Cook for another 3-4 minutes until the breakfast patties are fully cooked through. Remove them from the pan and enjoy!\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: teriyaki-chicken-skewers-with-spring-onion
Ingredients: ['1.5 lb. chicken thighs ', '6 strips of spring onion', '8 pcs. bamboo skewer sticks']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Gluten Free Teriyaki Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. corn starch', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Gluten Free Teriyaki Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Wash the chicken thigh and use a paper towel to pat dry, then cut the chicken into short strips, about one inch long. Using only the white part of the spring onion, cut it into strips that are about the same size as the chicken strips. Set aside for later use.\xa0
', '
Mix the chicken strips with the corn starch, vegetable oil, and half of the Lee Kum Kee Gluten Free Teriyaki Sauce, and marinate for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Spear the chicken strips and spring onion segments onto the bamboo skewers.\xa0
', '
Preheat the grill to about 400°F and place the skewers on a baking sheet. While grilling, brush the rest of the Lee Kum Kee Gluten Free Teriyaki Sauce onto the chicken skewers.\xa0
', '
Grill for about 30 minutes until cooked thoroughly. Ready to serve when the skewers are golden brown.\xa0
']

Name: shredded-pork-mushroom-noodle-soup
Ingredients: ['1 lb. noodles', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8 oz. shredded lean pork', '4 pcs shiitake mushrooms', '2 oz. segmented chives (optional) ', '2 Tbsp. chopped scallions']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '2 Tbsp. corn starch', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix the shredded lean pork with the marinade and leave for 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
Bring water to a boil and cook the noodles for 3 minutes, then drain the water and put the noodles into a separate bowl.
', '
Heat oil in the pot and stir fry the shredded pork and mushroom. Add water and Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Mushroom Hot Pot and bring to a boil. Then add chives and allow them to cook for a while. Finally, add the pork mushroom soup to the noodle bowl, sprinkle with scallions and serve.\xa0
']

Name: miso-vermicelli-clam-soup
Ingredients: ['1.5 lb. fresh clams ', '4 oz. vermicelli', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 pcs sliced ginger', '3 strips scallions, diced', '4 pcs sliced red chilis ', '3 Tbsp. rice cooking wine', '4 cups water', '1 bag enoki mushrooms']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Miso Hot Pot', 'Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Soak fresh clams in water for 30 minutes until sand is removed. Soak vermicelli in warm water until they soften up, then drain well and set aside.\xa0
', '
Blanch clams in boiling water until they slightly open, remove from the water and wash clean, then set aside.
', '
Heat the oil in the pot, stir fry the ginger, scallion and red chili slices, and add rice cooking wine. Then pour in water and add half a bag of Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Miso Hot Pot. After bringing it to a boil, add vermicelli, enoki mushrooms and clams and cook until clams open completely.\xa0
', '
Once fully cooked, transfer the soup to a serving pot and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil to serve.\xa0
']

Name: stir-fry-spring-vegetables-with-panda-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '4 oz. cauliflower ', '4 oz. broccoli, florets ', '4 oz. snow peas, removed stems ', '4 oz. squash, yellow, cut into cubes ', '2 oz. shitake mushrooms, removed stem, sliced ', '2 oz. red bell pepper, cut into strips ']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce (or Lee Kum Kee Vegan Oyster Flavored Sauce, if vegetarian)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan, add oil and stir-in all vegetables. Cook for 5 minutes.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce and sugar. Mix well.
', '
Cook vegetables until heated through.
']

Name: chiu-chow-style-avocado-toast
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil ', '1 large egg', '1 avocado, sliced', '1 slice toast', 'lemon juice, to taste ', 'thinly sliced watermelon radish and microgreens, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LkQzY5ilgtg&feature=youtu.be
', '
Spoon only the oil of the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil into a nonstick skillet and heat over medium-high heat.\xa0
', '
Once chili oil is heated, crack the egg in the middle of the chili oil. Season with a pinch of salt and black pepper. Cook until the whites are set and the yolk is still a little runny, about 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
While the egg is cooking, tilt the skillet to spoon some chili oil over the top of the egg.\xa0
', '
To serve, add the sliced avocado to the toast. Season the avocado with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice. Place fried egg on top of avocado toast. Garnish with sliced watermelon radish, microgreens, and an additional spoonful of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Enjoy!
']

Name: greek-chicken-and-rice-skillet
Ingredients: ['6 skin-on chicken thighs', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ red onion, minced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup long grain rice', '2 ½ cups chicken broth', '1 Tbsp. chopped oregano', '3 lemons', '1 cup green olives', '½ cup crumbled feta cheese', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['zest from 1 lemon', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. dried oregano', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LPWPxCQf7iQ&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 375˚F. Zest one of the lemons and add the zest to a small bowl along with the garlic powder and dried oregano. Mix to combine. Season both sides of the chicken with salt and pepper and then spread the mixture over the chicken.
', '
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium heat. Add the chicken to the pan, skin-side down. Sear until the chicken has browned, about 5-8 minutes. Transfer the chicken to a plate and set it aside.\xa0
', '
Add the onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic to the pan. Sauté until the onion turns translucent. Add in the long grain rice and cook for about 1 minute until the rice is coated with the oil. Season with salt. Pour in the chicken broth and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Bring it to a simmer. Mix in the chopped oregano and the juice of 1 lemon. Slice the remaining two lemons and set them aside.
', '
Nestle the chicken into the mixture, skin side up. Bake it in the oven for 20-25 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and the rice has absorbed all of the liquid. Arrange the lemon slices on top of the dish. Broil it for about 3 minutes until the lemon slices have charred and the chicken skin is crispy.
', '
Remove the dish from the oven and add in the green olives and feta cheese. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
