Name: vegan-satay-noodles
Ingredients: ['7 oz. rice noodles', '4 tsp. avocado oil', '7 oz. marinated tofu, cut into cubes', '3 ½ oz. broccoli florets', '1 large bok choy, chopped', '1 red bell pepper, sliced', '1 carrot, julienne', 'chopped peanuts, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup peanut butter', '2 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '4 tsp. rice wine vinegar', '1 Tbsp. maple syrup', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized bowl, combine the peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, rice wine vinegar, maple syrup, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and water. Mix with a whisk until smooth and well combined.
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add in the rice noodles and cook according to the package directions then drain.
', '
Heat 2 teaspoons of the avocado oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add in the tofu and fry on each side for 2-3 minutes until all sides are golden brown. Remove the tofu from the pan and set it aside.
', '
Pour the remaining avocado oil into the pan and heat over medium heat. Add in the broccoli and cook for 1-2 minutes. Then mix in the white parts of the bok choy and cook for another minute. Add in the red bell pepper, carrot, and green parts of the bok choy. Cook for 2 minutes. Remove the cooked vegetables from the pan and set them aside.
', '
Pour the prepared sauce into the pan and allow it to start to bubble. Add in the cooked noodles and mix until all the noodles are coated in the sauce. Then mix in the vegetables and tofu.\xa0
', '
Garnish with chopped peanuts, sliced green onions, and cilantro leaves. Serve with lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: huli-huli-chicken
Ingredients: ['4 lbs. boneless chicken thighs', '1 (20 oz.) can pineapple rings, drained and pat dry', 'sliced green onion, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Marinade: ['1 ½ cups Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the chicken thighs and 1 cup of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce to a large bowl. Mix the chicken together with the sauce until they are well coated. Allow the chicken to marinate for at least 2 hours.\xa0
', '
Heat the grill over medium heat. Add the chicken to the grill and cook for 20-25 minutes. Flip the chicken every 5 minutes and baste with the remaining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Remove the chicken from the grill once it is fully cooked through.
', '
Add the pineapple rings to the grill. Cook until the pineapple rings develop grill marks, about 2 minutes on each side.
', '
Serve the chicken with the grilled pineapple rings. Garnish with sliced green onion and serve with lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: crispy-honey-sriracha-chicken
Ingredients: ['¼ cup vegetable oil', '1 ½ lbs. boneless skin on chicken thighs', 'sliced green onion, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '2 tsp. garlic powder']
Sauce Mix: ['2 ½ Tbsp. honey', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 ½ Tbsp. lime juice', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Season the chicken on both sides with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
', '
Heat the oil in a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken thighs to the pan, skin side down. Cook for 5-6 minutes until the chicken skin is golden brown and crispy. Flip the chicken thighs over and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked through. Remove the chicken from the pan.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the honey, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, lime juice, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce. Whisk until combined then pour it over the chicken thighs. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: korean-style-slaw-hot-dogs
Ingredients: ['½ head green cabbage, shredded', '½ head red cabbage, shredded', '2 carrots, fine julienne', '8 beef hot dogs', '8 brioche hot dog buns', 'mustard, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup ketchup', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
To make the slaw, add Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, light brown sugar, dijon mustard, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to a bowl. Whisk until combined and set it aside. Add the green cabbage, red cabbage and carrots to a large bowl. Pour in the prepared dressing and toss until combined. Set it aside.\xa0
', '
To make the spicy ketchup, combine the ketchup, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger in a bowl. Whisk until combined and set it aside.
', '
Heat the grill over medium heat. Add the hot dogs to the grill and cook until cooked through. Toast the buns on the grill, if desired.
', '
Place a hot dog into each bun. Add the slaw mix on top. Then drizzle the spicy ketchup and mustard on top. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: grilled-pork-tenderloin-with-pineapple-salsa
Ingredients: ['1 ⅓ lbs. pork tenderloin', '2 cups diced pineapple', '¾ cup diced red onion', '¼ cup cilantro, chopped', '3 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 serrano pepper, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. lime juice', '¼ tsp. salt']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 green onions, chopped', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Procedure:
['
Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, green onions, Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and vegetable oil to a bowl. Mix until combined then add in the pork tenderloin. Allow it to marinate for at least 1 hour.
', '
In the meantime, combine the pineapple, red onion, cilantro, olive oil, lime juice, serrano pepper, and salt in a bowl. Toss until well combined. Set the pineapple salsa aside.\xa0
', '
Heat the grill over medium-high heat. Allow the excess marinade to drip off the pork then add it to the grill. Cook on one side for 7-8 minutes. Flip the pork tenderloin over and cook on the other side for 6-7 minutes. Turn off the heat and close the grill. Allow the pork to continue cooking for 5 minutes in the closed grill until cooked through.
', '
Remove the pork from the grill and allow it to sit for 10 minutes before slicing. Serve with the pineapple salsa and enjoy!
']

Name: grilled-lemon-artichoke-and-ricotta-flatbread
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 large flatbread', '1 ¼ cups grated mozzarella cheese', '1 ½ cups marinated artichoke hearts', '½ lemon, thinly sliced', '1 cup arugula']
Seasoning: ['1-2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['1 ½ cups ricotta', 'zest and juice from 1 lemon', '¾ tsp. ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine the ricotta, lemon zest, lemon juice, and black pepper.
', '
Heat a grill over high heat. Brush the olive oil on both sides of the flatbread. Place the flatbread on the grill and cook until warm and toasted, about 2 minutes on each side.
', '
Remove the flatbread from the grill and spread the ricotta mixture onto the flatbread. Top with the grated mozzarella. Add the artichoke hearts and lemon slices on top. Place the flatbread back on the grill and cook for 3 minutes or until the mozzarella is melted.\xa0
', '
Remove the flatbread from the grill. Add the arugula on top. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil over the top. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: mango-mandarin-sesame-shrimp-salad
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '2 tsp. olive oil', '8 cups mixed greens', '1 mango, peeled and sliced', '1 cup mandarin oranges', '1 cup shelled edamame', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Marinade: ['½ cup vegetable oil', '⅓ cup rice vinegar', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. ground ginger']
Procedure:
['
Add the vegetable oil, rice vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, granulated sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and ground ginger to a blender. Blend until smooth.
', '
Pour ⅓ of the dressing into a bowl. Add in the shrimp and mix until well coated. Marinate the shrimp for 10-30 minutes. Reserve the remaining dressing for serving.\xa0
', '
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Drain the shrimp from the marinade and add them to the pan. Cook the shrimp for 2-3 minutes on each side until they are fully cooked. Remove the shrimp from the pan.
', '
Add the mixed greens, mango, mandarin oranges, and edamame to a salad bowl. Top with the shrimp. Garnish with sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: thai-style-tom-yum-soup
Ingredients: ['1.5 lb. shrimp (heads on)', '1 can canned straw mushrooms', '4–6 strips sliced cilantro', '6 oz. fried bean curd', '4 Tbsp.\tvegetable oil', '7 cups water']
Seasoning: ['1 pack Lee Kum Kee Soup Base For Tom Yum Hot Pot']
Procedure:
['
Devein the shrimp and rinse clean. Boil the shrimp in water for about 30 seconds, remove from the heat and drain.
', '
Wash the straw mushrooms. Chop the straw mushrooms and fried bean curd into halves.\xa0
', '
Heat up the soup pot and add oil. Pour in the water and season with the Lee Kum Kee Soup Base For Tom Yum Hot Pot. Once it comes to a boil, add the shrimp, straw mushrooms and fried bean curd, turn the heat down and simmer for 2–3 minutes. Garnish with cilantro and serve.
']

Name: abalone-hand-rolls
Ingredients: ['2 sheets nori', '1 cup cooked rice', '4 pcs green lettuce leaves', '2 oz. ham, sliced into thin strips ', '2 oz. shredded carrots', '2 oz. shredded cucumber ', '2 cans Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce (4 pcs)']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Sauce from Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Cut nori sheets in half.
', '
Stir sauce from Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar into cooked rice until mixed thoroughly, and set aside.
', '
Take one half sheet of nori, place one green lettuce leaf on it, then layer one quarter of the ham, shredded carrots, shredded cucumber and seasoned cooked rice on top.
', '
Place two pieces of the Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce on top, and roll the sheet into a trumpet-shaped hand roll.
', '
Repeat with the rest of the ingredients.
']

Name: homemade-deluxe-surf-and-turf
Ingredients: ['16 oz. ribeye steak', '8 oz. lobster tail, 2 tails', '8 cups water, to boil', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored With Chicken (No MSG)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 Tbsp. fresh parsley, chopped']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 sprigs rosemary', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Coarse Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
To prep the steak: add the marinade to the steak and set aside for 30 minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, cook the lobster tails: boil the water in a pot. Cook the lobster tails until the shell turns bright red. Remove the lobster tails and let them cool.
', '
Combine all the seasoning ingredients for the lobster tails in a saucepan and cook over medium heat for 2 minutes. Put lobster seasoning sauce aside.
', '
Cook the steak: in a medium-sized pan, heat the oil for 3 minutes over high heat or until it begins to smoke. For a medium rare steak, sear the steak for 3 minutes on each side or until desired level of doneness is achieved, and then remove from the pan. Set aside to rest for 10 mins.\xa0\xa0
', '
Place the steak and lobster tails on a plate. Brush the lobster tails with cooked seasoning sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-shrimp-and-broccoli
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 cups broccoli florets ', '1 ½ lbs. shrimp, shelled and deveined', 'sliced scallion, for garnish ', 'sesame seeds, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', 'salt, to taste ', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=211QYzZesXQ
', '
Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Once hot, add Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Minced Garlic. Sauté for 30 seconds then add in the broccoli. Cook the broccoli until tender, about 3 minutes, stirring constantly.\xa0
', '
Add shrimp and stir fry until they just begin to turn pink, about 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and season with salt and pepper. Continue to cook until the shrimp and broccoli are fully coated in the sauce, about 1-2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Garnish with sliced scallion and sesame seeds. Enjoy!\xa0\xa0
']

Name: summer-squash-soup
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ cup minced yellow onion', '2 cups diced yellow summer squash', '1 cup peeled and diced yukon gold potato', '¼ cup diced carrot', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¾ tsp. cumin powder', '½ tsp. coriander powder', '½ tsp. turmeric powder', '½ tsp. smoked paprika', '¼ tsp. mustard powder', '¼ tsp. cinnamon', 'pinch of cayenne pepper', '¼ cup dry white wine', '2 cups vegetable broth', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '¼ cup coconut milk', 'additional coconut milk for topping', 'pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Odbv435r9TI
', '
Heat a pot over medium-low heat. Add in the olive oil and the onion. Cook until the onions are translucent, about 4-5 minutes. Add in the squash, potato, and carrot. Cook for about 5 minutes until the squash begins to soften. Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric, smoked paprika, mustard powder, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper. Cook for another minute.\xa0
', '
Pour in the wine. Use a wooden spoon to scrape any browned bits from the bottom of the pot. Allow some of the wine to evaporate before pouring in the vegetable broth and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Bring the soup to a boil then lower the heat so that it is simmering. Simmer for 10-15 minutes until the potatoes are tender.
', '
Blend the soup with an immersion blender or in a blender until smooth. Mix in the coconut milk and heat the soup for 5 minutes. Ladle the soup into bowls. Drizzle additional coconut milk on top and garnish with cilantro leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-thai-spaghetti-salad
Ingredients: ['8 oz. spaghetti', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '1 cup shredded carrots', '1 bunch green onions, sliced', '½ cup roasted peanuts', '2 Tbsp. sesame seeds', '1 handful cilantro leaves, chopped', '1 handful basil leaves, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['pinch of salt']
Procedure:
['
Add the Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, cayenne pepper, and a pinch of salt to a bullet blender. Blend until the dressing is smooth and emulsified. Set it aside.
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add in a pinch of salt along with the spaghetti. Cook the spaghetti according to the package directions. Drain the spaghetti and rinse under cold water until it is cool to the touch. Drain any excess water.
', '
In a large bowl, combine the spaghetti, red cabbage, carrots, green onions, peanuts, sesame seeds, cilantro, basil, and prepared dressing. Toss to combine and enjoy!
']

Name: miso-fish-burger-with-pickled-cucumber-slaw
Ingredients: ['4 (4 oz.) halibut filets', '2 Persian cucumbers, peeled into ribbons', '2 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar', '1 Tbsp. avocado oil', '1 carrot, peeled and julienned', '½ cup shredded red cabbage', '4 brioche rolls']
Seasoning: ['2 ½ Tbsp. wasabi mayo', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for serving']
Marinade: ['⅓ cup miso paste', '¼ cup mirin', '2 Tbsp. orange juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Combine the miso paste, mirin, orange juice, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce in a large bowl. Add in the halibut filets and mix so that the halibut is coated. Allow the halibut to marinate in the fridge for about 1 hour.\xa0
', '
Place the cucumber ribbons into a bowl. Pour in the rice wine vinegar and toss to combine. Allow the cucumber to sit for about 10 minutes then drain any excess liquid from the bowl. Set it aside.
', '
Heat the avocado oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Pat the marinated halibut filets dry with paper towels. Add the filets to the pan and cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until they are fully cooked.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, toss together the carrot, red cabbage, and wasabi mayo.
', '
Add the cabbage mixture to the bottom half of the brioche buns. Top with a halibut filet. Layer the pickled cucumber on top. Finish with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Place the top half of the brioche bun on top and enjoy!
']

Name: summer-salmon-teriyaki-salad
Ingredients: ['4 (4 oz.) salmon fillets', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 zucchini, sliced into half-moons', '1 cup grilled corn kernels', '½ cup frozen peas, thawed', '6 cups mixed greens', '2 cups halved strawberries']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup + 1 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. mirin', '3 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
For the Strawberry Almond Dressing: add the olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, shallots, almonds, strawberries, lime juice, lime zest, and salt to a bullet blender. Blend until smooth and combined. Set it aside.\xa0
', '
For the Teriyaki Sauce: add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, ¼ cup of the water, mirin, honey, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger to a sauce pot. Mix to combine and heat it over medium heat. In a small bowl, mix together the cornstarch and remaining tablespoon of water. Once the sauce comes to a boil, reduce the heat to medium low and add in the cornstarch mixture. Allow it to simmer for 1 minute then remove the sauce from heat.\xa0
', '
For the Salad: preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Place the salmon filets onto the baking sheet and season them with salt. Brush the prepared teriyaki sauce all over the salmon. Bake it in the oven for 12-15 minutes or until fully cooked. Remove the salmon from the oven and brush more teriyaki sauce on top.
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add in the olive oil and zucchini. Sauté the zucchini for 2 minutes. Add in the corn and peas. Sauté for another 2 minutes. Season with salt, to taste. Remove the vegetables from the pan and allow them to cool slightly.\xa0
', '
Portion the mixed greens into serving bowls. Distribute the sautéed vegetables and strawberries between the bowls. Top each bowl with a salmon fillet. Serve with the strawberry almond dressing and enjoy!
']

Name: tex-mex-3-bean-potato-salad
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baby potatoes, sliced in half', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ cup grilled corn', '½ cup chopped red bell pepper', '½ cup chopped yellow bell pepper', '½ cup chopped green bell pepper', '¼ cup diced red onion', '¼ cup sliced green onion', '½ cup kidney beans, drained and rinsed', '½ cup black beans, drained and rinsed', '½ cup chickpeas, drained and rinsed', '¼ cup chopped cilantro']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 450˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.\xa0
', '
In a large bowl, combine the potatoes, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Toss until the potatoes are coated. Spread them onto the prepared baking sheet. Bake the potatoes in the oven for 25-30 minutes, flipping them halfway through. Remove the potatoes from the oven and cool until they are just slightly warm.
', '
In a medium sized bowl, add in the water, canola oil, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, granulated sugar, cumin, chili powder, and salt to taste. Whisk until combined.
', '
In a large bowl, add in the potatoes, grilled corn, red bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, green bell pepper, red onion, green onion, kidney beans, black beans, chickpeas, cilantro, and prepared dressing. Toss to combine and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-grilled-chicken-and-pineapple-skewers
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. chicken breast, cut into 1” cubes', '1 small pineapple, cut into 1” cubes', '1 large red onion, cut into 1” squares', 'chopped cilantro, for garnish', 'white rice, for serving']
Marinade: ['¾ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the chicken and a ½ cup of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce to a bowl. Mix the chicken together with the sauce. Allow it to marinate in the fridge for at least 6 hours.\xa0
', '
Thread the chicken, pineapple, and red onion onto barbeque skewers.
', '
Preheat the grill to a medium-high heat. Add the skewers to the grill and cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side. Brush the remaining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce onto the skewers in the last minute of cooking.
', '
Remove the skewers from the grill. Garnish with cilantro and serve with white rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-burrata-tomato-appetizer
Ingredients: ['10 oz. cherry heirloom tomatoes', '2 Tbsp. chopped Calabrian chilies', '1 Tbsp. capers', '¼ cup chopped parsley', '1 loaf ciabatta, cut into ½ inch thick slices', '¼ cup olive oil', '1-2 garlic cloves', '2 large burrata balls']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '2 Tbsp. red wine vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'kosher salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350˚F.
', '
In a large bowl, add in the cherry heirloom tomatoes, Calabrian chilies, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, red wine vinegar, capers, parsley, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, kosher salt, and black pepper. Toss to combine and allow it to marinate for at least 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Arrange the sliced ciabatta onto a baking sheet. Drizzle both sides with the olive oil. Bake them in the oven for 12-15 minutes until golden brown and toasted. Remove the baking sheet from the oven and rub garlic cloves onto the ciabatta.
', '
Arrange the burrata in a shallow dish. Pour the marinated tomato mixture over the burrata. Serve with the garlic ciabatta. Enjoy!
']

Name: slow-cooker-pulled-pork-banh-mi-sandwiches
Ingredients: ['4 lbs. pork shoulder, fat trimmed and cut into large chunks', '3 carrots, peeled and julienned', '1 jalapeño, thinly sliced', '½ cup water', '2 fresh baguettes', 'cilantro stalks, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Chinese five spice powder']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. dry sherry cooking wine', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
Add the pork and Chinese five spice powder to a bowl. Rub the Chinese five spice powder onto the pork and allow it to sit for 5 minutes.
', '
In a separate bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, honey, sherry cooking wine, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger.
', '
Add the pork and prepared sauce into a slow cooker. Mix to combine. Cook on low for 8 hours, stirring halfway through. When the pork is tender and cooked through, shred it into pieces.
', '
While the pork is cooking, add the carrots and jalapeños to a bowl. Add in half of the salt and half of the sugar. Toss to combine and let it sit for 10 minutes to draw out the moisture. Rinse with water and drain.
', '
In a separate bowl, whisk the rice vinegar, water, remaining half of the salt, and remaining half of the sugar together until the salt and sugar dissolve. Pour this mixture over the vegetables and allow them to pickle for at least 1 hour.\xa0\xa0
', '
To assemble the banh mi, slice the baguettes in half. Spread Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo onto one half of the baguettes. Then layer on the pulled pork, pickled vegetables, and cilantro. Place the top half of the baguette on top and cut the baguette into the desired serving sizes. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: spring-pea-orzo-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['⅔ cup orzo', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup snap peas', '3 large eggs, beaten ', '1 cup frozen green peas, thawed', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add in a pinch of salt along with the orzo. Cook the orzo according to the package directions. Drain the orzo and rinse under cold water until it is cool to the touch. Drain any excess water.
', '
Heat a large pan over medium heat. Add in the olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook for 1 minute. Add in the snap peas and cook for about 3 minutes until tender.\xa0
', '
Mix the cooked orzo and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce into the pan. Push everything to one side of the pan. Pour in the beaten eggs and scramble. Add the green peas into the pan and continue to cook until the peas are warmed through. Remove the pan from heat and season with salt and pepper to taste. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: jalapeno-popper-deviled-eggs
Ingredients: ['6 large eggs', '6 slices bacon', '1 jalapeño pepper, sliced']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. cream cheese', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1 tsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 jalapeño pepper, minced', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Fill a pot with water. Add the eggs into the water, making sure that the water covers the eggs by at least 1 inch. Heat over medium high heat and bring the water to a boil. Once the water boils, turn off the heat and cover the pot with a lid. Allow the eggs to sit for 10 minutes. Remove the eggs from the pot and place them into a bowl of ice water to cool for about 8 minutes. Peel the shells off of the eggs and slice each egg in half, lengthwise. Remove the yolks from the center of the eggs and add them into a bowl. Set the egg whites aside.
', '
Heat a medium sized pan over medium heat. Add the bacon strips into the pan and fry on both sides until brown and crispy. Remove the bacon from the pan and place them onto a plate lined with paper towels to drain. When the bacon is cool enough to handle, chop the strips into tiny bits. Reserve 1 tablespoon of bacon and set it aside for topping.
', '
Use a fork to smash the yolks. Add in the cream cheese, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, apple cider vinegar, minced jalapeño, and bacon. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix until combined.
', '
Transfer the mixture into a piping bag. Fill the center of the egg whites with the filling. Top with the reserved crumbled bacon and a jalapeño slice. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegetarian-tofu-poke-bowls
Ingredients: ['8 oz. extra firm tofu', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 cups cooked white rice', '1 cup shaved red cabbage', '2 Tbsp. pickled ginger', '1 cup sliced cucumbers', '¼ cup sliced radishes', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, for serving', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish ']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Cut the tofu into 2” squares, about ¼” thick. In a bowl, mix together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Add in the tofu and allow it to marinate for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium high heat. Add the marinated tofu to the pan and cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side until it develops a golden brown crust. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
Evenly distribute the tofu, white rice, red cabbage, pickled ginger, sliced cucumber, and radishes between two bowls. Drizzle additional Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on top. Garnish with black sesame seeds, white sesame seeds, and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-sriracha-chicken-and-broccoli-meal-prep-bowls
Ingredients: ['olive oil spray', '1 egg white, beaten', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '3 chicken breasts, cut into 1” pieces', '1 head broccoli, cut into florets', '2 cups cooked white rice', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1 ¼ tsp. kosher salt', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a large baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray generously with olive oil spray. Place the egg white and cornstarch into separate bowls. Coat the chicken in the egg white then toss them in the cornstarch. Season with ¾\xa0 teaspoon of the kosher salt. Place the chicken on one half of the baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Remove the chicken from the oven and flip them onto the other side. Add the broccoli florets to the other half of the baking tray. Drizzle 2 teaspoons of the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil on top and season with the remaining kosher salt and ½ teaspoon of black pepper. Toss to combine the ingredients with the broccoli. Bake the broccoli and chicken for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Combine 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, honey, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar in a large bowl. Add in the chicken and toss until it is completely coated in the sauce.\xa0
', '
Portion a ½ cup of rice to each meal prep container. Then evenly portion the chicken and broccoli between each of the four meal prep containers. Garnish with black sesame seeds, white sesame seeds, and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-steak-with-cucumber-salad
Ingredients: ['12 oz. skirt steak', '1 English cucumber, sliced', '2 Tbsp. roasted peanuts, chopped']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. granulated sugar', '1 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar', 'large pinch of salt']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1” piece of ginger, peeled and grated', '2 garlic cloves, crushed', '1 red chili pepper, deseeded and minced', '2 green onions, sliced', '⅓ cup roughly chopped cilantro leaves']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the grill on medium high heat. In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce. Brush the marinade onto both sides of the steak then place it onto the grill. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until the steak reaches your desired level of doneness. Remove the steak from the grill and place it onto a cutting board to rest.
', '
Add the cucumber, granulated sugar, rice wine vinegar, and a pinch of salt to a large bowl. Toss to combine and place it in the fridge for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, grated ginger, garlic, red chili pepper, green onion, and cilantro. Mix until well combined. Drain the liquid from the bowl of cucumbers. Pour in the prepared sauce and toss to combine. Sprinkle in the chopped peanuts.\xa0
', '
Slice the steak against the grain and serve with the cucumber salad. Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: meal-prep-chipotle-chicken-bowls
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. boneless, skinless chicken breast, cut into 1" pieces', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 cups cooked brown rice', '4 cups shredded lettuce', '1 (15 oz.) can black beans, drained and rinsed', '½ cup shredded cheddar cheese blend', '1 cup salsa', '1 avocado, sliced', '½ cup plain Greek yogurt', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Marinade: ['2-3 chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, roughly chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'juice from 1 lime', '1 tsp. onion powder', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '¼ tsp. ground black pepper', '½ tsp. kosher salt']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, add in the chipotle peppers, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, lime juice, onion powder, garlic powder, ground cumin, 1 tablespoon of the olive oil, ground black pepper, and kosher salt. Mix until well combined.
', '
Place the chicken into an airtight storage container and pour in the marinade.
', '
Seal the container then shake to coat the chicken. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours. When you’re ready to cook the chicken, remove it from the refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for about 10 minutes.
', '
Add the remaining tablespoon of olive oil to a large pan and heat over medium-high heat. Add in the marinated chicken and cook until browned, about 5-8 minutes. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
Divide the rice equally among 4 serving bowls or meal prep containers. Portion the lettuce, black beans, cheese, and chicken between the bowls.
', '
When ready to eat, add in the salsa, avocado, and a dollop of Greek yogurt. Top with cilantro and serve with a lime wedge. Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-chili
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef', '1 onion, diced', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1” piece of ginger, grated', '1 ½ cups chopped carrots', '1 cup diced tomatoes', 'sliced avocado, for serving', 'sliced radishes, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for serving', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cups chicken broth', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '⅓ cup coconut aminos', '2 tsp. fish sauce', '1 tsp. apple cider vinegar', '½ tsp. Chinese five spice', '2 tsp. coconut sugar']
Procedure:
['
Heat a pot over medium heat. Add in the ground beef and cook until browned. Season with salt and pepper and crumble the beef into pieces. Remove the beef from the pot and set it aside. Drain all but 2 tablespoons of the grease from the pot.\xa0
', '
Add in the onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and ginger. Sauté until the onion turns translucent. Then add in the carrots, chicken broth, diced tomatoes, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, coconut aminos, fish sauce, apple cider vinegar, Chinese five spice, and coconut sugar. Mix until combined and bring the chili to a low boil.
', '
Reduce the heat so that the chili is simmering and simmer for 35 minutes until the vegetables are tender and the chili has slightly reduced.\xa0
', '
Remove the chili from heat and serve with sliced avocado, radishes, green onions, and lime wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-garlic-shrimp-with-snow-peas
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '4-6 garlic cloves', '20 shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 lb. snow peas, trimmed', 'white rice, for serving (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. cold water', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Shaoxing cooking wine', '1 tsp. chili flakes']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Uszx0I_H20c
', '
Add the cornstarch and water to a small bowl. Mix until the cornstarch dissolves.
', '
In a separate bowl, mix the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Shaoxing cooking wine, and chili flakes together. Pour in the cornstarch mixture and mix until well combined.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add in the butter and garlic. Allow the garlic to cook for about 30 seconds.\xa0
', '
Add in the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked through, about 5 minutes. Then mix in the snow peas and cook until they turn a vibrant green color, about 1 minute. Pour in the sauce mixture and cook it with the shrimp and snow peas for about 1-2 more minutes. Remove the pan from heat and serve with white rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegan-korean-potato-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 lb. baby potatoes', '2 cups water', '1 ⅔ Tbsp. and 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds', '1 large carrot, peeled and julienned', '1 medium cucumber, julienned', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. baby spinach', 'white rice, for serving', 'toasted sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onion, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 ½ Tbsp. and 2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. and 1 ½ tsp. agave ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. rice wine vinegar', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
For the Potatoes: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the potatoes to the pan and cover with a lid. Cook the potatoes for about 15 minutes, shaking the pan every few minutes. Add in ⅔ tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for 30 seconds. Pour in the water, 2 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, 2 tablespoons of the agave, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and ½ tablespoon of the rice wine vinegar. Slightly increase the heat and bring the sauce to a simmer. Cook until the potatoes are tender and the sauce has thickened. Remove the pan from heat and mix in 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and toasted sesame seeds.
', '
For the Carrots: Combine the carrots, ½ tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, ½ teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and ½ teaspoon of the agave in a medium sized bowl. Mix until combined and set it aside.
', '
For the Cucumbers: Combine the cucumber, 1 tablespoon of the rice wine vinegar, 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, 2 teaspoons of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and 1 teaspoon of the agave in a medium sized bowl. Mix until combined and set it aside.
', '
For the Spinach: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium high heat. Add in 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sauté for 30 seconds. Add the spinach to the pan and cook until the leaves wilt down, about 5 minutes. Turn off the heat and season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
For Serving: Add a portion of the potatoes, carrots, cucumber, spinach, and white rice to each bowl. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: moroccan-style-eggs
Ingredients: ['½ onion, diced', '4 garlic cloves, roughly chopped', '1 lb. ground lamb', '14 oz. can fire-roasted diced tomatoes', '¼ cup water', '2 cups spinach', '6 eggs', 'cilantro, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. fennel seeds', '½ tsp. cumin seeds', '½ tsp. caraway seeds', '1 tsp. salt', '2 tsp. smoked paprika', '2 tsp. ground cumin', '½ tsp. Aleppo chili flakes', '½ tsp. cinnamon', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375˚F. Heat a small pan over medium heat. Add the fennel seeds, cumin seeds, and caraway seeds. Toast the spices until fragrant then remove them from the pan.
', '
Heat a cast iron skillet over medium heat. Add in the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion turns translucent. Then add the lamb to the pan. Cook and crumble the lamb until it is cooked through. Add in the salt, smoked paprika, ground cumin, Aleppo chili flakes, cinnamon, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and the toasted spices to the lamb. Mix until combined then add in the fire roasted tomatoes, water, and spinach. Mix until the spinach wilts. Cover the pan and simmer the mixture on low heat for 10 minutes.
', '
Remove the cover from the pan and use a spoon to create 6 divots in the mixture. Crack each of the eggs into each of the divots. Season the eggs with salt and pepper. Place the pan into the oven and bake for 7-10 minutes until the egg whites are cooked and the yolks are still soft.
', '
Remove the pan from the oven and garnish with cilantro. Enjoy!
']

Name: slow-cooker-honey-sriracha-chicken
Ingredients: ['6-7 boneless skinless chicken thighs', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '¼ cup water', 'cooked white rice, for serving', 'steamed broccoli, for serving', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['¾ cup honey', '¾ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 garlic cloves, crushed', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Add the chicken thighs to a 5 quart slow cooker. In a small bowl, whisk together the honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Add the sauce to the slow cooker. Cook on low for 4-6 hours or high for 3-4 hours.
', '
Remove the chicken from the slow cooker and shred with two forks. Whisk together the cornstarch and water in a small bowl. Mix it into the sauce in the slow cooker. Place the shredded chicken back into the slow cooker and let it cook for another 15 minutes to let the sauce thicken.
', '
Serve with white rice and broccoli. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-white-bean-dip
Ingredients: ['Assorted vegetables, breads, and crackers for dipping']
Procedure:
['
Add the cannellini beans, reserved bean liquid, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, cumin, and kosher salt to a food processor. Blend for 30 seconds, scraping down the sides if needed.
', '
Stream in the olive oil while the mixture is blending and blend until smooth.
', '
Transfer the dip into a dish and garnish with a drizzle of olive oil and chopped parsley.
', '
Serve with assorted vegetables, breads, and crackers. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: bibimbap-bowl
Ingredients: ['8 oz. ground beef', '10 tsp. vegetable oil', '8 oz. sliced shiitake mushrooms', '2 carrots, cut into batons', '2 zucchinis, cut into batons', '1 bunch spinach', '4 cups bean sprouts', '4 cups cooked white rice', '4 fried eggs', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ tsp. granulated sugar', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 ¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt, to taste', '¼ tsp. fish sauce']
Marinade: ['¼ green apple, grated', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. gochujang paste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tbsp. mirin', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 tsp. white sugar', '1 garlic clove, minced', '2 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine the apple, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, honey, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil together in a bowl. Then add in the ground beef and mix it together with the marinade. Set the beef aside to marinate for 30 minutes. Heat a pan over medium high heat, then add in 2 tsp. of vegetable oil. Add the marinated beef to the pan and cook until fully cooked through. Remove the beef from the pan and set it aside for later.\xa0
', '
To create the sauce, combine all of the sauce mix ingredients together in a bowl until the sugar dissolves. Set it aside for later.
', '
For the vegetables: Heat 2 tsp. of the vegetable oil in a pan over medium high heat. Add in the shiitake mushrooms and cook for about 2 minutes. Then add in 1 ½ tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, ¼ tsp. sugar, and ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook for 1 minute, then remove the mushrooms from the pan.
', '
To cook the carrots, heat 2 tsp. of the vegetable oil in a pan over medium high heat. Cook for about 5-8 minutes until tender. Then remove the carrots from the pan. To cook the zucchini, heat 2 tsp. of the vegetable oil in a pan over medium high heat. Cook for about 4 minutes until tender. Then remove the zucchini from the pan.
', '
To cook the spinach, heat 2 tsp. of the vegetable oil in a pan along with ¼ tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Add in the spinach and cook until it begins to wilt. Then add in ½ tsp. of garlic and salt to taste. To cook the bean sprouts, steam them in the microwave for 3 minutes until slightly wilted. Rinse and drain them under cold water then squeeze out the excess water. Place the bean sprouts into a bowl and mix it together with 2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and ¼ tsp. fish sauce.
', '
To serve: Distribute the rice between the serving bowls and top each bowl with the beef, vegetables, a fried egg, the sauce, and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-beef-noodle-soup
Ingredients: ['6 oz. Yangchun noodles  ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3.5 oz. brisket, diced', '½ Tbsp. dried chili peppers, chopped', '1 Tbsp. green onion, chopped, to garnish']
Procedure:
['
Cook the noodles in boiling water for 3 minutes. Drain the noodles and rinse with cold water, then place in a bowl and set aside.
', '
In a heated pan, add oil and stir fry the brisket and dried chili pepper. Add the Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Mala Beef Noodles and the water and bring to a boil. Pour the soup onto the noodles, scatter with the chopped green onion and serve.\xa0\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: dan-dan-noodles
Ingredients: ['6 oz. Yangchun noodles ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3.5 oz. minced pork', '1 Tbsp. green onion, chopped, to garnish', '1 Tbsp. peanuts, crushed, to garnish']
Procedure:
['
Cook the noodles in boiling water for 3 minutes. Drain the noodles and rinse with cold water, then place in a bowl and set aside.
', '
In a heated pan, add oil and stir fry the minced pork for about 3 minutes until browned. Add the Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Style Dan Dan Noodles and the water and bring to a boil for. Once the minced pork is cooked through (about 2 minutes), pour the soup onto the noodles. Scatter with the chopped green onion and crushed peanuts and serve.
', '
N/A
']

Name: brown-rice-and-kale-salad
Ingredients: ['1 cup uncooked brown rice', '2 cups water', '½ cup pepitas', 'drizzle extra virgin olive oil', '3 cups kale, chopped', '½ cup thinly sliced radishes', '1 Tbsp. hemp seeds', '1 Tbsp. white sesame seeds', '1 Tbsp. black sesame seeds', '½ cup mung bean sprouts', '1/4 tsp. red pepper flakes', 'squeeze of fresh lime juice', '1 avocado, sliced']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. black pepper', '¼ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ScpT6CmJRbs
', '
Cook the brown rice according to the package directions. Set it aside to cool.
', '
Preheat the oven to a low broil. Mix the pepitas, olive oil, black pepper, and salt together until combined. Broil for 1-2 minutes until lightly browned and set it aside.
', '
In a large bowl, combine the brown rice, kale, radishes, hemp seeds, white sesame seeds, black sesame seeds, and mung bean sprouts. Toss until combined. Add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, red pepper flakes, a squeeze of fresh lime juice, and the roasted pepitas. Give the salad another toss. Add the sliced avocado on top and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-tangerine-beef
Ingredients: ['1 lb. (16 oz.) beef tenderloin, cut into thin strips', '2 Tbsp. canola oil', '1 large carrot, thinly sliced ', 'half of a yellow onion, thinly sliced ', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. water', 'white rice and steamed broccoli, for serving', 'toasted sesame seeds, sliced scallions, and tangerine zest, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. oil ']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. minced fresh ginger', '¼ cup sherry wine ', '¼ cup honey', '1/4 cup freshly squeezed tangerine juice']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-pTo9BOI72M&feature=youtu.be
', '
Place sliced beef tenderloin in a large bowl and toss with cornstarch. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and oil. Mix ingredients together and let marinate while mixing the spicy tangerine sauce.\xa0
', '
Whisk together Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, minced ginger, sherry wine, honey and tangerine juice until completely combined.
', '
Heat the canola oil in a large wok over high heat. Add the beef and let sear for 2-3 minutes. Add sliced carrot and yellow onion and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
', '
Add the sauce mix and cornstarch slurry. Cook for another 2 minutes until the sauce thickens. Add salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Serve over rice and broccoli. Garnish with sesame seeds, scallions and tangerine zest. Finish with Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil (optional). Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: vietnamese-style-scallops
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 lb. scallops, patted dry', '¼ cup sliced green onion', '¼ cup chopped peanuts']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 tsp. orange juice', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. granulated sugar', '1 red chili pepper, deseeded and minced']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine the lime juice, orange juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, granulated sugar and red chili pepper. Stir until the sugar dissolves. Then mix in the green onion.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Add in the vegetable oil. Season the scallops with the salt. Add the scallops to the pan and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown and fully cooked through. Remove the scallops from the pan and place them into a shallow dish.\xa0
', '
Mix the chopped peanuts into the sauce then pour it over the scallops. Enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-peanut-udon-salad-with-shredded-chicken
Ingredients: ['2 (8 oz.) packages frozen udon', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 scallions, sliced', '8 oz. chicken breast, cooked and shredded', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '2 Tbsp. tahini', '1 Tbsp. peanut butter', '½ tsp. coconut sugar', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes']
Procedure:
['
Cook the frozen udon according to the package directions.\xa0
', '
Add 1 tablespoon of the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, rice vinegar, tahini, peanut butter, coconut sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and crushed red pepper flakes to a bowl. Whisk until smooth and well combined.\xa0
', '
Heat the remaining tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a small pan over medium high heat. Add in ⅔ of the sliced scallions and cook until crisped, about 3-4 minutes. Remove the scallions from the pan.
', '
Add the udon, prepared sauce, and crisped scallions to a bowl. Toss everything together until the noodles are well coated. Portion the noodles into serving dishes and top with shredded chicken, remaining sliced scallions, black sesame seeds, and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: black-rice-salad
Ingredients: ['1 cup black rice', '2 cups water', '1 cup whole raw cashews', '3 cups baby bok choy, chopped into bite sized pieces', '1 ½ cups diced red bell pepper', '1 cup diced mango', '¼ cup sliced green onion', '2 Tbsp. Thai basil, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'additional sesame seeds, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the black rice well and drain. Add the rice and water to a medium sized sauce pot. Bring the water to a boil. Turn the heat to low and cover the pot with a lid. Cook for about 25-30 minutes until all of the water has been absorbed and the rice is tender. Fluff the rice with a fork and transfer it to a large mixing bowl. Place it into the fridge to cool.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper then add the cashews to the baking sheet. Bake the cashews in the oven for 12-14 minutes until toasted and golden. Roughly chop the cashews and set them aside.
', '
In a bowl, add in the coconut milk, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, curry powder, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, red pepper flakes, and Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce. Whisk until well combined.\xa0
', '
Remove the bowl of rice from the fridge. Add the bok choy, red bell pepper, mango, green onion, Thai basil, and sesame seeds to the bowl. Pour in half of the prepared dressing and toss the salad together. Taste and add more dressing if needed.\xa0
', '
Garnish with cilantro and sesame seeds. Serve with lime wedges and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-chili-garlic-tofu
Ingredients: ['1 (16 oz.) package extra-firm tofu, drained', '½ cup cornstarch', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ lb. green beans, ends trimmed', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', 'white rice, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 ½ Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Wrap the tofu in paper towels and transfer it onto a plate. Place a heavy pan on top of the tofu and allow it to sit for 30 minutes to drain. Cut the tofu into ½” cubes.
', '
Add the cornstarch into a resealable plastic bag. Then add in the tofu. Seal the bag and shake until the tofu is well coated. Place the tofu into a bowl and drizzle in 1 tablespoon of the olive oil. Toss to combine.
', '
Place the tofu into the air fryer basket. Cook the tofu in the air fryer at 370˚F for 12-15 minutes. Check the tofu halfway through, and if they look powdery, drizzle a bit more olive oil on top. Cook until golden and crispy on the outside.
', '
Heat the remaining olive oil in a large pan over medium high heat. Add in the green beans and sauté until they are almost fully cooked. Then mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and salt and pepper to taste. Cook for 30 seconds.
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, rice vinegar, and brown sugar. Mix to combine. When the sauce starts bubbling, continue to cook for about 1 minute. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and air fried tofu. Cook for 1 minute and mix until the tofu is evenly coated in the sauce. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
Serve the tofu with white rice and garnish with sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-tempeh-sandwich
Ingredients: ['8 oz. tempeh, cut into 2 ½” long ¼” thick slices', '2 Tbsp. avocado oil', '4 slices sourdough bread', '1 avocado, halved and sliced', '1 small carrot, peeled into thin ribbons', '1 cup micro sprouts']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. lime juice', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ tsp. hot sauce', '½ tsp. dijon mustard', '½ cup cilantro leaves', '½ cup mayo', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Add the lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, hot sauce, dijon mustard, and cilantro leaves into a food processor. Pulse until the cilantro is finely chopped. Add in the mayo and season with salt and pepper. Blend until combined then transfer the cilantro mayo to a small bowl and set it aside.\xa0
', '
Brush all sides of the tempeh with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Heat a pan over medium high heat. Add in a ½ tablespoon of the avocado oil. Place the tempeh into the pan and fry until golden brown on each side then remove them from the pan, about 5-8 minutes.
', '
Drizzle the remaining avocado oil onto both sides of each slice of sourdough. Add the sourdough to the pan and toast on both sides over medium high heat until golden brown.\xa0
', '
Spread a layer of the cilantro mayo onto each slice of sourdough. Add sliced avocado, carrot ribbons, tempeh, and micro sprouts to two of the sourdough slices. Top each sandwich with the remaining slice of sourdough. Slice in half and enjoy!
']

Name: vietnamese-style-pork-belly
Ingredients: ['14 oz. pork belly strips, cut into bite sized pieces', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 yellow onion, cut into slices', '8 ½ oz. mushrooms, sliced', '½ cup water', '1 green onion, cut into 1” pieces', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '3 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h9NaWhSycS8&feature=youtu.be
', '
Bring a large pot of water with a pinch of salt to a boil. Add in the pork belly and cook for 10-15 minutes. Remove and drain the pork belly.\xa0
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium high heat. Add in the pork belly along with a pinch of salt and the sugar. Cook for 3-5 minutes.
', '
Add in the yellow onion, mushroom, water, fish sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce. Mix until combined. Cook until caramelized and the sauce has reduced. Mix in the green onion pieces.
', '
Remove from heat and garnish with white sesame seeds and cilantro. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-hoisin-salmon-with-egg-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['2 (6 oz) salmon filets', '2 Tbsp. oil ', '2 eggs, lightly beaten', '1 small white onion, diced ', '3 cups cooked rice ', '1 cup frozen peas and carrots, thawed', '¼ cup scallions, thinly sliced', 'toasted sesame seeds and chopped chives, for garnish ', '[optional] sliced nori, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste ', '2-3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, more or less to taste', '1-2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1/8 tsp. ground ginger', '1 garlic clove, minced', '1 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OhTLB2zpghQ&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a small bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, ground ginger, garlic and honey. Season salmon with salt and pepper. Pour hoisin honey glaze over salmon filets and brush to coat entire flesh of salmon, including sides.
', '
Preheat air fryer to 400˚F for at least 5 minutes. Spray air fryer basket with cooking spray and add salmon filets. Air fry for 10 minutes.
', '
While the salmon is cooking, make the fried rice. Preheat oil in a large skillet or wok to medium high heat. Pour in beaten egg. Add diced onion and sauté for 2 minutes. Add rice on top of the partially cooked egg and stir to combine.\xa0
', '
Season with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Stir in the peas, carrots and scallions.\xa0
', '
To serve, plate rice and place a salmon filet on top. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and chopped chives. Serve with sliced nori. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-glazed-spam-and-eggs
Ingredients: ['6 large eggs, whisked', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '12 oz. can of spam, cut into ¼” slices', '3 cups cooked white rice', 'furikake seasoning, for topping', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['pinch of salt', 'pinch of white pepper', '2 Tbsp. granulated sugar']
Sauce Mix: ['2 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '¼ cup water']
Procedure:
['
Whisk the eggs, a pinch of salt, and a pinch of white pepper together in a bowl.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Pour the eggs into the pan. Use a rubber spatula to push the eggs around the pan until they come together in soft curds. When the eggs come to a soft scramble, remove them from the pan.
', '
Heat another pan over medium heat. Add the sliced spam to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until brown and crispy.
', '
Combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and water in a small bowl. Sprinkle the sugar over the spam. Toss the spam to evenly coat it on both sides. Then pour in the sauce mixture. Swirl the sauce around in the pan and cook the spam for about 2 minutes on each side until caramelized. Remove the pan from heat.
', '
Serve the spam with the eggs and white rice. Top with furikake and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: low-carb-philly-cheesesteak-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 lb. rib eye steak', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 onion, sliced', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 bell peppers, sliced', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. steak seasoning', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup heavy cream', '½ cup cream cheese', '6 oz. provolone', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. hot sauce', '1 tsp. garlic powder']
Procedure:
['
Pat the rib eye steak dry with paper towels. Season both sides with the steak seasoning. Place the rib eye steak in the freezer for 10-15 minutes. Then slice the rib eye steak, against the grain, into thin strips. Set it aside.
', '
Heat 2 tablespoons of the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add in the onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté until the garlic is fragrant. Add in the bell peppers, 1 teaspoon of salt, and ½ teaspoon of pepper. Cook until the bell peppers are cooked through and the onions have caramelized. Remove the vegetables from the pan and set aside.
', '
Heat the remaining tablespoon of vegetable oil in the same pan the vegetables were cooked in over medium high heat. Add in the sliced rib eye steak and cook for 1 minute or until fully cooked through. Remove the rib eye steak from the pan and add it to the sauteed vegetables.
', '
Combine the heavy cream and cream cheese in a small saucepan. Whisk as the cream cheese starts to melt. When the sauce comes to a simmer, remove the pan from heat and stir in the provolone, ½ teaspoon of salt, ¼ teaspoon of pepper, hot sauce, and garlic powder.\xa0
', '
To serve, add the sauteed vegetables and rib eye steak mix to a serving bowl. Ladle the cheese sauce on top of the meat and vegetables. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: vegetarian-vegetable-and-kimchi-pancakes
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 onion, sliced', '1 small carrot, julienned', '1 cup chopped kimchi', '1 cup sliced shiitake mushrooms', '1 cup all-purpose flour', '½ Tbsp. baking powder', '3 Tbsp. cornstarch', '⅔ cup sliced green onions, additional for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. turmeric powder', '1 cup room temperature water', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Heat 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil in a pan over medium high heat. Add in the onions, carrot, kimchi, and shiitake mushrooms. Sauté until the vegetables are tender then remove them from the pan.
', '
Add the flour, baking powder, cornstarch, salt, and turmeric powder to a bowl. Whisk until the ingredients are evenly combined. Then mix in the water and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil until you get a batter-like consistency. Add 2-4 additional tablespoons of water if necessary.
', '
Mix the sauteed vegetables and sliced green onions into the batter. Heat a large pan over medium high heat. Add in ½ tablespoon of the remaining vegetable oil. Ladle half of the batter into the pan, making sure the vegetables are evenly distributed.\xa0
', '
Cook for 4-5 minutes until the bottom is golden brown then flip the pancake onto the other side. Cook until browned then remove it from the pan. Use the remaining batter to make the second pancake.\xa0
', '
Garnish the pancakes with the additional sliced green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: calabrian-chili-and-sausage-pasta
Ingredients: ['1 lb. rigatoni pasta', '½ Tbsp. olive oil', '1 yellow onion, thinly sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 lb. mild ground Italian sausage', '½ cup grated parmesan cheese, additional for serving', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup Calabrian chili pepper paste', 'juice and zest from 1 lemon', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Cook the rigatoni pasta according to the package directions. Reserve ½ a cup of pasta water for later. Drain the pasta and set it aside.
', '
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium high heat. Add in the onion and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Sauté until the garlic is fragrant. Add the sausage into the pan. Cook and crumble the sausage until it has browned and fully cooked.\xa0
', '
Add the cooked rigatoni pasta, Calabrian chili pepper paste, lemon juice and zest, and parmesan cheese to the pan. Toss everything together until combined. Pour in the pasta water and mix. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Serve the rigatoni pasta with additional grated parmesan cheese and garnish with chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: pan-seared-cod-with-chili-garlic-oil
Ingredients: ['4 (6 oz.) cod filets', '3 Tbsp. avocado oil', '4 garlic cloves, smashed', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. kosher salt', '¼ tsp. ground black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Pat the cod filets dry with paper towels and season both sides with the kosher salt and pepper. Let the cod sit at room temperature for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Combine the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a small bowl. Mix until combined then set it aside.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat until very hot. Add in the avocado oil. Place the cod filets into the pan and cook for about 3-5 minutes until it develops a golden crust.\xa0
', '
Flip the cod filets onto the other side and pour the chili oil mix on top. Add in the garlic cloves. Continue to cook the fish for 3-5 minutes until fully cooked through. In the last few minutes of cooking, tilt the pan to one side and use a spoon to baste the oil on top of the cod filets.\xa0
', '
Remove the cod from the pan and garnish with sliced green onions. Serve with any additional side dishes. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
