Name: satay-beef-noodles
Ingredients: ['2 packs instant noodles', '12 oz. beef (sliced)', '2 Tbsp. chopped spring onion (optional)', '2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro (optional)']
Procedure:
['
Bring water to a boil. Cook the instant noodles for 3 minutes, then drain and divide between two bowls. Set aside.
', '
Add the beef into the boiling water. Cook through, then drain and lay the slices over the noodles.
', '
Dissolve one pack of Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Satay Hot Pot in five cups of boiling water. Pour the sauce over the beef and noodles and mix to combine. Serve immediately – and enjoy some mouthwatering satay beef noodles!
', '
Tip: to take these noodles to the next level, try adding other ingredients, such as mushrooms, meatballs and vegetables. You can also use your favorite type of noodles to make the recipe your own.
']

Name: abalone-and-shrimp-in-lobster-sauce-over-rice
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '6 oz. raw shrimp, peeled ', '¼ cup green peas', '4 oz. carrot, finely diced', '2 cans Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Abalone Sauce ', '1 egg, beaten', '2 cups rice, cooked']
Procedure:
['
In a large pan, add the vegetable oil and heat for 1 minute over medium-high heat.
', '
Add the shrimp, green peas, carrots, and Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Abalone Sauce. Stir and cook for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Drizzle the beaten egg into the mixture. Cook and reduce the sauce for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
', '
Pour the mixture over a bed of rice. Enjoy!
']

Name: clay-pot-rice-with-deluxe-abalone-in-brown-braising-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 cup rice', '1 cup water', '4 oz. carrot, thinly sliced', '1 can Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce', '1 stalk scallion, sliced']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. sugar', '½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '¼ cup Brown Braising Sauce (from Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce)']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=4isq-WaVZkM&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a clay pot, add the rice and water. Let it soak for one hour.\xa0
', '
Cover the rice and water and bring to a boil over medium heat.\xa0
', '
Add the sugar, salt, Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil, mix together well, and then add carrots.\xa0
', '
Simmer for 5-8 minutes over low heat. Remove the abalone from the can and set aside.\xa0
', '
Pour ¼ cup of the Brown Braising Sauce from the can into the clay pot, place the abalone in the center and cover with a lid. Continue to simmer over low heat until the edges of the rice become golden and crispy.\xa0\xa0Remove the clay pot from the heat and let it cool. Garnish with scallions and enjoy!
']

Name: crispy-pan-fried-noodles-with-abalone-and-mixed-seafood
Ingredients: ['¼ lb. shrimp (peeled)', '¼ lb. scallop', '8 oz. egg noodles, par-cooked', '4 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '6 shiitake mushrooms', '1 can Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce (6pcs.)', '1 cup water', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch slurry', '6 stalks yu choy sum, cooked']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken']
Marinade: ['½ tsp. sugar', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2vXNUNyy-v0
', '
In a small bowl, add the shrimp, scallop, sugar, salt, and Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder. Mix until combined.
', '
In a large pan, add egg noodles and oil. Sear until noodles are crispy on both sides. Set aside.
', '
In a pan, cook shrimp, scallop and Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce (6 pcs.). Add shiitake mushrooms and stir. Remove all ingredients and set aside.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken, water and cornstarch slurry to reserved abalone sauce in a pan. Cook until the sauce is reduced in volume by half.
', '
Toss seafood and shiitake mushrooms in the sauce and stir. Pour the mixture over a bed of noodles with yu choy sum. Enjoy!
']

Name: thai-coconut-shrimp-soup
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. avocado oil', '2” ginger, cut into ¼” thick slices', '2 stalks lemongrass, diagonally cut into 1” pieces', '2 kaffir lime leaves', '8 oz. shiitake mushrooms', '2 lbs. shrimp, peeled and deveined', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. red curry paste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '32 oz. chicken broth', '3 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar', '40 oz. coconut milk', '3 Tbsp. lime juice', '½ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Heat the avocado oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add in the ginger, lemongrass,\xa0 red curry paste, and Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce. Mix and cook for 3 minutes until the ingredients release their flavors.
', '
Pour in the chicken broth and add in the kaffir lime leaves. Mix until combined then add in the fish sauce and brown sugar. Bring the soup to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes.
', '
Mix in the shiitake mushrooms and coconut milk and continue to simmer for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in the shrimp and cook until they are fully cooked, about 5-10 minutes. Remove the ginger, lemongrass, and lime leaves from the soup. Mix in the lime juice and salt.
', '
Remove the pot from heat and serve. Garnish with cilantro leaves and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: chinese-chicken-and-potato-stew
Ingredients: ['1 ½ - 2 lbs. chicken drumsticks', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '5 sliced ginger', '5 garlic cloves, peeled', '1 star anise', '2 bay leaves', 'pinch of cinnamon', '2 cups water', '1 lb. Yukon gold potatoes, peeled and cut into 1 ½” cubes', 'white rice, for serving', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. tomato paste', '2 Tbsp. granulated sugar']
Marinade: ['½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. white pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized bowl, combine the chicken drumsticks with the salt and white pepper. Let it sit for 15 minutes at room temperature.\xa0
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a Dutch oven over medium low heat. Add in the ginger, garlic, star anise, bay leaves, and cinnamon. Cook and stir until aromatic, about 1-2 minutes.
', '
Adjust the heat to medium and add in the chicken. Cook for 1 minute then flip them onto the other side. Add in the Shaoxing wine, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, tomato paste, and granulated sugar. Stir and cook for about 30 seconds.
', '
Pour in the water. Cover the pot and bring it to a boil. Turn the heat down to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
', '
Mix the Yukon gold potatoes into the stew and cook for another 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender. Turn off the heat and serve the stew with white rice. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-crisp-broccoli-and-labneh-dip
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 cup canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed', '16 oz. labneh', 'chopped parsley, for garnish', 'pita bread, for serving', 'crackers, for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. avocado oil', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '½ tsp. cumin powder', '½ tsp. chili powder', '¼ tsp. garlic powder', '¼ tsp. onion powder', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. lemon juice', '1 tsp. maple syrup']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Add the broccoli, chickpeas, avocado oil, smoked paprika, cumin powder, chili powder, garlic powder, onion powder, and salt and pepper to taste to the baking sheet. Mix the ingredients together until the seasonings are evenly distributed. Bake it in the oven for about 12-15 minutes until the broccoli is tender. Remove it from the oven and set it aside to cool.
', '
Add the labneh, lemon juice, and maple syrup to a bowl. Mix until combined. Transfer the labneh to a shallow dish.
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a separate bowl. Drizzle some of this mixture over the labneh. Arrange the broccoli and chickpeas on top of the labneh. Garnish with chopped parsley. Serve with pita bread and crackers. Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-vodka-ravioli
Ingredients: ['12 oz. cheese ravioli', 'grated parmesan cheese, for serving', 'basil leaves, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup tomato paste', '½ cup vodka', '⅔ cup heavy whipping cream', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Cook the ravioli according to the package directions. Drain the ravioli and set it aside.\xa0
', '
Add the olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil to a pan. Heat it over medium heat for 2 minutes. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
', '
Mix in the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Pour in the vodka and mix until combined. Cook for another 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Mix in the heavy whipping cream and bring it to a simmer. Once the sauce begins to bubble, remove the pan from heat. Season with salt and pepper, to taste.
', '
Serve the sauce over the cooked ravioli and with a side of grated parmesan cheese. Garnish with basil leaves and enjoy!
']

Name: spring-rolls-4
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '13 oz. ground pork', '6 dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked in boiling water and roughly chopped', '1 ½ cups shredded carrots', '1 ½ cups bean sprouts', '1 ½ cups shredded green cabbage', '3 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. water', '15-20 (8-inch) square spring roll wrappers', 'vegetable oil, for frying', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over high heat. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for 30 seconds. Add in the pork and break it apart into crumbles. Continue until fully cooked.\xa0
', '
Mix in the mushrooms, carrots, bean sprouts, and cabbage. Cook for about 3 minutes or until the vegetables have wilted. Then add in 1 teaspoon of the cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce. Cook for about 1 minute until all of the moisture has evaporated from the pan. Remove the pan from heat and spread the mixture out onto a baking sheet. Place it into the refrigerator for 5-10 minutes until it has cooled.
', '
Mix the remaining 2 teaspoons of cornstarch and water in a small bowl until combined. Place one of the spring roll wrappers in front of you in a diamond position. Add a heaped spoonful of the filling to the bottom of the wrapper. Roll the wrapper up halfway then fold in the sides. Brush the cornstarch mixture along the edges at the top of the wrapper then roll it the rest of the way up. Repeat this step to assemble the remaining spring rolls.
', '
Pour enough vegetable oil into a pot so that it is 2-3 inches deep. Heat it over medium high heat until the oil is hot. Working in batches, add in a few spring rolls and fry for 1-1 ½ minutes until golden brown. Use a slotted spoon to remove the spring rolls from the oil and place them onto a plate lined with paper towels to drain. Fry the remaining spring rolls. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: stir-fried-pork-with-green-onion
Ingredients: ['12 oz. pork sirloin, sliced in strips', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ["2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee's Premium Oyster Sauce", '4 oz. green onion, shredded', '1 red pepper, sliced', '1 Tbsp. rice wine']
Marinade: ["1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee's Premium Oyster Sauce", '2 tsp. cooking oil']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 tsp. cornstarch', '4 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Mix pork strips with marinade.
', '
Heat oil and saute red pepper. Add pork and cook until done. Drizzle with rice wine.
', '
Add green onion and cornstarch mixture, stir to combine. Cook until thickened.
']

Name: chow-fun-noodles
Ingredients: ['10 oz. flank steak, sliced into thin tiles (about 2"x1")', '2 Tbsp. neutral cooking oil ', '½ yellow onion, sliced', '1 lb. fresh flat rice noodles, separated ', '2 cups bean sprouts ', '1 scallion, cut into 1” slices', '¼ cup scallions, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda ', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '2 Tbsp. water ', '¼ tsp. white pepper ', '1 ¼ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=n_tIcu-o-cc&feature=youtu.be
', '
Place the beef, baking soda, cornstarch, water, white pepper, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce into a small bowl to tenderize and flavor the beef. Stir together until incorporated. Reserve until ready to stir fry.\xa0\xa0
', '
Heat a large skillet or wok on high for about 2 minutes. Swirl in neutral cooking oil until you see a wisp of white smoke. Add the marinated beef down and away from you. Spread the beef across the surface area of the wok and let sear. Add onions and toss into the beef to sauté. Add the separated rice noodles. Toss so the noodles go to the bottom of the wok. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Cook, tossing for 1 to 2 minutes, scraping up any bits from the bottom of the pan. Stir in the bean sprouts and 1” sliced scallions. Finish seasoning with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Cook for an additional 30 seconds, until noodles are translucent and veggies are cooked through.
', '
Transfer to a large serving platter. Garnish with sliced scallion and season with pepper to taste. Enjoy!
']

Name: vietnamese-style-shredded-beef
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 lb. leftover cooked brisket, shredded', 'cooked rice, for serving', 'sliced cucumbers, for serving', 'chopped red chili pepper, for topping', 'chopped peanuts, for topping', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 garlic cloves, minced', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '2 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '2 ½ Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. lemongrass paste', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix together the garlic, lime juice, fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, brown sugar, lemongrass paste, and 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil.\xa0
', '
Add in the shredded brisket and mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil in a large pan over high heat. Add half of the brisket to the pan and spread it out in a single layer. Cook for about 1 minute then flip the brisket over onto the other side. Cook for 30 seconds then remove the brisket from the pan. Repeat this step to cook the remaining brisket.\xa0
', '
Serve with rice and sliced cucumbers. Top with red chili pepper and chopped peanuts. Garnish with cilantro leaves and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: ginger-garlic-noodle-soup-with-bok-choy
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '3 shallots, diced', '1 bunch green onions, sliced and green and white parts separated', '4 garlic cloves, minced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '5 ½ cups chicken broth', '2 star anise', '10 oz. crimini mushrooms, sliced', '6 oz. uncooked rice noodles', '1 ½ heads bok choy, roughly chopped', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'red chili flakes, for topping']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper, to taste ']
Procedure:
['
Heat the olive oil in a medium-sized stockpot over medium heat. Add the shallots and cook over for 4-5 minutes or until the shallots turn translucent and soften.\xa0
', '
Toss in the white part of the green onions, garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Mix until combined. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 1-2 minutes until garlic and ginger are fragrant.
', '
Pour the chicken broth into the pot and bring it to a simmer. Add in the star anise and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
', '
Remove the lid and remove the star anise from the soup. Add the mushrooms, rice noodles, and bok choy to the pot. Simmer for 5-8 minutes or until noodles and bok choy are tender. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Divide soup between bowls. Garnish with sesame seeds, the green parts of green onions and red chili flakes. Enjoy!
']

Name: korean-style-braised-soy-ginger-lemon-chicken
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '2 lbs. bone-in skin-on chicken thighs, excess fat trimmed', '1 onion, sliced', '1 lemon, sliced', 'juice from ½ a lemon', '1 Tbsp. mirin', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'white rice, for serving (optional)']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '3 Tbsp. white wine', '1 Tbsp. mirin', '1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. granulated sugar']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, white wine, 1 tablespoon of the mirin, 1 tablespoon of the extra virgin olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and granulated sugar. Mix until well combined. Add the chicken to the marinade and marinate for at least 2 hours.\xa0
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium high heat. Add the chicken to the Dutch oven, skin side down, and sear for 4-5 minutes until golden brown. Flip the chicken over and cook on the other side for about 4 minutes until golden brown. Remove the chicken thighs from the pan and set them aside for later.\xa0
', '
Add in the onion and lemon slices. Cook until the onions have lightly browned and the brown bits at the bottom of the pan have loosened.\xa0
', '
Place the chicken back into the Dutch oven on top of the onions, skin side up. Pour the lemon juice and remaining tablespoon of mirin on top.\xa0
', '
Transfer the Dutch oven to the oven and bake for 40-45 minutes.
', '
Remove the chicken from the oven and garnish with white sesame seeds and green onions. Serve with white rice and enjoy!
']

Name: slow-cooker-jambalaya
Ingredients: ['1 white onion, diced', '3 celery ribs, diced', '1 green bell pepper, diced', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '1 lb. smoked sausage, sliced', '1 lb. boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite sized pieces', '1 (28 oz.) can diced tomatoes', '1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '4 cups cooked white rice', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 Tbsp. dried oregano', '2 bay leaves', '1 ½ Tbsp. Creole seasoning', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Add the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, onion, celery, bell pepper, garlic, sausage, chicken, tomatoes, oregano, bay leaves, and Creole seasoning to a large slow cooker. Mix until combined.
', '
Cook on high for 3 hours. The vegetables should be tender and the chicken is cooked through.
', '
Add the shrimp to the slow cooker. Stir and cover. Cook on high for another 30 to 45 minutes until the shrimp are cooked through.
', '
Remove bay leaves from the jambalaya. Season with salt and pepper to taste and stir the cooked rice into the jambalaya. Garnish with fresh chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: salmon-chowder
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '½ lb. bacon, cut into ½" pieces', '3 celery stalks, minced', '1 onion, minced', '1 jalapeño, thinly sliced', '1 bunch of scallions, sliced', '4 garlic cloves, minced', '2 large russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1" pieces', '2 cups frozen corn', '2 cups heavy cream', '1 ½ lbs. salmon, skinned and cut into 1" pieces', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. ground black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '4 cups chicken stock', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '2 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
In a pot, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the bacon and cook until the bacon begins to crisp, about 8 minutes. Remove bacon from the pan and set it aside on a plate lined with paper towels to drain.
', '
Add celery, onions, jalapeños, scallions and garlic and cook until softened, about 8 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, chicken stock, potatoes, 1 teaspoon of salt, pepper and cooked bacon. Bring it to a simmer and cook for about 15 minutes until the potatoes are tender.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk cornstarch and two tablespoons of water to form a slurry. Stir the cornstarch slurry into the broth and bring to a boil. Let the soup boil for about 2 minutes to thicken slightly.
', '
Turn the heat down to a simmer, and stir in the corn and heavy cream. Place the salmon pieces on top of the simmering soup. Season it with the remaining ½ teaspoon of salt, and cover the pot with a lid. Simmer for ten minutes, or until the salmon is cooked through.
', '
Top with fresh chives or extra scallions and freshly ground black pepper. Enjoy!
']

Name: gluten-free-beef-and-broccoli-noodles
Ingredients: ['12 oz. gluten free spaghetti noodles', '3 Tbsp. avocado oil', '3 cups broccoli florets', '1 Tbsp. arrowroot starch', '1 lb. sirloin steak, thinly sliced against the grain', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¾ tsp. kosher salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup coconut aminos', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. coconut sugar', '1 tsp. apple cider vinegar', '2 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. ginger powder', '2 tsp. onion powder']
Procedure:
['
Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions and drain. Toss the spaghetti with a bit of avocado oil to keep the spaghetti from sticking together. Set it aside for later.\xa0
', '
In a large deep pan, heat 1 tablespoon of avocado oil over medium heat. Add the broccoli and a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook for 6-7 minutes or until tender. Remove the broccoli from the pan, set aside. Wipe out the pan with paper towels.\xa0
', '
Add the arrowroot starch to a bowl along with the remainder of the salt and pepper. Add the steak slices and coat thoroughly.
', '
Using the same pan, heat the remaining avocado oil over medium high heat. Once the oil is hot, add half of the steak. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side. Remove the steak from the pan and add in the remaining uncooked steak.\xa0 Cook until all of the steak is cooked.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, whisk the coconut aminos, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, coconut sugar, apple cider vinegar, garlic powder, ginger powder, and onion powder together.
', '
Heat the pan over medium low heat. Add in the spaghetti, broccoli, steak, and sauce mixture. Cook until heated through and the sauce coats the noodles. Remove from heat and serve with green onion and sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegetarian-thai-peanut-curry
Ingredients: ['16 oz. extra firm tofu, drained, pat dry, and cut into ½" cubes', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 red onion, sliced', '2 red chilies, chopped', '1" piece ginger, grated', '1 carrot, peeled and sliced into half-moons ', '1 red bell pepper, deseeded and cut into 1" pieces', '1 ½ cups broccoli florets', 'lime wedges, for serving', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'chopped peanuts, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. cinnamon', '½ tsp. turmeric', '1 tsp. cumin', '1 tsp. ground coriander', '1 tsp. sweet paprika', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cups vegetable stock', '3 Tbsp. peanut butter', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 (13.5 oz.) can of coconut milk']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized bowl, combine two tablespoons of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, cinnamon, turmeric, cumin, ground coriander, sweet paprika, one teaspoon of the sugar, and Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce. Mix until evenly combined. Add the tofu, and gently mix it together with the sauce. Allow the tofu to marinate while you prepare the curry.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium high heat. Add in the garlic, red onion, red chilies, ginger, carrot, and red bell pepper. Sauté until the vegetables are tender. Transfer half of the vegetables to a bowl and the other half into a blender.\xa0
', '
Add the vegetable stock, peanut butter, remaining teaspoon of sugar, and remaining tablespoon of soy sauce to the blender. Blend until smooth and set it aside for later.\xa0
', '
In a separate pan, heat the remaining tablespoon of oil over medium high heat. Add in the marinated tofu. Fry the tofu for 2-3 minutes on each side until all sides of the tofu are golden brown. Add in the remaining sautéed vegetables and the broccoli. Cook for 1 minute.
', '
Add in the blended sauce and coconut milk. Mix until combined. Bring the sauce to a simmer and simmer for 15 minutes. Season with salt and pepper, to taste. Serve with lime wedges. Garnish with cilantro leaves and chopped peanuts. Enjoy!
']

Name: stir-fried-abalone-with-celery-in-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 oz. ginger (sliced)', '½ each of red and yellow bell peppers (chopped)', '6 oz. celery (sectioned)', '2 cans of Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Abalone Sauce']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 Tbsp. Shaoxing Cooking Wine']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. sauce from Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Abalone Sauce', '2 tsp. corn starch slurry ']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil on high heat and sauté the sliced ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce.
', '
Add the red and yellow bell peppers, celery, abalones from Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Abalone Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No\xa0 MSG Added) and Shaoxing cooking wine and stir-fry.
', '
Finally, add in the Sauce from Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Abalone Sauce and the corn starch slurry and cook until thickened.
']

Name: abalone-siu-mai
Ingredients: ['4 oz. shrimp', '1 can of Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Abalone Sauce (diced)', '4 oz. minced pork ', '3 pcs. mushrooms (soaked & diced)', '1 tsp. corn starch', '8 pcs. siu mai wraps']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ', 'a dash of Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Pound the shrimp with the back of a knife blade, then dice.
', '
Stir together all the ingredients and seasonings (except the siu mai wraps) for one minute to mix. Then refrigerate for 30 minutes.
', '
Place the filling in the middle of the wrappers and wrap the sides. Press against the top of the filling with a spoon to flatten.
', '
Steam for 10 minutes over high heat.
']

Name: korean-bulgogi-beef-bowl
Ingredients: ['10.5 oz. rib eye steak, sliced', '4 Tbsp. vegetable oil, divided into two', '2 red onions, sliced', '½ oz. ginger, finely diced', '1 lb. 2 oz. cooked brown rice', '½ cucumber, sliced', '2 oz. shredded carrots', '2 eggs, fried', 'a pinch of sesame seeds, for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '½ Tbsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. cornflour', '1 egg', '1 tsp. ground black pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine the marinade ingredients, add the beef and marinate for at least 30 minutes before cooking.
', '
Add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a hot pan over medium-high heat. Add marinated beef into the pan and stir-fry for about 6 minutes until it is cooked-through. Transfer from the pan to a bowl.
', '
With the same pan, add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil over a medium heat. Add the onions and ginger and stir fry them for 2-3 minutes until the onions are softened.
', '
Add the cooked beef back in and give it a quick stir until it is reheated and mixed well.
', '
Cook the brown rice as per pack instructions. Divide the rice into two bowls then add the beef, cucumber and carrots and top with a pan-fried egg. Garnish with sesame seeds and serve.
', "
Tips:\xa0
1) Give the beef a good rub. Wear a glove and mix in a circular motion to massage in the marinade and tenderize the beef.
2) You can top with Lee Kum Kee's Hoisin Sauce to taste.\xa0
"]

Name: teriyaki-chicken-bowl
Ingredients: ['7 oz. chicken thigh fillets (boneless)', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', 'rice, for serving (optional)']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1 tsp. grated ginger']
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken thighs for at least 30 minutes. Set aside.
', '
Heat frying pan to medium heat. Place chicken thighs and cook till they turn golden brown.
', '
Lower heat and add sauce mix. Turn chicken thighs to coat in sauce. Cook till sauce is reduced and sticky.
', '
Cut it into bite-sized pieces. Serve.
', '
Tips:
1) Cut any thick part of a chicken thigh into half to ensure the meat is of equal thickness.
2) Best serve with rice.\xa0
']

Name: stir-fried-seafood-with-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['5 oz. scallops ', '5 oz. shrimp', '3.5 oz. calamari ', '3.5 oz. fish fillet (chopped)', '1 Tbsp. oil', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '6–8 slices ginger (sliced)', '5 oz. green onion (sectioned)', '2 cans of Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce ', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken  (No MSG Added)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Shaoxing cooking wine ', '2 tsp. sugar', '2 tsp. corn starch', '¼ tsp. salt']
Marinade: ['1½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder', 'a few twist of the Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder', '1 tsp. corn starch']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the scallops, shrimp, calamari and fish fillet for 20 minutes.
', '
Boil the shrimp, calamari and fish fillet, then drain once fully cooked.
', '
Simmer the scallops in water and drain once fully cooked.
', '
Heat oil on medium heat and sauté Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce until fragrant. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, ginger and green onion and stir well.
', '
Add scallops, shrimp, calamari, fish fillet, Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce and all the remaining seasonings, then stir well. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
']

Name: rice-with-abalone-and-mushroom
Ingredients: ['4 pcs. shiitake mushrooms (soaked & diced)', '1.5 oz. soaked snow fungus (diced)', '3.5 oz. Chinese kale (diced)', '2.5 oz. carrots (diced)', '1.5 oz. jujubes (halved & deseeded)', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 cup water', '1 can of Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce (diced)', '3 bowls of cooked rice ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ', '4 tsp. sugar']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. sauce from Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce', '4 Tbsp. corn starch slurry']
Procedure:
['
Boil the mushrooms, snow fungus, Chinese kale, carrots and jujube and drain once fully cooked.
', '
Heat the oil and sauté ingredients in step one until fragrant. Add in water and seasonings and cook for three minutes.
', '
Add in Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce (diced), the sauce from Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce and the corn starch slurry.
', '
Lastly, add the rice and cook for two minutes.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: abalone-rice-ball
Ingredients: ['7 oz. pearl rice', '¾ cup water', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 oz. dried sakura shrimp', '1 Tbsp. crab roe', '1 can Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce', '2-3 sheets of nori']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '¼ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Cook the pearl rice with ¾ cup of water. Let cool and set aside.
', '
Heat oil on high heat and slowly sauté the dried sakura shrimp until fragrant.
', '
Mix the pearl rice, dried sakura shrimp, crab roe, Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar and salt together, before shaping it into a rice ball by hand.
', '
Press the Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce into the center of the rice ball and wrap with the nori sheets.
', '
Tips: Use the sauce from Lee Kum Kee Deluxe Abalone in Brown Braising Sauce as a dip to make this treat even tastier!
']

Name: sesame-ginger-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground turkey', '⅓ cup water', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Marinade: ['4 cloves garlic, minced', '1 Tbsp. minced fresh ginger', '1 large egg', '¾ cup panko', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qws_zzEHa2E
', '
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray it with cooking spray. Set it aside for later.
', '
Add the turkey, garlic, and ginger to a large bowl. Mix until combined. Then mix in the egg, panko, 1 teaspoon of the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and 1 tablespoon of the Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Portion the mixture into meatballs about 1 ½ -2 inches in size and place them onto the prepared baking sheet. Bake them in the oven for 20 minutes, flipping them over halfway through.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the remaining 3 tablespoons of Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and remaining 1 teaspoon of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pan over medium heat. Transfer the meatballs to the pan along with the prepared sauce. Coat and turn the meatballs in the sauce as it begins to bubble and thicken.\xa0
', '
Pour the water into the pan to deglaze it and cook for 3-4 minutes. Remove the meatballs from the pan and place them into a serving dish. Pour the sauce on top. Garnish with sliced green onions and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: leftover-holiday-ham-and-shrimp-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 carrot, peeled and cut into fine julienne', '½ lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 cup frozen green peas, thawed', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '3 cups cooked white rice', '2 eggs, beaten', '4 oz. diced leftover ham', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat one tablespoon of the oil in a large pan or wok over high heat. Add the carrots and cook for about 1 minute. Then add in the shrimp and cook for another minute. Mix in the peas and cook until the shrimps are pink and fully cooked through. Transfer the mixture onto a plate and set it aside for later.\xa0
', '
Heat 1 ½ tablespoons of the oil in the wok over high heat. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and garlic and cook until fragrant, about 15 seconds. Mix in the rice and cook for 2-3 minutes. Push the rice to the side and pour a ½ tablespoon of oil into the center of the wok. Add in the egg and scramble until it is cooked. Mix the egg with the rice. Then mix in the ham.
', '
Add the shrimp and vegetable mixture into the pan along with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Mix and cook for another 2-3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper then remove the pan from heat. Serve and garnish with sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: mushrooms-bourguignon
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 ¾ lbs. baby bella mushrooms, halved and quartered', '9 oz. onion, cut into ½ inch squares', '9 oz. carrots, chopped into ¼ inch half moons', '4 cloves garlic, minced', '¾ cup red wine']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 small bunch fresh thyme', '2 dried bay leaves', '1 cup vegetable stock']
Procedure:
['
Heat the oil in a large pan with sides over medium-high heat. Add in the mushrooms, onion, and carrots. Cook until the mushrooms have released their moisture, about 8-10 minutes then mix in the garlic.\xa0
', '
Pour in the red wine and cook until most of the wine evaporates. Then mix in the tomato paste, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, thyme, bay leaves, and vegetable stock. Bring the liquid to a simmer then cover the pan with a lid. Cook for an additional 10-15 minutes until the carrots are tender and the sauce has slightly thickened.\xa0
', '
Remove the pan from heat and enjoy!
']

Name: chinese-style-tomato-egg-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['5 large eggs', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '1 green onion, sliced', '2 medium tomatoes, cut into 8 wedges', 'white rice, for serving', 'additional sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['pinch of salt', 'pinch of white pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. ketchup', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ Tbsp. sugar', '¼ cup water']
Procedure:
['
Crack the eggs into a bowl. Season with a pinch of salt and white pepper. Whisk until smooth and combined.
', '
Heat 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil in a wok or large pan over medium-high heat. Add the eggs into the wok. Scramble and cook the eggs until they are set but still slightly runny. Transfer the eggs into a bowl and wipe out the wok with a paper towel.\xa0
', '
Pour the remaining tablespoon of oil into the wok. Then add in the garlic and white parts of the green onion. Cook for 15 seconds. Add in the tomatoes, ketchup, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, sugar, and water. Cook until the tomatoes have softened.
', '
Turn off the heat and gently fold the eggs into the mixture. Serve with rice and garnish with additional sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-and-scallion-mashed-potatoes
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. Yukon gold potatoes, peeled and quartered', '3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted', '2 green onions, thinly sliced', '2 garlic cloves, minced', 'toasted white sesame seeds for garnish', 'additional sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'freshly ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Add the potatoes to a large pot. Fill the pot with water so that it covers the potatoes by at least 2 inches. Add in a large pinch of salt. Bring the water to a boil and continue to boil the potatoes until they are tender, about 10-12 minutes.\xa0
', '
Drain the potatoes then return them to the pot. Mash the potatoes until they are still a bit chunky. Add in the melted butter and the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Mix until combined. Then add in the green onions, and garlic. Mix until you reach your desired consistency. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Transfer the mashed potatoes into a bowl and garnish with white sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-sesame-roasted-brussels-sprouts-with-apples
Ingredients: ['1 lb. brussels sprouts, trimmed', '1 ½ Tbsp. olive oil', '1 honeycrisp apple, cut into half-moon slices ¼ inch thick', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '3 Tbsp. honey', '1 tsp. apple cider vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F.\xa0 Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.\xa0
', '
In a large bowl, add in the brussels sprouts, olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and salt and pepper to taste. Toss the ingredients together until combined.\xa0
', '
Spread the brussels sprouts onto the prepared baking sheet and bake them in the oven for about 10-15 minutes. Then mix in the apples, honey, and apple cider vinegar. Roast for another 10 minutes until the brussels sprouts are tender and slightly charred.\xa0
', '
Remove the brussels sprouts from the oven and mix in the sesame seeds. Transfer to a serving bowl and enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-crab-cakes-with-chili-garlic-aioli
Ingredients: ['⅓ cup mayonnaise', '1 large egg', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '¼ cup sliced green onions', '1 Tbsp. grated ginger', '1 Tbsp. chopped cilantro', '1 red chili pepper, chopped', '2 tsp. lime zest', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '18 oz. lump crab meat', '1 ½ cups panko', '⅓ cup vegetable oil, for frying', '4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, for frying']
Procedure:
['
To make the crab cakes: add the mayonnaise, egg, fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, green onions, ginger, cilantro, red chili pepper, lime zest, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to a large bowl. Mix until combined. Break the crab meat into smaller chunks and add it into the bowl. Gently fold the crab into the mixture. Add in the panko and mix. Cover and refrigerate the crab cake mixture for 1 hour.\xa0
', '
Scoop about ¼ cup of the crab cake mix and form it into a patty about ¾ of an inch thick. You should yield about 16 patties. Heat a large pan over medium high heat. Add half of the vegetable oil and half of the butter into the pan. When the butter melts, add 6-8 crab cakes into the pan and fry them for about 2 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Remove them from the pan and transfer them to a plate lined with paper towels. Wipe out the pan with paper towels and add in the remaining vegetable oil and butter. Fry the remaining crab cakes.
', '
To make the chili garlic aioli: add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, ginger, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, lemon juice, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and egg yolk into a small food processor. Pulse until smooth. While blending the ingredients, slowly pour in the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a thin stream. Continue to blend until emulsified and creamy. Add in the cilantro and pulse until it is chopped into small pieces. Transfer the aioli into a bowl and serve with the crab cakes. Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-fusion-lollipop-lamb-chops
Ingredients: ['8-12 pcs. lamb chops', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 ½ cups brown sugar', '¾ cups Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup cilantro, minced', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '½ tsp. red chili pepper flakes', '½ tsp. Chinese five spice ', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, cilantro, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce,\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, red chili pepper flakes, Chinese five spice, and salt to taste. Mix until well combined.
', '
Add in the lamb chops. Massage the marinade into the lamb chops for 5-10 minutes. Allow them to marinate for 4-6 hours.\xa0
', '
Turn on the broiler setting in the oven. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray it with cooking spray. Remove the lamb chops from the marinade and place them onto the baking sheet. Broil the lamb chops on each side for 2-3 minutes for medium rare doneness.
', '
Garnish with white sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: spiced-hoisin-glazed-ham
Ingredients: ['1 cup water', '3 lbs. bone-in spiral sliced ham, at room temperature']
Marinade: ['½ cup packed brown sugar', '½ cup honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. shaoxing wine', '1 tsp. five spice', '1 tsp. white pepper', '4 garlic cloves, lightly smashed', '4 slices ginger']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 250˚F. Add the brown sugar, honey, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, shaoxing wine, five spice, white pepper, garlic, and ginger to a pot. Mix to combine then heat it over medium heat and bring it to a bubble. Remove the pot from heat and set it aside.
', '
Place a wire rack inside a roasting pan. Pour 1 cup of water into the pan. Place the ham onto the wire rack, cut side down, and brush on the first layer of glaze. Wrap a sheet of aluminum foil over the ham and bake it in the oven for 35-45 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 130˚F.\xa0 Brush a coat of the glaze onto the ham every 15 minutes.
', '
When the ham reaches 130˚F, increase the oven temperature to 450˚F. Brush another coat of the glaze onto the ham. Bake it for another 5-10 minutes, brushing a coat of the glaze onto it every 2-3 minutes. The ham should be very caramelized.
', '
Allow the ham to rest for 10-15 minutes before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: steamed-egg-with-abalone
Ingredients: ['½ cup water', '4 eggs (beaten)', '1 can of Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce (sliced)', '1 Tbsp. green onion (sliced)']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. of sauce from  Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
Add water and seasonings to the egg and mix well. Strain the egg mixture through a sieve onto a deep dish.
', '
Fill a pot with water and place a steam rack inside. Bring the water to a boil over high heat.
', '
Steam the egg mixture over high heat for 2 minutes.
', '
Place the sliced abalones from Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce on top of the egg and steam for an additional 2 minutes. Turn the heat off and leave for 3 minutes with the lid on.
', '
Pour the sauce mix over the steamed egg and Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce and sprinkle with green onions.
']

Name: green-onion-mixed-noodles-with-abalone-and-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 green onions', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1½ Tbsp. dried shrimp ', '1 Tbsp. red chili (chopped) ', '6 oz dry noodles (boiled and drained)', '1 can Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Cut the white part of the green onion into sections and slice the green part into rings.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil into a heated pan , sauté the dried shrimps until fragrant, then set aside.
', '
Add 2 Tbsp. of cooking oil into the pan, sauté the red chili and white part of the green onion, take out half of scallion oil and mix with the dry noodles.
', '
Mix the remaining scallion oil\xa0 with all the sauce mix ingredients and bring to a boil.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce and dried shrimps to the noodles, pour in the sauce mix and sprinkle with sliced green onion.\xa0
']

CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: mayouji-sesame-oil-chicken-soup
Ingredients: ['1-inch fresh ginger, thinly sliced', '2 chicken thighs', '2 chicken drumsticks', '4 cups cooking rice wine', 'water, as needed', '8 oz. thin wonton noodles']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_dG2c9qd98
', '
Heat the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a pot over low heat. When the oil is just warm, add in the ginger.
', '
Fry the ginger until it has released all its flavor and looks, golden and crisp.
', '
Increase the heat to medium and add in the chicken thighs and drumsticks. Fry until the outside of the chicken is cooked.\xa0
', '
Pour in the rice wine and add just enough water to cover the chicken. Increase the heat and bring the liquid to a boil.
', '
Lower the heat so that it is simmering and simmer for 10-15 minutes until the chicken is fully cooked and tender. Season the broth with salt to taste. Cook the wonton noodles according to the package directions. Drain and add them to the broth. Enjoy!
']

Name: sticky-hoisin-fall-roasted-vegetables
Ingredients: ['3 carrots, peeled and sliced in half lengthwise', '3 cups brussels sprouts, halved', '1 acorn squash, cut into ½ inch slices', '4 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 heads garlic, tips cut off']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a larger baking sheet with aluminum foil.
', '
Divide each of the carrots, brussels sprouts, and acorn squash into separate bowls. Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil and 1 tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce to each bowl. Season with salt and pepper and toss the vegetables together until well coated. Add the garlic into a separate bowl and coat it with the remaining tablespoon of olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
', '
Spread the vegetables out onto the prepared baking sheet, grouping them by the types of vegetables. Bake them in the oven for about 20-25 minutes. Test to see if the vegetables are tender. If so, remove them from the baking sheet. If some of the vegetables need more cooking time, place them back into the oven to cook for an additional 10-15 minutes until tender. Enjoy!
']

Name: mini-sesame-and-fig-galettes
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '4 large shallots, sliced', '3 sheets premade pie dough', '4 oz. goat cheese, crumbled', '6 large figs, trimmed and cut into rounds', '¼ cup heavy cream', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'sesame seeds, for sprinkling ', 'honey, for drizzling']
Seasoning: ['pinch of salt', '1 ½ tsp. za’atar ']
Procedure:
['
Melt the butter in a wide pan over medium-low heat. Add the shallots and cook, stirring frequently, until golden and caramelized, about 20 minutes. When the shallots start to brown, reduce the heat to low and add a splash of water if the pan looks too dry. Season with a pinch of salt.
', '
Place the pie dough onto a lightly floured surface. Use a ring cutter to cut out 6 circles, 6 inches in diameter. Place the cut-out discs onto a baking tray lined with parchment paper.
', '
Divide the caramelized shallot onto the center of each dough round. Top with crumbled goat cheese and a sprinkle of za’atar. Fan the fig rounds over the top. Fold the dough edges over the figs to form pleats. Return the galettes to the refrigerator and chill until the dough is firm again, 20-30 minutes.
', '
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Brush the crusts with the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Bake the galettes until the crusts are golden and the fruit is bubbling, 20-30 minutes. Remove to a serving platter, drizzle with honey, and sprinkle with a little more za’atar. Serve warm or at room temperature.
']

Name: honey-crisp-daikon-cucumber-salad
Ingredients: ['1 honeycrisp apple, cut into thin slices', '1 large daikon radish, peeled and cut into thin strips', '2 large english cucumbers, deseeded and thinly sliced ', '½ cup mint leaves, thinly sliced ', '¼ cup pomegranate aerials ']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, orange juice, lime juice, honey, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and canola oil into a mason jar. Seal the jar with the lid and shake to emulsify. Set it aside for later.
', '
In a large bowl, combine all ingredients for the salad.\xa0
', '
Add in a few tablespoons of prepared dressing and enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-orange-chicken-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 egg', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, plus extra for frying', '½ cup cornstarch', '¼ cup flour', '2 lbs. boneless skinless chicken thighs', 'white rice, for serving', 'steamed broccoli, for serving', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. salt', '1 pinch black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken']
Procedure:
['
Add the egg, salt, pepper and 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil into a bowl. Mix until combined.
', '
In a separate bowl, add the cornstarch and flour and mix.
', '
Fill a pot with a few inches of vegetable oil and heat it to 375˚F. Dip chicken in the egg mixture, then dredge in the flour mixture. Fry the chicken for 3-4 minutes or until golden and crispy. Transfer to a cooling rack and repeat with remaining chicken.
', '
Pour the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken into a small pot and bring it to boil.
', '
Add the fried chicken and heated Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken to a large bowl. Toss the chicken and sauce together until the chicken is well coated.
', '
Serve with white rice and steamed broccoli. Garnish with white sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-curry-pot-pie
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. beef chuck, cubed', '2 large russet potatoes, peeled and cubed', '2 large carrots, peeled and diced', '2 stalks celery, diced ', '1 fresno chili, deseeded and diced ', '2 garlic cloves, minced ', '1-2 sheets pre-made pie dough']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. curry powder ', '4 Tbsp. flour', '1 Tbsp. fresh thyme', '½ tsp. garam masala', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 cups beef stock ']
Procedure:
['
Heat the olive oil in a pot over medium high heat. In a small bowl, coat the beef with 1 tablespoon each of curry powder and flour. Once the oil in the pot is hot, add half of the beef. Cook the beef until browned, about 2 minutes per side, then transfer to a bowl. Repeat this step with the remaining beef.
', '
In the same pot, add the potatoes, carrots, and celery. Sauté the vegetables for 2-3 minutes, then add the fresno chili, garlic, thyme, remaining 3 tablespoons of curry powder, garam masala, salt and pepper. Stir to coat the vegetables with the curry and cook for 2-3 minutes until the curry becomes dark and fragrant. Add the beef back into the pot and stir in the tomato paste and remaining 3 tablespoons of flour.
', '
When all the vegetables and beef are coated and the tomato paste becomes a deep brown color, add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and the beef stock. Scrape any bits that have stuck to the bottom of the skillet and mix until well incorporated. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cook until thickened, about 20 minutes.
', '
Preheat the oven to 400°F. On a lightly floured dusted surface, cut the pie dough slightly larger than the top of the skillet or dish you’re baking the curry in. Transfer the curry into the skillet or dish and place the dough directly on top. Cut slits into the top to allow steam to escape.
', '
Place the beef pot pie in the oven to bake for 30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown. Allow to cool for 5-10 minutes before serving. Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-and-garlic-green-beans
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. oil ', '1 lb. green beans, ends trimmed', 'sesame seeds for garnish ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 tsp. rice vinegar', '1 tsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. soy sauce ', '2 Tbsp. water ']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in a large wok over medium high heat. Add green beans and fry until they just start to shrivel, about 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, rice vinegar, brown sugar, soy sauce, and water to the green beans. Stir to combine. Cook until most of the liquid has cooked off, about 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving plate and garnish with sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: gado-gado
Ingredients: ['7 oz. red potatoes, cut into 1-inch cubed', '4 cups bean sprouts', '1 bunch spinach ', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '7 oz. tempeh, sliced ', '1 english cucumber, sliced', '2-3 soft boiled eggs, halved ', 'chopped peanuts, for garnish ', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup peanut butter', '½ cup coconut milk ', '½ cup water ', '1 lime, juiced', '½ tsp. salt', '1 garlic clove, grated', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
["
Mix the peanut butter, coconut milk, water, lime, salt, garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce in a small saucepan. Heat it over medium low heat and bring to a simmer. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring regularly so the bottom doesn't burn, until it thickens. If it becomes too thick, add more water. You should be able to drizzle the sauce.\xa0
", '
Bring a pot of water to the boil. Add potatoes and cook them for 5 minutes or until tender. Use a slotted spoon to transfer the potatoes into a colander to drain. Add the bean sprouts to the pot and cook for 3 minutes or until just wilted. Transfer them into the colander and press out the excess water. Add the spinach into the pot, Once the leaves wilt, remove them from the water and place it into the colander. Press out excess water.
', '
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium high heat. Cook tempeh 2 min. on each side until deep golden and crispy.\xa0
', '
Arrange the vegetables, tempeh, and eggs onto a serving platter. Serve with the gado gado sauce and garnish with chopped peanuts and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-sesame-soy-roasted-turkey
Ingredients: ['2 - 2 ½ lb. turkey breasts', '1 Tbsp. white sesame seeds']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. mayonnaise', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. grated ginger', '1 garlic clove, minced']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. honey', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. white miso paste']
Procedure:
['
Place a rack in the bottom half of the oven. Preheat the oven to 450°F. In a small bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, salt, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, ginger, and garlic.
', '
Pat turkey breasts dry with paper towels, and place them into a roasting rack set inside a roasting pan. Loosen the skin over the breasts, and rub the mayonnaise mixture under and over the skin to cover. Place the turkey in the oven and immediately reduce the oven temperature to 350°F. Roast for 20 minutes.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together the honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and white miso paste. Baste the turkey with the glaze. Continue to roast the turkey, basting every 15 minutes, until a meat thermometer inserted in the thickest part of the breast reaches 165˚F, about 1 ¼ hour more. Scatter sesame seeds over the top during the last 15 minutes of roasting.
', '
Let the turkey stand for 10 to 15 minutes before slicing. Enjoy!
']

Name: sriracha-mayo-chickpea-burger
Ingredients: ['¼ cup quick-cooking oats', '1 can chickpeas', '1 garlic clove, chopped', '1 medium carrot, peeled and grated', '1 egg', '2 Tbsp. grapeseed oil, for cooking', '1-2 beefsteak tomato, sliced ', 'lettuce', 'red onion, sliced', 'pickles', '3-4 hamburger buns']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. ground coriander', 'Salt & pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl, combine the oats, ¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, and lemon juice. Let sit for 10-15 minutes.
', '
While it sits, drain and rinse the chickpeas and put them into a food processor with the garlic, ground spices, salt and pepper. Slightly process to obtain a rough paste then add the carrot, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo/ oat mixture and egg. Process briefly until evenly mixed but not totally smooth.
', '
Divide the mixture into 3-4 medium sized patties, about 1 ½” thick.\xa0
', '
Heat the oil in a saute pan or cast iron skillet over medium heat. Cook each side for 2-3 minutes or until crisp and golden.
', '
Dress your bun with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo\xa0and your favorite toppings (pickles, red onions, lettuce).\xa0
']

Name: pressure-cooker-barbecue-short-ribs
Ingredients: ['3 stalk scallion, roughly chopped', '2 lb. short ribs, laterally sliced', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, to garnish', '1 stalk scallion, to garnish']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '¼ cup rice wine', '½ cup brown sugar, packed', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil\t', '5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mv_E-j6KBz0
', '
In a bag, add the chopped scallion and marinade to the short ribs. Mix until combined. Refrigerate and marinate the short ribs for 30 minutes.
', '
Place the marinated short ribs in a pressure cooker set to “Slow Cook”. Cook for one hour.\xa0
', '
Remove the short ribs and serve. Garnish with sesame seeds and scallion.\xa0
']

Name: summer-rolls
Ingredients: ['excess water', '8 rice paper rounds', '32 medium-sized shrimp, cooked and cleaned', '½ cup fresh basil leaves', '½ cup fresh mint leaves', '½ cup fresh cucumber, cut into match-stick pieces', '½ cup carrot, cut into match-stick pieces', '1 cup baby spinach leaves']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0-g5QytP7U4

', '
Dip the rice paper rounds in a large bowl of water, wetting both sides for 30 seconds.\xa0
', '
Place four shrimps in a row on the lower third of the rice paper, then place basil leaves, mint leaves, cucumber, carrot, and baby spinach on top of the shrimp.\xa0
', '
Fold the left and right sides of the rice paper towards the center, then fold the bottom of the rice paper towards the center and roll upward.\xa0
', '
With your fingertips, dab some water at the top of the rice paper and roll to seal.\xa0
', '
Dip the summer roll in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce or Lee Kum Kee Sesame Sauce and enjoy!\xa0
Tip: As an option, adding Lee Kum Kee Sesame Sauce for come complex flavor and creamy texture

']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
