Name: niu-rou-bing-beef-pancake
Ingredients: ['12 oz. ground beef', '1 stalk scallion whites, finely chopped', '1 shallot, finely diced', '10 pcs. premade flaky dough', '1 Tbsp. oil', '1 stalk scallion greens, sliced, to garnish']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee’s Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rrFs3M-Ce7I
', '
In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, marinade, scallion whites, and shallots. Let the mixture marinate for 10 minutes in the refrigerator.
', '
Lay out the premade flaky dough round, then add the beef mixture and spread until it is ⅛-inch thick.\xa0
', '
Place another premade flaky dough round on top to sandwich the filling. Press around the edges with a fork to seal them together.\xa0
', '
In a large skillet, heat the oil until it smokes. Sear and cook the beef pancake on both sides until a golden-brown crust develops. Remove the beef pancake and let it rest for 5 minutes.
', '
Cut the beef pancake into quarters and serve with Lee Kum Kee’s Premium Oyster Sauce as a dip on the side.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-butternut-squash-pizza
Ingredients: ['-----Pizza Dough-----', '½ cup warm water', '1 ½ tsp. dry active yeast', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 ½ cups all-purpose flour', '¼ tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', 'additional olive oil, for greasing', '-----Roasted Butternut Squash-----', '2 cups cubed butternut squash, ½ inch cubes', '½ Tbsp. olive oil', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil', '½ tsp. chili powder ', '½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. ground black pepper', '-----Toppings-----', '3 strips thick-cut bacon', '½ onion, sliced', '1 ½ Tbsp. unsalted butter', '6 sage leaves', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '2 ½ cups mozzarella', 'honey, for drizzling']
Procedure:
['
To make the pizza dough: add the warm water, yeast, and honey to a large bowl. Mix everything together and let it sit for 10 minutes until foamy. Then add in the flour, salt and olive oil. Mix everything together until the dough comes together into a ball. Turn the dough out onto a surface and knead it until a smooth ball is formed. Add more flour if necessary. Grease a bowl with additional olive oil and place the dough into the bowl. Cover with a towel or plastic wrap and allow it to rise in a warm area for 1 ½ hour.
', '
To make the butternut squash: preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Add the butternut squash, olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, chili powder, salt, and pepper to a bowl. Toss the ingredients together until well combined then spread it out onto the prepared baking sheet. Bake it in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until the butternut squash is tender. Set it aside to cool.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Add the bacon to the pan and cook on both sides until crispy and golden brown. Remove it from the pan and allow it to drain on a plate lined with paper towels. When the bacon has cooled, roughly chop it into bits.
', '
Discard the bacon grease but leave 1 tablespoon of it in the pan. Heat the pan over medium high heat. Add in the onions and cook until translucent. Lower the heat to medium low and continue to cook the onions until they caramelize and become jammy. Remove them from the pan and allow them to cool.
', '
Melt the 1 ½ tablespoons of butter in a pan over medium heat. When the butter is hot and melted add the sage leaves to the pan. Baste the leaves with the hot butter and cook until they have fried and are a light golden brown. Remove them from the pan and allow them to drain on paper towels. Set them aside for later.
', '
When the dough has risen, preheat the oven to 400˚F.\xa0 Grease a baking sheet with olive oil. Press down on the dough to release any air. Place the dough onto the greased baking sheet and flatten it out into a disc. Shape and stretch the dough into a circle 12 inches in diameter. Be sure to leave the outer edge a little thicker for the crust. Spread the 1 ½ Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil on the pizza dough. Sprinkle half of the mozzarella cheese on top. Evenly distribute the roasted butternut squash, bacon, and caramelized onions on top of the pizza. Sprinkle the remaining mozzarella cheese on top. Bake the pizza in the oven for 20-25 minutes until the pizza dough is golden brown and cooked through. Remove the pizza from the oven and top with the fried sage leaves. Drizzle honey on top and slice into 8 pieces. Enjoy!
']

Name: instant-pot-middle-eastern-style-lamb-stew
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. lamb stew meat, cut into 1 ½ inch cubes', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion, diced', '4-6 garlic cloves, roughly chopped', '15 oz. can chickpeas drained and rinsed', '¼ cup raisins', 'cooked couscous, for serving', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. pepper', '1 tsp. cumin', '1 tsp. coriander', '1 tsp. turmeric', '1 tsp. cinnamon', '1 tsp. cumin seeds', '½ tsp. Aleppo chili flakes', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '¼ cup apple cider vinegar', '2 Tbsp. honey', '1 ¼ cups chicken broth']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the lamb and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce to a bowl. Mix the lamb together with the sauce until evenly combined. Allow it to sit and marinade for at least 30 minutes.
', '
Turn on the instant pot and set it to the “Sauté” setting. Add in the olive oil and onion and cook until the onion turns translucent. Then add in the garlic, marinated lamb, salt, pepper, cumin, coriander, turmeric, cinnamon, cumin seeds, and Aleppo chili flakes. Mix until combined and sauté for 5 minutes. Add in the tomato paste, apple cider vinegar, honey, chicken broth, chickpeas, and raisins. Mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Cover the instant pot and set it to the pressure cook setting for 50 minutes on high. When the stew is done, naturally release the pressure.
', '
Stir and taste. Adjust the seasoning if necessary.\xa0 Serve with couscous and garnish with parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: ramen-eggs
Ingredients: ['4 large eggs']
Seasoning: ['salt']
Marinade: ['¾ cup mirin', '¼ cup water', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. cayenne pepper', '2 garlic cloves', '1 star anise']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xNXMJUtJMJo
', '
Add the mirin, water,\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce,\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, cayenne pepper, garlic, and star anise into a sauce pot. Heat it over medium to medium high heat and bring the mixture to a simmer. Once it begins to simmer, remove the pot from the heat and allow it to cool to room temperature.
', '
Fill a pot with water and add a pinch of salt. Bring the water to a boil over high heat with the lid on then lower the heat to medium so that the water is gently bubbling.
', '
Gently lower the eggs into the water and place the lid back on. Cook them for 6 ½ minutes. Remove the eggs from the water and transfer them into a bowl of ice water. Allow them to cool for a few minutes.
', '
Peel the eggs and place them into an airtight container with the marinade. Allow the eggs to marinate for at least 2 hours. They can be marinated for up to 24 hours. Enjoy!
']

Name: filipino-style-spaghetti
Ingredients: ['1 lb. spaghetti noodles', '3 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 hot dogs, sliced diagonally', '1 onion, diced', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 lb. lean ground pork', 'grated parmesan cheese, for serving', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'ground black pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 ½ cups tomato sauce', '½ cup tomato paste', '1 cup ketchup']
Procedure:
['
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Cook the spaghetti according to package directions. Drain and rinse it under cold water. Set it aside for later.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Add in 2 tablespoons of the olive oil then add in the hot dogs. Cook the hot dogs until they have browned. Remove them from the pan and set them aside for later.
', '
Pour the remaining tablespoon of olive oil into the same pan. Add in the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion turns translucent. Place the ground pork into the pan. Cook and crumble the pork until it has browned and is fully cooked. Season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, tomato sauce, tomato paste, and ketchup to the pork. Mix to combine and reduce the heat to medium. Cover the pan and simmer the sauce for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Mix in the hot dogs.
', '
Portion the spaghetti noodles onto plates and spoon the sauce over top. Serve with grated parmesan cheese and garnish with chopped parsley.
']

Name: nasi-goreng
Ingredients: ['2 ½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 tsp. red chili, finely chopped', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 onion, diced', '5 oz. chicken breast, thinly sliced', '3 cups, cooked white rice, made the day before and refrigerated', 'fried eggs, for serving', 'quartered tomatoes, for serving', 'sliced, cucumbers, for serving', 'lime wedges, for serving', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. shrimp paste']
Procedure:
['
Heat one tablespoon of the oil in a large pan or wok over high heat. Add the chili and garlic to the pan and cook for 10 seconds. Then add in the onion and cook for 1 minute.
', '
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until it is mostly cooked through and the outside is white. Pour in 1 tablespoon of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and cook the chicken for another minute until it lightly browns.
', '
Add the remaining 1 ½ tablespoons of oil into the pan. When the oil has heated, add in the rice, the remaining tablespoon of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, and shrimp paste.
', '
Cook and stir the rice until it absorbs the sauces and caramelizes.
', '
Serve the nasi goreng with a fried egg, tomatoes, cucumbers, and lime wedges. Garnish with cilantro leaves and enjoy!
']

Name: crockpot-beef-and-broccoli
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. sirloin steak, thinly sliced', '12 oz. frozen broccoli florets', 'cooked white rice, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup beef broth', '1 (8 oz.) packet Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef', '1 Tbsp. cold water', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Add the beef broth and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef to a crockpot. Mix the two together until combined.\xa0
', '
Add the beef to the mixture. Cover with a lid and cook on low heat for 5 hours.\xa0
', '
When the beef has finished cooking, mix the water and cornstarch together in a small bowl. Pour the mixture into the crockpot, and mix.
', '
Add the frozen broccoli to the crock pot and stir to combine. Cover the crockpot and cook for 30 minutes.
', '
Serve the beef and broccoli with white rice and garnish with sliced green onions and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: japanese-style-egg-salad-sandwich
Ingredients: ['8 eggs', '2 Tbsp. chopped green onions', '4 Tbsp. salted butter, at room temperature', '8 slices bread']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '¼ tsp. sugar', '¼ tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. milk', '¼ cup Japanese style mayo']
Procedure:
['
Fill a pot with water. Add in 6 eggs and heat it over high heat. Bring the water to a boil. Remove the pot from the heat and cover. Let the eggs sit in the pot for 10 minutes then remove them and place them into a bowl of ice water for 10 minutes. Remove them from the ice water and remove the shells. Roughly chop the eggs and set it aside in a large bowl.
', '
Bring another pot of water to a boil. Gently lower the remaining 2 eggs into the boiling water. Cook them for 8 minutes then remove them and place them into a bowl of ice water. Remove them from the ice water and remove the shells. Slice the eggs in half lengthwise and set them aside.
', '
Use a fork to mash the chopped eggs even more. Then add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, sugar, salt, green onions, milk, and Japanese Style mayo. Mix until combined.
', '
Spread some of the butter onto each slice of bread. Then spoon a layer of the egg salad onto each slice of bread. Place one halved egg, cut side down, into the center of 4 of the bread slices. Top each of them with the remaining slices of bread.
', '
Cut off the crusts for each sandwich then slice them in half. Enjoy!
']

Name: scallion-pancake-waffles
Ingredients: ['---For the Dough---', '2 cups all-purpose flour ', '½ tsp. salt', '½ cup boiling water', '¼ cup cold water', '---For the Filling---', '½ cup + 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '¾ tsp. salt', '1 cup chopped green onions']
Procedure:
['
To make the dough: add the flour and salt into a bowl. Mix until combined. Slowly pour in the hot water and mix it into the flour with a fork. Then drizzle in the cold water, mixing it in with the fork until flakes of dough form. Press the dough flakes together until they combine. Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until a ball forms. Cover the dough with plastic wrap and set it aside to rest for 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
To make the filling, add flour, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and salt into a bowl. Mix the ingredients together until paste forms.
', '
When the dough is done resting, knead it for another minute until smooth. Divide it into 6 evenly sized balls. Work on one ball at a time. Keep the balls of dough you aren’t working with plastic wrap. Roll the ball of dough into a rectangle about 6x10 inches in size. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the filling onto the dough and spread it out, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge. Sprinkle about 2 tablespoons of the chopped green onions on top.
', '
Roll the dough up lengthwise so that you form a long rope. Slightly flatten the rope and pinch one end of it. Roll up the pinched end and continue rolling it towards the other end. Tuck the end into the underside of the bun. Press down on the disc to slightly flatten it. Repeat steps 3-4 on the remaining balls of dough.
', '
When all the discs have been formed, roll each of them out into a circle, about 7-8 inches in diameter. Stack two pancake circles on top of each other so that you now have a total of 3 pancakes.
', "
Preheat a waffle iron according to the machine's instructions. When the waffle iron has heated, spray it with cooking spray and place one stack of the pancakes into the waffle iron. Close the machine and cook it for about 8-10 minutes until it is golden brown and crispy. Remove the scallion pancake from the machine and cook the remaining stacks. Enjoy!
"]

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: tuna-poke-salad
Ingredients: ['8 oz. raw tuna, diced', '8 oz. salad leaves', '4 oz. cucumber, thinly sliced', '4 oz. cherry tomatoes', '4 oz. pea sprouts', '6 oz. pickled seaweed ', '4 oz. carrots, shredded', '2 Tbsp. green onion, chopped', '2 tsp. toasted sesame seeds']
Procedure:
['
Combine ingredients for Ginger Hong Shoyu.  Set aside.
', '
Mix tuna with green onions, sesame seeds and 4 Tbsp. of Ginger Honey Shoyu mixture.
', '
Place salad leaves and all vegetables on a plate, then lay tuna mixture on top. Drizzle salad with Ginger Honey Shoyu. Ready to serve.
']

Name: brown-braised-eggplant
Ingredients: ['1 lb.  eggplant, cut into strips', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp.  rice wine', '1 Tbsp.  cooking oil', 'chopped green onion as desired']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '½ tsp.  sugar', '1 tsp.  cornstarch', '4 Tbsp.  water']
Procedure:
['
Deep-fry eggplant until golden. Drain and set aside.
', '
Heat oil and saute ginger and garlic. Add eggplant and drizzle with rice wine.
', '
Stir in sauce mix and green onion until thickened. Serve.
']

Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: moussaka
Ingredients: ['3 eggplants, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch-thick slices', '½ cup olive oil', '1 Tbsp. butter', '1 lb. lean ground beef', '2 yellow onions, chopped', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 large egg, beaten', '1 ½ cup grated parmesan cheese']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '¼ tsp. ground cinnamon', '½ tsp. ground nutmeg', '½ tsp. fines herbs', '2 Tbsp. dried parsley', '1 (8 oz.) can tomato sauce', '½ cup red wine']
Sauce Mix: ['4 cups milk', '½ cup butter', '6 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=HMLhEl4G6rM&feature=youtu.be
', '
Lay the slices of eggplant on paper towels, sprinkle with salt, and set it aside for 30 minutes to draw out the moisture. Heat a pan over high heat. Pour in the olive oil. Add in the eggplant and fry until browned. Remove them from the pan and set them aside on paper towels to drain.
', '
Heat a large pan over medium heat, melt the 1 Tbsp. of butter and add the ground beef, onion, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Season with salt and pepper to taste. When the beef has browned, sprinkle in the cinnamon, half of the nutmeg, fines herbs and parsley. Pour in the tomato sauce and wine. Mix until combined. Simmer for 20 minutes then stir in the egg.
', '
To make the bechamel, add the milk to a sauce pot. Heat it until it is almost boiling then remove it from the heat. Melt ½ cup of butter in a large pan over medium heat. Whisk in flour until smooth. Reduce the heat to low and gradually pour in the hot milk, whisking constantly until it thickens. Season with salt, and pepper to taste.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with cooking spray. Arrange a layer of eggplant in the bottom of the pan. Cover eggplant with all of the meat mixture then sprinkle 1/2 cup of the parmesan cheese over top. Cover with the remaining eggplant and sprinkle another 1/2 cup of cheese on top. Pour the bechamel sauce over the top, and sprinkle with the remaining nutmeg. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
', '
Bake for 1 hour and enjoy!
']

Name: indian-spiced-hummus
Ingredients: ['½ cup raw whole cashews', '1 (15 oz.) can of chickpeas, drained', '3 garlic cloves', '3 Tbsp. pomegranate arils', 'parsley leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'pinch of garam masala', 'pinch of turmeric', 'pinch of Hungarian paprika', 'pinch of ground cardamom', 'salt, to taste', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '3 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 ½ tsp. curry powder', '½ tsp. ground cumin']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the cashews, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, garam masala, turmeric, Hungarian paprika, ground cardamom, and salt to taste. Spread the cashews onto the baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes, stirring halfway. Remove the cashews from the oven and set them aside to cool.
', '
Place the chickpeas into a food processor along with the lemon juice, garlic cloves, and olive oil. Pulse until the ingredients are just combined.\xa0
', '
Then add in the curry powder, cumin, and salt to taste. Blend until smooth and creamy. Taste for seasoning.
', '
Spread the hummus into a shallow dish. Top with the spiced cashews, pomegranate arils, and parsley leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: palak-paneer
Ingredients: ['12 oz. spinach', '1 tomato', '5 garlic cloves (3 whole cloves, 2 cloves minced)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 green chili', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 large onion, finely chopped', '½ cup water', '1 tsp. garam masala', '¼ tsp. turmeric powder', '¼ tsp. red chili powder', 'salt to taste', '2 Tbsp. heavy cream', '8 oz. paneer cheese', '½ Tbsp. crushed dried fenugreek leaves', 'lemon juice, to taste is']
Procedure:
['
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add in a pinch of salt and then the spinach. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the leaves are wilted then place them into a bowl of ice water.\xa0
', '
Add the cooled spinach, tomato, 3 whole cloves of garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and green chili into a blender. Puree until a smooth paste forms.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat, then add in the vegetable oil. Add in the minced garlic and cook until it turns a light golden-brown color. Stir in the onion and cook for 2-3 minutes until translucent.\xa0
', '
Add in the pureed spinach and water. Mix until combined. Cover the pan and cook for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
', '
Then add in the garam masala, turmeric, red chili powder, and salt to taste. Cook for 1 minute, then pour in the heavy cream.\xa0
', '
Add the paneer to the pan and allow it to simmer for 3-4 minutes. Remove the pan from heat, then mix in the fenugreek and lemon juice. Enjoy!
']

Name: vegan-tempeh-blt
Ingredients: ['8 oz. tempeh, thinly sliced', 'sourdough bread, as needed', 'vegan mayo, as needed', 'leafy greens, as needed', 'sliced tomatoes, as needed']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. maple syrup', '½ tsp. liquid smoke', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '½ tsp. onion powder', '¼ tsp. ground cumin', '½ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, apple cider vinegar, olive oil, maple syrup, liquid smoke, smoked paprika, onion powder, cumin, and salt.\xa0
', '
Place the sliced tempeh in a shallow dish and pour the marinade over top. Allow the tempeh to marinate for at least 1 hour.\xa0
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Place the tempeh onto the baking sheet and bake it for 15 minutes. Flip the tempeh over and bake for an additional 7-10 minutes until brown and crispy.
', '
To assemble the sandwiches, spread vegan mayo onto the slices of bread. Then layer the leafy greens, sliced tomatoes, and tempeh bacon on top. Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-and-aubergine-fatteh
Ingredients: ['4 pita breads, cut into triangles', '3 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 small onion, finely chopped', '1 eggplant, cut into ½ inch cubes', '1 lb. ground beef', '½ cup pomegranate arils', '½ cup toasted pine nuts', '2 Tbsp. chopped parsley']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. ground cumin', '2 tsp. ground coriander', '1 tsp. paprika', 'salt & pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spread the pita onto the baking sheet. Bake them in the oven for 10-15 minutes until toasted. Then set them aside for later.
', '
In a bowl, add in the Greek yogurt, tahini, lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and sea salt. Mix until combined and set it aside in the fridge for later.
', '
Heat a large pan over medium heat. Add in the oil and then the onion. Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook the onions for about 5 minutes. Then reduce the heat to low and cook for another 4 minutes until they develop a light golden-brown color.\xa0
', '
Increase the heat to medium and add in the eggplant. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
', '
Then add in the cumin, coriander, and paprika. Mix until combined. Increase the heat to high and add in the ground beef. Use a spatula to break the beef apart into crumbles. Reduce the heat to medium and cook until the beef is fully cooked through. Remove the pan from heat and season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
To assemble, arrange the pita onto a large plate. Then add on the ground beef and eggplant. Spread a layer of the reserved yogurt sauce on top of the beef and sprinkle the pomegranate arils, pine nuts, and chopped parsley on top. Enjoy!
']

Name: black-bean-and-sweet-potato-quesadilla
Ingredients: ['3 small sweet potatoes, cut into 1-inch cubes', '2 tsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 yellow onion, diced', '1 large green bell pepper, diced', '2 cloves minced garlic', '1 (15 oz.) can black beans, rinsed and drained', '6 medium flour tortillas', '1¼ cups grated sharp cheddar cheese']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. chili powder', '1 Tbsp. cinnamon', '1 tsp. cumin', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. ground chipotle chili powder', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Place the sweet potatoes into a pot and fill it with water until the potatoes are covered. Bring the water to a boil and cook the potatoes for about 8 minutes until tender. Drain the potatoes, then place them back into the pot.
', '
Mash the potatoes, then mix in the chili powder, cinnamon, cumin, smoked paprika, ¼ tsp. kosher salt, chipotle chili powder, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat, then pour in the olive oil. Add in the onion and bell peppers and sauté until tender. Then mix in the garlic and remaining ¼ tsp. of kosher salt.\xa0
', '
Add the sautéed vegetables and the black beans to the mashed sweet potatoes. Mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pan over medium heat and place a tortilla into the pan. Spread about a ½ cup of the sweet potato mixture onto one half of the tortilla. Sprinkle about 3 Tbsp. of cheese on top. Fold the other half of the tortilla over. Cook for about 1-2 minutes until the tortilla is lightly browned then flip onto the other side. Cook for about 1-2 minutes then remove it from the pan. Repeat this process to make the remaining quesadillas. Enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-mushroom-and-tomato-omelet
Ingredients: ['2 oz.  chicken, diced', '2 oz.  button mushrooms, diced', '2 oz.  tomatoes, diced', '1 oz.  cheddar cheese, grated', '2 Tbsp.  cooking oil', '3   eggs']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1/2 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix chicken with marinade.
', '
Use 1 Tbsp. cooking oil to sauté chicken until done. Add mushrooms and tomatoes, stir well and set aside.
', '
Beat eggs with Seasoning Mix.
', '
Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. cooking oil, add beaten eggs, and lightly scramble. Lower the heat and pan-fry to form an egg sheet. Place cooked chicken and vegetables on half the egg sheet and sprinkle cheese on top.
', '
Flip over the other half of egg sheet to close omelet. Heat through and serve hot.
']

Name: tuna-salad-with-oyster-sauce-dressing
Ingredients: ['4 oz. sushi-grade tuna     ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 oz. cherry tomatoes, sliced', '2 oz. cucumber, peeled and sliced', '2 oz. salad vegetables ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix tuna with 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce\xa0and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Heat oil and pan-fry tuna on each side for about 30 seconds till golden. Remove from pan, let cool, and slice.
', '
Place vegetables in center of plate. Arrange tuna on top.\xa0
', '
Mix dressing and pour over everything before serving.
']

Name: watermelon-gazpacho
Ingredients: ['5 cups watermelon, ¼-inch diced ', '1 cup seedless cucumber, ¼ inch diced', '¼ cup chopped red onion, plus extra to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ jalapeño, deseeded and minced, plus extra to taste', '2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 tsp. kosher salt', 'bean sprouts, to taste ', 'cilantro, few leaves']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=oygYps5CLpk&feature=youtu.be
', '
Add the watermelon, cucumber, red onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and jalapeño to a blender. Blend until smooth.
', '
Mix in the vinegar and salt. Cover and chill the gazpacho for 30 minutes, then serve with bean sprouts, red onion, cilantro and jalapeno slices, to taste. Enjoy!\xa0\xa0
']

Name: samosas
Ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '¼ cup and 2 Tbsp. oil', '¾ tsp. carom seeds', '1 ¼ tsp. salt', '6 Tbsp. water', '4 potatoes, cut into larger chunks', '¾ tsp. cumin seeds', '1 Tbsp. minced ginger', '½ cup frozen green peas', 'vegetable oil, for frying', 'mint chutney, for serving']
Seasoning: ['¾ tsp. red chili powder', '¾ tsp. garam masala', '½ tsp. cumin powder', '½ tsp. fennel powder', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '4 Tbsp. coriander leaves, finely chopped', '1 tsp. lemon juice ']
Procedure:
['
Add the flour, ¼ cup of oil, carom seeds, and ¾ tsp. of salt to a bowl. Rub the flour in between your palms to incorporate the oil into the flour. You should be able to press down on the flour and have it hold its shape without crumbling. Add in the water a little at a time, mixing it into the flour until a stiff dough forms. Cover and rest for 25-30 minutes.
', '
Add the potatoes to a pot and cover them with cold water. Bring the water to a boil and cook until the potatoes are tender. Drain the potatoes then crumble them into pieces in a bowl. Do not mash the potatoes.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat then pour in 1 Tbsp. of oil. Add in the cumin seeds and cook until they begin to sizzle. Mix in the ginger and cook until fragrant. Add in the green peas and sauté for about 2 minutes. Sprinkle in the red chili powder, garam masala, cumin powder, and fennel powder. Mix everything together and sauté for about 30 seconds. Add in the potatoes, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and remaining ½ tsp. of salt. Cook for 2-3 minutes then mix in the coriander leaves. Remove the pan from heat and stir in the lemon juice.\xa0
', '
Knead the dough until it smooths out a bit. Divide the dough into 5 evenly sized balls. While working with one ball of dough, cover the remaining balls with plastic wrap to prevent them from drying out. Lightly grease the work surface with oil. Flatten one ball of dough and lightly grease it with oil. Roll the dough out into an oval shape, about 8 ½ inches long and 6 ½ inches wide. Cut the oval in half, crosswise.
', '
Take one half of the oval and brush the straight edge with water. Join one end of the edge to the other end of the edge so that you form a cone shape. Pinch the seams together so that it is sealed. Fill the cone with the potato mixture then brush the top edges of the dough with water. Pinch the edges together until the seam is sealed. Set the assembled samosas aside and cover with a cloth while you assemble the remaining samosas.
', '
Fill a pot with a few inches of oil. Heat over medium heat. To know if the oil is ready, add in a small scrap of dough. It should slowly rise and there should be tiny bubbles. Add a few of the samosas into the oil. Cook for about 10-12 minutes. When the dough becomes slightly firm, increase the heat a little bit and flip the samosas onto the other side. Fry until crispy and golden brown. Remove the samosas from the oil and allow them to drain on paper towels. Continue to fry the remaining samosas. When all the samosas have been fried, place them onto a serving tray and serve with mint chutney. Enjoy!
']

Name: marinated-goat-cheese-spread
Ingredients: ['⅓ cup olive oil', "1 Tbsp. fresh thyme, plus add'l for garnish", '2 garlic cloves, minced', '¼ tsp. chili flakes', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce', '10 cherry tomatoes, sliced in half', '10 oz. spreadable goat cheese, at room temperature', 'parsley leaves, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Add the olive oil, thyme, garlic, and chili flakes to a microwave safe bowl. Microwave for 20 seconds to infuse the flavors. Remove the bowl from the microwave, then mix in ½ Tbsp. of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce, and the cherry tomatoes.
', '
In a separate bowl, mix together the goat cheese and remaining tablespoon of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce until combined.
', '
Spread the goat cheese into a shallow dish and spoon the olive oil mixture on top.\xa0
', '
Allow the goat cheese to sit with the olive oil for about 1 hour.
', '
Garnish with parsley leaves, and additional fresh thyme leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: shrimp-and-grits
Ingredients: ['¾ cup uncooked old-fashioned grits', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '1 lb. peeled and deveined shrimp', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 cups reduced-sodium chicken broth', '2 cups milk', '⅓ cup butter (cubed) and 1 Tbsp. butter', '¾ tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. cajun seasoning', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Add the chicken broth, milk, ⅓ cup of cubed butter, salt, and pepper to a sauce pot. Heat it over medium high heat and bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat to medium-low and slowly stir in the grits. Cover the pot with a lid and cook for 12-14 minutes until the grits have thickened. Stir frequently. Mix in the cheddar cheese and set the grits aside.
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add in the remaining tablespoon of butter and allow it to melt. Then add in the garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Place the shrimp into the pan along with the Cajun seasoning and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Cook the shrimp until fully cooked then remove the pan from heat.
', '
Spoon some of the grits into a dish then top with a few pieces of shrimp. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: ponzu-chicken-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 lb. diced boneless skinless chicken breasts', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '4 cups white rice', '1 cup sliced cucumbers', '1 cup sliced radish', '1 cup shredded carrots', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Place the chicken breasts and the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling and Dipping Sauce in a bowl. Mix the ingredients together and allow the chicken to marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat, then pour in the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Add the chicken into the pan and cook for 4-5 minutes until it is fully cooked through.\xa0
', '
Distribute the rice into each bowl and top with the chicken, sliced cucumbers, sliced radishes, and shredded carrots. Garnish with sliced green onions and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: pollo-a-la-brasa
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. bone-in chicken thighs ', 'lime slices, for serving', 'aji verde, for serving', 'plantains chips, for serving ', 'parsley, for serving ']
Marinade: ['2 garlic cloves, grated', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. aji amarillo chili paste', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '¼ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
Add the garlic, olive oil, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, aji amarillo chili paste, cumin, salt, and pepper into a resealable bag.\xa0
', '
Place the chicken thighs into the marinade and seal the bag. Ensure that each chicken thigh is well coated in the marinade, then place it into the fridge to marinate overnight.\xa0
', '
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Take the chicken out of the fridge while the oven preheats.\xa0
', '
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil, then place a wire rack on top of the tray. Place the chicken thighs skin side up onto the rack.\xa0
', '
Bake the chicken for about 40 minutes until it is cooked through and the skin is crispy.
', '
Serve with lime slices, aji verde, plantain chips, and parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: miso-roasted-eggplant-steak
Ingredients: ['2 globe eggplants, cut in half lengthwise', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. red miso paste', '2 Tbsp. mirin', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '1 Tbsp. sake', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Procedure:
['
Score the flesh of each eggplant in a crosshatch pattern, making sure you don’t cut all the way through. Set them aside for later.
', '
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with foil and spray it with cooking spray.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the miso paste, mirin, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, granulated sugar, sake, and vegetable oil.
', '
Brush half of the miso mixture onto the eggplant halves, making sure to get it inside the crevices. Place the eggplants cut side down onto the prepared baking sheet. Bake them in the oven for about 20-25 minutes until tender.
', '
Remove the eggplants from the oven and flip them so the cut side is up. Brush the remaining miso mixture on top and place them back into the oven. Broil the eggplants until the tops have caramelized then remove them from the oven. Garnish with white sesame seeds and enjoy!
']

Name: coconut-curry-mussels
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. mussels, scrubbed and cleaned', '1 cup frozen peas, thawed', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. olive oil', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 (14 oz.) can coconut milk', '2 tsp. red curry paste', '1 tsp. fish sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 ½ cups chicken broth', 'juice from 1 lime', '1 tsp. sea salt']
Procedure:
['
Heat a wide-bottomed pot over medium heat. Add in the olive oil and garlic and cook until fragrant.\xa0
', '
Then add in the coconut milk, red curry paste, fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, chicken broth, lime juice, and sea salt. Mix until combined and simmer for 5 minutes.
', '
Add the mussels to the pot and toss them together with the curry sauce. Increase the heat to medium-high and bring the curry to a boil. Cover the pot with a lid and cook until the mussels have opened, about 6 minutes. In the last 2 minutes of cooking, mix in the peas.
', '
Serve the mussels with lime wedges and enjoy!
']

Name: wagyu-beef-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['3.5 oz  Wagyu beef (chopped)', '2 tsp. cooking oil', '1.5 oz green onion (finely chopped)', '9 oz cooked rice ', '2 egg (beaten)']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Deluxe First Draw Soy Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Heat the oil in a pan over high heat, and stir-fry the wagyu beef until medium well. Set aside.
', '
Add 2 tsp. of oil into the same pan, and scramble the eggs over low heat until half-cooked. Add the rice, stir and turn it over on low heat to break up any clumps.
', '
Add the wagyu beef and Lee Kum Kee Deluxe First Draw Soy Sauce, stirring to combine. Stir in green onion over high heat until fragrance. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: sriracha-lada
Ingredients: ['ice  ', '¼ cup lime juice ', '½ cup tomato juice ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. Worcestershire sauce', '1 can beer', '1 grilled shrimp skewer', '1 lime wheel ', '1 quesadilla slice', '1 elote stick ', '1 yellow pepper skewer (optional)']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. sea salt', '1 tsp. chili powder ', '1 tsp. lime zest ', '1 lime wedge']
Procedure:
['
In a small plate mix together sea salt, chili powder and lime zest. Run the lime wedge around the rim of a glass then dip into the salty chili mixture and set aside.
', '
Fill a glass with ice, then add lime juice, tomato juice, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, worcestershire sauce and mix.\xa0
', '
Top off with beer and mix again.\xa0
', '
Garnish with a grilled shrimp skewer, lime wheel, quesadilla slice, an elote stick, and a yellow pepper skewer (optional).\xa0
', '
Check out the recipe video on our YouTube Channel!
']

Name: broccoli-beef-2
Ingredients: ['12 oz. beef', '10 oz. broccoli', '1 oz. carrot, sliced', 'oil, as needed', '2 green onion stalks, sectioned', '4 ginger slices', '3 garlic cloves, sliced']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. cooking wine', 'a little pepper', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 egg white', '2 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. of oil']
Procedure:
['
Slice the beef and mix it with cooking wine, pepper, 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce. Mix with 1 Tbsp. of starch and the egg white. Then add 2 Tbsp. of water and mix well. Cover the beef with 1 Tbsp. of oil.
', '
Cut the broccoli, boil them with the carrot slices in boiling water for 40 seconds. Scoop out, drain and set aside.
', '
Add an appropriate amount of oil to the wok. When the oil temperature is medium, put the beef into the wok. Slide until it is cooked. Scoop out and set aside.
', '
Leave some oil in the wok, stir-fry the green onions, ginger, and garlic for a while. Pour the sauce mix (Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, 1 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken, sugar, 1 Tbsp. of starch, a little water) into the wok, and bring it to a boil.\xa0
', '
Add in the beef, broccoli, and carrots and stir fry for 30 seconds. Drizzle the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and serve.
']

Name: korean-army-stew-budae-jjigae
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1/2 cup shredded onion', '2 Tbsp. garlic', '4 slices luncheon meat', '2 shredded Shiitake mushrooms', '6 pcs. ham sausages', '1 pack of Enoki mushrooms', '1 pack of instant noodles', '4 pcs. fish cakes', '1 slice of cheese', '6 pcs. tofu', '4 scallions (or chopped green onions) ', '10 oz. Korean rice cakes', '6 oz. kimchi']
Procedure:
['
Place the oil in a heated pot and stir-fry the shredded onions and garlic.\xa0
', '
Add water and one pack of Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Korean Army Stew to the pot, stirring until it is evenly mixed.
', '
Place the other ingredients into the soup base, cover with lid, and bring to a boil. Then simmer on low for about 3 minutes until the ingredients are completely heated through before removing lid. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-tuna-yaki-onigiri
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups short grain rice', '15 oz. cold water', '4.5 oz. canned albacore tuna, drained', '½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', 'shredded nori, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['1 ½ Tbsp. mayonnaise', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '½ tsp. rice vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the rice with cold water through a mesh sieve until the water runs clear. Drain well.
', '
Add the rice and the cold water to a pot. Bring the water to a boil. Cover the pot with a lid and lower the heat so that it is simmering. Simmer for about 16-18 minutes or until all the water has been absorbed. Remove the pot from heat and fluff the rice with a fork or rice paddle. Cover the top of the pot with a kitchen towel and place the lid back on. Allow the rice to cool.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, combine the tuna, mayonnaise, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, and rice vinegar. Mix until combined. Moisten your hands with water to prevent the rice from sticking to them. Place about a ½ cup of rice into your palm and spread it out to an oblong shape. Add 1 Tbsp. of the tuna mixture into the center.
', '
Pinch the rice together to cover the filling then mold it into a triangular shape.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat then add in the vegetable oil. Place the onigiri in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until the rice turns crispy and golden brown.
', '
Brush Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce\xa0onto both sides of the onigiri then cook on each side until the sauce slightly caramelizes. Serve with shredded nori and garnish with sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: spam-musubi
Ingredients: ['12 oz. spam, cut into 8 slices', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '3 sheets of nori, cut into thirds', '6 cups cooked sushi rice']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '½ cup sugar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=0FQ_akjNsZY&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, and sugar until the sugar dissolves. Add the spam to a resealable plastic bag and pour in the sauce mix. Marinate the spam for 15 minutes.\xa0 \xa0
', '
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add in the oil followed by the marinated spam and fry on each side until they turn golden brown and slightly crispy. Remove the spam from the pan.
', '
Place a strip of nori onto a clean work surface. Use your hands or a musubi mold to shape the rice into the same shape as the spam and about 1 ½ inches high. Wet your hands with water to prevent the rice from sticking to them.
', '
Place the rice onto the middle of the strip of nori. Add a slice of spam on top of the rice and fold the ends of the nori strip on top. Use a bit of water to adhere the ends of the nori together. Repeat steps 4-5 to assemble the remaining musubi. Enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-lime-watermelon-salad
Ingredients: ['1 medium watermelon, cut into 1-inch cubes', '1 english cucumber, deseeded and diced', '1 shallot, thinly slices', '1 jalapeño, thinly sliced', '3 Tbsp. chopped cilantro leaves', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice, maple syrup, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, avocado oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Set it aside for later.
', '
Arrange the watermelon, cucumber, shallot, jalapeño, and cilantro onto a large dish or platter. Drizzle the dressing over top. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!
', '
N/A
']

Name: thai-style-chicken-peanut-flatbread
Ingredients: ['2 flatbreads', '2 cups cooked, shredded chicken', '1 cup sliced red onion', '½ cup shredded carrots', '2 cups mozzarella cheese', '¼ cup chopped peanuts, for garnish', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 tsp. fish sauce', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '¼ tsp, ground ginger', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '¼ tsp. salt', '½ cup peanut butter']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line 2 baking sheets with aluminum foil. Place each flatbread on a baking sheet.
', '
In a medium bowl, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, water, lime juice, fish sauce, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, ground ginger, black pepper, and salt. Then stir in the peanut butter. Mix until combined.
', '
Spread some of the sauce onto the flatbreads, reserving a few Tbsp. for later.\xa0
', '
Distribute the chicken, red onion, carrots, and mozzarella cheese onto the flatbreads.
', '
Bake them in the oven for about 10-15 minutes until the cheese is melted and the flatbread is golden brown.\xa0
', '
Drizzle the remaining peanut butter sauce on top and garnish with the chopped peanuts and cilantro leaves. Cut into slices and enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: baked-sesame-feta
Ingredients: ['½ cup all-purpose flour', '1 large egg, beaten', '3 Tbsp. white sesame seeds', '3 Tbsp. black sesame seeds', '8-10 oz. block of feta, pat dry', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.\xa0
', '
Place the flour and egg into separate dishes. In another dish, combine the black and white sesame seeds.\xa0
', '
Coat all sides of the feta in flour. Dust off any excess flour. Dip the feta into the egg until all the flour has been absorbed. Allow any excess liquid to drip off. Then completely coat the feta in sesame seeds.
', '
Place the feta onto the prepared baking sheet and drizzle the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil on top. Bake for 20 minutes then enjoy!
']

Name: orange-jackfruit-bowls
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 red onion, cut into 1-inch pieces', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 tsp. grated ginger', '1 red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces', '1 yellow bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces', '14 oz. can young jackfruit, drained and shredded into chunks', 'cooked white rice, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken']
Procedure:
['
Heat a pan over medium high heat then add in the vegetable oil.
', '
Add the red onion to the pan and cook until translucent. Then stir in the garlic and ginger. Cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.\xa0
', '
Add in the red bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, and jackfruit. Cook until the bell peppers are tender. Season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Pour in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken. Mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Serve over white rice and garnish with sliced green onions and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: kimchi-beef-noodle-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. frozen udon noodles', '½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8 oz. beef top sirloin, thinly sliced against the grain', '5 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 cup chopped kimchi', '2 Tbsp. gochujang', 'fried eggs, for serving', 'shredded nori, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup kimchi juice', '¼ cup low sodium chicken broth', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef']
Procedure:
['
Boil the udon noodles according to the package directions then drain and set aside for later.
', '
Heat a pan over high heat then add in the vegetable oil. Add the beef to the pan and season with salt and pepper. Cook for about 3 minutes until cooked through. Remove the beef from the pan and set it aside for later.
', '
In the same pan, melt 2 Tbsp. of the butter over medium high heat. Add the chopped kimchi and gochujang. Cook until the kimchi slightly softens and begins to brown.
', '
Pour in the kimchi juice, chicken broth, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook until it slightly reduces, about 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add the udon to the pan along with the beef and remaining 3 Tbsp. of butter. Cook and toss the noodles together with the sauce until evenly coated, about 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Serve with a fried egg and garnish with shredded nori and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-lemon-pepper-potato-wedges
Ingredients: ['4 russet potatoes', 'cooking spray, as needed', 'chopped parsley, for garnish', 'lemon wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. garlic salt', '½ tsp. cracked black pepper', '½ Tbsp. olive oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Slice the potato wedges, lengthwise, into wedges.
', '
In a large bowl, toss together the potato wedges, garlic salt, black pepper, olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce.
', '
Spray the air fryer basket with cooking spray and place the potato wedges inside.\xa0
', '
Air fry the potatoes at 400˚F for 15 minutes, flipping them halfway through.\xa0
', '
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with lemon wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: pancit
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 lb. boneless skinless chicken breast, sliced into bite-sized pieces', '1 onion, finely chopped', '2 garlic cloves, finely chopped', '1 cup chopped cabbage', '½ cup julienne carrots', '8 oz. rice noodles', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cups low sodium chicken broth', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. granulated sugar']
Procedure:
['
Heat a large pan over medium heat and add in the oil. When the oil is hot, toss in the chicken and cook until the chicken is fully cooked. Remove the chicken from the pan and set it aside for later.\xa0
', '
Add the onion and garlic to the pan. Cook until the onion is translucent then add the chicken back to the pan. Season with salt and pepper and mix. Mix in the cabbage and carrots. Cook for another 3-4 minutes.\xa0
', '
Then add the chicken broth, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and sugar. Mix and bring the sauce to a boil.\xa0
', '
Add in the rice noodles and stir until the noodles are tender, about 3-4 minutes. When the noodles are cooked through, remove the pan from heat. Garnish with sliced green onions and Enjoy!
']

Name: fried-rice-with-dried-baby-shrimp-and-seaweed
Ingredients: ['350g steamed rice', '10g dried seaweed', '15g dried baby shrimp', '2 eggs, beaten', '50g red carrot', '5g green onion']
Seasoning: ['30ml Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoning Soy Sauce', '50ml cooking oil', '3g white pepper']
Procedure:
['
Mix steamed rice with eggs.
', '
Chop seaweed, carrot, and onion. Set aside.
', '
Heat pan and add cooking oil. Stir-fry chopped carrot and steamed rice mixture. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoning Soy Sauce, then add seaweed and dried shrimp. Sprinkle with white pepper and onion. Ready to serve.
']

Name: spicy-shanghai-sponge-tofu
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baked sponge tofu', '2 ½ Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 oz. sliced shiitake mushrooms (soaked in water for 20 minutes)', '2 oz. sliced bamboo shoots', '2 oz. black trumpet mushrooms (soaked in water for 20 minutes)', '1 tsp. goji berries', '2 oz. dried daylily bulbs (soaked in water for one hour)', 'Cornstarch slurry as needed']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['8 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Brown Braising Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee‘s Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '8 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Heat water to a boil and add the baked sponge tofu. Boil for 2 minutes, then drain. Heat the wok until hot and add 2 Tbsp. cooking oil and baked sponge tofu. Stir-fry until golden and set aside.\xa0
', "
In a wok, heat ½ Tbsp. cooking oil. Stir-fry the shiitake mushrooms and bamboo shoots. Add the black trumpet mushrooms, goji berries, daylily bulbs and a mixture of Lee Kum Kee Brown Braising Sauce, Lee Kum Kee's Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, and water. Braise for around 10-15 minutes until well cooked.\xa0
", '
Add cornstarch slurry and Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil. Now your dish is ready to serve – enjoy!
']

Name: stir-fried-pork-belly-with-chili-peppers
Ingredients: ['10 oz. pork belly, thinly sliced', '1 ½ Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. jalapeños, cut into chunks', '1 oz. red bell peppers, cut into chunks', '1 oz. ginger, sliced', '1 oz. garlic, sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the pork belly with a mixture of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce for 10 minutes.
', '
Add the oil to a heated wok and stir-fry the jalapeños and bell peppers. Sautee the ginger and garlic until fragrant.
', '
Add the pork belly and stir-fry until fragrant. Add Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood and stir-fry all ingredients until well done.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil and mix together. Now your dish is ready to serve – enjoy!
']

Name: seafood-paella
Ingredients: ['4 ½ cups chicken broth', '½ tsp. saffron threads', '¼ tsp. salt', '3 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ yellow onion, finely chopped', '½ red bell pepper, finely chopped', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '6 oz. chorizo, sliced into half moons', '3 cups arborio rice', '14 oz. fire roasted diced tomatoes', '½ lb. littleneck clams, rinsed and scrubbed', '½ lb. mussels, rinsed and scrubbed', '½ lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 cup frozen green peas, thawed', '¼ cup chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jc0-YiAXmbs
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Pour the chicken broth into a pot and heat it over high heat. Bring the chicke broth to a boil, then mix in the saffron and salt. Turn off the heat and let the saffron steep from 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pan over medium heat. Pour in the olive oil then add in the onion and red bell pepper. Cook until the onion turns translucent and stir in the garlic and chorizo.\xa0
', '
Add in the rice and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Mix it until the grains are evenly coated with oil. Mix in the stock and tomatoes. Bring the stock to a simmer. Cover the pan with a lid and simmer for 15 minutes or until most of the stock has been absorbed.\xa0
', '
Nestle the clams, mussels, and shrimp, into the rice. Tightly cover the top of the pan with foil then place it in the oven for 8-10 minutes until the rice and seafood are cooked.\xa0
', '
Remove the pot from the oven and gently fold in the peas. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: lobster-rolls
Ingredients: ['3 cups chopped, steamed lobster', '4 French rolls', '4 romaine lettuce leaves', 'green onion, for garnish', 'lemon wedges, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup and 2 Tbsp. melted butter', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Add the lobster, 2 Tbsp. of melted butter, and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo to a bowl. Mix until combined.\xa0\xa0
', '
Split the French rolls open ¾ of the way. Brush the remaining melted butter onto the insides of the rolls. Heat a pan over medium heat. Place the rolls cut side down onto the pan to toast the inside. Remove the rolls from the pan when they are golden and toasted.
', '
Add a romaine lettuce leaf to each roll and fill with the lobster meat.\xa0
', '
Garnish with chopped green onion and serve with lemon wedges. Enjoy!
']

Name: wonton-happiness-salad
Ingredients: ['4 cups romaine lettuce, chopped', '3 cups shredded cabbage', '1 cup shredded carrots', '1 ½ cups fried wonton strips', '¼ cup fresh cilantro leaves', '½ cup sliced green onions', '1 Tbsp. white sesame seeds', '2 cups shredded cooked chicken']
Procedure:
['
Add the avocado oil, rice vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce to a bowl. Mix until emulsified and set it aside for later.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a large bowl, add in the romaine lettuce, shredded cabbage, shredded carrots, wonton strips, cilantro leaves, green onion, white sesame seeds, and shredded chicken. Toss until the ingredients are evenly distributed.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving dish and serve with the prepared dressing. Enjoy!
']

Name: portobello-mushroom-fajitas
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. portobello mushrooms, sliced ¾ inch thick', '1 red onion, sliced', '1 red bell pepper, sliced', '1 orange bell pepper, sliced', '1 yellow bell pepper, sliced', 'mini corn tortillas, for serving', 'salsa, for serving', 'crumbled cotija cheese, for serving']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['¼ cup taco seasoning', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '¼ cup lime juice', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 450˚F. Line a baking tray with aluminum foil.\xa0 In a large bowl, mix together the taco seasoning, olive oil, lime juice, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce.
', '
Add the portobello mushrooms, red onion, red bell peppers, orange bell peppers, and yellow bell peppers to the bowl along with salt and pepper to taste. Toss the vegetable together with the marinade until evenly coated.
', '
Spread the vegetable out onto the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 20 minutes.
', '
Serve with corn tortillas, salsa, and cotija cheese. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']

\xa0

', '
