Name: valentines-day-bento-box
Ingredients: ['---Japanese Rice---', '1 ½ cups short grain rice', '1 ½ cups water', '---Tamago---', '3 large eggs', '3 Tbsp. dashi', '2 tsp. granulated sugar', '1 tsp. mirin', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'vegetable oil, for greasing', '---Assembly---', '1 sheet of nori']
Sauce Mix: ['---Japanese Curry---', '½ Tbsp. peanut oil', '½ onion, finely chopped', '1 clove garlic, minced', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '½ apple, peeled and minced', '1 ½ Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '1 carrot, peeled and diced', '1 cup broccoli florets', '½ tsp. garam masala', '2 Tbsp. curry powder', '1 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 cup red wine', '2 tsp. granulated sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 cups water', '½ cup frozen corn kernels', '½ cup frozen peas', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
To make the rice, rinse and drain the rice with cold water about 3-4 times until the water runs mostly clear. Add the rice and water to a pot. Let it soak for 1 hour. Cover the pot with a lid and bring it to a boil over medium high heat. Lower the heat so that it is simmering and cook for 20 minutes until all of the water has been absorbed. Remove the pot from the heat and let the rice stand for 15 minutes. Remove the lid and fluff the rice. Set it aside for later.
', '
To make the curry, heat a pot over medium heat. Add in the peanut oil and then the onion. Cook until the onion turns translucent. Then add in the garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and apple. Cook for about 2 minutes. Add in the flour. Mix and cook for 1 minute. Add in the carrots, broccoli, garam masala, curry powder, and tomato paste. Mix until combined then pour in the red wine. Bring the mixture to a boil then add in the sugar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and water. Bring the mixture to a boil again then lower the heat so that it is simmering. Cover the pot with a lid and simmer for 30 minutes. Remove the lid and cook for another 30 minutes. In the last 5 minutes, mix in the corn and peas. Season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
To make the tamago, beat the eggs together then mix in the dashi, sugar, mirin, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce.
', '
Heat a small pan over medium heat. Blot a paper towel with vegetable oil then wipe the greased towel onto the pan. Pour in half of the egg mixture. Lightly scramble the eggs in the first 30 seconds then cover the pan with a lid and cook for about 2 minutes or until all of the egg on top is cooked. Remove the egg from the pan then repeat this process to cook the remaining egg mixture.\xa0
', '
To assemble the bento box, spoon some of the curry into the serving dish. Form the rice into various sized balls to make the head, ears, arms, and feet for the bears. Cut shapes out of the nori to make the eyes and nose. Trim the tamago to fit the shape of the serving dish. Place all of the components together and enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-margarita-cocktail
Ingredients: ['1⁄2 oz. lime juice', '6 oz. tequila', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce', '¼ cup fresh lime juice ', '4 tsp. cielito', 'ice ', '1 jalapeno sliced for garnish ', '12 oz. pineapple soda', '1 pineapple ring, quartered for garnish ']
Procedure:
['
[Video]
', '
In a shaker add fresh lime juice, tequila and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Shake for 30 seconds.\xa0
', '
Using a lime wedge for fresh lime juice, run it along the rim of 4 glasses, place the cielito in a flat plate then season each rim.
', '
Add ice, and jalapeno slices to all the glasses. Evenly pour the tequila mixture between the 4 glasses.\xa0
', '
Top with pineapple soda and stir. Garnish with a pineapple wedge & jalapeno slice. Serve and enjoy!\xa0\xa0
']

Name: thai-turkey-lettuce-cups
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '½ yellow onion, diced', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 small red chili pepper, minced', '1 lb. ground turkey', '1 head boston lettuce, leaves separated', '1 small carrot, fine julienne', '½ cup peanuts, roughly chopped', '¼ bunch cilantro leaves, for garnish ', '1 lime cut into 4 wedges']
Seasoning: ['salt, to taste', 'black pepper, to taste', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gvt4R8GEVIs&feature=youtu.be
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Pour in the vegetable oil.
', '
Add the yellow onion to the pan and sauté until it turns translucent. Then add in the garlic and red chili pepper. Cook until the garlic becomes fragrant, about 30 seconds.\xa0
', '
Add the turkey into the pan. Cook and crumble the turkey into small pieces until it is fully cooked. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Pour in ¼ cup of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap and mix it together with the turkey until fully combined. Continue to cook the turkey with the sauce until most of it is absorbed. Remove from heat.
', '
To serve, fill each lettuce cup with a few spoonfuls of the turkey mixture. Then add ¼ cup of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap on top followed by julienne carrot sticks, chopped peanuts, and cilantro. Serve with lime wedges on the side and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: stir-fried-chicken-in-ground-bean-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1/2 cup onions, shredded', '1 cup asparagus, sliced', '1/2 cup baby corns, sliced', '8 oz. chicken, cut into pieces']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Ground Bean Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a wok and add cooking oil. Stir fry onions, asparagus, baby corns, and chicken until done.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Ground Bean Sauce and heat through.
', '
N/A
']

Name: stir-fried-beef-with-sa-cha-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. beef fillet, sliced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. bell pepper, cut into pieces']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sa Cha Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Marinate sliced beef with Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce.
', '
Stir-fry beef in oil until done.
', '
Add bell pepper pieces and Lee Kum Kee Sa Cha Sauce and heat through.
']

Name: roasted-pork-with-teriyaki-sauce
Ingredients: ['17½ oz. pork loin ', '5 pcs. thyme ', '1/2 onion, shredded', '1 apple', '1 lemon ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil ', 'salt, to taste', '1 tsp. fennel seeds ']
Marinade: ['1½ cup Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Pour Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce into a resealable plastic bag. Add the pork and coat with the sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour, preferably overnight.
', '
Pre-heat oven to 425°F. Rub olive oil, salt, and fennel seeds all over the pork. Place the pork in a roasting tray, skin-side up, and transfer to oven. After 10 minutes, turn the heat down to 320°F. Lay the thyme and shredded onion around the pork in the roasting tray. Roast for a further 25 minutes until cooked through. Transfer the meat to a platter, cover with aluminum foil and let rest.
', '
Discard the excess liquid fat from the tray. Add the remaining Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce. Place over medium heat and stir until the gravy starts to boil and becomes syrupy. Once ready, set aside.
', '
Cut the apple into quarters, leaving the skin on, but removing the core. Toss the apple with a squeeze of lemon juice. Stir-fry the apples with 1 Tbsp. oil for 15 minutes. Turn regularly. They are ready when they are tender and golden. Sprinkle some thyme leaves on the apples. Cut the meat into thick slices, add gravy and serve with apples.
']

Name: mushroom-beef-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. button mushrooms, cleaned and sliced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. beef, cut into strips']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. sherry , dry', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Rub beef with 1 Tbsp. Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce and 1 Tbsp. cornstarch. Set aside.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, stir fry beef until about half way done.
', '
Add dry sherry and button mushrooms and cook for another 3 minutes.
', '
Pour in 2 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce and cook mixture until heated through.
']

Name: marinated-beef-shank
Ingredients: ['18 oz. beef shank']
Seasoning: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Chinese Marinade', '1½ cup water']
Procedure:
['
Boil Lee Kum Kee Chinese Marinade with water, add in beef shank, cover the lid and simmer for 40 minutes until done. Spoon out.
', '
Boil the marinade and pour 4 Tbsp. of it over the dish.
', '
N/A
']

Name: lemon-pepper-pork-chops
Ingredients: ['4 medium - sized pork chops', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce    ', '½ cup butter, melted  ', '4 cloves garlic, minced']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Season pork chops with salt and pepper, set aside.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce, butter and garlic. Set aside.\xa0
', '
In a cast iron skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. When the skillet is hot, add the pork chops and sear until golden brown (about 2 minutes per side).\xa0
', '
Pour the sauce mixture over the pork chops then place the skillet in the oven and cook for about 10-12 minutes or the internal temperature reaches 145°F.\xa0
', '
Remove from the oven and spoon the lemon pepper butter sauce left in the skillet along with the capers onto the pork chops before serving.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: kung-pao-chicken-3
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. chicken, sliced', '2 oz. water chestnuts, diced', '2 oz. celery, diced', '2 oz. red bell peppers, diced', '1 oz. onion, sliced', '1 oz. peanuts', '1 oz. green onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Kung Pao Stir-Fry Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan, add 2 Tbsp. cooking oil, sliced chicken, stir-fry until half done. Add 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Kung Pao Stir-Fry Sauce, diced water chestnuts, celery, red bell peppers, stir evenly.
', '
Then add 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Kung Pao Stir-Fry Sauce, sliced onion, peanuts and green onions.\xa0
', '
Heat through.
']

Name: hot-and-spicy-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['4 chicken wings, frozen']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot']
Procedure:
['
Defrost chicken wings, place with Marinade for at least 2 hours.
', '
Mix the Dipping Sauce well, set aside.
', '
Pan-fry the chicken wings until golden. Then bake the chicken wings in a preheated 375 °F oven for about 8 minutes until cooked through. Serve with dipping sauce.
', '
Tip: Instead of pan-frying, the chicken wings can be deep-fried before baking.
']

Name: holiday-oyster-prime-rib
Ingredients: ['1 prime rib bone-in roast, tied (about 14 lb.) ', '20 large sage sprigs ', '20 large thyme sprigs', '8 bay leaves', '8 shallots, peeled and halved', '1 head garlic, cloves crushed, plus 4 cloves thinly sliced', '2 cups water', '1 onion, thinly sliced', '1 cup dry red wine', '5 cups beef stock, or low sodium broth ', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour ']
Seasoning: ['2 cups Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, plus 1 Tbsp. to make the gravy', 'dash freshly ground pepper', '3 Tbsp. freshly cracked black peppercorns']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Set the meat in a large roasting pan, fat side up. Season the meat generously with 2 cups of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and pepper. Around the roast, scatter 10 sprigs each of sage and thyme, 6 of the bay leaves, the shallots and the crushed garlic cloves. Pour in 1 cup of the water and roast for 45 minutes.\xa0
', '
Reduce the temperature to 275 degrees F. Roast the meat for about 2 hours and 15 minutes or longer, adding the remaining 1 cup of water to the pan as the juices evaporate. The roast is done when an instant-read thermometer inserted in the thickest part registers 135 degrees F.\xa0
', '
Transfer the roast to a large carving board. Pour the fat in the roasting pan into a large heatproof bowl, stopping when you reach the syrupy pan juices at the bottom. Pour the pan juices into a small bowl and discard the vegetables and herbs.\xa0
', '
To make the gravy, set the pan over 2 burners and add 2 Tbsp. of the reserved fat. Add the thinly sliced onion, 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, dash of freshly ground peppers and the 4 cloves of thinly sliced garlic, remaining 2 bay leaves and 10 sprigs each of sage and thyme. Cook over moderate heat until the onion is softened, about 8 minutes. Add 1 cup of dry red wine and cook, scraping up any bits stuck to the bottom and sides of the pan. Pour the mixture into a medium saucepan and bring to a boil over high heat. Add 5 cups of beef stock and pan juices and cook over moderate heat until slightly reduced, about 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, whisk the flour with 2 Tbsp. of the reserved fat. Whisk the paste into the saucepan and simmer the gravy until thickened, about 5 minutes. Strain the gravy through a fine sieve and keep warm until ready to serve.
', '
Cut the bones off the roast and slice the meat ½ inch thick. Cut in between the bones and serve them on the side. Pass the gravy at the table.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-glazed-pork-belly
Ingredients: ['3 lbs. pork belly (uniform thickness)']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce  ', '2 tsp. chili flakes ', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '¼ cup honey ', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce ', '1 ½ tsp. Chinese 5 spice powder ', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar ', '1 tsp. black pepper ', '1 Tbsp. fresh ginger, grated']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, chili flakes, Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce, honey, fish sauce, Chinese 5 spice powder, rice vinegar, black pepper and fresh ginger, mix well.\xa0
', '
Place pork belly in a large zip up bag and pour marinade over. Turning it over to evenly distribute the marinade. Let it marinate for several hours or overnight in the fridge.\xa0
', '
Preheat the oven to 275℉. Place the pork belly on a roasting rack (reserving the marinade) and roast for 4-5 hours depending on how thick the pork belly is.\xa0
', '
Place the remaining marinade in a small saucepan on low heat, bringing to a simmer. The marinade will reach a syrup consistency.\xa0\xa0
', '
In the last hour of roasting brush the glaze over every 20 minutes to build more flavor onto the pork belly.\xa0\xa0
', '
Let the pork belly rest for 15-20 minutes before serving.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: hoisin-and-mustard-flavored-minced-chicken
Ingredients: ['10 oz. minced chicken leg meat', 'as appropriate oil', '1 Tbsp. minced ginger   ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic  ', '4 oz. onions, chopped ', '4 oz. bamboo shoots, chopped  ', '1 oz. green onions (white part only), chopped   ', '1/8 cup cilantro, chopped', 'as appropriate deep-fried wonton wrappers, crushed ']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Garlic Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. yellow mustard', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Peanut Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Stir-fry chicken till golden brown and strain out the liquid.
', '
In a heated pot, add oil to stir-fry ginger, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and onions. Then add bamboo shoots and stir-fry the minced chicken until the sauce evaporates. Add in seasoning mix and stir-fry until it is evenly coated with sauce.
', '
Add green onions and cilantro and stir-fry. Sprinkle with crushed deep-fried wonton wrappers.
', '
Tips: You can also enjoy this recipe as a lettuce wrap.\xa0
']

Name: grilled-chicken-with-string-beans
Ingredients: ['2 Large chicken breast, skin on', '1 oz. Ginger, peeled, cut into rounds', '8 oz. Green beans, ends removed']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a baking dish, combine the chicken breast, ginger, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Mix well.
', '
Marinate chicken for two hours or more.
', '
Bake at 350 degrees until chicken is fully cooked. Cool for 5 minutes.
', '
Toss green beans with ginger and the remaining sauce.
', '
Slice chicken into 1/2 inch thick pieces.  Serve with green beans.
']

Name: grilled-black-pepper-pork-chops
Ingredients: ['4 pork loin chops', '2 apples, sliced ', '1 red onion, sliced ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 bunch green onions ']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce + additional for serving', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, salt and pepper to taste, mixing well. Add in the pork chops, apples and onions. Toss well to combine.
', '
On a grill over medium high heat, brush the olive oil over the grates. Then put all the contents of the bowl onto the grill. Move the pork chops to the hottest part of the grill and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.\xa0
', '
Then move to a cooler spot on the grill and turn over the apples and onions for an additional 5-6 minutes. Add in your green onion bunch and cook until wilted. (Internal temperature should reach 145°F.)
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and allow them to rest for 5-6 minutes before slicing. Serve with additional Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce if desired.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: grilled-beef-flank-ribs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef flanken ribs']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. black pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice']
Procedure:
['
Combine Premium Soy Sauce, brown sugar, minced garlic, lemon juice, sesame oil in a bowl.
', '
Add beef flank ribs and marinate for 1 to 2 hours.
', '
Grill or broil 5 minutes each side.
']

Name: curry-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '7 oz. potatoes, cut into pieces', '3½ oz. carrots, cut into pieces', '2 oz. onions, cut into pieces', '9 oz. chicken, cut into pieces', '1 cup water']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Curry Sauce', '1/4 cup coconut milk']
Procedure:
['
Heat a wok and add cooking oil, stir fry potatoes, carrots, onions and chicken pieces.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Curry Sauce, water and coconut milk, simmer until sauce thickens.
', '
N/A
']

Name: citrus-chicken-skewers
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless skinless chicken thighs, diced  ', 'non-stick cooking spray   ', '8 wooden skewers']
Marinade: ['½  cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken ', '1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine the chicken, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken, salt and pepper. Mix well until evenly combined and let it marinate for 15 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
Evenly distribute the chicken on to 8 skewers using your hand to spread them out so they can cook evenly.\xa0
', '
Turn the grill on to medium heat, once hot spray the grill with non-stick cooking spray.
', '
Place the skewers on and let them cook on each side for 5 minutes turning over a total of 4 times.
']

Name: chicken-skewers-in-satay-sauce
Ingredients: ['50 g pineapple, cut into pieces', '75 g bell pepper, cut into pieces', '350 g chicken meat, sliced']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Satay Sauce', '2 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Marinate sliced chicken meat with Lee Kum Kee Satay Sauce and water for 30 minutes.
', '
Thread pineapple pieces and bell pepper pieces and chicken meat on bamboo sticks alternatively. Grill on pan-fry until done.\xa0
', '
Serve with extra Lee Kum Kee Satay Sauce.
']

Name: bulgogi
Ingredients: ['16 oz. beef, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. onions, julienned', '1 Tbsp. garlic, minced', '2 oz. carrots, julienned', '2 oz. enoki mushrooms (optional)', '3 Tbsp. green onions, chopped ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Korean Bulgogi Marinade']
Procedure:
['
Place the thin beef slices into a bowl. Add the Lee Kum Kee Korean Bulgogi Marinade and mix well. Marinate for approximately 10 minutes.
', '
Heat the oil in a hot pot, then sauté the onions and the minced garlic until fragrant. Add the marinated beef slices and stir-fry until cooked through.\xa0
', '
Add the carrots, enoki mushrooms (optional), and the chopped green onion, and quickly stir.
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil and stir well.
']

Name: breaded-chicken-breast
Ingredients: ['8 oz. chicken breast, tenderized and cut thinly', '4 Tbsp. flour', '1 whole egg, beaten', '1 cup breadcrumbs, or panko (Japanese bread crumbs)']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste ']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee  Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Combine Sesame Oil, Hoisin Sauce and vinegar in a small bowl (Hoisin sauce mixture). Mix well and set aside.
', '
Season chicken with salt and pepper.
', '
Dip chicken into flour. Dip again into the beated eggs. Dip again into bread crumbs until chicken breast is fully coated.
', '
Deep-fry chicken until golden brown. Serve with Hoisin sauce mixture.
']

Name: beef-pepper-steak
Ingredients: ['4 oz. red and green bell peppers, seeded, cut into strips', '1 oz. water', '8 oz. top sirloin steak, cut into strips']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. sherry, dry', '1/2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Rub beef with 2 Tbsp. Oyster Flavored Sauce and 1 Tbsp. cornstarch. Set aside for 10 minutes.
', '
Combine dry sherry, sugar, cornstarch, Premium Soy Sauce and water in small bowl (soy sauce mixture). Set aside.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, stir fry beef and add ginger. Cook beef until almost done.
', '
Add bell pepper and soy sauce mixture. Cook beef until sauce thickens and serve.
']

Name: stir-fried-beef-with-black-bean-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3½ oz. onions, sliced', '3½ oz. bell peppers, sliced', '7 oz. beef, sliced']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a wok and add cooking oil, stir-fry onions and bell peppers until fragrant. Add sliced beef and stir-fry for 1½ minutes.\xa0
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Sauce and heat through.
', '
N/A
']

Name: honey-glazed-garlic-flavored-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['10 chicken wings (approx. 1 lb.)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Honey']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
Mix wings well with Lee Kum Kee minced garlic and Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon and marinade for 30 minutes.
', '
Add oil to a heated pan, pan-fry wings over low heat till golden brown and cooked through.
', '
Add honey and stir-fry for 2 minutes to coat completely. Ready to serve.
']

Name: hoisin-mustard-pork-loin
Ingredients: ['1 small cucumber, peeled, cut into rounds half-inch thick', '1 lb. pork loin, boneless', '1 whole tomato, large, cut into rounds half-inch thick', '1 small red onion, peeled, cut into rounds half-inch thick']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '2 Tbsp. canola oil', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. mustard', '2 Tbsp. canola oil']
Procedure:
['
Marinate pork loin with 4 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce, mustard and 2 Tbsp. canola oil for 15 minutes.
', '
Grill pork until done. Cover and set aside.
', '
Combine remainder Hoisin Sauce, rice vinegar, canola oil and black pepper in a mixing bowl (hoisin sauce vinaigrette). Mix well and set aside.
', '
Assemble tomato, red onion, cucumber and grilled pork loin in a platter.
', '
Serve pork platter with hoisin sauce vinaigrette.
']

Name: grilled-rib-eye-steak
Ingredients: ['2 small zucchini, washed, removed ends, cut into half-inch thick pieces lengthwise', '8 oz. bok choy, washed, removed ends, cut in half', '4 oz. bell peppers, red and yellow, seeded, cut into strips', '2 lb. rib eye steak, boneless, cut into half inch thick']
Marinade: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '4 Tbsp. canola oil']
Procedure:
['
Marinate steak with Oyster Flavored Sauce, Chili Garlic Sauce and 2 Tbsp. canola oil for 15-20 minutes.
', '
Grill steak according to preference. Keep covered. Set aside.
', '
Drizzle remainder of canola oil onto vegetables.
']

Name: grilled-pork-chop
Ingredients: ['4 pieces pork chops with bone in ']
Marinade: ['1/4 cup sherry wine', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine all marinade ingredients.
', '
Marinate for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
', '
Grill pork chop for 10 minutes on each side, brushing frequently with marinade.
']

Name: grilled-chicken-steak-and-pork-chop-with-black-pepper-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 (approx. 10 oz.) boneless chicken leg\t\t           ', '1 (approx. 7 oz.) bone-in pork chop\t\t\t', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1/4 cup water\t\t\t\t', '1 tomato\t\t\t\t\t', '3 asparagus stalks\t']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic\t\t\t', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce\t']
Procedure:
['
Slash the skin of the boneless chicken leg a few times. Rinse the boneless chicken leg and bone-in pork chop and pat dry with paper towel. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, half of Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce, and 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil, mix well, and marinate for about 30 minutes.
', '
Coat a tray with 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil and then place the chicken leg and pork chop on it. Place into an oven pre-heated to 400°F to grill for 15 minutes. Remove the pork chop and put the chicken leg back into the oven to roast for another 10 minutes.
', '
Mix the remaining half of the Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce with water and boil the mixture into a sauce. Drizzle the sauce over the chicken leg. Place the tomato into an oven pre-heated to 375°F for about 3 minutes and cook the asparagus with boiling water. Plate and ready to serve.\xa0 \xa0
']

Name: grilled-beef-ribs-with-korean-barbecue-sauce
Ingredients: ['4-5 lbs. beef ribs, cut along the bone']
Marinade: ['8 oz. Lee Kum Kee Korean Barbecue Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1/2 cup chopped cilantro', '2 tsp. worcestershire sauce', '4 oz. orange juice']
Procedure:
['
In a baking dish, combine all marinade ingredients. Mix well. Marinate beef for two hours or more.
', '
Bake covered at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
', '
Remove cover. Bake for another 15 minutes at 400 degrees.
', '
Transfer the juice into a small sauce pan. Bring mixture to a boil. Cook sauce until thickened.
', '
Glaze beef ribs with the sauce.
']

Name: garlic-glazed-chicken-thighs
Ingredients: ['4 boneless skinless chicken thighs ', '½ cup vegetable oil', '3 baby bok choy, halved', '1 tsp. sesame seeds for garnish', '1 Tbsp. green onion for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt ', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce   ', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. ketchup']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Minced Garlic, Less Sodium Soy Sauce, and ketchup. Add in the chicken thighs and mix well until evenly marinated. Then season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
In a large nonstick skillet, add in the vegetable oil and wait until hot. Place thighs in skillet cooking for 5-7 minutes on each side until it is a caramelized brown color and internal temperature of 165°F.\xa0
', '
Once chicken is almost completely cooked, add in bok choy to finish cooking with the chicken (additional 4-5 minutes).\xa0\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
']

Name: garlic-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken mid joint wings ', '4 cups oil']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Honey Garlic Marinade ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '1/3 cup water ']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. minced garlic ', '2 tsp. minced ginger ', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Kum Chun Brand Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch ']
Procedure:
['
Wash and pat dry the chicken mid joint wings. Make two diagonal cuts on both sides of each wing. Marinate with minced garlic, minced ginger, cooking wine, and Lee Kum Kee Kum Chun Brand Soy Sauce and then mix well with cornstarch. Let stand for 30 minutes.
', '
Heat up a wok, pour oil into it, and heat it to about 300°F. Deep fry the marinated chicken wings for 5 minutes, remove from the wok, and drain away excess oil.
', '
In a separate wok, cook Lee Kum Kee Honey Garlic Marinade, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and a small amount of water over low heat until boiling. Pour in the wings and mix well.
']

Name: chili-black-beans-fried-pork-2
Ingredients: ['3 oz. chili pepper', '10 oz. pork belly', 'a little cooking oil', '1/2 oz. garlic cloves, smashed', '1/4 oz. ginger slices', 'a little cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Black Bean Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Slice chili pepper into diagonal sections and set them aside. Slice pork belly into thin pieces and add Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce to marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Heat a wok over high heat. Add a small amount of cooking oil, smashed garlic and sliced ginger, then quickly sauté until fragrant.\xa0
', '
Then add meat to sauté until thoroughly cooked. Add chili pepper, followed by Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Chili Black Bean Sauce.\xa0
', '
Stir-fry over high heat until the water evaporate and the sauce fully cover the ingredients. Ready to serve.
']

Name: black-pepper-honey-wings
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken mid joint wings ', '4 cups oil']
Marinade: ['1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder ', '1 tsp. cooking wine ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch ']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. honey ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1/4 cup water ']
Procedure:
['
Wash and pat dry the chicken mid joint wings. Make two diagonal cuts on both sides of each wing. Marinate with Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, cooking wine, and Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce. Add cornstarch, mix well, and let stand for 30 minutes.
', '
Heat up a wok, pour oil into it, and heat it to about 300°F. Deep fry the marinated chicken wings for 4-5 minutes, remove from the wok, and drain away excess oil.
', '
In a separate wok, cook Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce, honey, Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and water over low heat until boiling. Pour in the wings and mix well.
']

Name: balsamic-citrus-lamb-chops
Ingredients: ['2 lb. lamb chops  ', 'white rice for serving  ', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt ', '2 tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce   ', '2 ½ Tbsp. balsamic vinegar ', '2 Tbsp. fresh orange juice ']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce, balsamic vinegar, and orange juice then set aside.\xa0
', '
Heat a grill on medium high heat. Before placing the lamb chops on the grill season each with salt and pepper then brush all sides with the citrus sauce mixture. Grill for 3-4 minutes on each side until it has a nice char and the inside is not fully cooked (slight red color).\xa0
', '
Let it rest for 5 minutes before transferring to a serving platter with rice. Garnish with chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: asian-zing-wingz
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. chicken wings ', '2 fresno chilies, thinly diced ', '2 Tbsp. sesame seeds ', '5 sprigs green onion, thinly sliced ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. baking powder', '¾ tsp. salt  ', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Place a rack on a large baking sheet and preheat the oven to 250°F. Dry the wings with a paper towel then place in a large bowl. Add the baking powder, salt and pepper giving the chicken a good toss.
', '
Place the wings skin side up in a single layer on the lower shelf of the oven and let it bake for 30 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
After those 30 minutes are up, turn the oven up to 425°F. Rotate the tray and place the wings on a higher shelf and bake for 45-50 minutes until golden brown.
', '
While wings are cooling for a few minutes, mix the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce in a small bowl.\xa0\xa0
', '
Transfer the wings to a large bowl and pour the sauce mixture over the wings and fresno chilies, tossing ensuring that each wing is covered in sauce.\xa0
', '
Stack the wings high on a serving platter, garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-lime-and-oyster-sauce-baked-chicken-thighs
Ingredients: ['5 chicken thighs, bone in and skin on']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Marinade: ['Salt and pepper, to taste', '1 lime, zested and juiced', '2 Tbsp. honey', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qJFPPu3YMKA
', '
Preheat the oven to 375° F. Add all the marinade ingredients to the chicken thighs in a bowl or plastic bag and mix them together well.\xa0
', '
In a large cast iron or oven ready skillet, add the olive oil, and add the chicken on medium high heat and brown with the skin side down for 3-5 minutes. Flip the chicken over so the skin side is up.
', '
Add the remaining marinade and bake in the oven at 375°F for 20 minutes, uncovered in the oven safe pan.
', '
Tip: Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce on the Chicken as desired.
']

Name: carne-asada
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef skirt-sliced thin']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. cilantro', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 oz. orange juice', '1 Tbsp. tequila', '1 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine all marinade ingredients. Mix well.
', '
Marinate beef for two hours or overnight.
', '
Grill on high heat according to preference.
', '
Serve with flour tortillas and pico de gallo.
']

Name: dong-po-pork
Ingredients: ['600 g pork belly, cut into 2 big squares', '2 pcs straw', '12 g green onion, sectioned', '8 g ginger, sliced', '100 g rock sugar ', '90 g slab sugar ', 'little chin kiang vinegar']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '100 ml water ', '50 ml Hua Diao wine ', '4 g star anise', '2 g cinnamon']
Procedure:
['
Trim pork belly. Burn hair on skin. Tie with straws. Blanch in boiling water to keep the shape. Then put pork belly in an earthen pot lined with bamboo mat.
', '
Sauté green onion and ginger in oil. Add Sauce Mix, some rock sugar, some slab sugar and boil. Pour sauce into earthen pot. Stew pork belly for about 2 hours.
', '
Add the remaining rock sugar and slab sugar. Add Chinkiang vinegar and cook again over low heat for about 1 hour.
', '
Put pork belly on a serving plate. Add thickening to the sauce and heat through. Pour sauce over pork belly.
']

Name: cant-stop-wont-stop-wings
Ingredients: ['non-stick cooking spray', '1 ¼ lb. chicken wings, patted dry with a paper towel', '3 Persian cucumbers, cut in half and sliced lengthwise into wedges']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '¾ tsp. kosher salt, more as needed', '1/2 tsp. fresh ground black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil', '1 tsp. apple cider vinegar', 'pinch of salt']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EZLeLaAoBjY&feature=youtu.be ', ' Preheat broiler with an oven rack 6 inches from heating element. Line a baking sheet with foil. Spray a wire rack with non-stick cooking spray and place on prepared baking sheet. ', ' In a large bowl, toss together wings, oil, salt, and pepper. Arrange in a single layer on rack and broil until browned, about 10 to 12 minutes, then flip and broil for another 5 minutes. ', ' Meanwhile, in a large bowl toss together melted butter, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil, vinegar, and a pinch of salt. When wings come out from the oven, transfer to bowl with sauce, and toss to coat. ', ' Return to wire rack and broil for another 1 minute, until sauce has caramelized. Return to bowl with sauce, toss again to coat, and transfer to a serving platter. Drizzle with any extra sauce still in the bowl. ', ' Sprinkle cucumber wedges with salt and serve with hot wings.\xa0 ']

Name: chestnut-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken (about half a chicken), cut into large pieces', '7 oz. chestnuts, cooked and peeled', '2 oz. red pepper, sliced', '2 garlic cloves, whole', '3 ginger slices', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '13½ Tbsp. water', '2 tsp. cornstarch', '½ tsp. sugar']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp.  cornstarch', '1 Tbsp.  rice wine']
Procedure:
['
Mix chicken with marinade. Set aside.
', '
Heat oil, sauté ginger and garlic. Add chicken, red pepper, and chestnuts. Toss well until done.
', '
Stir in rice wine and cornstarch mixture. Cover pan and cook over low heat to thicken the sauce.
']

Name: drunken-pig-trotters-with-plums
Ingredients: ['600 g (21.2 oz.) frozen pig trotters', '2 stalks green onions', '3 slices ginger', '2 pieces star anise']
Marinade: ['1 bottle Lee Kum Kee Marinade for Drunken Chicken ', '2 pieces salted preserved plums, crushed', '4 pieces green plums, crushed', '100 ml (3.5 fluid oz.) Shao Hsing wine']
Procedure:
['
Place ginger, green onions, and star anise to a pot of water and bring to a boil. Add trotters and cook over medium heat for about 40 minutes, until tender.\xa0
', '
Remove trotters and immerse in ice water until cold. Drain.
', '
Mix trotters with Marinade Mix and marinate for 6–8 hours in a fridge. Drain and serve cold.
']

Name: brown-braised-eel-with-mashed-purple-sweet-potatoes
Ingredients: ['13 oz. freshwater eel, deboned', '3 ½ oz. purple sweet potatoes', '3 ½ oz. potatoes', '3 ½ oz. whipping cream', '1 oz. butter', 'salt and ground white pepper, to taste']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Brown Braising Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey']
Marinade: ['Dash of salt and ground white pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Brown Braising Sauce', '2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Cook potatoes and purple sweet potatoes, then mash until fluffy. Add whipping cream, butter, and dash salt and ground white pepper. Mix well. Keep warm and set aside.
', '
Pat eel dry and marinate lightly. Let eel air-dry.
', '
Stir Seasoning Mix well over hot water (double boiler). Brush a layer onto eel. Roast in 350°F preheated oven. Continue to baste with Seasoning Mix periodically until eel is cooked through. Plate the eel.
', '
Stir Sauce Mix well over hot water. Drizzle over eel. Serve with mashed potatoes.
']

Name: baked-baby-potatoes-and-mixed-vegetables-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 oz. yellow and green squash, cut into 1-inch thick pieces', '4 oz. baby potatoes, cut into 1-inch thick pieces', '4 oz. zucchini, cut into 1-inch thick pieces', '4 oz. red bell peppers, seeded , cut into 1-inch strips']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Oyster Flavored Sauce, Pure Sesame Oil and water in a bowl. Set aside (Oyster Flavored Sauce mixture).
', '
Layer vegetables and potatoes in a baking pan.
', '
Add oil and season with black pepper.
', '
Bake at 400 degrees for 10-15 minutes.
', '
Drizzle Oyster Flavored Sauce mixture before serving.
']

Name: beef-vegetable-pasta-rotini
Ingredients: ['4 oz. zucchini, julienne', '4 oz. carrots, julienne', '4 oz. mushrooms, sliced', '8 oz. pasta rotini', '4 oz. bell peppers, julienne', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. top sirloin steak, cut into thin strips']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook pasta according to direction. Set aside.
', '
In a heated pan, add 3 tablespoons of oil. Add beef and ginger. Cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Stir all vegetables, Soy Sauce and Oyster Flavored Sauce. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
', '
Add pasta, cook until heated through.
']

Name: beef-and-mushroom-lasagna
Ingredients: ['1 lb. 90% lean ground beef', '1 small onion', '1 celery rib', '1 medium carrot', '2 portobello mushrooms', '2 garlic cloves', '1 Tbsp. fresh sage, chopped', '1 Tbsp. fresh rosemary, chopped', '1 bay leaf', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '8 oz. oven-ready lasagna noodles', '3 cups part-skim ricotta cheese', '3 cups part-skim mozzarella cheese, shredded', '½ cup Parmesan cheese, grated']
Seasoning: ['2 6-oz. cans tomato paste', '1 28-oz. can crushed tomatoes', '3½ cups water']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, place the beef. Brush the oyster sauce over the entire surface area of the beef. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
', '
Finely dice the onion, celery, carrot, and mushrooms. Mince the garlic.
', '
Heat the olive oil in a large pot or saucepan over medium heat. When the oil is shimmering, add the diced onion, celery, carrot, and minced garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables soften, about 4 minutes. Add the beef, diced mushrooms, sage, and rosemary. Continue to cook, breaking up the ground beef using a wooden spoon, until the meat is cooked through, about 5 minutes. Then add the bay leaf, crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, water, and stir to combine. Bring the mixture to a boil. Lower heat and simmer, covered, until sauce thickens, about 20 minutes. Allow the sauce to cool about 15 minutes and remove bay leaf.
', '
Pre-heat the oven to 350° F.
', '
 In a 14x11-inch baking pan, spread about 11/2 cups of the sauce on the bottom of the pan. Add a layer of 4 lasagna noodles, placing the noodles so they slightly overlap. Spread about 2 cups of the sauce over the noodles, then spread half the ricotta cheese, and sprinkle 1 cup of mozzarella cheese. Repeat with a second layer. Spread the remaining sauce over the top of the noodles, sprinkle with remaining 1 cup of mozzarella cheese, and then the grated Parmesan. Cover the pan with aluminum foil and place in the oven to bake for 1 hour.
']

Name: minced-pork-rice-with-potatoes
Ingredients: ['2 cups   rice', '6 oz.  potatoes, peeled and cut into quarters', '5 oz.  minced pork ', '2 cups  water ', '1 Tbsp.   green onion, chopped ', '1  egg, whole']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix minced pork with marinade.
', '
Rinse rice and add to rice cooker with water. On the surface of rice, spread pork and arrange sliced potatoes around edges. Then start the rice cooker.
', '
After the rice is cooked, add green onion and egg. Cook covered for 2 more minutes, mix well, and serve hot.
', '
Season with extra oyster sauce to taste.
']

Name: braised-meatballs-with-tomato-sauce-and-cola
Ingredients: ['250 g minced pork ', '1 pc bell pepper, shredded', 'corn starch [for dusting]', 'coriander']
Marinade: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kem Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. water ', '2 tsp. corn starch ']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. tomato ketchup', '125 ml cola ', '1 tsp. corn starch ', '1 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Mix minced pork with marinade.  Make into 14 small balls.  Dust lightly with corn starch.
\xa0
\xa0
', '
Stir-fry meat balls in 2 tbsp oil until golden yellow.  Stir in sauce mix.

', '
Cover and cook on low heat for about 5 minutes until meat balls are done.

', '
 Add bell pepper and stir-fry for about 1 minute. Serve.

']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

', '

Name: baked-vegetables-and-corned-beef
Ingredients: ['1 piece  cabbage, cored, quartered', '1 piece  carrot, peeled, large dice', '1 stalk  celery, large dice', '1 piece  bell pepper, deseeded, large dice', '1.5 pounds corned beef, cooked']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven at 350°F.
', '
In a medium bowl, mix together vegetables, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Oyster Flavored Sauce and olive oil.
', '
Transfer onto a baking pan. Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 40 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
', '
Serve with corned beef and garnish with parsley.
']

Name: bacon-wrapped-chicken-skewers-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['6-8 bamboo skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes or metal skewers', '1 lb. chicken tenders (about 6 - 8 tenders)', '½ cup cherry tomatoes', '1/2 lb. bacon (about 8 slices)']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '2 Tbsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '6-8 springs fresh thyme']
Procedure:
['
Heat oven to 400 degrees F and fit a half sheet tray with a baking/cooling rack.
', '
Skewer each chicken tender with a cherry tomato at the top and bottom. Season with salt and pepper. Wrap each skewer with a slice of bacon and place on the prepared sheet pan.
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, lemon juice, sugar, and oil in a small bowl. Brush each skewer until completely coated. Add sprigs of thyme to the top of the skewers.
', '
Roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until bacon is deep brown and chicken is cooked all the way through.
']

Name: garlic-flavored-black-pepper-pork-chop
Ingredients: ['2 pork chops (with bones, approx. 16 oz. total)', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 Tbsp. butter', '2 tsp. shallots, chopped and fried']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. ground black pepper', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '3 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Pound chops with meat mallet to soften. Mix well pepper, garlic, 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon, cornstarch, and water. Marinate pork chops in this mixture overnight.
', '
Add cooking oil to a heated pan, pan-fry chops till golden brown on both sides, add butter and cook thoroughly. Place chops on a plate.
', '
To same pan with leftover sauce from chops, add water, remaining 1 Tbsp. concentrated chicken bouillon, and bring to a boil. Pour this sauce over chops and sprinkle shallots on top. Ready to serve.
', '
Tip: Side dishes can be added according to personal preference.
']

Name: black-pepper-chicken-fillets-with-onion
Ingredients: ['2 chicken breasts (approx. 14 oz.)', '½  onion, julienned', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '¼ cup water']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. ground black pepper', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
Cut chicken to create flat fillets. Mix well minced garlic, black pepper, cornstarch, 2 Tbsp. oil, and 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon. Marinate chicken in this mixture for 20 minutes.
', '
Add remaining 1 Tbsp. oil to a heated pan, pan-fry fillets till golden brown on both sides, remove from pan, and set aside. Sauté onion in same pan till fragrant. Place chicken and onion on a plate.
', '
To same pan, add water, remaining 1 Tbsp. concentrated chicken bouillon, and bring to a boil. Pour the sauce over chicken. Ready to serve.
', '
Tips: 1. Chicken breasts can be replaced with boneless chicken thighs.
', '
Tips: 2. Side dishes can be added according to personal preference.
']

Name: chicken-with-basil-spaghetti
Ingredients: ['4 oz.  chicken breast, sliced', '4  broccoli florets', '1 tsp.  basil, finely chopped', '2 oz.  red bell pepper, sliced ', '½ cup  water', '5 oz.  spaghetti noodles', '½ tsp.  ground black pepper', '4 Tbsp.  butter', '2 Tbsp.  flour', '2 Tbsp.   cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r9T5GiCSqF0&feature=youtu.be
', '
Marinate chicken in 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon.
', '
Cook spaghetti thoroughly, rinse with cold water, drain, and set aside.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. cooking oil to a heated pan, dust chicken with flour, pan-fry till golden brown.
', '
Add water and bring to a boil, add black pepper, add remaining 2 Tbsp. concentrated chicken bouillon, and add butter.  Stir to mix well.
', '
Add spaghetti and pan-fry till sauce thickens. Ready to serve.
']

Name: braised-ribbonfish
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. ribbonfish, cut into 1.5-inch-wide strips', '2 green onion stalks', '4 garlic cloves, chopped', '2 ginger slices', '3 Tbsp. oil', '2 cups hot water', 'flour as needed for coating']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Brown Cooking Soy Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. wine', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Marinate ribbonfish strips in wine and salt for 20 minutes.
', '
Heat oil in the pan. Coat marinated fish with flour. Pan-fry till golden brown on both sides.
', '
Add green onion, ginger, garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Brown Cooking Soy Sauce to pan and continue cooking. Add hot water after one minute.
', '
Cook at high heat until sauce thickens. Ready to serve.
']

Name: modern-style-braised-pork-belly
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. pork belly', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', 'Water as desired']
Seasoning: ['1/5 cup Lee Kum Kee Spare Rib Sauce   ', '1/5 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '2 green onion stalks', '2 ginger slices', '2 star anise pods', '1 cinnamon stick', '2 Tbsp. cooking wine', '2 Tbsp. rock sugar']
Procedure:
['
Cut pork belly into cubes. Rinse with boiling water and drain. Set aside.
', '
Heat pan with 1 Tbsp. oil, sauté pork until light golden (about 7–10 minutes). Add cooking wine, rock sugar, anise pods, cinnamon, green onion, and ginger. Continue to stir-fry for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Stir in 3 cups water, Spare Rib sauce and Soy Sauce. Cook over high heat until boiled.
', '
Lower heat and simmer for 40 minutes. Ready to serve.
']

Name: garlic-flavored-spare-ribs-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['1 lb. pork spare ribs', '2 Tbsp. chopped red onion', '3 Tbsp. chopped pickled cucumber', '1 Tbsp. chopped parsley', '⅓ cup warm water']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Marinade: ['¼ cup chopped garlic', '2 cilantro leaves', '2 cups water', '3 Tbsp. wheat flour', '1 Tbsp. custard powder', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '2 tsp. white sugar']
Procedure:
['
Cut ribs into 2.5” pieces and set aside.
', '
Blend garlic, cilantro, and water till smooth. Combine with flour, custard powder, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder, and sugar. Marinate ribs in this mixture overnight.
', '
In a big bowl mix Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo with onion, pickled cucumber, parsley, and about ⅛ cup warm water to create a kind of Sriracha Mayo juice. Set aside.
', '
Remove ribs from marinade and deep-fry in hot oil (about 375ºF) till cooked fully and golden brown.
', '
Drain oil from ribs and coat evenly with Sriracha Mayo mixture. Ready to serve.
']

Name: beef-green-bean-and-scallion-oyster-sauce-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['⅓ cup chicken broth', '3 Tbsp.vegetable oil ', '1 lb. green beans, trimmed and cut into 2 inch pieces ', '1 ½ lbs.flank steak, trimmed and sliced thin against grain ', '8 scallions, cut into 2 inch pieces ', '6 garlic cloves, minced', '1 Tbsp. grated fresh ginger']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 tsp. rice vinegar ', '1 tsp. red pepper flakes ']
Procedure:
['
Whisk broth, Oyster Flavored Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, vinegar, and pepper flakes in bowl; set aside. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in 12 inch nonstick skillet over high heat until just smoking.
', '
Add green beans and cook, stirring occasionally, until spotty brown, 4 to 6 minutes. Transfer to large bowl.
', '
Heat 2 teaspoons oil in now-empty skillet over high heat until just smoking. Pat steak dry with paper towels. Add half of steak to skillet, break up any clumps, and cook, without stirring, for 1 minute.
', '
Stir beef and continue to cook until browned, 1 to 2 minutes. Transfer to bowl with green beans and repeat with 2 teaspoons oil and remaining steak.
', '
Add remaining 2 teaspoons oil and scallions to now-empty skillet and cook until spotty brown, about 2 minutes. Push scallions to sides of skillet. Add garlic and ginger to center and cook, mashing mixture into pan, until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
', '
Stir mixture into scallions, then return green beans and steak, with any accumulated juices, to skillet and toss to combine. Whisk broth mixture to recombine, then add to skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until sauce is thickened, about 30 seconds. Serve.
']

Name: chicken-with-garlic-flavored-green-onion-oil
Ingredients: ['1   whole chicken (approx. 2½ lb., giblets removed)', '3 Tbsp.   green onion, julienned', '1 Tbsp.   red bell pepper, julienned', '1 Tbsp.    Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp.    cooking oil', '¼ cup   water', '2 tsp.   cornstarch water']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
Rub whole chicken (inside and out) with 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon and marinate for 15 minutes.
', '
Steam chicken over high heat for 30 minutes. Pour off excess chicken juices and reserve for later. Chop chicken into pieces and place on plate.
', '
Add oil to a heated pan and sauté garlic and green onion till fragrant. Add remaining 1 Tbsp. concentrated chicken bouillon, reserved chicken juices, water and bring to a boil.
', '
Add cornstarch water and mix well. Pour sauce over chicken. Sprinkle green onion and red bell pepper on top.  Ready to serve.
']

Name: baked-salmon-packets
Ingredients: ['4             4 oz. salmon fillets, skinless', '3 oz.       carrot peeled and julienned', '3 oz.       fine green beans, halved  ', '4 oz.       broccoli florets', '1 oz.       butter, melted', 'Parchment paper']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp.      Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp.      Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp.      Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce', '1 Tbsp.      dried coconut or sesame seeds', '1 Tbsp.      lime juice', '2 tsp.         fresh ginger, grated']
Procedure:
['
Heat oven to 400 degree.
', '
Mix marinade ingredients. Coat fish with this mixture.
', '
Cut 4 pieces parchment paper, about 11 x 19 inches each.
', '
Mix melted butter with 1 tsp. oyster sauce and toss with vegetables. Divide between the pieces of paper and finish with fish, spooning any remaining marinade over top.
', '
Fold and twist the sides to form packets, tucking loose ends under.
', '
Transfer to baking tray and bake 20 minutes, until fish is cooked. Timing will depend on thickness of fillets. Serve with cooked brown basmati or wild rice.
']

Name: broccoli-beef-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['9 oz.      beef, diced', '5 oz.      broccoli, cut into small florets', '1 oz.      carrots, shredded', '2 Tbsp.  cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp.   Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 tsp.      water ', '1 tsp.      cornstarch ']
Procedure:
['
Mix beef with marinade.
', '
Blanch broccoli and carrot in boiling water (or cook with 2 Tbsp. water in a microwave at high heat for 90 seconds). Drain.
', '
Stir-fry beef in 2 Tbsp. oil until done. Add broccoli, carrots, and Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce. Stir well until heated through.
', '
Serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: pork-riblets-with-honey-flavored-black-bean-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 lb. pork spark ribs, cut into 2-inch pieces', '1 tsp. ginger, thinly sliced', '½ cup cooked rice']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. dry sherry', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce', '2 oz. water', '1 Tbsp. honey']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, dilute cornstarch with water to create a cornstarch mixture. Set aside.
', '
In a heated pan, add oil and pan fry pork riblets until brown.
', '
Add ginger, dry sherry, Chili Garlic Sauce, water, honey and Black Bean Garlic Sauce. Simmer for 5 minutes.
', '
Add in cornstarch mixture, stir well and cook until sauce thickens.
', '
Serve over steamed rice.
']

Name: double-cooked-pork
Ingredients: ['9 oz.\tpork belly', '2 oz.\tred & green bell peppers, cut into small pieces', '2 oz.\tgreen leek stalks', '6\t\tginger slices', '8\t\tgreen onion stalks, white section only', '2 \t\tgarlic cloves, sliced', 'Peppercorns as desired', 'Cooking oil as desired']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp.\tLee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broadbean Sauce', '1 Tbsp.\tLee Kum Kee Sweet Bean Sauce', '½ Tbsp.\trice wine', '1 tsp.\tLee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Cut pork belly into cubes. Add 4 slices of ginger, peppercorns, and 4 white sections of green onion stalks to boiling water. Boil until fragrant.
', '
Add pork belly and cook until 70–80% done. Drain and slice thinly.
', '
Heat oil in pan. Pan-fry sliced pork belly until curled. Push aside in pan.
', '
In same pan stir-fry Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broadbean Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Sweet Bean Sauce, then add remaining ingredients and Seasoning. Stir well to combine. Ready to serve.
']

Name: grilled-steak-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 rib-eye steaks (approx. 12 oz.)  ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp.   Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp.   Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp.  fresh rosemary, chopped', '1 Tbsp.  black pepper, ground', '4 Tbsp.  cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h7X0FGzPScw&feature=youtu.be
', '
Combine marinade ingredients and stir well to mix.
', '
Add steaks and marinate about 15 minutes.
', '
Place steaks on a fully heated grill pan.
', '
Grill both sides till golden brown, about 50–70% done (medium).
', '
As an option, add grilled corn, mushrooms and bell peppers as side dishes. Adding oyster flavored sauce in marinade can enhance the taste of steak.
']

Name: baked-mushrooms-with-black-truffle-and-oyster-sauce-in-shell-pasta
Ingredients: ['8 jumbo pasta shells (cooked)', '3 oz. white mushrooms (finely diced)', '3 oz. fresh shiitake mushrooms (finely diced)', '2 oz. onion (minced)', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 oz. mozzarella cheese (shredded)', '1 oz. cheddar cheese (shredded)', '1 oz. parmesan cheese (shredded)', '1 oz. truffle sauce']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. water ']
Procedure:
['
Heat the wok. Sauté onions and minced garlic, add white mushrooms and shiitake mushrooms. Add Seasoning Mix. Let mushrooms cook until sauce thickens and reduces to make filling. Plate and set aside.
', '
Stuff the pasta shells with mixed mushroom filling. Scatter all three cheeses over the top and add truffle sauce.
', '
Bake 5–8 minutes in a 350°F preheated oven.
']

Name: braised-sweet-and-sour-pork-ribs
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. pork ribs', '4 star anise pods', '4 garlic cloves', '1 cinnamon stick', '2 green onion stalks', '4 oz. rock sugar', '3 cups water', '4 ginger slices', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 Tbsp. corn starch']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Spare Rib Sauce', '1 tsp. white pepper', '¼ cup ketchup', '¼ cup Shaoxing cooking wine', '6 Tbsp. Zhenjiang vinegar']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Slice pork ribs in long strips. Marinate in Premium Soy Sauce for 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Deep-fry until golden. Remove, drain, and set aside.
', '
Heat oil in pan, sauté ginger, green onion, and garlic until fragrant. Add Spare Rib Sauce and ketchup, drizzle with cooking wine, then add water. Lay ribs in pan and add all remaining ingredients.
', '
Cook over high heat until boiled. Lower heat and simmer for 40 minutes until ribs are softened. Mix cornstarch with small amount of water. Stir in cornstarch mixture and continue to cook until sauce is thickened.
']

Name: beef-fried-rice-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['6 oz. peas and carrots', '4 cups cooked rice , preferably one day old', '2 whole eggs, beaten', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 stalks green onion, chopped', '8 oz. beef tri tip, cut into think strips']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook eggs with 1 tablespoon oil. Set aside.
', '
Stir-fry beef for 2 minutes, add the rice and mix well.
', '
Stir Premium Soy Sauce and Oyster Flavored Sauce. Stir well until rice is well coated with sauce.
', '
Add peas and carrots and green onion until heated through. Serve.
']

Name: fish-slices-in-chili-wine-sauce
Ingredients: ['300g/10.5 oz. thin fish slices (e.g., grass carp/white amur)', '20g/1 oz cloud-ear fungus', '20g/1 oz.', '3 slices ginger', '5 pcs. green onion ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1½ tsp. cornstarch', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '5 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '½ cup water']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '1 Tbsp. egg white', '¼ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. cornstarch', 'dash of pepper', 'cooking oil, for poaching']
Procedure:
['
Soak cloud-ear fungus in water and cut into small pieces. Parboil in boiling water for a while and drain.
', '
Marinate fish for 10 minutes and poach in warm oil until just cooked.
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil to sauté ginger and green onion. Add Seasoning Mix and fungus, cook for 2 minutes. Add fish and cook until heated through.
']

Name: kung-pao-chicken
Ingredients: ['250g Chicken thigh meat', '35g   Fried peanuts', '6g     Green onions [white-part, sectioned]', '6g     Red dried chili peppers', '6g     Ginger, sliced', '6g     Garlic, sliced', '1g     Sichuan peppercorns', '10g   Shao Hsing wine']
Marinade: ['3g Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2g Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '25g Tapioca starch and water solution']
Sauce Mix: ['10g Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '10g Chinkiang vinegar', '3g Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '3g Lee Kum Kee Peppercorn Chili Oil', '2g Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '0.5g Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '12g Sugar', '15g Stock', '15g Tapioca starch and water solution']
Procedure:
['
Cut chicken into 1.5cm cubes and marinate for a short while. Cut dried red chili into 2 cm sections.\xa0
', '
Heat wok on high heat. Add 2 tbsp oil and heat to medium hot. Add chicken and stir-fry until half done.
', '
Add dried red chili, Sichuan peppercorns and sprinkle with Shao Hsing wine. Add ginger, garlic, green onions and stir-fry quickly until done.
', '
Add Sauce Mix and stir. Add Fried peanuts on top. Serve.
']

Name: beef-with-black-bean-sauce
Ingredients: ['300 g beef tenderloin, sliced', '½ pc red bell pepper, cut into pieces', '½ pc green bell pepper, cut into pieces']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Stir-fry beef in 1 Tbsp. oil until done.
', '
Stir in bell peppers.
', '
Add\xa0Black Bean Garlic Sauce and heat through.
']

Name: fried-rice
Ingredients: ['1 lb.  steamed rice ', '4 oz. char siu (Chinese BBQ), diced', '1 oz. green onion, diced', '1 oz. shallots, diced', '2 eggs, beaten', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Stir-fry shallots in 2 Tbsp. oil until fragrant.
', '
Add eggs. Stir in rice, char siu, Seasoning Sauce, and green onion.
', '
Mix well. Heat through and ready to serve.
']

Name: pad-see-ew-2
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 lb. chicken breast, sliced thin', '2 eggs', '1 ½ cups broccoli florets', '4 cups fresh rice noodle, separated', '1 tsp. scallions for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fish Sauce', '2 tsp. sugar', '½ tsp. white pepper']
Procedure:
['
Combine the Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, fish sauce, sugar and white pepper in a small bowl and set it aside.
', '
This Chicken Pad See Ew recipe features stir-fried rice noodles with chicken, broccoli, eggs, and a savory soy-oyster sauce—quick, rich, and satisfying.
', '
Add the eggs to the pan and lightly scramble them until they are just set, about 30 seconds.
', '
Add the broccoli, tossing it constantly until it starts to turn dark green, about 1 to 2 minutes.
', '
Add the fresh rice noodles and allow them to sear in the pan and trade flavors with all the other ingredients for about 1 minute. Then add the sauce mix and stir constantly to combine for about 3 minutes until the noodles soak up the sauce and start to crisp slightly on the edges, and in the broccoli and toss together. Garnish with scallions.
']

Name: asian-sesame-grilled-beef-skewers
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. top sirloin steak, cut into 1-inch cubes', '2 green onions, sliced for garnish', 'metal skewers or wooden skewers soaked in water']
Marinade: ['⅔ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce + more for serving ', '6 garlic cloves, minced', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ cup vegetable oil', '½ cup sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. white sesame seeds + more for garnish ']
Procedure:
['
Combine 2/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, vegetable oil, sugar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and white sesame seeds in a large bowl. Whisk the ingredients together until they are fully incorporated.
', '
Place the steak into the bowl and toss to coat, then refrigerate with the marinade for 3 hours.\xa0\xa0
', '
Preheat the grill to a medium high heat. Place the marinated steak onto the skewers and grill for about 8-10 minutes or until they reach your desired level of doneness.\xa0
', '
Remove the skewers from the grill. Serve with additional Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and garnish with sliced green onions and additional white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
