Name: avocado-egg-rolls
Ingredients: ['3 avocados', '1 roma tomatoes, deseeded and diced', '¼ cup chopped cilantro leaves + more for garnish', '12 egg roll wrappers', '1 large egg, beaten', 'vegetable oil for frying']
Seasoning: ['1 lime, juiced', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Cut each of the avocados in half and remove the pit. Use a spoon to scoop the flesh of the avocados into a bowl. Mash the avocados with a fork until smooth.
', '
Add the tomatoes, chopped cilantro, lime juice, and salt and pepper to taste to the bowl of avocados. Mix until the ingredients are combined.
', '
Lay one of the egg roll wrappers onto the work surface. Spoon about 2 Tbsp. of avocado mixture onto the center of the wrapper. Fold the bottom of the wrapper over the filling then fold in the sides. Roll the egg roll upwards until you reach the top of the wrapper. Brush the beaten egg wash onto the inside flap of the egg roll to seal. Repeat this step to make the remaining egg rolls.
', '
Fill a pot with about 3 inches of vegetable oil. Heat the oil to 350˚F. Working in batches, add a few of the egg rolls to the oil and fry until the wrapper turns golden brown.
', '
Use a spider or slotted spoon to remove the egg rolls from the oil and place them onto a baking sheet lined with paper towels.
', '
Garnish the egg rolls with additional cilantro leaves and serve with the Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-roasted-cauliflower-steaks
Ingredients: ['1 large head of cauliflower, cut into 1-inch thick slices', '1 ½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', 'lime wedges, for serving', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', '1 red chili, sliced for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray it with cooking spray.
', '
Coat the cauliflower steak slices with the vegetable oil and place them onto the prepared baking sheet. Use a pastry brush to brush the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce onto both sides of the cauliflower steaks. Reserve any remaining sauce for later.
', '
Place the cauliflower into the oven and roast for about 15 minutes or until the cauliflower is tender.
', '
In the meantime, place the Greek yogurt, mayonnaise, garlic clove, lime zest, lime juice and salt into a food processor. Blend until smooth then use a rubber spatula to scrape the sauce out into a bowl.\xa0
', '
When the cauliflower has fully cooked, remove it from the oven and brush with the remaining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce.
', '
Serve the cauliflower with the yogurt sauce and lime wedges. Garnish with cilantro leaves and red chili slices, enjoy!
']

Name: vegetable-fried-rice-2
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 cup white mushrooms, sliced', '1 cup chopped bok choy', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 white onion, chopped', '½ cup frozen chopped carrots, thawed', '½ cup frozen peas, thawed', '1 cup frozen broccoli florets, thawed', '2 large eggs, beaten', '3 cups cooked cold white rice', '1 cup bean sprouts', 'sliced green onion, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a large pan or a wok over medium high heat. Pour the vegetable oil into the pan. Add in the mushroom and bok choy. Sauté the vegetables until they are tender and fully cooked then remove them from the pan and set them aside for later.\xa0
', '
Pour the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to the same pan then add in the onion, thawed carrots, thawed peas, and thawed broccoli. Sauté until the onion is translucent and the vegetables are warmed through, about 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Push the vegetable to one side of the pan, then pour in the beaten eggs onto the other side. Cook and scramble the eggs until they are fully cooked, then mix the scrambled eggs with the vegetables.\xa0
', '
Add the rice, mushroom, bok choy, and bean sprouts to the pan. Stir until everything is evenly mixed together.\xa0
', '
Pour in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Mix everything together and continue to cook until the rice has warmed through.
', '
Remove the pan from the heat then garnish with sliced green onions and white sesame seeds. Enjoy!
']

Name: citrus-ponzu-roasted-chicken
Ingredients: ['1-2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 (3 ½ lb.) whole chicken', '1 orange, sliced', '1 lemon, sliced', '6 garlic cloves, smashed', '4 sprigs of thyme', '2 rosemary sprigs', '4 cups chicken stock']
Marinade: ['3 tsp. kosher salt', '2 tsp. ground black pepper', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375˚F. Coat the bottom and sides of a roasting pan with the butter. Set it aside for later.\xa0
', '
Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Rub the cavity of the chicken with 2 tsp. of salt and 1 tsp. of the black pepper. Stuff it with half of the orange slices, half of the lemon slices, garlic, thyme sprigs, and rosemary sprigs.\xa0
', '
Arrange the chicken so that the breast side faces up. Cross the drumsticks on over the other and tie it together with a piece of kitchen twine.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, whisk the lemon juice and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce together until combined. Use a pastry brush to brush a coating of the sauce all over the chicken. Sprinkle the remaining tsp. of kosher salt and black pepper onto the chicken.
', '
Arrange the remaining lemon and orange slices at the bottom of a roasting pan. Place the chicken and stock into the pan and roast it in the oven for 1 ½ to 2 hours until the chicken is fully cooked. It should have an internal temperature of 165˚F and the juices should run clear.
', '
Remove the chicken from the oven and tent it with a sheet of aluminum foil. Allow the chicken to rest for 10 minutes before serving. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: vietnamese-shrimp-noodle-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '8 oz. rice noodles, cooked according to package instructions', 'chopped peanuts, for garnish', 'basil leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 shallot, minced', '4 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', 'zest and juice from 1 lime + additional wedges for serving ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
Add the shallot, 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil, fish sauce, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, lime zest and juice, and 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger to a bowl. Whisk the ingredients together until combined.\xa0
', '
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss the shrimp in the marinade so that each piece is evenly coated. Let the shrimp marinate for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Place the cooked rice noodles into a bowl. Pour in the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and toss it with the noodles to prevent the strands from sticking together. Divide the noodles between the serving bowls. Set it aside for later.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Drizzle in the remaining Tbsp. of vegetable oil, then add in the shrimp and marinade. Cook the shrimp for about 3-4 minutes or until they are fully cooked. Spoon the shrimp over the prepared noodle bowls. Continue to cook shrimp in batches until all are cooked.\xa0
', '
Garnish each bowl with a sprinkle of peanuts and a few basil leaves. Serve with a lime wedge and enjoy!
']

Name: miso-soba-noodle-soup
Ingredients: ['1-inch piece of ginger, peeled and sliced', '3 dried shiitake mushrooms', '4 cups vegetable broth', '1 ½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8 oz. extra firm tofu, cut into ½ inch cubes', '1 ½ cups sliced white mushrooms', '8 oz. soba noodles, cooked according to package instructions', '2 cups baby spinach', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', '2 boiled eggs, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup yellow miso paste', '2 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'salt and black pepper to taste ']
Procedure:
['
Add the ginger, dried shiitake mushrooms, and vegetable broth to a pot. Bring the broth to a boil then turn off the heat. Allow the ginger and shiitake mushrooms to steep in the broth for about 25 minutes. Pour the broth through a mesh strainer and into another pot. Discard the ginger and shiitake mushroom.\xa0
', '
Add miso paste to a medium sized bowl. Ladle a spoonful of the broth into the bowl and gently mix it together with the miso paste until it loosens. Pour the miso paste into the pot of broth along with 1 Tbsp. of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Add in 1 Tbsp. of vegetable oil. Then add in the tofu. Cook the tofu for 2-3 minutes on each side until the cubes develop a golden brown crust. Pour in the remaining 1 ½ Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and mix it together with the tofu until it has been absorbed. Remove the tofu from the pan and set it aside for later.\xa0
', '
Pour in the remaining ½ Tbsp. of oil to the pan. Add in the mushrooms and sauté until the mushrooms are no longer releasing any moisture. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
To serve: reheat the broth if necessary. Divide the cooked soba noodles between two bowls. Ladle a few spoonful’s of hot broth then add in 1 cup of spinach to each bowl and allow it to wilt. Portion the tofu and mushrooms between the bowls. Garnish with white sesame seeds and sliced green onions. Serve with an egg and enjoy!
']

Name: orange-tofu-buddha-bowls
Ingredients: ['14 oz. extra firm tofu', '2 cups chopped kale', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 cup cooked brown rice ', '1 avocado, cut into slices', '1 cup shredded carrots', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ Tbsp. olive oil', '½ Tbsp. lemon juice', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. ground black pepper', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken']
Procedure:
['
Remove the tofu from the packaging and drain the liquid. Wrap the tofu in paper towels, then put it on a plate. Place a heavy pan or dish on top of the tofu to press out any excess moisture. Let the tofu stand for about 30 minutes.
', '
Add the chopped kale to a bowl along with the olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper. Massage the kale with the ingredients until it wilts slightly. Set it aside for later.
', '
Unwrap the tofu and cut it into ½ inch cubes.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Add in the vegetable oil and then the tofu. Arrange the tofu in a single layer in the pan. Cook the tofu for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until all the sides turn a light golden brown color.
', '
Pour in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken and mix it together with the tofu.
', '
To serve, portion 1 cup of brown rice, ¼ portion of the tofu, ¼ of the avocado, ¼ cup of shredded carrots, and 1 cup of the prepared kale into each bowl. Garnish with black sesame seeds, white sesame seeds, sliced green onions, and cilantro leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-truffle-devotion
Ingredients: ['6 oz, semi-sweet chocolate', '1 tsp. butter, soft not melted']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. corn syrup', '2 oz. heavy cream', '1 tsp. powdered sugar']
Procedure:
['
Bring heavy cream and corn syrup to a boil. Pour cream over chocolate, let stand for 1 minute.
', '
Stir mixture until smooth. Begin with small circles in middle then move onto an outward stir. Add butter and stir well to incorporate (using spatula). Add in Hoisin Sauce and repeat.
', '
Cover bowl and place mixture in refrigerator for 10 minutes.
', '
Stir batter mixture and transfer to a ready-made pastry bag. Squeeze out batter to form small balls on parchment paper and let stand for 5 minutes.
', '
Sprinkle powdered sugar and serve.
']

Name: yellowtail-sashimi-with-chili-and-ponzu
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sushi-grade yellowtail', '6 very thin slices of jalapeno (less than 1/4 of 1 jalapeno)', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. yuzu juice (or lemon juice)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NAyOPZ7he28&feature=youtu.be
', '
Slice yellowtail in six thin slices. This is easiest when the fish is very cold or even slightly frozen (pop it in the freezer for 30 minutes if you’re having trouble).
', '
Combine yuzu and soy, set aside.
', '
Top each slice of fish with a slice of jalapeno and a drop of sesame oil.
', '
Pour yuzu soy sauce over fish, garnish with cilantro leaves and serve immediately or chill until ready to serve.
']

Name: california-roll
Ingredients: ['2 cups sushi rice, uncooked', '2 cups water', '4” square kombu, cut into 2" pieces', '8 nori half sheets', '1 lb. crab or surimi (imitation crab)', '3/4 cup water ', 'wasabi and pickled ginger, for garnish', '1 hothouse cucumber, french fry cut to 4” long', '1 avocado, sliced into strips', '2 Tbsp. sesame seed']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['6 oz. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar + 1/4 cup for Temi-zu (hand dipping mixture)', '5 Tbsp. sugar', '¼ cup sea or kosher salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NAyOPZ7he28&feature=youtu.be
', '
Place rice in a fine sieve and rinse under cold running water, massage the rice as it rinses until the water runs clear and drain well. Add rice and 2 cups of water to the rice cooker along with the 2"piece of Kombu, cover and cook for 20 minutes. If using a pot, place the rice and water in a 2 quart heavy saucepot with a tight-fitting lid and one 2" piece of kombu. Remove from heat and rest for 20 minutes until all liquid is absorbed and rice is shiny and tender. In a separate small saucepan combine 6 oz. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar, sugar, salt and remaining 2" piece of kombu. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until sugar and salt are dissolved.
', '
Transfer the rested rice to a large wooden salad bowl and delicately spread into an even layer using a silicone spatula. Let rest again for about 15 minutes undisturbed. Drizzle vinegar mixture slowly all over rice. Work the rice and vinegar together by gently folding, being careful not to smash any rice grains. You can press any large lumps apart and fold the rice back into the vinegar. Taste rice and, if desired, add more vinegar mixture. Cut until any lumps are broken up and rice uniform and shiny. You can hold sushi rice in a large lidded Dutch oven lined with plastic until ready to make sushi. This recipe makes about 4 cups of cooked sushi rice.
', '
In a small bowl, fold together the crab and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo until well combined, reserve.
', '
Use a small bowl of water with a 1/4 rice vinegar to create a Temi-zu to keep your hands moist. This will keep rice from sticking to your hands. Lay a bamboo sushi rolling mat down with the long side lined up close to your body on the board. Place one sheet of nori rough side up with the long side lined up with the edge of the mat. Grab about a loose tennis ball of rice, about ¾ cups and spread the rice into a thin, even layer across the whole nori sheet leaving an uncovered 1/2” strip at the top.\xa0 Rub a 1 tsp. smear of wasabi lengthwise down the middle. Right over that smear, place 3 Tbsp. of crab, 1\xa0 strip of cucumber, and a strip of avocado. Sprinkle with 1 tsp. of sesame seeds, don’t over stuff.
', '
Lift up the back edge of the mat, use the tips of your fingers to contain the filling and rice as you roll. Continue rolling the sushi by pulling forward on the folded-over edge of the bamboo mat, rolling over a little at a time until rolled over. Once the roll is sealed, place the roll on the board and snug it down with the mat. Moisten the edge of a sharp knife, slice the roll in half. Line up the two halves. Wipe your blade down with a damp towel and cut the two half rolls into three equal pieces. Serve with extra wasabi and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce on the side if desired.\xa0
']

Name: wonton-soup-2
Ingredients: ['7 oz. ground pork ', '25 wonton wrappers', 'water, for brushing', '4 baby bok choy cut in half lengthwise, for serving', '3 oz. cooked egg noodles, for serving', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 cups chicken broth', '2 garlic cloves, smashed', '2 tsp. granulated sugar', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 ½ Tbsp. shaoxing wine', '¼ tsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['½ Tbsp. minced ginger', '1 shallots, minced', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. shaoxing wine', '¼ tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Add the ground pork, minced ginger, shallots, ½ Tbsp. of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, 1 Tbsp. of shaoxing wine, salt, and 1 Tbsp. of the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to a bowl. Mash the ingredients together until everything is evenly combined.\xa0
', '
Place a wonton wrapper in the center of the cutting board. Spoon about 2 tsp. of the pork filling into the center of the wrapper. Brush the edges of the wrapper with water. Fold the bottom half up to the top half and press the two sides together. Wet the bottom edges of the wrapper then pinch them together so that it forms an upside down “U” shape. Repeat these steps to assemble the remaining wontons.\xa0
', '
To cook the wontons, bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the wontons to the pot and cook them for about 4 minutes or until they float to the top. Remove them from the pot with a slotted spoon and set them aside. To make the broth, add the chicken broth, garlic cloves, granulated sugar, the remaining ½ Tbsp. of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, the remaining 1 ½ Tbsp. of shaoxing wine, and the remaining ¼ tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil to a large pot.
', '
Cover the pot and heat it over high heat and bring it to a boil. Lower the heat and simmer the broth for 10 minutes. In the last two minutes of simmering, add in the bok choy and allow it to cook. (Optional) you could choose to add the bok choy to the divided soup instead, after everything is served depending on your preference.\xa0
', '
Divide the cooked egg noodles between two bowls. Add some of the wontons and bok choy to each bowl then ladle the broth over top. Garnish with sliced green onions and enjoy!
']

Name: spiced-goat-cheese-stuffed-bacon-wrapped-dates
Ingredients: ['24 medjool dates, pitted', '6 oz. creamy goat cheese', '12 slices thinly sliced bacon, cut in half']
Marinade: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pNB8ty0eq80&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 400℉. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
', '
Split the dates in half lengthwise, making sure not to slice all the way through. Remove the pit and discard. Stuff each date with goat cheese, then gently squeeze to seal. Wrap each date with bacon and place them seam side down on the baking sheet. Repeat till all have been stuffed and wrapped.\xa0
', '
Place Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce in a small bowl and use pastry brush to glaze each date with the sauce.\xa0\xa0
', '
Bake in the oven for 20-25 minutes until the bacon has become crispy. Transfer to a serving platter and serve warm.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: daikon-salad-2
Ingredients: ['1 large daikon, cut into 3 inch long matchsticks', 'black sesame seeds, for garnish', 'white sesame seeds, for garnish', 'sliced green onions, for garnish', 'alfalfa sprouts, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Mix the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, rice vinegar, and granulated sugar together in a small bowl.\xa0
', '
Place the daikon in a large bowl and pour the dressing over top. Toss the daikon with the dressing until it is evenly coated.\xa0
', '
Garnish the salad with black sesame seeds, white sesame seeds, sliced green onions, and alfalfa sprouts. Enjoy!
']

Name: crab-rangoon
Ingredients: ['16 oz. cream cheese, at room temperature', '24 wonton skin wrappers', '16 oz. imitation crab meat, chopped into small chunks', '1 large egg, beaten', 'vegetable oil, for frying', 'sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce plus more for dipping']
Procedure:
['
Add the cream cheese and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce to a bowl. Mix the ingredients together until they are well combined.\xa0
', '
Place a wonton wrapper in the center of the cutting board. Dollop a half tablespoon of the cream cheese mixture in the center of the wrapper. Then place a piece of imitation crab meat on top.
', '
Dip a pastry brush into the beaten egg. Brush the edges of the wrapper with the egg. Take two opposite corners of the wrapper and pinch them together at the top. Then take the remaining two corners and pinch them together at the top.\xa0
', '
Repeat steps 2-3 to make the remaining rangoons.\xa0
', '
Heat a pot filled with about 4 inches of oil to 350˚F.
', '
Working in batches, add the rangoons to the oil and fry them for about 1-2 minutes or until they turn golden brown. Remove the rangoons from the oil and place them on a baking tray lined with paper towels. Garnish with sliced green onions and serve with additional Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: chinese-smashed-cucumbers
Ingredients: ['2 English cucumbers', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['4 tsp. Chinese black vinegar', '1 garlic clove, minced', '1 tsp. granulated sugar', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. white sesame seeds', '½ tsp. red pepper flakes']
Marinade: ['1 ½ tsp. kosher salt']
Procedure:
['
Cut each cucumber into 3 even pieces then place them into a reseal-able plastic bag. Use a rolling pin or heavy pan to press down on the cucumbers until they split into spears.
', '
Remove the cucumbers from the bag then cut them into 1 ½ in. pieces.\xa0\xa0
', '
Toss the cucumbers with the salt then place them into a colander. Allow the cucumbers to stand for about 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the black vinegar, garlic, sugar, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, white sesame seeds, and red pepper flakes. Mix the ingredients together until combined.
', '
Transfer the cucumbers to a bowl then toss them with the prepared sauce. Garnish with cilantro leaves and enjoy!
']

Name: sausage-stuffing
Ingredients: ['1lb. loaf stale challah bread, torn into pieces', ' ¼ cup unsalted butter', '2 cups chopped onion', '2 cups chopped celery', '1 lb. kielbasa sausage, cut into half-moons', '6 garlic cloves, minced', '1 ½ cups chicken broth', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce', '1 ½ tsp. salt', '1 ½ tsp. dried thyme', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 250˚F. Spread the challah pieces onto a baking sheet and bake them for about 30 minutes to dry out. Remove them from the oven and set them aside for later.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F.
', '
Heat a large pan over medium high heat. Add the butter and allow it to melt. Then add in the onions and celery and cook until the onion turns translucent.\xa0
', '
Add the sausage and garlic to the pan. Cook until the sausage browns then add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce, salt, thyme, and pepper.
', '
Mix in the dried challah and chicken broth until everything is evenly combined.\xa0
', '
Spray a baking dish with cooking spray and scoop the stuffing into the dish. Cover the top with aluminum foil and bake it in the oven for about 1 hour. Remove the foil covering in the last 10 minutes. Garnish the stuffing with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: gingerbread-cookies
Ingredients: ['3 ¼ cups all-purpose flour', '1 Tbsp. ground cinnamon', '1 Tbsp. ground ginger', '¾ tsp. baking soda', '3/4 tsp. ground cloves', '1/2 tsp. ground nutmeg', '1/2 tsp. salt', '¾ cup unsalted butter, at room temperature', '½ cup brown sugar', '1 large egg', '½ cup molasses', '1 ½ tsp. vanilla extract', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', 'vanilla icing, for decorating', '(optional) sprinkles, for decorating']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the flour, cinnamon, ginger, baking soda, cloves, nutmeg, and salt. Mix with a whisk until the ingredients are evenly distributed.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, add the butter and brown sugar. Beat the two together with a hand mixer or rubber spatula until it becomes light and fluffy. Then mix in the egg, molasses, vanilla extract, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce.
', '
Gradually mix in the flour mixture until well combined.\xa0
', '
Divide the dough into half and form each half into a flat disc shape. Wrap the discs of dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate them for about 2 hours.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350˚F. Line a few baking trays with parchment paper. Unwrap the dough and lightly flour the work surface. Use a rolling pin to roll out the dough to an ⅛ inch thickness. Use a gingerbread man cookie cutter to cut out the shape then place it onto the baking tray. Re-roll the dough scraps as needed to cut out more cookies.
', '
Bake the cookies for about 8-10 minutes. Remove them from the oven and allow them to sit on the baking tray for 5 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to finish cooling. Once the cookies have cooled completely, decorate them with white icing and sprinkles. Enjoy!
']

Name: balsamic-cranberry-roasted-chicken
Ingredients: ['8 boneless chicken thighs']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. chopped rosemary leaves, and more for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 cloves garlic', '¼ cup balsamic vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 ½ cups cranberries', '3 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Add the garlic, balsamic vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, ½ a cup of the cranberries, and olive oil to a food processor. Blend the ingredients until smooth.\xa0
', '
Place the chicken thighs into a reseal-able plastic bag. Pour in the marinade and seal the bag. Place the chicken into the fridge to marinate for about 30 minutes.
', '
Preheat the oven to 375˚F. Spray a cast iron skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Place the chicken into the pan and season it with salt, pepper, and the chopped rosemary. Add the remaining cup of cranberries to the pan.\xa0
', '
Bake the chicken for about 20 minutes then increase the oven temperature to 425˚F and bake the chicken for an additional 5-8 minutes until the tops of the chicken brown.\xa0
', '
Remove the chicken from the oven and garnish with additional rosemary leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: maple-bacon-carrots
Ingredients: ['12 carrots, peeled', '12 strips bacon', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Marinade: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce', '2 Tbsp. maple syrup']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Spray with cooking spray.
', '
Wrap each carrot with a strip of bacon and place it onto the prepared baking sheet.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce, and maple syrup.
', '
Use a pastry brush to brush the sauce onto the bacon wrapped carrots.\xa0
', '
Roast the carrots in the oven for 15 minutes then brush on another layer of the sauce. Bake them for another 15 minutes until the bacon is crispy and the carrots are cooked.\xa0
', '
Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!
']

Name: roasted-potatoes
Ingredients: ['24 oz. petite medley potatoes, halved', 'chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ Tbsp. minced thyme, and more for garnish', '½ Tbsp. minced rosemary, and more for garnish', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Spray with cooking spray.
', '
Add the petite medley potatoes, olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, minced thyme, minced rosemary, salt, and pepper to a large bowl.
', '
Toss the ingredients together until everything is evenly coated.
', '
Spread the potatoes into a single layer on the baking sheet and roast them in the oven for about 30-35 minutes or until the potatoes are cooked through.\xa0
', '
Garnish the potatoes with additional thyme, additional rosemary, and chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: japanese-sesame-salad-dressing
Procedure:
['
Grind the sesame seeds using a mortar and pestle until a fine powder forms.
', '
Add the ground sesame seeds to a bowl along with the rice vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, granulated sugar, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and mayo.\xa0
', '
Mix the ingredients together with a whisk until everything has emulsified. Serve with a salad and enjoy!
']

Name: pan-fried-fish-with-fine-shrimp-sauce-and-chili
Ingredients: ['6 (7 oz. each) sea bass or snapper fillets, skin-on', '¼ cup cornstarch ', '1 tsp. baking soda ', 'banana leaf, for plating', '2 spring onions, cut on the bias, for garnish', 'lime wedges, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['sea salt to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '3 pcs. shallots, roughly chopped', '1 cup tomatoes, chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Shrimp Sauce (Finely Ground)', '1 tsp. tamarind concentrate ', '2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
To make the sauce, heat 3 Tbsp. of vegetable oil in a small saucepan over medium high heat and sweat shallots until they turn soft and translucent, about 3 minutes.
', '
Add tomatoes, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Shrimp Sauce (Finely Ground), tamarind concentrate and sugar. Simmer for about 10 minutes or until tomatoes are cooked through or “pulpy” and the sauce thickens slightly. Remove from heat and set aside until ready to serve.
', '
To prepare the fish, pour enough oil on a large non-stick pan or cast iron skillet to cover the base. Set heat to medium high. While waiting for pan to heat through, combine cornstarch and baking soda on a large plate and season fish fillets with salt. Ensure the skin is dry and then lightly coat cornstarch mixture. Pat off any excess flour and place skin side down into the oil.\xa0
', '
Cook for 2-3 minutes and turn the fillets over and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until cooked through. Transfer to paper towels to drain off the excess oil.\xa0
', '
Place banana leaf onto plate and spoon over a generous amount of sauce. Top with fillet of fish, skin side up. Sprinkle with spring onions and serve with a wedge of lime on the side. Serve immediately.\xa0
']

Name: three-cup-mushrooms-with-abalone
Ingredients: ['3 oz. brown beech mushrooms', '3.5 oz. oyster mushrooms ', '3.5 oz. fresh mushrooms ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 oz. ginger, sliced', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 oz. basil', '1 can Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch water ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored With Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Black Sesame Oil ', '2 Tbsp. rice wine ', '2 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Remove the roots from the brown beech mushrooms. Blanch the oyster mushrooms, fresh mushrooms, and brown beech mushrooms for about 30 seconds. Drain and set aside.
', '
Heat the oil and sauté the ginger and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic until fragrant. Add the oyster mushrooms, fresh mushrooms, brown beech mushrooms, and seasonings and stir well.
', '
Add the basil and Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce and cook with cover on for 20 seconds.\xa0
', '
Finally, add the cornstarch water and cook, keep stirring until the sauce is thickened.
']

Name: plum-turnover
Ingredients: ['3 ½ cups plums, quartered and deseeded ', '1 ½ cups pecans, finely chopped ', '2 sheets frozen butter puff pastry, thawed ', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, for dusting', '1 egg, lightly beaten  ', 'powdered sugar, garnish (optional)']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup firmly packed brown sugar', '½ tsp. ground cinnamon ', '1 tsp. grated lemon zest', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pFojIyA-Uqw&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
', '
In a large mixing bowl place the plums, pecans, brown sugar, ground cinnamon, lemon zest and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce. Toss to combine.\xa0\xa0
', '
Light dust a cool, flat surface with flour and place a pastry sheet on top. Cut each pastry sheet into 6 squares. Spoon the plum mixture evenly into the center of each pastry square.\xa0
', '
Brush the edges with the beaten egg, then fold over in half diagonally to form a triangle. Use a fork to seal the edges.\xa0
', '
Place the turnovers on the prepared baking sheet then brush the tops with the remaining beaten egg. Bake in the oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Garnish with powdered sugar (optional).\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.

Name: cranberry-ginger-relish
Ingredients: ['12 oz. cranberries', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Navel orange, peeled and sectioned', '½ cup pomegranate seeds', '2 tsp. orange zest']
Seasoning: ['¾ cup granulated sugar', '3 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add the cranberries, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, orange, sugar, and honey to a sauce pot. Cook over medium heat for about 15-20 minutes until the berries burst and the mixture slightly thickens.\xa0
', '
Stir in the pomegranate seeds and cook for another 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Remove the pot from the heat and mix in the orange zest. Enjoy!
']

Name: creamy-mushroom-fettuccine
Ingredients: ['8 oz. fettuccine pasta', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 lb. cremini mushrooms, cleaned and sliced', '1 yellow onion, diced', '½ tsp. dried thyme', ' ¼ tsp. dried dill', '2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', ' ¼ cup grated parmesan cheese', '½ cup chopped parsley, for garnish', '1 small bunch of basil, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['¾ cup vegetable broth', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 cup half and half']
Procedure:
['
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the fettuccine according to the package directions. Drain and rinse with cold water.
', '
Melt the butter in a large pan over medium heat. Add the garlic, mushrooms, and onion to the pan. Cook for about 3-4 minutes until the onions turn translucent and the mushrooms are no longer releasing any moisture. Stir in the thyme, dill, and salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Stir in the flour and mix until the mushrooms are evenly coated with it. Pour in the vegetable broth, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Mix with a whisk until combined. Then add in the half and half. Stir until the sauce has slightly thickened.\xa0
', '
Sprinkle in the parmesan cheese and fettuccine. Toss the pasta with the sauce until it is evenly coated.\xa0
', '
Garnish with a sprinkle of chopped parsley and basil leaves. Enjoy!
']

Name: sticky-rice-stuffing
Ingredients: ['2 ½ cups short-grain sticky rice', '¼ cup vegetable oil ', '2 shallots, sliced into rings', '6 oz. Chinese sausage, sliced on a bias', '⅓ cup sliced green onions, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Shaoxing wine', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 ½ cups chicken broth']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the rice in a colander then transfer it into a bowl. Cover the rice with 1 inch of water and allow it to soak overnight.
', '
Drain the rice well.
', '
Heat a cast iron pan over medium heat. Pour in the vegetable oil. Add the shallots and sauté until they turn golden brown.
', '
Then add in the Chinese sausage and sauté until they begin to curl, about 1 minute.\xa0
', '
Pour in the Shaoxing wine and bring it to a boil. Allow it to boil and reduce for about 1 minute. Add the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, rice, and chicken broth to the pan. Stir to combine.\xa0
', '
Bring the broth to a boil then lower the heat so that it is simmering. Cover the pan with a lid and cook for about 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked. Garnish the rice with the sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: cheesy-garlic-mashed-potatoes
Ingredients: ['4 lbs. russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 2" cubes', '½ cup unsalted butter', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup whole milk', '6 oz. cubed cream cheese, at room temperature', '8 oz. cheddar cheese', '3 oz. parmesan cheese', '½ cup chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. salt, in boiling water', 'salt and pepper, taste']
Procedure:
['
Place the potatoes into a large pot. Fill the pot with water so that the water comes about 2 inches over the potatoes. Add in the 1 Tbsp. of salt. Heat the pot over high heat and bring it to a boil. Continue to boil the potatoes until they are tender, about 20-25 minutes.\xa0
', '
Drain the potatoes from the water and place them into a large bowl. Roughly mash the potatoes.
', '
Melt the butter in a sauce pot over medium heat. Add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and stir until it becomes fragrant. Pour in the milk and bring it to a boil.
', '
When the milk reaches a boil, pour it into the bowl of potatoes. Add in the cream cheese, cheddar cheese, and parmesan, continue to mash and mix the potatoes until they reach the desired consistency. Season with salt and pepper and garnish with chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: cream-cheese-wontons
Ingredients: ['8 oz. cream cheese, at room temperature ', '½ tsp. granulated sugar', '24 pcs. wonton wrappers', '1 large egg, beaten', 'vegetable oil, for frying']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Place a wonton wrapper onto a clean surface. Spoon about 1 tsp. of the cream cheese mixture onto the center of the wrapper.\xa0
', '
Use a pastry brush to brush the edges of the wrapper with the beaten egg.\xa0
', '
Bring two opposite corners of the wrapper up to the top and pinch them together. Repeat with the two remaining corners so that you form a small pouch. Repeat steps 2-4 to make the remaining wontons.\xa0
', '
Bring a pot filled with about 4 inches of oil to 350˚F.
', '
Working in batches, add some of the wontons to the oil and fry until they turn golden brown. This should take about 3-5 minutes.
', '
Remove the wontons from the oil with a slotted spoon and allow them to drain on a sheet tray lined with paper towels. Serve the wontons with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: honey-glazed-cantonese-turkey
Ingredients: ['2 pcs. turkey breasts']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '½ cup honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking tray with aluminum foil. Spray with cooking spray.\xa0
', '
Pat the turkey breasts dry with paper towels. Season them with salt and pepper and place them onto the prepared pan.
', '
Place the turkey breasts into the oven, then lower the oven temperature to 350˚F. Bake the turkey breasts for about 40 minutes.
', '
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, honey, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic with a whisk. Divide the sauce evenly between 2 separate bowls.\xa0
', '
After the turkey breasts have cooked for 40 minutes, begin basting it with the sauce mixture every 10 minutes for a total of 20 minutes.
', '
When the turkey is fully cooked through remove it from the oven and allow it to rest for 20 minutes before slicing. Serve with the additional bowl of sauce. Enjoy!
']

Name: stuffed-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['20 pcs. baby bella mushrooms, cleaned', '1 Tbsp. peanut oil', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '1 cup water chestnuts, diced', '1 ½ cups panko breadcrumbs', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '⅓ cup chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Spray with cooking spray.
', '
Remove the stems from the mushrooms. Roughly chop the stems and set them aside. Place the mushroom caps onto the prepared baking sheet bottom side up.
', '
Heat a pan over medium high heat. Pour in the peanut oil.
', '
Add in the chopped mushroom stems and cook them until they are no longer releasing moisture, about 3-5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the garlic and water chestnuts. Cook for about 2 minutes. Add in the rice vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, kosher salt, and pepper. Mix until the ingredients are combined and cook for about 2-3 minutes. Remove the pan from heat.\xa0
', '
Spoon the filling mixture into the mushroom caps. In a small bowl, mix the panko breadcrumbs and sesame oil together. Sprinkle the breadcrumbs on top of the mushrooms. Bake the mushrooms in the oven for about 20 minutes. Remove the mushrooms from the oven and garnish with a sprinkling of chopped parsley. Enjoy!
']

Name: miso-glazed-roasted-root-vegetables
Ingredients: ['½ lb. carrots, peeled and cut into ¾" pieces', '½ lb. brussels sprouts, trimmed and cut in half', '½ lb. red beets, peeled, and cut into ¾" pieces', '½ lb. golden beets, peeled and cut into ¾" pieces', '2 Tbsp. microgreens', '5 sage leaves']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. miso paste', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 Tbsp. tahini', '1 Tbsp. maple syrup', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 Tbsp. water', '½ tsp. kosher salt', '¼ tsp. ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Spray with cooking spray.
', '
Place the carrots, brussels sprouts, red beets, and golden beets into a large bowl.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, combine the miso paste, vegetable oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, rice vinegar, tahini, maple syrup, garlic, water, salt, and pepper.
', '
Pour the sauce mixture into the bowl of vegetables. Toss the vegetables with the sauce until they are evenly coated.\xa0
', '
Add the vegetables to the prepared pan and arrange them so that they are in a single layer.
', '
Bake the vegetables for about 30-40 minutes or until they are tender. Remove them from the oven and garnish with microgreens and sage leaves. Enjoy!
\xa0
']

Name: sesame-bacon-hasselback-potatoes
Ingredients: ['4 russet potatoes', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted', '4 slices of bacon, cooked and chopped', '½ cup sliced green onions']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 450˚F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray.
', '
Place a potato onto a cutting board horizontally. Put one wooden chopstick up against the top of the potato and another against the bottom of the potato. Slice ⅛ inch thick slices into the potato. The chopsticks will prevent you from cutting all the way through the potato. Repeat step 2 for the remaining potatoes.
', '
Place the potatoes onto the prepared baking sheet.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the vegetable oil and butter. Use pastry brush to brush the oil and butter mixture onto the potatoes and in between the slices. Season the potatoes with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Bake the potatoes in the oven for 50-60 minutes or until the potatoes are cooked through. Remove the potatoes from the oven. Use a pastry brush to brush the potatoes with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, making sure to get in between the slices.\xa0
', '
Place the potatoes back into the oven for 3-5 minutes. Remove the potatoes from the oven. Garnish them with a sprinkling of chopped bacon and sliced green onions. Enjoy!
']

Name: red-curry-butternut-squash-soup
Procedure:
['
Heat a heavy bottom pot over medium high heat. Pour in the olive oil.
', '
Add in the butternut squash, yellow onion, garlic, red curry paste, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce, coriander, cumin, and salt. Mix the ingredients together and cook until the onion turns translucent.\xa0
', '
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring it to a boil. Lower the heat so that it is simmering. Simmer for about 15-20 minutes or until the butternut squash is tender.\xa0
', '
Working in batches, ladle a portion of the soup into a blender and blend until smooth. Pour the blended soup into a separate pot. Continue until all the soup has been blended.
', '
Add the lime juice to the soup. Taste the soup and season with more salt if necessary.
', '
Portion the soup into bowls. Swirl coconut milk on top of the soup and garnish with microgreens and dried cranberries. Enjoy!
']

Name: braised-abalone-with-sea-cucumber
Ingredients: ['1 pc. soaked sea cucumber (about 12 oz.), chopped', '1.5 cup water', '1 oz. ginger, sliced', '1.5 oz. green onion, sectioned', '1 oz. garlic, smacked', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 lettuce', '2 cans Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce', 'shrimp roe (optional)', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Black Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Shao Hsing Wine', '2 tsp. sugar', '4 Tbsp. Sauce from Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Boil sea cucumber and drain. Bring 1.5 cups of water to a boil with the ginger, green onion, garlic, and oil. Once this mixture comes to a boil, add the sea cucumber and simmer for 30 minutes over medium heat. Remove the ginger, green onion, and garlic from the pot.
', '
Wash the lettuce and cut it into four portions. Cook them in boiling water with oil, drain, and place each portion on a plate.
', '
Mix all seasonings (except the abalone sauce). Add the seasonings, Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce, and shrimp roe to the sea cucumber pot and bring to a boil.
', '
Add cornstarch and the sauce from the Lee Kum Kee Abalone in Premium Oyster Sauce.
', '
Place all the ingredients on the lettuce and pour the sauce on top.
']

Name: steamed-chicken-with-shrimp-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. chicken fillet (sliced)', '3 oz. bean vermicelli (sectioned, soaked until softened, drained', '3 oz. asparagus (sliced)', '2 oz. carrot(s) (sliced)', '6 pcs. bean curd puffs (sliced)']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Shrimp Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 Tbsp. oil', '1 Tbsp. water', '1 ½ tsp. sugar', '1 tsp. corn starch']
Procedure:
['
Mix all ingredients with marinade ingredients. Steam on high heat for 10 minutes or until cooked through.
', '
Remove and serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: assorted-seafood-hot-pot-with-shrimp-sauce
Ingredients: ['5 oz. assorted seafood', '1 oz. bean vermicelli (soaked until softened, drained)', '1 pc. red chili (sliced)', '4 oz. leek (sliced)']
Seasoning: ['salt & pepper (to taste)']
Sauce Mix: ['stock', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Shrimp Sauce', '1 tsp. cooking wine', '2.5 cups water']
Procedure:
['
Add all the Sauce Mix ingredients into a pot to create the soup base. Bring to a boil.
', '
Add in assorted seafood, bean vermicelli and red chilies. Heat through. Stir in leeks and season with salt and pepper if necessary. Transfer to a bowl and serve.
']

Name: jjimdak-korean-braised-chicken
Ingredients: ['5 cups water ', '1.8 lbs. chicken (cut into medium-sized chunks)', '1 medium carrot, cut into medium-sized chunks', '5 small dried red chili peppers ', '3 pcs. shiitake mushrooms, thinly sliced', '1 large brown onion, cut into medium-sized chunks', '2 medium potatoes, cut into medium-sized chunks', '5.3 oz. Korean glass noodles (soaked in warm water for about 20 mins to hydrate, drain before use) ', '1 stalk green onion, sectioned', '1 tsp. roasted sesame seeds']
Sauce Mix: ['1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. raw sugar or dark brown sugar', '2 Tbsp. rice wine /mirin', '1 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ', '¼ tsp. ground black pepper', '1 ½ cup water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xpiMhkF0_1E&feature=youtu.be
', '
On medium-high heat, boil 5 cups of water in a pot. Once boiling, parboil the chicken for 1 minute to skim off any fat. Drain the water.\xa0
', '
Mix all seasoning sauces in a bowl. In another pot, add the chicken and the sauce mix. Boil them over medium-high heat for about 10 minutes, covered.
', '
Add the carrots, chilies, mushroom, onions, and potatoes. Cover and boil for another 15 mins.\xa0
', '
Add in the glass noodles, and green onions. Cover and let it simmer for about 3 to 5 minutes. Stir lightly to make sure the noodles and the mushrooms are mixed with the sauce. Garnish with sesame seeds before serving.\xa0
', '
Tips: Oyster Sauce can greatly enhance the flavor of the meat and add umami to the dish.\xa0
']

Name: korean-stir-fried-glass-noodles
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '6 fresh shiitake mushroom, sliced', '1 oz. chives, sectioned ', '2 oz. carrot, julienned ', '2 oz. onion, julienned ', '2 oz. cucumber, julienned ', '2 oz. bean sprout', '1 Tbsp. roasted sesame ', '4 oz. Korean vermicelli']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ', '2 Tbsp. white sugar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BBnoLE1PPBQ&feature=youtu.be
', '
Add cooking oil in a heated wok, pour in all ingredients and stir-fry for 1 minute.\xa0
', '
Add in seasoning sauces and stir well.\xa0
', '
Add the cooked vermicelli, and sugar. Stir quickly and sprinkle the roasted sesame before serving.\xa0
', '
Tips: Oyster Sauce can add complexity and help bring out the flavor of the dish.\xa0
']

Name: lo-mein-with-oyster-sauce-with-dried-scallop
Ingredients: ['8 oz. egg noodles', 'a few green onions ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce with Dried Scallop ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Add egg noodles in boiling water and cook for about 3 minutes, drain off excess water and put in a bowl. Sprinkle some chopped green onions over the noodles, then drizzle heated cooking oil in the noodles.\xa0
', '
Add in Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce with Dried Scallop and Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil, mix well and ready to serve.\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: szechuan-style-fish-with-pickled-mustard-greens
Ingredients: ['12 oz. fish fillet', '12 oz. pickled mustard greens', 'a little oil  ', '2 Tbsp. dried chili pepper', 'as appropriate ginger', 'as appropriate garlic ', '8 cup water', '2 Tbsp.  Szechuan peppercorn', 'as appropriate green onions ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. yellow chili sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Chicken Bouillon Powder (No MSG Added)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar', '1 tsp. white pepper']
Marinade: ['a little salt  ', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 egg white']
Procedure:
['
Cut the fish into ½ cm slices. Coat the fish in a mixture of salt, cooking wine, cornstarch, and egg white, and marinate for 30 minutes. Chop the pickled mustard greens into pieces and soak in water until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Heat the oil in a pan. Sauté dried chili pepper, ginger, and garlic until fragrant; and then add the pickled mustard greens, and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Add the Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and the yellow chili sauce, stirring well. Add water, and allow it to boil for 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Place the pickled mustard greens at the bottom of the serving bowl. Place the pieces of fish into the pan one at a time, and allow to boil for 1 minute. Add the Lee Kum Kee Premium Chicken Bouillon Powder (No MSG Added), Lee Kum Kee 9° Selected Rice Vinegar and white pepper to season. Pour the cooked fish along with the contents of the pan over the bed of pickled mustard greens.
', '
Toss dried chili peppers, the Szechuan peppercorn, and scallions into the pan with oil, and leave until 80% cooked through. Pour over the top of the dish, and serve.\xa0
']

Name: char-siu-with-fried-egg-over-rice
Ingredients: ['10 oz. pork', '1 pc. fried egg', '1 bowl rice']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. honey', '1/2 Tbsp. Mei Kuei Lu Chiew (cooking wine)']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1/2 Tbsp. sugar', '1/4 tsp. five-spice powder', '1/8 tsp. white pepper']
Procedure:
['
Clean the pork, then soak up the excess water with some paper towel.
', '
Create a char siu marinade: Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, sugar, five spice powder, and white pepper. Place pork with marinade in a plastic bag for 30 minutes; best if overnight.
', '
Create honey wine by combining honey and Mei Kuei Lu Chiew (cooking wine).
', '
Preheat air fryer at 350℉ for 5 mins. Add marinated pork, cook for 5 mins. Flip over pork, brush with honey wine, and cook for another 5 mins. Flip again, brush with honey wine, and cook last time for another 5 mins.
', '
Thicken the remaining marinade into a sauce. Pour sauce over char siu.
', '
Slice char siu. Serve with rice, fried egg, and desired vegetables.
']

Name: spicy-kimchi-tofu-stew
Ingredients: ['1½ cup kimchi cabbage ', '3½ oz. pork shoulder butt ', '1 small pack tofu ', '2 stalks green onion ', '1 pc. Cheongyang chili pepper ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 tsp. minced garlic', '3 cups water  ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder']
Procedure:
['
Cut the kimchi into 2-inch thick pieces. Cut the pork shoulder butt into two halves and cut it into 1-inch thick pieces. Cut tofu into 1-inch thick pieces. Slice green onion and Cheongyang chilli pepper diagonally.
', '
Add cooking oil to a heated pot and put minced garlic, pork shoulder butt, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and stir-fry them for 2 minutes on medium heat and put Kimchi then stir-fry for 3 minutes.
', '
Pour in water then when it boils up over high heat, add Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, cover it with a lid and reduce to medium heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
', '
Add tofu, green onion, Cheongyang chili pepper, Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder and simmer for another 5 minutes.
']

Name: glazed-cod
Ingredients: ['4 center-cut skinless cod fillets ', 'vegetable of choice, for serving', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. black pepper ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice ', '1 Tbsp. honey  ', '1 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425°F. Spray an 8 inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray. Season both sides of the cod with salt and pepper, then place in the dish and set aside.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a small saucepan over medium high heat, mix together the lime juice, honey, unseasoned rice vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Bring to a boil then reduce to a simmer, and cook until a thick syrup consistency is reached.\xa0
', '
Spoon 1 tsp. of glaze over each fillet, reserving the leftover glaze for serving.\xa0\xa0
', '
Bake in the preheated oven until the fish is cooked through and opaque, about 12 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
Serve over your favorite vegetables and garnish with sesame seeds.\xa0
']

Name: mushroom-shrimp-and-pork-dumplings
Ingredients: ['8 pcs. dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked in water', '1 lb. minced pork ', '8 oz. shrimp ', '2 Tbsp. corn starch ', '4 oz. chives, chopped', '2 eggs', '1/3 cup water ', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '35 sheets dumpling wrapper']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG added) ', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Julienne the soaked shiitake mushrooms.
', '
Put all the ingredients (except the dumpling wrappers) into a large bowl and mix well with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG added), and Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder in a clockwise direction until the filling turns into paste form. Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil and mix well. Place the filling in the refrigerator for about 1 hour.
', '
Take out the filling from the refrigerator and wrap it using dumpling wrappers.
', '
Tips: Make Cantonese dumplings by wrapping the filling with wanton wrappers.
']

Name: sizzling-black-pepper-beef
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ribeye steak', '8 oz. onions, julienned ', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic ', '1/8 cup water', '2 tsp. corn starch ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) ']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder ', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
Slice the ribeye steak into thick strips. Marinate with 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce, 1 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, 1 Tbsp. of cooking wine, and 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil for about 30 minutes. Next, mix evenly with onions and minced garlic.
', '
Add plain water and corn starch to the remaining seasoning and mix well.
', '
Heat up a hot plate, pour in 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil, and lay out the marinated beef on the hot plate. Pan-fry the beef on high fire until it becomes about medium and golden brown in color. Pour in the mixture and stir-fry it with the beef.
']

Name: stuffed-turkey-jack-o-lanterns
Ingredients: ['5 medium orange bell peppers ', '2 tsp. olive oil ', '1 ¼ lb. lean ground turkey meat ', '1 large onion, minced', '2 cloves garlic, minced  ', '2 medium tomatoes, finely chopped ', '1 ¾ cup shredded cheddar cheese ', '1 ½ cups panko crumbs ', 'green onions, for garnish (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EW-kEEsVBE8&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 325°F. Cut the tops off the peppers and carve out a shape of a Jack O’ lantern in each pepper (eyes and a mouth) in each pepper.
', '
In a large skillet over medium high heat, add the oil and wait till it gets hot. Add the turkey breaking apart with a wooden spoon.\xa0
', '
Mix and cook with the onion and garlic. Season with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce.\xa0\xa0
', '
Cool slightly then stir in tomatoes, cheese and panko crumbs.\xa0\xa0
', '
Fill each pepper with the turkey mixture. Bake, uncovered until heated through and peppers are tender, 20-25 minutes. Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: thai-peanut-noodle-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['2 packages dry ramen noodles ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 yellow bell pepper, sliced lengthwise ', '1 Fresno chilies, diced ', '1 bunch scallions, chopped ', '½ cup roasted peanuts']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Thai chili paste', '5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles according to package instructions. Strain and run under cold water, set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large wok over medium high heat, add Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and wait till it gets warm. Add in the Thai chili paste and mix well. Add in bell peppers and fresno chilies tossing in the oil. Let them soften 3-5 minutes stirring occasionally.\xa0
', '
Deglaze the pan with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and add in cooked ramen noodles.\xa0
', '
Toss altogether and cook for an additional 2-4 minutes to reheat noodles.\xa0
', '
Transfer to serving bowls and garnish with chopped scallions and roasted peanuts.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
