Name: sauteed-bok-choy
Ingredients: ['3 heads of baby bok choy', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '2 tsp. roasted sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Pull apart baby bok choy, rinse and pat dry.\xa0
', '
In a large sauté pan over medium high heat, add vegetable oil and wait till it gets hot.\xa0\xa0
', '
Add in prepared bok choy and drizzle the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Gently toss to coat the bok choy. Cook till the leaves have slightly wilted.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with roasted sesame seeds.\xa0
']

Name: vietnamese-style-pork-chops
Ingredients: ['4, 1” thick cut bone-in pork chops', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', 'rice, for serving (optional)', 'vegetables, for serving (optional)', '4-6 spring fresh rosemary, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. fresh cracked black pepper', '4-6 spring fresh rosemary']
Marinade: ['2 lemons, 1 for serving', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce  ', '3 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine the lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce.\xa0
', '
Transfer the pork chops to the large bowl and coat the sauce over each chop. Cover and let pork chops marinate at room temperature, turning occasionally for 20 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
Remove pork chops from marinade, scraping off excess marinade, but reserve for glazing.\xa0
', '
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Season pork chops with salt and pepper and cook until browned and cooked through, about 4 minutes each side.
', '
Glaze the reserved remaining sauce over the pork chops in the last 2 minutes of cooking. Let the pork chops rest for 10 minutes before serving.
', '
Garnish pork chops with fresh rosemary and lemons. Serve with rice and your favorite vegetable dish.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: garlic-bread
Ingredients: ['1 loaf fresh baked french bread ']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup fresh parsley, chopped ']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '4 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.\xa0
', '
Slice the loaf of bread in half lengthwise.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and olive oil.\xa0
', '
Using a pastry brush, divide the mixture onto both halves and place on the baking sheet.\xa0
', '
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until the edges are golden. Once taken out the oven, slice and garnish with fresh parsley.\xa0
']

Name: ginger-miso-acorn-squash
Ingredients: ['2 acorn squash  ', '¼ cup chopped roasted cashews']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup honey ', '½ tsp. miso paste', '½ tsp. salt  ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger  ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
', '
Wash the squash well, then dry with a paper towel. Trim the top and bottom of each squash, then cut in half from the top to bottom. Use a spoon to remove the inner seeds and strings.\xa0
', '
Lay each squash half flat on its side, and cut into 1 in. thick slices.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a microwave safe bowl, combine the honey, miso paste, salt and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Microwave for 60 seconds until the honey is melted and the mixture can be well combined.\xa0
', '
Place the squash sliced in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet. Use a pastry brush to brush the mixture onto both sides of the squash.\xa0
', '
Roast for 25 minutes on the first side, then flip and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes until caramelized. Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with cashews.
']

Name: korean-tempeh-bowls
Ingredients: ['8 oz. tempeh, cut crosswise into 16 pieces ', '1 cups green beans ', '½ orange bell pepper, sliced lengthwise ', '½ yellow bell pepper, sliced lengthwise', '2 cups cooked white rice ', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Marinade: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425°F. Place a wire rack on a rimmed baking sheet and coat with cooking spray.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and 3 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce.\xa0 \xa0
', '
Coat the tempeh with the sauce mixture, then evenly space onto the prepared baking sheet. Leaving space for the vegetables on the baking sheet.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, place the green beans and bell pepper in the remaining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce.\xa0 \xa0
', '
Bake in the oven for 15- 20 minutes or until the tempeh has slightly browned.\xa0
', '
Divide the cooked rice between 4 bowls and divide the cooked tempeh and vegetables. Garnish with sesame seeds.\xa0
']

Name: coconut-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 cup all-purpose flour, divided ', '½ tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. black pepper  ', '1 tsp. baking powder ', '½ tsp. garlic powder  ', '1 egg ', '½ cup soda water ', '1 cup shredded coconut ', '1 cup panko bread crumbs', 'vegetable oil, for frying ', '1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined leaving the tails on', '½ cup grape tomatoes, sliced lengthwise ', 'basil for garnish ', 'lemon wedges, for serving  ']
Procedure:
['
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, set aside.\xa0
', '
In a shallow bowl, add ½ cup flour, salt and pepper, whisk well. In another bowl, add the remaining flour, baking powder, garlic powder, egg and soda water. Whisk well until the batter resembles pancake consistency. In a third bowl, mix together the shredded coconut and panko bread crumbs.\xa0
', '
Dredge each piece of shrimp into the flour mixture shaking off any excess. Then dip into the batter, shaking off any excess. Lastly, coat the shrimp in the breadcrumb mixture.\xa0
Place onto the prepared baking sheet and freeze until firm for about 30 minutes.\xa0
\xa0
', '
In a deep skillet over medium high heat, add 2-3 inches of vegetable oil and wait till it gets hot.\xa0
', '
Fry the frozen shrimp in batches for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crispy. Drain them on a plate lined with a paper towel then transfer to a serving platter.\xa0\xa0
', '
Garnish the plate with grape tomatoes, basil, and lemon wedges. Use Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce for serving.\xa0
']

Name: soup-dumpling
Ingredients: ['1 cup all-purpose flour ', '6 Tbsp. warm water  ', '1 lb. ground pork ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '¾ tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '¾ tsp. sugar ', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce + additional for dipping ', '3 Tbsp. water ', '¼ tsp. ground white pepper ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, add the flour and warm water 1 Tbsp. at a time. Work and knead the dough using your hands for 15-20 minutes. The dough should be very soft and smooth. Cover with a cloth and let it rest for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
While dough is resting, add the pork in a food processor and pulse for 30-60 seconds until the pork resembles paste like consistency. Transfer to a mixing bowl adding Shaoxing wine, salt, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, sugar, Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, water, white pepper and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Mix well, cover and place in the freezer.\xa0
', '
Dust a clean working surface with flour and roll the dough into a long cylinder about an inch thick. Keeping everything under a damp cloth so it does not dry out. Cut the dough into small equal pieces. Then roll out each piece into a round disc about 3 inches in diameter.\xa0\xa0
', '
Bring a pot of water to a boil to place and prepare the bamboo steamer. Leaving about an inch between the water and steamer, line with a piece of cheesecloth.
', '
Place about 1 Tbsp. of the filling in the middle of each disc. Using your thumb to push the filling inside, pleat (fold) the dough as many times as you are able to (12-18) folds. Making sure the top is sealed. *If the filling gets too wet to handle, place in the freezer for 15 minutes and start again.\xa0
', '
Place the dumplings in the lined steamer basket about 1 ½- 2 inches apart. Steam over high heat for 8 minutes, immediately remove the bamboo steamer from the pot and serve.\xa0
']

Name: pork-belly-bao
Ingredients: ["9 oz. all-purpose flour + add'l for working ", '1 tsp. instant dry yeast ', '6 oz. water  ', '7 oz. ground pork ', '(optional) fresh cut vetgetables', '(optional) sesame seeds']
Marinade: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and dry yeast, mix well. Slowly pour the water into the bowl, mixing with a pair of chopsticks. When the water is mixed with the flour, dust both hands with flour and start kneading the mixture to form the dough.\xa0\xa0
', '
Transfer the dough to a dusted working surface and continue to knead for an additional 5 minutes (dough should be springy). Run a clean dish towel under water, then dust a clean bowl with flour and transfer the dough to the bowl. Cover with the damp towel and let the dough rest until it doubles in size (2 ½ -3 hours).\xa0
', '
When the dough is almost ready, combine the ground pork, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Re-dust the working surface and transfer the dough kneading for 3-5 minutes to remove any air bubbles. Divide the dough into two equal pieces. Roll the dough into a long stick, then divide to 12-14 pieces.\xa0
', '
Take one dough piece and roll it a few times, until the shape resembles a ball. Press the dough to a round disk and roll it with a rolling pin in a round sheet.\xa0Scoop 2 Tbsp. of the pork mixture and place into the center of each wrapper. Hold the bun with one hand and begin sealing the bun with the other hand folding and creating pleats. Repeat with the remaining discs. Then place in a large container upside down to cover the buns. Let them rest for 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add water to a large pot and place a steaming rack in the center. The water should be 1 inch below the rack. Place a clean towel on the rack and carefully transfer the buns in batches leaving one inch apart each one.\xa0
', '
Cover and cook over high heat till the water begins to boil. Then turn to medium high heat and cook for 10-12 minutes or until the buns are cooked through.\xa0Serve warm with your favorite fresh cut vegetables, and sesame seeds if desired.
']

Name: lemon-feta-crostini
Ingredients: ['1 baguette, sliced into ½ inch slices', '4 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 clove of garlic']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce', '2 lemons, zest', '1 tsp. freshly cracked black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 lemons, juiced', '10 oz. feta cheese ', '8 oz. ricotta cheese ', '1 tsp. red pepper flakes']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XxFAo4Zk83M&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Slice baguette into ½ inch slices and brush each slice with 1 Tbsp. of olive oil.
', '
Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden, but still soft. Rub garlic clove on each side while still warm. Then brush each slice with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce.
', '
Zest and juice each lemon (reserve the zest). Meanwhile, place the feta cheese, ricotta cheese, lemon juice, remaining olive oil and red pepper flakes in a food processor.
', '
Blend until cheeses are slightly whipped and doubled in size (about 2 minutes). Top each slice with whipped feta, add lemon zest & freshly cracked black pepper. Serve and enjoy.
']

Name: chicken-empanadas
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. boneless skinless chicken thighs ', '2 tomatoes, diced ', '3 packages puff pastry dough for turnovers ', 'cilantro for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Clean and oil the grill grate. In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and olive oil.\xa0
', '
Using a grill brush, glaze each chicken thigh with black pepper mixture. Grill the chicken on both sides for about 5-7 minutes. Remove from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes before dicing it. Reserve the remaining sauce.
', '
Add the diced chicken, diced tomatoes and remaining sauce. Mix well then preheat the oven to 375°F. Let the dough sit at room temperature for 15 minutes. Remove 6 rounds from the package, keeping the plastic divider underneath.\xa0
', '
Place 2 Tbsp. of filling in the center of each round. Brush water around half of the outer edge of each round then fold over and pinch the edges to seal. Use a fork to crimp the sealed edges.\xa0
', '
Place the completed empanadas on a lined baking sheet with parchment paper. Bake rotating the tray halfway through until golden brown and slightly darker about 25-35 minutes. Repeat with the remaining trays. Garnish with cilantro.
']

Name: sesame-fries
Ingredients: ['1 package frozen french fries', '1 tsp. sesame seeds for garnish  ', 'mint leaves for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. kosher salt  ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil   ']
Procedure:
['
Bake the fries according to package instructions.\xa0
', '
Once removed from the oven, toss with the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and salt.\xa0
', '
Transfer the seasoned fries to a serving bowl. Then garnish with sesame seeds and fresh mint.\xa0
']

Name: hoisin-tilapia
Ingredients: ['4 tilapia fillets ', '1 bunch asparagus ', '2 cups white rice, cooked   ', '3-4 sprigs green onion, thinly sliced', '1 tsp. sesame seeds for garnish', 'limes for serving ']
Seasoning: ['salt & pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 ½ tsp. garlic powder  ']
Procedure:
['
Line a baking dish with parchment paper and preheat the oven to 425°F.
', '
In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and garlic powder. Place tilapia in the baking dish leaving one side available for the asparagus. Brush the sauce on both sides of the tilapia, then place the asparagus on one side of the baking and season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Bake uncovered for 10-15 minutes until the tilapia is flakey and asparagus has softened/browned.\xa0\xa0
', '
Serve over a bed of rice, garnishing with green onions and sesame seeds. May be served with limes and additional sauce if desired.
']

Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: red-curry-chili-lime-noodles
Ingredients: ['8 oz. stir fry rice noodles   ', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 cloves garlic, minced  ', '1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced ', '4 sprigs green onion sliced into 1 inch pieces ', '½ cup roasted cashews, chopped', '4 Tbsp. fresh cilantro, chopped ', 'limes for serving ']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling and Dipping Sauce  ']
Procedure:
['
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the noodles according to package directions.
', '
In a large nonstick skillet over medium high heat, add oil and wait till it gets hot. Add in the garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until aromatic. Then add in the bell peppers and sauté until it has softened about 4-5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Once the noodles have completed cooking and have been strained, add it into the garlic and bell pepper mix. Pour Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling and Dipping Sauce over the noodles, add in the green onions then stir well to incorporate.
', '
Transfer to serving bowls and garnish with roasted cashews, cilantro and limes.
']

Name: grilled-lemongrass-chicken-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breast ', '2- 8 oz. packages rice vermicelli noodles ', '2 persian cucumbers, sliced ', '1 red bell pepper, thinly diced ', 'fresh mint, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. black pepper ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and preheat the oven to 425°F.
', '
Using a meat mallet, pound each chicken breast to ⅛ in. thick pieces. Ensure all chicken breasts are even, then place onto the lined baking sheet.
', '
Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper, then glaze the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce on each breast. Bake in the oven for 16-18 minutes. Or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F.
', '
While the chicken is baking, prepare the rice vermicelli noodles according to package instructions.\xa0 \xa0
', '
Once chicken is cooked, let it rest for 2-3 minutes before slicing. Divide the noodles between 4 bowls, place chicken, persian cucumber and diced bell peppers.\xa0
', '
Garnish with mint and enjoy with additional sauce if desired.
']

Name: spicy-salmon-burger
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. salmon, skinned and deboned  ', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil   ', '6 brioche buns', '6 leaves lettuce', '12 slices tomato']
Sauce Mix: ['2 shallots, minced ', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo + additional for topping ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce   ', '4 Tbsp. fresh parsley, minced ', '4 tsp. dijon mustard ', '¼ tsp. salt ', '¼ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a food processor, pulse the salmon in batches until coarsely chopped.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together shallots, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, parsley, mustard, salt and pepper. Then gently fold it into the salmon until combined.\xa0
', '
Divide the salmon into 6 portions. Form loose balls, then pat down to form 1 in. burgers. Place on a plate, cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.\xa0\xa0
', '
Heat the oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Gently place burgers down and cook until browned for 4-5 minutes. Flip the burger and continue to cook until the other side is golden brown, about another 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Serve on a brioche bun with lettuce and 2 slices of tomato. Additional Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo can be drizzled onto the burger as desired.\xa0
']

Name: mushroom-burrito-bowl-and-lime-cilantro-dressing
Ingredients: ['5 cups portobello mushrooms, sliced ', '2 cups cooked white rice ', '2 cups cooked black beans ', '2 cups corn  ', '2 cups shredded romaine lettuce ', '2 roma tomatoes, chopped', 'limes for serving ']
Seasoning: ['4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a jar with a lid, combine the Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, olive oil, lime juice and fresh cilantro. Seal the jar and shake well to combine.
', '
In a large nonstick skillet over medium high heat, place mushrooms and let them cook till the liquid from the mushrooms evaporate. Once you begin to notice the liquid evaporating, deglaze the pan with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce. Cook for an additional minute.
', '
Divide the mushrooms, rice, black beans, corn, lettuce and tomatoes into four bowls.\xa0
', '
Drizzle the cilantro lime dressing over each bowl and serve with additional lime if desired.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-tofu-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 block extra-firm tofu, diced and pat dried', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8 corn tortillas ', '½ red onion, thinly sliced ', '1 serrano, thinly sliced ', '4 sprigs green onion, thinly sliced', '½ cup fresh cilantro, chopped ', 'lime wedges for serving']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce  ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, place the diced tofu and toss with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Let it marinate for 5 minutes.\xa0
', "
In a medium sized skillet over medium high heat, add the vegetable oil and wait till it gets hot. Slowly add in tofu and cook on each side for 2 minutes until it's browned a little.\xa0
", '
Begin building tacos using corn tortillas followed by tofu, red onions, sliced serranos, green onions, and cilantro.\xa0\xa0
', '
Transfer the tacos to a serving platter and serve with limes.\xa0
']

Name: malatang
Ingredients: ['6 pcs. mushrooms, pre-soaked in water   ', '4 slices lotus roots, sliced     ', '2 stalks baby bok choy      ', '2 oz. black fungus, pre-soaked in water  ', '8 oz. beef, sliced     ', '2 pcs. tofu puffs    ', '1 pack  enoki mushrooms ']
Seasoning: ['1 pack Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Hot & Spicy Soup Base (Malatang)   ', '11 cups boiling water ']
Procedure:
['
Pour 1 pack of Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Hot & Spicy Soup Base (Malatang) into 11 cups of boiling water and bring to a boil.
', '
Add the ingredients and simmer until cooked.
', '
N/A
']

Name: herbed-tuna-and-potato-patties
Ingredients: ['1 pc. (about 7 oz.) baking potato ', '2 oz. carrots, finely chopped', '2 parsley, finely chopped', '3½ oz. canned tuna ', 'a little olive oil']
Marinade: ['1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Steam the baking potato until cooked, peel off skin and whisk into mash with a fork.
', '
Add chopped carrots, parsley and marinade into mash, mix well, then wrap loaf in cling film and chill to a thick consistency in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
', '
Remove loaf from refrigerator, add tuna fish and form into circular patties. Fry with olive oil over medium heat until golden and heated through to serve.
']

Name: pork-and-veggie-bundles
Ingredients: ['4 asparagus, cut into 3 strips', '1 pc. sweet potato, cut into strips', '1 pc. carrot, cut into strips ', '12 pcs. sliced pork', 'olive oil, as appropriate']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. honey']
Marinade: ['1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Boil asparagus, sweet potatoes and carrots separately for about 3 minutes until cooked and tender, mix together and drain well.
', '
Brush and glaze sliced pork pieces with marinade. Arrange vegetables onto pork slices and roll into bundles. Glaze with moderate amount of the marinade once more.
', '
Heat up non-stick frying pan, grease it with a little olive oil and sauté roll bundles until cooked. Season with honey to serve.
']

Name: crispy-chicken
Ingredients: ['8 pcs. chicken drumsticks  ', '1/3 cup flour   ', '1/2 cup cornstarch  ', '1 Tbsp. baking powder ', '3 eggs, beaten']
Marinade: ['as appropriate salt   ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder']
Procedure:
['
Marinate the chicken drumsticks with the marinade ingredients for 2 hours. Mix the flour, cornstarch, and baking powder evenly.
', '
Sprinkle the marinated drumsticks with a bit of the powder mixture and mix well. Next, add the beaten eggs and mix well. Place the drumsticks into the powder mixture to coat them and pat until they are covered with the powder.
', '
Deep-fry in hot oil at about 350°F until golden, crispy, and thoroughly cooked. Remove from the oil and let them drain.
', '
Pair with Lee Kum Kee Thai Style Sweet Chili Sauce when eating.
']

Name: pork-mango-and-walnut-salad
Ingredients: ['5⅓ oz. minced pork ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '1 pc. mango, diced', '2 Tbsp. walnuts ', '10 pcs. cherry tomatoes ', 'as appropriate salad greens ']
Marinade: ['a little Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Marinate minced pork with Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce for 10 minutes. Heat up frying pan, and stir-fry pork with olive oil until cooked. Drain well and set aside.
', '
Mix salad dressing ingredients to blend. Toss with cooked minced pork and remaining ingredients to serve.
', '
N/A
']

Name: sashimi-platter
Ingredients: ['2 oz. salmon, sliced ', '2 oz. tuna, sliced ', '2 oz. octopus, sliced ', 'as appropriate carrot, shredded ', 'as appropriate basil leaves']
Procedure:
['
Place the sliced salmon, tuna, and octopus on a plate and garnish with shredded carrots and basil leaves.\xa0
', '
Mix Lee Kum Kee Authentic Seasoned Soy Sauce with wasabi as a dip.
', '
N/A
']

Name: chicken-rice-burger
Ingredients: ['10½ oz. minced chicken ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '2 oz. onions (finely chopped)', '3 oz. sweet corn', 'a little olive oil ', '2 bowls steamed white rice ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix minced chicken with 1½ Tbsp. of marinade, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, onions and sweet corn. Marinate the loaf for 20 minutes.
', '
Form the loaf into circular discs, and fry with olive oil over medium heat until thoroughly cooked.
', '
Shape steamed rice with a mold into circular buns, grease non-stick frying pan with a little oil and sauté both sides of the buns into golden brown. Brush a little (about 1/2 Tbsp.) Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Less Sodium Oyster Flavored Sauce on them and sandwich chicken loaf into a burger to serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: zucchini-pizza-bites
Ingredients: ['2 large zucchini', '1 cup tomato sauce or pizza sauce', '2 cups mozzarella cheese, shredded', 'mini pepperonis, for topping']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. oregano, divided', 'fresh chopped basil, for topping']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P7o4IleXzCM&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 450°F.\xa0
', '
Slice zucchini into thick slices, about ¼ inch. Oil a baking sheet and add zucchini.
', '
Top them with the tomato sauce, oregano, mozzarella cheese and mini pepperonis.\xa0
', '
Bake for 5 minutes until zucchini is soft then toss in the broiler for another minute to bubble the cheese.\xa0
', '
Take out and garnish with chopped basil and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce.
']

Name: turkey-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground turkey', '¾ cup panko breadcrumbs', '2 cloves garlic, minced', '1 large egg', 'Green onions for serving', 'Sesame seeds for serving', 'Butter lettuce, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '¼ tsp. salt', 'Tapatio, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '2 tsp. Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. water', '1 tsp. sesame oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j-ZnONpzMqU
', '
Heat oven to 400 degrees. Add turkey, breadcrumbs, garlic, green onions, egg, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce. Mix with until combined.\xa0
', '
Line a baking sheet and portion out 10-12 medium meatballs. Place meatballs on the baking sheet and cook for 15 minutes or until fully cooked.
', '
While the meatballs are baking, make the sauce.\xa0
Combine Panda Brand Oyster Sauce, Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce, brown sugar, water, and sesame oil, whisking until combined. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Remove the meatballs from the oven and toss to coat in the sauce.\xa0
', '
Serve with the lettuce and make wraps, garnish with the onions, sesame seeds, and Tapatio, to taste.
']

Name: thai-grilled-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. chicken wings, drumettes and flats', 'lime wedges for serving']
Marinade: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 tsp. ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nfIF8eB_H14&feature=youtu.be
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, sugar, oil and pepper in a large bowl. Add wings and toss.\xa0
', '
Let marinate 30 minutes.
', '
Heat a grill or grill pan over high heat. Grill chicken wings until cooked through turning occasionally about 8 minutes total.
', '
Add lime juice before serving.
']

Name: thai-beef-noodle-salad
Ingredients: ['¾ lb. sirloin steak, trimmed', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. flat rice noodles, cooked according to package directions', '1 English cucumber, thinly sliced', '1 ½ cups cilantro leaves', '⅓ cup honey roasted peanuts, chopped']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce', '1 ½ tsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. water  ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E3tML_UDP30&feature=youtu.be
', '
For the sauce mix, use a bowl and mix Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, lime juice, fish sauce, sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water.\xa0 Whisk to ensure sugar dissolves.
', '
Season steak generously with salt and pepper. Add cooking oil to skillet over medium heat. Add steak and cook for about 3 minutes each side. Let the steak rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
', '
In a bowl, add rice noodles, sauce mixture, cucumber, and cilantro in a large bowl. Toss all together.
', '
Add steak to the top of the noodles and sprinkle peanuts over dish.
', '
Serve.
']

Name: tuna-stuffed-avocado-with-bacon
Ingredients: ['2 slices of bacon, diced', '1 can albacore tuna, drained', '1 scallion, chopped', '1 large, ripe avocado']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IYvHkt22Vt4&feature=youtu.be
', '
Sautee bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove bacon from pan with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, albacore tuna, and scallions.
', '
Cut avocados in half lengthwise. Remove pit and discard. Spoon tuna mixture into empty pitted area. Sprinkle with bacon and drizzle with extra Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
']

Name: tahini-brownie
Ingredients: ['6 oz. bittersweet chocolate (between 60 and 65%), chopped', '3 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 large eggs, room temperature', '1/4 cup all-purpose flour']
Seasoning: ['1 cup sugar', '1/3 cup tahini, room temperature', '3 Tbsp. unsweetened cocoa powder', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. vanilla extract', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. Maldon salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bcBE3JJFPCw&amp;feature=youtu.be
', '
Heat the oven to 350°F. Line an 8x8-inch pan with 2 sheets of parchment paper, overlapping and leaving the edges long so parchment comes up all 4 sides.
', '
Melt chocolate and butter in 30 second increments in the microwave, stirring in between.\xa0
', '
Whisk together sugar, tahini, eggs, cocoa powder, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, vanilla, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce.\xa0
', '
Stir in chocolate mixture, then fold in flour until just combined. Scrape into baking pan.
', '
Bake until edges are just set and a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out with just a few crumbs, 29 to 31 minutes. Sprinkle with Maldon salt, then let cool. Cut into squares.
']

Name: tuna-nicoise-toast
Ingredients: ['½ cup avocado, smashed', '2 slices sourdough bread, toasted', '1 jar oil-packed tuna, drained', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '¼ cup black olives ', '2 soft boiled eggs, halved']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. black pepper, for finishing ', '½ tsp. smoked paprika', '¼ cup fresh dill, ripped, for finishing']
Sauce Mix: ['½ lemon, juiced', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '2 garlic cloves, shaved', '1 shallot, shaved', '1 tsp. sea salt', '2 tomatoes, diced']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h9Nio9IOGXA&feature=youtu.be ', ' In a mixing bowl, add lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, shaved garlic, shaved shallot, sea salt, diced tomatoes and mix together. ', ' In a separate bowl, smash the avocado and set aside. Toast 2 sourdough slices and spread the smashed avocado on each slice. ', ' Add the tomato mixture, tuna chunks, a drizzle of olive oil, and black olives. Then top with the remaining juice from the tomato mixing bowl.\xa0 ', ' Place 2 eggs per slice and garnish with black pepper, smoked paprika, and fresh dill. ']

Name: sriracha-mayo-tuna-melt
Ingredients: ['10 oz. Tuna in water, drained', '2 scallions, thinly sliced', '1 stalk of celery, diced small', '4 slices of thick sliced white bread ', '2 medium tomatoes, sliced', '4 slices white cheddar cheese']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo ', '2 Tbsp. whole fat Sour Cream', 'Salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MlLEd-JAN0c
', '
In a medium bowl, combine tuna, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, sour cream, scallions, celery, and salt and pepper. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Heat your oven to 450 degrees. Spread tuna mixture evenly onto 4 pieces of bread.
', '
\xa0Add tomato slices and cheese. Heat until the cheese on top melt and begins to brown or bubble.\xa0
', '
Plate and add Tapatio, to taste.\xa0
']

Name: spicy-beef-lettuce-wraps
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. ground beef', '1 cup yellow onion, chopped', '4 garlic cloves, diced', '1” piece of ginger, diced', '6-8 pieces of bibb lettuce', 'Toppings: chopped peanuts, fresh chopped cilantro, lime juice']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper to taste', '5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2Wvei4a92xY&feature=youtu.be
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. olive oil in a skillet. Add in the ground beef and cook that down, while breaking apart the meat with a spatula. Cook that until it’s no longer pink adding salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
When it’s cooked, remove from the pan and place in a bowl and set aside.\xa0 
', '
In the same pan toss in the chopped onion, garlic and ginger and let that cook down for a couple minutes. Add the meat back in to the pan along with the Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap\xa0 and give it a stir.\xa0
', '
Plate the lettuce and then spoon the beef mixture into the middle of each piece. Top them with chopped peanuts, fresh chopped cilantro and lime juice.
']

Name: spicy-orange-pulled-chicken-tacos
Ingredients: ['4 chicken breasts', '½ whole onion', '1 package small corn or flour tortillas', '½  cup cotija cheese', '⅓ cup green onions', 'jalapeno, for garnish', 'lettuce for garnish', '2 small tomatoes, diced for topping', 'lime wedge, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. pepper']
Marinade: ['¾ cup chicken broth', '1 Tbsp. chili powder', '¼ tsp. cayenne pepper', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '⅓ cup Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AL3AkelC9zA&feature=youtu.be
', '
Add chicken broth to a large pot followed by: chili powder, cayenne pepper, tomato paste, Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken. Whisk all together.
', '
Place in the chicken breasts and season with salt and pepper. Add in the onion and then cover and let simmer for 15 minutes.
', '
Take chicken out and shred with forks and then place back into the liquid.\xa0
', '
Heat the tortillas and prepare the tacos with shredded chicken, Cotija cheese, green onions, jalapeno, lettuce, tomato, and a squeeze of lime(optional). You should be able to make 8 or more tacos.\xa0
']

Name: super-green-kale-salad
Ingredients: ['8 oz. thinly sliced lacinato kale', '2 tsp. toasted sesame seeds', '1/2 cup cooked edamame', '1/4 cup scallions, sliced', '1/2 avocado, sliced', '2 Tbsp. pumpkin seeds']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 pinch salt, for avocado']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1.5 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', 'salt to taste']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-167-LB8D38&feature=youtu.be ', ' To make the sauce mix, combine olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Minced Ginger, Minced Garlic, and salt in a medium sized bowl and mix it all together. ', ' In a large bowl, add sliced kale, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, rice vinegar, and toasted sesame seeds. Mix it all together. ', ' Garnish with edamame, sliced scallions, avocado slices, and pumpkin seeds.\xa0 ', ' Season avocado with salt and serve.\xa0 ']

Name: stir-fry-honey-hoisin-beef-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '½ small red onion, finely chopped', '1 lb. ground beef', '½ cup mushrooms, finely chopped', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '4 cups cooked long grain rice', '½ cup matchstick carrots', '½ avocado, sliced', '¼ cup scallions, sliced', '1 tsp. sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P8hovvyfBoA&feature=youtu.be
', '
Make sauce mix by combining Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, rice wine vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and honey. Mix all together.\xa0
', '
Make stir fry by heating oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Add onion and cook 2 minutes.
', '
Add in beef and season with salt and pepper. Sauté about 4 minutes. Add mushrooms, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger.
', '
Add sauce to pan and cook 2 minutes until beef is coated.
', '
Assemble bowls by adding rice to a plate, topped with beef, carrots, avocado, scallions, and sesame seeds. Serve immediately while hot.
\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-steak-tacos
Ingredients: ['2 boneless sirloin steaks, 1 ½" thick', '16 small flour tortillas, lightly toasted', '½ cup crema (sour cream) ', '1 cup kimchi', '2 cups daikon, finely shredded', '½ cup cilantro leaves']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. mirin', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 tsp. chili flakes']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0UFayEGz-IQ&feature=youtu.be
', '
Season steaks generously with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Make the sauce mix by combining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, mirin, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, brown sugar, chili flakes, in a bowl and then stir ingredients until sugar is dissolved.
', '
Heat a pan on high heat and cook steaks 2-3 minutes each side. Season with salt and pepper. Right before pulling the steaks off the pan, brush one side with the sauce and grill briefly to caramelize. Repeat with the other side. Remove steaks and let rest 5-10 minutes.
', '
Spread crema on tortillas and top with steak slices, kimchi, daikon, and cilantro.
']

Name: shrimp-and-egg-breakfast-grain-bowl
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 oz. shiitake mushrooms', '2 cups fresh baby spinach', '1 tsp. olive oil', '1 fried egg', '⅔ cup cooked brown rice', '⅓ cup matchstick cut carrots', '⅓ cup shredded cabbage', '⅓ cup daikon ', '3 oz. cooked shrimp', '2 Tbsp. chopped green onion']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XJDFoN_5dEg&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a nonstick skillet, heat Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil over medium heat. Add in shiitake mushrooms and stir for 2 minutes. Add spinach and season with salt and pepper. Cook until wilted, about 1 minute. Take off and set aside.
', '
In the same pan, add 1 tsp. olive oil then the egg.\xa0 Season with salt and pepper. Fry the egg for about 3 minutes then take off and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a serving bowl, add cooked brown rice, top with spinach and mushroom mixture. Add on carrots, cabbage, daikon, cooked shrimp, fried egg, and green onions.
', '
Serve.
']

Name: sriracha-mayo-deviled-eggs
Ingredients: ['8 large eggs', '¼ cup jarred roasted red peppers, drained', '3 chives cut 16 half inch pcs', '(optional) paprika for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ja1695xn0L8&feature=youtu.be
', '
Bring a pot of water to boil over high heat. Lower eggs carefully into water and boil for 8 minutes. Remove eggs immediately from boiling water and place them in a bowl with cold water or an ice bath.
', '
In a food processor, add Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, roasted red peppers, and egg yolks.
', '
Transfer the yolk mixture to a piping bag or a plastic bag. Pipe filling, about a tablespoon, into the hollow center of the egg white.\xa0
', '
Using a fork or knife create vertical lines to resemble the ridges of a pumpkin. When done filling eggs, place a piece of chive at a diagonal at the top of the yolk mixture to resemble a pumpkin stem. Sprinkle with paprika if desired.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-salmon-poke-bowl
Ingredients: ['3/4 lb. sushi grade salmon, cut into ½ inch cubes', '2 tsp. toasted sesame seeds', '1 scallion, minced', '2 cups cooked sticky rice', '1 medium carrot, grated', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '3/4 cup defrosted shelled edamame', '1 avocado, cubed', '3/4 cup seaweed salad mix, optional', '1 tsp. black sesame seeds (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MJzZTgwROvY&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a medium bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce, Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, lemon juice, and olive oil. Stir to combine and set half of the mixture aside.
', '
In the medium bowl with half the dressing, mix in the cubed salmon. Toss to coat. Toss in the toasted sesame seeds and scallions to the salmon mix and stir gently to combine.
', '
Build poke bowls by dividing rice into 4 bowls. Arrange salmon, grated carrot, red cabbage, edamame, avocado, and seaweed mix (optional) as desired.\xa0
', '
Dress with remaining dressing and add black sesame seeds for garnish (optional). Serve and enjoy.
']

Name: soft-scrambled-tamago-eggs
Ingredients: ['3 large brown eggs', '2 tsp. finely chopped green onions', '1 clove garlic, grated', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '(optional) 1 portion white rice, for serving', '(optional) ½ packet roasted seaweed snack, snipped into strips, or a shake of furikake seasoning, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1/4 tsp. sugar', '1 pinch kosher salt ', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hnmNFO3ihNc&feature=youtu.behttps://youtu.be/hnmNFO3ihNc
', '
Whisk together the eggs, green onions, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, and sugar.
', '
Starting from a cold pan over medium-low heat, add the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, then the egg mixture.\xa0
', "
With a rubber spatula, stir occasionally so you end up with large curds, but make sure to stir so the eggs cook slowly and evenly. Just be sure to undercook them (they'll carryover cook off the heat). This step will likely take around 2 to 3 minutes, depending on your stove.
", '
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Serve over white rice and garnish with slices of roasted seaweed snack or a shake of furikake seasoning (optional).
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-pimiento-cheese-spread
Ingredients: ['1 endive, trimmed and leaves separated', 'grapes on the stem, figs, dried apricots', '5 oz. each prosciutto, mortadella, spicy coppa, hard salami/saucisson sec', 'piece of Humboldt Fog (or other aged goat cheese)', 'round of Vermont Creamery Coupole (runny goat)', 'piece of Cabot Clothbound Cheddar (or other hard cheese)', 'piece of Delice de Bourgogne (or other triple cream cheese)', 'piece of Tallegio (or other semi-soft washed rind cheese)', 'Marcona almonds, walnuts and any other nut of choice', 'variety of colorful seasonal vegetables (watermelon radishes, heirloom carrots, sugar snap peas, etc.)', 'variety of rustic crackers', 'mixed olives', 'cornichons and caperberries', 'honey or honeycomb']
Sauce Mix: ['8 oz. cheese (a variety, whatever bits you have in your fridge), cut into cubes', '2 Tbsp. dry white wine', '1 small garlic clove, minced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce (for an extra kick, add more)', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, optional']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NtmTG9k9bH0&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a food processor, combine cheese, wine, garlic, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Dipping Sauce, and if cheeses are hard, 2 Tbsp. butter. Blend to combine, adding more butter if necessary, until mixture is spreadable and smooth. Scrape into a small serving bowl.
', '
Arrange cheese mixture, fruits, vegetables, meats, cheeses, nuts, crackers, olives, cornichons and honey on a serving platter. Serve and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: sesame-and-chocolate-chip-pumpkin-muffins
Ingredients: ['4 medium eggs', '2 cups sugar', '1 can pumpkin puree', '1 cup Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 cups flour', '2 tsp. baking soda', '1 tsp. baking powder', '1 tsp. salt', '1 Tbsp. pumpkin pie spice', '⅓ cup white sesame seeds', '2 cups semi-sweet chocolate chips']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q6LgxHYkGyg&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F. Line muffin tray with paper cups.
', '
In a large glass mixing bowl, beat the eggs, sugar, pumpkin puree and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil until nice and smooth.
', '
In a separate bowl, add the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, pumpkin pie spice, and sesame seeds. Mix well, then slowly add dry mixture into the wet bowl and mix well. Fold in the chocolate chips.
', '
Pour/scoop mixture into the cups, filling them up ¾ to leave room to grow. Place some sesame seeds and more chocolate chips onto the top before cooking.\xa0
', '
Bake for 15-17 minutes or until cooked through in the center. Test with a toothpick. Transfer to cooling rack and let cool.\xa0
']

Name: sauteed-vermicelli-with-spicy-minced-pork
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3 oz. ground pork', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 cup water', '8 oz. vermicelli (soaked in warm water for 30 minutes)', '1 Tbsp. green onion, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Spicy Soybean Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LdN_zSO2V2E&feature=youtu.be ', ' Add cooking oil to a heated pan and sauté ground pork till moisture has evaporated. Add cooking wine, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, Seasoning Soy Sauce, Spicy Soy Bean Sauce, Minced Ginger and Minced Garlic, and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Pour water into the meat mixture, add soaked vermicelli, and stir-fry. ', ' When vermicelli turns soft and the sauce is absorbed, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil and sprinkle green onion on top. Ready to serve. ', ' Tips: Adding Oyster Sauce to the ground meat and vermicelli can greatly enhance the flavor and instantly release mouth-watering fragrance. ']

Name: spicy-roasted-red-pepper-and-tomato-soup
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. butter', '1 yellow onion, finely diced', '4 garlic cloves, minced', '2 Tbsp. flour (for thickener)', '2 cans crushed tomatoes', '1 jar roasted red peppers, removed from oil or liquid ', '2 cups vegetable stock', '(optional) french baguette']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. dried basil', '¼ tsp. dried thyme', '¼ tsp. crushed red pepper', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil + ½ tsp. more for final drizzle', '¼ cup parsley, chopped', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X8pGrfbIJFU&feature=youtu.be ', ' Heat a large pot on medium low heat. ', ' Add in the butter and let that melt down for 1 minute. Then add the chopped onion and garlic and cook down for another few minutes. ', ' Add in the flour and let thicken for 1-2 minutes. Once butter/flour starts to lightly brown and become thick, remove from heat. ', ' In a blender, add the crushed tomatoes, roasted red peppers, and the onion and garlic mixture and blend until smooth. Then place back into the pot and heat on medium/high. Add vegetable stock, basil, thyme, crushed red pepper, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil and stir well. ', ' Let simmer for another 10-15 minute, then ladle into a bowl and top with a light drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Garnish with more fresh chopped parsley and cracked black pepper. Serve with a french baguette. ']

Name: steak-salad
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. flank steak', '1 lb. baby potatoes', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '4 oz. green beans, trimmed', '4 cups salad greens (could be butter lettuce and radicchio, or any other colorful greens)', '4 radishes, thinly sliced (breakfast or watermelon radishes) ', '¼ cup black olives, pitted and sliced']
Seasoning: ['flakey sea salt, for serving']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k84NtFH9iBI&feature=youtu.be ', ' Coat steak evenly with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour. ', ' Bring potatoes and water to a boil with 1 tsp. salt, then continue to simmer until potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork, about 15 minutes, adding green beans for the last 2 minutes of cooking. Transfer green beans to a bowl with ice water; drain potatoes. Rinse with cold water, then slice potatoes in half.\xa0 ', ' Stir together shallot, sherry vinegar, salt, and pepper. Let it sit for 2 minutes, then whisk in Dijon followed by oil. ', ' Heat grill or grill pan to medium-high. Scrape off any excess marinade from steak, then grill 8 to 10 minutes, flipping halfway through, for medium-rare. Transfer to a cutting board to rest for 5 minutes, then slice against the grain. ', ' Toss together salad greens and just enough dressing to coat. Transfer to a large serving platter. In the same bowl, toss radishes, green beans, and potatoes with more dressing, then add to lettuce. Top with sliced steak, olives, and flakey salt. ']

Name: spicy-bbq-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro, for topping', '1 tsp. red pepper flakes, for topping']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, plus a little more for topping']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FkKbRlqD7Y4&feature=youtu.be
', '
Place the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce into a bowl, then add in the shrimps. Mix them well in the sauce, then place onto skewers.\xa0
', '
Grill the shrimp for 2 minutes per side until perfect then take off the heat.\xa0
', '
Plate the shrimp skewers, top with fresh chopped cilantro, red pepper flakes, and a little more Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce. Serve right away while hot.\xa0
']

Name: southwest-burger-with-avocado-salsa
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef, formed into two ½ lb. patties', 'pepper jack cheese, sliced  for topping', 'hamburger buns']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. smoked paprika', '½ tsp. chili powder', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. of your favorite hot sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 large tomatoes, deseeded and diced', '¼ cup finely diced red onion', '¼ cup chopped cilantro', '½ jalapeno, deseeded and diced', '2 avocados, diced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '½ lime, juiced', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OSaW7WCBdbU&feature=youtu.be
', '
Make the avocado salsa by mixing all the sauce mix ingredients in a bowl. Place in the fridge to chill until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Place the ground beef into a bowl along with the smoked paprika, chili powder, ground cumin, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, and hot sauce. Mix together with your hands and form into two 1/2 lb. burger patties.\xa0
', '
Grill the burgers for 5-6 minutes per side or cook till desired doneness. Place cheese down onto burger and let melt.\xa0
', '
Place burgers onto the buns and then top with a few spoonfuls of avocado salsa. Serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: spicy-italian-hoagie-dip
Ingredients: ['¼ lb. chopped pepperoni ', '¼ lb. chopped roasted turkey breast', '¼ lb. chopped salami', '¼ lb. chopped provolone cheese', '⅓ cup banana peppers, diced', '2 tomatoes, deseeded and chopped ', '1 small red onion, diced', 'fresh Italian baguette, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1 tsp. olive oil ', '½ tsp. red wine vinegar', '1 Tbsp. dried basil', '1 Tbsp. oregano']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RFLjX4XaRQY&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a large mixing bowl, place chopped pepperoni, roast turkey, salami, provolone cheese, banana peppers, tomatoes, and diced red onion and mix well.
', '
In a separate bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, olive oil, red wine vinegar, dried basil and oregano. Combine the sauce mix with the meat and cheese mixture.
', '
Season with salt and pepper and place in the fridge until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Serve with a fresh Italian baguette for serving.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: sheet-pan-citrus-chicken-and-veggies
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. boneless chicken breasts, cut into small chunks', '3 cups broccoli florets ', '1 yellow pepper, cut into pieces', '½ lb. asparagus, cut into ½ inch pieces', '2 cups brussels sprouts', '1 red onion, sliced thin']
Seasoning: ['(optional) garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onion']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fc64xbaWv8c&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 425°F.
', '
Mix the chicken with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling & Dipping Sauce in a bowl and toss well until combined. Chop all the veggies and then add them into the bowl with the chicken and coat them in the sauce.
', '
Spray baking sheet with cooking oil and set aside.
', '
Place the chicken and veggies onto the baking sheet, spreading out evenly.
', '
Bake them for 15-20 minutes, stirring halfway through. When the chicken is cooked through, remove from the oven and serve right away. Optional, garnish with sesame seeds and chopped green onions.\xa0
']

Name: summer-crostini-bites
Ingredients: ['1 baguette, sliced ', '4 Tbsp. olive oil + some for drizzling', '1.5 lbs. skirt steak  ', '½ cup microgreens ']
Marinade: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce', '1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=quDQ9fJL4sQ&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
', '
Slice the baguette into ½ thick crostini’s. Evenly place on the sheet tray and coat each piece with olive oil. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.\xa0
', '
In a deep dish, place the skirt steak and brush 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce and season with salt and pepper. Flip onto the other side using tongs and repeat.
', '
On a well-oiled grill over medium high heat, add skirt steak and cook for 4- 6 minutes until browned, flipping on each side while cooking.\xa0\xa0
', '
Let the steak rest, then slice thinly to top crostini. Begin building crostini by layering 1-2 pieces of skirt steak to cover the entire crostini and garnish with olive oil and microgreens. Serve and enjoy!
']

Name: roasted-brussels-sprouts-and-sweet-potatoes-with-sesame-honey-glaze
Ingredients: ['2 small sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1” cubes', '1.5 lbs. brussels sprouts, cut in half (lengthwise)', '1.5 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. black sesame seeds for garnish']
Seasoning: ['pepper and salt to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1-3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '3 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fBLW3xdF2Rw&feature=youtu.be
', '
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and add the sweet potatoes and brussel sprouts. Add olive oil and season with salt and pepper.\xa0 Toss until everything is coated.
', '
Preheat oven at 400 degrees F and bake for 25-30 minutes.
', '
In a saucepan over medium heat, combine Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Chili Garlic Sauce, honey, and rice vinegar. Stir and bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer. Simmer until mixture is reduced by half. Cook for about 10-15 minutes. Remove from heat.
', '
To serve, plate your sweet potatoes and Brussel sprouts and drizzle vegetables with glaze and top with black sesame seeds.
']

Name: popcorn-chicken-bites-with-lee-kum-kee-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['2 whole eggs', '1 cup panko breadcrumbs', '2-3 large boneless skinless chicken breasts cut into small pieces about 3/4”', '1 cup of oil for frying']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, plus more for serving', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6LmUkep6e6U&feature=youtu.be
', '
Mix eggs with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo in a bowl (Mayo mixture). Place breadcrumbs in a shallow dish and season crumbs with salt and pepper.
', '
Add chicken pieces to the Mayo mixture and toss to coat. Remove chicken pieces from Mayo mixture and roll in the breadcrumbs to coat.
', '
In a saucepan, add a thin layer of oil and heat over medium heat until oil shimmers.\xa0
', '
Add chicken pieces in batches without crowding the pan. Cook until golden brown and cooked through. Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain off excess oil.\xa0
', '
Serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping chicken bites.
']

Name: philly-cheesesteak-stuffed-peppers
Ingredients: ['1 lb. top sirloin steak', '4 green peppers, tops cut off and deseeded', '4 Tbsp. olive oil ', '1 cup, sliced cremini mushrooms', '1 red onion, sliced', '½ red pepper, sliced', '2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Marinade: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Lof1wiqi-Ek&feature=youtu.be ', ' Place sirloin steak onto a bowl or plate with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Coat well, cover and let marinate for two hours before cooking. Preheat oven to 400°F.\xa0 ', ' Cut about 1" down from the top of the green peppers, then removed the seeds and whites. Place on a sheet pan and drizzle with 2 Tbsp.\xa0 olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Bake them for 10 minutes. Once cooked, take out and set aside.\xa0 ', ' In a pan, heat up the remaining olive oil and then sear the steak for 1 minute per side then remove from heat and let cool.\xa0 ', ' In the same pan, add in the mushrooms and sliced onions. Cook them down for 3 minutes and then add in the sliced red pepper and cook for another 2 minutes until all have softened. Season them with salt and pepper. Cut steak into thin slices, across the grain once cooled and combine with sautéed veggies.\xa0 ', ' Then fill the green peppers with cooked veggies and the steak. Fill all 4 of them up, then top with shredded mozzarella cheese and place back into the oven to bake for 5-10 minutes until the cheese is melted. Plate and serve right away.\xa0 ']

Name: plant-based-sriracha-burger
Ingredients: ['1 package beyond burgers', '2 slices cheddar cheese', 'hamburger buns ', 'lettuce', 'tomato slices', '2 onion rings']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M3Dh1W2auns&feature=youtu.be
', '
Grill the beyond burger for 3 minutes per side then add on the cheddar cheese and let melt.\xa0
', '
Make the burger by placing the burger on the bun then top with lettuce, tomato then the baked onion rings.\xa0
', '
Finish it off with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha mayo.\xa0
']

Name: orange-chicken-drumsticks
Ingredients: ['8-10 chicken drumsticks', '1 green onion, sliced, for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'lime wedge, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken, as needed']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '2 garlic cloves, minced']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0lZ-4p12id8
', '
Pour the Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken into a mixing bowl along with the chopped garlic and lime juice. Place the chicken drumsticks into a separate bowl and pour the marinade in and coat well. Cover and let marinade for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Preheat the oven to 450 degrees F.
', '
Arrange the marinated chicken into an oiled cast iron skillet. Then place in the oven to bake for 45 minutes.
', '
Take out of the oven and place the skillet on the burner and add some more Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken over medium heat. Heat the sauce up, sauteeing the chicken around until the glaze starts to bubble a bit. About 5 minutes.
', '
Turn off heat. Sprinkle it with some chopped green onion and sesame seeds. Use lime wedge for garnish. Plate and serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: one-pan-lemon-pepper-chicken-and-potatoes
Ingredients: ['10 small red potatoes, skin on cut into quarters', '2 bone-in and skin-on leg and thigh jointed ', '1 lemon, quartered', '2 tsp. chopped fresh rosemary ', '1 sprig fresh rosemary (optional)', '2 tsp. chopped fresh oregano (optional)']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil, divided', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce, divided', '2 tsp. salt, divided', '1/2 tsp. pepper, divided']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RQ5NyKcCaDY&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
', '
In a medium bowl, add potatoes, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce, 1 tsp. salt, ¼ tsp. pepper and toss.
', '
In another larger bowl, add leg-thigh joints and 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper and toss.
', '
In a large ovenproof skillet or baking dish, place potatoes in the pan with juices. Then place chicken on top of potatoes with juices. Toss in the lemon wedges, sprinkle on the chopped rosemary, add optional sprig of rosemary and sprinkle on the optional chopped oregano.
', '
Roast the dish in the oven for 1 1/2 hours. Serve.
']

Name: maple-baked-cauliflower
Ingredients: ['2 cup fresh cauliflower florets', 'Scallions, thinly sliced, for serving', '2 cups cooked rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['Tapatio, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', 'Pinch of Salt']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. maple syrup', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce', '¼ tsp. garlic powder', '¼ tsp. ground ginger', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mWm9ylVjETY
', '
Heat oven to 400 degrees. Toss cauliflower florets with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, cornstarch, and pinch of salt. Put the cauliflower on a lined sheet tray and bake for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
While the cauliflower is baking, make the glaze. Combine Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, maple, Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce, garlic powder, ginger, and rice vinegar in a small bowl.
', '
After 10 minutes, remove cauliflower from the oven carefully coat it in the maple glaze.\xa0
', '
Return the sheet tray to the oven and bake for 10-15 more minutes, or until the cauliflower is beginning to brown and crisp.
', '
Garnish with scallions and add Tapatio, to taste.\xa0 \xa0
']

Name: morrocan-quinoa-salad
Ingredients: ['1 zucchini, roughly chopped', '1 red pepper, roughly chopped', '½ red onion, roughly chopped', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 cup water', '1 cup veggie broth', '1 cup quinoa', '½ cup shredded carrots', '¼ cup toasted almonds, slivered', '¼ cup cilantro, plus more for garnish', '¼ cup pomegranate arils', '¼ cup chopped parsley']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. salt, plus more to taste', '½ tsp. pepper, plus more to taste', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. coriander', '1 tsp. cinnamon', '¼ tsp. ground turmeric']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IQZVChukRIs&feature=youtu.be ', ' Preheat oven to 400°F. ', ' Add the chopped zucchini, red pepper, red onion, olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, 1/2 tsp. salt and 1/2 tsp. pepper together in a bowl and mix. ', ' Line a baking dish with olive oil and add in your veggies. Bake for 20-25 minutes until nicely roasted then take out and set aside.\xa0 ', ' Cook the quinoa by adding water, veggie broth, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, turmeric and 1/2 tsp. salt to a pot. Bring to a boil then add in the quinoa and lower heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes. Take off heat and fluff with a fork.\xa0 ', ' Place the cooked quinoa into a large mixing bowl with the roasted veggies. Top with carrots, toasted almonds, chopped cilantro, pomegranate arils, chopped parsley and salt and pepper. Mix all together.\xa0Serve on a plate and garnish with chopped cilantro.\xa0 ']

Name: jalapeno-popper-stuffed-chicken-breast
Ingredients: ['8 chicken breast cutlets, thinly sliced', 'non-stick oil spray ', '3 oz. cream cheese, soft', '4 oz. shredded cheddar or pepper jack', '2 Tbsp. chopped green onion', '2 Tbsp. bacon bits', '3 jalapeños, seeded and chopped ', '½ cup panko or breadcrumbs']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lime, juiced']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eEtCLCFl_1w&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 450°F.\xa0Place chicken breasts onto a cutting board with plastic wrap on top. Using a meat mallet, flatten out chicken so it’s easy enough to roll.\xa0
', '
Spray baking tray with non-stick oil. Season chicken breast with salt and pepper on both sides and set aside.
', '
In a bowl, combine the soft cream cheese, cheddar, Lee Kum Kee Cilantro Lime Flavored Hoisin Sauce, chopped green onion, bacon bits and chopped jalapeno.\xa0
\xa0
', '
Lay the chicken cutlets onto board and then place one scoop of the cheese mixture down on each cutlet. Lightly roll them up and then secure the ends with toothpicks to hold in place. Set aside.
', '
In a bowl, add panko or breadcrumbs. In the next bowl, add olive oil, lime juice, salt and pepper. Take the chicken rolls and dip them into the liquid mixture,\xa0 then into the bread crumbs and onto the baking tray. Do this for all of them.\xa0Bake for 22-25 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
