Name: kale-detox-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. fingerling potatoes, cut in half', '3 heirloom carrots, cut in to pieces', '1 can chickpeas, roasted', '1 large handful of kale, roughly chopped', '1 cup cooked brown rice', '1 jalapeno, sliced thin', '½ avocado, sliced']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. pepper', '1 tsp. dried parsley', '½ tsp. garlic powder', 'sea salt, for finishing']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. olive oil', '½ lemon, juiced', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425°F.\xa0
', '
Cut up the potatoes and carrots and place onto an oiled baking sheet. Drain and rinse the chickpeas and place them on the tray with the other veggies as well. Season with salt and pepper, dried parsley and garlic powder. Then roast for 40-50 minutes until all the veggies are soft and the chickpeas are crispy.\xa0
', '
Chop up the kale and then place into a bowl with a little olive oil, lemon juice and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Toss well, and then add in the roasted veggies and the cooked brown rice. Toss in the thinly sliced jalapeno, if\xa0 desired. Scoop out the avocado and then slice it up and place on top of the salad.\xa0
', '
Serve in bowls and top with a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and sea salt.\xa0
']

Name: korean-grilled-bbq-chicken
Ingredients: ['3 lbs. chicken thighs (boneless, skinless)', 'vegetable oil for brushing the grill', '1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds, for garnish', 'scallions, for garnish (optional) ', 'white rice (optional)']
Marinade: ['6 cloves garlic, smashed', '3 scallions, ends trimmed and cut into 2” pieces', '1- 4” piece of ginger cut into 1/4 inch thin rounds', '3/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/2 cup Korean malt syrup OR barley malt syrup ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 1/2 tsp. ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Lay chicken flat on a cutting board. Cover with plastic and pound to an even 1/2” thickness.
', '
Place garlic, scallions, ginger, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, malt syrup, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and black pepper in a large bowl or plastic bag. Add chicken and marinate covered in the refrigerator for 2 hours.
', '
Heat a gas or charcoal grill to high. Rub grates with vegetable oil to prevent sticking. Remove chicken from fridge and allow to sit at room temperature while the grill heats up.
', '
Remove chicken from marinade and place on the grates. Cook turning only once about 7-10 minutes total until nicely charred. Serve garnished with toasted sesame seeds, and scallions (optional).
', '
Serve with a side of white rice (optional).
']

Name: korean-kimchi-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. chopped onion', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic', '1 bowl cooked rice', '1 cup  kimchi (cut to pieces)', '2 eggs', '1 Tbsp. chopped green onion', 'shredded seaweed, as desired ', '1 tsp. cooked white sesame']
Seasoning: ['1/3 cup kimchi juice', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rbPA1vc3p8c&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a heated wok, add cooking oil and sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic until it is a little charred. Add in cooked rice and mix well (need to press down to break the rice clump). Then add in kimchi and kimchi juice to stir fry.
', '
Add in seasoning and stir fry well before serving in a plate.
', '
In addition, crack the eggs in to boiling water and cook slowly for 3 minutes to make poached eggs.
', '
Finally, sprinkle with chopped green onion, shredded seaweed and cooked white sesame to complete.\xa0\xa0
', '
Tips: adding oyster sauce to this dish can help boost the flavor.
']

Name: hoisin-chicken-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '2 Tbsp. sunflower or grapeseed oil', '1 ½ lb. boneless, skinless chicken breast', '10-12 small white corn tortillas', 'Fresh cilantro', 'Scallions, thinly sliced', 'Radishes, thinly sliced', 'Red cabbage, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['3/4 cup chicken stock', '3 Tbsp. soy sauce', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Honey', '2 cloves garlic, minced', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '1 tsp. ground ginger', 'Tapatio, to taste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9t3xTYYjWXU
', '
In a medium bowl, combine the chicken stock, soy sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin, honey, garlic, and ginger, whisking to combine. Set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large skillet with a tight fitting lid, heat a the oil over medium-high heat. Once the oil is hot, add the chicken, searing on each side for 4 minutes.
', '
Add the Hoisin mixture to the skillet, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and place the lid on the skillet. Cook the chicken for 25-35 minutes, turning once. Remove from heat and set aside to cool slightly. Remove the chicken and transfer to a plate or cutting board and shred using two forks.\xa0
', '
Bring the leftover sauce to a low boil and add cornstarch. Whisk and let thicken slightly. Once thick, remove from heat and set aside. Add the thickened sauce to the chicken.\xa0
', '
Spoon the chicken mixture into the tortillas, add toppings and Tapatio, to taste.
']

Name: healthy-lamb-meatballs-in-pita
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground lamb', '½ cup panko breadcrumbs', '¼ cup parsley, chopped ', '2 Tbsp. coarsely grated onion and their juices (from about 1/2 small onion)', '1 large egg', '2 Tbsp. oil', '1 cup whole milk Greek yogurt, for serving', '4 pitas pockets, cut in half', 'lettuce, for serving', '3 to 4 Persian cucumbers, sliced lengthwise', '1 red chili pepper, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '¼ tsp. fresh ground black pepper', 'salt to taste']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X1qGjHbTPOk&feature=youtu.be ', ' Heat the broiler with a rack 4 inches from heating element. ', ' Mix together lamb, breadcrumbs, parsley, onion, egg, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, and pepper until just combined.\xa0 ', ' Roll into 1 ¼” meatballs (about 32 pcs). Drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil and broil, shaking pan occasionally to encourage even cooking, until browned and cooked through, 6 to 8 minutes. ', ' Meanwhile, in a mini food processor or blender, pulse together parsley, cilantro, jalapenos, garlic, lemon juice, salt, cumin, and 1 Tbsp. water. Pulse until mixture is evenly chopped, scraping down sides as necessary. Stir in 5 Tbsp. oil. Taste and add more salt or lemon juice if necessary. ', ' Lightly toast pita bread. Smear 2 Tbsp. Greek yogurt inside each pita and sprinkle with salt to taste. Layer in lettuce, meatballs, and cucumber slices. Top with chili pepper; serve immediately. ']

Name: garlic-angel-hair-with-oyster-sauce-and-zucchini
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. butter', '2 cloves of garlic, minced', '1 medium zucchini, sliced into ¼” rounds', '3 cups cooked angel hair pasta', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh basil for garnish']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. fresh squeezed lemon juice', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l22SMYg5SIM
', '
Cook angel hair pasta based on package instruction. Set aside.
', '
Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and saute until fragrant.
', '
Add the zucchini and season with salt and pepper. Saute until slightly soft.\xa0\xa0
', '
Add lemon juice and oyster sauce, stir well. Then, add the pasta and toss to make sure pasta is coated.\xa0Remove from heat.
', '
Season as desired, then serve and garnish with fresh basil.
']

Name: grilled-lemon-pepper-potatoes
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. Yukon Gold potatoes', '1 Tbsp. salt (to water)', '1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce, plus more for dipping', '1 lemon, juiced', '1 garlic clove, minced', '¼ cup chopped herbs such as parsley,', 'oregano, rosemary and chives', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3UtPH8Lkj8M&feature=youtu.be
', '
Cut potatoes in 1/2" thick slices. Add the slices to a pot of salted boiling water at medium heat and allow to cook for 10 minutes. The potatoes shouldn’t be cooked through all the way.
', '
Stir together 2 Tbsp. olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce, lemon, garlic, herbs, salt and pepper in a shallow dish.
', '
Drain potatoes and toss them through the lemon pepper oil.
', '
Heat a grill or grill pan over medium high heat. Oil pan with 1 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil. Transfer the potato slices from the lemon pepper oil to the grill and cook a couple minutes each side until there are grill marks and potatoes are cooked through.\xa0
', '
Serve and drizzle with remaining lemon pepper oil, and a side of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce for dipping.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: ginger-cookies
Ingredients: ['1 ½ cups all-purpose flour', '¼ tsp. ground cinnamon', '¼ tsp. ground nutmeg', '¼ tsp. allspice', '2 tsp. ground ginger', '¾ cup crystallized ginger, finely chopped', '1 stick of butter, melted', '½ cup dark brown sugar', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '½ cup honey']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup brown sugar, for coating cookies']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5xXXPFgv-EE&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a mixing bowl, add your all-purpose flour, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, allspice, ground ginger, and finely chopped crystallized ginger.\xa0
', '
In another bowl, add butter, dark brown sugar, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger. Whisk that together until smooth, then add honey.\xa0
', '
Once mixed, slowly add in the dry ingredients until combined to a thick consistency.\xa0
', '
Take a scooper to form dough into a ball and place it on a large sheet pan. Preheat oven to 325ºF. Once rolled, coat cookies in the sugar and back on the sheet pan.
', '
Bake on the middle rack for 10-12 minutes until the top starts to crack. Once finished, plate and enjoy!
']

Name: french-dip-sandwich-with-dipping-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 shallot, finely chopped', '1 Tbsp. flour', '1 ½ lb. deli sliced roast beef', '4 French sandwich rolls']
Sauce Mix: ['1 can beef consommé', '1 ½ cup beef broth', '2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zSK_5zgZccE&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a bowl, add the beef consommé, beef broth and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce. Stir and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large skillet over medium heat, melt down the butter. Add in the chopped shallots and cook for 2 minutes. Then add in the flour and cook for another minute to thicken up.\xa0
', '
Whisk in the sauce mix and bring to a low simmer. Add in the sliced roast beef.\xa0
', '
Take the meat out of the broth and set aside. Pour the juice out into a serving bowl.
', '
Place the meat into a roll, serve with the juice and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce alongside.\xa0
']

Name: easy-meatless-cold-sesame-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '3 scallions, thinly sliced, greens and whites separated ', '1 package Quorn Meatless Grounds, thawed ', '1 package prepared lo mein or udon noodles (dried or fresh) ', 'Toasted black or white sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, or more as desired', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar ', 'Salt and pepper']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=blWZvCOP2eQ
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a pan, add scallions whites, and sauté the Quorn Meatless Grounds in a pan with the scallion whites until warmed through.
', '
Cook the noodles according to the package instructions. Once cooked, drain and rinse under very cold water.\xa0
', '
Toss the cooked noodles in a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, rice vinegar, scallion greens, salt and pepper. Pop the bowl in the fridge to start chilling the noodles.\xa0
', '
Toss the Quorn Meatless Grounds in with the dressed noodles, then refrigerate until well chilled.\xa0
', '
Garnish with a sprinkle of sesame seeds and sprinkle of more scallion. Add more Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil as desired.
']

Name: esquites-with-lee-kum-kee-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '3 cups kernels (4 ears), cut from the cob', '2 oz. cotija or feta cheese', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ cup cilantro leaves, chopped', '½ cup green onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['salt to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i7Et8gtT5Tg&feature=youtu.be
', '
Heat vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet over high heat until simmering. Add corn and sautee over medium heat. Season with salt to taste. Keep mixing for about 2 minutes. Transfer cooked corn to a medium bowl.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, cotija or feta cheese, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, cilantro, green onions and lime juice to the bowl with corn. Mix to combine. Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve immediately while warm.
']

Name: diy-shrimp-taco-bar
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. jumbo shrimp, peeled and deveined', '8 (8”) corn tortillas', '4 (½” thick) pineapple slices, fresh or from a can, patted dry with paper towels', '1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, to brush on pineapple slices', '2 avocados, halved, pitted, and sliced', '½ cup cilantro leaves', '4 scallions, sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt to taste']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil', '¼ tsp. ground chipotle pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup mayonnaise', '2 tsp. lime zest', '2 tsp. fresh lime juice']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5e75jt4DHic&feature=youtu.be ', ' Stir together Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, 1 Tbsp. oil, and chipotle. Add shrimp and marinate for at least 30 minutes. ', ' Heat a grill or grill pan over medium heat. Line a plate with a clean kitchen towel. Grill tortillas until lightly charred, 1 to 2 minutes per side, then transfer to prepared plate and wrap in the towel to keep warm. ', ' Brush pineapple slices with 1 Tbsp. oil, then grill until lightly charred, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Cool slightly, then cut into bite-sized pieces. ', ' Grill shrimp until pink and cooked through, 3 to 5 minutes on each side.\xa0 ', ' Stir together mayonnaise, lime zest, and lime juice. Arrange avocado slices on a serving plate and sprinkle lightly with salt. To serve, set out tortillas, pineapple, shrimp, avocado, cilantro, scallion, and lime mayonnaise for a DIY taco bar. ']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: chicken-fried-rice-with-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['350g Cooked rice (about 2 cups)', '200g Chicken meat, shredded', '2 pcs Egg (s), lightly beaten', '1 Tbsp. Green onion(s), diced', '1 Tbsp. crab roe']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wq11eAVz1Mo
', '
Stir-fry eggs in 2 Tbsp. oil until just set.\xa0 Set aside.
', '
Saute chicken in 1 Tbsp. oil until done.\xa0 Add rice, seasoning mix and eggs.\xa0 Stir-fry until heated through. Sprinkle with green onion and crab roe. Serve.
']

Name: chili-garlic-chicken-pasta
Ingredients: ['1 lb. penne pasta', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. chicken breasts, diced into pieces', '1 yellow onion, diced', '1 red bell pepper, diced', '5 garlic cloves, minced', '⅓ cup sundried tomatoes', '¾ cup parmesan cheese', '6 oz. roughly chopped spinach']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 cup heavy cream']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wl-4V99TDfo&feature=youtu.be ', ' Boil penne pasta in salted water then drain and set aside until ready to use.\xa0 ', ' Oil a saute pan over medium-high heat, add diced chicken breast and cook until golden brown. Remove and set aside.\xa0 ', ' Using the same pan, add yellow onion, bell peppers, garlic, sun dried tomatoes and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce. Stir until cooked and onions are caramelized.\xa0 ', ' Bring heat to a simmer adding in heavy cream, parmesan cheese, spinach and cooked chicken followed by penne pasta. Mix well and serve with additional parmesan(optional).\xa0 ']

Name: chili-black-beans-fried-pork
Ingredients: ['10 oz. pork belly', '3 oz. Korean chili pepper', '½ oz. garlic cloves, smashed', '¼ oz. ginger']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Guizhou Style Black Bean Chili Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Choy Sun Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KtwWdlW7edU&feature=youtu.be
', '
Slice Korean chili pepper into diagonal sections and set them aside. Slice pork belly into thin pieces and marinate with Lee Kum Kee Choy Sun Oyster Flavored Sauce for 30 minutes.
', '
Heat a wok over high heat. Add a small amount of cooking oil, smashed garlic and sliced ginger then quickly sauté until fragrant. Then add meat to sauté until thoroughly cooked. Add Korean chili pepper, followed by Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Guizhou Style Black Bean Chili Sauce. Stir-fry over high heat until the water evaporate and the sauce fully cover the ingredients. Ready to serve.
', '
Tips: Lee Kum Kee Choy Sun Oyster Flavored Sauce can help eliminate the odor in meat, enriching the flavor and making the meat more tender.
']

Name: carrot-cake-loaf
Ingredients: ['1½ cups flour', '1½ tsp. baking soda', '¾ tsp. baking powder', '¼ tsp. salt', '1½ tsp. ground cinnamon', '¼ tsp. ground allspice', '¼ tsp. ground ginger', '½ tsp. nutmeg', '3 eggs', '¼ cup + 2 Tbsp. granulated sugar', '¾ cup vegetable oil', '¾ cup brown sugar', '2 tsp. vanilla extract', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1½ cups carrots, grated', '½ cup roasted walnuts, chopped', 'cream cheese frosting, for coating ', 'cinnamon, for sprinkling on top of frosting']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J93HNj7nlz0&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 350ºF. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, all spice, ginger, nutmeg and then set aside.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, granulated sugar, vegetable oil, brown sugar, vanilla extract and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Once mixed well, combine with the dry ingredients and mix until it is blended.
', "
Peel the carrots and cut off the ends. Using a grater, grate the carrots and then set aside. Fold in the grated carrots and roasted walnuts into the mixture, but don’t over mix. Pour batter into the lined baking pan and smooth out the top so it's even.\xa0
", "
Bake for about 1 hour 10 minutes, until the middle comes out clean when you stab it. Tips: If it's getting too dark on the top while baking, cover with foil.
", '
Take out and let cool before spreading on the cream cheese icing. Using a sifter, sift some cinnamon over the top of the icing. Cut and serve.\xa0
']

Name: chili-mango-ice
Ingredients: ['½ cup water', '2 cups frozen mango', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 cup ice cubes', 'sweet chili garnish, for the rim of the glass', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce ', 'mango slices for garnish']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CNvyNd4VrLA&feature=youtu.be
', '
Add water, frozen mango and lemon juice to the blender and blend until smooth.\xa0
', '
Add ice to the blender and blend until thick.
', '
Rim the glass first with lime & then sweet chili garnish.\xa0
', '
Spoon Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce into the bottom of the glass then spoon in the icy mango mix.\xa0
', '
Top off with a nice slice of mango and serve with a spoon. Sprinkle some extra sweet chili garnish on the top if you desire.\xa0
']

Name: chinese-chicken-salad
Ingredients: ['2 cups precooked shredded chicken', '½ head of red cabbage, shredded', '1 head romaine, shredded', '1 head iceberg, shredded', '1 cup shredded carrots', '½ cup sliced green onions', '2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro', 'roasted cashews, garnish', 'red pepper flakes, garnish', 'sesame seeds, garnish']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=djYVWinNtTY&feature=youtu.be
', '
Make the dressing by adding all ingredients in a mixing bowl and whisk together until blended. Place in the fridge to chill until ready to use.\xa0
', '
In a large salad bowl, place the shredded chicken then drizzle with ⅓ of the dressing over and toss, coating the chicken well.\xa0
', '
Add in the red cabbage, romaine, iceberg, carrots, green onion, cilantro, and last ⅓ of dressing toss well with tongs.\xa0
', '
Garnish the top of the salad with roasted cashews, red pepper flakes, and sesame seeds.
', '
Serve with ⅓ dressing on the side.
']

Name: chorizo-mushroom-frittata
Ingredients: ['12 eggs', '½ cup cremini mushrooms ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil ', '2 links chorizo sausage ', '2 cups shredded mexican cheese ']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. fresh cracked pepper', '2 tsp. paprika', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rVAPor8dwdU&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 350°F.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a medium sized bowl, add and beat eggs with salt, pepper, and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Over medium high heat, add mushrooms to an ovenproof skillet and wait until the water from the mushrooms has evaporated. Add in olive oil and chorizo, cook till browned.
', '
Pour egg mixture over the pan and mix with chorizo and mushroom mix, top with shredded cheese and sprinkle paprika.
', '
Bake for 40-45 minutes until it is set in the center and golden color on top. Slice and enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: baked-beans-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['¼ lb. of bacon slices, cut into ½” pieces', '½ cup diced yellow onion', '2 cups cooked pinto beans']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', 'Salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. dark brown sugar', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GCyJIGu8htc
', '
Heat oven to 350°F. In an oven safe pan with a tight fitting lid, heat olive oil over medium heat.\xa0
', '
Add bacon and yellow onion to the pan. Season with a pinch of salt. Add the pinto beans, brown sugar, garlic powder, smoked paprika, pinch of pepper, lime juice, and Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
Stir, then cover and place in the oven at\xa0 350°F. Bake for 30 minutes.
']

Name: beef-tostadas-with-cilantro-lime-slaw
Ingredients: ['1 cup shredded cabbage', '¼ cup chopped cilantro', '1/2 cup diced red onions', '2 cloves garlic, finely chopped', '1 lb. ground beef', '1 15-oz. can refried beans', 'Sour cream, for serving', '2 Tbsp. water', '8 corn tostadas (flat, hard taco shells)', '1 1/2 cups shredded monterey jack cheese']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. lime juice', 'Salt, to taste', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', 'Pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. tomato paste', '2 tsp. chili powder', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tFXdaktcrFY
', '
Make the slaw: combine cabbage, cilantro and lime juice in a small bowl. Toss until well combined and season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
', '
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add the garlic and cook, stirring, 1 minute.
', '
Add the beef and salt and pepper and cook, breaking up the meat, until browned, about 3 minutes. Add the tomato paste, chili powder, and oyster sauce and cook, stirring, about 2 more minutes.
', '
Meanwhile, heat the refried beans in a small saucepan. Thin the sour cream with about 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl.
', '
Spread the beans on the tostadas, then top with the beef and cheese. Drizzle with the sour cream. Top with slaw and more cilantro.
']

Name: banh-mi-meatball-sliders
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '1 package Quorn Meatless Meatballs, thawed', '1 Carrot, sliced into thin rounds (slice half and reserve the rest for another use) ', '1 English cucumber, sliced into thin rounds (slice half and reserve the rest for another use) ', '1 small daikon, sliced into thin rounds (slice half and reserve the rest for another use) ', '1 Baguette ', '1 small bunch mint', '1 small bunch cilantro ']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1/2 Tbsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JhW7AyptTRQ
', '
Create the sauce mix by heating the rice vinegar, sugar, and salt in a small pot until dissolved.\xa0
', '
Heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Cut each Quorn Meatball in half, then toss them in a pan with hot vegetable oil and until the meatballs become golden brown and caramelized. Season with a dash of salt and plenty of black pepper.
', '
Pour the sauce mix over the sliced carrot, cucumber, and daikon in a bowl and allow them to chill while you complete the next steps.
', '
Spread a generous layer of Sriracha Mayo on the top sides of each baguette, then follow with 2 meatball halves (flat side-down so they don’t roll out!).\xa0
', '
Follow with the pickled vegetables and finish with fresh herbs.
']

Name: beef-and-vegetable-stew
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 ½ lbs. beef stew meat', '1 yellow onion, chopped', '2 carrots, diced', '2 celery stalks, diced', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 can crushed red tomatoes', '2 yellow potatoes, quartered', 'Fresh baguette, as desired']
Marinade: ['salt and pepper to taste', '2 cups red wine', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 cup beef stock', '1 tsp. fresh chopped parsley', '1 sprig thyme', '2 bay leaves', '2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/embed/3vwgtUFcXwk
', '
Place Dutch oven or large pot on the stove over medium/high heat. Add olive oil and let that heat up for a few minutes. Place meat down and quickly sear it for a few minutes on each side. Take out and set aside.\xa0
', '
Toss in chopped onion and cook down for 3-4 minutes. Then add the chopped carrots, diced celery and minced garlic. Season with salt and pepper. Let that cook for another 5 minutes. Stirring often.
', '
Add the red wine and let cook for a couple minutes. Then add the tomato paste, crushed red tomatoes, beef stock, parsley, thyme, bay leaves and the Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef. Give it a stir.
', '
Add the quartered potatoes and put the meat back in to the pot.\xa0Cover and let cook on low heat for 3 hours. Stirring often.\xa0
', '
After 3 hours the stew should be thick and very flavorful. Add salt and pepper to taste. Serve in a bowl with a fresh baguette.\xa0
']

Name: baked-fish-in-coconut-curry-sauce
Ingredients: ['400g Grouper fillet, cut into pieces', '75g Carrot (s), sliced', '2 ½ Tbsp. Desiccated coconut or bread crumbs']
Sauce Mix: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Coconut Flavored Curry Sauce', '125ml Coconut milk']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8QCOYcj_2J8
', '
Cook carrot in boiling water until tender.\xa0 Drain.
', '
Pan-fry fish fillet in 2-3 Tbsp. oil until golden yellow and done.
', '
Arrange carrot and fish on a baking dish.\xa0 Pour on sauce mix. Sprinkle with desiccated coconut.\xa0 Bake at 190C/375F hot oven until golden yellow.
']

Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']

Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.

Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: beet-and-goat-cheese-salad-with-triple-citrus-dressing
Ingredients: ['1 bag or box of spring green salad mix', '1/4 red onion, thinly sliced', '2 small cooked beets, cut into 1/2" cubes or wedges', '1 orange, peeled, pithed and segmented', '1/4 cup goat cheese, crumbled', '3 Tbsp. roasted pistachios, roughly chopped']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LQ4A1NW9kL0&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a bowl, make the dressing by whisking together the orange juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper and set aside.
', '
Spread out greens on a plate or in a salad bowl.
', '
Layer red onion, beets, orange segments, goat cheese and pistachios.\xa0
', '
Dress the salad with vinaigrette. Lightly toss and serve.
']

Name: black-pepper-halibut
Ingredients: ['3/4 lb. baby potatoes, halved', '1 Tbsp. salt', '1/2 lb. green beans, trimmed', '2 portions of halibut (4-6 oz. each)', '1/2 small bunch of fresh basil', '2 garlic cloves, thinly sliced', '1/2 lb. cherry tomatoes', '1 lemon, sliced', '2 pcs crusty breads (optional)']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', '1 Tbsp. Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil, divided']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EXco-uFa6Uc&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F. Clean potatoes and cut them in half. Place in pot of salted water and bring to a boil over medium high heat. Reduce heat to medium and allow to simmer for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
', '
Add green beans to the pot with potatoes in the last 2 minutes of cooking.
', '
Drizzle 1 Tbsp. olive oil onto fish fillets and season with salt and pepper on both sides. Set aside.
', '
Drain vegetables. Place the vegetables into a sheet tray large enough to hold them in a layer. Toss in the basil leaves, sliced garlic, cherry tomatoes, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, and generously season with salt and pepper. Toss to coat the vegetables.
', '
Place fish fillets on top of vegetables and brush the fillets with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce. Lay lemon slices in\xa0 the tray and bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes. Serve the fish with vegetable mixture and crusty bread (optional).
']

Name: black-pepper-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1.5 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 lb. peeled and deveined shrimp', '3 scallions, thinly sliced', 'rice for serving (optional)']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w8fWQ48EIDo&feature=youtu.be
', '
Heat a cast-iron or large skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil and garlic.
', '
Cook a few seconds, then add shrimp in a single layer.
', '
Cook for about 2 minutes until shrimp has a nice color on the first side. Seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Flip the shrimp to the second side. Add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce and cook for another 2 minutes. Seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Toss in the sliced scallions and serve with a side of veggies and rice (optional).\xa0
']

Name: bbq-steak-bowls
Ingredients: ['1 lb. top sirloin steak, sliced thin', '1 tsp. olive oil (for cooking steak)', '2 bell peppers (red and yellow), cut into thin circles', '2 bok choy, chopped', 'sesame seeds, for garnish', 'green onions, sliced for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '⅔ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. chili paste']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I3c-hquEmWE&feature=youtu.be
', '
Blend the marinade ingredients in a food processor until smooth.
', '
Cut the steak strips, place them in a baking dish and cover to marinate for an hour (or longer) until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan with olive oil over high heat. Add steak to hot pan and cook a few minutes on each side or until cooked through. Turn off heat and set the steak aside.\xa0
', '
Cut peppers and the bok choy and add them to a mixing bowl. Add in the steak along with any leftover sauce. Mix it well and add into your serving bowl.\xa0
', '
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.
']

Name: baked-avocado-egg-bites
Ingredients: ['2 avocados, halved', '4 oz. smoked salmon', '4 eggs']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', 'chili pepper flakes, for topping', 'fresh dill, for topping']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vCMtUCgHzJQ&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F, then cut the avocados in half, removing the pit.\xa0
', '
Place them onto a baking sheet and then line the middles of the avocado with a piece of smoked salmon.
', '
Crack an egg on top of the salmon (make sure it stays on top).
', '
Top with salt and pepper and place in the oven to bake for 15-20 minutes.
', '
Take out and then top with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, chili pepper flakes, and a few pieces of fresh dill.\xa0
']

Name: stone-fruit-salad
Ingredients: ['1 lb. stone fruit (plums, peaches, nectarines), sliced ', '1- 16 oz. container washed and ready arugula', '½ cup feta cheese ', '½ cup slivered almonds ', '½ lime for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup olive oil ', '¼ cup orange juice ', '¼ cup lemon juice  ', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Clean and oil the grill grate.\xa0\xa0
', '
Using a grill brush glaze each slice of stone fruit with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce.\xa0
', '
Grill the fruit on both sides for about 2-3 minutes. Remove from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes in the refrigerator.\xa0
', '
In a small jar with a lid, combine olive oil, orange juice, lemon and salt. Seal the jar and give it a good shake till the vinaigrette is blended together.\xa0
', '
In a large bowl, place the arugula and toss with ½ the dressing. Additional can be kept on the side or remain in the jar in the refrigerator for up to a week.\xa0 \xa0
', '
Transfer the tossed arugula to a serving platter, sprinkle the feta cheese, slivered almonds on top, and lime. Then place the grilled stone fruit throughout the salad and serve.\xa0
']

Name: seared-ahi-tuna-salad
Ingredients: ['1- 4 oz. Ahi tuna steak', '1 ½ cups mixed greens  ', '¼ yellow bell pepper, thinly sliced lengthwise ', '¼ cup spiralized zucchini ', '1 quarter English cucumber, sliced ', '1 radish, thinly sliced ', '¼ cup shredded carrots ', '½ tsp. vegetable oil  ', '1 green onion, sliced ', '¼ cup wontons crisps  ', 'lemon slices for serving']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ Tbsp. honey ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil  ', '¼ tsp. salt  ', 'pinch of black pepper ']
Procedure:
['
Whisk together Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, honey, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil , salt and pepper. Place in a zip lock bag with ahi tuna and let it marinade for 10 minutes in the refrigerator.\xa0
', '
While fish is marinating, prepare and place the mixed greens, yellow bell pepper, zucchini, cucumbers, radishes and carrots in a bowl.\xa0
', '
In a skillet over medium high heat, add in the vegetable oil and wait till it gets hot. Remove the fish from the bag and place into the skillet. Sear on both sides for 3 minutes. Remove from heat and let it rest for 3 minutes, then slice and place over the salad bowl.\xa0
', '
Garish with green onions, wonton crisps, and dress with a squeeze of lemon.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-shrimp-burritos
Ingredients: ['1 lb. peeled and deveined raw shrimp ', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 flour tortillas ', '1 cup white rice, cooked ', '1 avocado, sliced ', '½ cup fresh cilantro, chopped ', 'lime wedges for serving']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce + additional for serving ']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, place cleaned shrimps (no tails) into a bowl and toss with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Let it marinate for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a medium sized skillet, over medium high heat add the vegetable oil and wait till it gets hot. Slowly add in shrimp and cook on each side for 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Begin building burritos by placing a flour tortilla, rice, avocado, shrimp and cilantro onto the bottom half of the tortilla.
', '
Begin rolling the burrito from the bottom folding in the sides of the tortilla then complete the roll to the top.\xa0
', '
Half the burritos and serve with limes.
']

Name: citrus-tofu-kebabs
Ingredients: ['1 block extra firm tofu, cubed and patted dry ', '1 red bell pepper, diced ', '1 red onion, cut into large dices  ', '2 navel oranges, wedges cut into small triangles', 'parsley leaves for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['½ Tbsp. honey ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, then set aside.\xa0
', '
Place one cube of tofu, red bell pepper, red onion, and orange wedges.\xa0
', '
Heat a grill on medium high heat. Before placing the skewer on the grill brush all sides with the citrus sauce mixture. Grill for 3-4 minutes on each side until it has a nice char.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with parsley leaves.
']

Name: orange-chicken-lo-mein
Ingredients: ['1 egg ', '1 ½ lb. boneless skinless chicken breast, diced into 1 in. cubes', '½ cup all-purpose flour ', '¼ cup cornstarch', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '3 cloves garlic, minced ', '6 oz. dry ramen noodles ', '¾ cup water  ', '1-12 oz. frozen stir-fry vegetable blend, thawed ', '3 cups green cabbage, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. black pepper  ', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup white vinegar ', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KUkfyPgBUxo&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a large bowl, combine egg, salt and black pepper. Whisk until combined. Add in the diced chicken and stir to coat.\xa0
', '
In a mixing bowl, combine the flour and cornstarch then add in the chicken mixture, toss to coat.\xa0\xa0
', "
In a large skillet or wok over medium high heat, add oil and wait till it's hot. Remove the chicken from the flour mixture shaking off excess flour then carefully place into the skillet. Cook for 8-10 minutes until the chicken is golden brown. Remove from the skillet, set aside and keep it warm.\xa0
", '
In the same skillet, add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant (30 seconds). Add ramen, water, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, white vinegar and Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken to the skillet. Cover and bring to a simmer, cooking until the noodles have softened (3-4 minutes).\xa0
', '
Add the thawed vegetables and cabbage, cook for an additional 3-4 minutes. Then add in the chicken, mix well ensuring the chicken has been coated. Serve while hot.\xa0
']

Name: pineapple-and-shrimp-red-curry-soup
Ingredients: ['1 ½ tsp. vegetable oil ', '1 Tbsp. fresh grated ginger ', '1 tsp. red curry paste ', '1 cup red bell peppers, diced', '1 cup pineapple, diced  ', '1 ½ cans coconut milk ', '1 lb. raw shrimp, peeled and deveined  ', '3 Tbsp. fresh cilantro, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce  ', 'salt to taste ', '1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice ', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large pot over medium heat, add the oil. Cook and stir the ginger, curry paste, red bell peppers and pineapple. Saute for 1- 2 minutes. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce stir well to incorporate.
', '
Slowly add the coconut milk over the mixture and stir occasionally. Let it simmer for 10-12 minutes.\xa0 Add salt to taste.
', '
Add in the shrimp and wait about 2 minutes before seasoning the soup with lime and fish sauce. Take off heat and garnish with chopped cilantro.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: lemongrass-chicken-banh-mi
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breast, thinly sliced and diced', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '4 french bread rolls', '½ cup shredded carrots ', '½ cup shredded red cabbage ', '1 jalapeño, thinly sliced ', '2 mini red bell peppers, thinly sliced ', '¼ cup cilantro leaves  ', '2-3 mint sprigs, leaves plucked', 'limes for serving']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce ', '1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. black pepper  ']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, salt, pepper and chicken. Give it a good toss and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a medium sized skillet over medium high heat, add the vegetable oil and wait till it gets warm. Add in chicken coated in Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, mixing occasionally until it has reached the internal temperature of 165°F.\xa0
', '
Slice the bread rolls and fill with chicken, carrots, red cabbage. Top with sliced jalapeños, red bell peppers, cilantro and mint. Serve with sliced limes.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: hoisin-beef-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['½ Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8 oz., filet mignon', '1 cup broccoli ', '1 cup white rice, cooked  ', '1 orange, peeled and thinly sliced ', '¼ cup roasted cashews for garnish', '¼ cup microgreens for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. black pepper  ', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce  ']
Procedure:
['
In a skillet over medium high heat, add the vegetable oil and wait till it gets hot. Season the steak with salt and pepper then place down in the skillet to get a nice sear. Once flipped, brush on the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce on both sides. Cook to desired tenderness. For a medium steak 3-4 minutes on each side. Take off the heat and let it rest.\xa0
', '
Bring a small pot filled with water to a boil, add in broccoli for 2- 3 minutes then remove.\xa0
', '
Begin building bowls by dividing the rice, broccoli florets, and orange slices. Then slice the rested meat portioning out about 4 oz. for each bowl.\xa0
', '
Garish with roasted cashews and micro greens.\xa0
']

Name: japchae
Ingredients: ['8 oz. sweet potato starch noodles ', '2 cups fresh spinach', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 cup yellow onion, thinly sliced   ', '2 cloves garlic, minced ', '½ cup shiitake mushrooms ', '½ cup shredded carrots ', '2 green onions, cut into 1" pieces + add\'l for garnishing', 'sesame seeds for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil   ', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Bring a large pot of water to a boil, cook the noodles for 5 minutes then remove. Do not toss the water. Run cold water over noodles to stop the cooking process and set aside.
', '
In the same pot you cooked the noodles in, blanch the spinach for a minute. Remove the spinach, then form into a ball to squeeze out the excess water. Then slice the drained spinach ball in half.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a large sauté pan over medium high heat, add the vegetable oil and allow it to heat up. Add the onion, garlic, mushrooms and carrots. Sauté for 2 minutes, then add the green onions and sauté for another minute.
', '
Turn the heat to low, then add in the noodles, spinach, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Gently stir to combine until the noodles are coated, then garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.
']

Name: spicy-chicken-salad-bowl
Ingredients: ['2- 4 oz. chicken breast ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 heads romaine lettuce, washed and cut ', '1 English cucumber, sliced  ', '1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved ', '2 radishes, thinly sliced ', '1 avocado, halved and sliced', '2 soft boiled eggs ', '1 red onion, thinly sliced ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. black pepper ', '¼ tsp. cayenne pepper ', '3 cloves garlic, minced ']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and minced garlic. Mix well then add the chicken breast, gently massaging for about a minute.\xa0
', '
In a medium sized skillet over medium high heat, add oil and wait till it gets hot. Then gently place the chicken down. Searing and cooking on each side for about 5-7 minutes or until cooked through at 165°F. Let it cool, then slice.\xa0
', '
While the chicken is cooking, begin building each salad bowl adding lettuce, cucumbers, tomatoes, radishes, avocados, eggs and onions.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, olive oil, and lemon juice. Mix well to combine. Season with salt and pepper to taste and set aside to use as dressing.\xa0
', '
Place chicken over the prepared bowl and drizzle on the dressing.\xa0
']

Name: green-bean-sprouts-and-meat-dumplings
Ingredients: ['50 g minced beef', '50 g minced pork', '1/2 pack tofu (large pack, about 150 g)', '400 g green bean sprouts (about 8 handfuls)', '25 g chives (about 1/2 handful)', '14 dumpling wrappers (diameter 10 cm)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. green onions, chopped', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1/3 tsp. salt', '1/3 tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
Remove the blood from the minced beef and pork by wrapping them in a kitchen towel.
', '
Press the tofu on the side of the knife, crush it finely, and wrap it with cotton cloth to squeeze out the water.
', '
Put the green bean sprouts in boiling water, parboil for 30 minutes, and drain water through a sieve. Spread it in a bowl, cool it, squeeze it out, and chop it finely. Chop the chives.
', '
Put seasonings in a large bowl, mix and add all the ingredients except dumpling wrappers, mix and leave for 10 minutes.
', '
Add 1/2 Tbsp. of the mixture from step 4 to the dumpling skin, apply water to the edges. Fold it in half and press it firmly to the edge, then stick both ends together after applying water. Repeat until you use up all the dumpling wrappers.\xa0Place dumplings on a steamer and steam for 10 minutes over medium heat.
', '
Tips: The amount of pepper can be adjusted according to preference.
']

Name: sauteed-tuna
Ingredients: ['8 oz. fresh tuna fish', '1 cucumber ', 'cooking oil, as needed']
Marinade: ['Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, as needed']
Procedure:
['
Pat the surface of the tuna with Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder and then set aside. Peel the cucumber, cut it into strips, and place it on a plate.\xa0
', '
Heat the pan, pour in the oil, fry the tuna until golden brown on medium heat, remove from the pan, cut into half-inch thick pieces, and place them on the cucumber sticks.
', '
Mix the dipping sauce ingredients thoroughly and serve.
', '
Tips: You can buy pre-cut tuna at the supermarket.
']

Name: prawns-with-black-pepper-and-butter-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['1½ lbs. prawns', 'oil, as needed', '1/8 cup green onions (white part only, chopped)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/8 cup green pepper, chopped', '1/8 cup red pepper, chopped', '2 Tbsp. dried shrimp, chopped', '2 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', 'water, as needed']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) ']
Procedure:
['
Cut the shrimp down its length and devein. Add chicken bouillon powder and marinate for 20 minutes.
', '
Add oil to a heated wok and stir-fry shrimp over high heat till 60% done. Remove shrimp from the wok and set aside.
', '
Stir-fry green onions, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, green and red peppers, and dried shrimp till fragrant. Add Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder, then add shrimp and mix evenly.
', '
Stir-in remaining seasoning, add butter, and mix well. Pour in cornstarch water to thicken the sauce. Ready to serve.
']

Name: chicken-braised-with-mushroom
Ingredients: ['1½ lbs. bone-in chicken  ', 'oil, as needed', '2 green onion stalks ', '5 garlic cloves', '3 ginger slices ', 'as appropriate cooking wine  ', '10 oz. hazelnut mushroom ', '10 oz. water-immersed sweet potato vermicelli ']
Seasoning: ['1 pc. cinnamon stick     ', '5 pcs. bay leaves                            ', '3 pcs. star anise                             ', 'a little Sichuan peppercorn  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce                ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce                          ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)']
Procedure:
['
Cut the chicken into big pieces, parboil them, drain away the water, and set them aside.\xa0
', '
Heat the wok until the oil gets warm, stir-fry the combination of green onions, garlic and ginger until fragrant. Put in chicken pieces, stir-fry for 5-7 minutes until almost dry. Sprinkle some cooking wine into the wok when the chicken turns brown, stir-fry until well mixed. Then add in the cinnamon stick, bay leaves, star anise and Sichuan peppercorn in turn.\xa0
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce, stir-fry until well combined, pour in some hot water until the chicken pieces become submerged, add in the hazelnut mushroom and Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce to add color, cook over high heat until a boil, then switch over medium-low heat for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Put in the sweet potato vermicelli, heat to a boil, boil for 5 minutes, and add Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken.\xa0
', '
Tips: Using Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce help release the unique fragrance of hazelnut mushroom, improving this dish’s color, aroma and consistency.\xa0
']

Name: chicken-wings-with-beer-and-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken wings', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3 slices of ginger', '1 green onion stalk, sectioned']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce  ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. cornstarch ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup beer', '2 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Mix chicken wings with marinade and marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Heat cooking oil, sauté ginger and green onion. Add chicken wings and stir-fry until done.
', '
Add sauce mix and continue to cook over medium heat until sauce is thickened.\xa0
']

Name: boiled-fish-fillets-in-hot-spicy-soup
Ingredients: ['1/2 cup cooking oil', '1/2 oz. dried hot peppers', '1 Tbsp. Sichuan peppercorns', '1 lb. fish steaks  ', '6 oz. bean sprouts', '6 oz. celery ', '2 Tbsp. ginger, chopped', '2 Tbsp. green onion, chopped', '4 Tbsp. minced garlic', '4 cup water']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce', '1/5 cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood   ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Peppercorn Flavored Oil', '1 tsp. white pepper ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 egg white', '1 tsp. white pepper ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in pan and sauté hot peppers and Sichuan peppercorns until fried and crispy. Remove to cool. Chop and set aside.
', '
Slice fish into thin 1/4-inch fillets. Marinate in cooking wine, egg white, 1 tsp. white pepper, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon, and cornstarch. Mix well to combine. Marinate for 20 minutes (refrigerated).\xa0
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. oil to another pan. Sauté bean sprouts and celery, add 1 tsp. salt and continue to stir-fry for 3 minutes. Place in serving bowl.
', '
Use another pan to heat 3 Tbsp. oil. Sauté ginger, green onion, and half the minced garlic. Add Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce and continue to cook until fragrant. Add Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood, remaining 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon, and 4 cups water. Bring to a boil and cook for 5 minutes.
', '
Place fish in pan. Lower heat then bring to a boil. Pour soup over bean sprouts and celery.\xa0 Sprinkle chopped peppers from (1). Add remaining minced garlic and 1 tsp. white pepper.\xa0
', '
Bring remaining cooking oil and Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Peppercorn Flavored Oil to a quick boil. Pour over fish. Ready to serve.\xa0 \xa0
']

Name: shredded-potato-salad
Ingredients: ['2 potatoes        ', 'a little cilantro ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee 9°Selected Rice Vinegar    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil          ', 'a little salt']
Procedure:
['
Wash, peel the potatoes and cut into thin shreds. Blanch them in hot water for 40 seconds, remove from the water and place into cold water to cool down.
', '
Remove potato shreds from cold water and drain. Add Lee Kum Kee 9°Selected Rice Vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil, salt, and cilantro.\xa0
', '
Mix well and ready to serve.\xa0
']

Name: double-cooked-pork-wrap
Ingredients: ['8-10 oz. pork belly ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '2 green onion stalks, sectioned ', '2 ginger slices', '2 lettuce leaves ', '1 pc. pan-fried Chinese scallion pancake ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sweet Bean Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chef’s Select Soy Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Cook the pork belly with cold water. Remove from the water and let cool before slicing.
', '
Heat up a wok and pour oil into it. Sauté the pork belly until it changes color. Add the chopped green onions, ginger, Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Sweet Bean Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Chef’s Select Soy Sauce. Stir-fry over medium heat for 2 minutes before turning off the fire.
', '
Place the lettuce on the pancake and then lay out the pork belly on top of it. Roll up and serve.
']

Name: sesame-oil-scrambled-eggs-with-longan
Ingredients: ['20 g ginger', '30 g dried longan', '3 pcs. eggs ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RH6_R3vzTqA&list=PLXUQ0OE2DwE9zOGlqhJ_LCWCPHl4gSfh1&index=4
', '
Julienne ginger, dice dried longan, crack and whip eggs.\xa0
', '
Slowly sauté julienned ginger with sesame oil, add diced longan and stir-fry till soft.\xa0
', '
Scramble the eggs with ginger and longan.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: fettuccine-and-beef-in-guilin-style-chilli-sauce
Ingredients: ['4⅓ oz. fettuccine', '5⅓ oz. beef, cut into strips\t', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3⅓ oz. courgette', '1 bell pepper, cut into strips']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Premium Oyster Sauce', '1/2 tsp. corn starch']
Sauce Mix: ['2½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Guilin Style Chili Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. water', '1/2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Cook fettuccine in boiling water according to packet instructions or until tender. Drain.
', '
Mix beef with marinade.
', '
Sauté minced garlic in oil. Add beef and stir-fry until almost done. Add courgette, bell pepper and stir-fry for 1 minute.
', '
Stir in fettuccine, sauce mix and heat through.
']

Name: sichuan-spicy-noodles-in-soup
Ingredients: ['1½ oz. dried thin noodles', '1/2 cup boiling water']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Spicy Noodle Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook dried thin noodles in boiling water until done.\xa0
', '
Drain and put noodles in ½ cup boiling water. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Spicy Noodle Sauce and serve hot.
', '
N/A
']

Name: cold-vietnamese-spring-roll-2
Ingredients: ['12 Vietnamese spring roll wrappers ', '3 oz. imitation crabmeat, shredded ', '3 oz. carrot, shredded', '3 oz. cucumber, cut into strips', '3 oz. mango, peeled and cut into strips ', '3 oz. fried tofu puff, cut into strips']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegetarian Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Soak wrappers in cool water for about 1 minute until soft. Drain and pat dry with a towel.
', '
Arrange crabmeat, carrot, cucumber, mango, fried tofu puff, and 1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Vegetarian Hoisin Sauce. Roll up to form a small sealed packet.\xa0
', '
Repeat procedure for remaining spring rolls.\xa0
']

Name: stir-fried-bitter-gourd-with-egg
Ingredients: ['1 bitter gourd', '2 eggs, beaten', 'as appropriate cooking oil', '5 pcs. fried tofu puffs, cut into strips', '1 tomato, diced', '1 green onion stalk, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Organic Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. water']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. sea salt']
Sauce Mix: ['-----Broth Ingredients-----', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder', '1½ cup water']
Procedure:
['
Cut bitter gourd and use a spoon to scoop out the seeds. Cut bitter gourd into thin slice. Marinate with sea salt for 15 minutes, then rinse with water.
', '
Add the broth ingredients into a pot, boil and add the bitter gourd to cook for 2 to 3 minutes, then drain and set aside.
', '
Add 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Bouillon Powder to the beaten egg as seasoning and mix well.
', '
Heat the oil in medium heat, add the tofu puffs and sauté, then the bitter gourd and tomato, and sauté for about 1 minute.
', '
Mix the remaining seasoning, then add into the saucepan and sauté for about 1 minute or until the tomato turns soft.
', '
Pour in the beaten egg, use spatula to cook it until turning slightly translucent, sprinkle with chopped green onions and then sauté the egg until it is fully cooked.
']

Name: cauliflower-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', 'a few green onions, chopped', '1 egg, beaten', '10 oz. cauliflower rice']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Gluten-Free Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Gluten-Free Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Pour oil into a medium-high heated frying pan. Sauté green onions until fragrant. Reduce the heat to medium and scramble the egg.
', '
Add cauliflower rice to pan. Stir-fry over medium-low heat until dry. Stir seasonings into cauliflower rice. Stir-fry until sauce coats the mixture evenly.\xa0
', '
Ready to serve.
']

Name: sichuan-spicy-jelly-sheet
Ingredients: ['2 oz. cucumber, sliced', '12 oz. mung bean jelly sheet']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Peanut Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', 'a little water', 'a little sugar']
Procedure:
['
Place sliced cucumbers on plate.
', '
Soak jelly sheet into hot water until tender. Drain, slice into pieces and place on top of cucumber.\xa0
', '
Mix seasoning well. Pour the mixed sauces over the jelly sheet. Ready to serve.
', '
Tips:\xa0
1. Jelly sheet can be substituted by Konnyaku.
2. Using Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot in a cold dish is innovative.\xa0 Mixing with Lee Kum Kee Peanut Flavored Sauce easily creates a fusion and yet authentic flavor of Sichuan spicy cold dish.
']

Name: hot-and-spicy-stir-fried-beef
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '50 g onion, sliced', '50 g bell pepper, cut into pieces', '10 g red chili, cut into pieces', '350 g beef, sliced']
Seasoning: ['1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a wok and add oil, stir-fry onion, bell pepper and red chili.
', '
Add beef and stir-fry until done. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Sauce and heat through.
', '
Tips: Add 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Sauce more for extra spicy flavor.
']

Name: tofu-in-spicy-bean-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3⅓ oz. ground pork', '10½ oz. soft tofu, diced']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Spicy Bean Sauce (Ma Po Sauce)']
Procedure:
['
Heat the wok and add cooking oil.
', '
Stir-fry the ground pork until done.\xa0
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Spicy Bean Sauce (Ma Po Sauce) and soft tofu, heat through.
']

Name: eggplant-in-spicy-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['12 oz. eggplant, cut into stripes', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. ground pork']
Seasoning: ['4 oz. (1/2 jar) Lee Kum Kee Spicy Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Fry or boil the eggplant first, drain and set aside.
', '
Heat a wok and add cooking oil, stir-fry ground pork until done. Add eggplant and 1/2 jar of Lee Kum Kee Spicy Garlic Sauce.
', '
Tips: You can substitute eggplant with your favorite vegetables.
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-shrimp-balls
Ingredients: ['9 oz. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 egg, beaten', '2-3 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Marinade: ['1/8 tsp. salt', '1/4 tsp. sugar']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sweet & Sour Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Soak the shrimp in warm, salted water for 5 minutes. Rinse in cold water, drain, and pat dry with paper towels.
', '
In a medium bowl, marinate the shrimp with salt and sugar. Then mix in the egg and corn starch.
', "
Heat a pot of oil until it's 320°F-340°F, add the shrimp balls to the hot oil, until they are crispy and golden (3 to 4 minutes). Remove the shrimp balls from the hot oil and drain them on paper towels.
", '
Place the shrimp balls in a pot, stir in Lee Kum Kee Sweet & Sour Sauce and mix well.
']

Name: chinese-noodle-with-oyster-flavored-meat-sauce
Ingredients: ['10 oz. dry noodle ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. ground pork ', '1/4 cup water', '2 oz. cucumber, shredded', '1 oz. water-soaked black fungus', '2 oz. bean sprouts, boiled']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. minced garlic ', '2 Tbsp. minced ginger ', '2 Tbsp. green onions, chopped ', '8 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lo Mein Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '(optional) minced chili \t']
Procedure:
['
Boil water, add in the noodles until cooked. Remove noodles from the pot and soak in cold water for 5 seconds. Drain the water and set the noodle aside in a bowl.
', '
Heat oil, stir-fry ground pork for 2 minutes. Add seasoning, keep stir-frying for 2 minutes. Add water, simmer for another 2 minutes.
', '
Add the remaining ingredients and meat sauce on top of noodle. Ready to serve.
']

Name: tuna-omelet-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['3 eggs', '2 oz. can tuna in water (drained and crushed)', '1 oz. onion, julienned', '1 oz. green pepper, julienned', '1 oz. red pepper, julienned', '2 Tbsp. oil', '1 oz. cheddar cheese, shredded ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Kum Chun Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Beat the eggs well. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Mix the rest of ingredients (except oil and cheddar cheese) and season with Lee Kum Kee Kum Chun Oyster Flavored Sauce. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil, stir-fry the tuna mixture until fragrant and set aside.
', '
Heat another 1 Tbsp. oil, pour the beaten eggs evenly into the pan and cook until 80% done. Add cooked ingredients and cheddar cheese on top of the cooked egg sheet. Fold in half. Ready to serve.
', '
Brush the omelet with Lee Kum Kee Kum Chun Oyster Flavored Sauce as needed for more flavor.
']
