Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: pumpkin-with-minced-chicken
Ingredients: ['90 g chicken, ground/minced', '500 g pumpkin, peeled and cut into 12 thick slices', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Boullion Powder  ', '2 cups water ', '1 tsp. sugar']
Marinade: ['shredded ginger', '2 tsp. cornstarch ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Marinade  ', '1 Tbsp. bonito flakes ', '2 cups dashi (bonito stock)']
Procedure:
['
Marinade chicken with shredded ginger and cornstarch. Set aside.
', '
Make a stock by boiling Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder, water, and sugar.
', '
Once the stock comes to a boil, add pumpkin and cook for about 10 minutes until soft. Take out carefully and arrange on 4 individual serving bowls.
', '
In a wok, stir-fry minced chicken in 1 Tbsp. oil, or until cooked.
', '
Stir in sauce mix (Lee Kum Kee Chicken Marinade, bonito flakes, dashi/bonito stock) and heat through.
']

Name: asian-chicken-salad-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '1 lb. ground chicken  ', '2 heads butter lettuce ', '1 ½ cup carrots, julienned', '2 cups shredded red cabbage   ', '½ cup roasted cashews ', '4 green onions, thinly sliced ', '½ cup fresh cilantro, chopped ']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wraps + additional for dressing', '½ tsp. red chili flakes ', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a large skillet over medium high heat, add the vegetable oil and wait till it gets hot. Then add the chicken and cook till slightly brown.\xa0
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wraps, red chili flakes, salt and pepper. Mix well and cook through. (about 10-15 minutes)\xa0\xa0
', '
Place washed and roughly chopped butter lettuce in bowls, then add carrots, and cabbage.\xa0
', '
Top salad bowl with cooked chicken and garnish with cashews, green onions, and cilantro. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wraps on top for additional dressing.\xa0
']

Name: bun-rieu-meat-ball-soup-with-noodles
Ingredients: ['8 oz. rice noodles', '1/2 lb ground pork', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2-3 pcs tomatoes, each halved into 4', '1 stalk green onion, diced', '1/2 cup bean sprouts', '1/2 pc. lime', '2 oz. lettuce, shredded', '1 stalk mint leaves']
Seasoning: ['4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '3 cups water']
Marinade: ['1 1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Fine Shrimp Sauce', '3 oz. (2/3 can) minced prawns in spices', '1 egg, beaten', '1/4 tsp. sugar', '1/2 tsp tapioca starch']
Procedure:
['
Prepare bun rice noodles according to package instructions, rinse and set aside.
', '
In a large bowl, evenly mix the ground pork with marinade, stir hard until sticky.
', '
Form pork mixture into small balls and set aside. Heat pan with cooking oil and stir-fry tomatoes until softened.
', '
In a pot, add 3 cups of water and 4 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder, bring it to a boil and put in the tomatoes and meat balls, bring to the boil again.\xa0 Lower the heat to medium and cook for 10 minutes or until done.
', '
Pour the stock on rice noodles and sprinkle with green onion.
', '
Serve with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Sriracha Chili Sauce together with bean sprouts, lime, lettuce and mint leaves.
']

Name: bacon-ponzu-plum-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['8 oz. bacon, chopped', '1 red bell pepper, diced  ', '3 cups cooked white rice ', '2 green onions, sliced for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling and Dipping Sauce', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a large skillet over medium-high heat, add the bacon and cook until crisp. Remove the bacon using a slotted spoon onto a plate lined with a paper towel.\xa0
', '
In the same skillet, add red bell peppers and sauté for 2 minutes until they are tender.\xa0
', '
Add in the cooked rice and bacon, stir to combine. Then pour over Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling and Dipping Sauce, season with salt and pepper, mix well to combine.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with green onions.\xa0 \xa0
']

Name: peppered-kebabs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. flank steak, cut into chunks ', '16pcs. shishito peppers ', '1 red onion, cut into chunks']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt ', '2 tsp. cracked black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Clean and oil the grill grate.\xa0
', '
Thread the beef, shishito peppers and red onion chunks onto metal skewers from top to bottom. Season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Using a grill brush, glaze each skewer with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce.\xa0
', '
Grill the skewers until the steak is seared on all sides about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce for dipping.\xa0
']

Name: stir-fry-sauce
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/2 cup chicken stock ', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '1 Tbsp. honey ', '1 tsp. rice vinegar ', '1 Tbsp. ginger paste', '1 tsp. sesame oil ', '2 cloves garlic, grated']
Procedure:
['
Whisk together all ingredients in a saucepan. Place the saucepan on medium heat to allow the cornstarch to cook for about 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Transfer to an airtight container and store in the fridge for up to a week.
', '
N/A
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 package linguine rice noodles ', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '2 pcs. fried chicken breasts, diced', '2 cups shredded carrots ', '1 ½ cup shredded purple cabbage', '1 cup roasted and salted peanuts ', '½ cup fresh cilantro, chopped ', '2 Tbsp. green onion, thinly sliced']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '¼ tsp. red pepper flakes']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles according to package directions, rinse under cold water and set aside.\xa0
', '
While water is boiling for the noodles, begin to prepare the sauce. In a small bowl mix together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, honey, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, and red pepper flakes.\xa0
', '
In a large skillet over medium heat, add Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and add in the sauce. Then add in noodles and fried chicken, mix until well coated and combined.\xa0
', '
Top with carrots, purple cabbage, peanuts, cilantro and green onion.
']

Name: orange-garlic-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined  ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil, for sautéing', '¾ cup bell pepper, chopped ', '1 ¼ cup sugar snap peas ', '4 cloves garlic, minced ', '2 tsp. fresh ginger, minced ', '2 tsp. rice wine vinegar', 'white rice for serving', '1 green onion, sliced ', 'sesame seeds for garnish  ', '¼ cup cilantro leaves']
Marinade: ['salt and pepper to taste ', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup fresh orange juice ', '1 ½ tsp. orange zest ', '⅓ cup low sodium chicken broth ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. honey ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '⅛ tsp. red pepper flakes ', '2 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together orange juice, orange zest, low sodium chicken broth, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, honey, Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce, lemon juice, red pepper flakes and cornstarch. Set aside. Pat dry the shrimps then place them in a bowl. Marinate with salt and pepper and toss in Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.\xa0\xa0
', '
Heat a skillet over medium high heat then add in olive oil, and wait until it gets hot. Place the shrimps in a single layer and cook for about 1 minute. Then flip on the other side and cook for another minute.\xa0\xa0
', '
Transfer the shrimps to a plate and using the same wok add in the bell peppers and sugar snap peas, allow it to cook for a minute without mixing it. Then stir the vegetables and cook until lightly browned.\xa0
', '
Add in the garlic and ginger to the pan, stir fry for 30 seconds. Deglaze with the rice wine vinegar, then carefully add in the whisked orange sauce, pouring down the side of the pan. Stir until the sauce gathers at the bottom of the pan.\xa0
', '
Let the sauce simmer for about 1-2 minutes. Add in the shrimps to the pan and mix altogether. Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve over a bed of rice and garnish with green onions, sesame seeds and cilantro.\xa0 \xa0\xa0
']

Name: red-curry-chili-lime-coconut-soup
Ingredients: ['1 ½ tsp. vegetable oil ', '1 Tbsp. fresh grated ginger ', '½ stalk lemongrass, minced ', '1 tsp. red curry paste ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling and Dipping Sauce  ', '2 cups chicken broth   ', '1 Tbsp. fish sauce ', '2 ¼ tsp. light brown sugar ', '1 ½ cans of coconut milk ', '2 zucchinis, sliced  ', '1 lb. cooked chicken, shredded']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice ', 'salt to taste ', '1 Tbsp. fresh cilantro, chopped']
Procedure:
['
In a large pot over medium heat, add vegetable oil then stir in the ginger, lemongrass, curry paste and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling and Dipping Sauce in the heated oil for 1 minute.\xa0
', '
Slowly add the chicken broth over the mixture and stir occasionally. Stir in the fish sauce and brown sugar. Simmer for 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Stir in the coconut milk and zucchini. Cook for about 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the chicken and cook for an additional 5 minutes, then add the lime juice and salt. Garnish with the chopped cilantro.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: spring-rolls-2
Ingredients: ['10 spring roll rice papers  ', '4 wonton papers, rolled and fried ', '1 carrot, peeled and thinly sliced  ', '1 cucumber, thinly sliced ', '4 cooked hot dogs, halved lengthwise ', '½ bunch cilantro ', '½ bunch basil ', '5 leaves butter lettuce']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and peanut butter. Mix well and set aside.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a large baking pan, pour warm water. One at a time, take a sheet of rice paper and dip into the warm water for 15-20 seconds until soft yet slightly firm and pliable.\xa0
', '
Immediately remove and place on a flat working surface (ideally a cutting board), pat the wrap dry. Begin filling it starting at the bottom of the paper to make it easier to roll.\xa0\xa0
', '
Fill with a few of each cut fried wonton, carrot sticks, cucumber, hot dogs, cilantro, basil, and butter lettuce.\xa0
', '
Starting with small increments of veggies roll them up tightly like a burrito using your hand to tuck in the filling.\xa0\xa0
', '
Cut the rolls in half and place on a serving platter and serve with Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce mixture.
']

Name: sesame-honey-tofu
Ingredients: ['cooking oil spray ', '12 oz. extra-firm tofu, drained and patted dry', '2 green onions, thinly sliced, for garnish', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. tamari ', '1 cloves garlic, minced ', '1 Tbsp. honey ', '1 Tbsp. fresh ginger, grated ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400℉. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, spray with cooking oil and set aside.\xa0
', '
Pat dry the tofu, cut into triangles and place onto the prepared baking sheet.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the tamari, garlic, honey, ginger, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Drizzle the sauce over the tofu and bake until golden brown on the bottom (about 12-13 minutes).
', '
Flip the tofu and place back in the oven and bake until the other side of the tofu is golden brown (about 10-12 minutes). Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds. Serve immediately.\xa0 \xa0
']

Name: chicken-rolls-in-chili-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['12 ⅓ oz. chicken fillet, thinly sliced', '3 oz. celery, julienned', '1 ½ oz. bamboo shoots/carrot, julienned']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. sugar']
Sauce Mix: ['½ Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Soy Sauce', '6 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1 tsp. corn starch']
Procedure:
['
Mix chicken with marinade.
', '
Put some celery and carrot on chicken slices. Roll up to form rolls. Arrange rolls on serving plate. Steam over high heat for 10 minutes or until done. Pour away excess liquid.
', '
Heat oil. Add sauce mix and heat through. Pour over chicken rolls.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']

\xa0

Name: wontons-with-seasoned-soy-sauce-for-dumplings
Ingredients: ['5 ⅓ oz. Chinese cabbage', '3 oz. minced pork', '1 ½ oz. shrimp, diced', '12 pcs. wonton wrappers', 'as appropriate celery, diced ', 'as appropriate red chili, diced ']
Seasoning: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Dumplings']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '½ Tbsp. corn starch', '½ tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Cook Chinese cabbage in boiling water until tender. Take out and squeeze out most of the water. Chop into small pieces.
', '
Marinate minced pork and shrimp. Stir in Chinese cabbage and divide into 12 portions.
', '
Wrap the filling with wrappers and form into wontons.
', '
Cook wontons in a large pot of boiling water for about 5 minutes or until done.
', '
Drain and put onto a deep serving plate.
', '
Stir in seasoning and sprinkle with celery and red chili. Serve hot.
']

Name: three-delights-salad
Ingredients: ['8 oz. potatoes, peeled and shredded', '3 oz. celery, shredded', '3 oz. pear, peeled and shredded']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Rice Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', 'as appropriate salt']
Procedure:
['
Soak potatoes, celery, and pear in boiling water for 30 seconds. Drain and let dry. Set aside.
', '
Mix Seasoning Sauce, then add all ingredients and combine. Ready to serve.\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: spicy-korean-bbq-prawns
Ingredients: ['1 lb. fresh tiger prawns', '1 cup pineapple, diced']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', 'cooking oil, as appropriate ']
Sauce Mix: ['5½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Korean Barbecue Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Rinse prawns and marinate for 1 hour.
', '
Mix Glazing Sauce in a bowl.\xa0\xa0
', '
Skewer marinated prawns, alternating with diced pineapple, and place on a grill. Brush with Glazing Sauce and grill until heated through.\xa0\xa0
', '
Tips: Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce may be adjusted based on individual’s taste preference.
']

Name: new-style-chinese-salad
Ingredients: ['150 g shredded cucumber ', '120 g shredded roasted turkey meat ', '50 g shredded carrot (s)', '1/2 pc shredded bell pepper (s)']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Red Vinegar ', '1/2 Tbsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Arrange all ingredients on a deep bowl and chill.
', '
Stir in seasoning mix just before serving. Serve cold.
', '
N/A
']

Name: pad-thai
Ingredients: ['8 oz. Thai rice noodles', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 oz. cooked chicken, shredded', '3 oz. shrimp, peeled', '1 oz. onions, julienned', '2 oz. dried onion slices', '1 oz. red bell pepper, julienned', '1 oz. green onions, chopped', '2 eggs, beaten ', '1 oz. Chinese chives, chopped ', '2 oz. bean sprouts', '2 oz. fried tofu, cut into pieces', '2 Tbsp. roasted peanuts, chopped', '2 lime wedges']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pad Thai Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1/2 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Soak the Thai rice noodles in boiling water for about 10 minutes until they become soft. Drain and put them aside.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil to the hot pot. Stir-fry the shredded chicken and the peeled shrimp until golden brown, then take them out and put aside.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil into the hot pot, stir-fry the julienned onions, dried onion slices, red bell peppers, and green onions until fragrant.\xa0
', '
Add the beaten eggs to the vegetables, scrambling and breaking them into small pieces until they’re just done.\xa0
', '
Add the Thai rice noodles, Chinese chives, bean sprouts, peeled shrimp, shredded chicken, fried tofu, and seasoning sauce, then quickly stir.
', '
Topped with fried peanuts and lime wedges on the side of the dish. Ready to Serve.
']

Name: asparagus-salad-with-sesame-oil
Ingredients: ['100g asparagus', '½ tsp. sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ml6WjV1wMss&feature=youtu.be
', '
Mix Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and sugar in a bowl. Wash asparagus and blanch in boiling water for 30 seconds.\xa0
', '
Cool asparagus in an ice bath, then cut into small pieces and drizzle sauce on top and add sesame seeds for garnish.\xa0
']

Name: yam-and-mushroom-rice-with-sesame-oil
Ingredients: ['dried shrimps', '5 pcs. shiitake mushrooms', 'a few slices of ginger', '1 pc. taro, diced', '1 cup fragrant rice', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Black Sesame Oil', 'corn kernels']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. rice wine', '½ Tbsp. mirin', 'a pinch of Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Powder']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TonFDzl-Dbk&feature=youtu.be
', '
Soak to soften dried shrimps and shiitake mushrooms separately (reserve the mushroom soaking water for later use). Slice the mushrooms and ginger, then place diced taro pieces evenly on the rice in a rice cooker, add water and allow them to cook.
', '
Slowly sauté the ginger slices with 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Black Sesame Oil, and add mushroom, dried shrimps and corn kernels to stir fry.\xa0
', '
Add in Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, rice wine, mirin and mushroom soaking water and cook until fragrant. Mix the ingredients with taro rice, and add 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Pure Black Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Powder.\xa0
']

Name: garlic-chicken-linguine-with-sesame-oil
Ingredients: ['4 pcs. garlic cloves (grated)', '1 Tbsp. goji berries', '80 g linguine', '4 pcs. ginger', '75 g chicken breast', '1 Tbsp. rice wine']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'a pinch of salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WF7CnHxhAqE&feature=youtu.be
', '
Mix grated garlic with 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Then soak to soften goji berries in warm water (reserve the goji berries water for later use).
', '
Boil water with 1 tsp. salt and cook linguine in boiling water.
', '
Slowly sauté ginger slices with 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and pan-sear chicken breast. Deglaze with goji berries water and rice wine. Pour in linguine, then when the sauce thickens, add goji berries and garlic sesame oil. Sauté evenly, turn off heat and add a pinch of salt. Enjoy!\xa0
']

Name: broccoli-beef
Ingredients: ['8 oz. broccoli, cut into pieces', '8 oz. flank steak, sliced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Original Stir-Fry Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cut broccoli into pieces and parboil. Drain and set aside.
', '
Heat add 2 Tbsp. cooking oil in a wok over high heat, stir-fry sliced flank steak with 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Original Stir-Fry Sauce.\xa0
', '
When beef is half cooked, add broccoli. Stir-fry until cooked through. Stir in additional 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Original Stir-Fry Sauce, mix well, serve.
']

Name: chili-garlic-paste
Ingredients: ['8 oz. red jalapeno peppers   ', '½  cup Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic  ', '1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. sugar', '⅓ cup white distilled vinegar ', '1 Tbsp. water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
In a blender, combine the peppers, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, salt, sugar and vinegar. Blend on medium speed until chunky. Remove ¼ of the mixture.\xa0
', '
Turn the blender on high to liquefy the remaining contents of the blender.\xa0
', '
Strain the mixture so you are just left with the liquid.\xa0
', '
Add the strained liquid and reserved chunky bits from the removed ¼ mixture to a pot and heat over a medium high heat until warm.\xa0
', '
Mix together the water and cornstarch to create a slurry then add it to the mixture and bring to a boil. Once boiled, remove from heat and allow to cool completely.\xa0
', '
Transfer to an airtight container and use as desired.\xa0 \xa0
']

Name: cilantro-lime-shrimp-skewers
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. peeled and deveined shrimp  ', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil  ', '½ bunch cilantro, chopped']
Marinade: ['½  cup Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce ', '1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. black pepper ', '½ tsp. ground ginger ', '1 tsp. garlic powder ']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, mix the shrimp, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, salt, pepper, ginger, and garlic powder. Mixing well to ensure the shrimp is evenly coated. Cover and let it marinate for 7-10 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a large nonstick skillet over medium high heat, add in ½ the vegetable oil and wait until it is hot. Add in ½ the shrimp and cook for 3 minutes on each side, making sure to flip over and get a nice sear on each side. Repeat with the other half.
', '
Transfer the shrimp to a serving platter and garnish with cilantro.\xa0
']

Name: cold-spicy-peanut-sesame-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 lb. Asian rice noodles', '2 green onions, chopped for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles according to the package and set aside when done.
', '
In a blender, combine water, peanut butter,\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, rice vinegar, brown sugar, sesame seeds, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, ginger and garlic. Process until smooth.\xa0
', '
Place noodles in a large bowl and pour the peanut sauce over. Gently toss to coat. Cover with plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator for an hour.\xa0
', '
Toss prior to serving and garnish with green onions.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: lemongrass-pork-banh-mi-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 lb. diced pork ', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '2 cups white rice, cooked ', '1 cup shredded carrots', '2 cucumbers, thinly sliced  ', '1 jalapeno, thinly sliced  ', '2 radishes, thinly sliced  ', '1 cup purple cabbage, thinly sliced   ', '½ bunch cilantro, chopped', 'lime wedges for garnish']
Marinade: ['½  cup Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce  ']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, mix the pork and Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce letting it marinate for 7-10 minutes.
', '
While the pork is marinating, chop and prep garnishes.\xa0
', '
In a large nonstick skillet, add in the vegetable oil and wait until it is hot. Add in the pork and stir occasionally until it has browned and fully cooked.\xa0
', '
Begin building bowls by placing rice at the base, then the pork, carrots, cucumbers, jalapeno, radishes, purple cabbage and drizzle of mayonnaise. Garnish with cilantro and lime wedges.\xa0
']

Name: vegetable-sushi
Ingredients: ['4 cups sushi rice, cooked  ', '4 sheets roasted nori', '8 sticks cucumber ', '8 sticks carrot ', '8 slices avocado']
Sauce Mix: ['2 ⅕ Tbsp. rice vinegar ', '1 Tbsp. sugar ', '¾ tsp. salt   ']
Procedure:
['
In a small pot over medium heat, add the rice vinegar, sugar, salt and whisk to combine. Bring the mixture to a boil and whisk till all ingredients have dissolved. Remove from heat.\xa0
', '
Add in the cooked sushi rice to a large bowl and the vinegar mixture until it is well combined.
', '
Place 1 sheet of nori over a bamboo sushi mat. Place one cup of rice on top of the nori. Fill a small bowl with water to dip your fingers into. Using your fingers spread the rice evenly over the nori, leaving a 1 inch border at the top to seal the roll.\xa0
', '
On the bottom quarter of the nori, layer the cucumber, carrot, and avocado. Use your fingers to hold the vegetables in place while you begin to roll the nori. Making sure to squeeze the bamboo mat around as you roll the nori to make it tight. Transfer the sushi roll to a cutting board and cut in half then into quarters.\xa0
', '
Place rolls on a serving platter and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Repeat.
', '
(Optionall) Use Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce as a dipping sauce.
']

Name: ponzu-plum-roasted-brussel-sprouts
Ingredients: ['1 - 12 oz. package brussel sprouts, halved  ', '¼ cup parsley for garnish, chopped ']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce   ', '3 Tbsp. olive oil  ', '2 Tbsp. honey ', '1 ½ tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce, olive oil, honey, salt and pepper. Set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large mixing bowl, place brussel sprouts and add Ponzu Plum mixture over ensuring all the brussel sprouts are evenly coated.\xa0
', '
Place an even layer on the baking sheet and roast in the oven for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Once done roasting, transfer to a serving platter and garnish with parsley.\xa0
']

Name: shiitake-mushroom-ravioli
Ingredients: ['1 - 20 oz. package four-cheese ravioli ', '4 cups shiitake mushrooms', '¾ cup butter ']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 ½  tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. pepper', '¼ cup fresh parsley leaves, chopped']
Procedure:
['
Cook ravioli as instructed on the package and set aside.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a large skillet, add mushrooms and cook until dried out, stirring occasionally. (about 4-6 minutes)\xa0
', '
Once mushrooms are dried, add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, stirring to coat. Then add in the butter to melt, seasoning with salt and pepper.\xa0\xa0
', '
Place the ravioli into the sauce along with the sage. Gently spoon over the butter mixture onto the ravioli. Garnish with additional parsley if desired.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: spicy-garlic-egg-plant
Ingredients: ['2 pcs. (about 12 oz.) eggplants, cut into strips', '3 oz. minced pork', '1 Tbsp. oil']

Deep-fry eggplants in hot oil or cook in boiling water. Drained.
', '
Stir-fry minced pork in 1 Tbsp. oil until done. Add Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Spicy Garlic Egg-Plant and eggplants.
', '
Stir well until heated through.
']

Ingredients: ['12 oz. chicken meat, cut into pieces', '4 Tbsp. oil', '6 shallots, skinned and crushed', '2 ginger slices', '2 green onion stalks, sectioned\t\t']
Seasoning: ['1 pouch Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Black Bean Chicken']
Procedure:

Sauté chicken in 1 Tbsp. oil golden yellow. Drain and set aside.

', '
Stir in green onions and serve.
']

Name: sichuan-style-mabo-tofu
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. ground pork or beef', '1 pkg. silken tofu (14 oz.)', '2 Tbsp. green onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['1 pouch Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Sichuan Style Mabo Tofu (Hot)']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil and sauté meat over low heat. Turn off the heat after meat is fully cooked and completely separated. Pour Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Sichuan Style Mabo Tofu (Hot) over meat and mix well.
', '
Add tofu to pan and stir gently. Cover with a lid and continue to cook over low heat.
', '
Sprinkle green onions on top. Cook over high heat until sauce is thickened.
', '
Tips: Dice tofu and blanch in boiling water for 2 minutes. Then drain and set aside. The tofu will taste better.
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-pork-ribs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. pork ribs', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 ginger slices', '2 green onion stalks']
Seasoning: ['1/8 cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '4 oz. rock sugar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Choy Sun Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Choy Sun Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Cut the ribs into sections. Rinse the meat and drain the water. Marinate the ribs with 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Choy Sun Oyster Flavored Sauce for 1 hour for best flavor.
', '
Add oil to a heated pan, stir fry ginger, green onion and pork ribs, add Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar, rock sugar, plus 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Choy Sun Oyster Flavored Sauce to cook until boiled. Cover pan and simmer for 20 minutes over low heat.
', '
When the sauce thickens, add Lee Kum Kee Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce for coloring. Cook over high heat until the sauce becomes shiny and thickens, then ready to serve.
']

Name: hot-and-sour-soup
Ingredients: ['6 cups of water', '1/4 pkg. tofu, cut into strips', '6 oz. bamboo shoots, julienned', '3 oz. cloud ear fungus, julienned', '4 oz. dried mushroom, julienned', '2 eggs, beaten', '1 Tbsp. green onions, chopped', '1 Tbsp. cilantro, finely chopped', '4 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Peppercorn Grinder', '3 Tbsp. cooking wine']
Procedure:
['
Add all ingredients (except eggs, green onion, and cilantro) to 6 cups of water, bring to a boil.
', '
Add all seasoning ingredients and lightly stir, bring to a boil again. Thicken soup with cornstarch. Add eggs and stir well. Serve in a bowl.
', '
Sprinkle green onions and cilantro on top.
']

Name: black-fungus-salad
Ingredients: ['6 oz. whole black fungus, soaked ', '1 Tbsp. red bell pepper, chopped', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic']

Procedure:
['
Cook black fungus in boiling water for about 1 min. Then rinse in ice water. Drain and let dry.
', '
Combine all seasoning ingredients with the remaining ingredients, and add to black fungus. Stir well. Ready to serve.
', '
N/A

Name: braised-shrimp
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '12 oz. \tshrimp (with head and shell)', '1 stalk green onion (chopped)', '2 slices ginger', '2 cloves garlic (chopped)', 'appropriate amount of water ']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. sugar', 'a pinch ground pepper', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan, add cooking oil and stir fry shrimp for 3 minutes.
', '
Put in green onion, ginger, garlic and stir fry till fragrant.\xa0
', '
Then add in Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce, sugar and pepper.
', '
Add in water and stir fry evenly.
', '
Turn on high heat to thicken the sauce, put in Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (no MSG) and Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil. Stir fry to even before serving on plate.
']

Name: stir-fried-beef-with-mushroom
Ingredients: ['6 pcs. king oyster mushrooms', '6 oz. thickly sliced beef\t ', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. chopped green onions\t\t', '2 Tbsp. minced red chili pepper']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder\t\t\t                            ', '1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce\t\t\t']
Procedure:
['
Cut mushrooms to thick slices. Mix mushrooms, sliced beef, and the seasoning sauce well.\xa0
', '
Heat up 3 Tbsp. of cooking oil in a wok. Pan-fry mushroom over high heat until both sides turn golden brown. Same way to cook beef slices. Then place mushrooms and beef on a plate.
', '
Heat up 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil to sauté Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, green onions and red chili till fragrant. Sprinkle them on top of mushrooms and beef. Ready to serve.
']

Name: oyster-mushrooms-and-chinese-broccoli-in-abalone-sauce
Ingredients: ['14 oz. oyster mushrooms', '4 ¼ cup water', '8–10 Chinese broccoli (mustard stalks) ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 ginger slices', '1 green onion stalk']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon  ', '2 Tbsp. salt', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Abalone Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Slice oyster mushrooms and set aside.\xa0
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon and salt to 4 cups water and bring to a boil. Place sliced mushrooms into boiling water for 30 seconds; drain and set aside. Place Chinese broccoli into boiling water until cooked through; drain and place along the edge of the plate.\xa0
', '
Heat cooking oil in a wok, sauté ginger slices and green onion. Mix Lee Kum Kee Abalone Sauce with ¼ cup water and pour into wok, then add mushrooms, simmer for 3 minutes and remove ginger and green onion. Add Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and pure over the top of Chinese broccoli. Ready to serve.
', '
Tips: Oyster mushrooms can be found in most markets as canned products.
']

Name: selected-five-spices-marinade-platter
Ingredients: ['1 cup water', '9 oz. chicken wings', '1 hard boiled egg', '9 oz. fried tofu']
Seasoning: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Selected Five Spices Marinade']
Procedure:
['
Boil Lee Kum Kee Selected Five Spices Marinade and water.\xa0
', '
Add chicken wings, hard boiled egg and fried tofu. Bring to boil, turn to low heat and braise for 30 minutes. Turn occasionally.\xa0
', '
Take the ingredients out, drain and ready to serve.
']

Name: abalone-flavored-noodle-soup-with-spam
Ingredients: ['8 oz. whole-egg noodles            ', '3 cups water                                                           ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '4 broccoli rabe, with leaves  ', '3 pcs. spam, sliced ½" thick', '1 egg ', '2 fresh ginger slices  ', '1 Tbsp. dried shrimp  ', '1 can chicken broth, unsalted ']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Abalone Sauce                         ', '¼ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Boil noodles in 2 ½ cups water for about 2 minutes. Take out and drain. Mix evenly with 1 tsp. oil, place at the bottom of a bowl. Boil broccoli rabe and place inside the bowl.\xa0
', '
Pan-fry the spam on both sides until golden brown; make a sunny-side-up egg (or well-done depending on your preference).\xa0
', '
Heat oil in a hot pan, sauté ginger slices till golden brown. Add dried shrimp, chicken broth, and remaining half-cup water. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Abalone Sauce and salt, and boil gently over low heat for about 10 minutes. Strain out the ginger slices and dried shrimp, then combine soup with noodles and broccoli. Garnish with fried egg. Serve hot.\xa0
']

Name: garlic-roasted-broccoli-with-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. grapeseed oil', '12 oz. bag of fresh broccoli florets', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, set aside.
', '
In a large bowl, whisk together grapeseed oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce.\xa0\xa0
', '
Add in broccoli florets and coat evenly.\xa0
', '
Place on the prepared baking sheet and roast for 25 minutes.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving platter, garnish with sesame seeds and enjoy with your favorite entree.
']

Name: kimchi-udon-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 packet fresh udon noodles ', '3 strip bacon, roughly chopped ', '1 cup store bought kimchi, roughly chopped', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 bunch green onions, sliced ', '2 fried eggs']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil  ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce    ', '1 ½ Tbsp. honey ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ Tbsp. rice vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Cook udon noodles according to the package and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and rice vinegar, then set aside.
', '
In a large skillet on high heat, cook bacon until it is cooked making sure not to make it crispy.\xa0 \xa0
', '
Add in the kimchi and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, sauté for 1 minute.
', '
Add the udon noodles, sauce mixture and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Mix well and top with green onions and fried egg!
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: lemon-pepper-cauliflower-wings
Ingredients: ['1 large cauliflower, cut into florets  ', '1 ½ Tbsp. olive oil ', '½ cup flour ', '1 cup plain breadcrumbs', '6 Tbsp. milk ', 'parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. garlic powder']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 425°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, set aside.
', '
In a large bowl drizzle florets with olive oil. Toss with flour and garlic powder until evenly coated.\xa0
', '
In a food processor, pulse breadcrumbs. Coat the cauliflower with milk and toss well in breadcrumbs.\xa0
', '
Arrange in a single layer on the baking sheet. Bake on the middle rack for 25 minutes.
', '
Dip the cauliflower into the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce and bake for an additional 15 minutes. Then broil for 4 minutes watching to ensure it will not burn.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with parsley.\xa0
']

Name: hoisin-chicken-cabbage-tacos
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. grapeseed oil', '1 ½ lb. shredded chicken', '1 green cabbage, washed, leaves removed  ', '2 persian cucumbers, spiralized', '2 carrots, shredded ', '3 mini red or orange bell peppers, thinly sliced ', '3 radishes, thinly sliced', '½ head purple cabbage, thinly sliced', '1 jalapeño, seeded and thinly sliced ', '½ cup cilantro  ', '(optional) 1 avocado, sliced ', 'sesame seeds, for garnish ', 'lime wedges, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a skillet over medium heat, add the grapeseed oil and let it get warm. Add shredded chicken and season with salt and pepper. Cook until browned.\xa0
', '
Once chicken has browned, add Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, cook for an additional 4 minutes.
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and begin building cabbage tacos adding cucumbers, carrots, bell peppers, radishes, purple cabbage, jalapeños, cilantro, avocado (optional), and sesame seeds and lime wedges.
']

Name: spicy-dan-dan-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 package thick egg noodles', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '1 lb. ground pork  ', '2 heads baby bok choy, halved lengthwise', '¼ cup cilantro leaves  ', '2 Tbsp. sliced green onions, for garnish ', '1 Tbsp. peanuts, for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Chinese black vinegar']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce    ', '1 Tbsp. Chinese black vinegar ', '1 Tbsp. honey ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. water', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles according to the package and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large skillet over medium high heat, pour vegetable oil and add ground pork meat. Breaking up with a spatula, cook until the meat has a brown and crispy appearance. Then add Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and 1 Tbsp. Chinese black vinegar. Mix well and cook till liquid has evaporated.\xa0\xa0
', '
Remove meat and set aside, in the same skillet, add the bok choy and sauté 3-5 minutes.
', '
In a small bowl, combine remaining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Chinese black vinegar, honey, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, water and garlic. Whisk to combine.\xa0
', '
Mix sauce into noodles. Divide between 4 bowls and top with pork, bok choy, cilantro, green onions and peanuts.\xa0
']

Name: vietnamese-noodle-bowl-with-lemongrass-tofu
Ingredients: ['8 oz. vermicelli noodles\xa0', '1 brick firm tofu, cut into 1" triangles', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 cups shredded cabbage mix', 'cilantro, for garnish ', '½ red bell pepper, thinly sliced ', '½ green bell pepper, thinly sliced', 'lime wedge, for garnish ', 'sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Thai chilies, thinly sliced ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil  ', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar ', '½ tsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles as directed on the package and set aside.
', '
In a medium sized bowl, mix together tofu and Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, ensuring that the tofu is covered on all sides.\xa0
', '
In a large skillet over medium high heat, add vegetable oil and begin frying the tofu, turning over on each side to make them even and crispy all around.\xa0\xa0
', '
In a medium bowl, combine Thai chilies, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, rice vinegar and honey. Whisk well to combine.\xa0
', '
In the same bowl add the shredded cabbage, mix and give a good toss.\xa0
', '
Divide noodles, tofu, and cabbage mix between 4 bowls. Garnish with cilantro, sliced bell peppers, lime wedges, and sesame seeds.\xa0
']

Name: kung-pao-chicken-2
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1" pcs or smaller', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 red bell pepper, diced ', '6 green onions, cut into 1" pcs', '½ cup roasted peanuts', 'butter lettuce for serving']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. sherry wine', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap', '2 tsp. baking soda  ', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Sauce Mix: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. balsamic vinegar', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized bowl, combine chicken, 1 Tbsp. sherry wine, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, 3 Tbsp. Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap, 2 tsp. baking soda and 1 tsp. cornstarch, mix well, cover and let it marinate for 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together remaining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Hoisin sauce, balsamic vinegar, 1 tsp. cornstarch and sugar.\xa0
', '
Heat a large skillet over high heat, and add 2 Tbsp. of the vegetable oil and add in chicken. Cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally until it has browned then set aside.\xa0
', '
In the same skillet, add the remaining oil. Mix in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, and bell pepper then stir fry for 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Mix the prepared sauce, then pour into the stir fry mixture. Bring to a boil and stir. Once sauce begins to thicken, add the chicken back into the pan and mix well until the chicken has been evenly coated. Add in green onions and peanuts, cook for an additional 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Serve immediately with butter lettuce and your favorite Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce.
']

Name: garlic-lemon-butter-chicken-skillet
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken thighs ', '1 lb. green beans, trimmed', '3 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. parsley, minced for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic  ', '1 tsp. onion powder ', '¼ tsp. salt ', '¼ tsp. fresh cracked black pepper  ', '¼ tsp. crushed red chili flakes ', '1 tsp. paprika ', 'zest of 1 lemon', 'juice of ½ a lemon']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized bowl, whisk together olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, onion powder, salt, black pepper, crushed red chili flakes, paprika, lemon zest and juice.\xa0
', '
Place chicken thighs in a plastic zip up bag and pour the marinade over, making sure to coat all the chicken, getting rid of any excess air in the bag.\xa0\xa0
', '
Leave in the fridge overnight turning over twice. In a medium sized saucepan, fill with water and bring to a boil. Add in green beans for 30 seconds, strain and set aside.
', '
In a large skillet on medium heat, add 1 ½ Tbsp. of butter. Once the butter has melted, place chicken in the skillet and let it brown before turning. Cook each side 5-7 minutes or until cooked through.\xa0
', '
After flipping the chicken over add in the remaining butter and toss in green beans to finish cooking with the chicken. Garnish with parsley, serve and enjoy!
']

Name: hoisin-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil  ', 'sesame seeds for garnish ', 'green onions for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. cracked black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar ', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, whisk together rice wine vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, set aside.
', '
Season shrimp with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Heat a large skillet over medium high heat, add in olive oil and wait for it to get hot. Add in shrimp and sauté on both sides for 2-3 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
Add in the sauce mixture and mix well, keep on the heat for an additional 1-2 minutes until the shrimp is evenly coated. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.\xa0
']

Name: asian-pork-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground pork ', '2 Tbsp. red onion, minced ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. cilantro, for garnish  ', '1 Tbsp. Thai chili, sliced for garnish ', '2 green onions chopped, for garnish   ', '2 cups cooked white rice', '2 zucchini, sliced']
Marinade: ['½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil    ', '½ tsp. salt ', '½ tsp. fresh cracked black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, and set aside.
', '
In a bowl, combine ground pork, red onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, salt,\xa0 pepper, and mix well.\xa0\xa0
', '
Using a tablespoon as a measure, create the meatballs and line on the baking sheet.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce and chili sauce. Using a pastry brush to glaze each meatball.\xa0
', '
Bake in the oven for 20 minutes, transfer to a serving platter and garnish with cilantro, Thai chilies, and green onion. Or serve over rice with sliced zucchini.
']

Name: hong-kong-style-borscht
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '12 oz. celery', '12 oz. carrot', '1 lb. cabbage', '6 pcs. tomatoes', '1 lb. potato', '2 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. minced garlic', '8 oz. onion', '2 gal. water', '4 pcs. bay leaves']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder', '2 tsp. salt', '2 packs Lee Kum Kee Tomato Soup Base ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)']
Procedure:
['
Season the beef with Lee Kum Kee Black Peppercorn Grinder and salt, pan-fry it with a small amount of oil until both sides are golden-brown. Remove from pan and cut into cubes.
', '
Chop up the vegetables. Peel the potatoes and cut them into cubes.
', '
Heat the cooking oil in a soup pot. Sauté the minced garlic and onion slices with butter. Add the vegetables and stir-fry until fragrant. Add water, Lee Kum Kee Tomato Soup Base, Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken, beef and bay leaves. Simmer for about 1 hour.
']

Name: mabo-tofu
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. ground pork or beef', '14 oz. silken tofu (diced, drained, and dried)', '2 Tbsp. medium-size scallion, chopped']
Seasoning: ['1 pack  Lee Kum Kee Sauce For Mabo Tofu']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil and sauté meat over low heat. Turn off heat after meat is fully cooked and completely separated. Put 1 pkg. of Lee Kum Kee Sauce For Mabo Tofu over meat and mix well.
', '
Add tofu to pan and stir gently. Cover with a lid and continue to cook over low heat.
', '
Sprinkle scallions on top. Cook over high heat until sauce is thickened.
', '
Tip: The tofu will taste even better if blanching in boiling water for 2 minutes and then draining before adding to the pan to cook.
']

Name: chinese-chive-and-shrimp-omelet
Ingredients: ['6 pcs. eggs     ', '8 oz. Chinese chives    ', '6 oz. shrimp (peeled, deveined, tail-off) ', '2 Tbsp. corn starch ', '1 Tbsp. water ', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce    ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil    ', '1 tsp. salt        ', '2 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Beat the eggs into a mixture. Cut the Chinese chives into sections, add them to the egg mixture, and mix well. Blanch the shrimp till 70% cooked, add them to the egg mixture, and mix well too.
', '
Add the seasoning. Mix the corn starch with 1 Tbsp. of water and add it to egg mixture.\xa0
', '
Heat up a wok and pour oil into it. Add all ingredients to the wok, and flip omelet over to pan-fry until both sides turn golden brown. Ready to serve.
']

Name: wuxi-spare-ribs
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 lb. pork ribs', '4 ginger slices ', '4 garlic cloves', '2 scallion stalks', '1/8 cup Shaoxing cooking wine', '3 cups water ', '1 pc. cinnamon, small', '4 pcs. star anise', '4 oz. rock sugar', '2 pcs. tsaoko amomum fruit     ', '1 Tbsp. corn starch']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Spare Rib Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Power Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added)', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '1/4 cup ketchup']
Procedure:
['
Heat up a wok and pour cooking oil into it. Pan-fry the pork ribs until golden brown. Add ginger, garlic, and scallion to sauté.
', '
Add Shaoxing cooking wine and let it cook for a while. And then, add water, other ingredients (except corn starch) and all the seasonings. Cover the wok with a lid and simmer for 50 minutes until the sauce starts to be absorbed. Place the ribs on a plate.
', '
Add corn starch to thicken up the sauce in the wok. Pour the sauce over the pork ribs and ready to serve.
']

Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.

Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: stuffed-napa-cabbage-rolls
Ingredients: ['6 large napa cabbage leaves        ', '1 Tbsp. goji berries        ', '6 oz. minced pork         ', '3 oz. finely chopped shrimp        ', '1/8 boX tofu         ', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic ', '1 Tbsp. green onion, finely chopped      ', '1 egg         ', '2 Tbsp. corn starch       ', '½ tsp. ground white pepper      ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce   ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil     ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) ', '(optional) 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seafood XO Sauce']
Procedure:
['
First, blanch napa cabbage in boiling water and then soak in cold water. Remove and set aside. Soak the goji berries in warm water.
', '
Add chopped shrimp and other ingredients to the minced pork. Season with 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Flavored with Chicken. Stir the mixture until it sticks together. Divide the mixture into 6 portions.
', '
Spread out the napa cabbage leaves. Add a portion of pork mixture to each leaf and roll it up. Place them on a plate. Sprinkle goji berries over them. Steam over boiling water for 15 mins and remove. Drain excess water.
', '
Heat up cooking oil and drizzle over the cooked napa cabbage rolls, and then drizzle 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce. Ready to serve.\xa0
', '
Optional: Serve with Lee Kum Kee Seafood XO Sauce on top of napa cabbage rolls.\xa0
']

Name: braised-chicken-and-rice-in-a-pot
Ingredients: ['half fresh free-range chicken', '1 cup rice', '2 cups water', '1 fresh lily bulb', '3 oz. ginkgo', '1 Tbsp. goji berries', '1 egg ', '4 pcs. cilantro']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. ginger, shredded', '1 Tbsp. green onion, shredded', '1 Tbsp. corn starch ', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine ', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Flavored with Chicken (No MSG Added) ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce    ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
First, wash and dry the free range chicken. Cut the chicken into strips. Add the marinade ingredients to the chicken strips (reserve half of Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Flavored with Chicken for later). Mix evenly and marinate for 10 mins.
', '
Wash the rice and drain. Mix 2 cups of water with ½ Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Flavored with Chicken to make the broth and pour into rice. Boil on low heat until the rice is half cooked.
', '
Spread the marinated chicken pieces on the rice. Add fresh lily bulb, ginkgo and goji berries. Cover and cook on low heat for 30 mins. Crack an egg and add it on top of the ingredients. Simmer for 3 minutes until done and garnish with cilantro.
']

Name: tomato-flavored-beef-fusilli
Ingredients: ['6 oz. fusilli ', '6 oz. beef slices', '2 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic', '2 oz.onion, julienned', '2 oz. red pepper, julienned', '2 oz. green peppe, rjulienned', '4 oz. tomato', '1 cup water']
Seasoning: ['1/2 pack Lee Kum Kee Tomato Soup Base              ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Boil the fusilli with water until it is thoroughly cooked. Remove from pot and drain. Blanch the beef with boiling water until half cooked. Remove from pot and drain.
', '
Heat up a pan, add butter, and sauté the garlic and vegetables till fragrant. Add all the seasoning ingredients and water. Add the fusilli and let it cook till the sauce is evenly coated.
', '
Add the beef slices, stir-fry a little bit and ready to serve.
', '
Tips:\xa0May use other types of pasta based on personal preference.
']

Name: lettuce-wrap-with-shrimp
Ingredients: ['half of a lettuce', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. minced ginger', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic ', '2 oz. chopped onions', '1 lb. chopped shrimp (peeled, deveined, tail-off)', '2 oz. chopped black fungus', '2 oz. chopped bamboo shoots ', '1 oz. chopped fresh mushroom', '3 Tbsp. chopped scallion']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce   ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce   ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the lettuce with water. Peel the leaves off gently and drain.
', '
Heat up a wok and pour cooking oil into it. Sauté the minced ginger, minced garlic, and chopped onions. Add the remaining ingredients and sauté until fragrant. Add 2 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, the remaining seasoning and sauté over high heat until fragrant.
', '
Put the sautéed shrimp mixture on the lettuce leaves and drizzle the remaining Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce over.\xa0 Ready to serve.
']

Name: delicious-brown-braised-pork
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. pork belly', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. cooking wine', '2 green onion stalks, cut into pieces', '4 ginger slices, minced', '6 garlic cloves ', '3 cups hot water']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Brown Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce (adjust as needed)']
Procedure:
['
Cook the pork belly in water until medium well done. Rinse and drain, then cut it into 1-inch cubes.
', '
Heat cooking oil, stir-fry pork belly cubes till golden brown. Add cooking wine and bring to a boil, then stir in green onion, ginger, garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute. Add Lee Kum Kee Brown Cooking Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce, and cook over medium heat for a couple minutes until the sauce is absorbed.
', '
Add hot water and cook over high heat until sauce thickens. Ready to serve.
']

Name: hainanese-chicken-rice
Ingredients: ['*****Hainanese Chicken*****', '-----Ingredients-----', '1 whole chicken (about 2½ lbs.)', '1 tsp. cooking oil', '2 ginger slices', '2 green onion stalks', '2 lemongrass stalks, crushed', '¼ cup Shaoxing cooking wine', 'water as needed', '-----Seasoning-----', '2 star anise pods', '1 cinnamon stick', '1 tsp. turmeric powder ', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '8 Tbsp. salt   ']
Marinade: ['*****Chicken Flavored Rice*****', '-----Ingredients-----', '3 cups white rice ', '6 cups water', '1/8 cup coconut milk', '1 green onion stalk', '2 ginger slices', '2  lemongrass stalks', '5 Tbsp. butter                                                      ', '-----Seasoning-----', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
Hainanese Chicken

Directions

1. Clean chicken. Drain and pat dry.

2. Heat oil in large pot, sauté ginger, green onion, and lemongrass (crushed). Add cooking wine and water (water should cover the entire chicken). Add all seasoning ingredients.

3. Bring to a boil, then set on low heat and cook for 10 minutes. Place chicken in seasoning broth, keep on low heat and simmer 45 min. until fully cooked. Remove chicken, drain, and let cool. Debone and cut into pieces. 
', '
Chicken Flavored Rice

Directions

1. Rinse rice with water. Drain and place in rice cooker.

2. Add water, coconut milk, and 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon. Mix to combine. Place green onion, ginger, and lemongrass on top. Start to cook.

3. Remove green onion, ginger, and lemongrass when rice is finished cooking. Add butter and remaining 3 Tbsp. Concentrated Chicken Bouillon to rice and mix well. Ready to serve. 
', '
Dipping Sauce

Directions

1. Mix scallion, minced ginger, salt, and Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon. Heat up the cooking oil and pour in ginger and scallion mixture. Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil and mix well.

2. Use the ginger and scallion mixture from Step 1 and Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce for Hainanese Chicken as dipping sauces.
']

Name: chinese-yam-with-sesame-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. fresh chinese yam (nagaimo) ', '2 cups water ', '1 Tbsp. salt ', '1 tsp. roasted white sesame seeds ']
Seasoning: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Sauce       ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce     ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. warm water ']
Procedure:
['
Peel the Chinese yam and cut into long strips. Soak them in cold water. Combine the seasoning ingredients and mix well with 3 Tbsp. of warm water to create the sauce.
', '
Boil 2 cups of water and add salt. Add Chinese yam strips and cook for about 2 mins. Remove, drain and place them on a plate.
', '
Drizzle the prepared sauce mix over Chinese yam, sprinkle white sesame seeds and ready to serve.
']

Name: cold-noodles-with-sesame-sauce
Ingredients: ['10 oz. dry noodles', '3oz. cucumber, julienned', '3 oz. carrot, julienned']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Supreme Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (no MSG added) ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Mature Vinegar', '1 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles in boiling water according to bag instructions. Afterward, blanch cooked noodles with cold water and drain off excess water. Pour in 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil and mix the noodles. Add cucumber and carrot.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Sesame Sauce, Supreme Seasoning Soy Sauce, Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (no MSG added), Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Mature Vinegar and sugar. Stir until combined and pour over the noodles.\xa0
', '
Serve chilled.\xa0
']

Name: baby-chinese-cabbage-with-garlic-in-broth
Ingredients: ['2 lb. baby Chinese cabbage', '1 oz. Jinhua ham strips', '3-4 pcs. wood ear mushroom', '1/2 Tbsp. goji berry', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 cloves garlic', '4 small ginger slices', '4 cups water']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Japanese Style Pork Bone Soup Base', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Wash baby cabbage and slice into long strips. Steam Jinhua ham and slice into strips. Soak the wood ear mushroom and goji berries in warm water until they have softened.
', '
Heat oil in a wok and sauté garlic and ginger slices. Add water and pour in Lee Kum Kee Japanese Style Pork Bone Soup Base and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Add baby cabbage, goji berries and wood ear mushroom, and braise over low heat for about 10 mins. Lastly, add Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil.\xa0
', '
Serve in a clay pot (casserole). Pour the baby cabbage along with broth into the pot. Add Jinhua ham strips and serve.
']

Name: assorted-veggie-beef-and-seafood-vermicelli-soup
Ingredients: ['1/2 lb. sliced cabbage', '8 oz. sliced beef', '3 oz. shrimp, peeled, deveined, off-tail', '2 oz. assorted fresh mushrooms', '2 small bunches vermicelli', '6 cups water ', '6 pcs. imitation crab sticks', '4 pcs. fish balls', '4 pcs. meatballs', '6-8 stems cilantro & leaves', '1 Tbsp. chopped green onions']
Seasoning: ['1 pack Lee Kum Kee Japanese Style Pork Bone Soup Base', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee White Pepper Grinder', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Blanch sliced cabbage, sliced beef, shrimp, mushrooms and drain. Soak the vermicelli in boiling water for 3 minutes, drain, and set aside.
', '
Boil water, add Lee Kum Kee Japanese Style Pork Bone Soup Base and ground white pepper. Put all the ingredients (except for cilantro and green onions) and boil for around two minutes. Pour the soup and ingredients into a serving bowl.
', '
Sprinkle some cilantro and green onions, drizzle some Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil on top, and ready to serve.
']

Name: tomato-ramen
Ingredients: ['4 cups water ', '2 pcs. fried tofu ', '1  pc. fresh shiitake mushroom, washed', '2 pcs. tomato wedge ', '6 oz. Japanese ramen', '1 pc. baby bok choy, washed']
Seasoning: ['1 pack Lee Kum Kee Tomato Soup Base']
Procedure:
['
Add 4 cups of water and 1 pack of Lee Kum Kee Tomato Soup Base to a large pot. Stir in fried tofu, shiitake mushrooms, tomato and bring to a boil.\xa0
', '
Boil another pot of water and add the ramen, cooking the noodles until they are medium-well. Add the baby bok choy to the pot of ramen and bring the water to a boil, then switch off the burner.\xa0
', '
Put the ramen in a bowl and pour over the tomato soup. Place the shiitake mushrooms, fried tofu, tomato, and baby bok choy on top of the ramen before serving.\xa0
']

Name: lee-kum-kee-laksa-noodles
Ingredients: ['8 oz. boneless chicken leg', '8 pcs. fried tofu ', '2 boiled eggs', '8 oz. shrimp ', '1 lb. fresh yellow noodles ', '8 oz. bean sprouts', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic', '6 cups water', '2 Tbsp. crispy scallion ', 'cilantro as desired']
Seasoning: ['1 pack Lee Kum Kee Laksa Soup Base ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored With Chicken (No MSG Added)']
Procedure:
['
Steep the chicken in boiling water for about 30 minutes until they are cooked. Cut the chicken into strips. Cut the fried tofu and boiled eggs in half. Boil the shrimp for later use.\xa0
', '
Cook the noodles in boiling water for 1 minute. Drain the water and put the noodles in a bowl. Spread the cooked chicken strips, shrimp and boiled eggs across the noodles. Blanch the bean sprouts and drain the water. Put them on top of the noodles.\xa0
', '
Add cooking oil to a heated pot and sauté the garlic, then add the Lee Kum Kee Laksa Soup Base and 6 cups of water. After the mixture comes to a boil, add the fried tofu and Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored With Chicken (No MSG Added), cook for another 1 to 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Pour the soup on top of the of noodles. Sprinkle with crispy scallions and cilantro. Ready to serve.
', '
Tips:
1: You can substitute yellow noodles with rice noodles, or pair with fresh lime juice for a more Southeast Asian flavor.\xa0
2: Coconut milk can also be added to the soup for a stronger coconut flavor.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
