Name: japanese-tantanmen
Ingredients: ['6 oz. Japanese ramen', '1/2 pc. baby bok choy', '50 g minced pork', '1 Tbsp. chopped scallion stalk (white part only)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. white sugar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce for Sushi & Sashimi']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Japanese Style Pork Bone Soup Base ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce for Sushi & Sashimi   ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan)         ', 'Lee Kum Kee Peppercorn Chili Oil, as desired', '1 cup water']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee Japanese Style Pork Bone Soup Base, Soy Sauce for Sushi & Sashimi, Sesame Sauce, Chili Bean Sauce (Toban Djan) and Peppercorn Chili Oil and water into a pot and cook until boiling.\xa0
', '
In another pot of water, bring to a boil and add ramen. Once cooked, drain the water and put the noodles into a bowl.\xa0
', '
Blanch the baby bok choy and drain the water.\xa0
', '
Stir-fry pork in a large skillet, and add the chopped scallion stalk. Add white sugar and 1 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce for Sushi & Sashimi to the meat mixture and stir-fry until cooked.\xa0
', '
Pour the soup into the noodles.
', '
Add baby bok choy and meat mixture on top of noodles. Ready to serve.
']

Name: baked-beet-chips-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 beets, thinly sliced ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '¼ tsp. garlic salt']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 275°F.\xa0
', '
Grease or line a baking sheet.\xa0
', '
Wash and dry the beets, then slice into thin chips using a mandoline.\xa0
', '
Place the beet chips into a bowl along with the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and toss well, then lay out on a tray.\xa0
', '
Place into the oven on the middle rack and bake for 1 hour 40 minutes until beet chips are crispy. Half way through, flip them over. You want them to cook low and slow, as to not burn.\xa0
', '
Take out of the oven and cool for 5 minutes. Once cooled, season with garlic salt, serve in a bowl or save in a reusable or re-sealable bag for later.
']

Name: pho-ap-chao-fried-noodle-with-beef
Ingredients: ['1.5 lb. pho noodle or fresh rice noodles', '5 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1/2 lb. thinly sliced beef   ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 pc. onion, chopped                                           ', '1 pc. carrot, thinly sliced', '8 oz. bean sprouts']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce (Vietnamese Label)', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Gently toss noodles to loosen up.\xa0
', '
Pan-fry noodles in 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil until noodles are cooked through. Remove and set aside.
', '
Heat pan with 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil and stir-fry Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, onion, and carrot until halfway done.
', '
Add beef and continue to cook until done.
', '
Add seasoning mix.
', '
Add noodles, bean sprouts and quickly stir-fry with other mixture. The dish is now ready to serve.\xa0
']

Name: asian-cucumber-salad
Ingredients: ['2 large english cucumbers', '½ red onion, thinly sliced', '½ green onion, sliced', '¼ tsp. red pepper flakes', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. black sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Slice the cucumbers and place them into a mixing bowl. Season with salt and toss.\xa0
', '
Place in the fridge to chill for 30 minutes.
', '
Pat them dry and place them into another bowl along with the sliced red and green onions, red pepper flakes, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, honey and Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce.\xa0
', '
Toss and then place in the refrigerator to chill for 30 minutes.
', '
When ready to serve, take out and garnish with black sesame seeds.
']

Name: asian-chicken-chopped-salad
Ingredients: ['4 cups chicken breast, shredded ', '4 cups green cabbage, shredded', '1 red bell pepper, diced', '1 cup carrots, shredded', '½ cup green onion, sliced ', '½ cup cilantro, chopped + more for topping ', '½ cup peanuts, chopped + more for topping']
Procedure:
['
Mix the shredded chicken, green cabbage, diced bell pepper, shredded carrots, sliced green onion, chopped cilantro and chopped peanuts. Add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrapand give it a few big mixes.\xa0
', '
Place salad into a bowl and garnish with more chopped peanuts and cilantro.
', '
N/A
']

Name: whole-roasted-cauliflower
Ingredients: ['1 head cauliflower', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup grated parmesan cheese + more for topping', '1 Tbsp. fresh Italian flat leaf parsley, chopped']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Remove the leaves from the cauliflower and cut off the bottom stem so that it stands up straight.\xa0
', '
Brush cauliflower with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce, spoon on the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and parmesan cheese.\xa0
', '
Place cauliflower into an oiled Dutch oven. Cover and bake for 40 minutes until fork tender.\xa0
', '
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with more parmesan cheese.
', '
Place into the broiler to crisp the top for 3-5 minutes, but don’t let it burn. Garnish with parsley and serve.
']

Name: spring-pasta-salad
Ingredients: ['1 lb. cooked fusilli pasta', '1 tsp. olive oil', '2 zucchinis, grilled', '½ lb. cooked asparagus (6 stalks)', '1 cup arugula', '1 cup spinach', '⅛ cup pine nuts', '⅓ cup crumbled feta cheese ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
Cook fusilli pasta as directed and then drain and place into a large serving bowl. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Cut zucchini into half-moon slices and toss into a pan over medium heat to cook for 5 minutes until soft. Add cooked zucchini to the pasta.
', '
Cook the chopped asparagus in the same pan for 5 minutes and add that to the pasta.
', '
Add the arugula and spinach to the pasta and toss. Add in the pine nuts and feta and toss again.\xa0
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce and toss one more time. Top with more feta and serve.
']

Name: chicken-curry-with-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless chicken breast', '¼ cup onions, sliced', '1 shallot, chopped', '1 Tbsp. ginger, grated ', '6 oz. rice noodles']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. coconut oil', '3 Tbsp. red curry paste', '1 cup chicken stock', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. ground black pepper', '1 ½ cup coconut milk', '1 Tbsp. honey', '½ lime, juiced', '⅛ cup fresh chopped basil, plus more for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Slice chicken breasts into small pieces then set aside.\xa0
', '
In a large saucepan or dutch oven, add coconut oil along with half the red curry paste and set heat to medium. Add chicken stock and let come to a low boil. Stir to make sure the paste has dissolved into the broth.\xa0
', '
Add in the chicken along with salt and ground black pepper and cook for 5-10 minutes. Then add the coconut milk and stir all together.\xa0
', '
Toss in the sliced onion, chopped shallot, and grated ginger, rest of the red curry paste, honey, lime juice and fresh basil, saving some for topping. Stir and bring to another low boil for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the rice noodles and let cook for another 5-10 minutes. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Style Oil and ladle into a bowl. Garnish with more fresh chopped basil and serve.
']

Name: ham-and-egg-cups
Ingredients: ['cooking oil spray, for muffin pan', '12 slices country ham', '1 cup. shredded cheddar cheese', '12 eggs']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper + some for topping', 'chopped chives, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400ºF.\xa0
', '
Spray muffin tray with oil and then line a piece of ham into each cup, making sure it comes up over the sides.\xa0
', '
Add in a sprinkle of cheddar cheese then crack an egg into each cup. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Bake for 13-15 minutes until the egg is cooked through.\xa0
', '
Take out and put a dollop of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on each egg garnish with chopped chives and pepper to taste (optional).\xa0
']

Name: melon-with-prosciutto-and-basil
Ingredients: ['1 lb. prosciutto', '1 melon, scooped into balls', '1 cup mozzarella balls']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. fresh black pepper ', '¼ cup fresh basil ']
Procedure:
['
Lay the prosciutto on a serving plate, covering the whole plate.\xa0
', '
Cut the melon in half and remove the seeds.
', '
Using a melon baller, scoop out balls and place them onto the prosciutto.\xa0
', '
Add the mozzarella balls and drizzle everything with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Add fresh black pepper, fresh basil and serve right away while cold.
']

Name: daikon-salad
Ingredients: ['2 cups white daikon radish', '2 Tbsp. green onion, sliced', '1 tsp. korean chili flakes ']
Procedure:
['
Peel and slice the daikon radish and place it into a bowl.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce, sliced green onions and korean chili flakes.
', '
Cover and place in the fridge for 30 minutes before serving.\xa0
']

Name: lemon-and-herb-roasted-artichoke
Ingredients: ['4 artichokes', '2 lemons, sliced for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', 'lemon juice', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce', '1 tsp. fresh thyme', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400ºF.
', '
Remove low leaves and trim the points off the artichokes. Cut off the bottoms and slice them in half. Do this for all of them.
', '
Lay artichokes heart side down onto a greased baking tray and drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.\xa0
', '
Spoon Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce on the artichokes. Season with fresh thyme and salt to taste.\xa0
', '
Cover tray with foil and bake for 45-50 minutes until very tender.\xa0 Squeeze lemon juice on top if desired and serve with a side of lemon slices.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: potato-waffles
Ingredients: ['6 potatoes', 'cooking oil spray', '3 Tbsp. green onion, chopped ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '¼ cup grated parmesan cheese', '1 egg, lightly beaten', '(optional) serve with cream cheese spread, lox and fresh dill']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
Peel and shred 6 large potatoes. Place onto paper towels, drain excess water, and then place into a mixing bowl.\xa0
', '
Heat waffle iron and spray with oil on top and bottom.\xa0
', '
Mix the shredded potatoes with the green onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, grated parmesan cheese, egg, salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Scoop 1 large spoonful of potato mixture onto the waffle iron and close. Cook until its golden brown and crispy. Continue making as many as you can with the mixture.\xa0
', '
Serve with cream cheese spread, lox and fresh dill (optional).\xa0
']

Name: coconut-thai-red-chicken-curry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken thighs', '2 cups sweet potato', '12 Thai basil leaves', '(optional) rice for serving ', 'cilantro, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '6 Tbsp. red curry paste', '1 cup chicken stock', '2 cups coconut milk', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce, + some for topping', '1 Tbsp. palm sugar']
Procedure:
['
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium to high heat.\xa0
', '
Add in the red curry paste and cook for 2 minutes. Add the chicken stock, stirring in the paste and simmer for a few minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the coconut milk, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce, palm sugar, and then the chicken thighs.\xa0
', '
Bring to a simmer on medium heat for 8-10 minutes until sauce reduces even more. Taste it here to see if it needs anything.
', '
Add the sweet potato and continue to simmer until the sweet potato is soft. Remove from heat and stir in the Thai basil leaves.\xa0
', '
Serve over rice (optional) with a drizzle more of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce on top and roughly chopped cilantro.\xa0
']

Name: grilled-salmon-skewers-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. salmon fillet, cubed', '1 tsp. red pepper', '½ red onion, cut into chunks', '1 lemon, sliced', 'parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. lemon juice', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cut the salmon into cubes and then place them into a bowl along with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce. Let them marinate for an hour before cooking.\xa0
', '
Soak the wooden skewers in water for at least an hour before using or use metal ones.
', '
When ready to cook, add the salmon cubes to the skewers with red pepper, onion and lemon slices. Drizzle with lemon juice and season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Grill the salmon for 5 minutes on high heat, flipping once. Brush more Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce on while they are cooking.\xa0
', '
Take off and garnish with fresh chopped parsley and lemon slices.\xa0
']

Name: pan-fried-red-curry-chili-lime-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. olive oil', '1 chicken breast', '1 cup cooked jasmine white rice', '½ tsp. black sesame seeds, for garnish', '1 tsp. chopped cilantro, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan to medium-high heat with olive oil. Once hot, place down chicken breast and fry for 5-7 minutes on each side. Then cover the pan and let steam for another 5 minutes. Take out and let rest.\xa0
', '
Brush the chicken breast with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce and then slice.\xa0
', '
Serve chicken breast over the cooked jasmine rice and garnish with black sesame seeds and chopped cilantro.\xa0
', '
Portion out into meal prep containers.\xa0
']

Name: ponzu-plum-chicken-wings-air-fried
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken wings and drumettes', '1 radish, sliced for garnish', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, for garnish', '1 cucumber, sliced into ¼’s']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Pat dry chicken wings with a paper towel and place into a mixing bowl.\xa0
', '
Coat with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce and toss, mixing well.\xa0
', '
Place wings on the air fryer basket, spacing them evenly. Fry at 400ºF for 8 minutes then flip wings over and fry another 8 minutes, until wings are crispy and golden brown.
', '
Toss in more Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce before serving and then garnish with sliced radish and sesame seeds with a side of cucumber.
']

Name: seafood-rice
Ingredients: ['1 bowl (about 8-10 oz.) rice', 'cooking oil, a little', 'green onion, a little ', '2 slices ginger', '5 pcs shrimps', '3 pcs fresh scallops', '3 pcs squid rolls ', '3-5 pcs sea cucumber', 'red pepper, a little', '1 pc bok coy', 'water, as desired                               ', '1 tsp. starch']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Keep the steamed rice in a plate for later use.
', '
Heat a wok and add some oil. Stir-fry green onion and ginger, and then, add shrimp, scallops, squid and sea cucumber, stir-fry for 30 seconds. Add Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, and cooking wine, stir-fry for 1 minute, and then add red pepper and bok coy to cook.
', '
Put the fried seafood and vegetables on the top of rice. Add a little water to the starch and add to the remaining soup to let it thickens. Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken and Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil, and pour over the rice.
']

Name: stir-fry-cabbage
Ingredients: ['cooking oil, as desired', '3 cloves (sliced) garlic', '1 lb. cabbage']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. sugar', 'white pepper, as desired ', 'water, as desired']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Seafood Flavored Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Selected Seasoned Aromatic Vinegar, white sugar, pepper and water into a sauce for later use.
', '
Heat up a wok and add some oil, stir-fry garlic cloves and cabbage for one minute.
', '
Add in the sauce mix from step 1, stir-fry evenly, then add Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken, and ready to serve.
']

Name: grilled-curry-pork-chops
Ingredients: ['6 pork chops, bone-in ¼ “thick', 'watermelon radish slices, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', 'cilantro, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, place the pork chops along with 1 cup of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce. Coat well, cover and let marinate for a few hours until ready to grill.\xa0
', '
Take the pork chops out of the fridge and let come to room temp before grilling. Heat the grill to medium high heat.\xa0
', '
Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
', '
Cook the pork chops for 15-20 minutes rotating often and flipping halfway. Brush more of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Red Curry Chili Lime Grilling & Dipping Sauce onto the pork chops while cooking.\xa0
', '
When the pork chops are cooked through and have a nice crust, take off the grill and let stand for 5 minutes before eating.\xa0
', '
Serve with chopped cilantro and watermelon radish slices.\xa0
']

Name: ponzu-caprese-salad
Ingredients: ['1 lb. tomatoes, cored and sliced', '1 lb. fresh mozzarella cheese', '⅓ cup packed basil leaves']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. sea salt', 'fresh black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Lay tomato slices, mozzarella cheese and basil in that order to fill the plate.
', '
Season with sea salt and pepper and drizzle Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Ponzu Plum Grilling & Dipping Sauce over the top.\xa0
', '
Serve right away while cold and fresh.\xa0
']

Name: bulgogi-eggplant
Ingredients: ['1 lb. eggplants ', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, for garnishing', 'white rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. salt']
Marinade: ['1 small onion, finely diced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 green onion, chopped + more for garnish', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. red pepper flakes ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Make the marinade by mixing the onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, green onion, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, red pepper flakes and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil in a bowl.\xa0
', '
Slice the eggplants into small strips crosswise, then place them into a separate bowl with 1 Tbsp. salt. Toss a few times and squeeze to drain off some of the liquid. Discard the liquid and then add the marinade into the bowl, mix together with your hands. Cover and place in the fridge for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add in the eggplant, spreading out in the pan. Let sear for 5 minutes and then flip and brown for another 2 minutes. Once the eggplant has crisped up and the marinade has cooked off, take off the heat and plate. Garnish with sesame seeds and more green onion.\xa0
', '
Serve with a side of white rice and portion it out into meal prep containers for a nice vegetarian lunch.\xa0
']

Name: sheet-pan-chicken-chili-nachos
Ingredients: ['2 bags tortilla chips', '2 cups black beans', '2 cups mild salsa', '2 cups corn', '1 lb. pre-cooked shredded chicken', '4 cups shredded mexican cheese']
Seasoning: ['½ cup crumbled cotija, for topping', '⅛ cup fresh chopped cilantro, for topping']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350ºF. Line or grease a large baking tray.\xa0
', '
Lay one layer of chips and top with black beans, salsa, corn and shredded chicken. Add shredded cheese. Do this 3 times to make layers.\xa0
', '
Place into the oven and bake for 10 minutes until the cheese is nice and melted.\xa0
', '
Top with Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin sauce, crumbled cotija cheese, chopped cilantro, and a dollop of sour cream for serving.
']

Name: corned-beef-reuben-egg-rolls
Ingredients: ['8 oz. can sauerkraut, drained', '1 ½ lb. cooked corned beef, shredded or chopped up', '2 cups shredded swiss cheese', '10-12 egg roll wrappers', 'vegetable oil for frying']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. caraway seeds']
Procedure:
['
Heat saucepan to low heat and cook the sauerkraut for 10 minutes until the liquid has dissolved. Add in the caraway seeds to the sauerkraut. Set aside to cool.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, mix together the cooked corned beef, cooled sauerkraut and shredded swiss cheese.\xa0
', '
Place a single egg roll wrapper on your work surface. Moisten the edges with water. Place about ¼ cup of your filling mixture onto the middle of the wrapper. Fold 1 corner over the filling then tightly and carefully wrap it up. Press edges to make sure they stay secure. Make as many as you can with the filling mixture you have.
', '
Heat a deep skillet with vegetable oil. Once hot and ready to fry, add a couple rolls in at a time and fry for 3-4 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy. Place onto paper towels to drain off oil.
', '
Serve right away with a side of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: southwest-zucchini-boats
Ingredients: ['4 small thick zucchinis', '¼ cup diced tomato', '¼ cup corn', '¼ cup black beans', '1 cup shredded mexican cheese blend']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. chopped cilantro ', 'pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 375ºF. Line or spray baking tray and set aside.\xa0
', '
Cut the ends of the zucchinis and slice in half long ways. Using a spoon, hollow out the middles, leaving a small layer with enough space for filling.\xa0\xa0
', '
Once they are all hollowed out into little boats, place onto the baking tray.\xa0
', '
Fill boats with diced tomato, corn, black beans and then top with shredded cheese.\xa0
', '
Place into the oven and bake for 20 minutes until zucchini is soft and the cheese is nice and melted.\xa0
', '
Take out and top with Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce, chopped cilantro and pepper to taste.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: garlic-pepper-salami-bites
Ingredients: ['½ lb. sliced genoa salami', '2 Tbsp. roasted garlic cloves']
Seasoning: ['ground black pepper, for finishing']
Procedure:
['
Place sliced salami in a shallow plate.\xa0
', '
Add the roasted garlic cloves.\xa0
', '
Drizzle olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil.
', '
Finish with fresh ground black pepper.\xa0
']

Name: shrimp-cocktail
Ingredients: ['1 lb. jumbo shrimps, tails-on ', 'lemon wedges, for garnishing']
Sauce Mix: ['⅛ cup cocktail sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Clean the shrimps and keep the tails on.
', '
Boil water in a pot and add shrimps for 30 seconds until pink and translucent. Then place them immediately into an ice bath.
', '
Place crushed ice around a large serving plate and place the shrimps on top.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix the cocktail sauce and the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic.\xa0
', '
Serve that alongside the shrimp and garnish with a lemon wedge.\xa0
']

Name: broccoli-cheese-soup
Ingredients: ['½ butter stick', '½ onion, diced', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. flour, divided', '3 cups chicken broth', '¼ cup carrots, chopped', '4 cups broccoli florets, roughly chopped', '2 cups grated sharp cheddar cheese']
Seasoning: ['¼ tsp. all-spice', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cups half and half', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef']
Procedure:
['
Melt butter over medium heat in a large pot or Dutch oven. Add in the onions and sauté for 5 minutes until soft, add in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and continue cooking.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. flour and mix in well, heating for 1 minute while stirring. Carefully pour in the chicken broth and mix together seasoning with all-spice.\xa0
', '
Stir in the half and half and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef. Turn heat up to high and bring to a low boil for about 5 minutes, then turn the heat back down to low.\xa0
', '
Add in the chopped carrots and broccoli, cover and let simmer for 15 minutes until vegetables are tender, stirring often.\xa0
', '
Take the pot off the heat and add the remaining flour along with 1 quarter of the shredded cheese, do this in 4 parts so it mixes and melts in evenly adding in salt and pepper to taste. Once all the cheese has melted in, serve and enjoy.
', '
(Optional) Sprinkle with more pepper for serving.
']

Name: mini-reuben-sliders
Ingredients: ['12 sweet bread rolls', '8 oz. swiss cheese', '8 oz. thinly sliced corned beef', '8 oz. sauerkraut ']
Procedure:
['
Cut the rolls in half and then top buns with a slice of swiss cheese then corned beef, sauerkraut, one more slice of cheese then a dollop of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.\xa0
', '
N/A
', '
N/A
']

Name: sausage-and-cheese-stuffed-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baby bella mushrooms, cleaned', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ cup dry white wine', '12 oz spicy Italian sausage', '8 oz. cream cheese', '⅓ cup parmesan cheese, shredded', '3 tsp. panko for topping', '3 tsp. parmesan cheese, grated', '1 tsp. fresh chopped parsley ']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '3 sage leaves, julienned ', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F. Clean the mushrooms and remove stems, hollowing out the caps. Place into a bowl with the olive oil and white wine and toss the mushrooms, then place onto the lined baking tray.\xa0
', '
In a skillet, cook the sausage for about 10 minutes on medium-high heat until browned and cooked through. Add the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and sage and let simmer on low for 5 more minutes.\xa0
', '
Remove skillet from heat and add in the cream cheese and shredded parmesan cheese. Mix until cheese has melted, then season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Add one spoonful to each mushroom cap, then sprinkle with panko and a little more grated\xa0 parmesan cheese.
', '
Place in the oven and bake for 30 minutes until mushrooms are soft and tops are golden brown. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and garnish with fresh chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: chili-cheese-dip
Ingredients: ['8 oz. soft cream cheese', '1 can beef chili', '2 cups shredded cheddar cheese', 'tortilla chips for dipping, optional ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, mix together the softened cream cheese, beef chili, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and shredded cheese.
', '
Spread the chili mix into a greased baking dish, then sprinkle top with some more cheese.\xa0
', '
Bake for 15 minutes until cheese is bubbling. Serve with a side of tortilla chips (optional).\xa0
']

Name: scallion-pancakes
Ingredients: ['2 cups. flour', '¾ cup warm water', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 ⅓ cup finely sliced scallions ', '4 Tbsp. vegetable oil, for cooking']
Seasoning: ['¾ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix the flour and salt then slowly pour in the warm water, mixing until water has absorbed.\xa0
', '
Knead the dough on a surface for 5 minutes until you can shape it into a round ball. Cover with a damp towel and let rest for 30 minutes. Once rested, divide into 4 equal balls.\xa0
', '
Roll out one ball on a floured surface into a thin circle. Brush with olive oil, then sprinkle with scallions. Then roll it into a log. Once in a log, roll into a coil.\xa0
', '
Roll out the coil again and then set aside. Do this for as many pancakes as you can. Once they are rolled out and ready, heat pan with vegetable oil and fry each pancake for 2-3 minutes on each side until crispy. Take out and set on paper towels to drain oil off a little.\xa0
', '
Make dipping sauce by adding all sauce ingredients to a bowl and whisk well.\xa0
', '
Serve alongside the pancakes for dipping.
']

Name: hoisin-grilled-lamb-chops
Ingredients: ['4 lamb chops', '2 tsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. sea salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '3 sprigs of rosemary']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Pat the lamb chops with a paper towel, then add salt and pepper on both sides.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and Minced Garlic.\xa0
', '
Heat skillet with olive oil on high heat and toss in the rosemary sprigs.\xa0
', '
Sear both sides for 1 minute, then pour in the Hoisin and garlic sauce mix, reducing heat to low.\xa0
', '
Turn chops one more time to coat in the sauce, cooking for about 5 minutes.
', '
Take them off and let rest for 5 minutes before eating or slicing. Serve with more fresh rosemary if desired.
']

Name: garlic-and-spinach-dip-in-a-bread-bowl
Ingredients: ['½ cup sour cream', '8 oz. cream cheese', '10 oz. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained', '1 cup shredded monterey jack cheese', '1 cup shredded parmesan cheese', '1 round sourdough bread oaf, for bowl', '1 cup carrot sticks, for dipping', '1 cup celery sticks, for dipping', '1 packet of mini na’an (or pita), for dipping']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. minced onion', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. red pepper flakes']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, mix together sour cream and cream cheese until smooth.
', '
Add in chopped spinach, monterey jack, parmesan cheese, minced onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, salt, black pepper, red pepper flakes and stir together.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a small greased baking dish and bake for 10 minutes until cheese is melted.\xa0
', '
While cheese is melting, hollow out the sourdough bread loaf into a large bowl.
', '
Take dip out of the oven and scoop into the bread loaf and serve with a side of carrots, celery sticks, and mini na’an (or pita).
']

Name: bolognese-with-pappardelle
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lb. ground beef', '1 lb. ground pork', '1 lb. Italian sausage', '5 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 cups yellow onions, diced', '1 cup carrots, diced', '2 lbs. pappardelle pasta']
Seasoning: ['4 garlic cloves, minced', '2 tsp. oregano', '1 Tbsp. dried basil', '¾ cup grated parmesan cheese + more for topping ', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['3 cups red wine', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 cans whole tomatoes', '1 can tomato sauce (pureed tomatoes)', '1 cup of water']
Procedure:
['
Heat a large skillet to medium-high heat and cook the beef, pork and Italian sausage for 15 minutes until browned and cooked through, then place the meat into a large bowl.\xa0
', '
Heat another large skillet to medium heat with olive oil. Sautè the onions and carrots for 10 minutes until they become soft and browned.\xa0
', '
Add in garlic, oregano, basil and keep cooking for another 5 minutes. Add in red wine, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and reduce with the carrots and onions until the wine almost evaporates. Move to a large sauce pot, then add meat, whole tomatoes, tomato sauce and 1 cup of water and mix.\xa0
', '
Cover and set to low and simmer for 4 hours, stirring every hour so it doesn’t burn.\xa0
', '
After 4 hours, stir in the parmesan cheese.\xa0Then boil water with salt and cook the pappardelle until al dente.\xa0
', '
Plate the pasta and ladle bolognese on top along with more parmesan cheese and salt and pepper to taste.
']

Name: beef-satay-skewers
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. flank steak', '1 head bibb lettuce, for wrapping beef (optional)', 'bed of quinoa (optional)']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '1 Tbsp. fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap']
Procedure:
['
Heat grill to medium-high.
', '
Slice the beef flanks into long pieces and then thread them onto skewers. Season each side with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Grill skewers for 3-4 minutes per side then take off and brush with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Lettuce Wrap.
', '
Plate and garnish with fresh chopped parsley.
', '
Serve with a side of bibb lettuce, for wrapping meat or over a bed of quinoa (optional).
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: spicy-vegetable-and-cabbage-soup
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '½ cup diced onions', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup chopped celery', '1 cup chopped carrots', '6 yellow potatoes, quartered ', '28 oz. canned diced tomatoes', '1 lb. chopped green cabbage (5 cups)', '5 cups vegetable stock', '1 cup cannellini beans (white beans)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. dried oregano', '1 tsp. dried thyme', '2 Tbsp. chopped parsley ']
Procedure:
['
Heat a dutch oven to medium heat, adding in the olive oil and once hot, add in the diced onions and let cook down for 2 minutes, followed by the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and stir.\xa0
', '
Add in chopped celery, carrots and let that cook down for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in the quartered potatoes and mix, then add diced tomatoes, chopped green cabbage and vegetable stock and stir. Cover and turn to low heat to simmer for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the cannellini beans, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil, salt, black pepper, dried oregano, dried thyme and chopped parsley then stir. Cover and let simmer for another 15-20 minutes until potatoes are soft. Ladle into bowls and serve with some more fresh chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: chicken-tater-tot-pot-pie
Ingredients: ['3 cups cooked shredded chicken', '1 package frozen peas & carrots (thawed)', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese + more for topping', '1 package frozen tater tots (thawed)']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cans condensed cream of chicken soup', '½ cup milk', '¼ cup butter, cubed', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease an oval baking dish and set aside.\xa0
', '
In a saucepan, add the chicken soup, milk and butter. Cook for 5 minutes over medium heat until heated through, then take off heat.
', '
Add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, shredded chicken, peas, carrots and 1 cup of shredded cheese. Give a few big mixes.
', '
Transfer chicken mixture into greased baking dish, filling evenly. Top the entire casserole with tater tots then place into the oven and bake for 25-30 minutes until bubbling.\xa0
', '
Sprinkle more cheese on top and bake for a little longer if you desire, if not, take out and let cool before cutting and serving.\xa0
']

Name: broccoli-and-grape-roasted-sesame-salad
Ingredients: ['½ cup bacon bits', '¼ cup red onions, diced', '¼ cup celeries, diced', '¼ cup dried cranberries', '¼ cup almond slivers', '1 (12 oz.) bag broccoli florets, trimmed, washed and ready to eat', '1 cup red grapes, seedless and sliced into discs']
Procedure:
['
Using a large bowl, mix all the ingredients with dressing until well incorporated.
', '
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
', '
N/A
']

Name: rack-of-lamb-provencal-with-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['21 oz. frozen lamb rack', '2 oz. butter', '2 oz. breadcrumbs']
Seasoning: ['3½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '2½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 sprigs rosemary (minced)', 'dash of salt']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. water', '1 tsp. coarse-ground black pepper ']
Sauce Mix: ['1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '⅓ oz. onion (finely chopped)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '⅓ oz. butter', '2 oz. water', 'pinch of parsley flakes']
Procedure:
['
Defrost lamb rack, bone side up. Tie tightly with butcher’s twine to bind roast and keep its shape. Marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Pan sear all sides of lamb until browned. Place on roasting pan. Baste evenly with 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Roast 20 minutes in 350°F preheated oven.
', '
Melt butter. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, breadcrumbs, rosemary, and dash salt.\xa0Sauté together to make herb crust.
', '
Brush the remaining ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce evenly over lamb. Pat on herb crust, then roast in oven until light golden. Mix the sauce mix ingredients together and heat it up. Serve lamb rack with sauce.
']

Name: sheet-pan-meatballs-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 package of frozen beef meatballs']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, for brushing meatballs', '⅓ cup fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CDFecFXsedc&feature=youtu.be
', '
Place the frozen meatballs on a tray to thaw at room temperature (about 20 minutes). Once thawed all the way through, brush them with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce.\xa0
', '
Preheat oven to 400ºF (or whatever it says on the bag).
', '
Place meatballs into the oven to cook for as long as it says on the package.\xa0
', '
Once heated through, take out and brush with a little more Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce if desired.
', '
Top with fresh chopped parsley and serve as a simple appetizer.
']

Name: hoisin-glazed-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. chicken wings', 'fresh chopped cilantro, for garnish', 'lime wedges for serving']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '3 garlic cloves, chopped']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. baking powder', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '½ tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 450°F. Line a baking sheet with foil and set aside.\xa0Pat the chicken wings until dry and place into a bowl. Add the baking powder, salt and pepper. Mix with your hands until evenly coated, then spread evenly onto baking sheet.
', '
Place tray on the top rack and bake for 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
Remove wings from oven and place on a cooling rack.\xa0
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce to a bowl along with the chopped garlic. Toss the wings in the sauce, coating well. Place back onto the tray and back into the oven for another 10 minutes until crispy and caramelized.\xa0
', '
Take out, plate and top with fresh chopped cilantro and a side of lime wedges.\xa0
']

Name: homemade-granola-bars
Ingredients: ['2 cups rolled oats', '½ cup chopped almonds', '⅓ cup dried cranberries, chopped', '¼ cup mini chocolate chips']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup honey', '¼ cup butter, cut into pieces', '¼ cup light brown sugar', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '½ tsp. vanilla extract']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F. Line or spray baking sheet, then scatter the rolled oats and chopped almonds. Place in the oven to toast for 5 minutes, stir and then toast for another 3-5 minutes until lightly browned. Transfer to a bowl.\xa0
', '
In a small pot, mix the honey, butter, brown sugar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, and vanilla extract. Heat to medium and stir until the butter has melted. Pour mixture over the bowl of toasted oats and almonds and mix. Let sit and cool for 10-15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Once cooled, add chopped dried cranberries and chocolate chips and stir together.\xa0
', '
Transfer all of that to a lined baking pan and firmly press down. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours or overnight.\xa0
', '
Once they are hard, cut them into bars. If you want them soft, keep them at room temperature, if not keep them in the fridge.\xa0
']

Name: greek-tomato-salad
Ingredients: ['1 lb. heirloom tomatoes (or 3 medium tomatoes)', '1 cup cherry tomatoes', '2 cups baked pita chips, broken', '⅓ cup crumbled feta', '½ cup fresh basil']
Seasoning: ['1 ⅕ tsp. salt']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. extra virgin olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. lemon zest', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. za’atar seasoning']
Procedure:
['
Quarter the heirloom tomatoes and half the cherry tomatoes and place in a bowl, season with salt and toss.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, add the extra virgin olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, lemon zest, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and za’atar seasoning. Mix together well.\xa0
', '
Break up some pita chips and toss into the bowl with the tomatoes.\xa0
', "
Plate the tomatoes and pita chips,\xa0 then top with crumbled feta and drizzle with the za'atar sauce mix.
", '
Top with fresh basil leaves and serve right away.
']

Name: fried-pickles
Ingredients: ['3 cups vegetable oil for frying (2-3 inches)', '1 cup flour', '1 egg', '1 cup panko or breadcrumbs', '3 large dill pickles cut into ¼ inch pieces, and patted dry']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '¼ tsp. garlic powder', '¼ tsp. paprika']
Procedure:
['
Heat vegetable oil to 350°F in a deep pot.\xa0
', '
Place flour into a bowl and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder and paprika. Stir together.\xa0
', '
In a separate bowl, crack the egg and gently whisk.\xa0
', '
Pour the breadcrumbs into a separate bowl.
', '
Take the dry sliced pickles and place into the flour mixture to coat. Followed by the egg wash, then into the breadcrumbs and then into the oil to fry for 2-3 minutes until golden brown.
', '
Take out and place on paper towels to drain. Serve with a side of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping.\xa0
']

Name: curried-chicken-legs
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. olive oil', '6 chicken drumsticks', '2 cups white rice, for serving ', 'lime wedges, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 bunch fresh basil, some for cooking and for garnish', '1 tsp. fresh chopped cilantro, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 ½ cups coconut milk', '3 Tbsp. curry powder ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400°F.\xa0Heat a large cast iron skillet to medium heat and add in olive oil. When the oil has heated up, add in Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and Garlic and cook down for 2 minutes.
', '
Next, add in the coconut milk, curry powder, Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Style Chili Oil and stir together until powder is mixed in.
', '
Submerge the chicken drumsticks a little in the sauce mix, followed by a few pieces of fresh basil.\xa0
', '
Place skillet into the oven and bake for 1 hour until the chicken is golden and cooked through.\xa0
', '
Top with fresh chopped cilantro and serve with a side of white rice and lime wedges.\xa0
']

Name: spicy-chicken-sandwich
Ingredients: ['4 boneless chicken thighs', '3-4 cups canola or vegetable oil, for frying (3-4 inches)', '2 hamburger buns', 'lettuce & pickles for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ cup flour', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '2 tsp. garlic powder', '2 tsp. smoked paprika']
Marinade: ['½ cup buttermilk', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. kosher salt']
Procedure:
['
Add the chicken thighs, buttermilk, Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and salt to a large freezer bag. Mix and then place in the fridge to marinate for 4 hours.
', '
Heat the canola oil in a dutch oven to 350°F.\xa0
', '
In a large bowl, mix the flour, salt, pepper, garlic powder and smoked paprika.
', '
Take the chicken out and place into the flour mixture until well coated. Do this for all the chicken and then fry two pieces at a time for 4 minutes per side. Then place on paper towels to let cool.\xa0
', '
Assemble sandwiches by adding fried chicken, lettuce, pickles, and then top with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
']

Name: bbq-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 lbs. skinless chicken legs']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. sliced green onions, garnish', '½ tsp. white sesame seeds, garnish']
Procedure:
['
Season chicken with salt and pepper on all sides, then let come to room temperature before grilling.
', '
Heat grill to high heat. Once hot, place the chicken down and cook for 5 minutes on each side. After the 10 minutes are up, begin to brush the chicken with the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce and cook for another 2-3 minutes on each side. Brush another time if necessary.\xa0
', '
Once they are grilled through, take them off the grill and brush one final time and then top with sliced green onions and sesame seeds.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: mushroom-carbonara
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. olive oil', '1 lb. cremini mushrooms, roughly chopped', '1 Tbsp. butter', '¼ cup dry white wine', '4 egg yolks', '1 egg', '⅓ cup grated parmesan cheese, plus more for serving', '½ cup of water, as needed', '1 lb. orecchiette']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. kosher salt, for water', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 ½ tsp. fresh ground black pepper, plus more for serving', '¼ cup chopped parsley + ½ tsp. for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Salt your water and bring to a boil.\xa0
', '
Heat a skillet to medium with olive oil and add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and let cook down for 2 minutes. Then add in the mushrooms, butter, and white wine. Let that cook for 10-15 minutes until wine has cooked off and the mushrooms are nice and soft. Turn to low heat to stay warm.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, add the 4 egg yolks and 1 egg, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and parmesan cheese. Whisk together until desired thickness, and if needed, add water to thin.\xa0
', '
Drop the orecchiette and boil until al dente, about 10 minutes. Then drain well and add in the mushrooms along with the egg mix, tossing together well.\xa0
', '
Add ground black pepper and chopped parsley, then toss again.\xa0
', '
Plate the top with more fresh parmesan, black pepper and chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: roasted-acorn-squash
Ingredients: ['1 medium acorn squash']
Seasoning: ['3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F.\xa0Grease a baking sheet with some Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and set aside.\xa0
', '
Cut the acorn squash into ¼ inch pieces then remove the strings and seeds.\xa0
', '
Arrange the slices in a single layer.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Roast for 40-45 minutes until fork tender.
', '
Take out and garnish with fresh chopped parsley.
']

Name: spinach-and-beet-quiche
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion, sliced', '1 cup baby spinach', '3 eggs', '½ cup milk', '2 cooked beets, sliced thinly', '½ cup goat cheese', '1 pre-made pie crust', '¼ cup grated parmesan']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. ground rosemary', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 375ºF.\xa0
', '
Oil the pan, then cook down the onions for 10 minutes until soft. Toss in the baby spinach and let that cook down for 1-2 minutes, set aside when done.
', '
In a bowl, mix the eggs, milk, rosemary, salt, pepper and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Add in the sliced beets, cooked onion and goat cheese, then gently mix together.\xa0
', '
Add that mixture into the pie crust, then place in the oven to bake for 50 minutes.
', '
Take out and finish it with grated parmesan and place back in the oven for another 2 minutes.
', '
Remove from heat and let rest for 10 minutes before cutting into it. Serve and enjoy.
']

Name: pumpkin-pie-pancakes
Ingredients: ['½ cup coconut milk + more if needed', '⅓ cup pumpkin puree', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 cup flour', '3 Tbsp. coconut sugar', '½ tsp. cinnamon', '¼ tsp. nutmeg', '1 tsp. baking powder', 'non-stick oil spray', '2 Tbsp. maple syrup']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, pumpkin puree and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, then set aside.\xa0
', '
In another bowl, add in the flour, coconut sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg and baking powder.\xa0
', '
Take the pumpkin mixture and slowly pour into the dry mixture to combine. Add a little more coconut milk if too thick.\xa0
', '
Heat the skillet to medium heat and spray with non-stick oil.\xa0
', '
Ladle the mixture onto the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown, remove and keep making them until you’re out of batter.\xa0
', '
Serve with maple syrup and any other topping you desire.\xa0
']

Name: sausage-gravy-and-biscuits
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 lb. breakfast sausage (beef or pork)', '2 Tbsp. butter', '¼ cup flour', '3 cups milk', 'buttermilk biscuits, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a pan over medium heat, add cooking oil and cook breakfast sausage for about 10 minutes, chopping it up into small bits while cooking.
', '
Once browned and fully cooked, add in the butter and let melt. Once melted, add in the flour and mix together.
', '
Add the milk in a little bit at a time, stirring to create a nice and thick sauce.
', '
Next add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and keep mixing, salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Serve over biscuits.
']

Name: hong-kong-egg-tart
Ingredients: ['1 stick butter (melted)', '5 egg', '¼ cup powdered sugar', '1 ¼ cup flour', '8 Tbsp. coconut milk', '1 dash vanilla extract ', '1 cup water', '¼ cup sugar', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F.
', '
Melt butter in a bowl, then let cool for a minute before adding 1 egg, powdered sugar, flour, 2 Tbsp. coconut milk and vanilla extract. Mix together until dough forms, roll it out on the counter or knead it with your hands.
', '
Divide dough into small pieces, then fit into the mini tart molds. Make as many as you can with the dough (4-5). Once your tart shells are ready, set aside.
', '
Boil 1 cup of water and then add in sugar to melt, turn off heat and let cool.
', '
In a bowl whisk 4 eggs, 6 Tbsp. coconut milk and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, then whisk. If there are bubbles, pour the mixture through a strainer and back into the bowl.\xa0
', '
Pour the filling mixture into the tarts about ¾ full, then place on a baking tray and bake for 30 minutes until crust is golden brown.\xa0
']

Name: hoisin-beef-flank-steak
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef flank']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. pepper', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. butter + more if desired', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'fresh herbs, to garnish']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 450°F.\xa0Heat your cast iron skillet over medium high heat.\xa0
', '
Season steak with salt and pepper, sear the steak on each side for 2 minutes.
', '
Brush the meat with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, add in the butter, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic.
', '
Transfer skillet to the oven and roast for 40-45 minutes until cooked to a nice medium.\xa0
', '
Take out and let rest for 10 minutes before slicing. Drizzle with some more melted butter and garnish with fresh herbs.\xa0
']

Name: buttermilk-mashed-potatoes
Ingredients: ['1/2 pot of water', '2 lbs. russet potatoes, peeled and quartered']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['⅓ cup milk', '4 Tbsp. butter', '⅓ cup buttermilk (warmed)', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. black pepper (reserve ½ tsp. for topping)']
Procedure:
['
Fill a stock pot ½ way with water and salt, followed by the quartered potatoes and let come to a boil. Once boiling, let cook about 15-20 minutes for the potatoes to be tender. If they still aren’t tender, keep them boiling until fork tender.\xa0
', '
Once tender, drain and put back into the pot. Using a potato masher, mash up the potatoes well.\xa0
', '
Add in the milk, butter, buttermilk, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, ½ tsp. black pepper and continue to mix and smash until smooth and creamy.
', '
Garnish with black pepper and fresh chopped parsley.
']

Name: mala-tang-hot-and-spicy-hot-pot
Ingredients: ['oil, as needed', '2 pcs. green onion', '2 pcs. ginger', '6 cups water', '4 oz. beef slices', '2 oz. shrimp', '2 oz. fish balls', '3 slices lotus root', '1 slice spam ', 'napa cabbage, as desired ', '1 bok choy', '2 oz. soaked wood ear', '2 oz. imitation crab stick']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cRLVhJ7Bu2k&feature=youtu.be
', '
Add oil in a heated pot and sauté green onions and ginger. Add 2 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot and 1 Tbsp. of Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce and stir-fry until fragrant, then add water.
', '
Once water has boiled, add the Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and all the rest of the ingredients, let boil for 5 minutes. Pour in a bowl and ready to serve.\xa0\xa0
', '
Tips: Oyster Sauce can enhance the flavor of meat and seafood, adding more depth to the taste.
']

Name: imitation-crab-fried-rice-omelette-with-oyster-mayo
Ingredients: ['250 g rice ', '1 green onion, chopped finely', '3 sticks imitation crab, chopped ', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds ', '1 tsp. Ao Nori ', '2 eggs, beaten ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil         ', 'greens and cherry tomatoes, for garnish', '¼ shimeji mushroom ', '50 ml hot water']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil ', 'salt & pepper, to season ', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. mayo', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil in a non-stick pan and saute the rice. Once the rice is broken into parts, add green onion and imitation crab. Then add the sesame seeds, Ao Nori and season with salt and pepper.
', '
Mix 3 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and 3 Tbsp. of mayo in a bowl, then add the mixture to the pan and combine everything evenly with a spatula.\xa0
', '
Keep one corner of the pan clear from rice and pour in Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Once soy sauce is sizzling, mix rice evenly. Transfer the fried rice to a plate and wash the pan.
', "
Make omelette one at a time. Whisk 2 eggs in a small bowl, heat 1 Tbsp. of cooking oil in a pan over medium high heat. Make sure the pan's surface is well coated with oil and pan is hot. Pour the egg into the pan and tilt to cover the bottom, at the same time use the chopsticks to scramble the egg. When the egg is half way cooked and cover whole surface of the pan, bring back the fried rice onto the one side of the pan.\xa0
", '
Hold a clean plate in one hand and the pan in the other hand, flip the pan and move the omelette rice to the plate. Make sure the egg will fold onto the rice. Pour the pre-made sauce on top of the omelette rice. Add some greens and cherry tomatoes to garish.
', '
Sauce:
1. Heat non-stick pan and add broken shimeji mushroom with 50 ml hot water with cover to steam the mushroom.

2. Once shimeji is loose and soft, add 3 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and mix well with shimeji mushroom.

3. When shimeji is done and sauce consistency is nicely thicken and runny, turn off the heat and transfer to a serving bowl and wait for the omelette rice to be plated.
']

Name: dry-pot-cauliflower
Ingredients: ['1 lb. cauliflower', 'cooking oil, as desired', '6 oz. pork belly (peeled skin & sliced)', '2 oz. Tabasco pepper', 'dry red pepper, as desired ', '1 Tbsp. Sichuan pepper', '1 oz. garlic']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken (no MSG added)']
Procedure:
['
Cut cauliflower into pieces and boil in boiling water for 1 minute. Drain the water then set aside.
', '
Put the cooking oil in a pan, stir fry the pork belly until the grease came out, then add in the Tabasco pepper, dry red pepper, Sichuan pepper, garlic to sauté. Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot and stir well.
', '
Pour the cauliflower and stir fry for one minute. Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken, stir well then ready to serve.
']

Name: pork-belly-stewed-mung-bean-noodles
Ingredients: ['20 oz. pork belly (with skin)', '4 oz. mung bean noodles ', 'cooking oil, as desired ', '2 Tbsp. cooking wine', 'green onion, as desired', 'ginger, as desired', '2 pcs. star anise', '1 pc. amomum tsaoko', '1 pc. cinnamon', 'water, as needed to cover the meat']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cut the pork into chunks. Rinse the meat and drain the water then set aside.\xa0 Soak the mung bean noodle in water for 30 minutes, drain the water and set aside.
', '
Heat a pot and put in some cooking oil. Then add meat to sauté until thoroughly cooked to caramel color. Add cooking wine, green onion, ginger, star anise, amomum tsaoko and cinnamon to stir fry until fragrant. Add the sauce mix and simmer for 2 minutes.
', '
Add hot water to cover the meat. After boil, simmer for 40 minutes. Put the soaked noodles in to cook for 10 more minutes, then ready to serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']
