Name: pumpkin-pie-crisp
Ingredients: ['1 can pumpkin puree', '3 eggs, medium', '2 cups flour', '12 Tbsp. melted butter', 'vanilla ice cream, for topping', 'cinnamon, for sprinkling over the ice cream']
Seasoning: ['2 ½ cup granulated sugar', '2 tsp. pumpkin pie spice', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. vanilla extract', '⅔ cup coconut cream', '2 tsp. cinnamon', '½ tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2ihTdXuk7Po&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F.\xa0In a large glass bowl, whisk together pumpkin puree, 1 cup of sugar, eggs, pumpkin pie spice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, vanilla extract, and coconut cream then whisk until smooth.\xa0
', '
In another bowl, whisk together flour, cinnamon, 1 ½ cup of sugar, and salt. Then slowly add in the melted butter and mix with a fork until crumbly.\xa0
', '
Grease or butter 12 inch cast iron skillet then set aside. Then pour pumpkin mixture into the skillet then spread the streusel crumbles onto the top of the mixture evenly in the cast iron.\xa0
', '
Bake for 40-45 minutes\xa0 until the filling is set and the crumbles are a nice golden brown.\xa0
', '
Let cool for 10 minutes then top with a nice heap of vanilla ice cream. Sprinkle a little dusting of cinnamon over the ice cream then serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: simple-vegan-stuffing
Ingredients: ['1 sourdough loaf, cubed', '3 tsp. olive oil', '1 yellow onion, diced', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 cup celery, diced', '3 carrots, peeled and diced', '⅛ cup finely chopped sage', '1 tsp. chopped thyme']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. salt']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cups vegetable stock', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1qGa0jwDOk&feature=youtu.be
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F.\xa0Cube the sourdough loaf and place into a large bowl.\xa0
', '
Heat skillet to medium heat and add in 2 tsp. olive oil. When oil is hot, add in the diced onion and cook down for 2 minutes then add in the minced garlic, celery and carrots. Cook down for 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the seasonings: chopped sage, chopped thyme, black pepper, salt, and keep mixing with the veggies. Cook down for another 10 minutes until all the veggies have softened.\xa0
', '
Add veggie mixture into the bowl of bread cubes and then add in the vegetable stock, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and the remaining 1 tsp. olive oil. Give a couple big mixes coating the bread well then transfer that to the baking dish.\xa0
', '
Cover with foil and bake for 45 minutes then take foil off and cook for another 10 minutes to crisp up the top a little bit. Once golden brown and crispy take out and let cool before serving.\xa0
']

Name: brussels-sprouts
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. olive oil', '1 lb. brussels sprouts, halved', '⅛ cup pecan pieces', '⅛ cup cranberries', '1-2 pieces fresh rosemary, for garnishing plate ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a skillet, add olive oil and heat to medium.
', '
When hot, add in the brussels sprouts and let sear for 5 minutes until they start to brown and crisp up. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and toss sprouts to coat them. Lower heat, cover and let steam for 10 minutes until they are softened.
', '
Heat back to medium and add the pecans, cranberries and keep tossing for another 2 minutes to get them a little more crispy. Then take off heat and plate with rosemary for garnish.
']

Name: thanksgiving-turkey-club
Ingredients: ['4-6 slices rustic bread slices', '1 handful spinach', '½ red onion, sliced thin', '½ lb. roast turkey ', '4 slices cheddar cheese']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. cranberry sauce']
Procedure:
['
Toast the bread then spread the cranberry sauce on followed by\xa0 the spinach.\xa0
', '
Place down a few thin slices of red onion, then add thick slices of leftover turkey. Top with cheddar cheese and more cranberry sauce.\xa0
', '
Place the open faced sandwich into the broiler for a minute to melt the cheese. Then take out, top with a little Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo followed by a piece of bread, cut and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: vegan-soba-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 package soba noodles', '1 tsp. olive oil', '½ cup tofu, cubed', '1 bundle broccolini ', '4-6 asparagus spears', '1 cup baby spinach', '1 tsp. black sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Cook the soba noodles as directed on the package and then drain, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and set aside until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Add olive oil to a skillet and heat to medium.\xa0
', '
When hot, add the tofu and saute for 5 minutes on all sides. Then add the broccolini and asparagus and cook down for another 5 minutes until softened up.\xa0
', '
Next, add the baby spinach and cook for another minute until the spinach wilts.\xa0
', '
Add the soba noodles back into the pan and give a few tosses.
', '
Add the black sesame seeds and tofu, then serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: baked-brie
Ingredients: ['1-2 brie cheese wheels', '6 oz. blackberries', '6 oz. dried figs, halved', '4 oz. pecans', '1 tsp. pepitas', '1 tsp. fresh thyme', '(optional) crushed walnuts ', 'crackers for serving']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. blackberry jam', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400° F.\xa0
', '
Place the brie rounds on a baking tray. Place in the oven to bake for 5-7 minutes, but don’t let it get to runny.\xa0
', '
Take out and spread with the jam and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce. Add blackberries, figs, pecans, pepitas and fresh thyme. Serve right away with crackers.
']

Name: pecan-pumpkin-bread
Ingredients: ['¾ cup brown sugar + 1 Tbsp. for pecans', '¾ cup sugar', '½ cup coconut oil', '2 eggs', '1 tsp. baking soda', '2 tsp. cinnamon', '1 tsp. nutmeg', '½ tsp. salt', '1 ¾ cup flour', '1 cup pumpkin puree', '⅓ cup coconut milk', '½ cup chopped pecans', '1 Tbsp. softened butter']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350° F.
', '
In a bowl, whisk together the brown sugar, sugar, coconut oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and eggs.\xa0
', '
Stir in the baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt and flour with the wet ingredients. Then add in the pumpkin puree and the coconut milk and mix together well.\xa0
', '
Using a rubber spatula, scoop out the batter into the 9x5 greased loaf pan.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix the pecans with 1 Tbsp. of brown sugar and butter, pressing together with your fingers. Add that to the top of the batter, then place in the oven and bake for 55 minutes, until the center comes out dry.\xa0
', '
Let cool then cut and serve.\xa0
']

Name: butternut-squash-baked-ziti
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. olive oil', '1 lb. ziti pasta noodles', '1 can seasoned tomato sauce (italian)']
Sauce Mix: ['1 lb., pre-cubed butternut squash', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. roasted garlic', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '2 cups vegan cheese (cashew or the like)']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425ºF. Grease a baking sheet, add cubed squash, drizzle with a little olive oil and place in the oven and roast for 20 minutes or until fork tender then take out. Keep oven on but turn down to 375ºF.
', '
Make the sauce by adding 2 cups of the cooked butternut squash to the blender along with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, roasted garlic, salt and black pepper. Pulse until creamy and then pour into a pot and turn the heat to low to keep it warm. Fold in the vegan cheese and mix until melted and looks like a creamy cheese sauce. Keep warm until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Cook the ziti pasta as directed on the package (al dente) then drain, place in a bowl with a little olive oil and set aside.\xa0
', '
Grease the bottom of the casserole dish and then add a layer of tomato sauce (⅓ can), then cover that with ⅓ of cooked pasta, then take ⅓ of the “cheese” mixture and pour it over the pasta. Repeat this 2 more times, so you have 3 total layers. Sprinkle the top with a little extra vegan cheese, if you have any left.\xa0
', '
Pop in the oven and bake for 25-30 minutes until browned, keep in an extra few minutes to crisp up the top if you want. Serve right away while warm.\xa0
']

Name: vegan-pumpkin-chili
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. olive oil', '1 onion, diced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 carrot, chopped', '2 celery stalks, chopped', '1 red bell pepper, chopped', '2 cans chopped tomatoes', '2 cans kidney beans, drained and rinsed', '1 can black beans, drained and rinsed', '1 can pumpkin puree', 'garnish ideas: cilantro, avocado, vegan sour cream', '(optional) vegan cornbread']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. cumin', '2 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. pumpkin pie spice']
Procedure:
['
Heat a dutch oven or pot to medium low heat with olive oil.
', '
Add in the diced onion, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, carrot, celery and red bell pepper and cook down for 5 minutes until all softens up.\xa0
', '
Add the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce, cumin, salt, pepper, pumpkin pie spice and stir well.\xa0
', '
Next add the chopped tomatoes, kidney beans, black beans and pumpkin puree, stirring all together. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and let simmer for 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
After 20 minutes taste to see if you need to add anymore seasoning.\xa0
', '
Garnish with fresh cilantro. Additional sides: avocado, vegan sour cream and optional vegan cornbread .\xa0
']

Name: roasted-pumpkin-soup
Ingredients: ['1 pumpkin around 2 lbs. ', '1 Tbsp. coconut oil', '1 onion, chopped', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '½ tsp. Lee Kum kee Minced Ginger', '(optional) 1 spoonful of fresh burrata cheese, for topping', '1 tsp. pepitas or pumpkin seeds for garnishing']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. paprika', '½ tsp ground turmeric', '½ tsp. coriander', '½ tsp. finely chopped sage + leaves for garnish', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cups vegetable stock', '1 can coconut cream']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425º F.\xa0
', '
Cut the pumpkin in half and scoop out all the seeds and strings, then quarter it. Save the seeds for roasting later if you desire.\xa0
', '
Drizzle pumpkin with a little coconut oil then place on a lined baking tray.\xa0Roast pumpkin for 35-40 minutes until soft.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pot to medium heat and add in a little more coconut oil. Toss in the chopped onion, and cook for 5 minutes until soft then add in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and Minced Ginger, mix together and keep cooking.\xa0
', '
Scoop out the cooked pumpkin into the pot and along with the Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, paprika, turmeric, coriander, sage, salt and pepper. Then add in the vegetable stock and coconut cream and stir then bring up to a boil then turn down to low and let simmer for 10-15 minutes until flavors have developed.\xa0
', '
Remove soup from heat and add into a blender, in a few batches if needed. Pulse until nice and creamy. Adjust any seasonings here if needed.\xa0Serve in a bowl with a dollop of fresh burrata cheese, pepitas, and fresh sage leaves.
']

Name: braised-chicken-with-oyster-flavored-sauce-3-cup-chicken
Ingredients: ['½ cup ginger slices   ', '6 garlic cloves   ', '½ chicken, chopped into chunks', '1 basil sprig']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1½ Tbsp. sugar ', '4 Tbsp. wine']
Procedure: [' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cNmduizI5e0&feature=youtu.be ', ' Sauté ginger and garlic in Lee Kum Kee Premium Pure Sesame Oil. Add chicken and stir-fry. ', ' Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, sugar, and wine. Stir to mix well over high heat. Then cover and cook over low heat until sauce thickens. Stir in basil and serve. ', ' Tips: The rich flavor of Oyster Sauce can infiltrate into the food during slow cooking, enhancing the overall flavor. ']

Name: squash-and-caramelized-onion-pizza
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. butter', '2 onions, sliced', '4 cups pre-cooked frozen butternut squash cubes', '4 sliced pancetta', '1 lb. pre made pizza dough', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 sliced pancetta', '2 cups shredded gruyere cheese ', '1 bunch of sage, leaves for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['-----[Sage Butter]-----', '4 oz. butter', '1 bunch of sage']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 550°F, or as hot as your oven can get.\xa0
', '
Heat pan with the butter. Once butter is melted, toss in the sliced onions and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Let those onions caramelize for 30 minutes, stirring often. Once caramelized, take out of the pan and set aside.\xa0

', '
In the same pan, add the butternut squash cubes and cook down until they are soft and then set aside. Place the chopped pancetta into the pan and crisp up on medium high heat. Once crispy, take out and set aide.\xa0Using the same pan add in the butter along with the finely chopped sage. Let the butter brown along with the sage on low heat. Once melted and browned turn off heat.\xa0
\xa0
', '
Roll out the pizza dough and then drizzle with olive oil. Then take the sage butter and spread it evenly around the dough.\xa0
', '
Add the shredded gruyere cheese all over the pizza, then top with the pancetta, butternut squash, caramelized onions, and sage leaves around the top of the pizza, then place it in the oven. Cook for 8-10 minutes until cooked through and crispy.\xa0Take out and let cool for a moment before cutting.\xa0

']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: roasted-garlic-mashed-sweet-potatoes
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. sweet potatoes', '4 garlic cloves, roasted']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. coconut oil', '2 tsp. honey', '½ tsp. sea salt', 'fresh thyme, for garnish', 'black pepper, to taste', '1 slice of butter, for melting']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400°F and then line a baking sheet with foil.\xa0
', '
Place sweet potatoes onto the tray and stab with a fork to create air holes.\xa0
', '
Roast for 35-40 minutes until fork tender then take out.\xa0
', '
Once cooled, remove the skin and place into a food processor along with 4 roasted garlic cloves, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, coconut oil, honey and sea salt. Blend for 10 seconds until creamy, but not too creamy.\xa0
', '
Spoon into a bowl and garnish with fresh thyme and ground black pepper and butter.\xa0
']

Name: brussels-sprouts-and-prosciutto-pizza
Ingredients: ['1 tsp. olive oil', '1 pre-made pizza dough', '1 handful flour', '1 cup shaved brussels sprouts', 'grated parmesan cheese', 'shredded mozzarella cheese ', 'prosciutto, for topping ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 550° F or as hot as your oven can go.\xa0
', '
Roll out dough on a floured surface then stretch onto a pizza tray.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan with olive oil, once hot toss in the shaved brussels sprouts until they begin to crisp. Then add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce. Don’t let them burn, but you want them to be crispy. Once desired doneness , turn off the heat and set aside.\xa0
', '
Drizzle the dough with olive oil, then sprinkle grated Parmesan and mozzarella cheese.\xa0
', '
Spread the crispy shaved sprouts all over the top and place prosciutto pieces down.\xa0
', '
Place into the oven and cook for 8-10 minutes until the dough is cooked and crispy and the cheese has melted.Drizzle the top of the pizza with honey and serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: instant-pot-short-ribs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. short ribs', '1 Tbsp. butter', '4 garlic cloves, roughly chopped', 'mashed potatoes, for serving ', '(optional) side of garlic butter']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper', '1 Tbsp. fresh thyme leaves', '2 cups beef stock', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Season short ribs with salt and pepper.\xa0

', '
Turn on the instant pot to sauté mode. When it’s “hot” and ready, add in the butter and let that melt down, then add in the short ribs and sear on all sides, then remove and set on a plate.\xa0
', '
Add in chopped garlic, fresh thyme leaves, beef stock and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce into the pot. Then, place the ribs back in submerging them in the stock.

', '
Take off sauté mode and set place the lid on. Seal and set to high and cook for 35 minutes and then a 15 minute steam release will occur.\xa0
', '
After the steaming is up, turn the vent open then open the pot.\xa0
', '
Serve the ribs over mashed potatoes with a side of garlic butter (optional).\xa0
']

Name: lemongrass-chili-hoisin-baked-chicken
Ingredients: ['6 chicken thighs', '3 cups mini heirloom potatoes']
Seasoning: ['fresh herbs, for seasoning and garnish']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce + more for topping']
Procedure:
['
Season chicken with salt and pepper on both sides then place into a bowl along with the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce. Cover and let marinate for 30 minutes until ready to bake.\xa0
', '
Preheat oven to 400°F, then grease a baking dish and set aside.\xa0
', '
Chop up the potatoes and place into the dish and place the chicken on top.
', '
Drizzle a little more Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce over and sprinkle in some fresh herbs (thyme, rosemary, etc.).
', '
Bake for 25-30 minutes until chicken is cooked through and potatoes are fork tender.\xa0
', '
Garnish with more fresh herbs if desired and serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: stuffed-pepper-soup
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. olive oil ', '1 onion, diced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 lbs ground beef', '2 red bell peppers, diced', '2 cans diced tomatoes', '2 cups minute rice', 'fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 cans tomato sauce', '2 cups beef stock', '1 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar']
Procedure:
['
Heat a pot with a little olive oil to medium heat. Once hot, add in the diced onions and cook down for a few minutes and then add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook for another few minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the ground beef and brown for 2 minutes, mixing while cooking.\xa0
', '
Add in the diced bell peppers, diced tomato, tomato sauce, beef stock, paprika, salt, pepper, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, and brown sugar. Give a big stir and cover and simmer on low for 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
Stir in the minute rice, cover and let simmer for another 5 minutes.\xa0

', '
Serve with fresh chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: chinese-tea-egg
Ingredients: ['6 eggs']
Sauce Mix: ['2 black tea bags', '½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. palm sugar', '2 star anise ', '1 cinnamon stick', '½ tsp. black peppercorns', '2 orange peels ']
Procedure:
['
Boil water and once boiled, add in the 6 eggs and hard boil for 10 minutes. Turn heat off and pull the eggs out and remove the water.
', '
Using a butter knife gently tap the egg shells to crack the shells a bit, do it all over but not too much. Do this for all 6 eggs, then place them back into the pot and cover with 2 inches of water.
', '
Add in the tea bags, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce, palm sugar, star anise, cinnamon stick, black peppercorns, and orange peels.\xa0
', '
Bring to a boil, cover and reduce to a simmer for 2 hours.\xa0
', '
Once the 2 hours is up, remove from heat. Place the eggs and liquids in the fridge and allow to soak as you desire. Note: the longer they absorb the liquid, the more flavor the eggs have.\xa0
']

Name: onion-and-bagel-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 large yellow onion, sliced', '2 slices of cooked bacon', '2 eggs, sunny side up', '2 sesame bagels, sliced and toasted', '2 thick slices of cheddar cheese', '1 cup arugula']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan to medium heat with olive oil and toss in the sliced onion along with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce. Mix together and let cook down and caramelize for 30 minutes. If onions start to burn, turn heat down to low.\xa0

', '
Once onions are nice and caramelized, remove from pan and place into a bowl.
\xa0
', '
In the same pan, cook the bacon for 5 minutes on each side, or until crispy then remove and place on paper towels and pat dry.\xa0
', '
In the same pan, crack two eggs and let cook until fried but sunny on the top, then turn off the heat.\xa0
', '
Slice the bagels in half and toast them.\xa0

', '
Add the cheese, caramelized onions, egg, bacon and arugula.
']

Name: sauteed-pears-with-bacon-and-candied-walnuts
Ingredients: ['4 ripe pears, quartered and seeds removed', '⅓ cup bacon, thick-cut, ¼ inch pieces', '½ cup candied walnuts']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Peel and quarter the pears, then set aside.\xa0
', '
Heat skillet and then add in the chopped up bacon pieces. Cook for 5-10 minutes until almost crispy, then add in the pear wedges, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and sauté them until they have softened and the bacon is crispy, about another 5 minutes.
', '
Plate them and then top with candied walnuts. Serve right away while nice and warm.\xa0
']

Name: pad-see-ew
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. peanut oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 cup chicken thighs, sliced ', '4 stems Chinese broccoli ', '1 lb. rice noodles, stick form', '½ tsp. chili pepper flakes, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat skillet with peanut oil. When hot, add in Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook down for 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in the sliced chicken thighs and sauté for 5-7 minutes until brown and just about cooked through. Then add in the Chinese broccoli and keep cooking and tossing.\xa0
', '
Meanwhile in a pot, boil water,\xa0 then blanch the rice noodles for 3 minutes. Drain, then add into the skillet along with the Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Keep tossing to coat the noodles.
', '
Plate the pad see ew, garnish with crushed red pepper and serve.\xa0
']

Name: apple-cider-pulled-pork-sandwich
Ingredients: ['4 lbs. pork butt (shoulder)', '4 garlic cloves, halved', '1 yellow onion, sliced', '2 pieces of fresh thyme', '1 package rolls', '2 cups shredded cabbage, for topping']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. ground mustard', '1 tsp. paprika']
Sauce Mix: ['2 cups of apple cider', '2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl make the seasoning mix by mixing the salt, pepper, ground mustard and paprika together. Once mixed take\xa0 and rub it all over the pork, covering it on all sides.\xa0
', '
Place the sliced garlic and onion into the slow cooker followed by the fresh thyme leaves. Add the apple cider, apple cider vinegar and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce then place the pork butt down.\xa0
', '
Cover slow cooker and set to low for 8 hours.\xa0
', '
After 8 hours take the pork out and place on a cutting board. Let cool for a moment and then pull it apart using forks, then add the pulled meat back into the slow cooker.\xa0

', '
Make sandwiches by placing some meat down on bun with a little mayo and top with shredded cabbage for a nice crunch.\xa0

']

Name: butternut-squash-hummus
Ingredients: ['2 cups pre-cooked and cubed butternut squash', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 garlic clove', '1 Tbsp. tahini', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'serve with toasted pita bread']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. olive oil, for garnish', '1 tsp. black and white sesame seeds, for garnish', '¼ tsp. chili powder', 'fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Add all ingredients into the blender and pulse until creamy. Scrape down the sides with a rubber spatula and blend a little more.\xa0

', '
Transfer hummus to serving bowl and top with a drizzle of olive oil, a sprinkle of black and white sesame seeds, a little sprinkle of chili powder and fresh chopped parsley. Serve with a side of pita bread.\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: butternut-squash-and-soyrizo-tacos
Ingredients: ['½ tsp. olive oil ', '1 cup pre-cooked butternut squash, cut into cubes', '½ lb. soyrizo', '6-8 flour tortillas, grilled', '2 tsp. crumbled cotija cheese', 'fresh cilantro, for garnish', 'limes, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan with a little olive oil. Once hot, add in the pre-cooked and cubed butternut squash and cook for 2 minutes. Once they start to brown and crisp up, add in the soyrizo along with the Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce and cook for 5-7 minutes until soyrizo is cooked through and crispy and well mixed with the squash.\xa0
', '
In the meantime, grill the tortillas and set aside.\xa0
', '
Place the cooked tortillas down onto a plate and add the soyrizo and squash mixture. Top each with crumbled cotija cheese, fresh cilantro and serve tacos with lime wedges, for garnish.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: mushroom-ravioli-with-sage-butter-and-wine-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. olive oil', '8 oz. white crimini mushrooms, sliced', '3 garlic cloves, minced', 'fresh chopped sage, for sauce + garnish', '4 oz. butter, divided. (2 oz. with garlic sauce then remaining butter with the ravioli)', '1 lb. mushroom ravioli', '2 Tbsp. shaved parmesan cheese']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup white wine', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Soy Sauce', '½ tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a pan to medium heat and drizzle in some olive oil. When oil has heated, add in the sliced mushrooms and cook down for 5 minutes then add in minced garlic, sage, butter, white wine and both Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce and Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce.\xa0
', '
Let 2 oz. butter melt and cook down the wine with the mushrooms until a nice flavor and sauce has formed with the mushrooms, 10-15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Blanch the ravioli in boiling water as directed on the package and then drain and toss into the pan with the mushroom and sauce. Add in the remaining butter and toss ravioli a few times coating well. Slide onto a plate right away.\xa0
', '
Top with shaved parmesan and fresh sage(optional).
']

Name: sweet-potato-burgers
Ingredients: ['½ cup roasted and mashed sweet potato', 'olive oil, for drizzle ', '1 can black beans, drained and rinsed', '½ cup corn', '1 red bell pepper, finely diced', 'spinach, for topping', 'sesame buns', '2 slices red onion, for topping']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup bread crumbs', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '½ tsp. onion powder', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. coriander', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425°F. Peel and chop sweet potatoes, then place on a greased baking sheet.\xa0

', '
Drizzle with a little olive oil and roast for 40 minutes until soft and cooked through.\xa0
', '
Let cool and place potatoes into a bowl and roughly mash. Drain and rinse the black beans and add to the bowl with potatoes.\xa0
', '
Add in the corn, diced red pepper, bread crumbs, garlic powder, onion powder, black pepper, paprika, coriander, salt and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored sauce. Mix well using your hands, form into burger sized patties and set aside.\xa0
', '
Grill the burgers for 3-5 minutes on each side until crispy, then set aside.\xa0
', '
Place spinach on the bun, followed by the burger patty, and a few slices of red onion. Feel free to add any other toppings you desire.\xa0


']

Name: chicken-kebabs-with-garlic-butter
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken breast, cut into 1" pieces', '1 cup button mushrooms', '1 green bell pepper, cut into 1" pieces', '1 red bell pepper, cut into 1" pieces', '1 red onion, cut into 1" pieces', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper', '1 Tbsp. chopped parsley + more for serving (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['½ stick, butter', '½ Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. minced garlic']
Procedure:
['
Cut the chicken breast into 1" chunks and season with salt and pepper, then set aside. Cut the stems off the mushrooms, keeping just the tops. Then chop the green and red bell pepper and onion into 1" pieces.\xa0
', '
Heat grill to medium high heat. Skewer the chicken, peppers, mushroom and onion, making as many as you can.\xa0

', '
Drizzle skewers with olive oil, then place on the grill. Grill on each side for about 5 minutes, turning often.
', '
While the chicken skewers are cooking, make your garlic butter by melting ½ a stick of butter in a small bowl. Then add in the Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, minced garlic and finely chopped parsley. Stir together.\xa0

', '
When the chicken skewers are grilled nicely and cooked through, take off the grill and place on a serving plate.\xa0
', '
Spoon the oyster-garlic-butter mixture over the chicken and then top with more chopped parsley (optional). Serve and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: shrimp-pad-thai-with-zoodles
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 zucchinis, julienned ', '3 garlic cloves, chopped', '1 red bell pepper, diced', '2 green onions', '½ lb. peeled and deveined shrimp', '1 egg', '2 cups bean sprouts ', '⅓ cup roasted peanuts, chopped', '¼ cup chopped cilantro', 'lime wedges, for serving ']
Seasoning: ['⅛ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan to low heat with a little olive oil. Place the zucchini into the pan and toss, warming them gently, for about 5 minutes. Once cooked, drain out any remaining water left in the pan and remove the zucchini.
', '
Dry pan and then heat with a little more olive oil to medium high heat. Add in chopped garlic and cook down for 2-3 minutes, then add in diced red bell pepper and green onion, and cook for another 2 minutes.
', '
Add in the shrimp and cook them for 3 minutes until cooked through, then crack in 1 egg and mix around with everything until cooked.\xa0
', '
Add the zoodles back into the pan along with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, bean sprouts and chopped peanuts. Give one final mix then plate.\xa0
', '
For garnish, top with cilantro and a side of lime wedges.\xa0
']

Name: mushroom-chicken-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. boneless chicken breasts, cut into ¼" pieces', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '½ lb. baby bella mushrooms', '1 cup bean sprouts', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '2 tsp. ginger, minced', '2 green onions, sliced + some for garnish', '(optional) rice']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. dry white wine', '2 tsp. sugar', '2 tsp. corn starch']
Procedure:
['
Cut the chicken breast into pieces, season with salt and pepper, then set aside.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, mix together all the sauce ingredients and whisk well.\xa0

', '
Heat a pan with vegetable oil to medium high heat, then add in chicken. Cook for 2 minutes until golden brown on all sides, remove and set aside.\xa0
', '
In the same pan, add the mushrooms and cook for 5 minutes until soft. Then add in the bean sprouts, garlic, ginger and green onion. Adding in some more oil if needed, and cook for another 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Stir in the sauce, mixing everything together, then add chicken back in. Mix a few more times and turn down heat. Let simmer for 5 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and everything is coated in the sauce.\xa0
', '
Garnish with sliced green onion and serve with a side of rice (optional).\xa0
']

Name: hard-boiled-egg-crostini
Ingredients: ['2-4 radishes, sliced thin', '1 baguette, sliced', '6 hard boiled eggs, sliced in half lengthwise ', '1 cup arugula']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, for drizzle ', 'salt and pepper']
Procedure:
['
Slice the radishes and set aside.\xa0

', '
Slice the baguette and place onto a serving dish.\xa0

', '
Cut the hard boiled eggs in half, lengthwise.
', '
Place some arugula down onto the bread, then the sliced radishes, then hard boiled egg half.
', '
Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce over the top and then season with salt and pepper.\xa0
']

Name: pulled-chicken-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. boneless skinless chicken thighs', 'sesame buns, for serving ', '2 cups pre-made coleslaw ']
Marinade: ['½ cup ketchup', '½ cup BBQ sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '½ Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '1 tsp. yellow mustard', '½ tsp. cumin', '½ tsp. cayenne pepper']
Procedure:
['
Place chicken into the slow cooker along with ketchup, BBQ sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, apple cider vinegar, mustard, cumin, and cayenne pepper. Make sure the chicken is covered well in sauce mixture. Set slow cooker to low heat and cook for 6 hours.\xa0
', '
When the chicken is ready and extremely tender, take it out and shred it apart with forks, then place back into the slow cooker, and toss to marinate in sauce.\xa0

', '
Make sandwiches by placing some pulled chicken onto the bun and topping with coleslaw.\xa0
']

Name: bacon-and-pineapple-chicken-kebabs
Ingredients: ['2 chicken breasts, cut into 1 inch chunks', '1 lb. bacon, cut into pieces', '1 pineapple, cut into 2 inch chunks', 'wooden skewers, soaked in water']
Marinade: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, plus more for serving']
Procedure:
['
Cut the chicken into pieces and then place in a bowl along with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, cover and marinate for 30 minutes in the fridge.\xa0

', '
In the meantime, cook the bacon pieces in a pan for 3 minutes per side until almost crispy then take it out and let cool.\xa0
', '
Cut up the pineapple into chunks.
', '
Skewer the chicken pieces, bacon,\xa0 pineapple chunks and then grill kabobs for 5-7 minutes on each side, rotating often.\xa0

', '
When the chicken is cooked through, take them off and let cool.\xa0
', '
Serve with more Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce for topping.\xa0
']

Name: summer-chicken-chili
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 yellow onion, chopped', '1 jalapeno, diced', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '2 cans green chilis', '4 boneless chicken breasts, quartered', '5 cups chicken broth', '2 cans white beans, drained and rinsed', '1 cup frozen corn', 'fresh chopped cilantro, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. oregano', '½ tsp. cumin', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'salt and black pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a dutch oven or large pot, heat the olive oil, add in the chopped onion and jalapeño and cook for 5 minutes until they soften up. Then add in the minced garlic, oregano and cumin and cook for another minute.\xa0
', '
Add in the green chilis, quartered chicken, chicken broth and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Season with salt and pepper and then bring up to a boil then reduce heat, cover and let simmer for 15 minutes until chicken is tender and cooked through.\xa0

', '
Take the cooked chicken out and shred it with forks and then return to the pot along with white beans and corn. Bring back to a simmer and cook for another 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Serve with chopped cilantro and cheese and sour cream if you desire.\xa0
']

Name: low-country-boil
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baby potato medley', '4 corn on the cobbs, cut in to pieces', '4 andouille sausages, cut into chunks', '1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined ', 'lemons, for serving', 'fresh chopped parsley, for garish', '1 crusty baguette, for serving']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. old bay seasoning, plus more for serving ', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 lemon, halved', '2 bay leaves']
Procedure:
['
Bring water to a boil in a large stock pot. Add in the old bay seasoning, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, lemon halves and bay leaves. Bring up to a boil then reduce to a simmer.
', '
Add in the potatoes and corn, then let simmer for 10 minutes, and add the sausage. Cook for another 10 minutes until the potatoes have softened and the sausages are cooked. Then add in the shrimp and cook for 5 more minutes until shrimp is fully cooked, then drain the liquid and dump all of it out onto the table, or onto a serving platter.\xa0

', '
Serve with a side of lemons, more old bay seasoning, fresh chopped parsley and a crusty baguette.\xa0

']

Name: thai-shrimp-salad-spoons
Ingredients: ['½ cucumber, finely diced', '2 green onions,chopped', '1 red chili, chopped', '½ lb. cooked jumbo shrimp', '2 Tbsp. roasted peanuts, crushed', 'cilantro leaves, topping']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. lime juice', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin sauce']
Procedure:
['
Dice the cucumber and place into a mixing bowl along with the green onion and red chili.\xa0
', '
Add in the lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce and mix.\xa0
', '
Place a spoonful of the mixture onto a white ramen spoon, then top with a cooked shrimp, a few sprinkles of crushed peanuts and cilantro. Make as many as you can with the remaining mixture and shrimp. Serve and enjoy.
']

Name: beef-sukiyaki
Ingredients: ['1 cup green onion, sliced', '2 leaves of napa cabbage, sliced', '1 lb. beef, thinly sliced', '2 tsp. olive oil', '1 cup shiitake mushrooms', '½ cup kimchi', '1 piece tofu, cut into 1" pieces', '2 fried eggs, for topping']
Sauce Mix: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '¼ cup mirin', '1 cup vegetable stock', '¼ cup sugar']
Procedure:
['
Mix the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce in a bowl along with the mirin, vegetable stock and sugar.\xa0\xa0
', '
Arrange all the sliced vegetables onto a serving plate.\xa0
', '
Heat the electric skillet to medium high heat and add in oil and quickly brown the meat, then move to one side of the pot. Add in the other vegetables and tofu around in a circle filling it all up. Add the sauce you’ve made over everything, then cover and bring to a boil and cook for 2 minutes.\xa0\xa0
', '
Flip everything over and cook for another couple minutes.\xa0
', '
In a small skillet, fry two eggs for 2 minutes until sunny side up, then place on top. Serve and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: chicken-and-rice-skillet
Ingredients: ['2 tsp. olive oil ', '6 chicken thighs, skin on', '1 yellow onion, diced', '1 red bell pepper, diced', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '1 can diced tomatoes', '1 ½ cups white rice', '3 cups chicken stock']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. smoked paprika', 'salt and pepper', '1 tsp. ground cumin', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce', 'fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350°F. Heat cast iron skillet to medium high heat with a little olive oil.\xa0
', '
Season chicken thighs with smoked paprika, salt and pepper on both sides, then place chicken skin side down in the skillet. Brown on both sides for 2-3 minutes until golden brown, then remove and set aside.\xa0
', '
Turn the heat down to low and add in the diced onion, red bell pepper and garlic. Sauté for 5 minutes until they have softened.\xa0
', '
Season them with cumin and stir in.\xa0
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce, diced tomatoes, rice and chicken stock. Mix together.\xa0
', '
Place the chicken back into the mixture and cover the skillet with foil and place into the oven to bake for 20-25 minutes, until the rice is fully cooked and the chicken is cooked through. Serve straight from the skillet and garnish with fresh chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: chicken-skewer-mango-dip
Ingredients: ['4 chicken thighs, cut into thin strips', 'black and white sesame seeds, for chicken', 'cilantro leaves, for garnish', 'lime wedges (optional)']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 mango, cubed', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. coconut cream']
Procedure:
['
Cube 1 mango and add into the blender along with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce and coconut cream. Blend until creamy then pour into a small glass (shot glass size.) Place in the fridge until ready to use.
', '
Cut the chicken thighs into strips and skewer them. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Grill the chicken skewers for 3-5 minutes on each side until cooked through and crispy.\xa0
', '
Take the skewer off the grill and sprinkle them with sesame seeds, then place the skewer into the glass with mango sauce. Make as many appetizers as you can and garnish with cilantro leaves, and lime juice (optional). 
']

Name: simple-chow-mein
Ingredients: ['8 oz. thin lo mein noodles', '2 Tbsp. canola oil ', '2 cups carrot, chopped', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '⅛ cup water', '1 chicken breast cooked, chopped (optional)']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. chopped parsley']
Procedure:
['
Boil a pot of water and cook the lo mein noodles as directed on the package then drain and set aside until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pan or wok on high heat.
', '
Add 2 Tbsp. canola oil to the pan and then add the carrots and minced garlic. Cook down for 2-3 minutes until carrots have softened.
', '
Add in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and ⅛ cup water, then bring to a boil for 1 minute.
', '
Toss in the lo mein noodles and cooked chicken pieces (optional) give a few big tosses.
', '
Plate and garnish with chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: tuna-and-cucumber-bites
Ingredients: ['½ lb. sushi grade tuna, diced', '1 large cucumber, sliced']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. sesame seeds']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 green onion, sliced']
Procedure:
['
Add the diced tuna to a bowl along with the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and sliced green onion. Mix together and cover. Place in the fridge until ready to use.\xa0
', '
Slice the cucumber and place onto a serving plate. Place 1 spoonful of tuna onto each cucumber slice and then top with sesame seeds. Serve right away while fresh.\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: cilantro-lime-pesto
Ingredients: ['4 cups fresh packed cilantro ', '6 garlic cloves', '1 cup almonds', '½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '¾ cup olive oil', '¼ cup lime juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Flavored Hoisin Sauce', '½ cup water']
Procedure:
['
Place all ingredients into blender and blend until nice and smooth. Serve as a salad dressing, topping for chicken, or anything you desire!
', '
N/A
', '
N/A
']

Name: rainbow-veggie-noodle-bowl
Ingredients: ['8 oz. extra firm tofu', '2 large zucchini, julienned', '2 green onions, chopped thin', '1 cup carrots', '⅛ red cabbage', '⅓ cup snap peas', '1 handful chopped peanuts', 'mint leaves, for garnish ', 'lime wedge, for serving', '¼ cup cherry tomatoes, halved ']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '¼ tsp. black pepper', '½ tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame oil']
Procedure:
['
Press the tofu with paper towels to drain some of the moisture, then cut into small pieces.\xa0
', '
Heat a pan with oil and fry the tofu for 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy, then take out and set aside. While they are cooking, season with salt, pepper and garlic powder.\xa0
', '
Julienne the zucchini, chop the onion, carrots and cabbage. Toss that into the pan along with the snap peas and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Toss back in the tofu and mix together, heat for another 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Plate it, then top with chopped peanuts and mint leaves. Garnish with a lime wedge, cherry tomatoes and a side of thai peanut dressing (optional).\xa0
']

Name: mediterranean-tomato-salad-with-fresh-herbs
Ingredients: ['5 tomatoes, quartered ', '1 red onion, sliced thinly', '3 garlic cloves, chopped', '1 cup fresh chopped parsley', '1 cup fresh dill', 'some feta cheese for topping']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, add in the quartered tomatoes, sliced red onions, chopped garlic, chopped parsley and dill, then season with a little salt and pepper.\xa0

', '
In a small bowl, make the dressing by adding\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, lemon juice, white wine vinegar and extra virgin olive oil. Mix and then pour over the tomatoes.\xa0

', '
Season with a little more salt and pepper, fresh fill and then top with a few broken pieces of feta cheese.\xa0
']

Name: salmon-crudo
Ingredients: ['½ lb. sushi grade salmon', '¼ red onion, sliced thinly', '(optional)lemon wedge for serving']
Seasoning: ['maldon sea salt (or any flakey salt)to taste', 'black pepper', '1 Tbsp. capers']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup fresh lemon juice', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. mirin', '2 Tbsp. light brown sugar']
Procedure:
['
Make the ponzu sauce by mixing together the lemon juice, rice vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy, mirin, and light brown sugar. Whisk together until combined, then place in the fridge until ready to use.
', '
Using a sharp knife, slice the salmon against the grain into thin slices. Arrange them on a plate and then cover and place in the fridge for 1 hour before serving.\xa0
', '
Take the salmon out of the fridge and then spoon the ponzu sauce over the salmon, place thin red onion slices on top, season with maldon salt, black pepper and the capers. Garnish with a lemon wedge and serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: plum-and-gorgonzola-bruschetta
Ingredients: ['6 slices crusty sourdough bread', '1 tsp. fresh thyme, more if desired', '6 slices of gorgonzola cheese', '5 ripe plums or pluots, sliced ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. raw honey, more if desired', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Toast the sourdough slices and then drizzle each with raw honey and some thyme. Place a few slices of cheese down and then place it into the toaster or oven for a few minutes just to slightly melt the cheese.\xa0
', '
Lay the plum slices on top and then drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce and a little more honey and thyme(optional).\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: chinese-chicken-salad-with-summer-citrus
Ingredients: ['2 cups shredded chicken breast, pre cooked', '4 cups chinese cabbage, shredded', '1 cup red cabbage, shredded', '1 cup shredded carrot', '(optional) ½ cup chopped green onion', '12 cup fried wonton noodles', '1 mandarin orange, peeled and segmented', '(optional) 1 tsp. sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken ']
Procedure:
['
Combine the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Orange Chicken with\xa0 2 cups of pre-cooked chicken strips. Mix together and let chill until ready to use.\xa0
', '
In a large salad bowl, mix the shredded cabbage(s), carrots, green onions (optional) and the fried wonton noodles. Toss well then add in the shredded, coated orange chicken and give another toss.\xa0
', '
Place into a bowl and top with more chopped green onion(optional), mandarin slices and sesame seeds(optional). Serve right away while fresh.\xa0
']

Name: hoisin-beef-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef, cut into strips', '1 bunch of bok choy or choy sum, halved', '4 green onions, sliced', '¼ cup water']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil + 1 tsp. for cooking', '1 red chili, chopped ', '2 garlic cloves', '1 tsp. grated ginger', '⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, chopped red chilis, garlic, ginger and Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Flavored Hoisin Sauce in a large bowl. Add in the sliced beef and coat to marinate. Cover and let that marinate for 3 hours, or for better results overnight. Save half the sauce for later.
', '
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over high heat. Fry the marinated beef mixture until cooked through and then take out and set aside.\xa0
', '
Add in the halved bok choy, green onions, water and then cover and let steam until vegetables have softened. About 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add the meat back into the skillet along with the other half of the sauce. Give a few final tosses and then plate.
']

Name: smoked-salmon-roll-ups
Ingredients: ['8 slices thinly sliced smoked salmon', '8 oz soft cream cheese', '4-6 pieces fresh dill, for topping']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, for topping', 'fresh black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Lay out salmon slices, fill with 1 oz. cream cheese each and roll up.
', '
Plate them and top with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy, fresh black pepper and dill if desired. Serve right away.\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: sesame-grilled-shishito-peppers
Ingredients: ['½ lb. shishito peppers, washed and dried', '2 Tbsp. crushed walnuts', '½ lemon juiced, plus wedge for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Heat skillet to high heat.\xa0
', '
Toss peppers in a bowl with the Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and set aside.\xa0
', '
Blister the peppers in the skillet for 6 minutes, tossing often.
', '
Place the peppers back into the bowl and add the crushed walnuts and lemon juice. Toss and serve immediately, with lemon slices (optional).\xa0
']

Name: ruben-bites
Ingredients: ['2 slices rye bread, cut into small squares', '½ lb. corned beef', '½ cup butter pickles', 'toothpicks, for assembling ']
Procedure:
['
Cut the rye bread into small squares.
', '
Place corned beef on bread, add Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, and top with a pickle.\xa0
', '
Assemble sandwich with a toothpick and enjoy.
']

Name: zucchini-bolognese
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. olive oil', '½ onion, chopped', '2 garlic cloves, chopped', '1 zucchini', '½ lb. pasta, for serving', '1 tsp. capers, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. dried chili flakes', '½ tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. dried thyme', '1 can whole tomatoes', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', 'splash of dry white wine ', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Place the olive oil into a pan and set to medium high heat. When the oil is hot, toss in the chopped onion and sauté for a few minutes until they begin to soften.\xa0
', '
Add in the chopped garlic and cook for 2-3 minutes. Season with chili flakes, paprika, dried thyme, add the can of tomatoes, and the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and a splash of dry white wine.\xa0
', '
Simmer on medium heat for 10-15 minutes until the sauce thickens, stirring often.\xa0
', '
Shred the zucchini on a grater, then add into the sauce and let cook for another 5-10 minutes. Taste and season with salt and pepper if needed.\xa0

', '
Cook the pasta, then drain and place into a serving bowl with a little olive oil.\xa0
', '
Spoon the tomato and zucchini sauce over the pasta, top with capers and a little more salt.\xa0
']

Name: paleo-chicken-cobb-salad
Ingredients: ['2 boneless chicken breasts', '2 cups roughly chopped romaine lettuce', '4 slices of cooked bacon, cut into pieces', '2 hard boiled eggs', '1 cucumber, peeled and cubed', '⅓ cup corn', '⅓ cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '2 green onions, sliced', '⅓ cup blue cheese crumbles']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a freezer bag, place the chicken breasts and the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce along with a little black pepper. Place in the fridge to marinate for at least two hours before grilling.\xa0
', '
Grill the chicken breasts on the grill top with a little oil for 5-7 minutes per side until cooked through, then set aside to cool before cubing.\xa0
', '
In a large salad bowl, place the roughly chopped romaine lettuce, then add the cooked bacon pieces, hard boiled eggs, cubed cucumber, corn, halved cherry tomatoes, sliced green onions and blue cheese crumbles.\xa0
', '
Serve with a side of ranch dressing.\xa0
']

Name: sesame-and-soy-chocolate-chip-cookies
Ingredients: ['1 cup melted butter, cooled', '1 ½ cup white sugar', '1 cup light brown sugar', '2 eggs', '2 tsp. vanilla extract', '3 cups flour', '1 ½ tsp. baking powder', '1 ½ tsp. baking soda', '¼ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black sesame seeds', '½ tsp. white sesame seeds', '8 oz. dark chocolate chips']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', 'flaky salt, for topping']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, add the melted butter, white sugar, brown sugar and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Then add in the eggs, and the vanilla extract and mix.
', '
Add in the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, black and white sesame seeds and mix. Fold in the chocolate chips and then add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce. Give a final mix and then cover bowl with plastic wrap and let chill in the fridge for an hour.\xa0
', '
Preheat oven to 350°F. Then line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Scoop out balls of dough onto the sheet, spacing them 2 inches apart.\xa0
', '
Place into the oven and bake for 8-10 minutes until nice and golden brown. Take out and sprinkle with a little flaky salt before serving.\xa0
']

Name: homemade-ramen
Ingredients: ['8 cups vegetable broth', '1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 ½ tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. miso paste', '1 cup sliced green onions', '1 package ramen noodles', '1 egg, soft boiled']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce', '¾ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', 'hot sauce, or chili sauce (optional for topping)']
Procedure:
['
Add the vegetable broth to a pot and bring to a low boil. Place in Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, Minced Garlic, miso paste and boil until miso paste has dissolved and the garlic and ginger are soft, for about 5 minutes or so.\xa0
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, salt, pepper and half of the sliced green onions. Cook another 5 minutes until the onions have softened.\xa0
', '
Add in the ramen noodles and cook for 3 minutes, holding them under the broth until soft. Remove from the heat and gently pull the noodles apart with chopsticks.\xa0

', '
Garnish with a soft boiled egg, cut in half, more sliced green onion and chili or hot sauce.\xa0

']

Name: shrimp-po-boy-sandwich
Ingredients: ['vegetable oil, for frying ', '¼ cup cornmeal', '½ cup all-purpose flour', '½ cup buttermilk', '1 whole egg', '1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '3-4 french rolls', '2 cups shredded lettuce', '2 tomatoes, sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. garlic powder', '2 tsp. onion powder', '1 tsp. cayenne pepper', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper']
Sauce Mix: ['1 cup mayo', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '½ lemon, juiced', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. dijon mustard', '2 Tbsp. sweet relish', '1 scallion, chopped', '1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce', '1 tsp. creole seasoning']
Procedure:
['
Heat a medium sized saucepan on medium to high heat. Fill up halfway with vegetable oil and let heat.\xa0
', '
Mix together the cornmeal, flour, garlic powder, onion powder, cayenne, salt and pepper.\xa0

', '
In a separate bowl, mix the buttermilk with the whole egg and set aside.\xa0
', '
Dip the shrimp into the buttermilk followed by the flour mix then into the hot oil to fry. Do this with a handful of shrimp at a time. Fry them for 3-4 minutes each batch, then remove and place onto paper towels to cool and drain. Repeat until all shrimp has been fried.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, make the sauce mix by adding the mayo, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, dijon mustard, sweet relish, chopped scallion, Worcestershire sauce and creole seasoning. Whisk well and then begin to make the sandwiches.\xa0
', '
Take a french roll and spread the sauce mix on followed by lettuce, tomato and top with the fried shrimp. Top off with a little more sauce as desired. You should be able to make 3 or 4 sandwiches. Serve right away while nice and hot, with a side of oyster flavored sauce.\xa0
']

Name: crispy-eggplant-bites
Ingredients: ['vegetable oil, for frying', '1 eggplant, cut into wedges', '2 cups cornmeal', '2 eggs, beaten', '2 Tbsp. fresh chopped parsley, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['sea salt to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat vegetable oil in a pot on medium high heat.\xa0
', '
Place eggplant wedges into the cornmeal, then into the egg, then back into the cornmeal, and then into the hot oil.\xa0
', '
Fry a few at a time for 3 minutes, flipping halfway. Fry until golden brown and crispy. Take out with a slotted spoon, season with sea salt and let drain on paper towels before serving.
', '
Serve with a side of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Top with fresh chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: beef-with-broccoli-rice
Ingredients: ['1 head of broccoli, riced', '1 lb. beef sirloin', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion, chopped', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '2 pcs ginger, chopped', '1 cup crimini mushrooms']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef ']
Procedure:
['
Chop up the broccoli head, removing the stems. Place florets into food processor and pulse until riced, but not over chopped. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Slice the beef into ¼ inch pieces and place into a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef. Let that marinate for 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Heat a large frying pan to medium high heat with a little olive oil. Add the chopped onion, garlic, ginger and cook down for 2-3 minutes. Then, add crimini mushrooms, then the marinated beef. Cook for 5 or so minutes until beef begins to darken and crisp then toss in the broccoli rice.\xa0
', '
Turn down the heat to medium and stir fry for 10 minutes until meat is nicely cooked through, and the broccoli rice has softened and crisped up.\xa0
', '
Add in a little more Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce for Broccoli Beef and keep cooking for another few minutes.\xa0
', '
Remove from heat and serve right away while hot.\xa0
']

Name: pineapple-and-sausage-bites
Ingredients: ['1 package smoked sausage (of any type of meat desired)', '1 cup pineapple, cubed', 'toothpicks ']
Procedure:
['
Grill the sausage and set aside to cool. Slice them into 1 inch chunks.\xa0
', '
Cut the pineapple into small chunks.\xa0
', '
Place a cube of pineapple onto the sausage piece, making as many as you can.
', '
Skewer them with toothpicks. Top with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce as desired.\xa0
']

Name: bacon-wrapped-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '10 slices of bacon']
Marinade: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce, plus more for dipping']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425°F.\xa0
', '
Wrap all the shrimp with bacon slices, place on a lined baking tray coating with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Grilling and Dipping Sauce then bake for 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
Serve with a side of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon and Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce (optional).
']

Name: broccoli-and-mushroom-mac-and-cheese
Ingredients: ['8 oz. macaroni pasta', '2 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 garlic cloves, chopped', '1 shallot, minced', '2 Tbsp. flour', '1 ⅓ cup milk', '3 cups chopped broccoli ', '2 cups chopped crimini mushrooms', '6 oz. extra sharp cheddar cheddar cheese', '⅓ cup bread crumbs', '1 Tbsp. fresh chopped parsley, for garnish (optional)']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 375 °F.\xa0
', '
In a large pot, heat water with salt and bring to a boil. Cook the pasta as directed, drain and set aside.\xa0
', '
Melt the butter in a large skillet, then toss in the chopped garlic, shallot and cook for 2 minutes. Whisk in the flour and then slowly whisk in the milk until thickened. If it’s too thick, add more milk. Season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Chop up the broccoli and add into the pot along with the cooked macaroni, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Soy Sauce, crimini mushrooms and shredded cheese. Mix together, and then place into a greased baking dish, top with bread crumbs and bake for 25 minutes at 375°F. Top with fresh chopped parsley (optional).
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']
