Name: sweet-and-spicy-tuna-poke
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sushi grade ahi tuna, cut into small cubes', '2 cups white rice', '⅓ cup chopped green onion', '½ avocado', '1 cucumber, sliced', '½ tsp. black sesame seeds']
Marinade: ['¼ Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sauce Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Sauce', '1 tsp. rice vinegar', '½ lime, juiced', '½ tsp. red pepper flakes', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Mix the chopped tuna in a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Sauce, rice vinegar, lime juice, red pepper flakes and sesame oil.\xa0
', '
Make the poke bowl by adding the white rice, topping with the marinated tuna, chopped green onion, sliced avocado, cucumber slices, and black sesame seeds.\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: cajun-sausage-and-shrimp-vegetable-skillet
Ingredients: ['1 lb. cooked chicken sausage (or any other meat sausage you like)', '2 zucchini, sliced', '2 yellow squash, sliced', '1 bunch asparagus, cut into pieces', '2 red bell peppers, roughly chopped', '1 Tbsp. olive oil, for cooking', '1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '⅓ cup fresh chopped parsley', '1 lemon wedge, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Cajun seasoning, taste and adjust if needed']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, toss together the chicken sausage, sliced zucchini, squash, asparagus, bell pepper, salt and pepper. Add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Cajun seasoning. Toss together until nicely coated with the seasoning.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pan to medium high heat with a little olive oil. When hot, add in the chicken sausage and veggies. Cook for 8-10 minutes until the veggies are soft and the sausage is cooked through. Then add in the shrimp and cook for an additional 3-5 minutes until cooked.
', '
Place into a large serving plate and garnish with fresh chopped parsley and a lemon wedge.
']

Name: grilled-lobster-tail
Ingredients: ['2 cut lobster tails', '1⁄4 cup olive oil']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['8 Tbsp. unsalted butter, softened', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling and Dipping Sauce', '1 tsp. chopped chives ', '1 1⁄2 tsp. crushed red chili flakes', '4 cloves garlic, finely chopped', 'zest of 1 lemon']
Procedure:
['
Preheat grill to medium high heat.
', '
Brush the open side of the lobster tail with olive oil, season with salt and pepper, then place the cut side down and cook for 5 minutes until the top shells are bright red.\xa0
', '
Flip over and then brush with the sauce mix and continue grilling for another 5 minutes.\xa0
', '
Serve the lobster tails with more of the sauce mix.
']

Name: summer-breakfast-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '4 eggs, scrambled', '4 corn tortillas', '1 cup black beans, cooked', '1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '½ avocado', '¼ cup chopped cilantro']
Procedure:
['
In a pan with a little olive oil, slowly scramble the eggs on low medium heat. When the eggs are cooked, turn off heat but keep in the pan to stay warm.\xa0
', '
Warm the tortillas and then begin making the tacos.\xa0
', '
Add the scrambled eggs, black beans, cherry tomatoes, avocado and then drizzle them with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Garnish with fresh chopped cilantro and serve right away while warm.\xa0
']

Name: stuffed-sweet-potato
Ingredients: ['4 medium sweet potatoes', '½ Tbsp. olive oil', '1 clove garlic, chopped', '6 cups baby spinach', '1 cup cooked quinoa', '¼ cup pecans', '¼ cup dried cranberries', '1 oz. feta cheese, crumbled for topping']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400 ºF.\xa0
', '
Slice sweet potato in half lengthwise, but not all the way through and place them face down on a lined baking sheet.\xa0

', '
Roast for 30-40 minutes until soft. While potatoes are roasting add olive oil to a pan and cook down the chopped garlic for 2-3 minutes and then toss in the spinach.\xa0
', '
Cook down for another few minutes until spinach is wilted.
', '
Add in the cooked quinoa, chopped pecans, dried cranberries, Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce and salt and pepper to taste. Then stir it all together.\xa0\xa0
', '
Let sweet potatoes cool before scooping them out. Once cooled, place a heap of the quinoa mixture into the middle of each sweet potato. Do this for each of them until you’re out of quinoa. Top with feta cheese.

']

Name: lemongrass-tofu-summer-rolls
Ingredients: ['1 lb. extra firm tofu', '1 package vermicelli rice noodles', '1 red pepper, julienned', '1 small cucumber, julienned', '2 carrots, julienned ', '½ head of cabbage, sliced thin', '2 spring onions, finely sliced', '8 rice paper wrappers', '1 handful mint']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin, for grilling tofu, and for drizzle']
Procedure:
['
Drain the tofu and pat dry as best as you can, removing the liquid. Slice it into small thin pieces and place into a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce to marinate for a few hours before grilling.
', '
Cook the vermicelli rice noodles according to package and set aside.
', '
Heat the skillet to medium high heat and cook the tofu until golden brown and crispy on all sides( 5-10 minutes). Brush with some more sauce while cooking. When crispy, take off the heat and set aside.\xa0
', '
Prep all the veggies and set aside.
', '
Make the wraps by laying out rice paper and rubbing it down with water.
', '
Place the veggies down along with the tofu and mint, and add an extra drizzle of sauce. Wrap it up tightly and then give it a slice in half. Do this for as many as you can make. Serve with a side of Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce for dipping.

']

Name: lime-cilantro-chilaquiles
Ingredients: ['½ lb. chorizo sausage', 'oil, for frying', '2 handfuls corn tortilla chips', '⅓ cup queso fresco, crumbled', '3 jalapeno peppers, sliced', 'cilantro, garnish', '1 egg, sunny side up']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce + 1 Tbsp. for topping ', 'limes, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Heat a medium cast iron skillet to medium high heat.\xa0
', '
Cook the chorizo sausage with ⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce. When cooked through, take out and place in a bowl for later.\xa0
', '
In the same skillet, add the oil and a little more Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce. Bring to a low simmer and then stir in the tortilla chips until lightly covered. Letting them soften a bit.\xa0
', '
Top the chips with the chorizo and Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce, crumbled queso fresco cheese, sliced jalapeno peppers, chopped cilantro, and a sunny side up egg. Serve with a lime wedge.

']

Name: hoisin-roasted-cauliflower-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 small head of cauliflower', '8 corn tortillas', 'chopped cabbage, garnish', '1 red onion, sliced thin', 'jalapeno slices, garnish', 'cilantro, garnish (optional)', '½ cup queso fresco cheese, crumbles']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 450ºF. Then line a baking tray with foil.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, toss the roughly chopped cauliflower with the Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce.\xa0

', '
Lay out onto the baking sheet and bake for 18-20 minutes until cooked and crispy.\xa0
', '
Heat the tortillas and then make the tacos by adding the cooked cauliflower, topped with cabbage, red onion, sliced jalapeno, cilantro, lime juice, and queso fresco cheese. Serve with a side of Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce.

']

Name: vegan-avocado-toast
Ingredients: ['½  can chickpeas', '4 slices sourdough ', '1 avocado, mashed', '½  cup bean sprouts']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce', '½ tsp. of red chili flakes']
Procedure:
['
Drain and rinse chickpeas and then toss them in a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce.
', '
Bake for 25 minutes on 400ºF until crispy.\xa0
', '
Toast the sourdough to your liking.
', '
Mash the avocado and spread onto the toast then top with bean sprouts, red chili flakes and the roasted chickpeas.

', '
Drizzle more Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce on the top as desired.\xa0
']

Name: lime-cilantro-chicken-quesadillas
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken breast, shredded', '1 jalapeno, chopped for mixture, and sliced for garnish', '1 medium green bell pepper, chopped', '½ cup corn', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 cups cheddar cheese', '8 large flour tortillas', 'cilantro, for garnish', 'limes, for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 cups Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce (for marinade, and topping)']
Procedure:
['
Place chicken breasts into a bag along with 2 cups Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce. Marinate in the fridge for a few hours or overnight.\xa0
', '
Grill the chicken breasts until cooked through, 5-7 minutes per side. Take off the heat and let cool. Once cooled, shred it using two forks and place into a bowl.\xa0
', '
Add ½ chopped jalapeno, green pepper and corn and mix in with the shredded chicken.\xa0
', '
Heat a large pan on medium high heat with olive oil.\xa0
', '
Place a heap of cheese into the flour tortilla and then a few big scoops of the shredded chicken. Fold it over and place in the pan. Press down to flatten it out a bit. Cook for a few minutes on each side until tortillas are crispy and the cheese is melted.\xa0
', '
Garnish with chopped cilantro, remaining sliced jalapeno peppers and a side of lime wedges. Repeat until 8 quesadillas are done.\xa0
']

Name: lime-cilantro-turkey-burger
Ingredients: ['1 lb. lean ground turkey', 'sesame seed buns', '1 pc lettuce, for topping', '1 tomato, for topping', '1 red onion, ', 'pickles, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix the ground turkey, salt, pepper and Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce. Form into burger sized patties and set aside.\xa0
', '
Heat the pan or grill to medium high heat. Cook the turkey burger for 5 or so minutes per side until cooked though.\xa0
', '
Serve on a toasted sesame seed bun and top with lettuce, tomato, red onion and a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Lime Cilantro Hoisin Sauce. Optional, serve with pickles as a garnish.\xa0

']

Name: lemongrass-chicken-and-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['2 chicken breast, grilled', '¼ cup cooked quinoa', '¼ cup cooked brown rice', '1 cup cherry tomatoes', '½ head broccoli cut into florets', '3 cups roasted sweet potato, small cubes', '4 cups chopped kale']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce (for chicken), plus more for drizzle']
Procedure:
['
Brush the chicken breasts on each side with Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce and grill for 5-7 minutes per side. When cooked through, take off and let cool before slicing.\xa0

', '
Arrange the bowl by adding the cooked quinoa, cooked brown rice, topped with cherry tomatoes, broccoli florets, roasted sweet potato cubes, chopped kale and the previously grilled chicken.\xa0

', '
Drizzle with more Lee Kum Kee Lemongrass Chili Hoisin Sauce and season with salt and pepper.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: philly-cheesesteak-with-mushroom-flavored-dark-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 cup white onion, chopped', '1 cup crimini mushrooms, chopped', '½ lb. top round, cut into thin slices', '2 thick slices of Provolone cheese', '2 hoagie rolls']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M0vsY0ojvT4&feature=youtu.be
', '
Heat the flat top to medium/high heat and add olive oil. Then add chopped onion and mushrooms, adding salt and pepper to taste and 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce, tossing lightly for 3-4 minutes until cooked down.\xa0
', '
Push onions aside and add the chopped meat to the flat top. Season with salt and pepper and 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Dark Soy Sauce.
', '
When the meat is cooked through, mix with the onions and mushrooms.
', '
Form meat into a thin pile and place two slices of provolone cheese over the pile. Let that melt down for a minute.\xa0
', '
Take the sliced hoagie roll and place it face down over 1 slice of cheese and then with a large spatula scoop the meat and then flip it over. Do the same with the other roll. Serve immediately while hot.
']

Name: baked-parmesan-crisps
Ingredients: ['1 cup grated Parmesan cheese']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400ºF. Place scoops of grated parmesan cheese onto baking sheet and flatten into 1” diameter crisps.
', '
Bake for 3-5 minutes until crispy then allow time to cool.
', '
Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce.\xa0
']

Name: mini-cheeseburgers
Ingredients: ['½ lb. ground beef', '1 egg', '4 slices cheddar cheese, cut into small squares', '1 package mini slider rolls', 'lettuce ', 'tomato']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix ½ lb. ground beef with 1 egg and 2 Tbsp.Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce.
', '
Form into mini burgers and lay out on a tray.\xa0
', '
Grill burgers for 2-3 minutes per side until medium.
', '
Place a little piece of cheddar cheese on to the burgers and let that melt. Place burgers onto mini slider rolls and top with lettuce and tomato.\xa0
']

Name: soy-roasted-chickpeas
Ingredients: ['1 can chickpeas, rinsed and dried']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce', 'sea salt to taste ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400ºF.\xa0
', '
Toss chickpeas in a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and then spread out on a baking sheet.\xa0\xa0
', '
Roast for 15 minutes and then toss them and roast for another 15 minutes until golden brown and crispy. Season with sea salt immediately and serve.\xa0
']

Name: cherry-tomato-bruschetta
Ingredients: ['2 cups cherry tomatoes, halved', '1 toasted baguette']
Seasoning: ['2 Tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 handful fresh basil, ripped', 'sea salt + black pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Cut the cherry tomatoes in half and place in a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, olive oil, minced garlic, basil, sea salt and pepper.
', '
Mix and serve with a toasted baguette.\xa0
', '
N/A
']

Name: grilled-watermelon
Ingredients: ['1 small watermelon, cut into triangles', '⅓ cup crumbled goat cheese, for topping', 'mint, for garnish']
Marinade: ['⅓ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Brush the watermelon slices with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce.
', '
Grill both sides for 3-5 minutes each until they have nice grill marks.\xa0
', '
Place on a serving platter and top with crumbled goat cheese and fresh mint.\xa0
']

Name: spicy-grilled-chicken-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 chicken breasts', '2 brioche buns ', '1 cup premade coleslaw']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, place the chicken breasts along with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling and Dipping Sauce. Let them marinate for 2 hours in the fridge before grilling.
', '
Heat the grill and then place the marinated chicken down. Cook for 10 minutes on each side until cooked through and nicely charred. Take out and let cool.\xa0
', '
Prepare the sandwiches by spreading mayo on the bun, then place down the grilled chicken breast and top with coleslaw. Do this for both sandwiches.\xa0
']

Name: lemon-garlic-and-black-pepper-orzo-salad
Ingredients: ['¾ cup orzo pasta', '½ lb. asparagus', '¼ cup fresh dill', '⅓ cup feta cheese', '1 scallion, sliced thin', '2 persian cucumbers, diced', '2 cups baby arugula', '2 Tbsp. toasted pine nuts']
Procedure:
['
Boil orzo as directed until al dente. When there is no liquid left, toss in the asparagus and cook for 5 more minutes then take off heat and let cool.
', '
In a serving bowl, add the cooked and cooled orzo, asparagus, dill, feta cheese, scallions, cucumber, arugula and toasted pine nuts.\xa0
', '
Add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce while giving a few tosses.
']

Name: black-pepper-chargrilled-eggplant
Ingredients: ['4-6 baby eggplants ', 'olive oil, for cooking', '2 Tbsp. fresh parsley, chopped for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Slice the eggplants in half lengthwise.\xa0
', '
Brush them with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce.
', '
Heat grill pan to medium high heat with olive oil. Place the eggplant slices skin side down and grill for 10 minutes until skin has charred, then flip and cook for another 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Place the grilled eggplant on a serving plate.\xa0
', '
In a small bowl, mix the tahini and lemon juice. Drizzle over the eggplant and top with fresh chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: beef-and-rice-casserole
Ingredients: ['1 whole zucchini, cut into small cubes', '1 piece green bell pepper, seeded and cut into small cubes', '1 tsp. sugar', '1/2 cup rice, uncooked', '1½ cups tomatoes, diced', '1/2 cup water', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 whole red onion, medium, sliced thin', '1 lb. ground beef ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a medium saucepot, sauté onions, ground beef and sugar with oil until for 3-5 minutes or until browned.
', '
Add in vegetables, rice and sauces. Sauté for another 5-8 minutes. Pour in water and bring to a boil.
', '
Place lid on top of pot and simmer for 20-30 minutes or until rice is cooked through.
']

Name: grilled-artichokes-with-lemon-and-garlic
Ingredients: ['½ cup lemon juice', '2 large artichokes', '(optional) ½ lemon, sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Boil water with ½ cup lemon juice.
', '
Cut the tops off the artichokes and trim any unwanted leaves. Place into the water and boil for 15 minutes then take out and let drain.\xa0
', '
Heat the grill to medium-high heat.\xa0
', '
Cut the boiled artichokes in half longways and brush them with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce, then place them face down on the grill and cook for 5-10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Brushing on more sauce as you go and season with salt and pepper as desired. Remove from grill and serve immediately, with lemon slices (optional).\xa0
']

Name: crispy-corn-fritters
Ingredients: ['3 cups corn', '1 cup flour', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1 Tsp. baking powder', '2 eggs', '¾ cup heavy cream', 'vegetable oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix corn, flour, sugar, baking powder, eggs and heavy cream.
', '
Form batter into 2 Tbsp. balls and fry for 3 minutes until golden brown and crispy.\xa0
', '
Season with salt and pepper and serve with a side of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
']

STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: black-pepper-grilled-bratwurst
Ingredients: ['1 package bratwurst']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce, for bratwurst']
Procedure:
['
Brush bratwurst with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce. Grill on medium/high heat for 15 minutes, flipping often.\xa0
', '
When cooked through, take off the grill and let cool before slicing.
', '
Serve bratwurst with a side of whole grain mustard.
']

Name: picnic-charcuterie
Ingredients: ['1 yellow + 1 green zucchini', '4 small red bell peppers', '4 pearl onions', '1 rustic baguette', '⅓ cup dates', '1 bunch grapes', '½ lb. salami + prosciutto ', '1 bowl of buffalo mozzarella or burrata cheese', '6 slices aged provolone cheese']
Marinade: ['Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce, to brush on vegetables']
Procedure:
['
Brush the zucchini, peppers and onions with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce and grill them. When they are soft and nicely grilled take them off.\xa0
', '
Arrange all the food onto a charcuterie board as well as the grilled vegetables.\xa0
', '
Add ⅓ cup of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce into a bowl for dipping veggies and meats.\xa0
']

Name: spicy-chicken-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. boneless chicken thighs', '½ cup white onion, finely diced', '1 Tbsp. diced jalapeno', '½ cup chopped cilantro', '10 flour tortillas', 'lime wedge, for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce, plus more for topping']
Procedure:
['
Place Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce into a bowl along with the chicken thighs. Mix around and let that marinate for a few hours in the fridge.\xa0
', '
When ready to cook, heat up grill to medium/high heat.\xa0
', '
Toss the chicken on the grill and cook for 10 minutes per side until crispy and cooked through. Take off the grill and let cool before finely chopping.\xa0
', '
Dice the onion and jalapeno pepper and chop the cilantro.\xa0
', '
Chop up the chicken thighs into small pieces.\xa0
', '
Warm flour tortillas and then make the tacos by adding the chopped chicken, onion, jalapeno and cilantro. Top with more Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce and serve right away while hot with lime for garnish.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: buddha-bowl
Ingredients: ['2 cups cooked jasmine rice', '1 cup roasted beets', '1 cup purple cauliflower florets', '½ avocado', '1 cup raw broccoli rabe, stems removed', '1 Tbsp. pepitas ', '1 Tbsp. almonds', '1 Tbsp. raisins ', '1 radish, sliced thin', '(optional) 2, ⅛” lemon or lime slices, for garnish', '(optional) edible flowers']
Seasoning: ['1 lemon, juiced', 'salt and pepper to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In the bowl, place the cooked jasmine rice, topping with roasted beets, purple cauliflower, avocado, broccoli rabe, pepitas, almonds, raisins, radish slices, lemon juice, salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Drizzle a little Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, season with salt and pepper over the avocado and serve.\xa0
', '
Garnish with lemon and lime slices and real or edible flowers (optional).\xa0
']

Name: citrus-salmon-skewers
Ingredients: ['1 lb. salmon fillets, cut into 1" pieces', 'fresh chopped cilantro, for garnish', '(optional) spring salad or rice']
Seasoning: ['½ tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', '(optional) ½ tsp. red pepper flakes']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling & Dipping Sauce, plus more for dipping', '2 limes, juiced', '½ lemon, juiced', '2 garlic cloves, minced']
Procedure:
["
In a bowl, add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling & Dipping Sauce along with the lime juice, lemon juice, and garlic. Place the salmon pieces into the bowl and let marinate for 30 minutes. Don't over marinate, or the fish will start cooking from the citrus juice.\xa0
", '
Place the salmon pieces onto wooden or metal skewers with lemon slices every other piece of salmon. Then sprinkle the salmon with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes (optional).\xa0
', "
Put broiler on and when it's hot place the salmon in and cook for 10 minutes, until cooked through.\xa0
", '
Serve with a little Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling & Dipping Sauce on the side for dipping. Along with, chopped cilantro and a spring salad or rice (optional).
']

Name: lemon-pepper-grilled-chicken
Ingredients: ['4 pcs chicken breasts ', '2 green onions, thinly sliced (for garnish)', '(optional) 1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds, for garnish', '½ lemon, for garnish', '(optional) rice or salad']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce, plus more for finishing', '½ cup lemon juice']
Procedure:
['
Place the chicken breasts into a freezer bag along with 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce and lemon juice. Mix the chicken with the sauce and let that marinate for a few hours before grilling.\xa0
', '
Preheat grill over medium heat. Place the chicken on the grill and cook on one side for 10 minutes until crispy and browned. Turnover and cook for another 10-15 minutes until cooked through.\xa0
', '
Take off the grill and plate it along with a drizzle of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce, sliced green onion, toasted sesame seeds (optional) and a few slices of lemon.\xa0
', '
Serve right away while hot. Optional:\xa0 you can serve chicken with a side of rice or a salad.\xa0
']

Name: tuna-tartare-with-sesame-chili-and-ginger
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sushi grade tuna loin ', 'rice crackers for serving', 'fresh cilantro for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. honey ', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce ', 'juice of 1 lime', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1” piece of fresh ginger root, peeled and  grated', '1 fresno chili or jalapeño, minced', '2 scallions, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6xv-x2TxgWE&feature=youtu.be
', '
In a small bowl combine and mix together honey, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, lime juice, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, fresh ginger root, fresno chili or jalapeno, scallions, and toasted sesame seeds.
', '
Finely dice tuna into 1/4” cubes and place in a large bowl.\xa0
', '
Pour the sauce over the tuna and mix.\xa0
', '
Serve the mixture on rice crackers and garnish with cilantro.
']

Name: shaved-fennel-and-citrus-salad
Ingredients: ['1 fennel bulb', '1/2 pink grapefruit', '1/2 small orange, peeled and cubed', '1 avocado', '2 handfuls arugula', '1 handful microgreens', '1 handful Pomegranate arils (optional) ', 'shaved parmesan (optional)']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce, for dressing', '1 Tbsp. white wine vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Using a mandoline, thinly slice the fennel bulb into small pieces.
', '
Peel the grapefruit and orange and cut into small chunks.
', '
Peel and cut the avocado into small pieces.
', '
Place them into a bowl along with the arugula, microgreens and season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Toss in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling and Dipping Sauce along with the white wine vinegar. Mix well.\xa0
', '
Garnish with pomegranate arils and shaved parmesan (optional).
']

Name: avocado-toast-with-smoked-salmon
Ingredients: ['1 avocado', '2 Tbsp. plain greek yogurt', 'sourdough bread slices, toasted', '½ persian cucumber, thin ribbons', 'smoked salmon, a few thin slices', '1 handful watercress or pea shoots']
Seasoning: ['½ lemon, juiced', 'salt and pepper to taste ', '1 pinch cayenne pepper', 'Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, to drizzle on top']
Procedure:
['
Cut the avocado in half, removing the pit. Scoop it into a bowl along with the greek yogurt and lemon juice, salt and pepper. Mash together well.\xa0
', '
Toast the bread slices and then spread the avocado mash onto both halves. Sprinkle a little cayenne pepper followed by cucumber ribbons and smoked salmon.\xa0
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce and then finish with a little bit of watercress or pea shoots. Serve right away while nice and fresh.\xa0
']

Name: shrimp-and-avocado-cucumber-bites
Ingredients: ['1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '1 cucumber, sliced thick', '1 avocado, mashed', '1 green onion, finely sliced', '2 Tbsp. fresh cilantro, chopped ']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', 'salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the grill to medium/high heat.\xa0
', '
Toss peeled and deveined shrimp in a bowl with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce.\xa0
', '
Grill shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through. Take off heat and set aside.\xa0
', '
Slice the cucumber and arrange them on a serving tray or plate.\xa0
', '
In a bowl, smash up the avocado along with the green onion and chopped cilantro, and season with lime juice, salt and pepper to create the avocado mash.
', '
Spread avocado mash onto the cucumbers and then top each with a piece of grilled shrimp.\xa0
']

Name: patatas-bravas
Ingredients: ['1 lb. yellow potatoes, quartered', '1 Tbsp. olive oil, plus more for cooking']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', '1 bunch fresh chopped parsley']
Sauce Mix: ['1 can fire roasted tomatoes, liquid drained', '1 Tbsp. tomato puree', '3 garlic cloves', '½ white onion', '1 tsp. smoked paprika', '½ tsp. cayenne pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 375°F.\xa0
', '
Quarter the potatoes, place into a bowl and toss with olive oil, salt and pepper. Place onto a baking tray and bake for 30-35 minutes until crispy and cooked through.\xa0
', '
In the meantime, add all the sauce mix ingredients to a food processor and blend until thickened.\xa0
', '
Drizzle olive oil in a pan and set to medium heat. Pour the sauce mix into the pan to heat and reduce down for 5-10 minutes. Turn down to low and keep warm while potatoes finish cooking.\xa0
', '
When the potatoes are ready, take them out and place into a serving dish and top with the warm bravas sauce. Serve with a side of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping, and garnish with parsley. Serve right away while hot.\xa0
']

Name: spinach-feta-and-dill-hummus
Ingredients: ['1 can chickpeas, drained and rinsed', '1 cup feta cheese, plus some for topping ', '2 cups baby spinach, rinsed and drained ', '¼ cup toasted pine nuts, save some for topping', '¼ cup fresh dill, save some for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. tahini', '2 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, plus more for drizzle', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Place chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, feta cheese, spinach, pine nuts, dill, salt and pepper into a food processor and blend until smooth.\xa0
', '
Place hummus onto a plate and top with more fresh dill, toasted pine nuts, feta cheese\xa0 and a light drizzle Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.\xa0
', '
Serve with pita chips or vegetables.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: fried-goat-cheese-balls
Ingredients: ['12 oz. goat cheese (3 small logs)', '1 egg', '½ cup panko', '½ cup all purpose flour', 'frying oil']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. honey, plus more for garnish', '1 tsp. thyme', '1 tsp. sea salt', '½ tsp. black pepper', 'chives and red pepper flakes for garnish (optional) ']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl mix together the goat cheese, honey, thyme, ½ tsp. sea salt and ¼ tsp. pepper. Adjust as needed. Roll the cheese into 1 oz balls (golf ball sized) and set them aside.\xa0
', '
Whisk the egg in a bowl.
', '
Put panko onto a plate and season it with the remaining salt and pepper. Place the flour into another bowl.\xa0
', '
Roll the balls in the flour, then egg, then panko, covering well. Place onto a plate and do this for all of them. Once coated, place the plate of cheese balls into the freezer for 30 minutes to harden them up before frying.\xa0
', '
Heat the oil to 350°F in a shallow pot or dutch oven. Then fry the balls 4 or so at a time. Fry them for 5 minutes until they are golden brown and crispy. Do this for all of them and set aside on paper towels to drain off excess oil.
', '
Garnish them with chopped chives, red pepper flakes and a little drizzle of honey. (optional). Serve with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo for dipping.\xa0
']

Name: cuban-sandwich
Ingredients: ['4 hoagie rolls', '8 slices ham', '4 slices pre-cooked slow roasted pork', 'pickles, for sandwich and for garnish', '8 slices Swiss cheese']
Procedure:
['
Make the cuban sandwiches by slicing the hoagie rolls in half. Spread mayo and brown mustard on the inside.\xa0
', '
Lay down the ham, roasted pork, pickles, then top with Swiss cheese. Put the top on and flatten a little bit.\xa0
', '
Using a panini press, press the sandwich until the roll is crispy and the cheese is melted.\xa0
', '
Serve with a bowl of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet & Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce. Garnish with a few more pickles.\xa0
', '
Serve right away while warm.\xa0
']

Name: steamed-mussels-with-garlic-and-beer
Ingredients: ['12 oz. light beer ', '2 lbs. mussels, cleaned well', '1/2 cup chopped parsley, for garnish', '1 baguette, for serving']
Sauce Mix: ['1 ½ oz. unsalted butter, cubed', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 /2 cup chopped parsley', '½ cup thyme', '½ tsp. sea salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a stock pot with a lid, bring the beer to a low boil. Add in the cleaned mussels, cover and let cook for 8-10 minutes until all the shells have opened. If any mussels have not opened, discard.
', '
Strain the mussels, then place them in a bowl and cover so they stay warm.\xa0
', '
In a pan, make your sauce by adding the butter, a splash of leftover beer, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic.
', '
Let that cook for a bit until the flavors build and the butter is fully melted. Stir in ½ cup parsley, ½ cup thyme and season with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Spoon the mixture over the mussels and garnish with ½ cup fresh chopped parsley. Serve with a crispy baguette.
']

Name: roasted-red-pepper-and-sriracha-hummus
Ingredients: ['2 cans garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed', '3 Tbsp. water', 'black pepper, garnish', 'pita bread or vegetables, for serving']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '¼ cup olive oil', '2 Tbsp. honey', '1 tsp. garlic powder', '½ tsp. salt', 'fresh parsley, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
In a food processor, process the garbanzo beans until they are smooth.\xa0
', '
Add in Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, olive oil, honey and keep blending until mixed and smooth. Then add in the garlic powder and salt. Taste it here and season more to your liking.\xa0
', '
Add the water and give it one more final blend making it extra creamy.\xa0
', '
Scrape it out into a bowl and top with fresh black pepper and chopped parsley. Serve with pita bread or vegetables.\xa0
']

Name: caramelized-onion-and-mushroom-flatbread
Ingredients: ['1 yellow onion', '2 cups cremini mushrooms', '2 Tbsp. olive oil, plus more for drizzling ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'flour', '½ lb. pizza dough', '1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese', '¼ cup fresh grated parmesan cheese, plus more for topping']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Soy Sauce', 'fresh ground black pepper, topping', '¼ cup arugula']
Procedure:
['
Slice the onions and mushrooms. Heat a pan with olive oil and add onions. Let cool down for a few minutes.\xa0
', '
Then add in the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, sliced mushrooms and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Mushroom Flavored Soy Sauce. Let them cook and caramelize for 15-20 minutes until nice and soft. When mushrooms and onions are caramelized, take off the heat and set aside.\xa0
', '
Preheat oven to 450 degrees F.\xa0On a flat surface with some flour, roll out the pizza dough until thin and then move that to an oiled baking sheet.\xa0
', '
Drizzle the dough with olive oil and then bake for 5-7 minutes until lightly baked. Take out of the oven and then top shredded mozzarella cheese, the caramelized onions, mushrooms, and parmesan cheese.\xa0
', '
Place back in the oven and bake for 9-10 minutes until flat bread is crispy and the cheese is melted. Take out and season with black pepper, arugula and more parmesan cheese.\xa0
', '
Serve and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: citrus-and-soy-marinated-chicken-legs
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. whole chicken legs', 'fresh cilantro, for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '½ tsp. black pepper', '1 lime, juiced ', '½ tsp. lime zest', '1 green onion, sliced']
Procedure:
['
Place the chicken into a large freezer bag along with the olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, pepper, lime juice, lime zest and sliced green onion. Let that marinate for at least two hours in the fridge.\xa0
', '
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.\xa0
', '
Take the chicken out and let come to room temperature before cooking.\xa0
', '
Place marinated chicken onto a roasting tray and gently cover with foil. Roast for 30 minutes and then remove the foil and cook for another 45 minutes, until chicken is cooked through. Baste the chicken with marinade often as it cooks.\xa0
', '
Garnish chicken with fresh cilantro and serve right away.\xa0
']

Name: crunchy-cucumber-salad
Ingredients: ['1 English cucumber, spiralized']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup chopped peanuts, to garnish', 'fresh cilantro, to garnish (optional)']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. rice wine vinegar', '2 tsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix together Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce, rice vinegar, honey, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce and set aside.\xa0
', '
Spiralize the cucumber into noodles and place into the bowl with the sauce mix and toss.\xa0
', '
Serve in a bowl and top with crushed peanuts and fresh cilantro.\xa0
']

Name: sweet-soy-glazed-rib-eye
Ingredients: ['1 rib eye steak, bone in', 'fresh chopped parsley for garnish']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste', '1 tsp. rosemary', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy sauce, plus more for drizzle']
Procedure:
['
Season both sides of the steak with salt and pepper and rosemary.\xa0
', '
Let the steak come to room temperature before cooking.\xa0
', '
Heat the skillet to medium/high heat and place in the olive oil, butter and Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce. When the butter has melted and mixed with the soy sauce, place down the steak and cook for 5 minutes until the bottom has caramelized, basting the top of the steak in the soy butter mix.\xa0
', '
Flip the steak after 5 minutes and cook for another 5, still basting the meat.\xa0
', '
Remove the rib eye and allow it to rest on a cutting board for another 5 minutes before cutting in to it.\xa0
', '
Slice the meat against the grain around the bone and place slices on a plate for serving. Drizzle the steak with some more soy sauce if desired and garnish with fresh chopped parsley.\xa0
']

Name: jalapeno-mac-and-cheese
Ingredients: ['1 Jalapeño', '4 strips of bacon, chopped', '2 cups elbow pasta', '3 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '3 Tbsp. flour', '2 ¼ cup milk', '2 cups shredded cheddar cheese', '1 cup shredded Gouda cheese', '½ cup panko breadcrumbs']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', 'salt and pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat oven to 375 degrees F. Then slice the Jalapeños for the topping, and dice up the remaining pepper for inside the cheese. Cook the bacon on the stove top until crispy, remove and let drain on a paper towel.\xa0
', '
Simultaneously cook the pasta in salted water until just shy of al dente, drain and set aside. In the same pot over low/medium heat, add the butter and let that melt down and then add the rest of the Jalapeño peppers. Let them cook down for a few minutes until they begin to soften, then add in 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
', '
Add the flour in with the butter and chili mixture and let that thicken, forming your roux. Slowly add the milk into the mixture, whisking to work out any lumps. Cook for about 5-7 minutes until roux is nice and thick. Add in the shredded cheese to the roux and continue stirring. Keep stirring until all the cheese is melted. Season the cheese with salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Next, add the chopped bacon and save some for garnish as well. Add the cooked pasta to the cheese sauce and mix together well.\xa0
', '
Pour out the cheesy pasta into a greased baking dish and then sprinkle the breadcrumbs evenly over the top. Place in the oven to cook for 20-25 minutes until the top is golden brown and crispy.
', '
Take out of the oven and garnish with more bacon, sliced Jalapeño, ½ Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce.
']

Name: slow-cooker-carnitas
Ingredients: ['1 orange, cut in half', '1 cup water ', '1/2 cup whole milk', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 small white onion, quartered ', '5 garlic cloves', '1 tsp. oregano', '2 - 3 lbs. pork shoulder, cut into 4 large pieces', 'taco size corn or flour tortillas for serving', '½ cup cilantro, for topping', '1/2 cup white onion, chopped', '1 small bunch of radishes, sliced', 'Limes for serving']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
In a slow cooker squeeze orange halves and add the rinds. Add water, milk, oil, quartered onions, garlic, 2 tsp. salt, oregano, and pork pieces.\xa0
', '
Mix together and cover slow cooker. Cook for 8 hours on low.
', '
When the pork is done transfer it to a plate reserving some fat and juices from the slow cooker pot and dispose of the rest of the juices.
', '
In a cast-iron pan heat some of the fat from the cooking liquid or use vegetable oil (optional) over medium high heat. Sear pork chunks in the skillet until the outside is crispy. Add in reserved juices from the slow cooker to the carnitas.\xa0
', '
Serve the carnitas with warmed tortillas, cilantro, onions, radishes, lime and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
']

Name: hoisin-pizza
Ingredients: ['1.5 cups shredded cooked chicken', '6 green onions thinly sliced', '1 premade pizza crust (12 inches or so)', '1 ½ cups shredded mozzarella', '½ cup cilantro ']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 500 °F degrees with the rack in the center of the oven.\xa0
', '
In a medium bowl, toss chicken with 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce,\xa0 Minced Garlic, Minced Ginger, Chili Garlic Sauce and 6 sliced green onions.
', '
On a sheet tray place the premade crust. Spoon 1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce on the crust leaving a border. Top with the chicken mixture and then add on the shredded mozzarella.\xa0\xa0
', '
Bake the pizza on the center rack for about 10 minutes. Sprinkle with remaining green onions, and cilantro and slice before serving.
']

Name: pork-belly-buns
Ingredients: ['3 lb. slab skinless pork belly', '12 steamed rice buns (you can find these at your local Asian market in the freezer section)', '½ English cucumber thinly sliced', '1 bunch thinly sliced scallions', 'grated or julienned carrot (optional) ']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Marinade: ['¼ cup sugar', '¼ cup salt']
Procedure:
['
Mix together sugar and salt in a bowl. In a roasting pan big enough to house the pork belly, rub the sugar mixture all over the belly and discard any leftover sugar mixture. Wrap the pan with plastic and place the pork belly in the fridge to marinate for 12 hours or so. Do not marinate longer than 24 hours.
', '
When ready to cook belly, preheat oven to 450°F. Discard liquid that has accumulated in bottom of the pork belly pan. Put the pork in the oven fat side up and cook for 1 hour basting at 30 minutes until golden brown.\xa0
', '
Turn down the oven temperature to 250 °F and cook another hour until the belly is tender but not falling apart. Remove from the oven and transfer to a plate.\xa0
', '
When it’s cool enough, wrap the belly in foil and refrigerate until its chilled and firm. Cut cold belly into 1/2 inch thick slices that are 2" in length.
', '
To serve heat a skillet over medium heat and cook slices in the pan until they are hot throughout. Once hot, use ¼ Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce to glaze the pork belly.\xa0
', '
Place hot slices of pork belly into warmed rice buns with ¼ Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo and ¼ Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, cucumber slices, sliced scallions and julienned carrot (optional). Serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: ssam-dog
Ingredients: ['8 hot dogs', '8 hot dog buns', 'julienned or sliced cucumber', 'chili powder, optional']
Sauce Mix: ['___Hoisin BBQ Sauce___:', '1/3 cup barbecue sauce', '1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce  ']
Procedure:
['
To make the Ginger Scallion Relish, mix all the ingredients together under dressing.
', '
To make the Hoisin BBQ Sauce, stir together all the sauce mix ingredients in a small bowl.
', '
Grill hot dogs and place in lightly toasted buns. Spoon barbecue sauce on dogs and then top with the ginger scallion relish. Add on cucumber and sprinkle with chili powder if desired and serve.
']

Name: sticky-hoisin-wings
Ingredients: ['2 ½ lbs. chicken wings, drumettes and flats']
Seasoning: ['toasted sesame seeds for garnish', 'chives for garnish', 'lemon or lime wedges for garnish']
Marinade: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey', 'salt and pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400° F.
', '
In a large bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Pure Sesame Oil, and Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, honey, salt and pepper for the marinade. Give it a good whisk before adding the chicken wings.\xa0
', '
Coat the wings in the marinade.
', '
Transfer them onto a baking tray lined with baking paper and bake for 45 minutes until cooked through.\xa0
', '
Transfer to a serving plate. Serve with toasted sesame seeds, chives, and lemon or limes wedges for garnish.
']

Name: hoisin-pork-and-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 lb. pork loin cut into thin strips', '9-10 oz. rice noodles or thin spaghetti', 'grated carrot', 'chopped scallions', 'chopped peanuts', 'cilantro for garnish']
Marinade: ['1/3 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup water', '3.5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. sugar', '3 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1-2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 jalapeno, minced', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '3 Tbsp. peanut butter']
Procedure:
['
Whisk all the marinade ingredients together in a medium bowl. Reserve half the sauce for later in a separate container. Add pork loin strips to the sauce in the bowl and allow to marinate covered in the fridge for 2 hours.
', '
Remove pork from the fridge and let the meat come to room temperature.
', '
Heat a nonstick large skillet over medium/high heat. Add pork loin and stir fry the pieces until they are browned and caramelized on the outside. Set aside on a clean plate when finished cooking.
', '
Cook rice noodles or pasta according to the package directions. Save 1/2 a cup of the water used to cook noodles. This will be used to thin the pasta sauce later.
', '
In the large nonstick skillet or in a large bowl, add the reserved marinade to the noodles and toss. Add pasta cooking water to thin the sauce if necessary. Add pork, grated carrot, scallions, peanuts and cilantro to the top. Gently mix and serve.
']

Name: hoisin-peanut-dipping-sauce-for-spring-rolls
Ingredients: ['peanuts for garnish, optional']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. peanut butter', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/3 cup water OR coconut milk']
Procedure:
['
In a small saucepan over medium heat, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, peanut butter, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic with a whisk.\xa0
', '
Bring to a gentle simmer and slowly whisk in the water or coconut milk.\xa0
', '
Heat until the sauce is glossy and smooth. You also want the sauce to have a slightly runny texture, so add more liquid until you get the desired consistency.
', '
Serve the sauce with a peanut garnish and spring rolls.
']

Name: hoisin-ham-and-cheese-sandwich
Ingredients: ['4 slices of sourdough bread', '4 slices of ham', '1/2 cup shredded pepper jack cheese', '2 scallions, thinly slice', '½ Tbsp. butter']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. mayonnaise']
Procedure:
['
Put 1 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce on 1 slice of bread. Repeat with 1 Tbsp. on a second slice of bread.
', '
Build one sandwich by placing 2 slices of ham, ¼ cup cheese, 2 Tbsp. scallions on one of the slices of bread with Hoisin Sauce. Repeat with 2 more slices of ham, ¼ cup of cheese, 2 Tbsp. scallions on the remaining slice of bread with Hoisin Sauce.
', '
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add ½ Tbsp. of butter to the pan. Spread 1 Tbsp. of mayonnaise on the outside of the first sandwich. Repeat for the second sandwich.\xa0
', '
Place the mayo side down in the pan with butter. Put an additional tablespoon of mayonnaise on each slice of bread that is facing up. Toast the sandwich on each side until it’s golden and the cheese is melted.
']

Name: baked-hoisin-salmon
Ingredients: ['1 lb. salmon', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Seasoning: ['toasted sesame seeds for garnish', 'thinly sliced scallion for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 cup water', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '2 Tbsp. honey', '1 lime, juiced']
Procedure:
['
Make the hoisin glaze by combining water, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, Hoisin Sauce, Minced Garlic, Minced Ginger and honey in a small saucepan. Add the juice of one lime.
', '
Heat the saucepan over medium high heat. Reduce the glaze mixture by half then remove the pan from the heat.
', '
Preheat the oven to 350 °F degrees. Portion salmon into 4 fillets. Brush a baking sheet with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Brush the salmon with the glaze. Bake for 10 minutes. Remove the fillets and brush generously again with the glaze. Cook another 10 minutes or until fillets are cooked to your preference.\xa0
', '
Brush with additional glaze before serving and garnish with toasted sesame seeds and scallions.
']

Name: fish-tacos
Ingredients: ['1 lb. tilapia or other white fish', '2 cups finely shredded cabbage (or 1 bag coleslaw mix)', '2 carrots, grated (or 1 bag coleslaw mix)', '1/2 cup cilantro leaves, roughly chopped', 'cooking oil', 'corn or flour tortillas', 'sour cream (optional)', 'avocado slices (optional)']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', 'salt and pepper to taste', 'fresh lime juice to serve']
Marinade: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup rice vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'juice of 1 lime']
Procedure:
['
In a baking dish, whisk together Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, rice vinegar, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and lime juice. Add in the fish fillets and turn to coat. Let sit for 20 minutes or so to marinate in the refrigerator.
', '
Make the slaw mixture by combining Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo with cabbage and carrots, or 1 bag of coleslaw mix). Then add cilantro and toss to combine. Season with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
Cook fish by heating a nonstick skillet over medium high heat. Add in a little oil and then the fillets. Cook 2-3 minutes per side, until opaque but still moist and tender. Transfer fish to a plate.
', '
Heat tortillas in a skillet over medium high heat until soft and pliable. Keep warm in foil or in a clean kitchen towel until ready to serve.
', '
To build tacos, place slaw on tortilla then top with a piece of fish. Add sour cream and avocado (optional) with a sprinkle of salt and pepper and a squeeze of fresh lime juice.
']

Name: bacon-kimchi-cheeseburgers
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground chuck beef', '4 slices American cheese', '2 burger buns', '2-4 slices of cooked bacon', 'kimchi, about 1/2 cup chopped']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste ']
Procedure:
['
Divide beef into 4 equal portions. Flatten each portion into a patty that is the size of the burger bun and indent the center with your finger. Season the patties with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0\xa0
', '
Heat a cast-iron skillet over medium high heat. Place patties seasoned side down in pan and season the other side. Cook 2 minutes and flip.
', '
Put 1\xa0 slice of cheese on each patty immediately. Continue to cook for 2 minutes, then move patties onto a plate to cool.
', '
Toast buns in the same skillet, cut side down then arrange buns on plates.\xa0
', '
On the bottom half of each bun, spread Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. Add 2 burger patties to each burger. Then add bacon and kimchi. Put more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on the cut side of the top bun.
', '
Close burgers and serve.
']

Name: korean-bbq-burrito
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. sirloin steak, thinly sliced 1/4" thick pieces', 'vegetable oil for cooking', 'flour tortillas, large burrito size', 'cooked white rice', 'kimchi, chopped', 'cilantro, chopped', 'green onions, sliced']
Marinade: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce ', '1/3 cup sugar']
Procedure:
['
Place sirloin steak, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and sugar in a bowl. Let marinate in the fridge for an hour.
', '
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium high heat. Add a little vegetable oil. Sear thinly sliced sirloin steak pieces until caramelized on the outside but still juicy and tender on the inside. Set the cooked steak aside to rest for 5 minutes. Chop the beef into cubes.
', '
Heat tortillas in a dry skillet over medium heat until soft and pliable.\xa0
', '
Squeeze Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo in the middle of the tortilla. Layer rice, chopped kimchi, cilantro, green onions and beef.\xa0
', '
Add more Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo if desired, then fold the short sides of the tortilla over the burrito filling. Then using the tortilla end closest to you, wrap the tortilla over the filling, tucking it under the filling and rolling tightly away from you to close the burrito.
', '
Repeat with remainder of ingredients. Serve warm.
']

Name: salmon-burger-with-sweet-chili-glaze
Ingredients: ['4 (6 oz.) salmon portions', '2 Tbsp. oil', '4 soft burger buns', 'green lettuce leaves', '1/2 English cucumber thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper, to taste ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Chili Sauce in a bowl.\xa0
', '
Season salmon with salt and pepper to taste.\xa0
', '
In a nonstick skillet heat a little oil over medium high heat.\xa0
', '
Brush one side of the salmon fillets with the sauce mix. Place coated side down in pan and cook 3 minutes. Brush the side facing up with the sauce mix and flip again. Cook another 3 minutes until the fish is the desired degree of doneness. Remove fillets.
', '
Clean skillet and set over medium heat. Toast buns cut side down briefly until warmed through.\xa0
', '
Spread cut sides with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo. On the bottom side add lettuce and then salmon fillets. Top with thinly sliced cucumbers and bun top. Serve.
']

Name: oyster-sauce-chicken-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground chicken, preferably dark meat', '1/2 cup panko breadcrumbs', '1 large egg', '3 green onions, thinly sliced plus more for garnish', 'sesame seeds (optional garnish)']
Marinade: ['1 Tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 Tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
', '
In a large bowl combine ground chicken, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, Minced Ginger, Minced Garlic, panko, egg, and green onions. Using clean hands mix the ingredients together. Roll out the mixture into 1 1/2" meatballs, forming about 18.
', '
Make the oyster flavored dipping sauce by combining Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, Pure Sesame Oil, Minced Garlic, Minced Ginger, and rice vinegar in a bowl. Set a small amount aside for brushing on the meatballs during baking.
', '
Place the meatballs on a prepared baking sheet and bake for 12 minutes or until meatballs are cooked through. Brush the glaze on the meatballs and continue to cook for another 2-3 minutes.
', '
Serve meatballs garnished with chopped green onions, sesame seeds(optional) and oyster flavored dipping sauce.
']

Name: steak-and-asparagus-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1lb. sirloin steak', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 bunch asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1” pieces', '1, 2” piece of ginger, scrubbed and thinly sliced', '4 scallions cut into 1" pieces', 'cooked rice, for serving']
Seasoning: ['salt']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3 Tbsp. mirin', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Procedure:
['
Slice sirloin steak across the grain as thinly as possible.
', '
In a bowl, marinate the steak slices with 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, ¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, 3 Tbsp. mirin, and 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil. Toss to combine.
', '
Heat 2 Tbsp. of vegetable oil in a large skillet, over medium heat. When oil is simmering, add asparagus, ginger, and 1” scallion pieces and cook about 3 minutes. Then remove the vegetables from the pan and set aside.
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in the same skillet. Add a single layer of sirloin steak. Cook 3 minutes without moving. Then with a thin spatula flip meat.\xa0
', '
Immediately add cooked vegetables back into the pan and the remainder of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Cook tossing until meat is cooked through and sauce has thickened, about 1-2 minutes. Stir fry with salt.
', '
Divide the mixture among 4 plates and serve with cooked rice and thinly sliced scallions.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry

Name: thai-hot-pepper-linguini
Ingredients: ['10 oz. flat rice noodles or linguini', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 chicken breast cut into 3/4" pieces, ', '1 red bell pepper, cut into 1” pieces', '1 small white onion, cut into 1” pieces ', '1/2 cup cherry tomatoes, halved', '1 egg, beaten', '1/2 cup fresh basil leaves']
Seasoning: ['salt to taste']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Chili Garlic Sauce, Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and sugar in a bowl and set aside.
', '
Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain and rinse under cold water and set aside.
', '
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium high heat. Add Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and cook until golden about 1 minute. Add chicken and cook, while stirring constantly for about 3-4 minutes.
', '
Add bell pepper, onion, tomatoes and 2 Tbsp. of the sauce mix to pan and stir to combine. Add noodles, egg and last 2 Tbsp. of sauce mix and toss to combine.\xa0
', '
Add basil leaves and cook tossing constantly, until noodles and vegetables are fully coated and heated through, about 2 more minutes. Salt to taste.\xa0
', '
Serve and enjoy.\xa0
']

Name: chicken-soup-with-sweet-corn-and-mushroom
Ingredients: ['12 oz. chicken breast ', '1 carrot, diced', '1 sweet corn cob ', '2 pcs dried shiitake mushrooms (soak before using)    ', '12 cups water ']
Seasoning: ['salt to taste', '1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken']
Procedure:
['
Bring water to a boil. Add chicken and cook until the insides are no longer pink. Drain and set aside. Prepare carrot and sweet corn by chopping them both into six pieces. Cut dried shiitake mushrooms into thin slices. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Bring water to a boil, and add in all ingredients. Reduce heat, and simmer for about an hour.
', '
Add salt to taste, followed by Lee Kum Kee Premium Bouillon Powder Flavored with Chicken.
']

Name: steamed-soft-tofu-pair-with-oyster-sauce-with-dried-scallop
Ingredients: ['1 box silken tofu', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1/8 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. green onions (finely chopped) ']
Seasoning: ['1/8 cup Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce with Dried Scallop']
Procedure:
['
Cut soft tofu into big pieces, and steam for five minutes. Take out, and drain out the excess water on a plate. Set aside.\xa0
', '
Add cooking oil to a heated pan, and sauté Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce with Dried Scallop. Add water, and cook for a minute. Add cornstarch to thicken the sauce. Pour sauce over tofu.
', '
Garnish with green onions.\xa0
']

Name: miso-sesame-ginger-dressing
Ingredients: ['2” piece of fresh ginger, finely grated', '2 Tbsp. white miso', 'juice of 1 lime', '1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. canola oil', '3 Tbsp. honey', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '2 Tbsp. unfiltered apple cider vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Whisk all the ingredients together in a bowl or shake in a jar.
', '
N/A
', '
N/A
']

Name: pure-sesame-chocolate-chip-cookies
Ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '1/2 tsp. baking soda', '3/4 tsp. salt', '16 Tbsp. unsalted butter', '1 1/2 cups granulated sugar', '1/4 cup brown sugar', '1 egg', '1 1/2 tsp. vanilla', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '4 oz. bittersweet chocolate, chopped']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.\xa0
', '
Preheat oven to 350°F. Line two baking sheets with parchment paper.
', '
In the bowl of a stand mixer, beat butter on medium until creamy, for about 2 minutes. Add both granulated and brown sugars and continue to mix for 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add egg, vanilla, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and mix until combined.\xa0
', '
Add flour mixture on low speed until combined. Add in chopped chocolate and mix well to combine.
', '
Portion dough into 2.5 oz. balls. Place 4 cookies on a sheet pan.\xa0 Freeze ten minutes. Remove from freezer and bake only one cookie sheet at a time for 11-14 minutes. The edges of the cookies should be set and brown and the middle of the cookies should be light golden in color.
']

Name: sesame-chicken-with-broccoli
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 1/4 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breast diced into 1” inch pieces', '2 scallions, white parts thinly sliced and green parts reserved for garnish', '1 Tbsp. grated ginger', '2 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 small head broccoli, cut into florets, steamed 4 minutes', '3 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds', 'cooked rice for serving']
Marinade: ['4 tsp. cornstarch', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. of honey']
Sauce Mix: ['1 1/2 cups chicken broth', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar', '1 tsp. chili paste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 tsp. of honey']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl combine 4 tsp. of cornstarch, 3 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, 2 tsp. honey and diced chicken. Toss to coat and marinate for 20 minutes.\xa0
', '
Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add 2 Tbsp. of vegetable oil. Remove half of the chicken from the marinade with a slotted spoon and add to the non-stick pan. Cook for 6 minutes until browned and cooked through. Remove the chicken from pan and repeat this process with the remaining chicken and another 1 Tbsp. of vegetable oil. Transfer the cooked chicken to a serving plate.
', '
In a bowl, mix together the chicken broth, rice vinegar, and chili paste, remaining 2 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, 1 tsp. of Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and 3 tsp. of honey.
', '
Heat the last Tbsp. of vegetable oil in the same skillet over medium high heat. Add the white parts of scallions, ginger, and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.\xa0
', '
Add sauce mix to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes. Add chicken and steamed broccoli to the skillet and stir to combine.\xa0
', '
Serve chicken and broccoli, garnished with scallions and sesame seeds over a bed of rice.
']

Name: braised-prawns-crab-meat-and-e-fu-noodles-in-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['150g E-fu noodles (2 small cakes)', '250g Prawns, meat, deveined and dried', '120g Bean sprouts', '2 pcs Green onion(s), sectioned', '2 tsp. Garlic, minced', '50g Crab meat']
Sauce Mix: ['4 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce', '250 ml Water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0b9oaEQebwI
', '
Blanch prawns and bean sprouts in boiling water. Drain.
', '
Blanch E-fu noodles in boiling water until just tender. Drain.
', '
Saute minced garlic and green onions in 2-3 tbsp oil until fragrant.\xa0 Add prawns, crab meat, bean sprouts, E-fu noodles.\xa0 Stir-fry until done.
', '
Add sauce mix. Cook until sauce thickens.
']

Name: stir-fried-lily-bulb-and-lotus-root-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['200g Lotus root, sliced', '75g Snow peas/Mangetout', '75g Red bell pepper, cut into pieces', '75g Straw mushroom(s), canned, halved', '75g Baby corn, canned, sliced', '50g Fresh lily bulb, torn into pieces']
Sauce Mix: ['2½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Double Fermented Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 tsp. Sugar', '1 tsp. Corn starch', '2 Tbsp. Water']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pGBnuUo0da4
', '
Blanch lotus root in boiling water.\xa0 Drain.
', '
Mix well all sauce mix ingredients.
', '
Stir-fry all vegetables in 2 Tbsp. oil.\xa0 Stir in sauce mix and heat through.
']

Name: spicy-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['1 ½ lbs. chicken wings & drumsticks', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. fresh chopped parsley']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. black pepper', '1 tsp. paprika', '1 tsp. cayenne', '1 tsp. red pepper flakes', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.\xa0
', '
In a large mixing bowl place the chicken wings and drumsticks.\xa0
', '
Add in the dry seasonings and toss the chicken, coating the chicken well.\xa0
', '
Lay the chicken out evenly on a greased baking tray. Drizzle with olive oil and place in the oven to bake for 25-30 minutes until the chicken is crispy and cooked through. When it looks light brown, take out of the oven.
', '
Place the baked chicken into a mixing bowl and pour in the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Give that a nice big toss, coating the chicken well, then place into a serving dish and top with fresh chopped parsley.
']

Name: salmon-poke-bowls
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sockeye salmon, cut into small cubes', 'Rice or salad for the base', '¼ cup pickled cucumber', '½ an avocado, sliced', 'Topping options: [edamame, julienned carrots, cabbage, avocado]']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. rice vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix the salmon cubes, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, rice vinegar and Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
Cover and let that sit in the fridge.\xa0
', '
Make the poke bowl by starting with white rice or a salad. Topped ½ cup marinated salmon, pickled cucumber, avocado, and other toppings of your choosing.\xa0
', '
Finally, drizzle with top of the poke bowl with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
']

Name: sweet-soy-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. of your favorite homestyle meatballs or precooked meatballs', '2 Tbsp. green onion, chopped ', '2 Tbsp. sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Bake the meatballs according to the package, or your recipe.
', '
While the meatballs are in the oven, chop the green onions and prepare your serving dish for the meatballs.\xa0
', '
Remove the meatballs from the oven. In a mixing bowl pour the Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce over them, coating them well.\xa0
', '
Place them into a serving bowl and garnish with sesame seeds and the chopped green onions.
']

Name: vegetable-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 eggs, whisked together', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 white onion, diced', '2 carrots, peeled and diced', '¼ cup snow peas', '1 cup chopped broccoli ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 garlic cloves', '2 cups cooked brown rice', '3 green onions, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. red pepper flakes', '3 tsp. cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, optional']
Procedure:
['
Heat the skillet with oil over medium heat. Crack in two eggs and quickly scramble them and then place them into a bowl to save for later.\xa0
', '
Using the same skillet, add in Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, diced onion, diced carrots and cook down for about 5 minutes. Add the rest of the veggies in along with\xa0 salt and pepper. Let that cook for another couple minutes.\xa0
', '
Add in Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger, garlic, red pepper flakes and cook a little longer, stirring often.\xa0
', '
Add in the cooked brown rice and mix well. When the rice starts to get crispy and turn brown around the edges, add back in the eggs. Cook for another 2 minutes and then take off the heat and toss in the chopped green onion, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and give a final mix.\xa0
', '
Taste, and add more soy sauce if needed.\xa0
', '
Serve right away while hot, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce (Optional).\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']
