Name: roasted-root-vegetables
Ingredients: ['3 medium carrots, cut into small pieces', '1 ½ cup brussels sprouts', '4 cups red potatoes, cut into small pieces']
Seasoning: ['⅓ cup olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. dried thyme', '1 Tbsp. dried rosemary', '1 Tbsp. dried basil', '1 Tbsp. dried oregano', '1 tsp. salt', '½ tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.\xa0
', '
Cut up all the vegetables and place into a mixing bowl.\xa0
', '
Add in olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, dried thyme, rosemary, basil, oregano, salt and pepper. Give a nice toss, coating everything well.\xa0
', '
Pour the vegetables out onto a greased baking sheet and spread out evenly. Place into the oven and roast for 35 minutes on the middle rack.
', '
Take out of the oven and serve in a bowl, or right off the sheet tray.\xa0
']

Name: spicy-grilled-sausage-sandwiches
Ingredients: ['1 lb. italian sausage ', '1 baguette cut into sandwich sized pieces', '¼ cup roasted red peppers', '1 cup of arugula, for garnish']
Procedure:
['
Grill the sausages until cooked through and then set aside.\xa0
', '
Toast the baguette and then cut into sandwich sized pieces.\xa0
', '
Spread mayo and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce onto one half of the sandwich.
', '
Slice the sausage down the middle to open it up and place them inside the sandwich.\xa0
', '
Top the sausage with roasted red peppers and arugula. Close the sandwich and cut it in half. Serve right away while hot.\xa0
']

Name: bagel-and-lox
Ingredients: ['1 package everything bagels (4-6 pcs)', '⅓ cup soft cream cheese', '1 package, smoked salmon', '½ finely diced red onion', '1 tsp. capers', '1 tsp. black sesame seeds']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce, for topping']
Procedure:
['
Slice and toast the bagels.
', '
Spread cream cheese on each of the bagel halves followed by the smoked salmon, finely diced red onion, capers & sesame seeds.\xa0
', '
Drizzle each bagel with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce over on the top of the salmon.\xa0
', '
Repeat with remaining ingredients.\xa0
']

Name: chicken-and-honeydew-salad
Ingredients: ['6 oz. chicken breast', '2 oz. honeydew melon, skin and seeds removed', '1 oz. carrot, shredded', '1 oz. cucumber, shredded', 'cilantro to taste']
Procedure:
['
Cook chicken breast in lightly salted boiling water until cooked through. Cool chicken in ice water and thinly slice. Thinly slice honeydew. Set both aside.
', '
Combine all ingredients in a big bowl, stir in Seasoning Soy Sauce, and mix well. Sprinkle sesame seeds on top. Ready to serve.
']

Name: beef-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['6 oz.  ground beef', '2  eggs, beaten', '4 oz.  lettuce, shredded', '4 Tbsp.  green onion, chopped', '2 Tbsp.  cooking oil', '2 bowls  steamed rice']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Add oil to a heated pan, sauté ground beef and break up the clumps. Add eggs, rice, and stir-fry till fragrant.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, stir-fry, mixing well. Add lettuce, green onion, and sesame oil and stir-fry for 1 minute. Ready to serve.
']

Name: bacon-avocado-dip
Ingredients: ['3 strips bacon', '2 avocados (medium-size, ripe)']
Seasoning: ['1 /4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '4 tsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
In a saute pan over medium heat, cook bacon until crisp. Allow it to cool down slightly, rough chop into pea-size pieces.
', '
Cut open avocado, remove pit, scoop flesh into a medium-size bowl, and smash with a wooden spoon.
', '
Add Sriracha Mayo, lime juice, bacon, and mix well. Add more lime juice if needed.
', '
Serve as a dip for chips or French fries.
']

Name: asian-bbq-tacos
Ingredients: ['2 lb. pork butt, cut into 2 x 4-inch logs', '2 tomatoes (small diced)', '2 oz. onion (small diced)', '½ cup cilantro (chopped)', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 package taco shells', '2 cups shredded iceberg lettuce']
Marinade: ['4 oz. Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 oz. rice wine', 'black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, rice wine and black pepper and mix well. Marinate pork for two hours or more.
', '
Preheat oven at 350°F.
', '
Bake for 1 hour or until meat is tender. Cool and chop pork into small pieces.
', '
In a small mixing bowl, combine tomato, onion, cilantro and lime juice. Mix well.
', '
Assemble taco shell with pork, lettuce and the mixed ingredients.
']

Name: grilled-vegetables-with-premium-soy-sauce-and-herbs
Ingredients: ['1 small zucchini, cut lengthwise 1/2 inch thick', '1 stalk bok choy, cut lengthwise 1/2 inch thick', '1 small squash, yellow, cut lengthwise 1/2 inch thick', '1 small red bell pepper, removed stem and seed', '2 Tbsp. parsley , chopped']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine Sesame Oil, Chili Garlic Sauce, lime juice, parsley and Premium Soy Sauce (mixture). Set aside.
', '
Drizzle olive oil onto the vegetables then grill on both sides.
', '
Serve with mixture.
']

Name: zucchini-scrambled-eggs-with-bacon
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 whole eggs, beaten', '1 lb. zucchini , removed ends, cut into small cubes ', '1 Tbsp. chopped parsley', '2 oz. cooked bacon']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1/2 tsp. sugar ', '1 pinch salt ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan with oil, cook beaten eggs for 1 minute. Set aside.
', '
In the same pan, add 2 Tbsp. oil and stir in zucchini and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce.
', '
Cook mixture for 3-4 minutes. Stir in sugar, salt, chopped parsley and eggs. Cook for another minute.
', '
Serve hot and garnish with cooked bacon.
']

Name: zucchini-fritters-with-lee-kum-kee-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 whole eggs, beaten ', '2 cups flour ', '1/2 tsp. baking soda ', '2 Tbsp. chopped green onion', '24 oz. shredded zucchini', '2 cups cooking oil, for frying ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. salt ', '1 pinch black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a medium mixing bowl, combine eggs, flour, salt, black pepper, and baking soda. Mix well.
', '
Stir in green onion and zucchini. Mix well.
', '
Heat oil in pan on high. Drop 2 Tbsp. of zucchini mixture into oil. Repeat. Cook zucchini until golden brown.
', '
Dipping Sauce: In a small mixing bowl, combine sour cream, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, lime juice, parsley, and black pepper. Mix well.
']

Name: wontons-with-hot-and-spicy-sauce
Ingredients: ['___Wonton stuff___: ', '5 oz.  ground pork', '1 Tbsp. green onion, chopped', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '¼ tsp. sugar ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '½ tsp. white pepper', '___Wonton___: ', '12 wonton wraps', '2 Tbsp. beaten eggs', '___Garnish___: ', '2 Tbsp. green onion, chopped', '2 Tbsp. peanuts, chopped']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broadbean Sauce', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, boiled', '1.5 tsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. red pepper chili', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Peppercorn Chili Oil (optional)']
Procedure:
['
Combine wonton stuff.  Stuff wonton wraps and seal with egg.
', '
Add wonton into boiling water.  Mix Seasoning Sauce in large bowl.
', '
Cook wonton until floating.  Remove and place in large bowl.  Sprinkle garnish on top.
']

Name: wonton-soup
Ingredients: ['200 g sliced chicken meat ', '10 g sliced American ginseng ', '10 pcs stoned red dates', '2 slices ginger ', '150 g Shanghai cabbage or green vegetables', '10 pcs frozen wontons', '___CHICKEN STOCK___: ', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder ', '4 cups hot water']
Seasoning: ['salt and pepper to taste']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. sugar ', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Mix chicken with marinade.\xa0
', '
Bring chicken stock to a boil. Add chicken, American ginseng, red dates and ginger. Simmer for 15 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add Shanghai cabbage, wontons and cook for about 3 minutes or until wontons are done. Season to taste and serve hot.\xa0
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: vietnamese-salmon-and-mango-spring-rolls
Ingredients: ['12 pcs. (75g) Vietnamese rice paper', '150 g salmon sashimi (cut into strips)', '100 g mango flesh (cut into strips)', '80 g cucumbers (cut into strips)']
Procedure:
['
Place rice paper in cold drinking water and soak for 1 minute. Remove and paper towel dry.
', '
Arrange salmon, mangoes, and cucumbers on rice paper. Fold rice paper over ingredients to create spring roll. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
', '
Cut spring rolls in half and serve with Dipping Sauce.
']

Name: veggie-plate
Ingredients: ['2 cups broccoli florets', '2 celery stalks', '2 Persian cucumbers', '12 red cherry tomatoes', '4 oz. baby carrots']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo']
Procedure:
['
Cut the broccoli florets into smaller bite-size pieces if necessary.
', '
Cut celery and cucumber into 2-inch-long finger-thick sticks.
', '
Place ramekin in the middle of large plate or platter, fill with Sriracha Mayo. Arrange cut vegetables around the ramekin.
', '
Use cherry tomatoes as a garnish, scattered around the other vegetables.
', '
Notes: If Persian cucumbers are not available, hothouse cucumber work well too. Blanching the broccoli and carrots make them brighter and tastier.
']

Name: vegetarian-sourdough-sandwich
Ingredients: ['1 small zucchini, removed ends, cut into long strips ', '1 small eggplant, soaked in water and salt, cut into round pieces ', '1 whole red bell pepper, removed seeds and ends ', '1 small red onion, peeled, cut into rounds ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil ', '4 pcs. sourdough bread ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. mayonnaise ', '1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste ']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and mayonnaise.
', '
Mix well and refrigerate.
', '
Combine the remainder of the ingredients on a tray and season with salt and pepper.
', '
Drizzle olive oil on top of vegetables and grill for 2 minutes on each side.
', '
Assemble sandwich and serve.
']

Name: vegetable-tofu-egg-roll
Ingredients: ['1/2 cup vegetable oil ', '8 oz. firm tofu, cut into small cubes ', '8 oz. shredded carrots', '8 oz. thinly sliced celery', '8 oz. bean sprouts ', '8 oz. yam ', '1 package egg roll wrapper ', '1 whole egg, beaten ']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch black pepper, for taste ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan with oil, stir-fry tofu and celery for 5 minutes.
', '
Add in remainder ingredients except beaten egg. Cook mixture for another 5 minutes and mix well.
', '
Season with black pepper.
', '
Spoon vegetable mixture into egg roll wrapper. Roll mixture tight and seal edges with beaten egg. 

', '
Dip fry egg roll until golden brown. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce.
']

Name: vegetable-tortilla-lasagna-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['3 pcs. yellow squash, sliced vertically into thin strips', '1 pcs. red bell pepper, de-seeded, cut into rings', '1 pcs. red onion, peeled, cut into rings', '8 oz. sliced mushrooms', '10 pcs. flour tortilla, cut into squares']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 Tbsp. chopped parsley', '2 whole eggs, beaten', '16 oz. ricotta cheese', '16 oz. shredded mozzarella cheese', '8 oz. Parmesan cheese', '28 oz. tomato sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven at 375°F.
', '
In a small bowl, combine parsley, eggs, ricotta, mozzarella, Parmesan cheese, tomato sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and Hoisin Sauce. Set mixture aside.
', '
Toss vegetables with salt, pepper and olive oil.
', '
On a heated grill pan or skillet, grill or sear vegetables until cooked.
', '
In a greased baking dish, assemble lasagna by layering flour tortillas, sauce mixture, vegetables. Continue and finish with sauce mixture on top. Cover with aluminum foil.
', '
 Bake for 45 minutes. Remove foil and bake for another 15 minutes.
']

Name: vanilla-plum-flavored-strudel
Ingredients: ['8 oz. cream cheese ', '1 package pre-made puff pastry, frozen and thawed ', '1 whole egg, beaten ']
Seasoning: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce ', '1/2 tsp. vanilla extract ', '2 Tbsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, cream cheese, vanilla extract and 2 Tbsp. sugar.
', '
Mix well until creamy and fluffy (cream cheese mixture). Divide cream cheese mixture into two parts and set aside.
', '
Unfold puff pastry on a lightly floured surface. Divide into 4 individual pieces. Set aside.
', '
Place one part of cream cheese in the center and top with another slice of the puff pastry dough. Repeat.
', '
Brush edges with egg and then crimp with fork to seal edge. Brush the top with egg. Bake at 400 degrees F for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
', '
Optional: Serve with chocolate sauce or whipped cream and dust with powdered sugar.
']

Name: vanilla-custard-with-lee-kum-kee-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['6 Tbsp. sugar ', '2 Tbsp. water ', '10 whole egg yolks ', '18 oz. evaporated milk ', '1 can condensed milk ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. vanilla extract ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
In a small sauce pan combine sugar and water. Mix well.
', '
Bring sugar mixture to a boil. Lower heat and cook mixture until sugar is caramelized. Pour caramelized sugar right away into a small baking dish.
', '
In a blender, combine eggs, evaporated milk, condensed milk, vanilla extract, and Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce. Mix for 1-2 minutes and strain.
', '
Pour egg mixture into 8-4 oz-sized baking dishes.
', '
Steam egg mixture for 10-12 minutes. Serve with fresh fruit as desired.
']

Name: two-color-roe-tofu
Ingredients: ['12 oz. soft tofu', '2 tubes egg tofu', '1 Tbsp. black fish roe', '1 Tbsp. red fish roe', 'shredded spring onion as desired']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood']
Procedure:
['
Cut both soft tofu and egg tofu into desired shapes using cookie cutter.
', '
Place on a plate and steam 5 minutes.
', '
Arrange black fish roe over the soft tofu and red fish roe over the egg tofu.
', '
Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood. Garnish with spring onion and serve.
']

Name: turnip-rice-flour-cake
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '1 oz. dried shrimp', '6 pcs. dried shitake mushrooms, soaked, removed stem, cut and finely diced', '5 oz. Chinese sausages, cut into small pieces', '2 whole turnips, peeled and grated, cook in 8 oz. water until tender', '8 oz. rice flour, mix 1 cup water to form batter', '1 oz. chopped cilantro ', '1 stalk green onion, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Saute Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic with 2 Tbsp. oil. Add shrimp, mushroom and sausage and season with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Flavored Sauce and Chili Garlic Sauce. Cook mixture for 2 minutes (Shrimp Mixture).
', '
Immediately combine cooked turnip into rice flour batter.
', '
Add sautéed shrimp mixture into the rice flour batter and mix well.
', '
Pour mixture into square grease baking pan. Sprinkle chopped cilantro on top.
', '
Steam turnip rice flour cake for 30-45 minutes until cooled.
', '
Slice into squares and pan fry until golden brown. Garnish with green onions.
']

Name: turkey-wrap-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. turkey, cut into strips ', '3 Tbsp. oil ', '4 oz. button mushrooms, thinly sliced ', '4 oz. bell peppers, thinly sliced ', '4 oz. bean sprouts ', '3 stalks green onion, thinly sliced ', '4 pcs. pita bread']
Marinade: ['1/2 tsp. cumin ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Saute turkey strips in oil for 12 minutes.
', '
Add mushrooms, bell peppers, cumin, onion, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and Chili Garlic Sauce.
', '
Cook mixture for another 3 minutes.
', '
Serve with pita bread.
']

Name: turkey-with-vegetable-kabobs
Ingredients: ['12 oz. turkey tenderloin, cut into 1" cubes ', '3 pcs. cherry tomatoes ', '4 oz. squash, cut into 1" cubes ', '3 pcs. button mushrooms, removed stems ', '3 oz. red and green bell peppers, cut into 1" cubes ', '3 pcs. bamboo skewers', '3 pcs. shallots, peeled ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 tsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '2 Tbsp. ketchup ', '1 pinch black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, add in Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, Minced Garlic, sugar olive oil, ketchup and black pepper (BBQ sauce mixture).
', '
Marinate turkey meat with B.B.Q. mixture for at least one hour.
', '
Using the bamboo skewer, thread turkey and vegetables alternately.
', '
Cook turkey kabob on a grill, basting with the BBQ sauce mixture while cooking.
']

Name: turkey-tenderloin-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. turkey tenderloin ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil ', '2 Tbsp. butter ', '2 Tbsp. chopped parsley', '8 oz. wheat pasta, cooked according to direction']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste ', '1 oz. dry sherry ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Season turkey tenderloins on both sides with salt and pepper. Drizzle olive oil to coat both sides.
', '
Grill turkey tenderloins until well done. Cool and slice into lengthwise pieces. Set aside.
', '
In a heated medium sauce pan, add butter and chopped parsley and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in dry sherry, Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce and Chili Garlic Sauce. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
', '
Add in pasta and turkey tenderloins and cook mixture until heated through.
']

Name: turkey-strips
Ingredients: ['8 oz. turkey, cut into strips ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '4 oz. zucchini, cut into 1/2-inch pieces ', '4 oz. carrots, cut into thin pieces ', '4 oz. snow peas, removed ends ', '4 oz. squash, cut into 1/2-inch pieces ']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. sugar ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. cornstarch ', '3 oz. water']
Procedure:
['
Combine sugar, Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce, 1 tsp. cornstarch and water (black bean sauce mix). Set aside.
', '
Massage turkey strips with remaining cornstarch and Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
Stir-fry turkey strips with 2 Tbsp. cooking oil for 3 minutes.
', '
Add vegetables and cook mixture for another 3 minutes.
', '
Stir in black bean sauce mix and cook mixture until heated through.
']

Name: turkey-filo-pastry-rolls
Ingredients: ['3 ½ oz. diced onion', '2 oz. diced bacon', '3 ½ oz. potatoes (cooked and diced)', '4–6 slices smoked turkey (2 slices diced)', '1 oz. diced red bell pepper', '1 oz. green bell pepper (diced)', '3/4 oz. cooked spinach leaves', '2 oz. unsalted butter (melted)', '4–5 sheets pre-made filo pastry', '1 egg (beaten)']
Seasoning: ['1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce', '3 ½ oz. whipping cream', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Saute onions, bacon and potatoes until cooked through. Add diced smoked turkey, red & green bell peppers, and Seasoning Mix. Stir well to make filling. Let cool and set aside.
', '
Place a layer of plastic wrap on a work surface. Lay smoked turkey slices flat to form a rectangle.
', '
Place layer cooked spinach. Spread layer of filling over top, roll up to form a log. Set aside in freezer.
', '
Brush melted butter over each filo pastry sheet for 4–5 layers. Place frozen filling onto pastry sheet, roll to wrap filling inside.
', '
Seal edges with beaten egg, and brush some over sealed pastry.
', '
Bake pastry roll 15–20 minutes in 300°F preheated oven until golden-brown.
']

Name: turkey-carrot-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['3 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '1/2 cup chopped green onions', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic ', '1 lb. turkey breast, cut into cubes ', '1 cup celery, cut into small cubes ', '1 8-oz can water chestnut, drained and sliced ', '1/2 cup carrots, shredded ', '2 oz. button mushrooms, removed ends, sliced']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '4 oz. water ', '1/2 tsp. sugar ', '1 pinch black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, water, sugar and black pepper in a small bowl (soy mixture). Mix well and set aside.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, add onion and garlic and cook briefly for 1 minute. Stir in turkey, celery, and water chestnuts and cook mixture until 3/4 way done.
', '
Add in remainder ingredients except soy mixture.
', '
Bring mixture to a boil then add in soy mixture slowly while stirring.
', '
Cook mixture for another 2 minutes and serve.
']

Name: tropical-fruit-mix-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. papaya, peeled, cut into chunks ', '1 whole mango, peeled, cut into chunks ', '8 oz. pineapple, peeled, cut into chunks ', '4 oz. strawberries ', '2 pcs. mint']
Sauce Mix: ['4 oz. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. lime juice ', '1 oz. water ']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, lime juice and water (Plum Sauce Mixture). Mix well.
', '
Layer fruits in a bowl. Drizzle Plum Sauce Mixture on top.
', '
Garnish with mint.
']

Name: tomato-mozzarella-pizza
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '8 oz. fresh mozzarella cheese, cut into rounds ', '1 whole tomato, medium, cut into rounds ', '2 pieces 8" pre-made pizza dough ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '2 oz. tomato sauce ', '2 Tbsp. chopped basil']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Hoisin Sauce and tomato sauce. Set aside.
', '
Brush pizza dough with olive oil on both sides.
', '
Divide tomato mixture into two individual portions. Assemble pizzas and bake at 450 degree temperature for 10-12 minutes.
', '
Serve with Hoisin Sauce if desired.
']

Name: tomato-basil-bites-with-soy-vinaigrette
Ingredients: ['4 whole tomatoes, medium-sized, cut into rounds 1/4" thick', '1 whole cucumber, cut into 1/2" thick slices ', '8 oz. provolone cheese, fresh, medium-sized, peeled and cut into rounds 1/4" thick', '1/2 cup fresh basil, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 oz. red wine vinegar ', '2 tsp. sugar ', '1 oz. olive oil ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste ']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, red wine vinegar, sugar, olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
 Mix well and season with black pepper (Premium Soy Vinaigrette).
', '
In a platter, assemble tomato, cucumber and provolone cheese. Drizzle Premium Soy Vinaigrette and garnish with chopped basil.
']

Name: tofu-salad
Ingredients: ['16 oz. firm tofu, drained and diced ', '1/2 cup snow peas, trimmed, cut into 1" thick pieces ', '1/2 cup carrot, shredded ', '1/2 cup cabbage, shredded ', '2 stalks green onion, chopped ', '2 Tbsp. peanuts, chopped ']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, Pure Sesame Oil, olive oil, lime juice and sugar (dressing). Mix well.
', '
Add dressing on top of tofu and marinate for one hour in the refrigerator (tofu mixture).
', '
Boil snow peas for 5 mins in hot water, then soak in cold water for 2 mins.
', '
Toss in all vegetables with the tofu mixture and mix well.
', '
Garnish with chopped green onion and chopped peanuts.
']

Name: tilapia-fillet-with-asian-barbecue-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '16 oz. tilapia fillet ']
Seasoning: ['2 pinches black pepper ', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar ', '1 tsp. lemon juice ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine pepper, brown sugar, lemon juice, minced garlic, butter and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce (soy mixture).
', '
Microwave for 30 seconds and set aside.
', '
Drizzle 2 Tbsp of oil on the fillet and then grill for three minutes on each side.
', '
Pour the soy mixture over the fillet. Serve hot.
']

Name: three-bean-casserole
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, for cooking', '1 cup celery, chopped ', '1 small onion, chopped ', '1 cup garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained ', '1 cup lima beans, frozen ', '1 cup white beans, rinsed, drained ', '2 oz. bacon, chopped']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Italian seasoning', '1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste ', '2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 oz. heavy cream ']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in pan on high. Then add celery and onion. Cook for 3 minutes while constantly stirring.
', '
Add garbanzo beans, lima beans, white beans, Italian seasoning, Worcestershire sauce, tomato paste and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce.
', '
Cook mixture on high for 2 minutes. Stir in heavy cream and mix well.
', '
Pour mixture in a 9" x 7" baking dish and bake at 350 degrees F for 20-25 minutes.
', '
Garnish with chopped bacon bits.
']

Name: thai-style-pan-fried-fish-patties
Ingredients: ['300 g mackerel fillet', '40 g yard-long green beans (finely chopped)', '4 Tbsp. oil']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 tsp. sugar', '1/2 egg', '1 kaffir lime leaf (chopped)', '1/2 tsp. red chili flakes', '1/4 tsp. lime zest', '⅛ tsp. crushed black pepper', '1 tsp. chopped lemongrass', '1 tsp. chopped shallots']
Procedure:
['
Mash mackerel fillet. Blend with small amount salt and water in a mixing bowl until sticky. Add beans and Seasoning Mix and combine thoroughly.
', '
Divide mixture into 8–10 balls and flatten to form patties.
', '
Heat 4 Tbsp. oil in a skillet. Pan-fry over medium heat until both sides golden and thoroughly cooked. Serve with Dipping Sauce.
']

Name: thai-sweet-chili-wings
Ingredients: ['10 oz. chicken wings', '3 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '1 Tbsp. flour', '1/2 tsp. baking powder', '5 Tbsp. water']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Sauce', '3 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. water']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Combine marinade ingredients.
', '
Marinate chicken wings for about 1 hour.
', '
Mix well cornstarch, flour, baking powder, and water.
', '
Coat marinated wings with flour mixture. Deep-fry until golden brown and cooked through. Remove from oil and set aside to drain.
', '
Gently bring Seasoning Sauce to a boil. Toss wings in sauce and ensure each one is coated. Ready to serve.
']

Name: thai-style-fried-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['350 g chicken wings [middle joint]', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Chili Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. corn starch', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 stalk of lemongrass, chopped']
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken wings for 1/2 hour.
', '
Pan-fry chicken wings in 2 Tbsp. cooking oil over low heat until done.
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Chili Sauce and heat through.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: broccoli-chicken-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['6 oz. broccoli, florets, boiled and then rinsed with cold water, drained', '2 oz. carrots, sliced into small pieces', '8 oz. chicken breast, cut into 3/4 inch cubes', '1 oz. water', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. sherry, dry']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1-1/2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1/2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Massage chicken with 1 Tbsp. Oyster Flavored Sauce. Mix rest of Oyster Flavored Sauce, cornstarch, sugar and water, set aside. (oyster sauce mix)
', '
In a heated pan with oil, stir fry chicken until almost done. Add Minced Ginger and dry sherry and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Pour in oyster sauce mix and cook mixture until sauce thickens.
', '
Add broccoli florets and carrots. Cook until heated through.
']

Name: braised-short-ribs
Ingredients: ['1 whole carrot, medium, peeled, cut into 1-inch cubes', '2 stalks celery, cut into 1-inch thick pieces', '2 whole potatoes, cut into 2-inch cubes', '2 Tbsp. flour', '1 whole onion, small, finely diced', '1 whole tomato, medium, finely diced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 lb. beef short ribs, 2-inch thick']
Seasoning: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Coat ribs with flour.
', '
In heated non-stick pan, add oil and brown short ribs on both sides. Set aside.
', '
In the same pan, add tomato, onion and Chili Garlic Sauce. Cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Add beef, Oyster Flavored Sauce and rest of vegetables.
', '
Bring to a boil then simmer for 45 minutes or until meat is tender.
']

Name: braised-chicken-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['1/2 chicken, chopped into chunks']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1½ Tbsp. sugar', '4 Tbsp. wine', '1/2 ginger, sliced', '6 garlic cloves', '1 basil sprig']
Procedure:
['
Sauté ginger and garlic in sesame oil. Add chicken and stir-fry.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, wine, and sugar.
', '
Stir to mix well over high heat. Then cover and cook over low heat until sauce thickens. Stir in basil and serve.
']

Name: braised-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['2 lb. chicken wings, cleaned, cut into sections']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch black pepper , for taste', '4 Tbsp. lemon juice , or vinegar', '1 cup water', '3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3 Lee Kum Kee Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a pot, combine chicken and all of the other ingredients.
', '
Bring to a boil then simmer for 30-40 minutes or until chicken is done.
', '
Serve hot.
']

Name: blue-cheese-turkey-burger-with-lee-kum-kee-premium-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 oz. baby spinach', '4 Tbsp. blue cheese', '1 lb. ground turkey', '1 onion, sliced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 pcs hamburger buns']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine mayonnaise, black pepper and 1 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Sauce. Whisk well and refrigerate. (mayo dip)
', '
Heat oil in pan on high heat. Cook onions until caramelized. Add Soy Sauce and cook until heated through. Keep warm.
', '
In a medium mixing bowl, combine ground turkey, Chili Garlic Sauce and 1 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce. Mix well.
', '
Divide meat into four individual portions. Roll into a ball and stuff each meatball with 1 Tbsp blue cheese. Flatten meat into five inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick pieces.
', '
Grill burger until fully cooked. Assemble burger with with onions and spinach. Dip mayo mix as desired.
']

Name: black-pepper-steak-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['1/2 lb. Flank steak, sliced into thin strips', '1/2 lb. Asparagus, sectioned', '2 Tbsp. Vegetable oil', '1/2 Onion, stripped', '1/2 Red bell pepper, stripped', '1 Tbsp. Water']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/2 Tbsp. Rice Wine', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp LKK Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp Water', '1/2 Tbsp LKK Premium Soy Sauce/ Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '1/2 Tbsp Rice Wine', '1 Tbsp Sugar', '1/2 Tsp LKK Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tsp Freshly Ground Black Pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl or seal-able bag, add all marinades to steak and mix well. Refrigerate for 1 hour
', '
In a medium bowl, mix all sauce mix ingredients. Set aside. (Black Pepper Sauce Mix)
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. of oil in a wok or large skillet to high heat. Remove beef from the marinade and add to the wok. Stir fry for 3 minutes or until the steak is fully cooked. Remove from the pan and set aside.
', '
Add another 1 Tbsp. of oil to the wok or skillet. Add asparagus, onion, and bell pepper and stir fry until they have reached your desired tenderness.
', '
Return the beef to the wok. Add the Black Pepper Sauce Mix to the skillet and cook until heated through.
', '
Serve with rice as desired.
']

Name: black-pepper-burger-with-sriracha-mayo-and-thai-sweet-chili-slaw
Ingredients: ['2 Burger buns', '1 lbs. Breakfast sausage', '2 Garlic cloves, minced', '4 cups Napa cabbage, shredded', '2 cups Bok choy, shredded', '1 cup Cucumber, sliced', '1/8 cup Mint, minced', '1/8 cup Cilantro, minced', '1 cup Red bell pepper, small strips']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Thai Sweet Chili Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix Soy Sauce and Black Pepper Sauce. Grill Breakfast Sausage with sauce mix.
', '
Mix all slaw ingredients in a big bowl, add Thai Chili Sauce and mix well. Keep Slaw in refrigerator for 20 and 30 minutes before serving.
', '
Assemble the buger with breakfast sausage, cold slaw. Top with Sriracha Mayo to taste.\xa0
']

Name: beer-battered-asparagus-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. asparagus , cut ends', '1 tsp. baking soda', '1 cup flour', '1 oz. water', '1 whole egg', '2 oz. oil, for frying']
Seasoning: ['3/4 cup beer', '1/2 tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine Plum Sauce, water and lime juice (plum dipping sauce). Microwave for one minute and set aside.
', '
In a medium mixing bowl, beat egg. Add in beer and the remainder ingredients (beer batter mixture).
', '
Whisk mixture until smooth. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
', '
Coat asparagus with beer batter mixture one at a time.
', '
Dip fry asparagus until golden brown. Serve with plum dipping sauce.
']

Name: beef-steak-torta
Ingredients: ['2  bolilos / sandwich rolls', '¼ cup  refried beans', '1 cup  bok choy, shredded', '1 cup  nappa cabbage, shredded', '1 whole  tomato, sliced', '1 whole  avocado, sliced']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a re-sealable plastic bag, place steak and Black Pepper Sauce. Close bag and shake until the sauce is evenly distributed. Refrigerate and allow to marinate for at least 2 hours.
', '
Heat a grill or grill pan on high heat. Grill steak for 4-5 minutes on each side. Transfer meat onto a cutting board, rest for 5-7 minutes. Slice into portions.
', '
To assemble the Torta, cut bolilos in half and spread refried beans on each side.
', '
Place bok choy, nappa cabbage, tomato, avocado, steak on to the bun and top with Sriracha Mayo.
']

Name: beef-kabobs
Ingredients: ['1 each, small red and green bell pepper, remove ends, cut into large cubes', '1 lb. beef top sirloin, cut into large cubes', '4 skewers, soaked in water']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. ketchup', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine marinades. Mix well and set aside.
', '
On a skewer, thread meat and bell peppers. Marinate beef kabobs with mixture.
', '
Grill on a high heat according to preference.
']

Name: beef-egg-noodles-with-green-beans
Ingredients: ['6 oz. green beans , cut into 1-inch lengths', '8 oz. egg noodles, cooked according to direction', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 lb. ground beef']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Pan-fry beef with 2 Tbsp. cooking oil.
', '
Stir-in Chili Garlic Sauce, green beans and Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
Cook mixture until green beans are tender.
', '
Add egg noodles. Mix well and cook until heated through.
']

Name: beef-chow-mein
Ingredients: ['4 oz. carrot, shredded', '2 oz. celery, thinly sliced', '4 oz. shitake mushrooms, removed stem, sliced', '8 oz. noodles, dried', '4 oz. red bell pepper', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 stalks green onions , chopped', '8 oz. beef, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Soak dried noodles in hot water for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
', '
Stir fry beef with 3 Tbsp. oil for 5 minutes. Add-in the rest of the ingredients.
', '
Cook chow mein for another 5 minutes.
', '
Garnish with chopped green onions.
*Add Chili Garlic Sauce for a spicy kick to your dish.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-burger-with-scrambled-egg
Ingredients: ['300g Ground Beef', '25g Carrots, grated', '1/2 pc Onions, diced finely', '4 pcs Eggs, beaten', 'Cooked vegetables and toasts/buns, for serving']
Seasoning: ['1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee  Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'Pepper to taste']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix beef, onion and carrot with marinade.
', '
Divide beef mixture into 4 portions. Shape to form burgers.
', '
Pan-fry burgers in 2 Tbsp. oil until golden yellow and done. Keep warm.
', '
Mix beaten eggs with seasoning mix. Scramble in 3 Tbsp. oil until just set. Serve scrambled eggs and beef burgers with cooked vegetables and toasts.
']

Name: teriyaki-chicken-wings
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '3 lb. chicken wings , rinsed and patted dry']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper ', '1 cup Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
', '
Season the chicken wings with salt and pepper and drizzle a little olive oil on them to prevent sticking. Lay the wings in a single layer on a baking sheet.
', '
Bake for 30 minutes or until the skin gets crispy and the wings are cooked through.
', '
Pour in Lee Kum Kee Teriyaki Sauce into a large bowl.
', '
Dump the wings into the bowl and toss to coat them with the sauce.
', '
Transfer to a serving platter and sprinkle with the sesame seeds. Serve hot.
']

Name: tempura-dover-sole-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 box tempura mix', '1 lb. dover sole filler, cut in half', '5 Tbsp. oil, for deep-frying']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '4 Tbsp. mayonnaise', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, mix Chili Garlic Sauce and mayonnaise.
', '
Preheat oil in pan on medium to high heat.
', '
Season fish with black pepper. Coat fish in tempura mixture. Shake off excess batter.
', '
Slowly place battered fish into pan. Fry both sides until golden brown.
', '
Serve with Chili Garlic Mayonnaise.
']

Name: tempura-basket-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['1/2 cup cornstarch (batter mix) ', '1 tsp. baking soda (batter mix) ', '1 tsp. baking powder (batter mix) ', '1 oz. water (batter mix)', '1 whole egg, beaten (batter mix) ', '4 oz. zucchini, sliced lengthwise 1/2" thick ', '4 oz. eggplant, sliced lengthwise 1/2" thick ', '4 oz. carrots, sliced lengthwise 1/2" thick ', '8 oz. shrimp, shelled , removed veins', '2 oz. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['4 oz. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', '1 oz. water', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice ', '1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste ']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, water and lemon juice in a bowl. Set aside.
', '
Mix cornstarch, baking soda, baking powder, water and egg until smooth (batter mix).
', '
Season vegetables and shrimp with salt and pepper.
', '
Dip vegetables and shrimp few pieces at a time into batter mix.
', '
Deep fry vegetables and shrimp until crispy brown.
', '
Serve with Plum Sauce mixture.
']

Name: tangy-grilled-steak
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef flank steak']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste ', '2 oz. orange juice ', '1 Tbsp. orange zest ', '2 tsp. garlic, minced ', '1 oz. zucchini, shredded ', '1 oz. carrots, shredded ']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except flank steak. Mix well.
', '
Marinate steak for 30 minutes.
', '
Grill steak on each side for 5-7 minutes.
', '
Serve with your favorite side dish.
']

Name: cucumber-mango-salad-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 cups romaine lettuce', '4 oz. cucumbers, peeled, cut into 3/4" squares', '1 oz. thai basil, sliced', '1 oz. vinegar, or lime juice', '1 whole mango, riped and peeled, cut into 1/2 squares', '4 oz. mandarin orange segments (from can)', '4 oz. grape tomato']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, whisk Chili Garlic Sauce, Plum Sauce and Sesame Oil.
', '
Add all ingredients.
', '
Toss and serve.
']

Name: cubed-turkey-salad-with-lee-kum-kee-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. Turkey, cooked', '8oz. pasta, cook according to direction', '1 small red bell pepper, chopped', '1 oz. dried cranberries', '4 oz. grapes, halves']
Seasoning: ['4 oz. Mayonnaise', '1 pinch Salt and pepper, for taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients. Mix well.
', '
Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
', '
Serve immediately.
']

Name: crunchy-shrimp-toast
Ingredients: ['6 slices bread', '8 oz. tiger shrimp, shelled', '1/3 cup water chestnuts, drained', '1 whole egg white, organic', '2 tsp. sherry']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 Tbsp. sesame seeds, toasted', '2 stalks green onions, minced', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 250F.
', '
Cut each slice of bread into two or four triangles (depending on size of slices). Spread on ungreased baking sheet and bake 25 minutes, or until crisp.
', '
While bread toasts, add all remaining ingredients except sesame seeds to food processor or blender and puree until a medium-smooth paste.
', '
Scrape mixture into a bowl and let rest 10 minutes. Raise oven to 400F.
', '
Spread a generous amount of shrimp mixture on toast triangles and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Bake for 10-12 minutes and serve hot or warm with sauce.
', '
Whisk all ingredients with a fork in a small bowl until well blended (ginger plum sauce).
']

Name: croissant-turkey-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 pieces croissant', '6 oz. turkey, deli-style, sliced', '4 slices Swiss cheese', '1 piece tomato, sliced', '1 piece avocado, pit removed, sliced', '2 oz. black olives, pitted, sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1/2 tsp. sugar', '1/4 tsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, whisk together mustard, Chili Garlic Sauce, olive oil, sugar and lime juice. Set aside (chili garlic mustard).
', '
Spread chili garlic mustard on croissant.
', '
Assemble sandwich with remaining ingredients.
']

Name: crispy-chicken-cakes-with-plum-ginger-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cilantro, chopped', '1 lb. ground chicken', '2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped', '2 Tbsp. oil, for frying', '1 whole egg', '4 Tbsp. breadcrumbs']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Combine Oyster Flavored Sauce and Chili Garlic Sauce (sauce mixture). Heat up in microwave.
', '
Combine ingredients (chicken, cilantro, parsley, egg, breadcrumbs and sauce mixture) in a bowl. Mix well.
', '
Form a small ball and flatten-about 1/2 inch thick.
', '
Pan fry on both sides until golden brown.
', '
Serve with ginger plum sauce (Plum Sauce, vinegar, ginger, Sesame Oil).
']

Name: creamy-vegetable-soup-with-lee-kum-kee-premium-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 oz. Carrot, cut into small pieces', '8oz. butternut squash, peeled, cut into pcs', '4oz. heavy cream', '4 oz. half and half', '2 Tbsp. flour', '2 cups water', '2 oz. onion', '4oz. leek, cut into small pieces', '2 cloves angled luffa, minced', '2 Tbsp. Butter']
Marinade: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 pinch salt and pepper', '1 tsp. parsely, chopped', '1 tsp. thyme, dried']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized pan, heat butter and flour on medium heat. Stir well and cook until golden brown.
', '
Stir garlic, onion, leek, carrots and squash. Cook mixture for 3 minutes.
', '
Add water, thyme, Oyster Sauce and parsley. Cook mixture until vegetables are tender. Cool for 10 minutes.
', '
Transfer mixture into a blender. Process until mixture is smooth.
', '
Return mixture into the sauce pan. Add heavy cream and half and half.
', '
Cook mixture until heated through. Season with salt and pepper.
']

Name: creamy-minced-chicken
Ingredients: ['4 oz. chickpeas, canned, rinsed and drained', '8 oz. peas, frozen', '16 oz. chicken, minced', '4 oz. red bell pepper, seeded and diced', '1 cup cooked rice', '3 Tbso. cooking oil', '1 whole shallot, chopped']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch black pepper, for taste', '1 tsp. sugar', '6 oz. heavy cream', '1/4 tsp. cilantro', '1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken with Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce. Marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, cook shallot until brown.
', '
 Add minced chicken and cook until 3/4 done.
', '
Stir in Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce, red bell pepper, frozen peas, chickpeas, sugar, and cilantro.
', '
Cook mixture until almost dry.
', '
Stir in heavy cream and season with black pepper. Serve with steamed rice or pasta.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: crab-cakes-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. imitation crab , coarsely chopped', '2 whole eggs , beaten', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. breadcrumbs']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '4 Tbsp. mayonnaise', '1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard', '3 Tbsp. parsley, chopped']
Procedure:
['
Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl.
', '
Cut mixture into six equal parts and form mixture into patties.
', '
Pan-fry each side until golden brown.
']

Name: colcannon-with-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 lb. potatoes (Idaho), peeled and quartered', '1 cup milk, warm', '1 stick butter, melted', '1 lb. cabbage, shredded, blanched and drained', '12 oz. bacon, sliced, cook until crispy, fat drained', '4 stalks green onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large pot, bring potato and 1 gallon of water to a boil. Cook potato until tender and drain.
', '
Mash potato until smooth and gradually stir in hot milk and warm butter. Mix well.
', '
Fold in rest of ingredients. Serve warm.
']

Name: chicken-with-egg-noodles-and-bok-choy
Ingredients: ['8 oz. egg noodles, cooked', '8 oz. chicken breast, cut into 1-inch strips', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. bok choy, stems removed and cut into halves']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch black pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Sauce Mix: ['3 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '4 oz. water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine Black Bean Garlic Sauce, sugar, water and cornstarch to create a black bean sauce mixture. Set aside.
', '
Cook egg noodles according to packaged directions and set aside.
', '
Marinade chicken with 1 Tbsp. cornstarch and Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
In a heated pan, stir fry chicken. Midway through, add in egg noodles, bok choy and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in black bean sauce mixture and cook until heated through, or until the sauce thickens. Season with black pepper.
']

Name: chicken-pasta-with-edamame-pesto
Ingredients: ['4 oz. frozen edamame-thawed', '2 cloves garlic', '6 Tbsp. grated parmesan cheese', 'Black pepper, to taste', '2 cups basil', '1 Tbsp. pine nuts', '2 oz. olive oil', '8 oz. pasta-cook according to direction-keep warm', '8 oz. chicken breast ¡cut into thin strips', '2 tsp. cornstarch', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. chopped parsley']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Less Sodium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Klee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a blender, combine edamame, garlic, parmesan cheese, black pepper, basil, pine nuts, Sesame Oil, Soy Sauce. Process into a coarse paste mixture.
', '
Drizzle olive oil.\xa0 Blend mixture into a smooth paste. Set aside. (edamame pesto)
', '
In a small bowl, combine Oyster Sauce, chicken and cornstarch. Mix well.
', '
Heat cooking oil in pan. Stir-fry chicken until golden brown.
', '
Stir in cooked pasta and edamame pesto. Mix well.
', '
Garnish with chopped parsley.
']

Name: chicken-jambalaya-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. chicken breast, cut into strips', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 cup bell peppers (red and green), deseeded and diced', '2 whole tomatoes, medium diced', '1 cup celery, diced', '2 cups cooked rice', '8 oz. smoked sausage, cut into 1/2-inch pieces']
Seasoning: ['4 cups chicken broth', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 pinch salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a heated saucepan, sauté chicken with oil for 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in vegetables, Chili Garlic Sauce, cooked rice and chicken broth.
', '
Add in remaining ingredients and bring to a boil. Simmer for 8-10 ninutes.
']

Name: tangerine-stir-fried-beef-with-onions-and-snow-peas
Ingredients: ['12 oz. flank steak, cut into 2" strips with grain, then sliced across again into 1/8" thick slices', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 large onion, halved and cut into 1/2-inch wedges', '4 cups snow peas, ends trimmed and strings removed', '2 Tbsp. water']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. light brown sugar', '1 tsp. tangerine juice', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. light brown sugar']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. grated tangerine zest', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Sauce', '1/2 to 1/4 tsp. red pepper flakes', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce and 1 tsp. light brown sugar in medium bowl. Add beef, toss well, and marinate for at least 10 minutes or up to 1 hour, stirring once.\xa0
', '
Meanwhile, whisk 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce, 1 Tbsp. light brown sugar, tangerine juice, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, and cornstarch in medium bowl (Seasoning). Combine tangerine zest, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Minced Ginger, Black Bean Sauce, pepper flakes, and 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in small bowl (Sauce Mix).
', '
Drain beef and discard liquid. Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in 12-inch nonstick skillet over high heat until just smoking. Add half of the beef in single layer, breaking up clumps. Cook, without stirring, for 1 minute, then stir and cook until browned, 1 to 2 minutes.
', '
Transfer beef to clean bowl. Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in skillet and repeat with remaining beef. Rinse skillet and dry with paper towels.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil to now-empty skillet and heat until just smoking. Add onion and cook, stirring frequently, until beginning to brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Add snow peas and continue to cook until spotty brown, about 2 minutes longer. Add water and cook until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 1 minute. Push vegetables to sides of skillet.
', '
Add zest-garlic Sauce Mix to clearing and cook, mashing with spatula, until fragrant, 15 to 20 seconds. Combine zest-garlic Sauce Mix with vegetables. Return beef and Seasoning to skillet and stir to combine. Whisk everything together to recombine; cook, stirring constantly, until thickened, about 30 seconds. Serve.
']

Name: sweet-pulled-pork-sandwich-with-lee-kum-kee-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 lb. pork butt, cut to 2 x 4 in. logs', '4 pcs. french rolls ']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, as desired']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 pinch salt and pepper', '1 Tbsp. oil']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and mayonnaise. Mix well and refrigerate.
', '
In a baking dish, combine the pork, brown sugar, salt, black pepper and cooking oil. Mix well. Marinate for 2 hours or overnight.
', '
Bake marinated pork at 350 degrees F for 1.5 hours. Cool and slice into small pieces.
', '
Assemble pulled pork with the french rolls spread with the Hoisin and mayonnaise mixture. Brush on additional Hoisin Sauce on the pork.
', '
Tips: Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce helps retain the moisture and flavor for pork or any protein during high baking temperatures.\xa0
']

Name: sweet-ginger-salmon-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. salmon steak ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Plum Sauce, Minced Ginger and Pure Sesame Oil (plum mixture).
', '
Marinate salmon with plum mixture for 20-30 minutes.
', '
Grill salmon for 5 minutes on each side.
']

Name: sweet-boneless-short-rib-wraps-with-lee-kum-kee-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. beef ribs, thinly sliced', '2 Tbsp. oil', '8 pcs. tortilla, flour', '4 Tbsp. green onion(s), chopped']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine ribs, Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger and olive oil. Mix well and marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Heat oil in pan on high heat. Pan-fry beef in small batches until golden brown. Keep warm.
', '
Serve with warm tortillas, additional Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and remaining ingredients.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-chicken
Ingredients: ['4 whole chicken legs ']
Marinade: ['8 oz. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum kee Minced Ginger ', '4 Tbsp. dry sherry']
Procedure:
['
Combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, Chili Garlic Sauce, Minced Ginger and dry sherry in a baking dish.
', '
Marinate chicken for 1 hour.
', '
Bake at 350F until chicken is fully cooked.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-beef
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 lb. beef slices']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in pan. Stir-fry beef until 3/4 done.
', '
Stir in seasoning.\xa0
', '
 Cook until heated through.
', '
Serve over steam rice.
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-prawn-salad
Ingredients: ['200g honeydew melon [diced]', '200 g rock melon [diced]', '90 g prawns[meat, cooked]']
Seasoning: ['1 packet Lee Kum Kee Sweet & Sour Sauce for Sour Pork/ Spare Ribs']
Procedure:
['
Arrange ingredients on a salad bowl and chill.
', '
Mix well with Lee Kum Kee Sauce For Sweet and Sour Pork/Spare Ribs.  Serve at once.
', '
N/A
']

', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-pork
Ingredients: ['150 g pork fillet [cubed]', 'cornstarch for dusting', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1/2 pc. red bell pepper [cubed]', '4 slices canned pineapple [drained and cubed]']
Seasoning: ['1 packet Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Sweet & Sour Pork']
Marinade: ['½ tsp. salt', '1 tsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. beaten egg']
Procedure:
['
Mix pork with Marinade, dust with cornstarch. Remove excess cornstarch and deep-fry in hot oil until golden and done. Drain well.
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp oil. Sauté red pepper for 1 minute.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Sauce for Sweet & Sour Pork, pineapple and fried pork.
', '
Stir well until heated through.
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-meatballs
Ingredients: ['1 whole egg, beaten ', '8 oz. ground beef, lean ', '2 Tbsp. breadcrumbs', '2 oz. onion, small, diced ', '1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped ', '4 oz. red and green bell peppers, seeded, cut into strips ']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 oz. water', '2 Tbsp. seasoned vinegar']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine egg, ground beef, breadcrumbs, onions and chopped parsley. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Divide the mixture into 8 equal parts and form into individual meatballs. Deep fry meatball until done. Set aside.
', '
In a medium sauce pan, combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, water and seasoned vinegar (sauce mixture).
', '
Bring sauce mixture into a boil. Add in bell peppers and cooked meatballs and simmer until done.
']

Name: summer-fruit-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. raspberries ', '8 oz. blueberries ', '8 oz. cantaloupe, rolled into balls ', '1 whole mango, cut into 3/4" squares ', '8 oz. strawberries ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', '2 Tbsp. water', '2 Tbsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
Rinse fruits and pat dry.
', '
Arrange fruits in a bowl.
', '
Combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, water and lime juice. Place mixture to the fruits. Serve cold.
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-mandarin-fish
Ingredients: ['1 pc. Mandarin fish 600 Tael (China)', 'a little plain flour', '1-2 pc bamboo skewers', 'deep frying oil', 'a little tapioca starch', '1 Tbsp. ginger [chopped]', '2 Tbsp. water', '10 g ginger[shredded]']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Double Fermented Soy Sauce ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Chinkiang vinegar ', '2 Tbsp. sugar ', '2 Tbsp. water  ', 'a little Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', 'a little cooking wine ']
Procedure:
['
Remove fish meat from bone. Dust fish bone with plain flour and thread onto bamboo skewers. Deep-fry in very hot oil until crispy. Put on a serving plate.
', '
Cut fish meat into pieces. Marinate with Lee Kum Kee Double Deluxe Soy Sauce for a short while. Dust with tapioca starch. Deep-fry until golden yellow and crispy. Put on top of fish bone.
', '
Sauté chopped ginger. Add Sauce Mix. Stir in tapioca starch and water solution as thickening and heat through. Pour sauce over fish. Garnish with shredded ginger.
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 whole chicken ', '1 whole onion, chopped', '1 stalk celery, chopped ', '1/4 cup extra virgin olive oil ', '2 Tbsp. capers, rinsed ', '10 pcs. green olives, whole with pits ', '3/4 cup almonds, lightly toasted']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper ', '1/2 cup Panda Brand Sweet & Sour Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Remove all the skin and trim the fat from the chicken.
', '
Cut the chicken into 8 small pieces, using both the breast and the thighs.
', '
Season with salt and pepper.
', '
In a baking dish, place chicken pieces, onion, celery and bake for 15 minutes at 400 degrees F.
', '
Add in remainder ingredients and bake for 20-25 minutes. Serve hot.
']

Name: sweet-and-sour-brisket-delight
Ingredients: ['3 lbs. beef brisket, first-cut or flat-half cut, trimmed off any excess fat ', '2 Tbsp. canola oil', '1 whole onion, halved, then thinly sliced ', '3 cloves garlic, chopped ', '1/3 cup raisins ', '5 pcs. black peppercorns', '1/4 cup low sodium chicken broth']
Seasoning: ['1-1/2 tsp. salt and pepper', '1 can tomato sauce (15 oz.), preferably no salt added ', '1 cup Panda Brand Sweet & Sour Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat the oven to 300 degrees F.
', '
Pat the brisket dry and sprinkle with the salt and pepper. Heat 1 Tbsp. of oil over medium-high heat in a Dutch oven or pot. Sear the brisket until it is browned, 4 to 5 minutes per side. Transfer the brisket to a plate.
', '
Add the remaining 1 Tbsp. oil to the pot and cook the onion, stirring a few times, until softened, 3 to 5 minutes. Add the garlic and cook, stirring, for 1 minute. Add the tomato sauce, broth, Panda Brand Sweet & Sour Sauce, the raisins, peppercorns, and stir to mix well.
', '
Bring mixture to a boil, return brisket and any accumulated juices to the pot and transfer to the oven. Cook until the brisket is fork tender, 2 1/2 to 3 hours.
', '
Remove the brisket from the oven, transfer the meat to a cutting board, and let it cool for 10 to 20 minutes. Serve.
']

Name: chicken-gumbo-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. chicken breast, skinless, medium dice', '2 oz. onion, diced', '8 oz. okra, frozen', '2 oz. carrots, diced', '2 oz. celery, diced', '1 whole tomato, diced', '1 cup cooked rice']
Seasoning: ['2 cups chicken broth', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. thyme (fresh or dried)']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pot, add oil and sauté chicken for 5 minutes or until browned.
', '
Stir in vegetables and cook for 5 minutes.
', '
Add chicken broth, Chili Garlic Sauce and simmer for another 5-8 minutes.
', '
Serve with rice.
']

Name: chicken-egg-omelet
Ingredients: ['4 oz. button mushrooms, cut into small pieces', '4 oz. chicken breast, cut into small pieces', '4 oz. red bell peppers, diced', '5 whole eggs, beaten', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch black pepper , to taste', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Sauté chicken with 1 Tbsp. oil for 2 minutes.
', '
Add red bell peppers and mushrooms. Cook until wilted.
', '
Add Oyster Flavored Sauce and cook until heated through. Set aside (chicken mixture).
', '
In a heated non-stick skillet, add 2 Tbsp. oil. Cook eggs for 1-2 minutes.
', '
Add the chicken mixture and season with black pepper.
', '
Drizzle Hoisin Sauce before serving.
']

Name: chicken-breast-fillet-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 pieces tomato slices', '2 pieces lettuce', '1 pound chicken breast , fillet , cut into 2" length by 1/2" thick', '4 Tbsp. cornstarch', '2-3 slices onion', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 pieces bread rolls , 4"-6" in diameter']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste']
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken with Oyster Flavored Sauce, Hoisin Sauce and salt and pepper for 10 minutes.
', '
Coat chicken with cornstarch.
', '
Sauté chicken two pieces at a time, cook until done.
', '
Assemble chicken, tomato, lettuce and onion over the bread.
', '
Drizzle Hoisin sauce on top of burger for extra flavor.
']

Name: chicken-bacon-wrap-with-spinach-salad
Ingredients: ['2 pieces chicken breast, skinless, sliced in half lengthwise', '4 slices Swiss cheese', '4 rashers bacon', '4 pieces toothpicks', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 oz. red onion, cut into rings', '4 oz. baby spinach', '1 tsp. olive oil']
Marinade: ['2 oz. boxed stuffing, cook according to packaged directions', '1 oz. hot water', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '4 tsp. vinegar, separated', '1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped']
Procedure:
['
Combine stuffing, hot water, Chili Garlic Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, Hoisin Sauce, seasoned vinegar and parsley into a small bowl.
', '
Place a spoonful of stuffing mixture onto chicken. Roll up chicken into a tight cylinder.
', '
Wrap chicken roll with 2 slices of swiss cheese and bacon. Secure rolled chicken with a toothpick. Repeat.\xa0
', '
In a heated pan with oil, sauté red onion for 2 minutes and brown the rolled chicken on both sides until done.
', '
Cool and then slice.\xa0
']

Name: chicken-and-lychee
Ingredients: ['350g Chicken meat', '150g Canned Lychees, drained and halved', '1 pc Bell pepper', '1 pc Strawberry']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1/2 tsp. Corn starch', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Lee White Seasoned Vinegar', '3 Tbsp. Water', '1 Tbsp. Sugar', '1 tsp. Corn starch']
Procedure:
['
Mix chicken with marinade.
', '
Stir-fry chicken in 2 Tbsp. oil until done.
', '
Add bell pepper, strawberries and stir-fry for 1 minute.
', '
Stir in lychees, sauce mix and heat through.
']

Name: chicken-and-basil-burger
Ingredients: ['4 oz. Spinach, baby', '4 Slices Butter, swiss', '1 lb. Chicken, ground', '4 Tbsp. panko crumbs', '2 Tbsp. Oil', '4 pcs Hamurger buns']
Seasoning: ['1/2 tsp. Sugar', '3 Tbsp. basil, chopped', '4 Tbsp. Mayonnaise', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sacue']
Procedure:
['
Combine chicken, basil, Chili Garlic Sauce, Oyster Sauce, sugar and panko bread crumbs.
', '
Divide mixture into four equal parts. Roll into a ball and then flatten into 6 inch in diameter-sized patties.
', '
Heat oil in pan on high heat. Pan-fry chicken patties until fully cooked.
', '
Assemble chicken burger with the remainder of ingredients.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
