']

Name: cauliflower-casserole-with-panda-brand-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 head cauliflower, blanched with salted boiling water, rinsed and drained', '2 cups milk', '4 Tbsp. flour', '1 small onion, chopped', '4 Tbsp. butter', '1/2 cup breadcrumbs']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped', '1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, shredded']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sauce pan, add in butter and onion. Cook at medium heat for 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in flour and cook mixture for an additional 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in milk, Oyster Flavored Sauce and parsley. Mix well (mixture). Cook mixture until thickened.
', '
In a 4 x 9 inch baking dish, mix in cauliflower, breadcrumbs, and mixture thoroughly.
', '
Sprinkle parmesan cheese on top and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or until mixture forms a crispy crust on top.
']

Name: cabbage-and-sausage-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 small onion, sliced', '1 lb. cabbage, cored, cut into 2-inch pieces', '1 lb. sausage (beef or turkey), cut diagonally into 1/2-inch pieces', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 tsp. Italian mixed herbs (dried)', '1 cup water']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. vinegar', '1 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
In a heated saucepan, stir fry onions and sausage with oil for 5 minutes.
', '
Add in remaining ingredients except water and stir fry for another 2 minutes.
', '
Pour in water and place a lid on the pan.
', '
Bring to a boil and simmer for another 5 minutes.
']

Name: grilled-pepper-and-steak-kebabs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. sirloin steak', '1 red bell pepper', '1 green bell pepper', '1 red onion', 'olive oil']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper, to taste', 'Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, drizzle on top']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl place the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce, honey and the steak and let marinade.
', '
When your steak is marinated to your liking, go ahead and cut into cubes.
', '
Cut bell peppers and onion into skewer sized pieces.\xa0
', '
Place the marinated steak and veggies on a kebab, brush with a little olive oil, season with salt and pepper, and grill.
', '
Once removed from grill and cooled, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking soy sauce for added flavor.
']

Name: chili-garlic-shrimp
Ingredients: ['¼ cup olive oil', '1 tsp. chili flakes', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 lb. peeled and deveined large shrimp, tail on', '1 tsp. fresh chopped cilantro, to garnish']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper, to taste', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat a skillet with oil on high. Add in the chili flakes and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic. Mix well and cook until the garlic is browned, but not burned.
', '
Lower the heat to medium and then add in the shrimp, salt and pepper.
', '
Cook the shrimp for a few minutes until translucent and cooked through, stirring everything together.\xa0
', '
Stir in the Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and mix the shrimp well. Turn off the heat and then toss in the fresh chopped cilantro.
', '
Serve with some rice or by itself.
']

Name: soy-glazed-grilled-chicken-bowl
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken thighs, boneless & skinless', '1 tsp. grated ginger', '1 cucumber, cut into thin ribbons', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds', '1 cup brown rice, per bowl', '1 avocado, for garnish (optional)', '1 scallion, chopped for garnish', 'Sesame seeds, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup rice vinegar', '1 tsp. honey', '1 tsp. salt']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a freezer bag add the chicken thighs, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Cooking Soy Sauce and grated ginger. You can marinate this overnight, or just as long as you can. The longer the better.
', '
Make your cucumber topping by making cucumber ribbons and mixing them in a bowl with rice vinegar, honey, salt and sesame seeds. Toss that together and set aside.
', '
Grill the chicken until crispy and cooked through. Set aside to cool before slicing.\xa0
', '
Make your rice bowl by adding cooked brown rice, topped with cucumber ribbon salad, sliced chicken, avocado (optional), fresh chopped scallions and sesame seeds.\xa0
', '
You can drizzle more Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce over the top, or teriyaki sauce.\xa0
']

Name: mushroom-and-blue-cheese-lettuce-wrapped-burger
Ingredients: ['1 lb. lean ground beef', '½ yellow onion, finely diced', '1 egg, whisked', '⅓ cup butter', '1 cup crimini mushrooms', '2 garlic cloves, chopped', '4 butter lettuce wraps', '½ cup crumbled blue cheese']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl mix the beef, diced onion, salt, pepper, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and 1 egg. Mix well with your hands and then form into two ½ lb. burger patties.\xa0
', '
Cook the burgers to desired temperature and then set aside.
', '
In the same pan as the burgers toss in a little butter and let it melt down. Then add in the crimini mushrooms, chopped garlic and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce. Let the mushrooms cook down for about 5 minutes until soft then turn the heat off.\xa0
', '
Make your lettuce wraps by taking a large piece of butter lettuce and wrapping the burger patty, topping it with mushrooms and finally some crumbled blue cheese. Serve right away while warm.\xa0
']

Name: soy-glazed-salmon-with-broccoli-rabe
Ingredients: ['1 garlic clove', '1 salmon fillet, cut in halves', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 bunch broccoli rabe ', 'Green onion, chopped', 'Sesame seeds, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. miso paste']
Procedure:
['
In a pan combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, miso paste, and garlic in a pan over medium heat. Whisk together until miso is mixed in. Turn off the heat and set aside.
', '
Take the salmon and set on a tray with parchment paper. Brush the salmon with soy sauce mix and then place in the fridge to marinate for a bit until ready to cook.\xa0
', '
Preheat broiler to 350 F degrees.
', '
In a nonstick pan, place olive oil and heat it up. Place the salmon skin side down and cook for 2-3 minutes.
', '
Pour the remaining soy marinade over the salmon and then place under the broiler to cook for 6 or so minutes.\xa0
While the fish is cooking, throw in the broccoli rabe to the pan and cook that down for a few minutes.
', '
Remove salmon from the oven and garnish with some chopped green onion, sesame seeds and serve with a side of the seared broccoli rabe.
']

Name: kale-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 block of extra firm tofu', '2 tsp. cooking oil', '1 garlic clove, roughly chopped', '1 small bunch of kale, stem removed and roughly chopped', '¼ cup shredded red cabbage', '1 carrot, julienned ', '1 green apple, peeled and thinly sliced', 'White sesame seeds, to garnish (optional) ']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper, to taste', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Drain the tofu and try and get as much moisture out of it as possible before cutting.
', '
Cut the tofu into small 1 inch cubes and then season with salt and pepper.
', '
Place oil in a large frying pan and add the tofu. Cook until golden brown and crispy and then remove and set aside.\xa0
', '
Add the chopped garlic and cook for a minute, and then toss in the chopped kale and shredded cabbage. Cook that down until the kale starts to wilt and soften.
', '
Add in the julienned carrot, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and cook for another couple minutes. Add sliced green apples, place the tofu back in and give a few final tosses.\xa0
', '
Serve the stir fry over noodles, rice or by itself. Optional: top it off with some white sesame seeds.\xa0
']

Name: shrimp-spring-rolls-with-dipping-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 cucumber, julienned', '1 carrot, peeled and julienned ', '1 head of butter lettuce, rinsed and dried', '12 rice paper wrappers', '1 cup cooked white quinoa']
Procedure:
['
Peel and devein the shrimp and give a good rinse. Set them aside on a paper towel to dry off.
', '
Preheat the oven to 400 F degrees and then grease a baking tray.\xa0
', '
Place the shrimp on the tray and then roast them in the oven for 6 minutes or until cooked through and pink. Take them out and let cool, and then slice them in half lengthwise.\xa0
', '
Julienne both the carrot and cucumber and then set aside. Take your rice wrappers and wet one by one in a large bowl of water for 10 seconds.\xa0
', '
Place lettuce down and top with cooked quinoa, a few pieces of carrot,\xa0 cucumber followed by 2 pieces of shrimp. Wrap from the bottom to the top and then fold in the sides and roll it up. Make as many as you can.\xa0
', '
Serve them with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce.
']

Name: tempura-fried-chicken-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 cups flour', '2 cups water', '1 ½ tsp. baking soda', 'Frying oil, 2" deep in skillet', '1 lb. chicken breast tenders ', '2 brioche buns ', '1 cup slaw (red cabbage, carrot, onion)']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ tsp. salt', '3 Tbsp. vinegar']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, mix together the flour, salt and water. In another bowl mix the vinegar, baking soda; that will begin to foam and then pour that into the flour mix.\xa0
', '
In a dutch oven or deep skillet pour about 2 inches of frying oil and heat that up to 350° F, on medium/high heat.\xa0
', '
Place the chicken tenders into the tempura mix, letting it drip off and then place it carefully into the frying oil.
', '
Fry them in just a few at a time for about 5 minutes. Place them onto paper towels to drain. Fry all the chicken you have.\xa0
', '
Make your chicken sandwich by placing a tempura chicken tender on the bun, followed by coleslaw and then top it off with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.
', '
Make as many sandwiches as you can with the chicken. Serve right away while nice and hot.\xa0
']

Name: diced-beef-and-potato-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 oz. peas and carrots', '4 oz. potatoes , diced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '12 oz. beef flank steak, cut into 3/4-inch cubes']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. sherry', '1/2 tsp. sugar']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Marinate beef with 1 Tbsp. cornstarch and Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce for 10 minutes. Set aside.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, stir-fry beef and Minced Garlic for 4 minutes.
', '
Stir in the remainder ingredients. Cook mixture for another 3 minutes.
']

Name: exotic-cold-noodles
Ingredients: ['75g Green tea noodles', '75g Soba (buckwheat noodles)', '50g Chicken Sausage, shredded', '50g Jubilee Ham, shredded', '1/2 pc Bell pepper, eed, thinly sliced', '1/2 pc Bell pepper, yellow, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sweet Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Kee Kum Kee Seasoned Red Vinegar', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Sugar', '1 Tbsp. Water']
Procedure:
['
Cook noodles in boiling water separately according to packet instructions or until tender.
', '
Drain and soak in iced water until cold.  Drain.
', '
Arrange cold cuts and bell peppers on noodles.  Chill in refrigerator.
', '
Prepare seasoning mix and pour over noodles.  Mix well and serve cold.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: easy-mu-shu
Ingredients: ['1 Tbsp. shrimp, or shredded skinless chicken breast or diced firm tofu (optional)', '1/3 cup coleslaw mixture, pre-shredded (a mix of red cabbage, green cabbage and carrots)', '2 pcs shitake mushrooms, medium, fresh, cleaned and finely chopped', '1/3 cup cooked rice, for serving', '1 stalk green onion, finely diced', '1 whole egg white, organic', '2 pcs tortillas, 6-inch, or mu shu pancakes']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a nonstick skillet sprayed with cooking oil, sauté the coleslaw mix, green onion, and mushrooms until tender and the liquid released from the mushrooms has evaporated, stirring frequently.
', '
Push veggies to edge of pan, and add egg white. Scramble egg in pan until just cooked through. Remove pan from heat. Stir veggies into eggs, then stir in Hoisin Sauce.
', '
If using flour tortillas, wrap in foil and heat in 250°F oven for 10 minutes until hot.
', '
Spoon rice and veggie/egg mixture into pancake or tortilla (add shrimp/chicken/tofu if desired), wrap, and serve with additional Hoisin Sauce for dipping.
']

Name: easy-chicken-pizza
Ingredients: ['4 stems scallions, finely diced', '1 cup mozzarella cheese, grated', '8 oz. chicken breast, boneless, store-bought or pre-prepared', '1/2 piece red bell pepper, remove seeds, sliced into thin pieces', '2 whole pizza dough, 6-inch, ready-made']
Seasoning: ['1/4 can Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Hoisin Sauce', '1 pinch pepper', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350F.
', '
Place pizza dough on pizza pan. Brush olive oil thoroughly on pizza dough.
', '
Spread Hoisin Sauce on center of dough. Follow by sprinkling chicken breast over crust. Then, place bell pepper and scallions over crust.
', '
Sprinkle mozzarella cheese and black pepper and place entire pizza pan into oven
', '
Bake for 5-10 minutes or until cheese is melted. Serve immediately.
']

Name: fried-rice-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['350g (about 2 cups) Cooked rice', '90g Ham, diced', '50g Shrimp meat, cooked', '3 pcs Egg (s), beaten', '1 pc Onion, chopped', '2 Tbsp. Ginger, minced']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Pan-fry the eggs into thin egg sheets.  Shred and set aside.
', '
Heat 2 tbsp oil in wok.  Saute ginger and onion until fragrant.
', '
Add ham, shrimps and stir-fry until done.
', '
Add cooked rice, shredded egg and seasonings.
', '
Stir well until heated through.
']

Name: fried-rice-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['350g (about 2 cups) Cooked rice', '90g Beef, sliced', '1 Egg, beaten', '1/2 pc Onion, shredded', '2 pcs Fresh Shiitake mushroom, sliced', '1 Tbsp. Green peas', '1/2 Tbsp. Oil']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', 'Pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kem Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Sugar']
Sauce Mix: ['1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kium Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix beef with marinade.
', '
Add a little salt to the egg. Beat well. Scramble and set aside.
', '
Saute minced garlic and onion in 2 Tbsp. oil. Add beef, fresh black mushrooms and stir-fry until done.
', '
Stir in cooked rice, egg and green peas. Add sauce mix, pepper and stir well until heated through.
']

Name: fried-pumpkin-with-sesame-and-lee-kum-kee-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 cup carrots, shredded', '1/4 tsp. nutmeg', '2 Tbsp. sesame seeds, black, roasted', '4 cups pumpkin, skin removed and seeded, cut into cubes', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste', '1 pinch salt']
Procedure:
['
In a heated sauce pan with oil, add onion, Minced Garlic and pumpkin. Stir well.
', '
Bring mixture to a boil. Cover and then simmer for 10 minutes.
', '
Stir in Premium Soy Sauce, shredded carrots and nutmeg. Cook for another 5 minutes.
', '
Add pinch of salt and pepper. Garnish with roasted black sesame seeds before serving.
']

Name: fried-fish-with-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['350g Fish fillet, cut into pieces', '2 Tbsp. Corn starch, for dusting']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Mix fish fillet with marinade and dust with corn starch.
', '
Pan-fry fish in 2 Tbsp. oil until golden yellow and done. Stir in Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce and heat through.
', '
Sprinkle with red chili. Serve.
']

Name: fried-cod-fillet
Ingredients: ['250g (2 pcs) Black cod, fillet']
Seasoning: ['50g Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Pan-fry fish in 1-2 tbsp oil until golden yellow and done.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee\xa0 Soy Sauce for cod fillet and heat through.
', '
Stir well lightly.
', '
* Black cod fillet can be replaced by other kind of fish fillet.
']

Name: french-baby-green-bean-salad-with-premium-soy-vinaigrette
Ingredients: ['8 oz. green beans , removed ends, cut into 1-inch lengths, soaked in salted boiling water, rinsed and drained well', '2 oz. red and yellow bell peppers, cut thinly', '1 oz. white onion, sliced', '1 Tbsp. water']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil', '1 pinch black pepper', '1 pinch sugar', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. vinegar, seasoned']
Procedure:
['
Combine the following ingredients in a mixing bowl: Premium Soy Sauce, Sesame Oil, olive oil, vinegar, water, sugar and black pepper. Mix well.
', '
Toss in remainder ingredients and mix well.
', '
Serve at room temperature.
']

Name: summer-vegetable-pasta
Ingredients: ['2 whole zucchini, removed ends, sliced into 1/2-inch thick pieces lengthwise ', '4 oz. orso pasta, or rice shaped pasta, cooked according to direction ', '2 whole tomatoes, diced ', '1 cup parsley, chopped ']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste ', '1 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Season zucchini with salt, pepper and 1 Tbsp. olive oil.
', '
Grill zucchini on both sides and place in refrigerator until cool. Then dice into small pieces.
', '
In a bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, olive oil and vinegar (Plum-Soy dressing). Set aside.
', '
Assemble pasta and the tomatoes on a platter.
', '
Drizzle Plum-Soy dressing and garnish with parsley.
']

Name: grilled-tofu-and-vegetables
Ingredients: ['1 lb. zucchini, cut into 1/2-inch thick pieces lengthwise', '1 lb. squash , yellow, cut into 1/2-inch thick pieces lengthwise', '8 oz. asparagus, snapped ends', '1 lb. tofu, firm, cut into 2x4x1-inch thick pieces']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste', '2 tsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Premium Soy Sauce, black pepper, Sesame Oil and lime juice. Mix well and set aside (soy sauce mixture).
', '
Season vegetables with black pepper. Drizzle olive oil and toss well.
', '
Grill vegetables and tofu for 5 minutes on each side.
', '
Serve with soy sauce mixture.
']

Name: grilled-salmon-with-panda-brand-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 pieces salmon steak , 8 ounce, 1-inch thick', '3 cups baby spinach', '1 tsp. red pepper flakes', '1 Tbsp. oil, Canola']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. honey', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '1 Tbsp. ginger', '1 pinch salt and pepper', '1 Tbsp. green onion , minced', '3/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Hoisin Sauce', '1/2 cup orange juice']
Procedure:
['
Heat saucepan over medium heat. Add in canola oil and sauté garlic, ginger, and green onion until fragrant and tender.
', '
Add in the red pepper flakes. Mix the remaining ingredients in a separate bowl and add to the saucepan (barbecue sauce). Bring to a low simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
', '
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Lightly season salmon steaks with salt and pepper.
', '
Oil the grill with oil. Place the fish down for 4 to 5 minutes. Flip the fish over and brush with the barbecue sauce, continue cooking for another 4 to 5 minutes, until cooked throughout.
', '
Divide the baby spinach among 4 plates. Place the salmon steaks on top of the beds of spinach and serve.
']

Name: summer-rolls-with-thai-sweet-chili-sauce
Ingredients: ['3 oz. Vietnamese cellophane noodles ', '2 whole carrots, julienned ', '2 cups bean sprouts ', '2 bundles cilantro, hand-torn ', '3/4 cup peanuts, chopped ', '3 cups hot water', '20 pcs. rice paper wraps, round shape ', '3 oz. mint leaves']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 whole lime, juiced ', 'Salt and pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Place the cellophane noodles, vegetables, cilantro and peanuts in a large bowl; toss with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and lime juice to give the filling some flavor. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Pour 3 cups of hot (not boiling water) in a large shallow bowl. One at a time, immerse the rice paper wrappers in the hot water for 10 seconds to soften, then place on a slightly damp towel. Keep them covered while you work to prevent them from drying out and curling. NOTE: As the rice paper is very delicate, do not soak them any longer or they will break apart.
', '
To form the rolls, lay a rice paper wrapper on a flat surface. Grab a small amount of the cellophane and vegetable mixture and lay it across the bottom third. Carefully fold the bottom of the wrapper up to cover the filling. Fold in the left and right sides, then tuck and roll it over once. Lay 2 mint leaves on top, then tuck and roll it over to close the whole roll as tightly as possible. The mint leaves should show through the transparent rice paper.
', '
Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Thai Sweet Chili Sauce.
']

Name: summer-pork-chop-and-grilled-vegetable-platter
Ingredients: ['2 pcs. pork chops [boneless]', '8 oz. bok choy, removed ends, cut in half ', '2 whole red potatoes [washed, cut into 1/4 rounds]', '3 pcs. white corn [removed husk, cut in half]', '1 oz. hot water']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, 2 Tbsp. olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and pork chops. Marinate for 2 hours. Set aside.
', '
In a large mixing bowl, combine bok choy, potatoes and corn. Drizzle 2 Tbsp. olive oil. Toss until vegetables are coated.
', '
Grill pork chop and vegetables to perfection.
', '
Microwave remaining marinade with 1 oz. hot water until hot.
', '
Drizzle sauce over grilled vegetables and pork chop.
']

Name: grilled-ginger-tuna-with-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. tuna', '1 cup baby spinach, washed and trimmed', '4 oz. green beans, cut into 2-inches in length pieces', '2 whole tomatoes, cut into wedges', '2 whole eggs, peeled and cut into wedges']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Kee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. vinegar, seasoned']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. sherry , dry', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger']
Procedure:
['
Cook green beans in boiling water until tender. Rinse with cold water and drain.
', '
Marinate tuna with 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, dry sherry and minced ginger for 20 minutes.
', '
Combine 1 tsp. minced ginger, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 Tbsp. olive oil and 1 Tbsp. vinegar. Mix well and set aside.\xa0 (soy sauce dressing).
', '
Grill tuna for 1 minute on each side. Cool before slicing.
', '
Assemble tuna and vegetables and drizzle soy sauce dressing and serve.
']

Name: summer-guacamole-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['1-16 oz. package Wholly Guacamole Classic', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce  ']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix together guacamole and Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce.
', '
Serve with chips or your favorite cut vegetables.
', '
N/A
']

Name: summer-chicken-and-lime-tortilla-soup
Ingredients: ['1 small tomato [diced]', '1 small avocado [seeded, diced]', '2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro ', '2 Tbsp. onion(s) [chopped]', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. chicken [chopped]', '4 oz. celery, diced ', '4 oz. carrots, diced ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 pinch salt and pepper ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine tomatoes, avocado, lime juice, cilantro, white onions and salt and pepper (pico de gallo, a side salad). Mix well and refrigerate.
', '
Heat oil in pan on high heat. Stir-fry chicken, celery, carrots and Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and Chicken Bouillon Powder for 5 minutes.
', '
Add the remaining ingredients. Bring mixture to a boil.
', '
Serve with tortilla chips and pico de gallo.
']

Name: summer-beef-kabobs-and-vegetables
Ingredients: ['8 oz. Sirloin beef steaks ', '8 pcs skewers', '4 pcs cherry tomatoes', '4 pcs button mushrooms ', '1 small bell pepper', '1 whole squash']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. olive oil']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1/2 tsp. ginger ', '1 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1 pinch pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine 3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, 1 Tbsp. oil, ginger, sugar and pepper (Hoisin mixture).
', '
Marinate beef with the hoisin mixture for 30 minutes and set aside.
', '
Thread 3 slices of beef onto a skewer. Repeat. Grill to perfection and keep warm.
', '
In a seperate mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and 1 Tbsp. oil (Chili Garlic Mixture).
', '
Thread tomato, mushroom, bell pepper and squash on a skewer. Brush vegetables skewers with Chili Garlic mixture. Repeat.
', '
Grill to perfection and keep warm.
']

Name: stuffed-pork-chop-with-pineapple-and-cheese
Ingredients: ['400 g pork chops [boneless, 6 pcs, lightly beaten]', '3 pcs canned pineapple [halved]', '1/2 cup plain flour [for dusting]', '1 Tbsp. Italian mixed herbs', '1 pc egg [beaten]', '3 slices cheddar cheese']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. corn starch', 'Pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Cut each piece of pork chop horizontally with 1 cm seam left to form a pocket. Mix with marinade.
', '
Stuff pork chop with either halved pineapple or cheese.
', '
Mix flour with Italian herbs. Brush pork chop with beaten egg and then coat with flour. Pan-fry or deep-fry in hot oil until golden yellow and done.
', '
Remarks: 3 rings of canned pineapple can be replaced by 3 slices of cheddar cheese [about 70 g] [halved to form about 4 cm x 8 cm rectangles].
']

Name: stuffed-jumbo-shell-pasta
Ingredients: ['120 g (about 14 pcs) jumbo shell pasta ', '200 g minced chicken', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '90 g courgette [or zucchini, finely diced]', '25 g pitted black olives, finely diced', '1/2 pc bell pepper(s) [finely diced]']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '4 Tbsp. water', '1/2 tsp. corn starch', '1/2 tsp. chopped oregano']
Procedure:
['
Cook jumbo shell pasta in boiling water according to packet instructions or until tender.  Drain.
', '
Stir-fry minced chicken meat in 2 Tbsp. olive oil until done.  Add courgette, black olive, bell pepper and sauce mix.
', '
Stir well until heated through.
', '
Stuff jumbo shell pasta with chicken meat and serve as a snack.
']

Name: stuffed-cornish-hens
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. celery, small dice', '8 oz. button mushrooms, sliced', '4 oz. wild rice, cooked', '2 whole Cornish game hens, cavity removed, rinsed well and pat dray']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 pinch black pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven at 375°F.
', '
In a small bowl, mix together 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce with 2 Tbsp. cooking oil to form a paste. Set aside.
', '
In a pan on medium heat, sauté oil, celery, button mushrooms and wild rice for 5 minutes.
', '
Add in remaining 2 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce, Minced Ginger, sugar and black pepper. Sauté for another 5 minutes.
', '
 Stuff Cornish game hens with the cooked rice mixture.
', '
Rub the Cornish game hen with the Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce and oil paste. Place in oven to bake for 45 minutes or until cooked through.
']

Name: stuffed-chili-relleno-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 oz. cooking oil', '4 oz. ground beef ', '2 oz. mushroom, finely chopped ', '8 oz. Monterey Jack cheese, shredded ', '4 pcs. chili pasilla, roasted and seeded with removed skin, or bell pepper or eggplant ', '1 Tbsp. flour ', '3 whole eggs, beaten']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan with oil, cook ground beef until almost done.
', '
Add in mushroom and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce. Cook mixture for another two minutes and cool.
', '
Mix ground beef and Monterey Jack cheese in small bowl. Season with black pepper.
', '
Stuff chili pasilla with beef mixture. Dust with flour and soak in beaten eggs.
', '
Pan fry chili relleno until golden brown on each side. Serve chili relleno with Hoisin Sauce, if desired.
']

Name: string-vegetables-with-sesame-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 lb. chicken breast, cut into strips ', '4 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 oz. ginger, thinly sliced ', '3 oz. red bell peppers, thinly sliced ', '3 oz. celery, thinly sliced', '3 Tbsp. sesame seeds ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. sugar ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch ']
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken with 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and 2 Tbsp. cornstarch for 20 minutes.
', '
Stir fry chicken with cooking oil for 5-7 minutes. Add ginger, bell peppers, celery, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce and sugar. Mix well. Cook until heated through.
', '
Sprinkle roasted sesame seeds on chicken before serving.
']

Name: strawberry-cucumber-apple-and-chicken-salad-with-lee-kum-kee-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. oil ', '8 oz. chicken breast meat ', '1 cup cucumber ', '1/2 cup apple(s) ', '1 cup strawberries ', '3 Tbsp. basil, chopped']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. orange juice', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '1 Tbsp. olive oil ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 pinch of black pepper  ', '1 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in pan on high heat. Pan-fry chicken until fully cooked. Cool.
', '
In a medium mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, orange juice, lime juice, olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, black pepper and sugar. Mix well.
', '
Stir in remainder ingredients. Toss well and transfer mixture into a serving bowl. Top with chicken and serve immediately.
']

Name: stir-fried-vegetarian-abalone-with-vegetables
Ingredients: ['4 oz. sugar snaps ', '2 oz. carrots (sliced)', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '5 oz. vegetarian abalone (sliced)', '2.5 oz. fresh lily bulb (torn into pieces)', 'herbs']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee All Purpose Marinade']
Procedure:
['
In a pot of boiling water, blanch sugar snaps and carrot.  Drain.
', '
Stir-fry vegetarian abalone in cooking oil.
', '
Add sugar snaps, lily bulb, carrot, All Purpose Marinade, and\xa0herbs and cook through.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: grilled-chicken-salad-crunch
Ingredients: ['4 oz. avocado, peeled, cut into cubes', '8 oz. chicken breast', '4 oz. tortilla chips', '1 whole tomato, medium, diced', '4 oz. garbanzo beans, drained', '4 oz. kidney beans, red, drained']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch black pepper , for taste', '2 Tbsp. cilantro , chopped', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, whisk Hoisin Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce, olive oil and lemon juice together (Hoisin Sauce dressing). Set aside.
', '
Season chicken breast with 1 tbsp of Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
Grill chicken on both sides. Cook until done and then slice chicken into thin pieces.
', '
Combine all ingredients on a platter.
', '
Drizzle Hoisin Sauce dressing and garnish with chopped cilantro.
']

Name: grilled-asparagus-and-squash-with-lee-kum-kee-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 yellow squash, small, removed ends, sliced', '8 oz. asparagus, snapped ends', '1 red bell pepper, removed ends, seeded']
Seasoning: ['1 oz. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 pinch of black pepper, to taste', '1 pinch of sugar', '1/2 tsp. lemon juice', '3 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine sugar, black pepper, Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil, lemon juice, 1 Tbsp. olive oil and Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce (sauce soy mitxure).
', '
Whisk well and set aside.
', '
In a tray or small mixing bowl, toss vegetables with 2 Tbsp. olive oil.
', '
Grill vegetables until cooked. Serve with soy sauce mixture.
']

Name: greek-pasta-with-black-bean-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['3 oz. feta cheese', '2 cups pasta, cook according to direction, set aside', '5 Tbsp. arugula, chopped', '1 whole tomato, cut into wedges', '3 Tbsp. green onion, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Kee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '1 pinch black pepper , for taste', '1 tsp. sugar', '5 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl, combine lemon juice, olive oil, Black Bean Garlic Sauce, black pepper and sugar. Mix well.
', '
Stir in remainder ingredients and mix well.
', '
\xa0Refrigerate before serving.
']

Name: ginger-soy-fried-chicken-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 pieces chicken, legs or thighs, bone-in', '2 Tbsp. water', '10 oz. cooking oil, for deep-frying']
Seasoning: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', '4 oz. flour, or cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. lime juice']
Marinade: ['8 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '4 Tbsp. sherry, dry', '2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine lime juice, water and Plum Sauce (plum sauce mixture). Mix well and set aside.
', '
Marinate chicken with Premium Soy Sauce, dry sherry, ginger and black pepper for an hour.
', '
Roll chicken with flour and dust off any excess flour. Deep-fry chicken pieces until well done.
', '
Dip with Plum Sauce as desired.
']

Name: game-time-chili-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 oz. onion, chopped', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 cups beef broth', '1 lb. ground beef', '8 oz. kidney beans , canned, rinsed well']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. cilantro, chopped', '4 oz. tomato sauce', '1 package taco seasoning', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste']
Procedure:
['
In a medium heated pan, add oil and sauté beef until browned.
', '
Add onions and sauté for 5 minutes.
', '
Add in remaining ingredients and seasonings, except for cilantro.
', '
Bring mixture to a boil and simmer for 15 minutes.
', '
Garnish with cilantro.
']

Name: honey-oyster-bbq-pork-skewers
Ingredients: ['8 medium-size button mushrooms, stems removed', '1 lb. pork loin, or pork tenderloin, cut into 1-inch cubes', '1 small green bell pepper, seeded and removed stem, cut into 1-inch cubes', '4 skewers, pre-soaked', '4 shallots, peeled, ends cut off']
Marinade: ['5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lime juice']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Honey']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine marinade ingredients and mix well. Marinate pork in half the marinade mixture for 20 minutes.
', '
Thread pork and vegetables into skewers, alternating.
', '
Mix sauce mix ingredients (honey sauce mix).
', '
Grill pork, basting with the honey sauce mix.
']

Name: holiday-green-beans
Ingredients: ['1 can green beans (16 oz.), drained', '2 oz. heavy cream', '1 can cream of mushroom soup']
Seasoning: ['1-1/2 cups fried onions', '1-1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine cream of mushroom soup, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, heavy cream, green beans and 3/4 cup of the fried onions.
', '
Transfer mixture into a 4 x 9 inch baking dish and sprinkle the remainder of fried onions on top.
', '
Bake at 350 degree for 25 minutes. Serve hot.
']

Name: hoisin-tequila-burger
Ingredients: ['3 slices swiss cheese', '1 whole tomato, sliced', '1/2 piece red onion, sliced', '1 pound ground beef, lean', '3 pieces hamburger buns']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Kee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Kee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. tequila', '3 Tbsp. mayonnaise']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine beef, tequila and Chili Garlic Sauce. Mix well.
', '
Divide beef into 3 parts and form into individual balls. Flatten into 1/4-inch thick patties. Pan-fry patties until well done.
', '
In another bowl, mix in Hoisin Sauce and mayonnaise together (hoisin mix).
', '
Assemble hamburger and serve with hoisin mix.
']

Name: hoisin-grilled-scallions-with-flour-tortillas
Ingredients: ['16 stalks scallions, washed', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '8 pieces tortillas, flour, 6-inch']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 pinch pepper, ground']
Procedure:
['
Preheat grill.
', '
Brush scallions with olive oil and sprinkle a pinch of black pepper.
', '
Grill scallions until cooked through. Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce.
', '
Grill tortillas on each side for 15 seconds. Place 2 scallions in each tortilla and roll. Serve.
']

Name: hoisin-glazed-turkey-meatloaf
Ingredients: ['2 oz. heavy cream', '1 lb. ground turkey', '2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped', '3 Tbsp. water', '1 small onion, finely chopped', '2 whole eggs, beaten']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '7 Tbsp. Ketchup']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce, 2 Tbsp. ketchup, and water. Microwave for 1 minute and keep warm (Hoisin Sauce glaze).
', '
In a medium bowl, combine ground turkey, parsley, eggs, ketchup, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, heavy cream, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder and onion. Mix well.
', '
Transfer meat mixture into a 4 x 6 inch baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes. Remove from oven.\xa0
', '
Brush meatloaf with Hoisin Sauce glaze and bake for another 10 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
']

Name: hoisin-beef-quesadilla
Ingredients: ['8 oz. mexican cheese blend', '1 whole tomato, diced into small pieces', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 lb. beef, cut into thin strips', '6 pieces tortillas, medium, flour', '2 Tbsp. cilantro, chopped (optional)']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '4 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Marinate beef with Hoisin Sauce and Oyster Flavored Sauce for 5 minutes.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, stir-fry beef until almost done. Set aside.
', '
Assemble beef quesadilla with remainder ingredients. Pan-fry until cheese has melted.
', '
Sprinkle with chopped cilantro on top if preferred.
']

Name: hearty-chicken-vegetable-soup-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. butter', '2 Tbsp. flour', '1 lb. chicken breast, medium dice', '4 oz. zucchini, medium dice', '4 oz. cauliflower, cut into florets', '4 oz. broccoli, cut into florets', '4 oz. squash, medium dice2 ounces shiitake mushrooms, sliced', '1 tsp salt', '4 oz. heavy cream', '1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '3 cups chicken broth']
Procedure:
['
In a medium heat saucepot, melt butter and stir in flour with a wooden spoon. Continue to stir for 3-5 minutes until golden brown.
', '
Add chicken, vegetables and salt. Cook for 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in Chili Garlic Sauce, sugar and chicken broth. Bring to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes.
', '
Add in cream and parsley. Cook mixture until heated through.
']

Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']

Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '

Name: ham-and-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['4 oz. broccoli, florets', '4 oz. peas and carrots, frozen', '8 oz. ham, or turkey, cut into small chunks', '2 cups cooked rice, keep warm', '1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped', '2 Tbsp. oil']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste', '3 Tbsp. Plum Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan with oil, cook ham, frozen peas, carrots and broccoli florets for 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in Plum Sauce. Cook mixture until heated through.
', '
Add salt and pepper to taste.
', '
Serve over warm steamed rice.
']

Name: mango-pineapple-chicken
Ingredients: ['8 oz. chicken breast, cut into 1 inch cubes', '3 oz. red and green bell peppers, seeded, cut into 1" cubes', '3 oz. pineapple chunks, drained', '3 oz. mango, peeled, cut into 1 inch cubes', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 Tbsp. ginger, thinly sliced', '2 oz. onions, cut into cubes', '2 Tbsp. sherry, dry']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. sugar']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Marinate chicken with 1 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce and 1 Tbsp. cornstarch for 15 minutes.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, cook chicken until almost done.
', '
Add ginger, dry sherry and the rest of the vegetables and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Pour in Premium Soy Sauce and 1 tsp. sugar and mix well. Cook mixture until heated through.
']

Name: lucky-pan-glazed-salmon-with-oyster-flavored-sauce-and-basil
Ingredients: ['1½ lb. Skinless salmon fillet, cut into 1½-inch cube', '1 Tbsp. Vegetable oil', '1 Fresh long red chili, thinly sliced on the bias', '4 Scallions, cut into 1-inch length', '2 Tbsp. Water', 'Steamed rice and lime or lemon wedges, for serving', '3 Tbsp. Chopped basil']
Seasoning: ['Freshly ground pepper', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Dry white wine ']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, toss the salmon cubes with the oyster flavored sauce and season them lightly with salt and pepper.
', '
In a large nonstick skillet, heat the oil. Add the salmon and cook over moderately high heat, turning once, until browned but barely cooked through, about 6 minutes.
', '
Reduce the heat to moderate; add the chili and scallions. Cook until the scallions soften, about 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in the wine and water and simmer until the salmon is just cooked through, 1 minute.
', '
Stir in the basil. Transfer the salmon to plates and serve with rice and lime wedges.
']

Name: leftover-turkey-wrap-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 oz. Bean sprouts', '4 oz. Button mushrooms, thinly sliced', '8 oz. Turkey, cut into strips', '4 oz. Bell peppers, thin sliced', '1/2 tsp. Cumin', '3 Tbsp. Oil', 'Green onion, thinly sliced 3 stacks', '4 pcs Pita bread']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Saute turkey strips in oil for 12 minutes.\xa0
', '
Add mushrooms, bell peppers, cumin Oyster Flavored Sauce and Chili Garlic Sauce.
', '
Cook mixture for another 3 minutes. Serve with pita bread.
']

Name: leftover-turkey-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 oz. black olives , drained', '3 oz. celery, cut into small cubes', '1 lb. turkey, leftover (fully cooked and cooled), cut into small pieces', '2 oz. dried cranberries', '4 pieces french rolls', '2 oz. pecans, break into small pieces']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 cup Mayonnaise', '2 Tsp. Dijon mustard']
Procedure:
['
In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except french rolls. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
', '
Toast french rolls until golden brown.
', '
Spoon turkey mixture into the french rolls. Serve immediately.
']

Name: mu-shu-pork
Ingredients: ['1 lb. large pork tenderloin, cut into 1/2 inch strips', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '8 oz. shiitake mushroom, stemmed and sliced thin', '1 Tbsp. grated fresh ginger', '14 oz. coleslaw', '3 scallions, sliced thin', '8 8-inch flour tortillas, warmed']
Seasoning: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 Tbsp. dry sherry']
Procedure:
['
Pat pork dry with paper towels and toss with chili garlic sauce in medium bowl. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until just smoking.
', '
Cook pork until no longer pink, 3 to 5 minutes. Transfer to plate and tent with foil.
', '
Add mushrooms and remaining oil to now-empty skillet and cook over medium-high heat until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in ginger and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add coleslaw mix and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.
', '
Stir in pork, along with any accumulated juices, 1/2 cup hoisin, and sherry, and cook until sauce is slightly thickened, about 1 minute.
', '
Sprinkle with scallions. Serve with tortillas, passing remaining hoisin at table.
']

Name: mixed-greens-and-fruit-salad-with-hoisin-dressing
Ingredients: ['8 oz. mixed spring salad', '2 oz .walnuts or pecans', '1 whole avocado, pitted, cut into small cubes', '2 whole tomatoes, cut into wedges', '1/2 cup golden raisins', '1 green apple, peeled, thinly sliced', '4 oz. feta cheese']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Hoisin Sauce, vinegar, water, olive oil, Pure Sesame Oil and minced ginger (hoisin salad dressing). Mix well.
', '
In a salad bowl, mix up all the salad ingredients.
', '
Drizzle the hoisin salad dressing over mixed salad and serve.
']

Name: mixed-green-salad-with-poached-chicken-and-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 oz. mixed green salad', '4 oz. chicken breast, cut into cubes', '2 oz. red bell peppers , thinly sliced', '1 oz. yellow raisins', '1 oz. dried cranberries']
Procedure:
['
In a pot, add 2 cups of water and chicken. Bring to boil and simmer for 5 minutes.
', '
Combine Hoisin Sauce, lime juice and Sesame Oil. Season with black pepper (Hoisin Dressing).
', '
Drizzle the dressing over mixed green salad and top with dried cranberries, yellow raisins and poached chicken.
']

Name: mini-shrimp-sliders
Ingredients: ['12 oz. Shrimp(s), deveined, shelled', '1 box tempura mix (mixed according to direction)', '6 oz. oil for cooking', '8 pcs Hawaiian buns']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Mayonnaise', 'Pinch of black pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine mayonnaise and Hoisin Sauce. Mix well (Hoisin Sauce Mix). Refrigerate.
', '
Season shrimp with black pepper.
', '
Dip shrimp into tempura mix batter. Dust off excess.
', '
Deep-fry shrimp in oil until golden brown. Serve in a bun with Hoisin Sauce Mix.
']

Name: minced-chicken-with-garlic-hoisin-mustard-sauce
Ingredients: ['10 oz.  minced chicken leg meat ', '4 oz.  chopped bamboo shoot   ', 'some  crashed deep-fried wanton wrap  ', '1 oz.  chopped green onion (white part only)  ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee minced ginger', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Garlic Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. yellow mustard sauce', '1Tbsp. peanut butter', '4 oz. chopped onion', '1/8 cup chopped cilantro']
Procedure:
['
 Stir-fry minced chicken leg meat till golden brown and filter juice.
', '
Add oil to the heated pot, stir-fry minced ginger, minced Garlic and chopped onion, then stir-fry with chopped bamboo shoot and stir-fried minced chicken leg meat until sauce evaporates; then put in all the seasoning to stir-fry until evenly coated with sauce.
', '
Stir-fry with chopped green onion (white part) and chopped cilantro. Sprinkle crashed deep-freied wanton wrap on the surface.
', '
Tip:
You can also enjoy this recipe with lettuce wrap or tortilla.

']

Name: mexican-style-chicken-and-corn-soup
Ingredients: ['8 oz. chicken breast, cut into small cubes', '4 oz. carrots, peeled , cut into small cubes', '2 oz. onion, small , diced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 oz. corn, fresh or canned', '4 oz. macaroni shells, cook according to direction', '3 cups chicken broth', '2 stalks green onion, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a saucepot, sauté chicken, carrots, onions, Chili Garlic Sauce with cooking for 1 minute.
', '
Add corn, macaroni shells and chicken broth.
', '
Bring to a boil then simmer for 10-15 minutes.
', '
Garnish with green onions.
']

Name: dragon-fruit-boat
Ingredients: ['100g Chicken, cut into pieces', '100g Prawn', '2 pieces Dragon fruit', '1 piece Kiwi fruit, skinned and cut into pieces', '2 pieces Strawberries, cut into pieces']
Seasoning: ['1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1½ Tbsp. Sugar', '75 ml Water', '2 tsp. Lime Juice', '2 tsp. Corn starch']
Procedure:
['
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ad9aei4s61U
', '
Cut dragon fruits into halves lengthwise. Scoop the flesh out to make balls of about 200 g(7 oz).
', '
Remove any remaining flesh and keep the skin of dragon fruits.
', '
Stir-fry chicken and prawn meat in 2 Tbsp. oil until done.
', '
Add sauce mix and cook until sauce thickens.  Stir in all fruits.  Serve hot.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: bbq-pork-skewers-with-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 pieces button mushrooms , medium , removed stem', '1 lb. pork loin , or pork tenderloin , cut into 1-inch cubes', '1 small green bell pepper , seeded and removed stem , cut into 1-inch cubes', '4 pieces skewers , soaked', '4 pieces shallots , removed skin , cut off ends']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', '1 Tbsp. lime juice']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, combine Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce, Chili Garlic Sauce, Plum Sauce and lime juice. Mix well (plum mixture).
', '
Marinate pork with 1/2 of the plum mixture for 20 minutes.
', '
Alternately thread pork and vegetables into skewers.
', '
Grill pork and baste while cooking with the remaining plum mixture.
']

Name: meatloaf-with-black-pepper-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ground beef', '1 cup bread crumbs', '1/2 cup diced yellow onion', '1/2 cup whole milk', '1 large egg, beaten', '2 Tbsp. tomato paste', '1 tsp. dried parsley leaves']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce', '1 Tbsp. dark brown sugar', '1 tsp. kosher salt', '1/2 tsp. garlic powder', '1/4 tsp. fresh ground black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 350° F. In a large bowl, add the beef, bread crumbs, onion, milk, egg, 2 Tbsp. tomato paste, 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Pepper Sauce, brown sugar, parsley, salt, garlic powder, and pepper. Mix until well combined.
', '
Add the meat mixture to a half bread loaf pan, pat down to fit evenly and smooth the top.\xa0
', '
Add the rest of the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Black Pepper Grilling Sauce to the top of the meatloaf, spreading evenly.\xa0\xa0
', '
Bake uncovered for 50 minutes. If the top starts to burn, cover with foil and bake for remaining time.\xa0
', '
Let the meatloaf rest for 8-10 minutes before serving. After it has rested, slice and enjoy.
']

Name: rice-vermicelli-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['120 g dried rice vermicelli', 'Shredded toasted laver/nori and roasted sesame seeds [for serving ]']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 tsp. Sesame Oil (Pure)']
Procedure:
['
Cook rice vermicelli in boiling water according to packet instructions or until tender.
', '
Drain and put on a serving plate.
', '
Add all ingredients and seasoning mix to rice vermicelli. Mix well and serve hot.
']

Name: vegetarian-stew-over-rice
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '2 Tbsp. onion(s) [chopped]', '8 oz. cauliflower ', '4 oz. bell pepper(s)  [cut into 1 inch cubes]', '4 oz. garbanzo beans ', '4 oz. lima bean ', '8 oz. turnip(s)  [peeled, cut into 1 in. cubes]', '1 cup water ', '2 cup cooked rice ', '1/4 cup cashews  [optional]', 'chopped parsley [optional]']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Shao Hsing wine [or dry sherry]']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in pan. Stir-fry onions for 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and the remainder ingredients, except rice.
', '
Bring mixture to a boil.  Simmer until vegetables are tender.
', '
Serve over rice. Garnish with chopped parsley and cashews.
']

Name: spicy-potato-wedges-with-hoisin-flavored-sour-cream-dip
Ingredients: ['2 whole potatoes [washed & cut, 1/3 inch wedges]', '2 Tbsp. cilantro ', '2 Tbsp cilantro, chopped ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. lime juice ', '1/2 tsp. salt ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil ', '4 oz. sour cream ', '1 pinch black pepper [to taste]']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp.Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Chili Garlic Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine sour cream, lime juice, salt, black pepper, cilantro and Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce (hoisin flavored sour cream). Mix well and refrigerate.
', '
In a tray, toss potatoes with olive oil, Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
Place potatoes on grill and cook for 20 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
', '
Serve with hoisin flavored sour cream.
']

Name: braised-assorted-mushrooms-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['170 g Assorted mushrooms, halved', '25 g Sliced Carrot and Green Peas ', '2 small Ginger, slices']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1/4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '150 ml Water', '1 tsp. Corn starch', '1/4 tsp. Sugar']
Procedure:
['
Saute ginger in 1 Tbsp. oil until fragrant.  Add assorted mushrooms and stir-fry for a short while.
', '
Stir in carrot, green peas and sauce mix.  Cook for about 3 minutes until sauce thickens.
', '
Serve.
']

Name: stir-fried-tofu-and-pork-with-soybean-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 pcs. ginger, sliced', '5 oz. pork belly, sliced', '4 pcs. green onion, cut into sections', '5 oz. fried tofu, diced into cubes', '2 oz. cilantro']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan and add oil. Quick fry the ginger until fragrant, then add the sliced pork and cook until well done.
', '
Add seasoning and stir-fry to coat thoroughly.
', '
Add green onion, cook for 1 minute. Add fried tofu and stir-fry until liquid evaporates.
', '
 Add cilantro as garnish before serving.
']

Name: stir-fried-nagaimo-and-mixed-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['6 oz. nagaimo (Chinese yam)', '4 oz. oyster mushrooms', '2 oz. brown beech mushrooms', '2 oz. white beech mushrooms', '4 oz.  white button mushrooms', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Peel nagaimo and slice. Put nagaimo in boiling water and cook till halfway done.
', '
Cut stems from all mushrooms and rinse.
', '
Slice oyster mushrooms and cut white mushrooms in half. Keep beech mushrooms whole.
', '
Add oil to a heated pan, sauté minced garlic till fragrant. Add nagaimo, mixed mushrooms, and stir-fry completely.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon and mix well. Ready to serve.
']

Name: grilled-seafood-skewers-with-sweet-chili-sauce
Ingredients: ['20 pcs. skewers (soak in water for 1 hour)', '1 lb. jump shrimp, shelled and deveined', '1 lb. squid, cut into 2-inch strips', '1 cup cooked udon noodles or rice']
Procedure:
['
In a saucepan, bring Chili Garlic Sauce, vinegar, salt and sugar to a boil and simmer until mixture is reduced and thickened to a syrup consistency. Remove from heat and set aside to cool.
', '
Thread shrimp and squid strip onto skewers, alternate.
', '
Grill over charcoal or stove grill, turning on each side. Grill for 5 minutes or until cooked.
', '
Server over noodles or jasmine rice with dipping sauce.
']

Name: deviled-eggs
Ingredients: ['6 whole eggs, hardboiled, shells removed ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. mayonnaise', '1 tsp. mustard , dijion', '1/2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Cut boiled eggs in half lengthwise. Remove the yolk from egg white.
', '
In a small mixing bowl, mash yolk with mayonnaise, sugar and mustard until smooth (egg mixture).
', '
Spoon egg mixture into egg white.
', '
Top with Chili Garlic Sauce and Hoisin Sauce. Cool and serve.
']

Name: christmas-crab-cakes-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['1 lb. Crab meat or other lump crab', '1 cup Panko crumbs', '3 Eggs (beaten)', '2 Tbsp. Vegetable oil']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha chili sauce', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1/2 Tsp. Old Bay seasoning', 'Salt to taste']
Procedure:
['
Wash crab and set aside.
', '
Mix 1/2 cup Panko, 1 egg , Old Bay and Lee Kum Kee Sriracha chili sauce with crab. Mix slowly and keep crabmeat as whole as possible.
', '
Form crab cake patties and refrigerate for 1-2 hours.
', '
Pull from refrigerator and dredge in flour, then in egg, then coat in 1/2 cup panko.
', '
Sautee crab cakes in 2 tbsp. vegetable oil in pan on medium to high heat until golden brown.
', '
Drizzle Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo on the crab cake. Ready to serve.
']

Name: mushroom-onion-hoisin-burger
Ingredients: ['4 leaves lettuce', '4 slices provolone cheese', '8 ox. button mushrooms, sliced thin', '½ small onion, sliced thin', '2 Tbsp. oil', '2 pieces medium garlic cloves, minced', '1 pound ground beef', '4 slices hamburger buns']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '3/4 tsp. black pepper']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, mix ground beef, black pepper, 3 Tbsp. hoisin sauce and 1 Tbsp. soy sauce. Form mixture into 4 equal patties, 4 inches in diameter.
', '
In a skillet, add 1 Tbsp. oil, sautee onions and mushrooms and 1 Tbsp. soy sauce. Cook for 5 minutes and set aside.
', '
Cook patties in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Cook patties thoroughly.
', '
Assemble burger patties with onion mushroom mixture.
']
