Name: pan-fried-shrimp-with-mixed-herbs-and-triple-citrus-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh cilantro', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Triple Citrus Sauce', 'Salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Triple Citrus Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl whisk together: garlic, ¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Triple Citrus Grilling & Dipping Sauce, and fresh herbs. Toss shrimp to coat.\xa0
', '
Transfer shrimp to the refrigerator and allow to marinate for at least 30 minutes.
', '
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shrimp to the skillet, discarding their marinade.
', '
Cook the shrimp, stirring frequently to ensure even cooking, for 3 minutes.\xa0
', '
Pour in the reserved portion of Triple Citrus Sauce, stirring frequently, until the shrimp are caramelized and cooked through, about 2-3 additional minutes.\xa0
', '
Serve hot and garnish with fresh herbs, add salt and pepper to taste.
']

Name: sweet-and-spicy-baked-chicken-thighs-with-brussels-sprouts
Ingredients: ['1 lemon, juiced', '6 boneless & skinless chicken thighs (about 1 lb.)', '1 1/2 cups halved Brussels sprouts (about 1 lb.)', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, combine lemon juice, chicken, brussels sprouts, olive oil, and the Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet and Spicy Grilling & Dipping Sauce until the chicken and vegetables are coated.\xa0
', '
Distribute evenly onto a lined baking sheet, and roast at 425° F, until chicken is cooked through, about 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Transfer to serving platter and drizzle with pan drippings. Salt and pepper, to taste.\xa0
']

Name: roasted-root-vegetables-with-lemon-pepper-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into 1" pieces', '2 medium carrots, cut crosswise 1" pieces', '1 medium sweet potato, peeled and cut into 1" chunks', '1 small red onion, cut into 1" wedges', '1 lemon, sliced into thin rounds', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 Tbsp. thyme (fresh or dried)']
Seasoning: ['Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste', '¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Lemon Pepper Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Heat oven to 425°F. Combine, potatoes, carrots, sweet potatoes, onion, and lemon in a large bowl and toss with olive oil, thyme, and a pinch of salt and pepper.\xa0
', '
Pour Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Lemon Pepper Grilling & Dipping Sauce over the vegetables, and toss until evenly coated.\xa0
', '
Distribute evenly onto a lined baking sheet and bake, making sure to stir vegetables halfway through cooking, until golden brown and tender, about 30 minutes.
']

Name: ham-and-pineapple-with-lee-kum-kee-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 pcs Ham [packed, sliced ]', '1 whole pineapple [fresh, small, peeled]']
Seasoning: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and olive oil (hoisin mixture).
', '
Transfer ham slices and pineapple onto a tray.
', '
Brush ham with hoisin mixture.
', '
Grill until cooked.
']

Name: hamburgers-with-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 small yellow onion', '1 large Portobello mushroom', '1 Tbsp. olive oil', '1/4 cup cilantro', '1 lb. 90% lean ground beef', '4 whole-wheat hamburger buns', '4 lettuce leaves', '4 tomato slices', 'Nonstick cooking spray']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Chop onions and mushroom into a quarter-inch dice.
', '
Heat olive oil in a medium-size skillet over medium heat. When oil is shimmering add onions and cook until translucent, about 4 minutes. Add the mushroom and stir to incorporate. Cook until mushroom begins to soften, an additional 2 minutes. Transfer cooked mushroom and onions to a large bowl and allow to cool for 10 minutes.
', '
Chop the cilantro. Add the cilantro and beef to the cooled onion-mushroom mixture. Using clean hands, mix well to incorporate all ingredients.
', '
Form beef mixture into 4 even patties and place on a tray. Brush oyster sauce over both sides of the 4 burgers. Cover and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes.
', '
Pre-heat a grill pan or grill to high heat. Coat the grill pan with nonstick cooking spray. When oil begins to shimmer, place the burgers on the grill pan or grill. Cook for 5 minutes on each side or until the burgers reach desired doneness.
']

Name: beef-rolls-with-honeydew-melon
Ingredients: ['250g Beef fillet/tenderloin [12 thin slices]', '170g Honeydew melon [12 thick strips]']
Seasoning: ['Parsley, chopped, for garnish']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. Water', '1 tsp. Corn starch', '1/2 tsp. Sugar']
Procedure:
['
Mix beef fillet with marinade.
', '
Pan-fry beef fillet in 2 Tbsp. oil until golden yellow and done.
', '
Put honeydew melon strips on beef fillet and roll up. Arrange beef rolls on a  serving plate. Heat through sauce mix and pour over beef rolls. Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
']

Name: oyster-stew
Ingredients: ['1 pint oysters, shucked and in their liquid', '5 Tbsp. butter, unsalted', '1 medium shallot, diced', '2 celery stalk, minced', '3 ½ cups milk', '2 ½ cups heavy cream']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Green Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Remove oysters from their liquid and rinse in cold water. Pass liquid through fine strainer to remove any sand or shell. Set aside and chill.
', '
In a 3 to 4-quart saucepan melt the butter over medium heat, stir in the shallots and sauté until shallots are softened and clear, about 2 minutes. Add celery and cook for another 2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Stir in the milk, cream, oyster liquid and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce. Bring them to a simmer. Cook for 10 minutes at a gentle bubble, making sure it does not boil over.
', '
Turn the heat down so the liquid barely bubbles, blend in the oysters and cook until their edges begin to curl, about 2 minutes.
', '
Transfer to serving bowl and drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil right before serving.
']

Name: seafood-fettuccini-in-mushroom-cream-sauce
Ingredients: ['6 Tbsp. butter, unsalted', '1 clove garlic, minced', '16 oz. shiitake mushrooms, sliced', '2 lb. bay scallops, rinsed ', '1 lb. shrimp, peeled, cleaned and deveined', '1 lb. fettuccini pasta, cooked and drained', 'Parsley, for garnish']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '3 cups heavy cream', '¾ cups parmesan cheese, grated', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Melt the butter in a large pan over medium heat. Add the garlic and sliced mushrooms and cook until tender or golden brown, about 3 minutes.
', '
Add bay scallops and shrimp to pan and cook until shrimp turn pink, about 6 minutes. Add Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Green Label Oyster Flavored Sauce, heavy cream and parmesan cheese and allow to simmer for 5 minutes.
', '
Toss in cooked pasta and sesame oil to sauce and seafood mixture. Mix well and remove from heat.
', '
Transfer to platter and serve right away. Garnish with fresh parsley.
']

Name: cranberry-bread-pudding
Ingredients: ['6 cups half and half ', '1/2 cup raisins ', '1 cup dried cranberries ', '2 whole granny smith apples , peeled and cored, cut into 1/2-inch cubes ', '6 whole eggs , beaten ', '8 cups bread , cut into small pieces ']
Seasoning: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', '1 Tbsp. vanilla extract', '1/3 cup brown sugar', '1/2 tsp. nutmeg', '1/2 tsp. cinnamon']
Procedure:
['
Combine all ingredients into a mixing bowl. Mix well and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
', '
Transfer mixture into a large 9 x 7 inch baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes. Cool before slicing.
', '
If desired, drizzle with melted chocolate.
']

Name: hot-and-sour-soup-with-premium-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 cup bamboo shoots, drained, shredded', '2 oz. vinegar', '1 cup chinese black mushrooms, soaked with hot water, chopped', '8 oz. pork loin, cut into thin strips', '5 Tbsp. cornstarch, diluted with 5 Tbsp. water', '2 whole eggs, beaten', '2 stalks green onion, chopped', '3 cups chicken broth', '4 oz. tofu, soft, cut into small cubes']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '3 oz. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a heated large sauce pan, cook oil and pork for 3 minutes.
', '
Add in bamboo shoots, chinese mushroom, water and chicken broth. Bring to a boil for 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in Premium Soy Sauce, Sriracha Sauce, vinegar and tofu. Cook for 3 minutes.
', '
Slowly add in cornstarch mixture by stirring it to prevent lumping. Bring to a boil.
', '
Stir in beaten eggs and Pure Sesame Oil. Remove from heat and serve with chopped green onions.
']

Name: chili-garlic-broccoli-and-cheese-soup
Ingredients: ['12 oz. broccoli, cut into small pieces', '8 oz. cheddar cheese, shredded', '3 Tbsp. flour', '1 small onion, chopped', '3 cups chicken broth', '3 Tbsp. butter']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '3 oz. heavy cream']
Procedure:
['
In a medium heat saucepot, melt butter and stir in flour with a wooden spoon. Continue to stir for 3-5 minutes until golden brown.
', '
Add in all ingredients except cream and cheddar cheese. Bring mixture to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes.
', '
Blend mixture for 1 minute or until pureed.
', '
Pour pureed mixture back in pot and add in cream and cheddar cheese. Simmer and stir mixture until cheese has melted.
']

Name: stir-fried-shrimp-with-snow-peas-and-red-bell-pepper-in-hot-and-sour-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb shrimp (21-25 extra-large) peeled, deveined, and tails removed', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '1 cloves garlic (1 thinly sliced)', '1 large shallot, sliced thin(about 1/2 cup)', '1/2 lb snow peas or sugar snap peas, stems snapped off and strings removed', '1 medium red bell pepper, seeded and cut into 3/4 inch dice']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. sugar ', '3 Tbsp. white vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Dry sherry or Shaoxing wine ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. ketchup ', '2 tsp. cornstarch ']
Marinade: ['1 cloves garlic (minced or pressed through garlic press) ', '1 Tbsp. ginger, minced', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '1/2 tsp. salt ']
Procedure:
['
In a medium bowl, mix together shrimp, minced garlic, ginger, 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, and salt. Let shrimp marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes.
', '
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, chili garlic sauce, sherry, sesame oil, ketchup and cornstarch. In second small bowl, combine sliced garlic with shallot.
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in 12-inch nonstick skillet over high heat until just smoking. Sauté snow peas and bell pepper until vegetables begin to brown, 1-2 minutes. Transfer vegetables to medium bowl.
', '
Add remaining tablespoon oil to now-empty skillet and heat until just smoking. Add garlic-shallot mixture and cook, stirring frequently, until just beginning to brown, about 30 seconds. Add shrimp, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook, stirring frequently, until shrimp are slightly pink, 1-2 minutes.\xa0
', '
Whisk soy sauce mixture to recombine and add to skillet; return to high heat and cook, stirring constantly, until sauce is thickened and shrimp are cooked through, 1 to 2 minutes.
', '
Return vegetables to skillet, toss to combine, and serve.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: stir-fried-rice-with-fine-shrimp-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. Oil', '1 Tbsp. chopped garlic ', '½ Tbsp. chopped red chili ', '120 g / 4 oz prawn meat [diced]', '350 g / 12 oz cooked rice [about 2 rice bowls]', '4 leaves of lettuce [shredded]']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Fine Shrimp Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Saute garlic and red chili in 2 Tbsp oil.  Add prawn meat, Lee Kum Kee Fine Shrimp
Sauce and stir-fry until prawn meat is done.
', '
Add rice and stir well until heated through.
', '
Heat off and stir in lettuce.
']

Name: stir-fried-rice-noodles
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. oil ', '4 oz. sliced beef ', '6 oz. cooked rice noodle ', '4 oz. bean sprouts ', '2 oz. green onion', '1 oz. yellow chives']
Seasoning: ['SEASONING SAUCE (1) ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce  ', '1 tsp. sugar ', ' SEASONING SAUCE (2) ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil  ']
Procedure:
['
Deep-fry sliced beef with low-medium heat for 5 minutes. Remove the beef from oil, drain and set aside.
', '
In the same skillet, stir-fry rice noodle till heated thought, add seasoning sauce (1), beef, and the remaining ingredients over high heat for 2 minutes.
', '
Add in Seasoning Sauce (2) and stir evenly. Ready to serve.
']

Name: stir-fried-rice-noodles-with-beef-in-all-purpose-marinade
Ingredients: ['120 g / 4.2 oz. beef (sliced)', '100 g / 3.5 oz. trimmed beansprouts', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 green onion (sliced)', '25 g / 0.9 oz. carrots (shredded)', '350 g / 12.3 oz. fresh flat rice noodles', '50 g / 1.8 oz. yellow chives (chopped)']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee All-Purpose Marinade']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
Mix beef with Marinade.
', '
Saute beansprouts in 1 Tbsp. oil for 1 minute. Drain.
', '
Saute green onions in 2 Tbsp. oil, add beef and carrots, stir-fry until cooked through. Add rice noodles, beansprouts, yellow chives, and Seasoning Mix. Saute well till heated through. Ready to serve.
']

Name: grilled-fillet-of-salmon-with-oyster-and-roe-butter-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 pcs (2 lb.) salmon fillets']
Seasoning: ['Salt and pepper to taste', '3 Tbsp. lemon juice']
Sauce Mix: ['1/8 cup chopped onions', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '4 Tbsp. butter', '1 Tbsp. chopped parsley', '1/8 cup white wine', '1 cup heavy cream', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. roe']
Procedure:
['
Season the salmon fillets with salt, pepper and lemon juice. Pan fry both sides of the fillets until golden. Pre-heat the oven to 350°F.
', '
Bake the salmon fillets for about 15 minutes, then place them on a plate.\xa0
', '
On a pan, sauté the chopped onions and Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic until fragrant. Then, add in the white wine and cook for one minute. Then, add in the heavy cream and Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and cook until the mixture thickens.
', '
Melt the butter into the mixture, and add in the roe and parsley.
', '
Pour the sauce on the salmon fillets and serve.\xa0
', '
Tips: Side vegetables can be prepared as needed.\xa0
']

Name: garden-green-salad-served-with-oyster-sesame-vinaigrette
Ingredients: ['16 oz. baby mix greens', '8 slices of cucumbers', '8 pcs of grape tomatoes', '2 oz. carrots, julienne']
Procedure:
['
Mix all the veggies in a large bowl.
', '
To make the salad dressing, mix all the dressing ingredients in a bowl and whisk until the sugar is dissolved.
', '
Tip: Add an appropriate amount of the Oyster Flavored Sesame Vinaigrette to the salad and serve.\xa0
']

Name: crispy-fried-oysters-combo-served-with-premium-oyster-garlic-yogurt
Ingredients: ['2 dozen fresh oysters, with bottom shells', '¼ cup potato starch', '1/8 cup flour', '2 Tbsp. salad oil', '1/8 cup water', '1 whole egg', '½ tsp. baking soda', '½ tsp. baking powder', '½ tsp. salt', '1 cup bread crumbs ']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. lemon juice', '½ tsp. black pepper ']
Procedure:
['
Separate the oysters from the shells and place them in a large bowl, set the bottom shells aside for later use.
', '
Marinate the oysters with lemon juice and black pepper for about 10 minutes.
', '
Mix the potato starch, flour, salad oil, water, egg, baking soda, baking powder and salt to create a mixture. Allow it to rest for 10 minutes.\xa0
', '
Place all the oysters in the mixture and mix thoroughly, then deep fry one dozen of oysters in 400°F oil and place them back on the shells.
', '
For the second dozen of oysters, roll them in bread crumbs, deep fry them and place them back on the shells.
', '
For the dipping sauce, simply mix all the ingredients together and serve with the fried oysters.
']

Name: cream-of-wild-mushroom-and-oyster-soup
Ingredients: ['1 lb. mushrooms', '8 pcs. dried Shiitake mushrooms ', '½ pcs. onion', '½ lb. fresh oysters', '6 cup heavy cream', '3 Tbsp. butter', '8 cup hot water', '½ cup of flour']
Seasoning: ['½ cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Use a damp paper towel to remove any dirt on the mushrooms. Cut the stems off from the dried Shiitake mushrooms and soak them in 8 cups of hot water for about 2 hours.
', '
Melt the butter inside a stock pot and sauté the onions until fragrant. Then, add the mushrooms and flour and sauté until fragrant.
', '
Add the rest of the ingredients into the stock pot, including the soaked Shiitake mushrooms and water. Cook until it boils and then cook on low heat for about 30 minutes.\xa0
', '
Let the soup to cool down for a little and then using a blender, blend all the ingredients into a thick and creamy texture. Then pour it back to the stock pot and cook until it boils.
', '
Season the soup with Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce and serve hot.\xa0
', '
Tips: There is no need for any other seasonings! Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce is so lusciously tasty that it enhances the fresh oyster flavor in the soup.\xa0
']

Name: bacon-wrapped-ginger-soy-chicken
Ingredients: ['2 lb. chicken tenders (about 16 tenders)', '16 slices bacon']
Marinade: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger', '2 Tbsp. sugar', '1/4 tsp. cayenne pepper', '2 tsp. paprika', '2 tsp. garlic powder', '1 tsp. onion powder']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 425°F. Line two rimmed baking pans with aluminum foil and top with metal rack.\xa0
', '
In a plastic bag or shallow baking dish, combine Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, Minced ginger, sugar, spices, and chicken tenders, coating each tender. Let sit for 20 minutes in the fridge.\xa0
', '
Once it’s ready, wrap each tender with a slice of bacon, being sure to tuck in the ends. Place 1” apart on rack in prepared pan.
', '
Bake for 30-35 minutes at 425°F, or until bacon is crispy.\xa0\xa0
']

Name: beef-and-vegetable-barley-soup
Ingredients: ['1 cup carrots , cut into small cubes', '1 cup celery , cut into small cubes', '1 whole tomato , chopped', '1 small onion , chopped', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '6 cups chicken broth , low sodium', '12 oz. ground beef', '4 cups barley , rinse well, soak with cold water overnight']
Seasoning: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp. italian seasoning', '1/2 tsp. black pepper , for taste', '1 tsp. sugar', '4 Tbsp. parsley , chopped']
Procedure:
['
In a sauce pan with oil, cook the ground beef. Add in onions and garlic and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Add the remainder of ingredients and bring mixture into a boil.
', '
Then, simmer for 30 minutes.
', '
Serve hot and garnish with chopped parsley.
']

Name: avocado-fries
Ingredients: ['2 avocados, each sliced into 8 thick wedges', '1 egg lightly beaten', '1/4 cup flour', '1 cup coarsely ground almonds', 'Oil spray']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease sheet tray fitted with parchment.\xa0
', '
Combine the dipping soy sauce and egg. Gently dredge the avocado slices in flour, then dip in egg mixture. Coat in almond meal. Continue until all the slices have gone through all three stages.
', '
Place in a single layer on the greased sheet pan. Drizzle with the remaining oil or spray with cooking spray. This will help the avocado slices crisp in the oven.\xa0
', '
Bake for 15 minutes or until the avocados are golden and crispy. If desired, more oil can be drizzled while they are baking for additional crispness. Serve with Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Dipping Soy.\xa0
']

Name: kale-and-quinoa-salad-with-lime-vinaigrette
Ingredients: ['2 cups chopped Lacinato Kale', '1 cup shredded red cabbage', '½ cup sliced radishes', '1 cup prepared chickpeas', '¾ cup cooked golden quinoa', '¼ cup fresh cilantro leaves', '¼ cup crumbled feta', '¼ cup toasted pumpkin seeds', '1 avocado, peeled and cubed']
Procedure:
['
Make the dressing. In a blender or in a small bowl with a whisk, combine Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Sweet Soy Sauce, lime juice, dijon mustard, olive oil, salt and pepper. Blend or whisk until well combined.\xa0
', '
Combine the kale, cabbage, radishes, chickpeas, quinoa, cilantro, feta, and toasted pumpkin seeds in a big bowl.\xa0
', '
Toss all ingredients with the dressing and mix until all the kale is coated. Top with avocado and extra feta.
']

Name: turkey-pot-pie
Ingredients: ['4 stalks celery , cut into small cubes ', '6 ounces peas and carrots ', '1 pound turkey breast , cut into small pieces ', '1 whole potato , peeled and cut into small cubes ', '3 Tablespoons flour ', '8 ounces water ', '1 whole onion , diced ', '4 Tablespoons butter ', '1 package puff pastry , pre-made, frozen and thawed ', '1 whole pie shell ']
Seasoning: ['5 Tablespoons Lee Kum KeeTM Panda BrandTM Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 teaspoon Italian seasoning ', '1/2 teaspoon white pepper ', '8 ounces heavy cream ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated large sauce pan, add butter, onion, celery, and Italian seasoning. Cook mixture for 3 minutes. Add in flour and stir mixture for an additional 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in turkey breast pieces, potato, peas, carrots, Lee Kum KeeTM Panda BrandTM Oyster Flavored Sauce, white pepper, water, and heavy cream. Cook mixture until heated through or until sauce is thickened.
', '
 Place into refrigerator until cooled.
', '
Pour turkey mixture into unbaked pie shell. Unroll puff pastry sheet and place on top of filling.
', '
Crimp edges with thumb or fork. Slit an "X" on top of crust to vent while cooking.
', '
Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: oyster-sauce-steak-and-potato-kebobs
Ingredients: ['1 lb. ribeye steak, cut into 1 ½” cubes', '8 baby yukon gold potatoes, boiled until just tender and drained', '6-8 bamboo or metal skewers', '2 tsp. of cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['Salt and Pepper, to taste']
Marinade: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', '2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar', '2 Tbsp. brown sugar', '1/2 tsp. garlic powder']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sized bowl whisk together the marinade ingredients. Pour over the steak cubes in a large food storage bag or shallow casserole dish. Seal or cover and marinate in fridge at least 1/2 hour and up to 2 hours
', '
Make the skewers. Alternate between the steak pieces and cooked potato.
', '
Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high and lightly oil. Add the kebabs and grill about 5-6 minutes on both sides, flipping every 3 minutes, until the steak reaches the desired temperature.
']

Name: oyster-sauce-braised-chicken-with-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts (6 oz. each)', '2 Tbsp. olive oil', '1 lb. white mushrooms, wiped clean and sliced 1/2-inch-thick', '1 3/4 cups chicken broth', '2 Tbsp. chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley, plus more for garnish']
Seasoning: ['¼ cup Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Sauce', 'Salt and fresh ground pepper']
Procedure:
['
Season chicken with salt and pepper. In a large skillet, heat 1 Tbsp. oil over high. Add chicken, and cook until light golden brown, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate; set aside.
', '
Add remaining tablespoon oil to skillet. Add mushrooms and season with salt. Cover; and cook over medium heat until mushrooms release their juices, 2 to 3 minutes. Remove lid. Cook over high heat, stirring occasionally, until mushrooms are golden, 4 to 5 minutes
', '
Add oyster sauce, and cook, stirring, until bubbly, about 1 minute. Add broth and parsley, cook over medium-high heat until mushrooms are tender and liquid is reduced, 8 to 10 minutes.
', '
Return chicken to skillet. Cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer until chicken is cooked through, 10 to 12 minutes. Serve chicken topped with mushrooms, and drizzled with cooking liquid. Garnish with chopped parsley.
']

Name: california-salad-with-oyster-sauce-vinaigrette
Ingredients: ['4 cups assorted, mixed greens', '2 scallions, thinly sliced', '¼ cup sliced, toasted almonds', '1 medium avocado, diced', 'Vegetables such as: sweet corn, thinly sliced fennel, cherry tomatoes']
Seasoning: ['Salt & Freshly Black Pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
Combine the onion, lemon juice, Oyster Sauce, and maple syrup, in a small bowl. Whisk together until well combined. Slowly add the olive oil, whisking constantly. Salt and pepper to taste. Set aside.
', '
In a large bowl, combine lettuce, scallions, almonds, avocado, and vegetables.\xa0
', '
Toss in the dressing, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Add any additional vegetables as desired.\xa0
']

Name: aromatic-braised-lamb-shanks
Ingredients: ['2 lamb shanks (about 1000 g / 2.2 lb.)', '20 g / 0.7 oz. all-purpose flour', '150 g / 5.3 oz. dried apricots and plums', '250 ml / 8.5 fl. oz. red wine', '100 g / 3.5 oz. onions (diced)', '50 g / 1.8 oz. celery (diced)', '80 g / 2.8 oz. carrots (diced)', '400 g / 14.1 oz. canned chopped tomatoes']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce', '1 Tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. balsamic vinegar', '3 Tbsp. olive oil ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ tsp. wholegrain mustard', '¼ tsp. crushed black pepper ']
Procedure:
['
Soak dried apricots and plums in red wine for 1 day. Marinate lamb shanks for 2 hours. Dust with flour.
', '
Heat 3 Tbsp. olive oil, pan-fry lamb shanks until golden on all sides. Remove and set aside.
', '
Sauté onions, celery, and carrots in same pan for 3 minutes. Deglaze with balsamic vinegar. Add red wine, half the dried fruits, tomatoes, and Seasoning Mix. Bring to a boil.
', '
Place lamb shanks back into pan, cover with water (around 400–500ml/ 1⅔-2 cups) and bring to a boil. Place in a 150 °C (300 °F) preheated oven for 1 hour.
', '
Remove and stir in remaining dried fruits. Stew for another 1 to 2 hours until tender. Pour sauce over lamb shanks occasionally when stewing.
', '
Remove lamb shanks and cover to keep warm. Heat sauce until thickened. Serve lamb shanks with sauce.
']

Name: tomato-chicken-stew
Ingredients: ['16 oz. chicken breast, cut into big cubes ', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '2 oz. sliced onion', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Ginger ', '4 oz. diced celery ', '6 oz. sweet yam, peeled, cut into cubes ', '1 Tbsp. chopped parsley ', '2 whole medium-sized tomatoes, diced']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. dry sherry', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '4 oz. chicken broth ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Massage diced chicken breasts with 1 Tbsp. cornstarch and 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, cook chicken until about half way done.
', '
Add onion, ginger, celery and yams. Cook for another 3 minutes.
', '
Add dry sherry, Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce, chicken broth, Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce, parsley and tomato.
', '
Bring mixture into a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
']

Name: steamed-fish-in-double-fermented-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['450g fish', '2 slices ginger', '3 stalks, green onions']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Double Fermented Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. Premium Chicken Bouillon Powder', '1 tsp. sugar', '3 Tbsp. hot water']
Procedure:
['
Put sectioned green onions under the fish and put ginger slices inside fish gills.  Steam on high heat for 10 minutes.
', '
Put shredded green onions and Chinese parsley on steamed fish.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Double Deluxe Soy Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder and sugar to hot water.  Stir and mix well and set aside.
', '
Heat oil.  Pour over fish.  Then, pour on the prepared sauce mix.
']

Name: fish-head-with-chopped-chili
Ingredients: ['fish head 1 pc (500 g)', 'chopped red chili peppers', '4g salt', '5g green onion']
Seasoning: ['20g Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', 'little Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce', 'little Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce']
Marinade: ['5g ginger', 'cooking wine']
Procedure:
['
Wash fish head thoroughly. Cut open the fish head. Marinate with ginger slices and cooking wine for a while.
', '
Put Chili Garlic Sauce, Chili Bean Sauce and chopped chili peppers on the fish head. Add little salt. Boil water in a pan. When it brings to a boil, place fish head in the pan and steam for 20 minutes.
', '
When the fish head is done, pour away the excess water on the plate.
', '
Put some chopped green onions on the fish head and pour Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood. Heat some oil in a pan, and pour it over the fish head.
']

Name: spring-rolls
Ingredients: ['150 g pork [shredded]', '15 pcs spring roll wrappers ', '5 pcs Chinese mushrooms [soaked, squeezed and shredded]', '25 g yellow chives [sectioned]', '50 g beansprouts [drained]', 'FLOUR PASTE: 2 tsp. plain flour + 2 tsp. water ']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '½ tsp. cornstarch ']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. water ', '½ Tbsp. cornstarch ']
Procedure:
['
Marinate pork for 15 minutes.
', '
Stir-fry pork in 2 Tbsp. oil until done. Add mushrooms, yellow chives, beansprouts and stir-fry until tender. Stir in sauce mix and heat through. Set aside to cool.
', '
Divide pork fillings into 15 portions. Wrap each portion with spring roll wrapper to form spring rolls. Seal ends with plain flour paste.
', '
Deep-fry spring rolls in hot oil until golden yellow and crisp.
']

Name: chow-mein-fried-noodles
Ingredients: ['2 pcs (about 120 g) egg noodles  ', '90 g chilled clam meat ', '90 g fresh black mushrooms, sliced', '50 g Hon Shimeji mushrooms ', '½ pc bell pepper, shredded']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Double Fermented Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook egg noodles in boiling water according to packet instructions or until tender. Drain.
', '
Stir-fry clam meat, black mushrooms, Hon Shimeji mushrooms and bell peppers in 2 tbsp oil for about 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in egg noodles, Seasoning Mix and heat through.
']

Name: asian-chicken-salad
Ingredients: ['250 g chicken fillet (shredded)', '90 g beansprouts ', '75 g cucumber (shredded)', '25 g carrot (shredded)', 'peanuts (roasted, chopped for topping)']
Procedure:
['
Cook shredded chicken and beansprouts in boiling water until done.\xa0
', '
Rinse with cold drinking water until cool. Drain.
', '
Chill all ingredients (except chopped roasted peanuts) in refrigerator.
', '
Stir in dressing before serving. Top with chopped roasted peanuts.
']

Name: stir-fried-crab
Ingredients: ['600 g crab(s) [ 2 pcs, drained, cut into pieces]', '1 pc chili [red, shredded]', '1 pc green onion(s) [sectioned]', '2 Tbsp. Black Pepper Sauce']
Sauce Mix: ['3 Tbsp. Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood ', '1 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. water ']
Procedure:
['
Saute red chili, green onion and black pepper sauce in 3 Tbsp. oil.
', '
Add crabs and stir-fry until half done.
', '
Add sauce mix and stir well.
', '
Cover and cook until crabs are done.
']

Name: apple-crepe
Ingredients: ['1 cup cornstarch (crêpe mixture)', '2 Tbsp. flour (crêpe mixture)', '1 cup water (crêpe mixture)', '4 whole eggs, beaten (crêpe mixture)', '5 whole apples , medium, peeled and cored, cut into small pieces', '1/4 cup cooking oil', '2 Tbsp. butter']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. rum (optional)', '5 Tbsp. Plum Sauce', '1 pinch salt', '5 Tbsp. brown sugar']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan, add butter and apples. Cook for 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in brown sugar, Plum Sauce, salt and rum. Bring mixture into a boil. Simmer for 15 minutes and cool in refrigerator.
', '
Combine all crêpe ingredients in mixing bowl. Mix well until batter is smooth (crêpe mixture). Refrigerate for 1 hour before use.
', '
In a heated non-stick pan, drizzle a few drops of oil. Pour 1 ounce of crêpe mixture into the pan. Swirl crêpe mixture in pan to create round thin shape. Cook mixture for 30 seconds (no need to flip over).\xa0
', '
Spoon apple into the crêpe and fold twice to wrap. Serve with cut up season fruits and Plum Sauce as desired.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: sesame-beef-salad
Ingredients: ['1 small carrot, peeled, cut julienne', '1 whole cucumber, medium, peeled, cut julienne', '1 small green bell pepper, seeded, removed stem ', '1 Tbsp. sesame seeds, roasted ', '1 whole tomato, cut into wedges ', '16 oz. beef flank steak, or top sirloin, cut into thin strips']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Sesame Oil (Pure) ', '2 Tbsp. lime juice']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Marinate beef with 2 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce for 10 minutes.
', '
In a bowl, combine roasted sesame seeds, Sesame Oil, Hoisin Sauce and lime juice.

', '
 Add julienne vegetables. Mix well and set aside (mixture). 

', '
Grill beef turning once on each side.

', '
Serve beef with mixture.

']

Name: roasted-ginger-maple-salmon
Ingredients: ['1 lb. salmon filets, about 1-inch thick ', '8 oz. soba noodles, cooked, or fresh rice']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. white vinegar (ginger maple sauce) ', '3 Tbsp. maple syrup (ginger maple sauce) ', '1 Tbsp. ginger root , fresh grated, including juice (ginger maple sauce)', '2 pcs. garlic cloves , minced (ginger maple sauce)', '1/4 cup Premium Soy Sauce (ginger maple sauce) ', '1 tsp. cilantro ', '1 tsp. sesame seeds']
Procedure:
['
Combine all sauce ingredients in a small bowl and microwave until it just reaches a boil. Remove from heat and set aside.
', '
Preheat oven to 425F. Spread salmon filets in a single layer, skin side down, in a baking pan sprayed with cooking oil. Roast uncovered, about 9-11 minutes, until salmon is just barely cooked through.
', '
Serve over noodles or rice, and top with spoonfuls of sauce.
', '
Garnish with fresh cilantro and sesame seeds.
']

Name: pork-lettuce-wrap
Ingredients: ['6 oz. carrot, diced, cut into small pieces ', '1 head lettuce, cleaned, leaves separated', '4 oz. button mushrooms, cut into small pieces ', '8 oz. ground pork ', '2 oz. rice sticks, deep fried, drained', '4 oz. onion, diced, cut into small pieces', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch black pepper, for taste ', '2 cloves garlic, minced ', '2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cook ground pork with 2 Tbsp. oil until brown.
', '
Add carrots, onion, garlic and mushrooms. Cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Add Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce. Stir well and cook until heated through.
', '
Season with black pepper (pork mixture).
', '
Arrange lettuce in a plate. Pour over pork mixture.
', '
Garnish with fried rice stick. Serve with Hoisin Sauce.
']

Name: pork-medallion-served-with-wild-rice
Ingredients: ['8 oz. pork tenderloin ', '4 oz. red bell pepper, small, diced ', '8 oz. wild rice, cooked according to direction ', '1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped ', '1 whole shallot, finely chopped ', '4 oz. kidney beans, red, rinsed and drained ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Sesame Oil (Pure) ', '1 tsp. black pepper, coarse ', '1 tsp. sugar ', '3 Tbsp. olive oil ', '1 Tbsp. rice vinegar ']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine Premium Soy Sauce, 2 Tbsp. olive oil, rice vinegar, sugar, Sesame Oil and black pepper (premium soy dressing). Mix well and set aside.
', '
Massage pork loin with 1 Tbsp. Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce and 1 tsp. coarse black pepper.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, pan-fry pork loin until golden brown or until done.
', '
Let sit for 10 minutes. Slice into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
', '
Combine wild rice, kidney beans, shallot, parsley and red bell pepper in a medium bowl
', '
Stir in premium soy dressing and serve with sliced pork loin.
']

Name: mushroom-and-pork-noodle-soup
Ingredients: ['8 oz. fresh noodles', '4 oz. lean pork, finely sliced ', '2 mushrooms  ', '1 Tbsp. green onion, chopped', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '3 cups water']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Combine pork, cooking wine, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce, and cornstarch. Add 1Tbsp. oil, mix well, and set aside.
', '
Soak mushrooms till soft, slice, and set aside.
', '
Add remaining 1Tbsp. oil to a heated wok. Add mushrooms, pork, and stir-fry till cooked through. Add water and Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon and bring to a boil.
', '
Boil noodles till cooked through, drain. Place in a bowl and sprinkle green onion on top. Pour the mushroom-and-pork soup over noodles. Ready to serve.
']

Name: bloody-mary
Ingredients: ['32 oz. Tomato Cocktail(Clamato)', '4 Celery', '4-6 Ice Cubes']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '2 tsp. Worchestershire Sauce ', '2 tbsp. Lemon Juice ', '8 oz. Vodka ', '1 Pinch Salt']
Procedure:
['
Pour tomato cocktail into a large pitcher.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, Vodka and pinch of salt to taste.
', '
Stir well. Serve over ice. use celery sticks for stirring.
']

Name: stir-fried-bacon-and-fettucine
Ingredients: ['350 g fettuccine ', '1 pc onion, small dice ', '250 g bacon, diced', '1 pc green bell pepper, thinly sliced']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee PANDA BRAND Oyster Flavored Sauce', '5 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '7 Tbsp. water ', '1 Tbsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. dry sherry ', '1/2 tsp. corn starch']
Procedure:
['
Cook fettuccine according to packaged instructions or until tender. Drain.
', '
In a bowl, whisk together Chili Garlic Sauce, Oyster Flavored Sauce, water, sugar, dry sherry and cornstarch.
', '
In a heated pan, saute onions and bacon in 1 Tbsp. oil. Add green bell peppers, fettuccine, sauce mixture and stir well until heated through.
']

Name: garlic-flavored-steamed-eggplant
Ingredients: ['1 lb.   eggplant', '1 Tbsp.  deep-fried shallots', '1 Tbsp.  green onion, thinly chopped', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Salt', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic']
Procedure:
['
Cut eggplant into 3-inch-long strips, sprinkle with salt and set aside for 15 minutes, then move to a small dish.
', '
Combine well the deep-fried shallots, Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder, and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce, pour over eggplant, then place in a wok with boiling water to steam for about 8 minutes.
', '
Remove eggplant from the wok, pour hot cooking oil over eggplant, then sprinkle chopped green onion on top with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
']

Name: poke

Seasoning: ['Mixing Sauce:', '1 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '2 tsp. soy sauce', '2 tsp. sesame oil', '2 Tbsp. lime juice', '4 green onion stalks', '1 tsp. sesame seeds (black and white), toasted']
Procedure:
['

In a blender, combine remaining green onions, Sriracha Mayo, sesame oil, and lime juice. Puree until smooth to make a sauce.

In a bowl, combine tuna with sauce and mix well
', '
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.
', '
Note: Sauce can be prepared up to 2 days in advance.
']

Name: roast-beef-sandwich-with-hoisin-flavored-mayonnaise

', '
Season with black pepper and set aside (hoisin flavored mayonnaise).

Lightly toast the bread and spread hoisin flavored mayonnaise on top.\xa0
', '
Assemble roast beef sandwich with the remaining ingredients.\xa0
']

Dice salmon and tuna.

Name: chayote-squash-salad
Ingredients: ['300g chayote squash, shredded', '50ml cooking oil', '5g Thai chili, chopped']
Seasoning: ['15ml Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoned Soy Sauce', '3ml vinegar', '3g Lee Kum Kee minced garlic']
Procedure:
['
Combine minced garlic, Thai chili, Soy Sauce, and vinegar.
', '
Heat cooking oil. Combine above mixture with chayote squash first, then add heated oil. Ready to serve.
', '
Note: Heated oil boosts the aroma of the Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoned Soy Sauce. The chayote squash absorbs the flavors of the soy sauce, chili, and garlic. This tasty combination brings the senses to a new level.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: seasoned-fresh-clams
Ingredients: ['300 g fresh clams ']
Seasoning: ['15 ml Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoned Soy Sauce', '5 ml Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '5 ml black vinegar ', '3 g wasabi', '8 g scallion oil', '10 g garlic, minced', '10 g chili, chopped', '5 g parsley, chopped', '5 g green onion, chopped']
Procedure:
['
Clean the fresh clams and place in boiling water until shells open. Then place clams in a large bowl with ice. Set aside.

Mix garlic, chili, parsley, onion, Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoned Soy Sauce, black vinegar, and wasabi, then stir well to combine. Add Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and scallion oil.
', '

Note 
Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoned Soy Sauce allows the sweetness of the clams to come through. With the aroma of the black vinegar, this dish is a mouthwatering appetizer for a sizzling summer.

Name: spicy-chicken-stew-with-oyster-flavored-sauce

Add in the ingredients and bring chicken mixture into a boil.

Simmer for 30-40 minutes or until chicken is fully cooked.

Name: dried-red-shrimp-with-bitter-melon
Ingredients: ['250g bitter melon', '10g dried red shrimp', '10g red pepper, shredded']

Fry dried shrimp until golden.

Drain and dry melon. Add seasoning and stir well to combine. Sprinkle shrimp on top. Ready to serve.

Name: stir-fried-chicken-with-steamed-bread
Ingredients: ['2 steamed breads (steamed buns), diced  ', '1 egg, beaten', '100 g chicken breast, diced', '5 g dried red chili flakes', '5 g green onion, chopped', '5 g cilantro, chopped', '5 g celery, chopped']

['
Glaze the diced buns in the beaten egg. Set aside.

Name: green-papaya-with-sodium-reduced-seasoned-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['100 g green papaya, shredded', '10 g Thai chili, chopped', '5 g ginger, shredded', '10 g garlic, chopped']
Seasoning: ['50 ml Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '250 ml  Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoned Soy Sauce ', '15 g rock sugar']

['
Marinate shredded papaya in lemon juice. Set aside.
', '
Drain and dry Thai chili, ginger, and garlic.
', '
Heat pan and add seasoning until rock sugar is completely dissolved. Add chili and remove the seasoning mix from the stove to cool off.

Stir in ginger and papaya, mix until completely cooled. Place in refrigerator for 24 hours. Ready to serve.

Name: chicken-salad-with-bell-peppers
Ingredients: ['6 oz.  chicken breast', '2½ oz.  bell peppers (various colors) ', '1 Tbsp.  cooking oil']

Cut chicken breast into thin slices, place in boiling water till cooked through, drain and set aside.

Slice bell peppers. To a heated wok with oil, add bell peppers, boiled chicken, and stir-fry. Remove and put on a plate.

Pour Seasoning Sauce over peppers and chicken and mix well. Ready to serve.

Name: pork-rib-stew-with-mixed-vegetables
Ingredients: ['7 oz. pork ribs, cut apart', '7 oz. potatoes, cut into pieces', '4 oz. sweet corn cob, cut into chunks ', '3 oz. red carrot, chopped', '3 oz.  string beans, chopped', '2  green onion stalks (white part only), chopped', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']

Rinse ribs with boiling water. Drain and set aside.
', '
Heat cooking oil, saute ginger and anise pod. Add ribs and stir-fry until light golden.
', '
Add potatoes, string beans, corn, and carrot. Continue to stir-fry for 3 minutes.
', '
Stir in Seasoning Sauce and onion, cover pan and cook over low heat until ribs are tender and sauce is thickened.
']

Name: sriracha-mayo-wings

Mix Seasoning Sauce ingredients. Set aside.

Combine flour, cornstarch, baking powder, cooking oil, and water.  Add chicken wings and stir well to mix. Deep-fry wings until fully cooked.

Mix flour, cornstarch, water, baking powder, and add to chicken wings.

Combine wings with Seasoning Sauce. Ready to serve.

Name: cream-corn-beef-soup
Ingredients: ['4 oz. ground beef', '½ cup cream corn', '1 egg, beaten', '2 Tbsp. asparagus, chopped', '1 Tbsp. cilantro, chopped', '4 cups water', '4 Tbsp. cornstarch-water mixture']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder (optional)', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', 'pinch white pepper']
Procedure:
['
Bring water to a boil and add seasoning. Add ground beef, cream corn, and asparagus, and bring to a boil again. Stir cornstarch-water mixture into soup till thickened.
', '
Pour egg into soup. Lightly stir and sprinkle cilantro on top. Serve hot.
']

Name: shredded-pork
Ingredients: ['10 oz.   pork loin, shredded', '2    scallion stalks, finely shredded', '2 Tbsp.  cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp.   Lee Kum Kee Sweet Bean Sauce', '2 Tbsp.   Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce (or Premium Soy Sauce)']
Marinade: ['1   egg white', '1 Tbsp.  Cornstarch', '1 Tbsp.  cooking wine']
Procedure:
['
Mix well the pork, egg white, cornstarch, and cooking wine with a small amount of water. Marinate for 20 minutes.
', '
Put oil in pan over medium heat, add pork, stir-fry lightly till the pork turns opaque. Remove pork from pan and set aside.
', '
Use oil remaining in pan and add seasoning sauces. Stir-fry for 1–2 minutes over low heat. Add pork and keep stir-frying for another 2 minutes over medium-high heat till pork is thoroughly coated with sauce.
', '
Place scallions on a plate, put pork on top. Ready to serve.
']

Name: potato-and-seaweed-slaw
Ingredients: ['7 oz. potatoes, peeled and shredded   ', '1 oz. seaweed, shredded', '2 oz. red carrot, shredded', '1 oz. green bell pepper, shredded']
Procedure:
['

', '
Drain and set aside to cool. Soak seaweed in water until soft, then rinse in boiled water. Drain and set aside.
', '
Put all ingredients in a large bowl and place in refrigerator. Mix well with dressing before serving.
']

Name: lotus-root-and-fungi-salad
Ingredients: ['5 oz. lotus root, sliced', '1/2 oz. dried black fungi, shredded', '1 oz. white fungi, torn into small pieces']
Procedure:
['
Soak black and white fungi in water until soft.
', '
Rinse lotus root, black and white fungi with boiled water. Drain and dry.
', '
Mix all ingredients with salad dressing before serving.
']

Name: salmon-poke-woth-oyster-flavored-sauce

', '
N/A
']

Name: sirloin-steak-in-red-wine-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 sirloin steaks, about 14 oz. total', '1 oz. butter ', '2 oz. onion, chopped', '2 oz. button mushrooms, sliced', '2 tsp. all-purpose flour ', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', 'Baked potatoes and cooked vegetables as side dishes']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. sugar ', '10 Tbsp. red wine ']
Marinade: ['Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', 'Black pepper as desired']
Procedure:
['
Marinate steaks.
', '
Heat cooking oil, then pan-fry steaks for 2–3 minutes on each side. Add butter and mix well. Arrange steaks on plate and cover to keep warm.
', '
In same skillet with remaining oil, saute onion and mushrooms. Add flour and stir well. Slowly pour in Seasoning Mix and cook until sauce thickens.
', '
Pour thickened red-wine sauce over steaks and serve with potatoes and vegetables.
']

Name: poke-tacos
Ingredients: ['8 oz. raw salmon, diced', '1 tsp. fresh dill, chopped', '4 Tbsp. onion, julienned', '4 Tbsp. cilantro, chopped', '6 oz. avocado, diced', '3 hard taco shells']

Procedure:
['
Mix Seasoning Sauce. Set aside.
', '
Combine salmon, dill, onion, garlic, pepper, cilantro, and avocado with Seasoning Sauce. Stir well.
', '
Spoon poke mixture into taco shells. Ready to serve.
']

Name: soba-noodles-with-imitation-crab-meat
Ingredients: ['8 oz. soba noodles  ', '4 oz. imitation crab meat, torn into thin pieces  ', '2 oz. red carrots, chopped', '1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds  (optional)', '2 oz. cucumber, chopped']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Supreme Soy Sauce       ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '2 tsp. aged vinegar  ']
Procedure:
['
Follow instructions on noodles package and boil until soft. Place noodles in ice water, remove and dry. Place in a large bowl and set aside.
', '
Place imitation crab meat, cucumber, and red carrots on top of noodles, then place in refrigerator.

Add seasonings and stir to combine before serving. Sprinkle with toasted sesame.

Name: poke-rice-burrito-poke-seaweed-wraps
Ingredients: ['8 oz. raw salmon, diced', '8 oz. raw tuna, diced', '6 oz. pickled seaweed ', '3 oz. carrots, julienned', '3 oz. cucumber, julienned', '6 oz. imitation crab with mayo, pre-mixed', '1 1/2 bowls sushi rice, precooked', '6 oz. mixed salad leaves', '3 seaweed sheets']
Seasoning: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', 'Wasabi Shoyu', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 tsp. wasabi', '1 Tbsp. mirin (sweet rice wine)', '2 tsp. lemon juice', '2 Tbsp. water', '2 tsp. white sugar']

['
Mix Wasabi Shoyu ingredients. Set aside.

Combine salmon, tuna, carrots, and cucumber with Wasabi Shoyu. Set aside.

Spread sushi rice evenly on a seaweed sheet, arrange salad leaves, crab, and pickled seaweed on top. Add fish mixture from Step 2.

Roll seaweed sheet into the shape of a burrito, dress with Sriracha Mayo as desired. Repeat for remaining sheets. Ready to serve.
']

Name: steak-with-sriracha-bbq-sauce
Ingredients: ['Steak 4 pieces (about 8oz. /each)', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. garlic (chopped)', '2 Tbsp. fresh rosemary', '2 tsp. black pepper', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha BBQ Sauce', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Put steaks into a big bowl.
', '
Mix all ingredients will and add steak.  Marinate for 4 hours or overnight.
', '
Heat oil and pan-fry steak until golden on both sides.  Depending on personal preference, steak maybe cooked to your level of readiness. Serve.
']

Name: pork-chop-burger-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['5 oz. boneless pork chop, cut in 2, lightly pounded', '2 hamburger buns', '1 tomato, sliced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', 'Lettuce garnish as desired ']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1/2 tsp. Italian mixed herbs ', '1/4 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Mix pork chops with marinade and toast the buns.
', '
Use cooking oil to pan-fry pork chops over medium heat until done. Serve burgers on toasted buns with tomatoes, lettuce, and any condiments desired.
', '
N/A
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: asian-style-french-fries
Ingredients: ['French Fries']
Procedure:
['
Mix Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce,\xa0 Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and wasabi to make Wasabi Oyster Sauce Dip.
', '
Cook french fries as usual, serve with Asian-flavored Wasabi Oyster Sauce Dip.
']

Name: sichuan-cold-noodles
Ingredients: ['4 oz. thin noodles    ', '1 Tbsp. peanuts, chopped', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, roasted', '1 Tbsp. green onion, finely chopped']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Soup Base for Hot Pot', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Black Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '2 Tbsp. sesame sauce (or tahini)', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '1 tsp. vinegar   ', 'Water as desired']
Procedure:
['
Mix Seasoning Sauce ingredients to combine. Set aside.
', '
Cook noodles and rinse with cold water. Drain and set aside.
', '
Combine Seasoning Sauce with noodles in large bowl. Sprinkle garnish on top. Ready to serve.
']

Name: sichuan-style-beef-noodles
Ingredients: ['1½ lb. noodles', '1 lb. beef shank', '6 baby bok choy, cooked', '12 oz. carrots, thinly sliced and cooked', '3 ginger slices', '2 star anise pods', '2  cinnamon sticks', 'Green onion as desired']
Seasoning: ['3 cups Lee Kum Kee Premium Seasoned Soy Sauce', '6 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Soup Base for Hot Pot', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Oil', '2 tsp.  ee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', '1 1/2 gal. water', 'Salt as desired']
Procedure:
['
Pour water into pot. Add beef shank, Lee Kum Kee Premium Seasoning Soy Sauce, Premium Dark Soy Sauce, green onion, ginger, cinnamon, and anise. Bring to a boil over high heat, then lower to low heat and continue to cook for 2 hours. Add salt after 1 1/2 hour. Remove beef and slice.
', '
Cook noodles, reserving some cooking water, and rinse with cold water. Drain and set aside.
', '
In another pot, mix 1 cup beef broth with 1 cup water from noodles. Add Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Soup Base for Hot Pot, Chili Oil, and Concentrated Chicken Bouillon. Mix well and pour soup over noodles. Place sliced beef and vegetables on top. Ready to serve.
']

Name: steamed-scallops-with-black-bean-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['4  scallops, in shell', '1 oz. mung bean vermicelli', '1 green onion, chopped', '2 Tbsp. fried chopped garlic', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil, heated']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce For Seafood']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. Shaoxing cooking wine']
Procedure:
['
Soak mung bean vermicelli in water until soft. Drain and mix with Seasoned Soy Sauce For Seafood.
', '
Place seasoned vermicelli on top of scallops. Top with sauce mix.
', '
Steam scallops over high heat for 8-10 minutes. Sprinkle with green onions and fried garlic.
', '
Pour hot oil over scallops and serve immediately.
']

Name: spicy-instant-noodles
Ingredients: ['1 pkg. instant noodles ', '2 oz. ham, about 1 slice, shredded', '1 oz. carrot, shredded', '1 green onion, shredded', '1 egg, beaten', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil (or Lee Kum Kee Chili Oil) ']
Procedure:
['
To make an egg sheet, pan-fry beaten egg in cooking oil. Shred egg sheet into fine strips and set aside.
', '
Cook instant noodles in boiling water according to package instructions. Drain and ladle into a bowl.
', '
Add remaining ingredients and Seasoning Mix into noodles. Toss well and serve hot.
']

Name: noodles-with-pork-and-yellow-peas
Ingredients: ['4 oz.  thin noodles  ', '2 oz.  ground pork', 'Side Ingredients: ', '1 oz.  yellow peas, cooked', '1  baby bok choy, cooked', '2 Tbsp.  bean sprouts', '1 Tbsp.  cooking oil', 'Chopped green onion as desired']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Soup Base for Hot Pot', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broadbean Sauce', 'Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce as desired', 'Water as desired', '1 tsp. sesame seeds, roasted', '1 Tbsp. minced garlic']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in pan and stir-fry pork over medium heat for 5 minutes until fat is rendered.  Add green onion and minced garlic, Lee Kum Kee Premium Seasoning Soy Sauce, Premium Dark Soy Sauce. Continue to stir-fry for 1 minute. Remove and set aside.
', '
Add 2 cups water to same pan. Pour in Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Soup Base for Hot Pot, Sichuan Style Broadbean Sauce, and Concentrated Chicken Bouillon. Bring to a boil.
', '
Cook noodles in a separate pot. Combine noodles with sauce from Step #2. Place pork and remaining side ingredients on top. Ready to serve.
', '
Tip: Add a sunny-side-up egg on top if desired.
']

Name: noodles-with-pork-in-mixed-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 oz.  thin noodles  ', '2 oz.   ground pork', 'Side Ingredients: ', '1  baby bok choy, cooked', '2 Tbsp.  bean sprouts', '1 Tbsp.  cooking oil', '1 tsp.  sesame seeds, roasted', 'Chopped green onion, as desired']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '1 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Soup Base for Hot Pot', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Chili Oil', '1 tsp.  Lee Kum Kee Premium Dark Soy Sauce', 'Water as desired']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil in pan and stir-fry ground pork over medium heat for 5 minutes until fat is rendered. Add green onion, Lee Kum Kee Premium Seasoning Soy Sauce and Premium Dark Soy Sauce.
', '
Continue to stir-fry for 1 minute. Remove and set aside.
', '
Add half-cup water to same pan. Pour in Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Hot & Spicy Soup Base for Hot Pot, Chili Oil, and Concentrated Chicken Bouillon. Bring to a boil.
', '
Cook noodles in a separate pot. Combine noodles with sauce from Step #2 in a large bowl. Place pork and remaining side ingredients on top, then sprinkle with sesame seeds. Ready to serve.
', '
Tip: Add a sunny-side-up egg on top if desired.
']

Name: pork-dumplings-in-hot-chili-oil
Ingredients: ['5 1/2 oz. minced pork', '12 Shanghai-style wonton wrappers', '2 Tbsp. beaten egg', '3 Tbsp. spring onion (chopped)', '2 Tbsp. roasted peanuts (crushed) ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sichuan Style Broad Bean Sauce', '6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil (heated to a boil)', '1 1/2 tsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. cold water', '1 Tbsp. red pepper flakes', '1 tsp. ground Sichuan pepper']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil', '1/4 tsp. sugar', '1/2 tsp. ground white pepper']
Procedure:
['
Mix pork and 1 Tbsp. spring onion well. Add Marinade and stir well.
', '
Spoon some filling onto each wonton wrapper. Beat the egg and glaze the rim to seal.
', '
Bring some water to a boil. Drop in wontons and cook until they float to the surface. Remove and place in bowl with Seasoning Mix. Sprinkle with remaining spring onion and crushed peanuts, and serve.
']

Name: pan-fried-eggs-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['1–2 eggs, whole', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce to taste']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil and pan-fry eggs until done.\xa0
', '
Place eggs on serving plate. Season with Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce.
', '
N/A
']

Name: scotch-eggs
Ingredients: ['4 oz. minced beef', '2 oz. onion  (minced)', '2 boiled eggs (shelled)', '1 egg (beaten)', '3/4 oz. flour', '1/3 oz. breadcrumbs']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'dash of coarse-ground black pepper ']
Procedure:
['
Sauté onion until cooked through. Cool and set aside. Stir together beef, onions, black pepper, Seasoning Mix, and half of beaten egg. Mix well until a paste-like consistency forms.
', '
Coat boiled eggs evenly with flour. Take half the meat mixture and shape evenly around 1 boiled egg. Dip into beaten egg, then roll in breadcrumbs until evenly coated. Repeat each step for other egg.
', '
Deep-fry eggs in warm oil 5 minutes until golden-brown and serve.
']

Name: sauteed-diced-chicken
Ingredients: ['12 oz. chicken thigh meat', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch', '1 egg white', '4 oz. green peppers ', '1 tsp. ginger, sliced', '1 tsp. garlic, sliced', '4 oz. roasted peanuts']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Cut the chicken into cubes. Marinate with1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce, cornstarch, and egg white for 15 minutes.
', '
Heat oil in a hot pan and stir-fry chicken until cooked through, set aside.
', '
Cut the green peppers into cubes.
', '
Heat up a little oil in hot pan, sauté ginger and garlic, stir in Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce and stir-fry until fragrant. Add chicken and green peppers, season with 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce, stir-fry at high heat until the sauce is evenly distributed.
', '
Then sprinkle Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil and add peanuts. Stir-fry lightly for 10 seconds. Ready to serve.
']

Name: rice-dumplings-with-golden-oysters-and-dried-scallops
Ingredients: ['3 oz. glutinous rice', '3 oz. peeled green beans', '4–8 dried bamboo leaves', '1½ oz. pork belly (cut into pieces)', '2 salted egg yolks', '4 semi-dried oysters, soaked', '¾ oz. dried scallops, soaked', '4 pcs. cotton string']
Marinade: ['1 oz. five-spice powder ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder ']
Procedure:
['
Soak glutinous rice and green beans separately for 6 hours. Drain well and set aside.
', '
Marinate pork belly overnight by rubbing with five spice powder.
', '
In separate bowls, mix half Chicken Bouillon Powder with glutinous rice, and remaining half into green beans. Mix well.
', '
Divide stuffing ingredients into two equal portions. Stack two bamboo leaves together and twist to form a cone or funnel. Add a layer each of glutinous rice and green beans, then add pork belly, 2 golden oysters, dried scallop, 1 salted egg yolk, and the remaining green beans. Top off with rice.
', '
Fold the bamboo leaves to completely enclose the filling and form a pyramid. Tie securely with string. Repeat each step for other dumpling.
', '
Serve with Sweet Soy Sauce.
']
