Name: new-style-fish-fillet-in-hot-and-spicy-soup
Ingredients: ['1 lb. flounder fish fillet', '2 bags(4 oz.)   enoki mushrooms', '1 box (optional)  shredded konnyaku (also known as konjak)', '2 oz. green and red peppers', '3 tomatoes', '2 cups stock', '1 tsp. fresh peppercorns, grounded']
Seasoning: ['1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. curry powder', '2 tsp. sugar']
Marinade: ['1 egg white', '4 tsp. cornstarch', '1 tsp. salt', '1 tsp. cooking wine']
Procedure:
['
Clean then slice the fish fillet. Marinate in egg white, cornstarch, cooking wine and salt.
', '
Put enoki mushrooms, shredded konnyaku, green and red peppers, and tomatoes in boiling water until cooked through. Set aside in a big bowl. Boil the marinated fish fillet in\xa0 stock until 80% cooked, remove it from stock and reserve fish stock.
', '
Heat up the fish stock and add Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot, Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce and all other seasonings. Place the fish in the same bowl as mushrooms and vegetables.
', '
Pour fish stock over the fish, mushrooms, and vegetables. Sprinkle the grounded peppercorns on top. Ready to serve.
']

Name: pork-knuckle-in-brown-braising-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 pork knuckle (about 1200g/2.5 lbs.)', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '8 slices ginger', '6 pcs. green onion ', '2 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine', '10 cloves garlic']
Seasoning: ['200 ml (7 fluid ounces) Lee Kum Kee Brown Braising Sauce', '750 ml (3 cups) water ']
Procedure:
['
Blanch pork knuckle in boiling water. Rinse with cold water. Drain and set aside.
', '
Sauté ginger and green onion in 2 Tbsp. oil until fragrant. Add pork knuckle and pan-fry until golden. Sprinkle with wine.
', '
Add garlic. Stir in Seasoning Mix and bring to a boil. Simmer for about 2 hours until tender. If you like a softer texture, add 1–2 cup(s) boiling water and cook for another 1–2 hour(s).
', '
Remove the bone from the knuckle. Pour the sauce over the pork knuckle and serve hot.
']

Name: sauteed-string-beans-with-spicy-ground-pork
Ingredients: ['13 oz. string beans', '2 oz. ground pork ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', '2 tsp. garlic, minced', '2 tsp. green onions, minced', '1–2 fresh chili peppers, finely chopped', '2 3/4 cups cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
Clean the string beans, cut into sections.
', '
Deep-fry the string beans until cooked through, drain the oil, set aside.
', '
Saute ground pork, minced garlic, minced green onion, and fresh chili peppers until fragrant, add string beans.
', '
Then stir in Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood. Ready to serve.
']

Name: roasted-beef-ribs
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Spare Rib Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Poke beef ribs with a fork and mix well with spare rib sauce. Marinate for 2 hours.
', '
Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Roast beef ribs on a rack for 45–60 minutes. Set aside for 20 minutes before slicing.
', '
Serve with more spare rib sauce, if desired.
', '
Roasting time per 500g/17.5 oz. of beef: 
Medium well 25–30 Minutes
Well done 30–35 Minutes
']

Name: roast-chicken-in-soybean-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 whole chicken (about 3 lbs.)']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '4 Tbsp. water  ']
Marinade: ['7 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '2 tsp. sugar', '1 Tbsp. water ']
Procedure:
['
Rinse chicken clean and pat dry. Mix Marinade thoroughly and evenly coat chicken. Let stand 2 hours.
', '
Roast chicken 30–40 minutes in 350°F preheated oven. Baste chicken with oil occasionally. Roast until cooked through.
', '
Mix Dipping Sauce and heat for serving.
']

Name: steamed-abalone-in-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['250 g abalone  [1 pc,canned and drained]', 'Cooked asparagus or green vegetables [for garnish]']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce  ', '6 Tbsp. water', '1 tsp. corn starch ']
Procedure:
['
Steam the whole abalone for about 20 minutes until heated through.  Take out and put on top of asparagus.
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp oil.  Add sauce mix and heat through.  Pour over abalone, slice and serve hot.
', '
N/A
']

Name: seven-color-salad-mix
Ingredients: ['100 g (3.5 oz) spinach', '50 g (2 oz) cucumber, finely diced', '50 g (2 oz) jicama, finely diced', '8 g (1/2 oz) wood-ear mushrooms', '50 g (2 oz) five-spice dried bean curd', '50 g (2 oz) carrot, finely diced', '1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee White Vinegar', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. wasabi', '2 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Soak wood-ear mushrooms until soft. Blanch bean curd, spinach, and mushrooms in boiling water separately, one after the other. Take out each and rinse in cold water. Drain and finely dice.
', '
Chill all ingredients. To serve, combine with Seasoning Mix, toss well, and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
', '
N/A
']

Name: spicy-coleslaw-salad
Ingredients: ['1 lb. cabbage, shredded', '4 oz. carrots, julienned', '2 oz. onions, chopped', '2 oz. celery, chopped', '4 oz. golden raisins']
Seasoning: ['3/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '3 Tbsp. condensed milk', '2 Tbsp. cider vinegar']
Procedure:
['
Mix all ingredients in a big bowl. Add cider vinegar, toss evenly, and let chill for 5 minutes.
', '
Add Seasoning Sauce to the salad and mix well. Keep salad in refrigerator for 20 to 30 minutes before serving.
', '
N/A
']

Name: spicy-macaroni-salad
Ingredients: ['8 oz. elbow macaroni ', '1/4 cup carrots, julienned thinly', '3 oz. raisins', '3 Tbsp. onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo ', '2 Tbsp. condensed milk']
Procedure:
['
Cook macaroni according to package instructions. Rinse with cold water until completely cool and drain.
', '
Combine macaroni with rest of ingredients, add Seasoning Sauce, and mix well. Keep macaroni salad in refrigerator for about 30 minutes before serving.
', '
Tip: Drain the water from macaroni as much as possible for better texture and flavor.
']

Name: seared-scallops-with-sauteed-napa-cabbage-and-shitake-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['1 lb. scallops (large) ', '1 1/2 lb. cabbage (napa) slice crosswise into 1/2" thick pieces', '6 Tbsp. water ', '3 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '8 oz. shitake mushrooms (stemmed and cut into 1/4" thick slices) ', '2 tsp. cornstarch ', '4 slices ginger (1/4" thick) ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 pinch pepper ']
Procedure:
['
Place scallops on large plate; blot dry with paper towel. Season with salt and pepper.
', '
Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in large nonstick skillet over medium high heat. Add scallops and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer to clean plate; cover to keep warm.
', '
Add remaining 1 Tbsp. oil to skillet and return to medium high heat. Saute ginger 1 minute. Add shitake mushrooms,napa cabbage, ginger, and 4 Tbsp. water. Cover skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until stems are tender and leaves have wilted, 6 to 8 minutes.
', '
In small bowl, whisk together black pepper, cornstarch, 2 Tbsp. vegetable liquid from skillet, and Oyster Flavored Sauce. Uncover skillet, stir in sauce mixture, and cook until liquid in pan has thickened. Stir in scallops and serve immediately.
']

Name: pan-fried-lamb-rack-with-red-wine-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['450g/1 lb. lamb rack (about 8 pcs.)', '2 tsp. minced garlic', '1 cup red wine']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '1/2 tsp. cornstarch', '3 Tbsp. water']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'Dash of rosemary', '1 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Combine lamb rack with Marinade.
', '
Pan-fry lamb rack in 2 Tbsp. oil until golden and desired doneness is reached. Keep warm.
', '
Use the same skillet to sauté garlic. Add red wine and simmer until wine reduces to half. Stir in Seasoning Mix and heat through until thickened. Serve lamb rack with the sauce.
']

Name: crispy-chicken-with-sweet---spicy-soy-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 pound chicken thigh or chicken breast (cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces) ', '1/2 teaspoon baking soda ', '1 cup cornstarch ', '1 cup cooking oil ', '2 whole green onions (sliced thinly) ', '3 whole egg white ']
Seasoning: ['2 teaspoons Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1/4 cup Premium Soy Sauce ', '4 Tablespoons sugar ', '1 pinch pepper ']
Procedure:
['
In large bowl, whisk together Premium Soy Sauce, sugar, Chili Garlic Sauce, and green onions until sugar is dissolved.
', '
Beat egg whites in shallow bowl until frothy. In seperate bowl, whisk together corn starch and baking soda. Season chicken with pepper. At several pieces at a time, dip chicken into egg whites, allowing excess to drop off. Immediately dredge chicken in corn starch, shaking off excess.
', '
Place on large plate and continue until all chicken pieces are coated in egg white and cornstarch.
', '
Add enough oil to cover bottom of deep straight-sided pan by 1/2 inch. Heat oil over medium-high heat until hot. Cook chicken in 2 to 3 batches until cooked through and golden brown on both sides, about 5 minutes per batch.
', '
Drain chicken on several layers of paper towels. Serve with Chili Garlic & Premium Soy Sauce mixture.
', '
Transfer chicken to bowl with sauce mixture and stir until all pieces are well coated with sauce. Transfer to platter and discard extra sauce.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: satay-crab-casserole
Ingredients: ['50 g / 1.8 oz. mung-bean vermicelli (chopped)', '1 fresh crab (about 300 g / 10.6 oz.) (cut into pieces)', '3 ginger slices', '2 garlic cloves (crushed)', '3 green onions (chopped)', '1 Tbsp. chopped shallots', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', '3 Tbsp. chopped pineapple', 'Chinese parsley as desired', 'red chili peppers as desired (cut into rings)']
Seasoning: ['cornstarch (for dusting)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Satay Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Shao Hsing wine']
Sauce Mix: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/2 tsp. sugar', '250 ml / 8.5 fl. oz. water ']
Procedure:
['
Soak vermicelli in water until soft. Drain.
', '
Dust crab with cornstarch. Deep-fry or pan-fry until golden and cooked. Drain and set aside.
', '
Saute ginger, garlic, shallots, and satay sauce in 1 Tbsp. oil until fragrant. Add crab and drizzle with wine. Stir in Sauce Mix and pineapples and bring to a boil.
', '
Add vermicelli and simmer until sauce is thickened. Transfer to a heated casserole dish and garnish with chili peppers and Chinese parsley.
']

Name: pan-fried-oysters-in-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['200g/7 oz. (around 8–12 pcs.) frozen semi-dried oysters', '2 tsp. minced ginger', '75g/2.5 oz. red bell pepper (cut into pieces)', '75g/2.5 oz. green bell pepper (cut into pieces)', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. sugar', '2 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine']
Procedure:
['
Rinse and pat-dry oysters. Pan-fry oysters in 2 Tbsp. oil until both sides turn golden. Set aside.
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in wok and sauté ginger and bell peppers. Add Seasoning Mix and toss well with oysters. Last, stir in XO Sauce and serve hot.
', '
N/A
']

Name: hoisin-flavored-angel-wings-served-with-rice-pilaf
Ingredients: ['Spinach 1 lb [, baby, keep warm ]', 'Olive oil 1 tbsp', 'Chicken wings 1.5 lb [, cleaned ]', 'Rice 4 Cup [, pilaf, cook to directions ]']
Marinade: ['Hoisin Sauce 6 tbsp', 'Sesame Oil (Pure) 2 tsp']
Procedure:
['
In a medium-sized mixing bowl, combine chicken wings, Lee Kum Kee™ Pure Sesame Oil, olive oil and Lee Kum Kee™ Hoisin Sauce. Mix well. Marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Bake at 375 degrees with aluminum foil for 25 minutes. Remove cover and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
', '
Serve with rice pilaf and steam spinach.
']

Name: squash-stuffed-with-scallops-in-lemon-flavored-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['2 hairy squashes, peeled', '8 fresh scallops']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1/2 lemon', ' 2 Tbsp. condensed milk              ', 'Cilantro leaves for garnish']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder     ', '1/2 tsp. ground black pepper', '2 Tbsp. olive oil']
Procedure:
['
Cut each squash into 8 pieces (approx. 1½”-thick each). Using a round cookie or biscuit cutter, shape the squash pieces into similar disks, then remove the seeds. Note: When scooping out the seeds, take care not to remove too much of the squash flesh, as that will serve as support for the scallop stuffing later.
', '
Cook the squash in boiling water until medium-well done, drain, and set aside.
', '
Marinate scallops slightly in a mixture of Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder, black pepper and olive oil. Sauté scallops over high heat until both sides are golden brown and medium-well done. Stuff the scallops into squash and place the stuffed squash rounds on a baking sheet.
', '
Mix Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, lemon juice, and condensed milk well and spread evenly over the stuffed squash. Preheat the oven to 450ºF and bake for 5 minutes. Turn the oven to Broil and cook for another 2 minutes, until mayo turns golden brown.
', '
Remove squash from the oven, place on a plate, garnish with cilantro. Ready to serve.
', '
Tip: Hairy squash can be replaced with cucumbers.
']

Name: potato-and-bacon-salad-with-avocado-hoisin-dressing
Ingredients: ['80 g / 2.8 oz. bacon (diced)', '2 avocadoes', '500 g / 17.6 oz. potatoes (cut into pieces)', '80 g / 2.8 oz. carrots (cut into pieces)', '1/4 cup milk']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', 'chopped chives or chopped Italian parsley as desired']
Procedure:
['
Cook potatoes and carrots separately in boiling water with salt until soft.
', '
Remove skin and pit from avocadoes. Blend flesh with milk to form dressing.
', '
Stir-fry bacon until crispy and golden.
', '
Mix all ingredients with dressing and hoisin sauce. Serve warm.
']

Name: baja-shrimp-taco-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['1/2 large red onion', '1 Tbsp. butter', '1 1/2 cups cabbage', '1 cup matchstick carrots', '1/2 cup buttermilk, divided', '1- 1/2 pounds large shrimp', '1/2 cup all-purpose flour', '1 1/4 cup panko breadcrumbs', 'Oil, for frying', 'Flour or Corn Tortillas', 'Jalapeno peppers', 'Fresh cilantro leaves', 'Queso fresco']
Procedure:
['
To make the sautéed cabbage: Heat a skillet until very hot.\xa0 Add the butter, cabbage and carrots and cook over high heat for just 1 minute. Set aside.\xa0\xa0
', '
To make the panko crusted shrimp: In a medium bowl, toss the shrimp in ½ cup of buttermilk and ½ teaspoon of salt.\xa0 In a shallow baking dish, combine the flour and remaining ½ teaspoon of salt.\xa0 In a small bowl, pour the remaining ½ cup buttermilk.\xa0 In another shallow baking dish, pour out the panko breadcrumbs.\xa0 Start by dipping the shrimp in flour, then the buttermilk and finally the panko.\xa0
', '
In a large saucepan, heat 1 inch of oil 350.\xa0 Fry shrimp in batches until golden, about 2 minutes per batch.\xa0 Drain on paper towels.
', '
To assemble the Baja Shrimp Tacos: Heat up the tortillas in a skillet.Spoon some of the cabbage into the center of each tortilla and top with 2 fried shrimp.Sprinkle with jalapenos, pickled red onions, cilantro and queso fresco.Drizzle with the Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo.Serve tacos with lime wedges.Enjoy!
']

Name: sauteed-oyster-dice-in-sesame-puff
Ingredients: ['120 g / 4.2 oz. oyster meat (diced)', '90 g / 3.2 oz. minced chicken', '90 g / 3.2 oz. red bell peppers (finely diced)', '50 g / 1.8 oz. carrots (finely diced)', '25 g / 0.9 oz. water chestnuts (finely diced)', '50 g / 1.8 oz. pine nuts (toasted), ', '2 tsp. minced garlic,', '2 tsp. chopped shallots', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '250 g / 8.8 oz. all-purpose flour', '2 g / 0.07 oz. baking powder', '2 g / 0.07 oz. instant yeast', '30 g /1 oz. oil', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce', '100–120 ml / 3.5-4 fl. oz. water', 'sesame seeds (adequate amount)']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce,', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '2 Tbsp. water']
Procedure:
['
Knead 200 g / 7 oz. flour with baking powder, yeast, and water to form a soft dough. Mix remaining 50 g / 1.8 oz. flour with oil to form an oil paste.
', '
Divide soft dough into 8 portions. Roll out each to 5mm thickness. Brush oil paste onto each and roll up. Flatten each and roll out again. Brush with char siu sauce and roll up.
', '
Flatten dough again and roll into an oval shape. Brush with water and sprinkle with sesame seeds on one side. Arrange dough on oiled baking tray. Bake puffs in a 220 °C (430 °F) preheated oven for 15 minutes until golden.
', '
Marinate chicken. Blanch oyster meat in boiling water and drain. Stir-fry garlic and shallots in 2 Tbsp. oil. Add chicken and oyster and sauté until cooked.
', '
Add red bell peppers, carrots, and water chestnuts. Stir-fry for 1 minute, then add Sauce Mix. Heat through.
', '
Add pine nuts to filling and mix well. Place filling in sesame puff and serve hot.
']

Name: shrimp-with-vermicelli-casserole
Ingredients: ['5 oz. vermicelli (bean thread) ', '1" piece  ginger, thinly sliced ', '8-10 raw shrimp, deveined and shelled', '2 cups  water  ', '1 egg, beaten', '2 green onions, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. cooking wine', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
Soak vermicelli in water till tender, drain and set aside.
', '
Sauté shredded ginger with cooking oil in casserole dish until fragrant. Add oyster sauce and shrimp and cook until fragrant. Add water and cooking wine and bring to a boil. Add chicken bouillon powder and vermicelli and mix well, then cover casserole and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Uncover casserole and add egg, shredded onion, and sesame oil, then cover again with lid. Ready to serve after it has simmered for 2 minutes.
']

Name: sweet-grilled-chicken-sandwich
Ingredients: ['coleslaw mixture (pre-made) 2 oz', 'chicken breast filet 1 lb', 'hamburger buns 4 pcs']
Seasoning: ['Hoisin Sauce 6 tbsp', 'Mayonnaise 4 tbsp']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine Lee Kum KeeTMHoisin Sauce and mayonnaise (hoisin sauce mix). Whisk well. Refrigerate.
', '
Marinate chicken breast with Hoisin Sauce Mix.
', '
Serve with sesame hamburger bun, hoisin sauce mix and coleslaw, as desired.
']

Name: pan-fried-egg-dumplings-with-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['3 eggs', '100 g / 3.5 oz. minced pork', '1 Tbsp. chopped green onions', '1 Tbsp. chopped coriander / cilantro', '1 tsp. cornstarch', '1 Tbsp. water']
Seasoning: ['1/4 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', 'Dash of pepper']
Procedure:
['
Mix minced pork with Marinade. Combine pork, green onion, and coriander to form filling. Mix cornstarch with water, add to eggs with Seasoning Mix, beat well.
', '
Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Pour 2 Tbsp. egg mixture and place pork filling just off center.
', '
Fold egg sheet in half while still soft. Seal in pork filling by slightly pressing edges. Pan-fry over low heat until both sides are golden. Repeat until all ingredients are used. Serve with more XO sauce if desired.
']

Name: sriracha-mayo-popcorn-chicken
Ingredients: ['3 lb. chicken leg meat  ', '1 tsp. roasted sesame seeds']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder', '1 cup cornstarch   ']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/3 cup flour    ', '1 Tbsp. baking powder   ', '1/2 cup water    ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil']
Procedure:
['
Cut chicken meat into 1-inch cubes. Toss with Chicken Bouillon Powder and cornstarch and marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
In a separate bowl, whisk together Premium Soy Sauce, flour, baking powder, water and cooking oil to form a batter.
', '
Prepare the dipping sauce in another bowl by whisking together Sriracha Mayo with condensed milk. Set aside.
', '
Dip chicken into the batter (sauce mix) and deep fry in 400˚F oil. Remove and set aside.
', '
Sprinkle fried chicken with sesame seeds and serve with dipping sauce.
', '
Note: You can also substitute chicken wings for the chicken leg meat.
']

Name: split-pea-and-bacon-soup-with-premium-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 small carrot [peeled, chopped]', '2 stalks angled luffa  [chopped ]', '1 cup peas, rinsed well ', '2 oz. heavy cream ', '2 slices bacon [cut into small pieces ]', '6 cup water ', '1 cup chicken broth ']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 pinch pepper [for taste ]', '1 Tbsp. parsely, chopped ']
Procedure:
['
Heat oil on medium-heat in a soup pot. Cook bacon until brown. Set aside one slice of bacon for garnish.
', '
Add celery, italian seasoning and carrots. Cook mixture for 3-4 minutes.
', '
Stir in split peas and water. Bring mixture to a boil. Then, simmer for 45 minutes. Cool.
', '
Transfer mixture into a blender and process until smooth.
', '
Return mixture into the soup pot. Add chicken broth, Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, heavy cream and pinch of black pepper to taste.
', '
Cook mixture until heated through. Garnish with parsley and chopped bacon.
']

Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.

1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: chili-garlic-butter-prawns
Ingredients: ['10 oz. (300g) prawns, deveined and shelled, butterfly cut', '4 oz. (100g) onions, diced', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 oz. (30g) butter', '1 Tbsp. green onions, chopped']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce', '2.5 fl. ounces (80 ml) water ', '1 tsp. sugar', '½ tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
Sauté onion in 2 Tbsp. oil until fragrant. Add prawns and sauté well.
', '
Add Sauce Mix and simmer until prawns are cooked.
', '
Remove from heat. Add green onions and butter. Stir to melt butter and thicken sauce.
']

Name: banana-with-coconut-lee-kum-kee-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 whole banana, peeled, cut into pieces', '2 Tbsp. butter, unsalted', '4 Tbsp. rum', 'vanilla ice cream (optional)']
Seasoning: ['8 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', '8 oz. coconut milk', '4 Tbsp. brown sugar']
Procedure:
['
Coat bananas with brown sugar.
', '
Heat butter in pan on high heat. Pan-fry bananas until golden brown.
', '
Add rum and cook until wine evaporates. Keep warm.
', '
In a small sauce pan, combine Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce and coconut milk (plum coconut sauce). Bring mixture to a boil then simmer for 2 minutes.
', '
Strain plum coconut sauce and drizzle sauce over cooked bananas.
', '
Serve with vanilla ice cream, as desired.
']

Name: roasted-pork-neck-in-bean-sauce
Ingredients: ['⅛ cup chopped celery   ', '⅛ cup chopped cilantro  ', '1/4 cup cooking wine   ', '1 1/2 lb. pork neck ', '⅛ cup chopped dried green onion']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup  Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '⅛ cup  Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce', '⅛ cup  Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '⅛ cup  lemon juice', '2 Tbsp.  Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', '2 tsp.  cracked black pepper']
Procedure:
['
Rinse the pork neck and slice into 1 cm-thick pieces.
', '
Mix well remaining ingredients and seasoning sauce to create marinade. Add sliced pork neck and marinate 2 hours or overnight.
', '
Preheat oven to 375°F, bake pork neck for about 15 minutes until golden brown and cooked through. Plate and ready to serve.
']

Name: banana-foster
Ingredients: ['4 whole banana, peeled, quartered', '2 cups vanilla ice cream', '4 Tbsp. butter', '4 Tbsp. rum', 'mint (optional)']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce', 'Ground cinnamon (optional) ']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan. Add butter and banana. Cook mixture for 3 minutes.
', '
Stir in rum and Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce. Cook mixture for an additional 2 minutes.
', '
Plate ice cream and top with warm banana. Garnish with mint.
', '
Sprinkle ground cinnamon, if desired.
']

Name: golden-lobster-balls-in-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['5 3/4 oz. lobster tail meat', '3 salted egg yolks (steamed and mashed)', '3½ oz. broccoli  (cut into small pieces)']
Seasoning: [' 1/2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic', ' 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce']
Marinade: ['1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. sugar', '1/2 tsp. ground white pepper']
Procedure:
['
Marinate lobster meat 10 minutes. Heat oil and lightly fry lobster until cooked medium well. Remove from oil and set aside.
', '
Boil broccoli until cooked through. Drain well. Add minced garlic to ½ Tbsp. hot oil and sizzle until fragrant. Add broccoli and lightly sauté. Arrange broccoli on a plate.
', '
Fry salted egg yolks in 1 Tbsp. heated oil until begins to bubble. Add lobster and stir-fry until cooked through. Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce and lightly sauté. Arrange over the broccoli and serve.
']

Name: ramen-with-soybean-sauce
Ingredients: ['14 oz. Japanese ramen', '1 half-boiled egg', '1 lb. pork butt ', '1/4 cup evaporated milk', '4 narutomaki (fish paste), sliced', '4 oz. bamboo shoots, shredded', '2 Tbsp. green onion, chopped', 'Dried seaweed as desired']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon', '4 Tbsp. rice wine', '1/8 cup mirin (sweet rice wine)', '1/2 Tbsp. bonito dashi powder', '10 cups water']
Marinade: ['2 ginger slices', '2 Tbsp. rice wine', '4 Tbsp. mirin (sweet rice wine)', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce', '1/2 cup of water', '1/2 Tbsp. sugar', '1/2 Tbsp. bonito dashi powder']
Procedure:
['
Directions for half-boiled egg: 
Place egg in cold water (room temperature) and boil for 3 minutes.  Remove and rinse with cold water. Cut egg in half.
', '
Directions for Japanese-style BBQ pork:
Cook 1 lb. pork butt in boiling water until fully cooked. Remove and drain.
', '
Directions for Japanese-style BBQ pork:
Heat pan, add ginger, rice wine, mirin, soy sauce, half-cup water, sugar, bonito flakes, and bring to a boil. Turn off heat and marinate pork butt in this mixture for 45 minutes. Remove and bake in oven until slightly golden. Slice and set aside.
', '
Directions for ramen: 
Mix Soup Base Seasoning ingredients and boil 2 minutes. Add evaporated milk to make soup base.
', '
Directions for ramen: 
Cook ramen in boiling water according to package instructions. Drain and ladle into a bowl.  Pour soup base over ramen. Arrange narutomaki slices, bamboo shoots, egg, BBQ pork, and seaweed on top. Sprinkle with green onion. Ready to serve.
']

Name: turkey-and-corn-pie
Ingredients: ['225 g / 8 oz. all-purpose flour', '75 g / 2.65 oz. unsalted butter', '1/3 tsp. salt', '2/3 tsp. sugar', '1/3 tsp. baking powder', '2 egg yolks', '2 Tbsp. water', '1 Tbsp. cooking oil', 'Filling: ', '200 g / 7 oz. cooked turkey meat (diced)', '80 g / 2.8 oz. onions (diced)', '80 g / 2.8 oz. corn kernels', '1 Tbsp. all-purpose flour', '125 ml / 4.2 fl. oz. milk', 'Glaze: 1 beaten egg ']
Seasoning: ['11/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. mustard']
Procedure:
['
Rub butter into flour with fingers until it resembles crumbs. Mix with salt, sugar, baking powder, egg yolks, and just enough water to form dough. Cover dough with plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes.
', '
Saut? onion in 1 Tbsp. oil. Add corn and turkey and mix well. Sprinkle with flour. Add milk and Seasoning Mix slowly. Mix well and let stand to cool.
', '
Remove dough and roll out to 3–5 mm / 0.12-0.2 inch thickness. Cut four 4-inch circles for top and bottom crusts. Cut remaining dough into long strips the width and depth of pie pan, and line two 4-inch pans.
', '
Add filling to the lined pans. Brush rims of pies with egg-wash glaze and top with pastry circles. Slightly press rims to seal.
', '
Brush egg wash on top and bake in a preheated 180 °C (355 °F) oven for 25–30 minutes, until golden.
']

Name: noodles-with-stir-fried-meat-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb Shandong thick noodles ', '1 lb pork belly, diced', ' ½  lb cucumber, shredded', ' ½ lb carrot, shredded ', ' ½ lb  bean sprouts, boiled and drained', '1 Tbsp cornstarch', '1 cup water', ' 4 Tbsp  Oil']
Seasoning: ['1 cup Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '2 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 oz green onion, finely chopped', '1/2 oz ginger, finely chopped', '1/2 oz garlic, finely chopped', '4 Tbsp Wine']
Procedure:
['
Bring 1 gallon of water to a boil, add dried noodles, cook for 6–8 minutes. Cool with cold water. Drain and set aside.
', '
Heat oil in pan, add diced pork, stirring constantly until golden. Add onions, ginger, garlic, and wine, continue to stir-fry for 2 minutes.
', '
Add Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce and Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce, stir-frying over low heat for 5 minutes. Add cornstarch with water and stir until thickened. Top with Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil.
', '
 Place noodles in the bowl. Top noodles with cucumbers, carrots, and bean sprouts, pour meat sauce on top. This dish can be eaten hot or cold.
', '
Stir-fry meat sauce over low heat, otherwise the sauce could easily burn.
', '
This meat sauce can also be used as a dip.
']

Name: sriracha-dip
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '1 cup Mayonnaise', '1 Tbsp. lemon or lime juice ']
Procedure:
['
Combine all ingredients and mix well.
', '
Refrigerate.
', '
Serve chilled
']

Name: pumpkin-muffins-with-lee-kum-kee-plum-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 oz. milk ', '1 tsp. baking soda', '2 tsp. baking powder ', '2 cup flour, sifted ', '1 pkg. muffin cups ', '1 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips ', '1/2 cup oil', '1 whole egg']
Seasoning: ['8 Tbsp. Plum Sauce', '2 cup pumpkin puree ', '1 tsp. vanilla extract ', '1/4 tsp. cinnamon']
Procedure:
['
In a medium mixing bowl, combine pumpkin puree, Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce, oil and beaten egg. Mix well.
', '
Stir in flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, vanilla, milk and chocolate chips. Mix well.
', '
Line cupcake pan with muffin cups. Spoon mixture into muffin cups about 3/4 way to the top.
', '
Place tray in the oven. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes until muffins are done.
']

Name: stewed-beef-with-soybean-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 lb. beef brisket     ', '10 oz. fried bean curd    ', '6 oz. bamboo shoots', '5 pcs. dried Chinese black mushrooms, soaked  ', '5 garlic cloves, whole   ', '4 green onions, chopped  ', '3 Tbsp. oil', '10 cups cold water', '6 cups hot water']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '3 Tbsp. cooking wine', '6 oz. ginger, sliced   ', '2 pcs. star anise', '2 dried red peppers, chopped', '1 pc. cinnamon bark']
Procedure:
['
Cut beef into cubes, rinse with water, drain, and place in pot.
', '
Add cold water, ginger, star anise, cinnamon, 2 green onions, and boil over high heat. Reduce to low heat and simmer 1 hour. (Skim off the froth while boiling.)
', '
In a separate pan, heat oil and stir-fry garlic with remaining 2 green onions. Add these to pot with meat and stir for 2 minutes.
', '
Add cooking wine, Soybean Sauce, Seasoning Soy Sauce, and keep stirring for 2 minutes over medium-low heat.
', '
Add bamboo shoots, mushrooms, and fried bean curd. Add hot water to mixture. Bring to boil, reduce to low heat.
']

Name: seafood-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['6 oz. seafood mix', '2 oz. green peas and diced carrot', '2 eggs, beaten', '2 Tbsp. onion, chopped', '2 Tbsp. green onion, chopped', '1 bowl rice, cooked', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 Tbsp. water']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
Add 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon to seafood mix and marinate for 15 minutes.
', '
Add oil to a heated pan, sauté onion till fragrant, add seafood mix, and stir-fry.
', '
Add eggs into stir-fry and cook till halfway done. Add rice, green peas, carrot, and stir-fry to combine.
', '
Add remaining 1 Tbsp. concentrated chicken bouillon, water, green onion, and stir-fry well. Ready to serve.
', '
Note: 
Mixed seafood is available in supermarkets. Seafood can be replaced with chicken or beef.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']

Name: sriracha-pancake-with-sausage-and-corn
Ingredients: ['1 cup sausage, sliced', '1/2 cup corn kernels', '1/2 cup onions, julienned', '11/4 cup all-purpose flour', '11/2 cup water', '1 cup cabbage, shredded', '1/2 cup carrots, julienned', '1/2 cup cilantro leaves', '2 eggs']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Supreme Soy Sauce', '1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo', '1/2 cup mozzarella cheese', '2 tsp. white pepper powder', '1 tsp. seaweed powder']
Procedure:
['
In a large bowl, whisk flour, water, and eggs until combined. Add rest of ingredients and mix well. Stir in Lee Kum Kee Supreme Soy Sauce and white pepper powder.
', '
Divide the mixture into two portions to make two pancakes.
', '
Put oil into a heated pan and add one portion. Using a spatula, flatten and shape pancake until about 3/4" thick—approximately 10-11" wide.
', '
Pan-fry pancake over low heat until golden brown. Flip pancake and pan-fry until second side is golden brown. Repeat for second pancake.
', '
Spread mozzarella over pancakes until melted. Place the pancakes on a plate, drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo, and sprinkle with seaweed powder. Ready to serve.
']

Name: stir-fried-beef-with-asparagus
Ingredients: ['1 lb beef steaks, cut into strips', '2 tsp. corn starch ', '4 oz asparagus, cut into 2-in length pcs', '2 Tbsp. oil ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine 1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, cornstarch and beef (oyster sauce mixture). Mix well.
', '
Heat oil in a medium-sized pan. Stir-fry beef for 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in asparagus with oyster sauce mixture.
', '
Cook beef mixture for an additional 2 minutes. Serve over steamed rice.
']

Name: macaroni-with-ham
Ingredients: ['1 lb. macaroni', '8 oz. ham, diced', '8 oz. mixed peas and carrots', '12 cups water']
Seasoning: ['6 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
Procedure:
['
Boil macaroni in water until soft. Rinse with cold water. Drain and set aside.
', '
Boil 12 cups water. Add Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon, peas and carrots, ham, and cooked macaroni last. Lower heat, simmer briefly, and ready to serve.
']

Name: chinese-buns-with-sliced-pork-belly
Ingredients: ['1 ⅛ cups warm water', '1 Tbsp. yeast powder', '1 lb. all-purpose flour', '1 lb. pork belly', '1 star anise pod', '2 green onions', '1 piece cinnamon bark', '4 cups hot water', 'Sesame seeds as desired', '1 bunch cilantro']
Seasoning: ['12 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoning Soy Sauce', '2 Tbsp. cooking wine', '1 Tbsp. Sugar']
Procedure:
['
In warm water, dissolve sugar, add yeast, and slowly stir in all-purpose flour. Stir flour mixture while pouring water to make dough. Set aside and let rise for 1 hour.\xa0
', '
Soak pork belly in cold water. Rinse and cut into cubes. Sauté in a pan till golden brown, add cooking wine, 8 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce, all the Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce, and sauté over low heat. Add star anise, cinnamon, and hot water, and bring to boil. Turn down to low heat and braise for 1 hour. Drain and let cool. Chop pork belly into pieces and mix with green onion, cilantro, and remaining 4 Tbsp. of Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce. Set aside.
', '
Divide the risen dough into 8 pieces, rolling each piece to a 1 cm thickness. Sprinkle sesame seeds on the top and bake in a pan on the top of stove over medium heat until done.
', '
Slice open the buns and place sliced pork belly inside.
']

Name: squid-and-onion-hot-pot-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['400 g squid (fresh or frozen), cut into rings', '1 pc onion, thinly sliced ', '50 g carrot, shredded', '1 stalk celery, thinly sliced  ', '4 pcs shiitake mushroom, thinly sliced']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce  ', '1/2 tsp. salt ', 'white pepper, to taste', '4 Tbsp. white wine or chicken broth']
Procedure:
['
In a pot of boiling water, blanch squid until cooked. Drain.
', '
In a medium heated sauce pot, with 2 Tbsp. of cooking oil, saute seasoning mix until fragrant.  Add onion, carrot, celery, black mushrooms and squid. Stir well.
', '
Pour in white wine or chicken broth. Cover and bring to a boil for about 3 minutes until sauce thickens.
']

Name: braised-ox-tail-with-red-wine
Ingredients: ['Ox tail 500 g [sectioned]', 'Carrot (s) 120 g [cut into pieces]', 'Celery 90 g [cut into pieces]', 'Onion(s) 1/2 pc [cut into pieces]', 'Red wine 60 ml', 'Bay leaves 2 pcs [dried]', 'Tomato paste 2 tbsp']
Seasoning: ['Parsley [chopped, for topping]']
Marinade: ['Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce 4 tbsp', 'Water 2 Cup', 'Red wine 150 ml', 'Sugar 1 tsp']
Procedure:
['
Blanch ox tail in boiling water.  Drain.
', '
Saute tomato paste in 3 tbsp oil.  Add carrot, celery, onion, bay leaves and ox tail.
', '
Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.  Stir in sauce mix.  Cover and cook on low heat for about 1 1/2 hours until ox tail becomes tender.
', '
Stir in red wine and cook for 10 more minutes.  Put on a serving plate.
', '
Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
']

Name: stir-fried-chicken-and-pine-nuts
Ingredients: ['300 g chicken meat [cut into strips]', '90 g celery [cut into strips]', '50 g carrot (s) [cut into strips]', '50 g pine nuts ', '1/2 pc chili [red, cut into strips]']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Sesame Oil (Pure) ', '1/2 tsp. corn starch', '1 tsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ']
Sauce Mix: ['2 Tbsp. Sweet Soy Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. water ', '1 1/2 tsp. corn starch ']
Procedure:
['
Mix chicken with marinade.
', '
Parboil celery and carrot in boiling water. Drain.
', '
Stir-fry pine nuts in 2 Tbsp. oil until golden yellow. Set aside.
', '
Saute red chili in remaining oil. Add chicken and stir-fry until done. Add celery, carrot, sauce mix and heat through. Stir in pine nuts.
']

Name: stir-fried-pork-and-pine-nuts-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['300 g pork fillet/loin [diced]', '50 g nuts ', '1 pc bell pepper (s) [diced]', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 tsp. minced garlic']
Marinade: ['2 tsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Pure Sesame Oil ', '1/2 tsp. corn starch ']
Sauce Mix: ['4 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '5 Tbsp. water', '1 tsp. corn starch']
Procedure:
['
 Mix pork with marinade.
', '
Stir-fry pine nuts in 2 Tbsp. oil until golden yellow. Set aside.
', '
Saute minced garlic in remaining oil.
', '
Add pork and stir-fry until done.
', '
Add bell pepper, sauce mix and heat through.
', '
Stir in pine nuts.
']

Name: stir-fried-scallop-and-asparagus-with-black-bean-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['350 g scallop (s) ', '120 g asparagus [sliced]', '25 g carrot (s) [thinly sliced]', '1/2 pc chili [red, cut into pieces]']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Black Bean Garlic Sauce ', '1/2 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Blanch scallop in boiling water.  Drain.
', '
Saute red chili in 2 Tbsp. oil until fragrant.  Add asparagus, carrot and stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in scallop, seasoning mix and heat through.
']

Name: noodles-in-beijing-style
Ingredients: ['200 g Shanghai thick noodles [cooked]', '50 g pork [sliced]', '50 g shrimp(s) [meat, deveined]', '50 g broccoli [cut into pieces]', '25 g bamboo shoots [sliced]', '4 pcs wood fungus [dried and soaked, optional]', '4 pcs Chinese mushroom(s) [soaked]', '1 pc egg (s) [beaten]', '1 tsp. minced ginger']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp. corn starch', '1 tsp. cooking wine ', 'white Pepper to taste', '1 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 tsp Sesame Oil (Pure)', '500 ml stock', '1 1/2 Tbsp. corn starch ']
Procedure:
['
Mix pork with marinade.
', '
Place cooked noodles in serving bowls.  Keep warm.
', '
Heat 2 Tbsp oil.  Saute minced ginger till fragrant.
', '
Add shrimps, pork, bamboo shoots, broccoli, wood fungus and Chinese mushrooms, stir-fry for a while.
', '
Stir in beaten egg. Pour over noodles and serve.
']

Name: scrambled-egg-white-with-xo-sauce
Ingredients: ['300 g Iceberg lettuce [drained]', '4 pcs egg white ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. XO Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. corn starch', '1 Tbsp. oil ', '1/4 tsp. salt', '1/4 tsp. sugar ', '100 ml fresh milk ']
Procedure:
['
Cook lettuce in boiling water .  Drain and put on a serving  plate.  Keep warm.
', '
Add seasoning mix to egg whites.  Beat well.
', '
Pour egg whites into 3 tbsp oil while oil is just warm.
', '
Scramble quickly until egg whites are just set.
', '
Put on top of lettuce.
']

Name: plum-flavored-steamed-spare-ribs
Ingredients: ['1.5 lbs. ribs (spare ribs, short ribs, etc.)   ', '1 Tbsp. ginger, minced    ', '1 Tbsp. garlic, minced   ', '1 Tbsp. green onion, diced (white part only)   ', '1 Tbsp. green onion, chopped    ', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch or potato starch ']
Seasoning: ['1/2 cup Lee Kum Kee Plum and Soybean Sauce for spare ribs ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 tsp. sugar     ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Cut apart ribs, rinse, drain, and place into a big bowl. Add rest of ingredients (except chopped green onion) and mix well. Marinate for about 1 hour.
', '
Set the marinated ribs on a plate and steam the whole thing at high heat for about 20 minutes till well done.
', '
Sprinkle with chopped green onion, mix evenly, and serve.
', '
If you would prefer fish, substitute flounder in place of ribs. The rest of ingredients stay the same.
', '
Do not remove the lid while steaming or it will not cook through.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: soybean-pork-dumplings
Ingredients: ['1 lb. flour    ', '12 oz. ground pork     ', '6 oz. cabbage, chopped and squeezed of moisture    ', '10 oz. water     ', '1 oz. green onion, chopped', '1/2 oz. ginger, chopped']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. oil', '1 Tbsp. Pepper']
Procedure:
['
Place ground pork and Seasonings in a big bowl. Add ginger, pepper, and stir clockwise until mixed thoroughly. Slowly add 2 oz. water until combined completely.
', '
Add green onion and cabbage, mix completely, and set aside.
', '
In a separate bowl, add remaining 8 oz. water to flour and knead into dough. Set aside for 20 minutes before rolling out.
', '
Cut dough into 48 small pieces. Flatten each piece and use rolling pin to create circular dumpling wrappers. Place 1 Tbsp. filling on each wrapper, pinch edges together to form dumpling.
', '
Tips:
1.  For better flavor, add a little sesame oil and cooking wine to soybean sauce, steam for 12 minutes before mixing with ground pork. 

', '
Tips:
2.  Adding green onion prematurely will change flavor.

']

Name: colorful-sheet-jelly
Ingredients: ['8 oz. sheet jelly (a gelatin-sheet pasta from beans or sweet potatoes)', '3 oz. cucumber, julienned', '1 beaten egg', '2 oz. black fungus, soaked and julienned', '1 handful enoki mushrooms', '3 oz. carrot, julienned', '1 tsp. cooking oil']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Seasoned Soy Sauce for Seafood', '1 Tbsp. sesame sauce', '1 Tbsp. vinegar', '1 Tbsp. sugar', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soybean Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soup Base for Sichuan Hot & Spicy Hot Pot', 'Dash of water as needed']
Procedure:
['
Heat pan, add oil and coat pan evenly with paper towel. Pour beaten egg into hot pan and cook until golden, then flip over. Julienne the cooked egg and set aside.
', '
Boil the enoki mushrooms until soft, drain, and set aside. Boil sheet jelly until soft, cut into strips, and set aside.
', '
Place sheet jelly in center of plate, surrounded by five colors of ingredients.
', '
Dilute Seasonings with dash of water and pour over dish. Ready to serve.
', '
Tip: For better flavor, add a little sesame oil and cooking wine to soybean sauce, and steam for 12 minutes before pouring over dish.
']

Name: stir-fried-pasta
Ingredients: ['120 g spiral pasta', '120 g chicken meat [shredded]', '120 g celery [sliced thinly]', '25 g carrot (s) [sliced thinly]']
Seasoning: ['White pepper to taste']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. water ', '1 Tbsp. white wine ', '1 tsp. corn starch']
Procedure:
['
Cook pasta in boiling water according to packet instructions or until tender.  Drain.
', '
Stir-fry chicken in 2 Tbsp. oil until done.
', '
Add celery, carrot, sauce mix and stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in pasta and heat through.
']

Name: pan-fried-beef-ribs
Ingredients: ['300 g beef rib (s) [cut into pieces]', '1/2 pc bell pepper (s) [Green, shredded]', '1/2 pc bell pepper (s) [Red, shredded]', '1/2 pc onion(s) [shredded]', '2 pcs shallots [sliced]']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. sesame oil (pure) ', '1 tsp. cooking wine ', '1 tsp. corn starch ', '1/2 tsp. sugar ', '2 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce', '1 Tbsp. honey', '2 tsp. water', '1/2 tsp. corn starch ']
Procedure:
['
Mix beef ribs with marinade.
', '
Pan-fry beef ribs in 2 Tbsp oil until done.  Drain.
', '
Stir-fry shallots, onion and bell peppers for about 1 minute in the remaining oil.
', '
Add beef ribs, sauce mix and heat through.
']

Name: orange-chicken-fried-rice
Ingredients: ['120 g chicken meat, diced', 'Green peas', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', 'Apple', 'Raisins', 'Seasoning mix', '350 g cooked rice', '½ pc orange, peeled and diced', '½ pc green bell pepper, diced', '½ pc red bell pepper, diced']
Marinade: ['1/2 tsp Lee Kum Kee Chicken Boullion Powder  ', '1/2 tsp Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce  ', '1/2 tsp corn starch ', '1/4 tsp salt ', '1/4 tsp sugar ', '1 tsp Lee Kum Kee Chicken Boullion Powder  ', '1 Tbsp fresh orange juice ']
Procedure:
['
In a bowl, marinate chicken with marinade mix. Set aside.
', '
In a heated wok, stir-fry chicken meat and green peas in 2 Tbsp. oil until done.
', '
Add cooked rice, orange, apple, raisins and seasoning mix.  Stir well until heated through.
']

Name: pork-chop-with-apple-sauce
Ingredients: ['400 g [4 pcs] pork chop (s) ', '2 pcs strawberries [cut into pieces]']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1/2 Tbsp. Sesame Oil (Pure) ', '1/2 Tbsp. corn starch ', '1 1/2 Tbsp. sugar ', '125 ml water', '1/2 pcs grated Apple ', '1 1/2 tsp. lime Juice ', '1 tsp. corn starch ']
Procedure:
['
Mix pork chop with marinade.
', '
Pan-fry pork chop in 2 Tbsp. oil until golden yellow and done.  Drain and put on a serving plate.
', '
Heat through sauce mix and stir in strawberries.  Pour on pork chop.
']

Name: sriracha-chicken-salad
Ingredients: ['1 whole chicken, (about 3-4 lb) ', '1/2 cup red onion, thinly sliced, soaked in ice water for 15 min, drained well', '1/2 cup coriander leaves (cilantro), rough chopped', '1 /4 head green cabbage, cut into 2-4 wedges ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. lime zest, finely grated ', '6 Tbsp. lime juice, fresh ', '2 tsp. black peppercorns, coarsely ground ', '1 Tbsp. Thai plum sugar (or light brown sugar)  ', '2 Tbsp. oil ', '1 Tbsp. rice powder, roasted (optional) ', '2 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1-2 Tbsp. Fine Chili Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Buy a pre-roasted chicken and pull off the meat into bite-sized strip or poach a chicken in a 2-gallon (8-liter) pot, add enough water to cover the chicken. Bring to a vigorous boil; then lower the heat to simmer. Skim off any impurities that rise to the surface; simmer 15 minutes. Remove the pot from the heat; cover it. Allow it to rest at room temperature for 45 minutes, until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165F (75C).
', '
Carefully lift the chicken from the poaching liquid and plunge it into ice water. Leave in the water for 10 minutes (this stops the cooking and firms up the meat). Pull off the skin and discard. Pull the meat from the breast, thighs, and legs, tearing it into bite-sized strips; set aside 1 lb (500 g) for the salad, save the remaining meat for another use.
', '
Transfer to a covered container and reserve in the refrigerator. (Save the poaching liquid (broth) for Thai curries or other recipes!)
', '
Prepare the Chili-Lime Dressing by whisking all the ingredients in a large bowl.
', '
Toss the onions, chicken, and coriander leaves into the dressing and mix it well. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt, pepper, sugar, and fresh lime juice.
', '
Serve the salad in a large bowl or on a plate surrounded with the cabbage wedges. The wedges are meant for snacking on with the salad, adding a refreshing crunchy texture and slightly sweet taste.
']

Name: dumplings-with-dipping-sauce
Ingredients: ['200 g ground pork ', '50 g Chinese chive(s), diced', '24 pcs dumpling wrappers ', '1 tsp. green onion(s) [for topping]']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil [for topping]', '4 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bullion Powder  [for stock]', '1 L hot water [for stock]']
Marinade: ['1½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Bean Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Sauce  ', '1 Tbsp. corn starch ', '1 tsp. sugar']
Procedure:
['
Marinate ground pork. Stir in chives and divide the pork into 24 portions.
', '
Wrap the filling with wrappers and form into dumplings.
', '
Cook dumplings in a large pot of boiling water for about 5 minutes or until done. Drain.
', '
Serve with stock and top with diced green onion and sesame oil.
']

Name: steamed-salmon-with-basil
Ingredients: ['400 g salmon [fillet, 2pcs]', '1 Tbsp. bell pepper (s) [chopped]', '1 Tbsp. shallots  [chopped]']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 tsp. Pure Sesame Oil', '1 Tbsp. chopped dried basil ', '2 tsp. corn starch ', 'Pepper to taste']
Procedure:
['
Mix salmon with marinade.
', '
Put salmon on a piece of oiled foil. Sprinkle with bell pepper and shallot. Wrap up to form a packet and steam over high heat for about 10 minutes or until done.
', '
N/A
']

Name: spicy-stir-fried-noodles
Ingredients: ['6 oz. pork fillet (sliced) ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '5 oz. mixed vegetables ', '7 oz. cooked noodles ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chiu Chow Chili Oil ']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Marinate pork fillets strips in 1 Tbsp premium Oyster Flavored sauce for 10 minutes.
', '
Stir-fry pork in hot oil over medium heat for 5 minutes or until done.
', '
Add mixed vegetables and cooked noodles to the wok with the remaining sauces and stir-fry for 3-5 minutes more or until heated through.
']

Name: spicy-stir-fried-chicken-and-bok-choy-with-crispy-noodle-cake
Ingredients: ['about 1 1/4 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breasts, trimmed of excess fat, tenderloins removed and halved lengthwise, breasts cut crosswise into 1/2-inch strips', '12 oz. fresh Chinese egg noodles (about the thickness of spaghetti)', 'Thin-sliced scallions, white and light green parts sliced thin, dark green parts sliced thin on the bias for garnish', '4 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', 'about 1 lb. large head bok choy, stalks and greens separated, stalks cut crosswise into 1/4-inch slices and greens cut into 1/2-inch strips']
Seasoning: ['2 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce', '1 /4 cup Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. minced fresh garlic', '1 tsp. table salt ']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. dry sherry ']
Procedure:
['
 Bring 3 quarts water to boil over high heat in stockpot. Meanwhile, combine chicken, 1 Tbsp soy sauce, and 1 Tbsp sherry in small bowl; set aside to marinate. Mix together hoisin, chili sauce, and remaining 1 1/2 Tbsp each soy sauce and sherry in small bowl; set aside while preparing noodles.
', '
Add noodles and salt to boiling water; cook noodles until just tender(do not overcook), 2 to 3 minutes. Drain thoroughly, then toss with white and light green parts of scallions.
', '
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in 12" nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering, about 2 minutes. Spread noodles evenly across bottom of skillet; press with spatula to flatten and cook until crisp and golden brown, about 4 minutes. Slide noodle cake onto large plate. Add 1 Tbsp. oil to skillet, swirl to coat. Invert noodle cake onto second plate and slide it, browned-side up, back into skillet. Cook until golden brown on second side, about 4 minutes. Slide noodle cake onto cutting board; set aside.
', '
Add 1 Tbsp oil to skillet; heat oil over medium-high heat until just beginning to smoke. Pour off excess liquid from chicken and add chicken to skillet; stir-fry until just cooked, about 2 minutes. Transfer chicken to small clean bowl.
', '
Add remaining 1 Tbsp oil to skillet; heat oil over medium-high heat until just beginning to smoke. Add bok choy stalks and stir-fry 1 minute. Clear center of the pan, add ginger, and cook until fragrant, about 10 seconds, then stir ginger into stalks; continue to stir-fry until stalks are tender-crisp, about 20 seconds longer. Stir in bok choy greens, chicken, and hoisin mixture; cook until greens are wilted and ingredients are coated with sauce, about 30 seconds. Set skillet aside off heat.
', '
Cut noodle cake into 8 wedges. Place 2 wedges on each of the 4 plates; spoon portion of stir-fry and sauce over noodle cake, sprinkle with scallion greens, and serve immediately.
']

Name: ramen-in-all-purpose-marinade-with-herbs
Ingredients: ['2 packets (14 oz) ready-to-eat Japanese ramen', '2.5 oz shredded cucumber ', '2.5 oz drained canned whole kernel corn', '2 oz crab roes ', '1 shredded fried egg sheet ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee All Purpose Marinade with Herbs ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
Blanch Japanese ramen in boiling water.
', '
Take out and soak in iced water until cold.
', '
Drain and arrange on a serving bowl.
', '
Arrange cucumber, kernel corn, crab roes and egg shreds on Japanese ramen.
', '
Chill in refrigerator until cold.
']

Name: singapore-chili-stir-fried-shrimp
Ingredients: ['1 lb. jumbo shrimp (21-25 count), peeled and deveined ', '1 tsp. cornstarch ', '2 Tbsp. peanut oil or vegetable oil ']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce', '2 Tsp. Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce ', 'about 1 Tbsp. scallions, white and light green parts, minced', '2 Tbsp. scallion greens, sliced thin, reserved 2 -3', 'about 2 tsp. minced or 2 medium jalapeno chiles, seeded', 'about 2 tsp. minced or 2 medium cloves garlic', 'about 2 tsp. minced or 1/2" fresh ginger, peeled ', '1 /4 cup Tomato juice ', '3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Chili Sauce ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce ', '1 /2 tsp. granulated sugar ']
Marinade: ['1 Tbsp. dry sherry ', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Toss shrimp with sherry and soy sauce in medium bowl; set aside to marinate 10 minutes. Combine minced scallion, jalapenos, garlic, and ginger in small bowl; set aside. Stir together tomato juice, chili sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and cornstarch in small bowl or measuring cup; set aside.
', '
Heat 12-inch skillet over high heat until hot, 3 to 4 minutes. Add shrimp and cook, stirring every 10 seconds, until just opaque, about 1 minute. Push shrimp to sides of skillet, clearing a spot in the center of the pan. Add remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and scallion mixture to clearing and mash with spoon; cook until fragrant, 10 to 15 seconds, then stir mixture into shrimp. Remix tomato juice mixture and stir into skillet; cook until sauce has thickened, 30 to 45 seconds. Transfer to serving plate, sprinkle with reserved scallion greens, and serve.
', '
N/A
']

Name: spicy-scallops-with-sriracha-mayo
Ingredients: ['18 pcs scallops in shell ', '4 Tbsp. condensed milk ', '4 Tbsp. chopped cilantro stalks ', 'Green onions diced for garnish ']
Seasoning: ['1/4 cup Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo ', '3 Tbsp. lemon juice ', '2 Tsp. cracked black pepper ']
Procedure:
['
Rinse scallops. Grill them with closed lid for 5 minutes till they start to open a little. Use knife to pry open all the way and separate shells. Set aside.
', '
In a bowl, mix Lee Kum Kee Sriracha Mayo evenly with all other ingredients, then put sauce on scallops (the full half-shell) and place them on a baking tray.
', '
Put the scallops in oven and bake at Broil setting for 3 minutes till golden brown o the surface. Garnish with green onions.
']

Name: roasted-stuffed-turkey-roll
Ingredients: ['1 turkey breast (about 1200 g/2.5 lbs.)', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '2 cloves garlic, chopped', '3 shallots, chopped', '250 g (8.8 oz.) assorted mushrooms, chopped', '¼ cup  white wine/vodka', '100 g (3.5 oz.) spinach leaves, chopped', '40 g (1.5 oz.) rolled oats', '1 Tbsp. flour']
Marinade: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Char Siu Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard']
Procedure:
['
Horizontally halve the turkey breast. Pound with the back of a knife or meat mallet to obtain two evenly sized flat pieces. Rub the turkey with Marinade.

', '
In a pan, using 1 Tbsp. oil, saute garlic and shallots, add mushrooms, and stir-fry well. Drizzle wine.  Add spinach and toss well with rolled oats to form the filling.
', '
Sprinkle some flour onto both sides of meat, arrange filling on top, roll and tie up. Repeat this step to make another roll.

', '
Pan-fry the meat rolls in 1 Tbsp. oil until golden. Bake in a preheated oven at 180C/350F for 20 minutes until cooked through. Cut into slices to serve.
']

Name: quinoa-stir-fry-with-shrimp-and-vegetables-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 cup uncooked red quinoa ', '1 Tbsp. canola oil ', '1 lb. large shrimp, cleaned and peeled  ', '1 medium sized yellow pepper, diced ', '3/4 small medium sized onion, sliced  ', '1 cup shelled frozen edamame ', '1 cup sugar snap peas (fresh or frozen)  ']
Seasoning: ['3/4 cup fresh orange juice ', '2 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce  ', '2 Tbsp. orange zest ', '2 Tbsp. water ', 'about 2 Tbsp. fresh grated ginger (2" piece) ', '1 1/2 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '1 Tbsp. Less Sodium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. spicy brown mustard ', '1/4 tsp. red pepper flakes ']
Procedure:
['
For the quinoa: Place 1 cup of quinoa and 2 cups of water in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, simmer and cover, until all the water is absorbed, about 15 minutes. Fluff with a fork.
', '
In a medium bowl, whisk together orange juice, oyster sauce, orange zest, water, grated ginger, cornstarch, soy sauce, mustard, and red pepper flakes until smooth.
', '
Heat canola oil in a large wok or fry pan over high heat. Add the shrimp and cook until heated through, tossing continuously, for 2 minutes. Remove shrimp from the wok or fry pan onto a separate plate.
', '
Add the yellow pepper, onion, edamame, and sugar snap peas to the hot wok or fry pan. Cook until vegetables are tender, but crisp, about 3 minutes, tossing continuously.
', '
Add the sauce into the wok or fry pan with the vegetables and toss to evenly incorporate, about 1 minute. Add the shrimp and continue cooking until the sauce thickens, about an additional minute.
', '
Add the cooked quinoa and mix to incorporate. Serve warm.
']

Name: grilled-fish-fillets-with-lee-kum-kee-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 pound fish fillets or fish steaks , frozen and thawed ']
Seasoning: ['1/2 teaspoon black pepper , coarse ', '1 teaspoon lime juice ', '1 teaspoon green onion , chopped ', '4 Tablespoons Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 Tablespoons Hoisin Sauce ', '1 Tablespoon Sesame Oil (Pure) ']
Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except fish. Set aside.
', '
Grill fish on high heat for 2 minutes on each side.
', '
Drizzle sauce over fish. Serve with steamed vegetables.
']

Name: pulled-pork-with-oyster-sauce
Ingredients: ['5 lb. pork butt (shoulder cut) with bone (or 31/2 lb. pork butt without bone) ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Oyster Flavored Sauce', '1 Tbsp. garlic powder ', '1 Tbsp. onion powder ', '2 Tbsp. black pepper, freshly ground ', '2 Tbsp. smoked paprika ']
Procedure:
['
Place pork on a large plate. Brush oyster sauce over all sides.
', '
In a small bowl combine paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
', '
Sprinkle and rub the spice mixture evenly over all sides of the pork.
', '
Cover and refrigerator for at least 3 hours or overnight.
', '
To cook, place pork in a slow cooker and set to low. Cook until pork tender, about 9 hours.
', '
Pour off juices into a small bowl, and strain out any visible fat. Pour juices back into the slow cooker and using two forks pull the pork apart. Ready to serve.
']

Name: pineapple-pork-kabobs-with-lee-kum-kee-premium-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. baby spinach', '2 Tbsp. olive oil ', '4 oz. button mushroom (s)  [removed ends]', '1 lb. pork tenderloin, cut into 1" cubes', '2 oz. red bell pepper, cut into 1" cubes', '1 tsp. sugar', '4 cups rice pilaf, cooked according to direction', '4 oz. pineapple [canned, cut into 1" cubes]', '4 pcs. skewers [soaked in water]', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil ']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chili Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Sautee spinach with 2 Tbsp. cooking oil. Drizzle with Lee Kum Kee Premium Soy Sauce. Cook mixture until spinach is cooked. Keep warm and set aside.
', '
In a small mixing bowl, combine 2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Premium Oyster Flavored Sauce, 1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce, sugar and 1 Tbsp. olive oil (Premium Oyster Sauce mixture).
', '
Marinate pork with premium oyster sauce mixture for 30 minutes.
', '
Thread meat, vegetables and fruit on a skewer alternately. Grill pork kabobs until fully cooked.
', '
Serve with rice pilaf and baby spinach.
']

Name: pineapple-teriyaki-burgers
Ingredients: ['6 pcs. lettuce, tomato, onion, for serving ', '1 can pineapple, rings ', '1-1/2  lb. ground beef, lean ', '6 pcs. buns, whole grain ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Teriyaki Sauce ', '1 pinch salt and pepper ', '1/3 cup mayonnaise ', '1-1/2 tsp. wasabi, paste ']
Procedure:
['
Set up grill for direct cooking over high heat. Oil grill when ready to start cooking.
', '
In a mixing bowl, stir to combine ground beef, Panda Brand Teriyaki Sauce, and crushed pineapple.
', '
Form 6 patties slightly larger than bun. Gently press pineapple rings inton the top of burgers.
', '
Season burgers with salt and pepper and place on grilled pineapple, side down. Cook 8 minutes per side for medium done consistency.
', '
Mix together mayonnaise, wasabi, and Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce (wasabi mayonnaise). Serve hot on toasted buns with lettuce, tomato, onions, and wasabi mayonnaise.
', '
INDOORS: Follow instructions for preparing burgers. Preheat broiler. Place burgers pineapple side up on wire rack over foil lined baking sheet or broiler pan. Broil 6 inches from heat source for 4 to 5 minutes per side for medium.
']

Name: shrimp-and-chicken-noodle-soup
Ingredients: ['8 oz. shrimp, deveined and shelled, butterfly cut', '8 oz. chicken breast, sliced into strips', '4 oz. bok choy, halved', '4 oz. bean sprouts', '4 oz. linguini, cooked', '2 Tbsp. green onions, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp. Chicken Bouillon Powder', '4 cups water', '2 tsp. sugar', '2 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil ']
Procedure:
['
In a medium saucepan, combine Chili Garlic Sauce, Chicken Bouillon Powder, water and sugar, bring to a boil.
', '
Add in chicken and shrimp and cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Pour in bok choy and bean sprouts.
', '
Serve by pouring over a bowl of cooked linguine. Garnish with a few dashes of Sesame Oil and green onions.
']

Name: steamed-broccoli-with-hoisin-chicken
Ingredients: ['1 bundle broccoli, stems thinly sliced and the top cut into large florets ', '4 pcs chicken breast , boneless, skinless, cut in halves ']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper ', '3/4 cup Panda Brand Hoisin Sauce ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 400°F and spray baking dish with cooking spray.
', '
Place chicken into baking dish and season with salt and pepper. Pour Panda Brand Hoisin Sauce over the chicken and turn the chicken to coat evenly. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until fully cooked.
', '
In a separate skillet on medium heat, pour in about an inch of water and bring to a boil. Place the broccoli stems in a bamboo or collapsable steamer. Set steamer over the boiling water, cover, and cook 2 to 3 minutes.
', '
Add in florets and continue to cook until vegetables are crisp tender and bright green. Season with the salt and pepper.
', '
Divide the chicken and broccoli among 4 plates and serve.
']

Name: spicy-squash-soup
Ingredients: ['4 Tbsp. butter ', '4 Tbsp. flour ', '1 small onion, small dice', '1 lb. squash, butternut, peeled, small dice', '1/2 cup heavy cream ', '1 tsp. parsley, chopped ', '1 oz. croutons ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Hoisin Sauce ', '2 tsp. curry powder ', '4 cups chicken broth ']
Procedure:
['
In a medium heated saucepot, melt butter and stir in flour with a wooden spoon. Continue to stir for 3-5 minutes until golden brown.
', '
Add onion, squash, Chili Garlic Sauce, Hoisin Sauce and curry powder. Cook mixture for 3 minutes while stirring.
', '
Stir in chicken broth. Bring mixture to a boil and then simmer until squash is tender. Cool and purée with blender.
', '
Add heavy cream and cook squash mixture until heated through.
', '
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with croutons.
']

Name: soy-broccoli-salad-with-panda-brand-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 stalks broccoli, cut into florets (8 cups of florets) ', '1 cup olive oil ', '1 head garlic, peeled (about 16 cloves) ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 tsp. Panda Brand Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. salt, kosher ']
Procedure:
['
Place the garlic cloves and oil in a small heavy-bottomed saucepan. Bring to a boil and cook uncovered over low heat for 10 to 15 minutes, until the garlic is browned and tender. Turn off the heat and add the Panda Brand™ Chili Garlic Sauce and 1/2 tsp. salt. Immediately pour mixture into a container. Allow to cool to room temperature.
', '
For the salad, blanch the broccoli florets in a large pot of boiling salted water for 2 to 3 minutes, until crisp-tender. Drain well and immerse immediately into a large bowl of ice water until the broccoli is cooled. This process stops the cooking and sets the bright green color. Drain well.
', '
In a large bowl, toss the broccoli with 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1/4 cup of the oil used to cook the garlic, the Panda Brand™ Premium Soy Sauce, and 8 or more cloves of cooked garlic.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']
