Name: pumpkin-au-gratin-with-lee-kum-kee-panda-brand-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 lbs. pumpkin, skin removed and cut into thin slices ', '2 oz. mozzarella cheese, shredded ']
Seasoning: ['1 tsp. garlic, minced ', '4 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 pint heavy cream ']
Procedure:
['
Combine heavy cream, garlic, and Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce in a mixing bowl. Mix well.
', "
Place the pumpkin slices in a 9 x 7-inch baker's dish.
", '
Pour mixture over the pumpkin slices. Marinate for 30 minutes.
', '
Cover and bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.
', '
Remove cover and sprinkle cheese on top.
', '
Bake for another 10 minutes until cheese has melts.
']

Name: shrimp-and-scallop-chowder
Ingredients: ['5 oz. fish fillets or fish steaks, cut into ½-inch pieces ', '5 oz. scallops, jumbo sized, cut into halves ', '6 oz. shrimp, peeled and deveined ', '1/3 cup celery, cut into ½-inch pieces ', '4 Tbsp. flour ', '2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped ', '1/2 cup onions, chopped ', '2 cups chicken broth ', '1 Tbsp. vegetable oil ', '4 Tbsp. butter ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '3 cloves garlic, minced ', '4 oz. heavy cream ', '1 pinch black pepper ']
Procedure:
['
In a medium sauce pan, combine butter and flour. Cook mixture on medium heat for 3 minutes while stirring (flour mixture).
', '
Add onion, garlic and celery into flour mixture. Cook for another 2 minutes.
', '
Add in the remainder of the ingredients. Bring mixture to a boil and then simmer for 3 minutes. Serve hot.
']

Name: pumpkin-beef-stew
Ingredients: ['2 cups pumpkin, cut into small cubed pieces ', '1/2 cup celery, chopped ', '2 cups green beans, snip ends, cut into 1-inch length pieces ', '1/2 cup onion, chopped ', '8 oz. chicken broth ', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, for cooking ', '8 oz. beef flank steak, cut into cubes ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ', '2 oz. sherry, dry ', '1 tsp. garlic, minced ', '1 tsp. ginger, finely chopped ']
Procedure:
['
Heat vegetable oil in pan on medium heat.
', '
Then add beef and cook until browned. Set aside.
', '
In the same pan, add in ginger and garlic. Cook briefly for one minute.
', '
Add the beef and the remainder of ingredients to the pan.
', '
Bring mixture to a boil. Then simmer until pumpkin and beef are tender.
']

Name: portobello-hoisin-mayonnaise-sandwich
Ingredients: ['2 slices provolone cheese ', '2 pcs. portobello mushroom, use brush to remove excess dirt ', '1 whole tomato, cut into rounds ', '1 small onion, cut into rounds ', '4 slices sourdough bread ']
Seasoning: ['1/2 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce ', '1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste ', '2 Tbsp. mayonnaise ', '2 Tbsp. olive oil ']
Procedure:
['
In a small mixing bowl, combine mayonnaise and Hoisin Sauce. Mix well and refrigerate until ready to use.
', '
Season Portobello mushroom with salt and pepper.
', '
Drizzle olive oil on mushroom and grill with onion until cooked.
', '
Assemble sandwich using Portobello mushroom and remainder ingredients.
']

Name: stir-fried-chicken-and-vegetable-rice-bowl
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '4 oz. green beans, 1/2-inch pieces', '8 oz. chicken breast, small dice', '2 oz. button mushrooms, quartered', '1 whole red bell pepper, deseeded, small dice', '2 cups cooked rice, keep warm']
Seasoning: ['1 1/2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce', '1 tsp. sugar', '1 pinch black pepper, to taste']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan, add oil and stir fry green beans and chicken until cooked.
', '
Add Black Bean Garlic Sauce and sugar
', '
Toss in remaining ingredients, except rice.
', '
Serve over steamed rice.
']

Name: shredded-tuna-salad
Ingredients: ['8 oz. tuna, canned, drained ', '8 oz. mixed green salad, washed and drained ', '4 oz. noodles, crispy, pre-packaged ', '1 whole red bell pepper, removed ends, seeded and cut into strips ', '2 whole tomatoes, cut into wedges ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. water (dressing) ', '4 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce (dressing) ', '2 Tbsp. Sesame Oil (Pure) (dressing) ', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste (dressing) ', '2 tsp. sugar (dressing) ', '2 Tbsp. vinegar, seasoned (dressing) ']
Procedure:
['
Combine salad dressing ingredients in a mixing bowl. Mix well and place bowl in refrigerator until cooled.
', '
Toss remaining ingredients with dressing and serve.
', '
N/A
']

Name: stewed-apples-and-carrot-medley
Ingredients: ['2 cups carrots, peeled and sliced into thin pieces ', '4 oz. celery, cut into small cubes ', '2 cups apples, green, removed skin, cored and cut into cubes ', '2 Tbsp. butter ']
Seasoning: ['1 Tbsp. Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. salt ', '1/2 tsp. sugar ', '1 tsp. Italian seasoning ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated sauce pan, melt butter. Add in remainder ingredients.
', '
Cover mixture. Bring into a boil and then simmer for 15-20 minutes.
', '
Serve at room temperature.
']

Name: spring-vegetable-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['8 oz. broccoli, florets ', '4 oz. carrots, sliced into 1/4-inch thick pieces ', '4 oz. squash, yellow, sliced in 1/2-inch thick pieces ', '4 oz. mushroom, removed ends and sliced ', '4 oz. red bell pepper, seeded, cut julienne ', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ', '3 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce ', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste ', '1 oz. water ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan with oil, stir-fry vegetables for 5 minutes.
', '
Stir in Hoisin Sauce, Premium Soy Sauce and water.
', '
Cook mixture for another five minutes. Mix well and season with black pepper.
']

Name: pickled-ginger-beef
Ingredients: ['1 whole chili, removed seeds, thinly sliced ', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '2 Tbsp. ginger, pickled, thinly sliced ', '2 stalks green onion, cut into 2-inch pieces ', '8 oz. beef sirloin steak , thinly sliced ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. sherry, dry ']
Procedure:
['
In a heated pan with oil, stir-fry beef for 3 minutes.
', '
Add in Oyster Flavored Sauce, chili and pickled ginger. Cook for 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in dry sherry. Cook for an additional two minutes. Serve.
']

Name: bacon-spinach-salad-with-plum-sauce-dressing
Ingredients: ['4 oz. spinach , cleaned', '2 oz. water chestnut , cut into small pieces', '4 slices bacon, cooked, cut into small pieces', '2 whole eggs, hard-boiled, removed shell, cut into small pieces', '2 oz. red onion , thinly sliced']
Procedure:
['
Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
', '
Drizzle plum sauce dressing over baby spinach. Serve.
']

Name: soba-noodles-with-premium-soy-vinaigrette
Ingredients: ['8 oz. cucumber, shredded ', '4 oz. carrots, shredded ', '8 oz. soba noodles, cook according to direction ', '4 oz. tomatoes, grape ', '2 Tbsp. green onions, chopped ', '2 oz. red onion ']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Sesame Oil (Pure) ', '1 tsp. ginger, minced ', '1 Tbsp. vinegar, seasoned ', '1 pinch black pepper, for taste ', '1 tsp. sugar ']
Procedure:
['
Combine Premium Soy Sauce, vinegar, Sesame Oil, ginger, pepper and sugar in a bowl and mix well.
', '
Add in the remainder ingredients and mix well.
', '
Adjust seasoning as needed.
']

Name: rosemary-flavored-soy-turkey-tenderloin
Ingredients: ['2 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '1 lb. baby carrots, peeled, cut into bias ', '1 lb. button mushrooms, cleaned and sliced ', '2 lbs. turkey, tenderloin, sliced ', '2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped ']
Seasoning: ['1 pinch salt and pepper, for taste ']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. rosemary, dried ', '1 tsp. black pepper, coarse ', '3 Tbsp. olive oil ', '2 tsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. mustard, dijion ']
Procedure:
['
Combine turkey, Premium Soy Sauce, rosemary, black pepper, olive oil, sugar and dijion mustard in a baking dish.
', '
Marinate turkey tenderloin for 10-20 minutes or until done.
', '
Bake at 350 degree temperature for 20-30 minutes. Set aside for 10 minutes.
', '
In a heated pan with oil, stir-fry baby carrots for 5 minutes. Add mushroom, salt and pepper to taste. Cook until mushroom is wilted.
', '
Slice turkey tenderloin into medallion slices.
', '
Serve with vegetables and remaining juice from the turkey tenderloin and garnish with chopped parsley.
']

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']
Procedure:
['
PREPARE THE BROCCOLI. Blanch the broccoli in hot salted water for about 2 minutes or until slightly tender and dark green. Shock it in ice water and drain thoroughly.\xa0\xa0
', '
MARINATE THE BEEF. In a small bowl, whisk together the baking soda, cornstarch, Lee Kum Kee Cooking Soy Sauce, and Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil. Pour the mixed sauces over your thinly sliced beef flank steak and let it sit for at least 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
\xa0
', '
CREATE THE SAUCE MIX. In a separate small bowl, stir together the Lee Kum Kee Panda Oyster Sauce, Chinese rice wine, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon, water, and cornstarch until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
', '
STIR-FRY. Heat a wok or a large skillet on high heat and add the oil. When a wisp of white smoke appears, toss the Lee Kum Kee Minced Garlic and marinated beef into the pan. Cook for about 1 minute, continually moving the beef slices so they are brown on all sides, but still rare. Once the beef is seared, add the broccoli and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the sauce and keep it all moving.
', '
FINISH AND SERVE. Don’t be afraid to scrape any bits off the bottom of the pan before it starts to burn. Once the sauce has turned into a nice thick glaze, serve immediately with garnishes (optional). Enjoy!
']

Name: pan-fried-catfish-sandwich

Name: spring-turkey-pasta-salad
Ingredients: ['2 cups pasta, cook according to direction, rinsed and drained ', '2 cups turkey, cooked, chopped ', '4 oz. water chestnuts , chopped ', '1/4 cup celery, diced into small pieces ', '1/2 cup red bell pepper, chopped ', '1/2 cup green onions, chopped']

Pour mixture over remaining ingredients.

Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes or until cool before serving.

Name: scallop-potatoes-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 lb. potatoes, sliced into 0.25-inch thickness']
Seasoning: ['3 cups heavy cream ', '2 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1/2 tsp. salt ', '4 oz. Mexican cheese blend ']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven at 375°C.
', '
In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except cheese.
', '
Pour mixture into a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
', '
Bake for 30 minutes.
', '
Remove foil and sprinkle with cheese
', '
Return to the oven and bake uncovered for 15 minutes or until potatoes are soft.
']

Name: stew-lamb-shank-with-chili-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['5 oz. carrots, cut into medium pieces ', '5 oz. celery, cut into medium pieces ', '1 lb. cabbage, cut in 2-inch wedges, blanch for 2 minutes, drain and keep warm ', '3 lb. lamb shank, cut into 3 pieces per shank ', '1 lb. potatoes, red, baked and cut in halves ', '4 Tbsp. flour ', '5 oz. leek, clean, remove dark green portion, cut into medium pieces ', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '1 tsp. ginger ', '2 cups chicken broth ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 tsp. salt ', '1 tsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped ', '1 Tbsp. vinegar, seasoned ']
Procedure:
['
Dust lamb shanks with flour and set aside.
', '
In a heated sauce pan with oil, brown lamb shanks 3-4 pieces at a time.
', '
Add in the rest of the ingredients except potato and cabbage.
', '
Bring mixture to a boil then simmer for 2 hours or until meat is tender.
', '
Plate stew lamb shank with baked potato and cabbage. Garnish with chopped parsley.
']

Name: oyster-flavored-roast-beef-with-steamed-vegetables
Ingredients: ['8 oz. broccoli , florets', '8 oz. carrots , peeled and cut into cubes', '8 oz. cauliflower', '2 stalks celery , roughly chopped', '4 oz. snow peas , removed ends', '8 oz. turnips , peeled and cut into wedges', '1 whole onion , chopped', '4 lbs roast beef , chuck']
Seasoning: ['4 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce', '1 pinch black pepper , for taste', '1 tsp. salt']
Procedure:
['
Bring pot of salted water into a boil. Boil vegetables until 3/4 way done and immediately rinse with cold water. Drain and set aside.
', '
Massage roast beef with Panda Oyster Flavored Sauce and 1 tsp salt.
', '
In a baking dish, layer onion, celery and roast beef. Cover and bake roast for 3 hours at 350F degree temperature.
', '
Drain juice from the roast and remove excess fat. Pour juice in a small sauce pan and add Hoisin Sauce and black pepper (flavored hoisin au-jus).
', '
Cook mixture until heated through.
', '
Slice roast beef and serve with steamed vegetables and flavored hoisin au-jus.
']

Name: spicy-eggplant-with-black-bean-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['8oz. eggplant, cut into 1/2" x 2" in length pieces', '8 oz. ground pork', '2 Tbsp. cooking oil', '1 tsp. minced ginger']

Procedure:
['
In a small bowl, combine water, cornstarch, sugar, dry sherry and Black Bean Garlic Sauce to create a sauce mixture. Mix well and set aside
', '
In a heated pan, add oil and stir fry pork until browned and well done. Add in ginger and eggplant, cook for another 5 minutes.
', '
Add sauce mixture and cook until sauce thickens.
']

Name: avocado-fish-wrap
Ingredients: ['1 pound fish fillets or fish steaks, cut into logs of 2 x 4 inches ', '1 whole avocado, peeled, seeded, cut into half inch thick pieces lengthwise ', '4 pieces romaine lettuce, leaves, washed, drained, cut into long strips half-inch thick ', '1 small red bell pepper, seeded, cut into strips ', '1 small green bell pepper, seeded, cut into strips ', '4 Tbsp. cornstarch ', '2 oz. cooking oil ', '2 pieces tortillas , flour, medium sized ']

['

', '
Roll fish fillets with cornstarch until fully covered.
', '
Sautee fish until golden brown on each side.
', '
Warm the flour tortillas in microwave. Serve with fish, avocado, bell pepper and romaine lettuce.
']

Name: pasta-salad-with-olives-and-fresh-herbs
Ingredients: ['8 oz. linguine', '4 oz. black olives, pitted and sliced', '4 oz.  green olives, pitted and sliced ', '2 Tbsp. cilantro, chopped', '2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped', '4 oz. cherry tomatoes']
Procedure:
['
Cook linguine according to packaged instructions. Drain and rinse under cold water.
', '
In a small bowl, mix together the dressing.
', '
In a large bowl, toss together all ingredients.
']

Name: stir-fried-beef-with-leek
Ingredients: ['2 oz. red bell peppers , julienne ', '4 oz. leek , soaked with water and drained , julienne', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '1 tsp. garlic ', '4 Tbsp. sherry , dry ', '1 lb. top sirloin steak , cut into strips ']
Seasoning: ['2 Tbsp. Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '2 Tbsp. Premium Soy Sauce ']

['

Add in vegetables and cook for another 2 minutes.
', '
Stir in Oyster Flavored Sauce and Soy Sauce. Mix well.
', '
Cook until heated through.
']

Name: steamed-fish-with-ginger-and-black-bean-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['1 lb. fish fillets or fish steaks , salmon, red snapper or catfish ', '1 tsp. cornstarch, dissolved with 2 oz. of water ', '1 Tbsp. oil ', '1 Tbsp. ginger, thinly sliced ', '1 stalk green onion, chopped']
Seasoning: ['2 tsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. Chili Garlic Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Sesame Oil (Pure) ', '3 Tbsp. Black Bean Garlic Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Arrange fish fillet and ginger in the steamer. Cook for 15 minutes.
', '
Sauté Chili Garlic Sauce and Black Bean Garlic Sauce for 2 minutes.
', '
Add sugar and cornstarch mixture and bring to a boil. Cook the sauce until thickened.
', '
Serve steam fish with Black Bean Garlic Sauce. Drizzle Sesame Oil and garnish with chopped green onions.
']

Name: philly-steak-with-hoisin-sauce
Ingredients: ['4 slices cheese ', 'Onion(s) thinly sliced ', '2 Tbsp. Oil', '1 lb. Sirloin beef steak (s) ', '4 pcs french rolls ']
Seasoning: ['Hoisin Sauce']
Marinade: ['2 Tbsp Hoisin Sauce', '2 Tbsp Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 Tbsp Chili Garlic Sauce', '1 Tbsp Pure Sesame Oil']
Procedure:
['
In a mixing bowl, combine 2 Tbsp. Hoisin Sauce, 2 Tbsp. Oyster Flavored Sauce, Chili Garlic Sauce and Sesame Oil.
', '
Marinate beef with mixture for 10 minutes.
', '
Sautee onions with 2 Tbsp. oil for 3 minutes. Add the remaining Hoisin Sauce and cook for another 2 minutes. Set aside.
', '
 Grill or pan fry beef 3 minutes on each side - cut beef 1/2-inch thick.
', '
Assemble philly steak with cheese and sauted onion.
', '
Drizzle Hoisin Sauce before serving.
']

Name: roasted-chicken-breast-with-mixed-berries-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. mixed berries, frozen ', '3 Tbsp. sugar ', '1 Tbsp. lemon juice ', '1 lb. chicken breast, with skin']
Marinade: ['4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Chili Garlic Sauce ', '4 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Plum Sauce']
Procedure:
['
Preheat oven to 450°C.
', '
In a small saucepot, bring mixed berries, sugar and lemon juice to boil and simmer for 2 minutes. Set aside.
', '
In a bowl, whisk together Oyster Flavored Sauce, Plum Sauce and Chili Garlic Sauce. Rub chicken breast with mixture and marinade for 30 minutes.
', '
Roast chicken for 25-30 minutes or until done.
', '
Serve with mixed berries sauce.
']

Name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Ingredients: ['10 oz. fish paste']
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']
Procedure:
['
Add Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce into the fish paste\xa0and mix well.
', '
Take a small portion (around 0.8 oz.) and knead as a ball. Repeat the step until all the mixture are done.
', '
Put the fish balls in the air-fryer. Air-fry them at 392°F for 10 minutes.
', '
Add in honey and toss well. Put it back to air-fryer again. Air-fry for 3 minutes at 356°F.
', '
Tips:
1. When cooking at home, wet your hands with water before you knead. It helps to avoid sticking your hands from the fish paste.

2. Prepare a plate with plastic wrap and brush a layer of oil. Then put the fish balls\xa0in step 2 on the plate. It helps to avoid sticking the plate from the fish balls.
']

Add vegetables, Oyster Sauce, Hoisin Sauce and sugar.

Stir the mixture until coated with sauce for 2 minutes. Add water, cook until heated through.

Pour over pan fried noodles.

Thread salmon filet and vegetables alternately.

Place pork on top of squash slices (optional).

Pat dry red snapper and toss with cornstarch.

['

Beat the eggs. Soak mushrooms till soft, drain. Slice mushrooms and set aside.
